english: Now, brothers, I entrust you to God, and to the word of his grace, which is able to build up, and to give you the inheritance among all those who are sanctified.

chokri: I mipü raka sheri. Suna sheri mori füne sheri menyü meho tamozo.
english: I coveted no one's silver, or gold, or clothing.

chokri: Izo, ketho, neko ri seba zo; thebe hini tho ala moze keshüko thipü atsü mu azü ketako sheri khrühi tayo.
english: You yourselves know that these hands ministered to my necessities, and to those who were with me.

chokri: I mha metüpü neko mese süte, dipü bide mhatholü kemezami khrühi moze sushi ti, Niepoo Jisu jüko rekra de, pükepo, “mice mhakhi keyi ceri mhapü mi ketsü thejo püku.”
english: In all things I gave you an example, that so laboring you ought to help the weak, and to remember the words of the Lord Jesus, that he himself said, 'It is more blessed to give than to receive.'"

chokri: Pü jü süko po kevasa chütüki de uko metü zü kecho thiyi.
english: When he had spoken these things, he knelt down and prayed with them all.

chokri: Uko metü krakhu ta, uko tavo Paul vo chopüyi, de pü mebosü.
english: They all wept a lot, and fell on Paul's neck and kissed him,

chokri: Pü jüpo kesü kola uko lü suphita, uko püzü ngosa mota ketosü. Uko pü züvo ru lü khasü.
english: sorrowing most of all because of the word which he had spoken, that they should see his face no more. And they accompanied him to the ship.

chokri: Paul Jisu Khrista yitho-o, acüpü apostle mipü kethi, Jihova jüyikeve la akelakre keyi.
english: Paul, a servant of Jesus Christ, called to be an apostle, set apart for the Gospel of God,

chokri: Thajü saju keseko ketholesilü popü kemütako.
english: which he promised before through his prophets in the holy Scriptures,

chokri: Jüyikeve pü Nuo David thilü vori keto.
english: concerning his Son, who was born of the seed of David according to the flesh,

chokri: Jihova Nu thitole kekulü po mese kesü, rüpü kemesa zholü, kesalü rhüla keyi yono.
english: who was declared to be the Son of God with power, according to the Spirit of holiness, by the resurrection from the dead, Jesus Christ our Lord,

chokri: Püyo ngokemezhe ngoyi m apostle tho (mhatho) sheri, kemelü jüzü püvo Israelmi kemoko metü metso keti, püza-o lano.
english: through whom we received grace and apostleship, for obedience of faith among all the nations, for his name's sake;

chokri: Nrisa Jisu Khrista cükeyi krolü bate.
english: among whom you are also called to belong to Jesus Christ;

chokri: Jihova ngokemezhe kroko Rome lü keba kemesako. Ngokemezhe po neko zübayi thenyü kezükeve Therü uko Po celü kevori m Niepo Jisu Khrista celü.
english: to all who are in Rome, beloved of God, called to be saints: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: (Kecholü kemüza kha kesü). Theralü neko metüla I Jisu Khrita zalü Jihova meza kekrelamori neko kemelü po cejü metülü vo ketala.
english: First, I thank my God through Jesus Christ for all of you, that your faith is proclaimed throughout the whole world.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova azhopozo, I arüpü züde pü Nuo jüyikeve choyi thi keta I relü mozode akecholü neko va rü kra tayozo.
english: For God is my witness, whom I serve in my spirit in the Gospel of his Son, how unceasingly I make mention of you always in my prayers,

chokri: Jihova medo lize apo thelalü arevü nvekeyithi de nekoce vori thenyü.
english: requesting, if by any means now at last I may be prospered by the will of God to come to you.

chokri: Kekrelamori I neko pesünyü bayo de rüpü mhaphrü neko zü keza kesü neko thi kethepu ketola.
english: For I long to see you, that I may impart to you some spiritual gift, to the end that you may be established;

chokri: Hunehu kemelü thi kemetü yiketo ala sheri m nekola sheri.
english: that is, that I with you may be encouraged in you, each of us by the other's faith, both yours and mine.

chokri: I nekopo semo banyümo, alipüneko m asazüjürako, I tsükenu nekoce vori nyü süyo, vele kemecu ketala kevezo, I neko dolu use hungoyi ketola; Israelmi kemoko dolu thi kebabi.
english: Now I don't desire to have you unaware, brothers, that I often planned to come to you, and was hindered so far, that I might have some fruit among you also, even as among the rest of the Gentiles.

chokri: I Greekmi, mhakeseko, Barbarian m mhasekemomiko pori pü tate.
english: I am debtor both to Greeks and to foreigners, both to the wise and to the foolish.

chokri: Hila I jüyikeve po keto Romelü kebako ceri m neko cesheri ponyüde dojüpü tazo. (Jüyikeve keku)
english: So, as much as is in me, I am eager to preach the Gospel to you also who are in Rome.

chokri: I Khrista Jüyikeve la menga ta yomo, kekrelamori süosü Jihova keku pü kelakeyi jü melü ketako metü tsüsü; Judahmiko ra süsa Greekmila sheri.
english: For I am not ashamed of the Gospel of Christ, for it is the power of God for salvation for everyone who believes; for the Jew first, and also for the Greek.

chokri: Süsü kemelüyo Jihova kemezi thapü ka kesü kemelü, süo thopü kemüta hibi, “Kejüthomi kemelüla rhüyito.”
english: For in it is revealed God's righteousness from faith to faith. As it is written, "But the righteous shall live by faith."

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova lekhu tüyo thasu keta thüma mesa kemomi m thüma kesumi kejütho thi mesu ketako m kethoo pü mezikemolü sü ketako metsu.
english: For the wrath of God is revealed from heaven against all ungodliness and unrighteousness of men, who suppress the truth in unrighteousness,

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova ju seyi keve sü thipü uko mesesü, Jihova sükopü uko mengove
english: because that which is known of God is revealed in them, for God revealed it to them.

chokri: Cejü thiyiculü semo m ngomo ketiko kha mese mengo süte. Jihova keku kechothe keta pü mengosüte, süla umezi poyi keto ba mo.
english: For the invisible things of him since the creation of the world are clearly seen, being perceived through the things that are made, even his everlasting power and divinity; that they may be without excuse.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko Jihova sezori pürhopü Jihova le zimozo, mori pü mezale siri mozo; vele uko kemüdokolü kemechüko lü: uco kedilü uko melü thi mezü pütate.
english: Because, knowing God, they didn't glorify him as God, neither gave thanks, but became vain in their reasoning, and their senseless heart was darkened.

chokri: Kesemi le sizi tayo, vele uko kenyomi thite.
english: Professing themselves to be wise, they became fools,

chokri: Uko zapozale Jihova ka m dita (celire) kehoo khi thüma, mera, khonu, m guketa tenhiko marhe thisüyo.
english: and traded the glory of the incorruptible God for the likeness of an image of corruptible man, and of birds, and four-footed animals, and creeping things.

chokri: Süla Jihova ri uko khapü uko melü kemenyü mesakemolu süve, ukopo uthiuphori jü merho tate.
english: Therefore God also gave them up in the lusts of their hearts to uncleanness, that their bodies should be dishonored among themselves,

chokri: Kekrelamori uko kemedapü Therü kethoo valede khonuko reshü, mhametü thikesüo reshü keti sülü: kechothe thejo kepüo, Amen.
english: who exchanged the truth of God for a lie, and worshiped and served the creature rather than the Creator, who is blessed forever. Amen.

chokri: Uco hihila Jihova uko khapü zhoshülü kesuko kemenyülu süve, kekrelamori uko nopuko kedepü zhokrezhongako khi süculü zhoko metsu
english: For this reason, God gave them up to vile passions. For their women changed the natural function into that which is against nature.

chokri: Kemenyü meketo thi thepumi keho kekhrükezü; thenomi kemenyü sülü: Uko khapü süculü zhokemo kethengalü süva de sazhori uko kejola ngo zoto.
english: Likewise also the men, leaving the natural function of the woman, burned in their lust toward one another, men doing what is inappropriate with men, and receiving in themselves the due penalty of their error.

chokri: Uko Jihova khapü uko kelü thinyümo ketala Jihova uko khapü kerevolü süve, thizükemoko thite.
english: Even as they refused to have God in their knowledge, God gave them up to a reprobate mind, to do those things which are not fitting;

chokri: Mhakesuko pü chu: kesu dolini kethi, mesakemo, mehomenyü, minümo kethi, mhameho shuti, kedokhri, kejüzükemo, kemeli, kedokeche, udorüshuti, salisalü meso,
english: being filled with all unrighteousness, sexual immorality, wickedness, covetousness, maliciousness; full of envy, murder, strife, deceit, evil habits, secret slanderers,

chokri: Mishemeli kethi, Jihova ngokemu, mimelükrü, (retsüketi), kemeha, kemeko, mhakesu kesa kephu, ukrü jü zü kemo,
english: backbiters, hateful to God, insolent, haughty, boastful, inventors of evil things, disobedient to parents,

chokri: Mhasetho keti, jükeve (thezhokeve) vaphro keti, kemelü kedi, kenyo, ukhrü umelü kedi, mikhrü kemo (mehomeroti),
english: without understanding, covenant-breakers, without natural affection, unforgiving, unmerciful;

chokri: Jihova zhoko uko sezori somi zümo sheri sükopo sazüzo, sizo sheri uko nüde kethi lebi mori; mipori thinode mice po meto tayo.
english: who, knowing the ordinance of God, that those who practice such things are worthy of death, not only do the same, but also approve of those who practice them.

chokri: I ketso kesüpü, Jihova püthümako khavame? Simozo, Kekrelamori I sheri Israelmipüzo, Abraham yemi, Benjamin shuye.
english: I ask then, Did God reject his people? May it never be! For I also am an Israelite, a descendant of Abraham, of the tribe of Benjamin.

chokri: Jihova mejü se keta bi pü thümako khava mozo, Jihova Israelmi metsu ketala pü uko sülü pü mezhe melo keti neko semome?
english: God didn't reject his people, which he foreknew. Or don't you know what the Scripture says about Elijah? How he pleads with God against Israel:

chokri: Niepoo püneko nsaju kepoko dokhri tele, nreshüba kori jümüve; n alebi meha keyi zote: uko akerhüro phu tate.
english: "Lord, they have killed your prophets, they have broken down your altars; and I am left alone, and they seek my life."

chokri: Vele Jihova kedithi püjü kelasüta? I minye thüna meshopü aza thimba, thüma süko nekütsü Baal marhe reshü kemoko.
english: But how does God answer him? "I have reserved for myself seven thousand men, who have not bowed the knee to Baal."

chokri: Sübide tsühi sheri ngokemezhelü thüma kropü mehakhi tazo.
english: Even so then at this present time also there is a remnant according to the election of grace.

chokri: M mhace süosü ngo kemezhe lize mhathokola mozo, sizikemosa ngokemezhe süpü ngokemezhe thimo tate.
english: And if by grace, then it is no longer of works; otherwise grace is no longer grace. But if it is of works, it is no longer grace; otherwise work is no longer work.

chokri: Süsa dipüta? Israelmi phu ketao ngoyi mote, Kedakeyi sü ngoyi, vele kekreko uko mhücete.
english: What then? That which Israel seeks for, that he didn't obtain, but the chosen ones obtained it, and the rest were hardened.

chokri: Hizide thopü meta, Jihova uko khapü kezürüpü lü süve, umhüpü ngo kemo, uko nipü seyi keho; tha ketso sitate.
english: According as it is written, "God gave them a spirit of stupor, eyes that they should not see, and ears that they should not hear, to this very day."

chokri: David sheri poti, uko ketiba (miz) po uketüba umakeyi shepü thi tate, uphe kemeshü tsü m umethi meni keti thi tate.
english: David says, "Let their table be made a snare, and a trap, A stumbling block, and a retribution to them.

chokri: Uko mhü thi mezü vate, side ukopo mhango hitate; uko chepokechothe neküsü tate.
english: Let their eyes be darkened, that they may not see. Bow down their back always."

chokri: Süsa akepo, ukophe mesü vame de retu tateme? Mole, vele uko phe kemesü yola Judah kemokopo kelakeyi ngoyi ketola zo, de ukopo uroku ketola.
english: I ask then, did they stumble that they might fall? May it never be! But by their fall salvation has come to the Gentiles, to provoke them to jealousy.

chokri: Tsühi mhace, uko retu ketala cejüo cene thita lize, uko mekre ketala cejüo mhane ta zize: ukomedochusü ketasa dithedüri uko ve tata?
english: Now if their fall is the riches of the world, and their loss the riches of the Gentiles; how much more their fullness?

chokri: Tsühi Judah kemokola I jüpoba, I Judah kemola apostlemi ketibi, I amhathopü po kemele süto.
english: For I speak to you who are Gentiles. Since then as I am an apostle to Gentiles, I glorify my ministry;

chokri: Mhace I athümako lü thipü uro kene thisü lize uko humi kelayi ri sehomo tila.
english: if by any means I may provoke to jealousy those who are my flesh, and may save some of them.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace uko kha kegü kesülü cejüo züde kezüveyi, kedipü ngoyita size, kelakeyi ngoyi toshe.
english: For if the rejection of them is the reconciling of the world, what would their acceptance be, but life from the dead?

chokri: Kekrelamori püsi keraü mesa lize püchu metü mesa zoto, püme mesa ketisa pücori mesa zoto.
english: If the first fruit is holy, so is the lump. If the root is holy, so are the branches.

chokri: Mhace pücohu jüchu kesülü neko olivebo kethomozori püsü kokema keyizo, sizi keyi züde neko pümeyo m püboyo keta ujü keveko tüpü keza tiyo.
english: But if some of the branches were broken off, and you, being a wild olive, were grafted in among them, and became partaker with them of the root and of the richness of the olive tree;

chokri: Neko pücoko metsu kemeha morive. Vele ne kemehayo tisa no pümelü bamo vele püboyo ba tizo.
english: don't boast over the branches. But if you boast, it is not you who support the root, but the root supports you.

chokri: Püco jüchu süde apüsü süyo kemayite side no poba yive.
english: You will say then, "Branches were broken off, that I might be grafted in."

chokri: Izo ketho, uko melü kemola jüchu ve; kemelüla no tha kebazo: süla no nlünveta mori ve vele meprüsa yite.
english: True; by their unbelief they were broken off, and you stand by your faith. Don't be conceited, but fear;

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova püco kethoo zori jüchuva khrü moze menuyi kemosa nkelakre mode sübi tari seho.
english: for if God didn't spare the natural branches, neither will he spare you.

chokri: Seyite, Jihova keveko m pükerüko; retu ketakoyo pü kerü: pü keveko kha neyo sü, mhace nekevelü tayi süze; molize pü neko zathü vato.
english: See then the goodness and severity of God. Toward those who fell, severity; but toward you, goodness, if you continue in his goodness; otherwise you also will be cut off.

chokri: Vele melü kemo Israelmiko tsüzori melürü tazo sheri uko khipü kemala süto, Jihova kema ketisü thiyi vezo eru.
english: They also, if they don't continue in their unbelief, will be grafted in, for God is able to graft them in again.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace neko Olive bo kethomo zori neko dathüpüvo Olive bo keveyo kemayi ta süze, süculü keta olive bo ketho püvo olive boyo kema süketo süo thiku motame?
english: For if you were cut out of that which is by nature a wild olive tree, and were grafted contrary to nature into a good olive tree, how much more will these, which are the natural branches, be grafted into their own olive tree?

chokri: Kekrelamori azüneko I nekopo kemere kethiko semo ba nyümo, kekrelamori neko netho nekelülü batari semo; Israelmi hupo thelü kerülü baketa Israel kemokopo vori tsoyi kemothe.
english: For I don't desire, brothers, to have you ignorant of this mystery, so that you won't be wise in your own conceits, that a partial hardening has happened to Israel, until the fullness of the Gentiles has come in,

chokri: Süla Israelmi metüko kelayi zoto, Hibiketi thopü meta; Zionlü Süphra keyipü vorito: side Jacob yo mhatho keshüko khi vato.
english: and so all Israel will be saved. Even as it is written, "There will come out of Zion the Deliverer, And he will turn away ungodliness from Jacob.

chokri: Hihi ajütsüjükhozo ukoyo kephomako khiva keto.
english: This is my covenant to them, When I will take away their sins."

chokri: Jüyikeveco tisa, nekola ukopo ngomu thite; vele kedakeyico tisa ukopoko la nukhrünuko zo.
english: Concerning the Gospel, they are enemies for your sake. But concerning the election, they are beloved for the fathers' sake.

chokri: Khapü tsükesü m Jihova uko cükeyico lizo kede keva thitaho.
english: For the gifts and the calling of God are irrevocable.

chokri: Kekrelamori hijütho neko Jihova kemelü mimo sir itsühi neko ngokemezhe ngoyi uko melü kemola.
english: For as you in time past were disobedient to God, but now have obtained mercy by their disobedience,

chokri: Süla tsüri uko jüzülü vori kemola neko ngokemezhe ngoyi tibi uko sheri ngokemezhe pü tsü süto.
english: even so these also have now been disobedient, that by the mercy shown to you they may also obtain mercy.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova jüzükemo khi metüko ketsübi phikemezhe sheri pü metüko tsü zoto.
english: For God has shut up all to disobedience, that he might have mercy on all.

chokri: He-i, Jihova thelü mhase m kengo mhase kemesü kerelü didüpüri neshi pü shecoko phutso keyidi, püchoko phu keyimozo.
english: Oh the depth of the riches both of the wisdom and the knowledge of God! How unsearchable are his judgments, and his ways past tracing out!

chokri: Kekrelamori sopüno Niepoo lüdoko seyi veta? Mori sopüno pü tarhoyi veta?
english: "For who has known the mind of the Lord? Or who has been his counselor?"

chokri: Mori sopüno mhakha pütsü merasüde süsa pücelü mhango sala keyiba?
english: "Or who has first given to him, And it will be repaid to him again?"

chokri: Kekrelamori mhametüko pücelü, püyo m pula zo, püpo zapozale kethio thiyite. Amen.
english: For of him, and through him, and to him, are all things. To him be the glory for ever! Amen.

chokri: Süla akhrüko, Jihova phikemezhe zalü nekoce choyo; nethi nepho khapü merhü rütho, kemesa, Therüopo yikeshü kethi, süosü neyitholü rüpü kereshü thite.
english: Therefore I urge you, brothers, by the mercies of God, to present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable to God, which is your spiritual service.

chokri: Cejülü zhorüleko züta hite, sitimole nekehü redepü nelüri kesa salayite; vekethoti mipo nengote: yikeshükethi, m vetsüketi Jihova medo bide.
english: Don't be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind, so that you may prove what is the good, well-pleasing, and perfect will of God.

chokri: Kekrelamori ngokemezhe kha aketsübi I nekoce kepo kehopüri ulüpü utho uce rekrüku ta hite, vele mhalü metsü Jihova kemelü medepü kha kesü dü.
english: For I say, through the grace that was given me, to every man who is among you, not to think of himself more highly than he ought to think; but to think reasonably, as God has apportioned to each person a measure of faith.

chokri: Kekrelamori umoyo zatho kekreti kekro kebabi, zatho metü mhatho kemha phrümo.
english: For even as we have many members in one body, and all the members don't have the same function,

chokri: Sübi uko metü Khristayo zatho kekroba, zathopüpü ti themopüyo ba.
english: so we, who are many, are one body in Christ, and individually members one of another.

chokri: Ngokemezhelü mhaphrü kekre keti kha uko tsüsü, saju kepo sheri ukemelü didüpü ba sheri südü poyi khe.
english: Having gifts differing according to the grace that was given to us, if prophecy, let us prophesy according to the proportion of our faith;

chokri: Mori yitho kethi sheri, kemetha kethilü mimetha ti sheri.
english: or service, let us give ourselves to service; or he who teaches, to his teaching;

chokri: Mori ketarholü mitarhoti sheri, kha miketsülü püpo jükemelulü khasüte; pü mikekha ketimipo menu keti, miphimezhe ketipo unüsayi de kha kesü.
english: or he who exhorts, to his exhorting: he who gives, let him do it with liberality; he who rules, with diligence; he who shows mercy, with cheerfulness.

chokri: Kekhrüpo kethüra kemo, kesu keretsü, mhakeve chotsükeyi.
english: Let love be without hypocrisy. Abhor that which is evil. Cling to that which is good.

chokri: Sazüjüra hunehu kekhrü khi hunehu khrüyite, hunehu rho kekayite.
english: In love of the brothers be tenderly affectionate one to another; in honor preferring one another;

chokri: Nelü thathi tahi, rüpülü lümü thinyü hühü bayi; Niepoo choyi thiba zote.
english: not lagging in diligence; fervent in spirit; serving the Lord;

chokri: Kemerilü rechü bazote, kemezhe zori sügüsühe bazoyi; kecho thimetü vahi.
english: rejoicing in hope; enduring in troubles; continuing steadfastly in prayer;

chokri: Mhakhapü kemesako khimo kesüko tsüba zoyi, mi meso ba zote.
english: contributing to the needs of the saints; given to hospitality.

chokri: Jopü nekemeshuko tsüte, reliphri tsüte, reshuhi.
english: Bless those who persecute you; bless, and don't curse.

chokri: Somi rechü tasheli sümüzü rechüte, somi krata sheri sümizüde krayite.
english: Rejoice with those who rejoice. Weep with those who weep.

chokri: Hunehu züde lüdo kerhüyite, ulü rekrü tahi de mizü kemhayite; renuki ketsakhumi zü hüyite. Nthonlü nve tahi.
english: Be of the same mind one toward another. Don't set your mind on high things, but associate with the humble. Don't be wise in your own conceits.

chokri: Mhakesu khi mhakesu khüpo thihi, mimhüjülü mhakeve thipü mi mengo süte.
english: Repay no one evil for evil. Respect what is honorable in the sight of all men.

chokri: Mhace thiyi ve toze no thüma metü zü kezüve hüte.
english: If it is possible, as much as it is up to you, be at peace with all men.

chokri: Akhrüko, nekhüpo thihi zote; vele khapü Jihova meri süte: kekrelamori thopü metati, “Khüpo sü azhü, I shusüto,” Niepoo side poyo.
english: Don't seek revenge yourselves, beloved, but give place to God's wrath. For it is written, "Vengeance belongs to me; I will repay, says the Lord."

chokri: Siti moli, mhace nengomumi khü meri talize mhapü püpo tiyite, theri ta süze jüpü pü mekra süte; süsü no keto meyikrapü hipü püpiyo kesü bi zoto.
english: Therefore "If your enemy is hungry, feed him. If he is thirsty, give him a drink. For in doing so, you will heap coals of fire on his head."

chokri: Mhakesupo nce kuketamoli, mhakeve po mhakesukopi kuyi moze su.
english: Don't be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.

chokri: Thüma kehopüpori habi de ukehülü mipo melüyi kesümi thitate, Khristaa yitho mipü tibi, Jihova mhatho sekemo ungo kethi yitholü michotha kethimipü tila.
english: So let a man think of us as Christ's servants, and stewards of God's mysteries.

chokri: Sülebi mori michotha kethimi kemelü kevemi ziti mipo ngoti mesü.
english: Here, moreover, it is required of stewards, that they be found faithful.

chokri: Vele ala zono neko sheco kethi sü mhakedopü zo, mori thüma kekrepo thi sheri, sizizo, I atho asheco thimo.
english: But with me it is a very small thing that I should be judged by you, or by man's judgment. Yes, I don't judge my own self.

chokri: Kekrelamori I athozono mhapüri sebamo, sizosheri I hice athi kematho bamozo, vele asheco-o sü Niepoo zo.
english: For I know nothing against myself. Yet I am not justified by this, but he who judges me is the Lord.

chokri: Süla pütü mhüjü mhapüri sheco thi hite, Niepoo vori kemothe, pü kezülü resürevapü ketako metü hala sü ketola; umelülü mharhü ketako metü kehala süto: mu süce thüma kehopü sheri Jihova chuto.
english: Therefore judge nothing before the time, until the Lord comes, who will both bring to light the hidden things of darkness, and reveal the counsels of the hearts. Then each man will get his praise from God.

chokri: Mhahikola, azüneko, I mhakhi kedepü azalü mu Apollos zalü süvato, neko lano; side nekopo haniyo mhaseyi ketola, thüma lü kerekrüpü thopü kemeta pi sümo ketola, mu neko humi utho ulükerekrü kuta mo ketola.
english: Now these things, brothers, I have in a figure transferred to myself and Apollos for your sakes, that in us you might learn not to think beyond the things which are written, that none of you be puffed up against one another.

chokri: Kekrelamori sopü nthipü mice rekrüku süta? No no bakemo pü dipü la bale ziba? Tsühi no ngoyi ta lize dipüla nthi kerekrü zapozale thibata? No ngoyi kemo pübi bateme?
english: For who makes you different? And what do you have that you didn't receive? But if you did receive it, why do you boast as if you had not received it?

chokri: Tsühi neko chupü bate, mu neko mhane bate, neko kedemi thi bate hako samode, mu akemenyü nekopo kede thita nyü kethozo, side hako sheri neko züde kedethita ketola.
english: You are already filled. You have already become rich. You have come to reign without us. Yes, and I wish that you did reign, that we also might reign with you.

chokri: Kekrelamori akelüce Jihova ha apostle miko ketsü kenutho thisü tetho ziba, dokhri va ketola ketsü kesüko; cejüo po hako pe bate, tüyo choyimi mhüjülü mu thüma mhüjülü sheri.
english: For, I think that God has displayed us, the apostles, last of all, like men sentenced to death. For we are made a spectacle to the world, both to angels and men.

chokri: Hako kenyomi thite Khrista lano, vele Khrista lano neko mhakesemi (ketsümi); ha kethathimi, neko keku miko thibate; neko therho kepümi, vele hako mipo thalice ketami thite.
english: We are fools for Christ's sake, but you are wise in Christ. We are weak, but you are strong. You have honor, but we have dishonor.

chokri: Tsü bavüdo hilü ketso hani kenani therimeri bazo mu fümene di süsa miko hani meshu mu hani keba thethiridi.
english: Even to this present hour we hunger, thirst, are naked, are beaten, and have no certain dwelling place.

chokri: Tsühi ketso sheri hako therimeri tazo, mu fübemene methu ketami thitazo, mu meshu, mu hakeba thethi sheri bamo.
english: We toil, working with our own hands. When people curse us, we bless. Being persecuted, we endure.

chokri: Mhatho thizoba, hatho habe khipü, hameshu zo sheri hako jopü sümi tsü thazo, ha methi kesüko la ha kemezhe ti püyi.
english: Being defamed, we entreat. We are made as the filth of the world, the dirt wiped off by all, even until now.

chokri: I mhahiko thopü neko kengasü keto lamo, vele aneko nekopo nekerepü seba ketola, akekhrü miko.
english: I don't write these things to shame you, but to admonish you as my beloved children.

chokri: Kekrelamori nekotho Khrista yolü kemetha nye keripü batazo sheri, siri nekopo kethi thüma kekro bamo, kekrelamori I Jisu Khrista jüyikevelü neko menu kesüla
english: For though you have ten thousand tutors in Christ, yet not many fathers. For in Christ Jesus, I became your father through the Gospel.

chokri: Süla I nekoce choyo neko asakemejimi thi yite.
english: I beg you therefore, be imitators of me.

chokri: Mhahiola I Timotheus ketsüpü nekoce süzüho, pü kematho anu zo Niepoo celü, pü azho areleko khipüvo neko po arekrayi ketola, Khrista yolü, I kehorapü zori kehucekolü mimetha ketako.
english: Because of this I have sent Timothy to you, who is my beloved and faithful child in the Lord, who will remind you of my ways which are in Christ, even as I teach everywhere in every assembly.

chokri: Tsücehi humi ukhipü kerekrü kemeko bate I nekoce tavori hoketa lüde,
english: Now some are puffed up, as though I were not coming to you.

chokri: Vele I rekri vapülü nekoce vori tato, mhace Niepoo medo lize, uko kemeko jüpo keba füko seyito, vele keku kene jü.
english: But I will come to you shortly, if the Lord is willing. And I will know, not the word of those who are puffed up, but the power.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova kede kethisü jüo zomori keku lüto.
english: For the Kingdom of God is not in word, but in power.

chokri: Neko kedipü biba? I sürü khipü nekoce vori tome, mori kekhrü khipü vorita, mu rüpülü menünu tilü ta?
english: What do you want? Shall I come to you with a rod, or in love and a spirit of gentleness?

chokri: Süla uküzü pü choyimi thi küta bi, niepo Jihova cielü küpa ngokümüzheo khi kümüchü lü hinon niecie poyo.
english: Working together, we entreat also that you not receive the grace of God in vain,

chokri: Kükrelamole Pü po kütsü “I pütü tüce n khü künyiyi te, mu külaküyi tüsonha n khrühi sü” si mba. Süla pütü küve sü tsüce hizo mo külaküyi tüso sü tsüce hi zo.
english: for he says, "At an acceptable time I listened to you, In a day of salvation I helped you." Behold, now is the acceptable time. Behold, now is the day of salvation.

chokri: Ha mipüh chokha ri thiyo mo, mipo ha yitho tha mo küto la,
english: We give no occasion of stumbling in anything, that our service may not be blamed,

chokri: Sitsüo mole mha kühopühlüri ha Jihova yitho thiyi küshümi tsü thasüyo, murümu kütsü, kümüthi, kümüzhie kütsü, tsakhu,
english: but in everything commending ourselves, as servants of God, in great endurance, in afflictions, in hardships, in distresses,

chokri: Ha küvü, thüdzüküthi, kübvü kütsü, mhatho küthi, zümo kütsü, tükhü küthi,
english: in beatings, in imprisonments, in riots, in labors, in watchings, in fastings;

chokri: kümüsa kühü, mhashe, sügüsühü, mphrü, Kümüsa Ropü, kükhrü kütho,
english: in pureness, in knowledge, in patience, in kindness, in the Holy Spirit, in sincere love,

chokri: dzütho küpo, mu Jihova küku; kümatho rinyie püh ha zaco mu ha veco,
english: in the word of truth, in the power of God; by the armor of righteousness on the right hand and on the left,

chokri: thürho mu zhoswü lü, zhopo küve mu zhopo küshü lü, hapüh mi küdo kütsümi thi, vele kedzüthomi zo,
english: by glory and dishonor, by evil report and good report; as deceivers, and yet true;

chokri: püh she kümomi thi vele she mveri, püh sa kütami thi vele he rhühbazo, müthimünyi vele müsa va mo;
english: as unknown, and yet well known; as dying, and behold, we live; as punished, and not killed;

chokri: lüzhe küpümi thi vele hanü süh tayo, mha küdimi thi vele mi kükro thipüh mhanie ve, mhapühri küdimi thi vele mha mütü batsü.
english: as sorrowful, yet always rejoicing; as poor, yet making many rich; as having nothing, and yet possessing all things.

chokri: Hehe Korinthiako, ha mhotsu niece dzüpoyo ha mülü khakhri müzho püh.
english: Our mouth is open to you, Corinthians. Our heart is enlarged.

chokri: Halü niela tsakhu mo vele nietho nielü thi tsakhu ve.
english: You are not restricted by us, but you are restricted by your own affections.

chokri: Süla no I nieko ce küpo bi niepo nie thi müyoyi noyo.
english: Now in return, I speak as to my children, you also be open wide.

chokri: Mülükümomi zü küzhotü upüh pü kürhü hite; kümatho mu kürüzhüni kükrorhü tsü dipüh ba? Mori küve mu küzüni dipüh kükrorhü tsü ba?
english: Don't be unequally yoked with unbelievers, for what fellowship have righteousness and iniquity? Or what communion has light with darkness?

chokri: Khrista mu küciedzüo ni dipüh küdzürhü tsü ba? Mori kümülüo mu mülükümoo ni dipüh kümha tsü ba?
english: What agreement has Christ with Belial? Or what portion has a believer with an unbeliever?

chokri: Mu Nyepoo kürüshüce mu thürümharhece ni dipüh dzükho ba? Kükrelamole uko rhü küta Jihova rüshüce tsüla, süo Jihova potsü “I uko lübato mu uko dülü tato mu I uko Jihova thito mu uko a thüma thito.”
english: What agreement has a temple of God with idols? For you are a temple of the living God. Even as God said, "I will dwell in them, and walk in them; and I will be their God, and they will be my people."

chokri: Süla uko dülü tapari tate, sino nie kreyi tate, Nyepoo sino poyo, mu nie müsakümoko ni hite si tsüsa I n züyi to,
english: Therefore, "'Come out from among them, And be separate,' says the Lord, 'Touch no unclean thing. I will receive you.

chokri: Mu I nieko Po thiyi to, mu nieko anu mu anupüko thiyi to, Nyepoo kürükrüthoo sino poyo.
english: I will be to you a Father. You will be to me sons and daughters,' says the Lord Almighty."

chokri: Mha hiko mütü po utsü kümüta la, akhrieko, uko thümo ri ropü ri müsakümo mütü lü uthi kümüsayi no Nyepoo Jihova khri kümüprü lü velotsüyi khe.
english: Having therefore these promises, beloved, let us cleanse ourselves from all defilement of flesh and spirit, perfecting holiness in the fear of God.

chokri: Ha yiyi te; ha mipühri küdo mo, ha mipühri thi müshü va mo, ha mipühri swu va mo,
english: Open your hearts to us. We wronged no one. We corrupted no one. We took advantage of no one.

chokri: I nieko künga ton hiko po mo; vele thadzüri nieko ce potsü nieko ha mülülü ba sühyo mu ha niezü sari rhüri to.
english: I say this not to condemn you, for I have said before, that you are in our hearts to die together and live together.

chokri: I nieko ce thüpushü no dzü poyo, I nieko la kümüko yo, I nieko la alü lu yiyo, I uko kümüzhie küyiko lüri anü phayiküho thite.
english: Great is my boldness of speech toward you. Great is my boasting on your behalf. I am filled with comfort. I overflow with joy in all our affliction.

chokri: Siyo ha Macedonia lü votsü ce thümo co kürülü ngoyi mo vele lucohico kümüzheyi, chozou mizüh kütü mu thülüo müprü ta.
english: For even when we had come into Macedonia, our flesh had no relief, but we were afflicted on every side. Fightings were outside. Fear was inside.

chokri: Sizori Jihova mi khaküvako tho mülu yo küzhoo no Titus po vori tsüla ha nüyi;
english: Nevertheless, he who comforts the lowly, God, comforted us by the coming of Titus;

chokri: Pü küvo lübi la mo vele pü nieko yo thülükülu ngoküyila ri zo, nieko a müri küba, nieko akri küba, nieko ala ulünyi kübako she küsüce anü küchüh sa zo.
english: and not by his coming only, but also by the comfort with which he was comforted in you, while he told us of your longing, your mourning, and your zeal for me; so that I rejoiced still more.

chokri: I lüsi tho küsüo nieko lü thi müzhie va zori alütsakhu tamo, vele alümüzhie ri tazo: süo pütü dopüh la zoleri nieko lü thimüshü ta tsüla.
english: For though I made you sorry with my letter, I do not regret it, though I did regret it. For I see that my letter made you sorry, though just for a while.

chokri: Tsüeno a nüte, süo nieko lü thimüshü küsü la mo, vele nieko lüzhie pün thülü küdeküyi la, nie lüzhie küthoo pü küyila, sino hala mhapühlüri nie thi müshüva kümo la.
english: I now rejoice, not that you were made sorry, but that you were made sorry to repentance. For you were made sorry in a godly way, that you might suffer loss by us in nothing.

chokri: Kükrelamole küthoo lüzhie uthi püh ulü küde khi külaküyi cholü voyiyo mu süla uro tayo mo, vele ciedzüo lüzhie no küsa püh voyo.
english: For godly sorrow works repentance to salvation, which brings no regret. But the sorrow of the world works death.

chokri: Siyo hiehe kütho lüzhie hio didü nie thi mve süshi, nie lü thi münyi püh dipü thisüshi, didüri nietho nie thi kümüziyi shi, ie nielü rüda dipü thishi, mükrü dipü thishi, mi münyü küdipü thishi, nierha thi küdipü thishi, kümüzhie dipü thishi, hi mütülü nie jomo zo kütsü tha mika süve.
english: For behold, this same thing, that you were made sorry in a godly way, what earnest care it worked in you. Yes, what defense, indignation, fear, longing, zeal, and vengeance! In everything you demonstrated yourselves to be pure in the matter.

chokri: Süla I hidzü tho küsüo mha küshü thi küvao la mo, mori püyo küshü thi küvao lari mo, vele nie hala nie lünyiyo küzho püh Jihova mhüdzülü müshe sü küto la zo.
english: So although I wrote to you, I wrote not for his cause that did the wrong, nor for his cause that suffered the wrong, but that your earnest care for us might be revealed in you in the sight of God.

chokri: Süla ha thokümülu ngoyi. Halü külu mho Titus künüo la hanü küchüsa, kükrelamole nieko mütü la püpo ulü münütshü küyi la.
english: Therefore we have been comforted. In our comfort we rejoiced the more exceedingly for the joy of Titus, because his spirit has been refreshed by you all.

chokri: I püce nieko chuhza küsüko la a po münga tamo, vele ha niece po küsüko mütü kütho tsübi, ha Titus cie nie chuh küsüko kütho tsü thasüte.
english: For if in anything I have boasted to him on your behalf, I was not disappointed. But as we spoke all things to you in truth, so our glorying also which I made before Titus was found to be truth.

chokri: Pülü püh nieko tsüsa pfü bate, nieko mütü pü dzüzü mu mükrü sai rüshü pü zü küyi la.
english: His affection is more abundantly toward you, while he remembers all of your obedience, how with fear and trembling you received him.

chokri: I mha mütü lü nie mülüyi veküta la anüri te.
english: I rejoice that in everything I am of good courage concerning you.

chokri: Süla Khrista yolü thelü hüketi dzü hu ri, thelü thokemelu dzü, mu lüsülüzhe lüno küpa huri, Ropü lüno kezüh püh kethi huri mu ngokemezhe huri neko dolü bayo.
english: If there is therefore any exhortation in Christ, if any consolation of love, if any fellowship of the Spirit, if any tender mercies and compassion,

chokri: Nekelü kemhade kekhrü pühkhrü, kelürhüh de lüpüh thiyi yo a kenüo neyo tsühyito.
english: make my joy full, by being like-minded, having the same love, being of one accord, of one mind;

chokri: Kengomu mori utho u lükerükrü de mhathitahi deri ne lü rünu sa no huniehu yi sü nece veku le lüyite.
english: doing nothing through rivalry or through conceit, but in humility, each counting others better than himself;

chokri: Silizo kehopühri netho ne rülelübi lü tahino, mi rülü ri lüyite.
english: each of you not just looking to his own things, but each of you also to the things of others.

chokri: Jisu Khrista kelüo khi nelü süpü tayite.
english: Have this in your mind, which was also in Christ Jesus,

chokri: Püe Kemenupü bi zo ri kemeda lüno Kemenupü züh kethedü le lümo
english: who, existing in the form of God, didn't consider it robbery to be equal with God,

chokri: Sivele Pü tho Püthipüh thümanu thi mu mijümi thide Pü thi müdi.
english: but emptied himself, taking the form of a servant, being made in the likeness of men.

chokri: Mu Pü thikerünu püh thüma mhügo lü thüma zhorüle bidie kesalüri dzüzüh thi no cross yo ri sasü.
english: And being found in human form, he humbled himself, becoming obedient to death, yes, the death of the cross.

chokri: Süla Kemenupü ri Pü thi mülesü mu püza thipüh metü pi thisüve.
english: Therefore God also highly exalted him, and gave to him the name which is above every name;

chokri: Kekrelamori tüyo ketako ri, cedzü ketako ri mu jükhro keta metüko ri Jisu zalü chütüketo na.
english: that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of those in heaven, those on earth, and those under the earth,

chokri: Kehopüh ri Jisu Khrista hi Niepoo zo le lüketi u talü po tsode Kemenupü u Poo po zale püyi keto na.
english: and that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

chokri: Silizo a khrüko neko a mhüngoce dzüzüo lü kebalübi mo le a kedisano süceri dzüzü lü ba müfüyi mozosü, N kelakeyio la mi khriprüh mu rüsürüsa die mhathiyite.
english: So then, my beloved, even as you have always obeyed, not only in my presence, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.

chokri: Kekrelamori Kemenupü npo Pü nü Pü medoko thizoketo na Pütho n kenhü süve.
english: For it is God who works in you both to will and to work, for his good pleasure.

chokri: Süla panyoparo mu kepali tahino mha kehopüh ri thiyite.
english: Do all things without murmurings and disputes,

chokri: Siyi yo nie cejü hio lü müzikümo mu u lü kürüzho kütako dolü mesa mu mejokühomi thi Kemenupü nunie thi bayito.
english: that you may become blameless and harmless, children of God without blemish in the midst of a crooked and perverse generation, among whom you are seen as lights in the world,

chokri: Nieko kürhühprei dzüo thüzühbei baküyi yolü Khrista zho nha apo anüyito, I kemechü püh na tata mo, mori püco kedi püh lü no mhathi ta kemo na.
english: holding up the word of life; that I may have something to boast in the day of Christ, that I didn't run in vain nor labor in vain.

chokri: Ye mhanuü a kehü hio püh nie kemelü rütho püh thi die a za mükrüh to le mha sheri a nü mu nieko mütü zü a nü zoto.
english: Yes, and if I am poured out on the sacrifice and service of your faith, I rejoice, and rejoice with you all.

chokri: Süsübi nieko nü bayi mu a züh nieko nüyi zü.
english: In the same way, you also rejoice, and rejoice with me.

chokri: Niepo Jisu tho Timothy ketsüh meze püh nieko ce süketo meri ba, silize a pori nieko metü dzu sepüh a nü yiketo na.
english: But I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to you soon, that I also may be cheered up when I know how you are doing.

chokri: Nieko dzüve lü kethoketi pü kemha püh ri bamo zo.
english: For I have no one else like-minded, who will truly care about you.

chokri: Kekrekoe Jisu Khrista la mo le u tho u meve la ta yo.
english: For they all seek their own, not the things of Jesus Christ.

chokri: Deri nieko Timothy se mve ba, püe a züh pükrü pünu bi dzüyikeve mhatho thi vori.
english: But you know the proof of him, that, as a child serves a father, so he served with me in furtherance of the Gospel.

chokri: Süna a rüle kedipüh bi toshi seyimütha I püketsüh sü keto lü ba.
english: Therefore I hope to send him at once, as soon as I see how it will go with me.

chokri: Mu I Niepoo mülü keti a tho zo ri mücho mo die nieko ce vota keto meri ba.
english: But I trust in the Lord that I myself also will come shortly.

chokri: Sizori, a sazüo, a züh die yitho thi mu Khrista thipahi thikezho, nieko dzüyi khi kevori yo mu a thathi ce a thekü kesüo Epaphroditus ketsüh püh nieko ce sü keto lü ba.
english: But I counted it necessary to send to you Epaphroditus, my brother, fellow worker, fellow soldier, and your apostle and minister to my need;

chokri: Pü ri nieko menyü phi ba, siyo pü sükeyi dzü nieko po sekeva na ri sa pü lü kemezhe ba.
english: since he longed for you all, and was very troubled, because you had heard that he was sick.

chokri: Pü mhathi shü va ketho, pü sa ta nuzo, deri Kemenupüe pü phimezhe sü, mu pü lübi mole a po ri a thü shüsamo keto na a ri phimezhe sü.
english: For indeed he was sick, nearly to death, but God had mercy on him; and not on him only, but on me also, that I might not have sorrow on sorrow.

chokri: I ri pü ketsü sünsa die khükeho thi bate, süosü nieko po ri pü ngolasü no nieko nüyi mu a po ri a lünyi mütsayiketo na.
english: I have sent him therefore the more diligently, that, when you see him again, you may rejoice, and that I may be the less sorrowful.

chokri: Süla nieko ri Niepo yolü nenüsai die pü züyite, mu thüma hikemhami rhosüte.
english: Receive him therefore in the Lord with all joy, and hold such in honor,

chokri: Kekrelamori nieko a yo thinsa die thihokebao püe thisüto le pü kehü püh kemethi lü sü, mu Khrista yithoo na sata nu zo keti na.
english: because for the work of Christ he came near to death, risking his life to supply that which was lacking in your service toward me.

chokri: Mhace neko Khrista zü rhü süta lize, mesoyo keta zhüko phute, sülü Khrista Jihova po uzalaco ba ketao.
english: If then you were raised together with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is, seated on the right hand of God.

chokri: Ne kelü (ne mhatho) ko mesoyo ketakola thite, mu cejülü keta zhüko mori.
english: Set your mind on the things that are above, not on the things that are on the earth.

chokri: Kekrelamori neko satate, mu nekerhüro Khrista yo no Jihova celü kevapü metate;
english: For you died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.

chokri: Khrista uko kehüo mhüngo thi kevori ce, süce neko sheri zapozale kethilü mimhüngo thi tato.
english: When Christ, our life, is revealed, then you will also be revealed with him in glory.

chokri: Süla nethi nepho mesa vate, cejülü kebace, keregü kerezhü, mesa kemo, thizü kemo kethiko, ukethükeho mhakesu kethi, keregü, kemeho, süko therü marhe kereshü zo tila.
english: Put to death therefore your members which are on the earth: sexual immorality, uncleanness, depraved passion, evil desire, and covetousness, which is idolatry;

chokri: Mha süko la Jihova lüda jüzü kemo nuneko vota.
english: for which things' sake the wrath of God comes on the children of disobedience.

chokri: Nekori pütühu sülü ta, mu sülü hü.
english: You also once walked in those, when you lived in them;

chokri: Vele tsühi neko süko khave, thelü kereda, lekhu mi nümo kethi, Niepoo Po merho ti, mesakemo rethi, neko talü.
english: but now you also put them all away: anger, wrath, malice, slander, and shameful speaking out of your mouth.

chokri: Hunehu yo kemeda pohi, pü mhatholü thüma kevüo khi kevala.
english: Don't lie to one another, seeing that you have put off the old man with his doings,

chokri: Mu thüma kesa thite, pü uthi kesü hü thi kesa lülü keyi mhaselü.
english: and have put on the new man, that is being renewed in knowledge after the image of his Creator,

chokri: Greek miri kremo, mori Jewmi sheri, yi kerü mori yirü kemo sheri, barbarian, Scythian mi, thejümi mu ukekha kedimi sheri kekreho; vele Khrista yo metü kemhate, mu metülü.
english: where there can't be Greek and Jew, circumcision and uncircumcision, barbarian, Scythian, bondservant, freeman; but Christ is all, and in all.

chokri: Jihova keda keyi bi khi bemene yite, mesa mu kekhrüko, uralü phi kemezheko, ketsükeve, ulü kemeko kemo, menü nu, shügüsühe.
english: Put on therefore, as God's chosen ones, holy and beloved, a heart of compassion, kindness, lowliness, humility, and perseverance;

chokri: Hunehu la mhalü ti, hunehu kejova, mhace thüma hu mi metsu ti ba lize, Khrista ne kejo va kesübi, sübi neko hunehu yo thi süte.
english: bearing with one another, and forgiving each other, if any man has a complaint against any; even as Christ forgave you, so you also do.

chokri: Mhasüko metü pi kevaphi ti kekhrü, phakesapü vetsü tso keyi.
english: Above all these things, walk in love, which is the bond of perfection.

chokri: Jihova celü thelü kereyi po ne melülü ba yite, neko cüpü sülü sükeyi la, themo püte, mu ne mi meza saite.
english: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to which also you were called in one body; and be thankful.

chokri: Khrista jüpo nelü hü yite ketsü keve nephiti, metha mu hunehu tarho, tsale mu lithi rüpü tsaleko ne melülü kekhrü ba de tsale thipü Niepoo ce süte.
english: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly; in all wisdom teaching and admonishing one another with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your heart to the Lord.

chokri: Ne mhatho mori jülü she dipü thi sheri Jisu zalü thi zote, kethezü pü Jihova tsüte, pü u Po zoti la.
english: Whatever you do, in word or in deed, do all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God the Father, through him.

chokri: Micemi neko nenopu neko khro tayite, Niepoo celü süo pü zotila.
english: Wives, be in subjection to your husbands, as is fitting in the Lord.

chokri: Mi nopu neko, necemi neko khrüyi te, mu uko metsu khu mezü ta hite.
english: Husbands, love your wives, and don't be bitter against them.

chokri: Natsiko mha metülü nekrü neko jüzü thite, kekrelamori Niepoo hio pünü zo tila.
english: Children, obey your parents in all things, for this pleases the Lord.

chokri: Mipo neko ne nuneko lüva kereda hite, molize uko umelü thepu mo tato.
english: Fathers, don't provoke your children, so that they won't be discouraged.

chokri: Mi thekümiko mha metülü ne niepomi füzü thiyi te, uthi upho zhorele bi, umhüngoce lebi mo, thüma nü medo kethiko bita mode, vele umelü pü lebi khi, Jihova mpe tilü.
english: Servants, obey in all things those who are your masters according to the flesh, not just when they are looking, as men-pleasers, but in singleness of heart, fearing God.

chokri: Ne mhakehopü thi sheri, nenüde thite, Niepoo lano zitilü, mu thüma lano zi mode.
english: And whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord, and not for men,

chokri: Niepoo celü zhokhro kalü ngoyi keto seba ketabi, kekrelamori neko Niepoo Khrista choyi thiba.
english: knowing that from the Lord you will receive the reward of the inheritance; for you serve the Lord Christ.

chokri: Vele kekri keti mhatho kethiko kekri tilü mhangoyi to; mu thüma celü thechuthero ngoyi ho.
english: But he who does wrong will receive again for the wrong that he has done, and there is no partiality.

chokri: Hice uko kepo keba hiohi metü rhükesa kesüo zo, uko thevo kerekrü püba, pü tüyo kekuthoo kedeba püza (pübo püza) laco bate.
english: Now in the things which we are saying, the main point is this. We have such a high priest, who sat down on the right hand of the throne of the Majesty in the heavens,

chokri: Kereshübalü choyithi, kereshüce kethoo thebe pü thi kemo, Niepoo tho thikesüo.
english: a minister of the sanctuary, and of the true tabernacle, which the Lord pitched, not man.

chokri: Kekrelamori thevo kezhoo kehopüri püpo rütho khasü ketola pü kedasü, süla thümo hio püpo thisü moze kesu rütho ne.
english: For every high priest is appointed to offer both gifts and sacrifices. Therefore it is necessary that this high priest also have something to offer.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhaceno pü cejülü thüma lize, pü thevo thilho, thevomiko rütho khakesü thezho püba.
english: For if he were on earth, he would not be a priest at all, seeing there are priests who offer the gifts according to the law;

chokri: Thaka kesü tüyo pükhri püzo Jihova (Jihova) Moses mese kesü, pü jüfüce methüsü toli kezü tülü, pete side posü, “cejütuyo pühüko thapü n meka kesübi no metüko tsübi thi süte” zisü.
english: who serve a copy and shadow of the heavenly things, even as Moses was warned by God when he was about to make the tabernacle, for he said, "See, you shall make everything according to the pattern that was shown to you on the mountain."

chokri: Vele tsühi yitho ve rekriku püpo ngoyite, jükho veku keta thedolü vetho pü thisü jü phrapü kemeta veku tio yo thi kesü.
english: But now he has obtained a more excellent ministry, by so much as he is also the mediator of a better covenant, which has been enacted on better promises.

chokri: Mhace jükho therao kekriti di lize, süsasü kenao phusamo sheri ve.
english: For if that first covenant had been faultless, then no place would have been sought for a second.

chokri: Kekrelamori kekri keba ngoyi ketala, püpo kesü, “hihe, pü tüpü vori züho, Niepoo posü I jükho kesapü Isreal cekro züde kefükho tato, mu Judah cekro sheri.
english: For finding fault with them, he said, "Behold, the days come," says the Lord, "That I will make a new covenant with the house of Israel and with the house of Judah;

chokri: Thajü jükho I uko potsaneko zü thikesü, I uko Egypt cejülü kebace uko bece püpra kesü tülü kethi jükhoo kemo, kekrepü, kekrelamori uko jükho süo zü tamo ketala mu I uko saphrita mote,” Niepoo poyo.
english: Not according to the covenant that I made with their fathers, In the day that I took them by the hand to lead them out of the land of Egypt; For they didn't continue in my covenant, And I disregarded them," says the Lord.

chokri: Kekrelamori I jükho hiohi pütü hisalü Isreal cekro zü thi tato; Niepoo poyo, I a thezhoko khapü u kelülü sü tato mu uko melü kolü thosü tato; mu I thüma Rüo thito mu uko ala thüma kropü thi tato (athüma thitato).
english: "For this is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel. After those days," says the Lord; "I will put my laws into their mind, I will also write them on their heart. I will be to them a God, And they will be to me a people.

chokri: Mu uko usüzanumi metha mo tato, mu thümako sheri utho usazüjürako methamo tato, po kesü Niepoo seyite, kekrelamori uko metü ase ketala, kenithoo tavo kezhothoo ketso.
english: They will not teach every man his fellow citizen, Every man his brother, saying, 'Know the Lord,' For all will know me, From the least of them to the greatest of them.

chokri: Kekrelamori I uko mezikemoko phimezhe phisü tato, mu uko kephomako, uko mesa kemo kejokemuko I rekra samo tato.
english: For I will be merciful to their unrighteousness. I will remember their sins and lawless deeds no more."

chokri: Pü sülü po kesü, jükho kesapü, pü thera thi kevü süve; tsühi süo cereta mu dita keto kerede süte.
english: In that he says, "A new covenant," he has made the first old. But that which is becoming old and grows aged is near to vanishing away.

chokri: A züneko, mi kükro kümüthami thi hi, kükrelamole u mi müthao kütsüko kütso mürühku kütosheba küta la.
english: Let not many of you be teachers, my brothers, knowing that we will receive heavier judgment.

chokri: U mütüh mha kükrolü kükri tayo, mhanuü mi pühne pü dzüpolü kükrio moleo, pü vetsü kütsümite, pü umo photüh ri kükhayi ve.
english: For in many things we all stumble. If anyone doesn't stumble in word, the same is a perfect man, able to bridle the whole body also.

chokri: Mha kütsüne püh khi gura ta khayi kütace pü u dzüzüyi yo, side pü resü u müdolü voyiyo.
english: Indeed, we put bits into the horses' mouths so that they may obey us, and we guide their whole body.

chokri: Lüsüte, ru tho zhophi bari tükhra khrade po hüpü tazo ri ru küthomi ru küthosüh kütsüne püh püh ru repüh pü müdo co voyiyo.
english: Behold, the ships also, though they are so big and are driven by fierce winds, are yet guided by a very small rudder, wherever the pilot desires.

chokri: Sükümha u müyi ri u moyo zatsüh pühzo, vele kümüha swü kütsü poyi yo, lüsüte, me ne püh yolü kütsa küdithüdü ri tovayo mu!.
english: So the tongue is also a little member, and boasts great things. See how a small fire can spread to a large forest!

chokri: U müyi ri me pühzo, u mo yolü zatsüh dolü umüyi-e küphoma cejülü tate. Süo umo mütü thi mürho vayo. Mu u kühüzhorüle zho mütü tovayo, süo meza meo lü tovayo.
english: And the tongue is a fire. The world of iniquity among our members is the tongue, which defiles the whole body, and sets on fire the course of nature, and is set on fire by Gehenna.

chokri: Thümae thi müra, guküta khonu mu dzüküzholü küta lümi kükhayi ve, mu thümae süko kükha vozü zo.
english: For every kind of animal, bird, creeping thing, and thing in the sea, is tamed, and has been tamed by mankind.

chokri: Vele mipüh ri umüyi kükhayi mozo, süsü müyhumüzhe küta mhaküshü püh zo mu küsa rüh tshuzo
english: But nobody can tame the tongue. It is a restless evil, full of deadly poison.

chokri: Süo pühu Poo mu Nepoo tshuyo mu süo püh Jihova rhilü thiküyi thüma ri rüswü tayo.
english: With it we bless our God and Father, and with it we curse men, who are made in the image of God.

chokri: Tapühlü jopüh mi kütsü mu mi rüswü kütsü ri paiyo. A züneko, mhahiko hizi zü mozo.
english: Out of the same mouth comes forth blessing and cursing. My brothers, these things ought not to be so.

chokri: Dzüpra cepühlü dzüsi mu dzükhu pai ve me?
english: Does a spring send out from the same opening fresh and bitter water?

chokri: A züneko, chüdühbo yolü Olive she mori khubero yo chüdüh zhüyi ve me? Küza dzülü dzüsi krüpayo mo.
english: Can a fig tree, my brothers, yield olives, or a vine figs? Thus no spring yields both salt water and fresh water.

chokri: Ne dolü somine mhashe mu mhaco mhala sheyo? Pü po kühü zhorüle küve süo mününu kütsü mhashe yolü küvo mhatho tha mi kasüte.
english: Who is wise and understanding among you? Let him show by his good conduct that his deeds are done in gentleness of wisdom.

chokri: Vele ne lülü mi ngo uro swü kütsü mu utho uzhozhü lüphüh kütsü baleo süsüla kümüha hi mu küthoo püh kümüda thiva hi.
english: But if you have bitter jealousy and selfish ambition in your heart, don't boast and don't lie against the truth.

chokri: Si kütsü mhasheo müsoyolü kimo mu Ropü ceco mo, vele cejüo ceco muthürüküshü ceco zo.
english: This wisdom is not that which comes down from above, but is earthly, sensual, and demonic.

chokri: Kükrelamole mi ngo uro kütsü mu utho uzhozhü külü kübara kübvüküli mu mhaküshü dolümi bayo kütsüla.
english: For where jealousy and selfish ambition are, there is confusion and every evil deed.

chokri: Vele müsoyolü küki mhashee thürao müsa, süsa küzüküve, uzhoküve, küdzüzüyi kürüyi, mi phikümüzhe tshu küpü mu u mhatho she küzhü, unü shemükre kümo mu küthüzaküthüra kümo zo.
english: But the wisdom that is from above is first pure, then peaceful, gentle, reasonable, full of mercy and good fruits, without partiality, and without hypocrisy.

chokri: Küzüveo kütsümi küzüve de kümatho she lüsüyo.
english: Now the fruit of righteousness is sown in peace by those who make peace.

chokri: Dipühla ne dolü küzhe mu küpali kütsü sütayo? Ne münyü yolü ne dolü küzhe bata mo me?
english: Where do wars and fightings among you come from? Don't they come from your pleasures that war in your members?

chokri: Ne mha münyüyo vele süko bamo. Süla mi dokhriyo, mu mha mühoyo, vele ngoyi yomo. Süla ne küzhe mu küpaliyo. Sin ne ngoyi mo, kükrelamole ne choyo mo.
english: You lust, and don't have. You kill, covet, and can't obtain. You fight and make war. You don't have, because you don't ask.

chokri: Ne choyo siri ngoyiyo mo, kükrelamole ne ngo küyi püh ne nü ne nyüko thinyüsa de cho küzüo choyo mo.
english: You ask, and don't receive, because you ask with wrong motives, so that you may spend it for your pleasures.

chokri: Kürügü kürüzhümiko! cejüo zü khretho küthie Jihova ngomvu zo kütsü she mo me? Süla kühopühri cejüo zü khretho küthimi pütho püpüh Jihova mürhami thitayo.
english: You adulterers and adulteresses, don't you know that friendship with the world is enmity with God? Whoever therefore wants to be a friend of the world makes himself an enemy of God.

chokri: Mori Ropü khapüh uyolü süküvao uroküne münyü Kütholisi po küsü kümüchü püh zo kütsü lüyo me?
english: Or do you think that the Scripture says in vain, "The Spirit who lives in us yearns jealously"?

chokri: Sileri pü ngokümüzhe khamükro süyo. Süla Kütholüsi po kütsü, Jihova kümüko kütsümi müsüh thiyo, ngokümüzhe püh rünusai kütsümi tsüyo.
english: But he gives more grace. Therefore it says, "God resists the proud, but gives grace to the humble."

chokri: Ne khapüh Jihova tsüyi. Thürüküshü müsüh thiyi. Sileo pü ne thürhü tato,
english: Be subject therefore to God. But resist the devil, and he will flee from you.

chokri: Jihova müno voyi, sio Pü ri ne müno voyi to. Vajokütako, ne be thikümüsayi, lü künako ne lü thikümüsayi.
english: Draw near to God, and he will draw near to you. Cleanse your hands, you sinners; and purify your hearts, you double-minded.

chokri: Ne thükri thiyi, nelü kümüzheyi mu kraite, ne künyüpüh kükra thiyi mu ne künü po thüjüküzü thita te.
english: Lament, mourn, and weep. Let your laughter be turned to mourning, and your joy to gloom.

chokri: Nepoo mhüdzülü netho ne thipüh nünusai sileo Pü ne müsü süto.
english: Humble yourselves in the sight of the Lord, and he will exalt you.

chokri: A züneko, huniehu thahi, kühopühri pü zümi tha mori lü müjo leo thüzhoo tha mu thüzhoo müjo bate, thüzho müjo taleo thüzhoo thi mu zü kümomi te mu thüzhoo cope küthimi te.
english: Don't speak against one another, brothers. He who speaks against a brother and judges his brother, speaks against the law and judges the law. But if you judge the law, you are not a doer of the law, but a judge.

chokri: Thüzho kha küsüo mu copeo mipüh lübi zo. Süo thono küla süyive mu müka variyi ve. Vele n zanuo lü müjo kütsüo no sopüh mu?
english: Only one is the lawgiver, who is able to save and to destroy. But who are you to judge another?

chokri: Tsü rünisüphi, nekoe “Tha mori sühdo uko rüna lulü mori hiolü vo de tüce püh sülü hü no hethoheli thi de prayito,” süzi poyo.
english: Come now, you who say, "Today or tomorrow let's go into this city, and spend a year there, trade, and make a profit."

chokri: Sin sühdo dipüh bi tosi neko süo shemo. Ne kühü hi dipüh-ah? Ne thüzüh mhü u mhüngo thi masü de ditayo kütsü kro püh zo.
english: Whereas you don't know what your life will be like tomorrow. For what is your life? For you are a vapor, that appears for a little time, and then vanishes away.

chokri: Si kütao mole “Nepoo müdo leo uko rhüba de mha hio mori luo thito,” neko süzi pote.
english: For you ought to say, "If the Lord wills, we will both live, and do this or that."

chokri: Süsübi, ne kümako mu kümüha kümave tayo, Kümüha küta süko mütü kükri,
english: But now you glory in your boasting. All such boasting is evil.

chokri: Kühopühri thiküzüo she zori thi moleo, pü phoma tazo.
english: To him therefore who knows to do good, and doesn't do it, to him it is sin.

chokri: A kekhrümiko, I tsühi lesitho kesü kenao khapü neko ce sü züho, I nekolü kemesa nekopo rekra sala sü ketola.
english: This is now, beloved, the second letter that I have written to you; and in both of them I stir up your sincere mind by reminding you;

chokri: Nekopo hi mhüjü saju kepo kemesa jüko lü menu ba ketola, mu apostle kethi hako jükha kesü Niepoo kelakeyio.
english: that you should remember the words which were spoken before by the holy prophets, and the commandments of us, the apostles of the Lord and Savior:

chokri: Neko semo kesu thera thoo thelaco mha krünyü zoti kropü utho ukemenyü lü tavo tato.
english: knowing this first, that in the last days mockers will come, walking after their own lusts,

chokri: Uko po keta, Pü sala vori keto jükhakesü dipü ceba? Kekrelamori uponeko züzü ketako, cejü thi keyi lüvo tha ketso mha metüko sizi tazo.
english: and saying, "Where is the promise of his coming? For, from the day that the fathers fell asleep, all things continue as they were from the beginning of the creation."

chokri: Kekrelamori uko utho umedolü mhasemo tate, Jihova la tüko thajütho lazo, cejü sheri jüpi mu jükhro tha lazo.
english: For this they willfully forget, that there were heavens from of old, and an earth formed out of water and amid water, by the word of God;

chokri: Sizi ketala jüde po sütüce mha mekava.
english: by which means the world that then was, being overflowed with water, perished.

chokri: Tüko mu cejü tsü keba hiko jüsüo po meka va ketola meshu pü kemeta melü thüva ketola;
english: But the heavens that now are, and the earth, by the same word have been stored up for fire, being reserved against the day of judgment and destruction of ungodly men.

chokri: Vele akekhrüko, mhapüla neko mhasemo bata hite, tüsozho pü u Niepoo la tetse thenye bi, mu tetse thenye tüsozho pünha bizo.
english: But don't forget this one thing, beloved, that one day is with the Lord as a thousand years, and a thousand years as one day.

chokri: Niepo metsü tamozo pü jü kha kesü kola, humi kelü metsü ba keta bi sheri, vele uko la sügü sühe mecho kebazo, kehopü po sheri kata nyü kemola, vele metü po sheri thelü rede keyi kemenyü la.
english: The Lord is not slow concerning his promise, as some count slowness; but is patient with us, not wishing that any should perish, but that all should come to repentance.

chokri: Vele Niepoo kevori tüsozho sü tüzülü keregomi kevori bi zoto; süce tüko ufü kemere thide di tato, mu mha sülü ketako lü thiri ketala zho tato, mu cejü sheri mu mhatho sülü keba khü thü vato.
english: But the day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night; in which the heavens will pass away with a great noise, and the elements will be dissolved with fervent heat, and the earth and the works that are in it will be burned up.

chokri: Mha hiko metü zü dita keto seba ketabi, thüma mipü dipü thiti mesü sheri uzho urele ujüpo ujüli (rethifü) kemesa mu ukehü mesade hü keyi.
english: Therefore since all these things are thus to be destroyed, what manner of persons ought you to be in holy living and godliness,

chokri: Pe meri keba Niepoo kevori tüsozho kerekrilü, tüko melilü zü di tato, mu mha sülü kebako lüri ketala zho tato, süopo vori mezeta keto fü bame?
english: looking for and earnestly desiring the coming of the day of God, by reason of which the heavens being on fire will be dissolved, and the elements will melt with fervent heat?

chokri: Sizosheri pü popü kemeta jü uko tü kesa mu cejü kesa füba sülü kemezimi hü ketola.
english: But, according to his promise, we look for new heavens and a new earth, in which dwells righteousness.

chokri: Süla akekhrümiko, neko mhasüko meri keba bi menu de bate püponeko kezüve keba ngoyi ketola, thece kedi mu theku ne kemo.
english: Therefore, beloved, seeing that you look for these things, be diligent to be found in peace, without blemish and blameless in his sight.

chokri: U Niepoo pülü cho keba sü kelakeyi zo, uko sazüjürao Paul mhase khapü ketsü bi pü lesi thopü neko tsüsü te.
english: Regard the patience of our Lord as salvation; even as our beloved brother Paul also, according to the wisdom given to him, wrote to you;

chokri: Pü lesitho kesü metülü pü mha hiko po, sükolü mhahu seyi kerü ba, mhasekemoko la, mu ulü krokrü kemokola, uko lesitho kesü kekreko yo sheri sübi tayo, uko tho umeka ve.
english: as also in all of his letters, speaking in them of these things. In those are some things hard to be understood, which the ignorant and unsettled twist, as they also do to the other Scriptures, to their own destruction.

chokri: Ne akekhrümiko, neko hi mhüjü mha hiko semu lü bate, uceri tate molize neko sheri keretseko po ne ketse pü tata ri ve tila, kekritilü vo keta, ne kemelü kethothi kebalü retu tari semo tila.
english: You therefore, beloved, knowing these things beforehand, beware lest, being carried away with the error of the wicked, you fall from your own steadfastness.

chokri: Vele ngokemezhelü mema bate, u Niepoo Jisu Khrista mhaselü; püpo tsühi zapozale kethi mu kecho sheri kenenilü thite, Amen.
english: But grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. To him be the glory both now and forever. Amen.

chokri: Jisu Khrista cieta-o mü Jakob sazüwo Judah no khapüh kumünupü u Po-u tho thimu shieyiküta mu Jisu Khrista zalü khapü müta küta ciyikütako cie küshü.
english: Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ, and brother of James, to those who are called, sanctified by God the Father, and kept for Jesus Christ:

chokri: Ngokümüzhie nieko kütsü, vetho kükhrü samükro shüte.
english: Mercy to you and peace and love be multiplied.

chokri: A kükhrüko, müthi kulaküyi dzüh a künü mütü süh die thopüh nieko cie küshü mü süo nieko cie thoshünyi bou kücü süo nie tarhopüh kümülü lü ba-i küto thadzü vapüh kümüsako cie shü küvao zo.
english: Beloved, while I was very eager to write to you about our common salvation, I was constrained to write to you exhorting you to contend earnestly for the faith which was once for all delivered to the saints.

chokri: Kükrelamoli thüma humi mükhre guh udolü lü küta la; süko sazho dzüh thadzü thopüh müta ta. Süko kütho küthi mamo, kümünupü ngokümüzhie küdiepüh kürüyolü shüküvako: Nyiepoo u kümünupü püh zo mü Nyiepoo Jisu Khrista pha kümoko zo.
english: For there are certain men who crept in secretly, even those who were long ago written about for this condemnation: ungodly men, turning the grace of our God into lasciviousness, and denying our only Master, God, and Lord, Jesus Christ.

chokri: I süna thadzü nieko shievoküta dibin Nyepoo Egypt mi tüjülü thüma kropüh külayi, mu mülükümoko müka küshü nieko po rükralayi nyite.
english: Now I desire to remind you, though you already know this, that the Lord, having saved a people out of the land of Egypt, afterward destroyed those who didn't believe.

chokri: Süsa tülü choyimi kropüh thadzü u tho u küzho süh bayi mota die uko tho u batü-o kha küvako püe süko khapüh küzü khrikhrolü küchothe phapüh kütsokücü tüso küzho-u khü bata.
english: Angels who didn't keep their first domain, but deserted their own dwelling place, he has kept in everlasting bonds under darkness for the judgment of the great day.

chokri: Sodom mü Gomorrah ni bin rüna lüco kübako uzho u rüle kümha utho u khapüh kükhrüküzu cülü shü, süsa thüma zhokümo kürüzhüko thi ta tie. Süna küchothe meza lü sazho ngoi die thakapuh thipüh batazo.
english: Even as Sodom and Gomorrah, and the cities around them, having, in the same way as these, given themselves over to sexual immorality and gone after strange flesh, are set forth as an example, suffering the punishment of eternal fire.

chokri: Süsü bin müsakümo u mhokümako uthi upho va mürho umhü küzhomi mütü mü zapozalie küthimishie krenyi ta yo.
english: Yet in like manner these also in their dreaming defile the flesh, despise authority, and slander celestial beings.

chokri: Thadzü Michael tülü choyi küzhoo thonu thürüküshüo zü no Moses mo küso die küpali kücülü püh müjo mpe ta die “Niepoo tho n müjo to” shita.
english: But Michael, the archangel, when contending with the devil and arguing about the body of Moses, dared not bring against him an abusive condemnation, but said, "May the Lord rebuke you!"

chokri: Dei hiko mhapühyi shiekümo zo shie-yi krenyita o, hikoe u lulu shieküba lüshie u zho küshü khonu bi die sükola utho katao.
english: But these speak evil of whatever things they don't know. What they understand naturally, like the creatures without reason, in these things are they destroyed.

chokri: Süko cie-i kükrelamoli pühnieko Kain cholü vo mu zhokhro ngoi kütana tashü Balaam kükriküta dzü shie-i zei mu Korah nuko punieko mhuküzhomi dzü zimo küsülü katsota.
english: Woe to them! For they went in the way of Cain, and ran riotously in the error of Balaam for hire, and perished in Korah's rebellion.

chokri: Thüma hikohi nieko kükhrü tühü küthicie nieko zü hikücülü kürhodapü küta kropüh tüku kükhüko mpie modie u tho u va phuti-o kücükro, tükhra po hüshüküta kümhüko dzüshie ta kümo, tüsicie sü püshie küdi küsa sai sa kücü pü mieko chieluzo küva sübo kropüh.
english: These are hidden rocky reefs in your love feasts when they feast with you, shepherds who without fear feed themselves; clouds without water, carried along by winds; autumn leaves without fruit, twice dead, plucked up by the roots;

chokri: Utho ula mulula zoküto dzüküzho raphü zokuzhü kropüh küchothe tüzü bu kücü khapüh uko muri taküta rühu sei ta küzhü thünyie kropüh zo
english: wild waves of the sea, foaming out their own shame; wandering stars, for whom the blackness of darkness has been reserved forever.

chokri: Adam zolü hüküpa pho thünao Enoch sadzü küshie dzü po die Heyi! Nyepoo pu kümüsako nyie küri züh vo.
english: About these also Enoch, the seventh from Adam, prophesied, saying, "Behold, the Lord came with ten thousands of his holy ones,

chokri: Shishie-i püh thüma mütüko kütsoto mu uko kütholükümo mhatho thiküvako, uko kütholükumo thümako, süsa kütholükümo küphomako pu zo dzüküre poküva mütü küjo thashü kato.
english: to execute judgment on all, and to convict all the ungodly of all their works of ungodliness which they have done in an ungodly way, and of all the hard things which ungodly sinners have spoken against him."

chokri: Thüma hiko unümosüdie pacü pano mü künotao küzüko zo. Uko ta lü dzüpo khobou ta cüzo. Uko uko küpa ngoküyi lüdie mirho ta-o cüzo.
english: These are murmurers and complainers, walking after their lusts (and their mouth speaks proud things), showing respect of persons to gain advantage.

chokri: Dei a kükhrüko nieko Nyepo Jisu Khrista Apostelko thadzü po küshü dzüko rükrashüte.
english: But you, beloved, remember the words which have been spoken before by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Süko nieko cie po küzü pütü thülatso thüma kütholükümo u münyi utho u müdo thikütami küthükrezo kücü kropüh süto.
english: They said to you that "In the last time there will be mockers, walking after their own ungodly lusts."

chokri: Thüma süko mi püphoküta kropüh zo, uko thümo mhashie sa ropü di.
english: These are they who cause divisions, and are sensual, not having the Spirit.

chokri: Dei a kükhrüko nieko Kümüsa Ropüo lü choba die nieko kümülü kümüsa thoo zalü ve kühü ma ma zo yi te.
english: But you, beloved, keep building up yourselves on your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Nietho niekhapüh u Jihova kükhrülü bayi mü küchothe kürhero ngoyi küto la u Nyepo Jisu cielü küpa ngo kümüzhie khüba zote.
english: Keep yourselves in the love of God, looking for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ to eternal life.

chokri: Nieko humi ula kre ba ma? Süko ngo müzhie yite.
english: On some have compassion, making a distinction,

chokri: Soo kükreko meza lü tüshüpayi die külayi, u thi u pho la ukhü unie rütsonyieko va murho küvako rutsi-i zo yi te.
english: and some save, snatching them out of the fire with fear, hating even the clothing stained by the flesh.

chokri: Cüsa niephie müsükütolü niepo thayi kütola mü niepo jota modie püh tho zalie thikütolü u nüthori küto na no.
english: Now to him who is able to keep them from stumbling, and to present you faultless before the presence of his glory in great joy,

chokri: U kümünupü uko külakiyi-o püh lübi mhashie, Pühpo cü mü küchothie zapo zalie küdie mü kukuo thiyi te. Amen.
english: to God our Savior, who alone is wise, be glory and majesty, dominion and power, both now and forever. Amen.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi pü kiri zü I ngo, u thüla kedi kece ce cabi m ropha kezhopü pübelü ta
english: I saw an angel coming down out of heaven, having the key of the abyss and a great chain in his hand.

chokri: Fükera tüpü phava, püza tenhi, therü kerüo, Satan, tütse nye pü ro pü bata.
english: He seized the dragon, the old serpent, which is the devil and Satan, who deceives the whole inhabited earth, and bound him for a thousand years,

chokri: Pü kehüpü u thülakedi kececelü süva, de khapü mbata, de mohor vüva, püposhuyeko kedo sa moketola, tütse nye pü tsoo kemothe; süsa pütü dopü pü hesüto.
english: and cast him into the abyss, and shut it, and sealed it over him, that he should deceive the nations no more, until the thousand years were finished. After this, he must be freed for a short time.

chokri: I kedeba kekrongo, thüma sükoyo kebako ri, uko ne keti sü; thüma Jisu la mipo upi dothü kevako rüpü, therü jüla, m khonu marhe reshü kemoko, mori uko tükhayo püzasi thopü kemeko, ubeyori; uko Jisu Khrista züde tütse nye pü kedethi hü to.
english: I saw thrones, and they sat on them, and judgment was given to them. I saw the souls of those who had been beheaded for the testimony of Jesus, and for the word of God, and such as didn't worship the beast nor his image, and didn't receive the mark on their forehead and on their hand. They lived, and reigned with Christ for the thousand years.

chokri: Veli kesami kekreko tütse nye pü tsoi kemothe rhü sala mo. Hihi, rhülakesü kerao.
english: The rest of the dead didn't live until the thousand years were finished. This is the first resurrection.

chokri: Rhülakesü kerao lü uza kemenemi rukutho; sümikoyo kesa kenao ukeku bamote, veli uko Jihova m Khrista pethi kezhoko (thevoko) thi ta to, uko püzü tütse nyepü kede thi ta to.
english: Blessed and holy is he who has part in the first resurrection. Over these, the second death has no power, but they will be priests of God and of Christ, and will reign with him one thousand years.

chokri: Tütse nyepü tso ketasa Satan he sütato, pü thejü celü no.
english: And after the thousand years, Satan will be released from his prison,

chokri: Pü cejü zada zapü lü vode shuyeko kedo to, Gog & Magog (Russia & Aermong) de uko züvo kengu süde theri thi keto la; phri phai kho thito, tüsünyo bi.
english: and he will come out to deceive the nations which are in the four corners of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them together to the war; the number of whom is as the sand of the sea.

chokri: Uko cejü methi ketso vo, de kemesako hu lüyita, kenü nadeo risa; me tülü Jihova celü kiri de süko thüva.
english: They went up over the breadth of the earth, and surrounded the camp of the saints, and the beloved city. Fire came down out of heaven from God, and devoured them.

chokri: Therükesuo mikedoketo-o kehüpü meza lü m metsathi lü süva, khonuo ri m kemeda saju kepoo risa de tüso tüzü kechothe methi menita.
english: The devil who deceived them was thrown into the lake of fire and sulfur, where the beast and the false prophet are also. They will be tormented day and night forever and ever.

chokri: I kedeba kezho kemega pü ngo m süyo keba mao ri; uko keba thi ri ngosamota.
english: I saw a great white throne, and him who sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away. There was found no place for them.

chokri: Kesamiko kezhomiri ketsümiri Jihova mhüjü lü tha; lesidako hasü, lesida kekrepüri sa ho sü, hio kerhü lesi; kesamiko ne keti tsü thopü meta, uko mhatho khücethide.
english: I saw the dead, the great and the small, standing before the throne, and they opened books. Another book was opened, which is the book of life. The dead were judged out of the things which were written in the books, according to their works.

chokri: Jü kezhori kesami pülü ketako kha süva, kesao ri m mezari thüma sade sülü ketako khasü va; uko mi pü pü de umhatho khü cesü thi uko jünyo cosü.
english: The sea gave up the dead who were in it. Death and Hades gave up the dead who were in them. They were judged, each one according to his works.

chokri: Kesao m meza ni kehü pü mezalü sü va; hio kesa kenao.
english: Death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire. This is the second death, the lake of fire.

chokri: Thüma kehopüri kerhü lesida lü uza ngoyi kemokhü kehüpü mezalü süva.
english: If anyone was not found written in the book of life, he was cast into the lake of fire.

chokri: Süze Herod küde-o tüce Judea cejü lü Bethlehem rüna lü Jisu münu küyice, Yhie! Nathoco mhaküsemi kropüh Jerusalem lü vori die sü;
english: Now when Jesus was born in Bethlehem of Judea in the days of Herod the king, behold, wise men from the east came to Jerusalem, saying,

chokri: Münu züh küba Jewmi küde-o sü dice ba? Kükrenamori, ha nathoco Pu thünyio ngo die pu rüsu to vori küzüna zidie kütsota.
english: "Where is he who is born King of the Jews? For we saw his star in the east, and have come to worship him."

chokri: Herod küde-o mha hiko se küsüce; pu mo Jerusalem thüma mütüri pu züh die ulü krokrühyi mota.
english: When Herod the king heard it, he was troubled, and all Jerusalem with him.

chokri: Sidie pu pethiküzhoko mo lüsiküseko mütü ci künguyi die pukoce; Khristao sü dipühce münu tozu ta ra ha? Zi kütso.
english: Gathering together all the chief priests and scribes of the people, he asked them where the Christ would be born.

chokri: Puko sü, puce, Judea cejü lü Bethlehem li küti lü to, Kükrenamori, sadzühküseo po hibi die thopüh müta tina;
english: They said to him, "In Bethlehem of Judea, for thus it is written through the prophet,

chokri: Mo no Judea cejü lü Bethlehem, no, Judea cejü lü küzhoko dolü künyithoo motazo. Kükrenamori, n yono Küdenumi püh parito, mo süo tho a thüma Isrealko kükhü thi zoto küti na zita.
english: 'You Bethlehem, land of Judah, Are in no way least among the princes of Judah: For out of you shall come forth a governor, Who shall shepherd my people, Israel.'"

chokri: Süsa Herod mükhrüh mhaküseko cizüh vori die pukoce, dipühküthice u thünyio pari ta shi küti pu tütso thizo die kütsoyi.
english: Then Herod secretly called the wise men, and learned from them exactly what time the star appeared.

chokri: Sidie pu süko kütsüh püh Bethlehem lü sü die püko yisü, neko vo die neko tütso thi die unu-o phute. Sidie pu ngoyi lize la vori die ace po süte, a pori Pu rüsu küto na, zisü.
english: He sent them to Bethlehem, and said, "Go and search diligently for the young child. When you have found him, bring me word, so that I also may come and worship him."

chokri: Süze puko küde-o zü rünyiyi die ta zo vota, mo puko nathoco küngo thünyio puko mhuzü ra vo die unu-o khapüh kümüzü thüthi-o pitü lü bata.
english: They, having heard the king, went their way; and behold, the star, which they saw in the east, went before them, until it came and stood over where the young child was.

chokri: Puko thünyio ngoküyice puko nü shühta.
english: When they saw the star, they rejoiced with exceedingly great joy.
