chokri: Sidie puko ce-olü lü küyice, unu-o Pu zu Mary züh ba die ngoyi, süna puko nürhüh prü Pu rüsuta. Sidie puko mhadzühko phrühyi die suna, dhunatsa mo mha rüh küthünyiko püh Pu prü sü.
english: They came into the house and saw the young child with Mary, his mother, and they fell down and worshiped him. Opening their treasures, they offered to him gifts: gold, frankincense, and myrrh.

chokri: Süsa puko mholüno Jihova puko po Herod ce sala vo hino küta na; puko sho kükre züh sü puko tho puko rünana lü vota.
english: Being warned in a dream that they shouldn't return to Herod, they went back to their own country another way.

chokri: Süze puko ta küta sa, Yhie, Nyepoo shoyi-o Joseph mholü puce vori die sü; no süyite, sidie unu-omo Pu zu unyi züh Egypt lü vo tate, mo I nce po sü kümothe sülü batate, kükrenamoli Herod-e nu tsüo müka va tozu phu zoto kütina, zita.
english: Now when they had departed, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream, saying, "Arise and take the young child and his mother, and flee into Egypt, and stay there until I tell you, for Herod will seek the young child to destroy him."

chokri: Süsa pu süri die unu-o mo Pu zu unyi zühyi die tüzühzüh ta Egypt lü prüta. Sidie Herod sata kümothe sülü bata.
english: He arose and took the young child and his mother by night, and departed into Egypt,

chokri: Süosü Nyepoo sadzühküse-oe po die; “I Egypt lüno a nuo cipüh pariyi;” zipüh kümüta züo thi tsühyi kütona.
english: and was there until the death of Herod; that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the Lord through the prophet, saying, "Out of Egypt I called my son."

chokri: Sücesü Herod-e mhaküse süko pu shüh küva seyi die pu nümo shüh ta, sidie mi kütsüh püh mhaküseko celüno putü-o setü küyi bi die Bethlehem mo sushi sümhü küba thüpunumi tse küna mo sükhroko mütü dokhri tsova.
english: Then Herod, when he saw that he was mocked by the wise men, was exceedingly angry, and sent out, and killed all the male children who were in Bethlehem and in all the surrounding countryside, from two years old and under, according to the exact time which he had learned from the wise men.

chokri: Süosü Jeremiah sadzühküse-oe po püh kümüta;
english: Then that which was spoken by Jeremiah the prophet was fulfilled, saying,

chokri: Rama lü mhakhü püh se, kra mo thükri thi shüh; Rachel po pu nuneko kri krakra, sidie di kütako na pupo pulü luyi mota; süzi küsüo po tsühyi küto na.
english: "A voice was heard in Ramah, Lamentation, weeping and great mourning, Rachel weeping for her children; She wouldn't be comforted, Because they are no more."

chokri: Süsa Herod sata mütha, Yhie, Nyepoo shoyimi püh Egypt lüno Joseph mholü puce vori die pu yisü;
english: But when Herod was dead, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt, saying,

chokri: Sürite, die unu-o mo Pu zu unyi züh ta Israelmi cejülü lavo tate, kükrenamoli unu-o kürhühro phu kübako sü sata kütina.
english: "Arise and take the young child and his mother, and go into the land of Israel, for those who sought the young child's life are dead."

chokri: Süsa pu süri die unu-o mo Pu zu unyi züh ta Isrealmi cejü lü la vori ta.
english: He arose and took the young child and his mother, and came into the land of Israel.

chokri: Eli, pu Archelaus pupo sühlü Judea cejülü küde thi küba seyi die sülüvo müprüh ta. Süri pu mholü Nyepoo celü zü seyi die ta sü Galilee co vota.
english: But when he heard that Archelaus was reigning over Judea in the place of his father, Herod, he was afraid to go there. Being warned in a dream, he withdrew into the region of Galilee,

chokri: Sidie pu vo Nazareth li küti rüna pühlü lhü bata süosü Pu yisü Nazarethmi li die cito; zidie sadzühküsemiko po püh kümüta züo tsühyi küto na.
english: and came and lived in a city called Nazareth; that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through the prophets: "He will be called a Nazarene."

chokri: Süze sütüce sü John dzülukhaküsüoe Judea nhatsalümütha die;
english: In those days, John the Baptizer came, preaching in the wilderness of Judea, saying,

chokri: Nieko thülü küdeyite, tüyo küde münoto ba küta na.
english: "Repent, for the Kingdom of Heaven is at hand!"

chokri: Süze hiohi Isaiah sadzühküseo pu dzüh po die; mipüh nhatsalü se die; neko Nyepoo sho küsühyite, Pu shopriko thi kümüziyite; zi küta khüo sü pu zo.
english: For this is he who was spoken of by Isaiah the prophet, saying, "The voice of one crying in the wilderness, Make ready the way of the Lord, Make his paths straight."

chokri: Mo John hi Utma püh pu khüne thi, thigi shepha püh pu shepha, süze kopre mo mükhizü püh pu co thi.
english: Now John himself wore clothing made of camel's hair, with a leather belt around his waist. His food was locusts and wild honey.

chokri: Sücesü Jerusalem, Judea, cejü mütü mo Jordan kümütu rüna mütü lüno mi puce vori.
english: Then people from Jerusalem, all of Judea, and all the region around the Jordan went out to him.

chokri: Sidie u küphomako phra sü die pupo Jordan lüno puko püh dzülu püyi.
english: They were baptized by him in the Jordan, confessing their sins.

chokri: Eli, pu Phariseeko mo Sadduceeko kükro pu dzülu khaküsülü vori küba ngo küyice puko yisü, Yhie! Nyhibüpü shüyieko, sopühno neko po vori küzü lükhuo mhuzülü tayi no die neko ce po sü-a?
english: But when he saw many of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming for his baptism, he said to them, "You offspring of vipers, who warned you to flee from the wrath to come?

chokri: Süna thülü küde küyi se-o po rüthi pariyite.
english: Therefore bring forth fruit worthy of repentance!

chokri: Sidie nelüno hari Abraham sü hapo zo; süzi küti lüta hite, I neko ce po süto, Jihova-e kütsü hiko yori Abraham nuneko mülhü süyi vezo.
english: Don't think to yourselves, 'We have Abraham for our father,' for I tell you that God is able to raise up children to Abraham from these stones.

chokri: Mo tsüri sühdorü-o püh sühbo phelü müzüzo. Süna sühbo kühopüri u se zhiyi kümokhü ve va die kügü püh melü sü vato.
english: "Even now the axe lies at the root of the trees. Therefore, every tree that doesn't bring forth good fruit is cut down, and cast into the fire.

chokri: I-e dzülüno thülü küde küyi dzülu püh neko prüyo küti zo. Eli, asa vori küzüo aceri zhoku, I pu pheku rhiri phrüyi shümo pühyi sümo,
english: I indeed baptize you in water for repentance, but he who comes after me is mightier than I, whose shoes I am not worthy to carry. He will baptize you in the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Pue Kümüsa Rüpü mo melü neko püh dzülu püto. Pu lhahüri Pubelü ba, Pu atalha münu die hü kümüsa to, sidie atalhako püh Pu khilü künguyito; eli sabühko püh mhü tayi külho melü müto vato.
english: His winnowing fork is in his hand, and he will thoroughly cleanse his threshing floor. He will gather his wheat into the barn, but the chaff he will burn up with unquenchable fire."

chokri: Sücesü Jisu Galilee lüno tasü Jordan rülü John po Pu püh dzülu pü tozu vori.
english: Then Jesus came from Galilee to the Jordan to John, to be baptized by him.

chokri: Eli, John-e Pu kha die Pu yisü, I npo apüh dzülu küpü müsüh-o lü No ace vori zü me? zita.
english: But John would have hindered him, saying, "I need to be baptized by you, and you come to me?"

chokri: Süri Jisu pu zü küla die, tsüzo na a kha hite, kükrenamoli, süzi küsü lüno avü künanyi yono kümatho zho mütü thitsüh sü tozu ba küta na; zita. Süsa John ri thisü toli zita.
english: But Jesus, answering, said to him, "Allow it now, for this is the fitting way for us to fulfill all righteousness." Then he allowed him.

chokri: Süsa Jisu dzülu pü küyi sa dzülüno ta mha parita; sücesü, Yhie tüko khri Pu prü mo John-e Jihova Rüpüo mükhro püh bi die vekrüzo Pu yo kiri küti ngo.
english: Jesus, when he was baptized, went up directly from the water: and behold, the heavens were opened to him. He saw the Spirit of God descending as a dove, and coming on him.

chokri: Sücesü Yhie, Tüyono mhakhü püh; Hihi anu a khrü-o zo, I Pungo a künü thoo zo, zi kiri.
english: Behold, a voice out of the heavens said, "This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased."

chokri: Süsa Jisu-e Satan po pu küdo tozu die Rüpüo po Pu hüzüh nhatsalü vota.
english: Then Jesus was led up by the Spirit into the wilderness to be tempted by the devil.

chokri: Mo Pu tüsozho hieda mo tüzühzho hieda mvo kütasa Pu müri ta.
english: When he had fasted forty days and forty nights, he was hungry afterward.

chokri: Süsa küdo küti-o Puce vori die sü, No Jihova nuo zo lize kütsü hiko ce po sü die süko po tsükhrüda thiyite, zita.
english: The tempter came and said to him, "If you are the Son of God, command that these stones become bread."

chokri: Süri pu süo küla die sü, Thümae tsükhrüda libi na mori Jihova talü küpari zü kühopüh ri na rhühyi to; zi küti thopüh müta, zita.
english: But he answered, "It is written, 'Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceeds out of the mouth of God.'"

chokri: Süsa Satan Pu züh rüna kümüsao lü vo die Pu po kürüsuce pilüyo bayi.
english: Then the devil took him into the holy city. He set him on the pinnacle of the temple,

chokri: Sidie Pu yisü; No Jihova nuo lize, ntho rütu prüte, kükrenamoli, Pu na Pu shoyimi mülü sü die, kühopühtüce zori n po rütu prü kütsü-püh yori n phe rha mo küto na puko be püh n rhapühyi tato, zi küti thopüh ma küti na.
english: and said to him, "If you are the Son of God, throw yourself down, for it is written, 'He will give his angels charge concerning you.' and, 'On their hands they will bear you up, So that you don't dash your foot against a stone.'"

chokri: Jisu puce po die, no n Nyepoo Jihova küdo sü, zi küti tho püh müta zo, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "Again, it is written, 'You shall not test the Lord, your God.'"

chokri: Süsari, Küsüo Pu züh cejüthu kürükrü shüh pühyo vo die cejülü küdeko mo sülü thüshühthürhoko thapüh Pu ka:
english: Again, the devil took him to an exceedingly high mountain, and showed him all the kingdoms of the world, and their glory.

chokri: Sidie Pu yisü, No tüprü a rüsu to lize I hiko mütü püh n prüto, zita.
english: He said to him, "I will give you all of these things, if you will fall down and worship me."

chokri: Süsa Jisu puce, Satan no tatayi, kükrenamoli, no n Nyepoo Jihova libi rüsu mo Pu shoyi libi thiyi mosü, zi die tho püh kümüzü na.
english: Then Jesus said to him, "Get behind me, Satan! For it is written, 'You shall worship the Lord your God, and him only shall you serve.'"

chokri: Süsa küsüo Pu kha va die tata, mo Yhie, Tüyo shoyimi vori die Pu khrühi yita.
english: Then the devil left him, and behold, angels came and ministered to him.

chokri: Süsa Jisu mi John tüpüh küdücelü sü küva seyi die ta sü Galileelü vota.
english: Now when Jesus heard that John was delivered up, he withdrew into Galilee.

chokri: Sidie Pu Nazareth khava die tasü Zebulun mo Naphtali nyi taralü dzüküzho shice Kapernaumlü vo lhü bata.
english: Leaving Nazareth, he came and lived in Capernaum, which is by the sea, in the region of Zebulun and Naphtali,

chokri: Süosü Isaiah sadzühküse-oe po püh kümüta:
english: that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through Isaiah the prophet, saying,

chokri: Jordan rüshi prüh küvo Zebulun cejü mo Naphtali cejü küsa mo Naphtali cejü dzüküzho sho Galileemi mülü kümoko;
english: "The land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali, Toward the sea, beyond the Jordan, Galilee of the Gentiles,

chokri: Thüma küzühlü kütako küve küzhopüh ngote; süze cejü küsa mo pu khrilü kübako yori küve prarite; zi müzü.
english: The people who sat in darkness saw a great light, To those who sat in the region and shadow of death, To them light has dawned."

chokri: Süyogwino Jisu mi mütha shühdü die, nelü küdeyite, tüyo küde münoto ba küta na, zita.
english: From that time, Jesus began to preach, and to say, "Repent! For the Kingdom of Heaven is at hand."

chokri: Süze Jisu Galilee dzüküzho shice ta vo küzüce Pu mi küna sazühzüra nyi Simon Peter liyo kütio mo pü sazüh-o Andrew unyi khuma püh dzüküzholü kügü ta die ngo, kükrenamoli unyi-e khukütümi zo küti na.
english: Walking by the sea of Galilee, he saw two brothers: Simon, who is called Peter, and Andrew, his brother, casting a net into the sea; for they were fishermen.

chokri: Mo Pu unyi yisü, A samüdziyite, I nenyi po thüma kütümi thito; zisü.
english: He said to them, "Come after me, and I will make you fishers for men."

chokri: Süzi sü mütha unyi khüma kha mha va die Pu sa müdzi ta.
english: They immediately left their nets and followed him.

chokri: Süsari Pu sülüno ta vo küzüce sazühzüra mi kükre küna Zebedee nu James mo pu sazüh-o John unyi unyi khuma mükhu ba die ngoyi, mo Pu unyi cisü.
english: Going on from there, he saw two other brothers, James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother, in the boat with Zebedee their father, mending their nets. He called them.

chokri: Süsa unyi unyi po mo püzu-o khamha va die Pu sa müdzita.
english: They immediately left the boat and their father, and followed him.

chokri: Sidie Jisu Galilee cejü mütülü rühu die synagogueko lü mi mütha mo küde züyi küve dzühpo mika, mo thüma dolü küthi künyi lünyiko thi küsührho sü.
english: Jesus went about in all Galilee, teaching in their synagogues, preaching the Gospel of the Kingdom, and healing every disease and every sickness among the people.

chokri: Sücesü Syria cejü mütülü Pu dzüh po kümüle shüh vota; momi küthikünyi kükrekre kütiko, küsü rüpü po u kübü kütako, mülo kütako, lasako, mo thürüyozü mütü züh Puce vori mo Pu süko mütü thi küsührho sü.
english: The report about him went out into all Syria. They brought to him all who were sick, afflicted with various diseases and torments, possessed with demons, epileptics, and paralytics; and he healed them.

chokri: Süna Galilee lü mo Decapolislü mo Jerusalem mo Judea cejü lüri mo Jordan rü shico thüma krodepüh Pu sa müdzi tata.
english: Great multitudes from Galilee, Decapolis, Jerusalem, Judea and from beyond the Jordan followed him.

chokri: Thüma po ngo zo küto na ne mi mhuzülü phikümüzhethoko thizo mo küto lü türüyite; kümosa tüyo küba neko Poo celü ne zhokhro ngoyi lhozo.
english: "Be careful that you don't do your charitable giving before men, to be seen by them, or else you have no reward from your Father who is in heaven.

chokri: Süze ne mha müthu püh mi küprü ce küthürakütiko-e thüshüh ngoyi nyi die synagogue ceko lü mo shopüsholiko lü thiyo küti bi die sekhu zota hite. I nekoce po süto. Süko zo-e puko zhokhro ngoyi bate.
english: Therefore when you do merciful deeds, don't sound a trumpet before yourself, as the hypocrites do in the synagogues and in the streets, that they may get glory from men. Most assuredly I tell you, they have received their reward.

chokri: Eli, nekoe mha khaküsüce ne be ne zaco-e khaküsüo ne veco po se hite.
english: But when you do merciful deeds, don't let your left hand know what your right hand does,

chokri: Sidie no mhaküsüo kümükhrühlü khasü te, süze kümükhrüh mütü ngoyo küti ne Po-e mi mhüngolü ne zhokhro thipüh ne prüto tina.
english: so that your merciful deeds may be in secret, then your Father who sees in secret will reward you openly.

chokri: Süze no küsho küthice küthüra kütiko bi ta hite: Kükrenamoli, sükoe mi po ngo küto na synagogkolü mo shopü shiceko tha die sho küti puko nüyo, eli, I nekoce po süto, süko zo-e u zhokhro ngoyi bate.
english: "When you pray, you shall not be as the hypocrites, for they love to stand and pray in the synagogues and in the corners of the streets, that they may be seen by men. Most assuredly, I tell you, they have received their reward.

chokri: Süri, noe sho kütice n celüsühku lü die n cekha khayi, die kümükhrühlü küba n Po ce shote. Süze kümükhrüh mütü ngoyo küti n Po putho mi mhüngolü n zhokhro thipüh n prüto.
english: But you, when you pray, enter into your inner chamber, and having shut your door, pray to your Father who is in secret, and your Father who sees in secret will reward you openly.

chokri: Eli, no zo-e sho kütice mülükümomi bi die uco küdi küpo sapo lala hi, kükrenamoli, puko-e zü kükro küpo na puko küsho rünyiyi küto lüyo tina.
english: In praying, don't use vain repetitions, as the Gentiles do; for they think that they will be heard for their much speaking.

chokri: Süna nekoe süko bi ta hite; kükrenamoli, neko Po-e ne küsho mhuzü ne tsakhuko se batayo tina.
english: Therefore don't be like them, for your Father knows what things you need, before you ask him.

chokri: Süze nekoe sho kütice hibi die shoyiyi te; tüyo küba ha Po N zapo kümüsao thiyite
english: Pray like this: 'Our Father in heaven, may your name be kept holy.

chokri: N küde thi vorite Tüyo bi cejü hiri püh n müdo thiyite.
english: Let your Kingdom come. Let your will be done, as in heaven, so on earth.

chokri: Tha tha va kha ha prüte
english: Give us today our daily bread.

chokri: Ha mi küjo va küsü bi, ha küjo ri va ha prüte
english: Forgive us our debts, as we also forgive our debtors.

chokri: Ha züh müdoküphilü vo hite, eli küsüo belü ha küla süte. Kükrenamoli, Küde, kuku mo Zapozale sü tülhülü nzüzo tina.
english: Bring us not into temptation, but deliver us from the evil one. For yours is the Kingdom, the power, and the glory forever. Amen.'

chokri: Süze no mi küjo vasü mi prüyo lize tüyo küba ne Pori ne küjo va sü ne prüto.
english: "For if you forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you.

chokri: Süri ne mi küjo vapüh mi prü mu lize; tüyo küba ne Pori ne küjo va süyi lho.
english: But if you don't forgive men their trespasses, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses.

chokri: Sülibizomoli, neko kümvo tice küthürakütiko bi die ne thusü sa tatahite, süko mi po ngo küto na puko zü thi mükre pu tayo. I neko ce po süto; süko zo-e puko zhokhro ngo bate.
english: "Moreover when you fast, don't be like the hypocrites, with sad faces. For they disfigure their faces, that they may be seen by men to be fasting. Most assuredly I tell you, they have received their reward.

chokri: Eli, no kümvo kütice tier püh n pi künhüyi mo n zü chu vate.
english: But you, when you fast, anoint your head, and wash your face;

chokri: Sidie n kümvo püh thüma po ngo zota moli kümükhrühlü bayo küti n Po po ngote; süzi lize mha kümükhrühko ngoyo küti n Po tho mhulhelü n zhokhro thi n prüto.
english: so that you are not seen by men to be fasting, but by your Father who is in secret, and your Father, who sees in secret, will reward you.

chokri: Silhü mu gitsü poti vayo küti mo kürügomi po rhelü die rügoyi tayo küti cejülü küngu hite.
english: "Don't lay up treasures for yourselves on the earth, where moth and rust consume, and where thieves break through and steal;

chokri: Süziküti-omoli, silhü mori gitsü ri ti müdi vayi külho mo kürügomi ri rhelü rügo yi külho tüyo neko cene künguyi te.
english: but lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven, where neither moth nor rust consume, and where thieves don't break through and steal;

chokri: Kükrenamoli, n cene kübara nlü ri vo sülü ba tayo tina.
english: for where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.

chokri: Umo meto sü u mhü zo; mhaceno n mhü ve ba lize n mo ri vekrü pü bato.
english: "The lamp of the body is the eye. If therefore your eye is sound, your whole body will be full of light.

chokri: Eli, n mhü sü ta lize, n mo mütü ri zühbüh ta zoto. Süna n yo küba küveo züh ta lize, süsa küdithüdüpüh züh ta ta?
english: But if your eye is evil, your whole body will be full of darkness. If therefore the light that is in you is darkness, how great is the darkness!

chokri: Mi cetami pühri nyepo küna ceta thi küduyi ndi; süzi lize pu mipüh mütsü mo kükreo ngo pü nü tato; mori pu mipüh-o va ta die kükreo the tato. Ne Jihova mo züthokümo cene unyi ceta thi küduyi ndi zo.
english: "No one can serve two masters, for either he will hate the one and love the other; or else he will be devoted to one and despise the other. You can't serve both God and Mammon.

chokri: Süna I nekoce po süto, ne külhü hio na dipüh ti mori dipüh kraba teshi küti; mori ne mo na dipüh bemüne ba teshi küti rüleko lü ne lü künyi thi hite; U kürhüro-e kütikükra ceri mo u mo-e khümüne ceri veku mo me?
english: Therefore, I tell you, don't be anxious for your life: what you will eat, or what you will drink; nor yet for your body, what you will wear. Isn't life more than food, and the body more than clothing?

chokri: Tüyo rako pe süte; süko prühyo mo, mo rühriyo mo; mori süh vo ulhacelü künguri yo mo, süzori tüyo küba neko Po süko va thori thisü bayo. Neko-e süko ceri veku mo me?
english: See the birds of the sky, that they don't sow, neither do they reap, nor gather into barns. Your heavenly Father feeds them. Aren't you of much more value than they?

chokri: Neko sopühno mhalü shüh küsü na pu külhüzho bothopüh the ri thi müshoyi ve ta?
english: "Which of you, by being anxious, can add one cubit to the measure of his life?

chokri: Süze ne dipüh na khüne rüleko lü zo la? Neko yilü thürüba puko dibi die lhü bayo sheli lü süte, süko mhathi mhayi kümüzhe yo mo, süko türhi türha thiyo mo.
english: Why are you anxious about clothing? Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow. They don't toil, neither do they spin,

chokri: Süzori, I nekoce po süto, Solomon zapozale thishü zori, süko mipüh düri kürütso mo.
english: yet I tell you that even Solomon in all his glory was not dressed like one of these.

chokri: Süna Jihova-e nha tha lhüba die südo papüh mephülü müto va kütoko rütso thori thi süyo lize, neko kümülü kütsako, Pu süko ceri neko rütso thiku sü mo to me?
english: But if God so clothes the grass of the field, which today exists, and tomorrow is thrown into the oven, won't he much more clothe you, you of little faith?

chokri: Süna neko dipüh ti mo kra ba teshi, mori dipüh be müne ba teshi küti rüleko lü die nelü künyi thiba zohite.
english: "Therefore don't be anxious, saying, 'What will we eat?', 'What will we drink?' or, 'With what will we be clothed?'

chokri: Mülükümoko-e mha hikohi rüle libi lü die phu bayo eli tüyo küba neko Po-e neko tsakhu hikohi mütü se bayo kütina.
english: For the Gentiles seek after all these things, for your heavenly Father knows that you need all these things.

chokri: Süri neko Pu küde küthi mo Pu kümatho phu mürayite, sülize mha hikohi mütü püh neko sa süto.
english: But seek first God's Kingdom, and his righteousness; and all these things will be given to you as well.

chokri: Süna neko sühdo rüle lü neko lü kümüzhe hite. Kükrenamoli, tüsonha putho pu kürüh batso tina.
english: Therefore don't be anxious for tomorrow, for tomorrow will be anxious for itself. Each day's own evil is sufficient.

chokri: Süsa Jisu cejüthu yono kiri küyice thüma kro küzho shüh püh Pusa müdzi vori ta.
english: When he came down from the mountain, great multitudes followed him.

chokri: Mo, Yhie! Lepra küthimi püh Puce vori Pu rüsu die sü, Nyepoo no n müdo lize a thi kümüsa vayi vezo zita.
english: Behold, a leper came to him and worshiped him, saying, "Lord, if you want to, you can make me clean."

chokri: Süce Jisu Pu be yho püh pu nyi die sü, a müdo ve, no müsayi tate; zisü. Süzi sü mütha pu lepra küthi-o münü mhata.
english: Jesus stretched out his hand, and touched him, saying, "I want to. Be made clean." Immediately his leprosy was cleansed.

chokri: Süsa Jisu puce po die, no mipüh ceri po hite, sidie tavo ntho n khapüh Pethiküzho-o mhüngo thisü te, sidie mi po seyi küto na Moses-e po püh kümüzü rütho-o thisüte, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "See that you tell nobody, but go, show yourself to the priest, and offer the gift that Moses commanded, as a testimony to them."

chokri: Süsa Jisu Capernaum lü lüri küyice, riwhümi kra mhu küzhomi püh vori Puce sho die:
english: When he came into Capernaum, a centurion came to him, asking him,

chokri: Nyepoo, a cetami püh lasa ta die kümüzhe shüh die celü bayo le, zisü.
english: and saying, "Lord, my servant lies in the house paralyzed, grievously tormented."

chokri: Jisu puce; I vori die pu thi küsührho sü to, zisü.
english: Jesus said to him, "I will come and heal him."

chokri: Riwhimi kra mhu küzho süo sü; Nyepoo, I n po a cekhrikhro vori no küto sümo ri zo; eli no züco pühri posü zori a cetao sührho ta zoto, zita.
english: The centurion answered, "Lord, I'm not worthy for you to come under my roof. Just say the word, and my servant will be healed.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, I ri küzhomi khrikhro ta kütimi zo; a khro ri riwhimi ba, mo I hio ce, vote, zi lize puri vo tayo, kükremi pühce, vorite; zisü lize puri voriyo; mo a cetami yisü; hihi thi süte; zi lize puri thi süyo; zita.
english: For I am also a man under authority, having under myself soldiers. I tell this one, 'Go,' and he goes; and tell another, 'Come,' and he comes; and tell my servant, 'Do this,' and he does it."

chokri: Jisu sü se küsüce, Pu malhü thi die Pu samüdzi kütako yisü, I nekoce potü süto, I Isrealmi dolü u kümülü hidü zho küti ngo mozo.
english: When Jesus heard it, he marveled, and said to those who followed, "Most assuredly I tell you, I haven't found so great a faith, not even in Israel.

chokri: Süze I neko ce po süto, nathoco mo nakroco thüma kükro vori die tüyo küdelü no Abraham, Isaac mo James neko züh ba tato.
english: I tell you that many will come from the east and the west, and will sit down with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob in the Kingdom of Heaven,

chokri: Süri cejü küdenuko-e kügü püh shozu küzühlü sü vato, sülü kra mo uhu thüzhe pü ba tato.
english: but the children of the Kingdom will be thrown out into the outer darkness. There will be weeping and the gnashing of teeth."

chokri: Süsa Jisu kra mhu küzhoo yisü, n sholü votate, mo no mülü küyi bi die süo po n yo tsüh küyio thiyite. Sidie po küsü tütü lü pu cetao sührho bata.
english: Jesus said to the centurion, "Go your way. Let it be done for you as you have believed." His servant was healed in that hour.

chokri: Süsa Jisu Peter celü vori küyice, Peter cemi ne zu rüce zü die ngoyi,
english: When Jesus came into Peter's house, he saw his wife's mother lying sick with a fever.

chokri: Süna Jisu süpü be nyi sü mo rüce-o lata; sidie süpü sü die puko shoyi thi bata.
english: He touched her hand, and the fever left her. She got up and served him.

chokri: Süsa thüva vori küyice. Thümako küsü rüpü po u kübü küta kükro züh Puce vori; mo Pu zü püh lüno rüpü süko hu va; mo küthi künyiko thi küsührho sü.
english: When evening came, they brought to him many possessed with demons. He cast out the spirits with a word, and healed all who were sick;

chokri: Sidie Isaiah sadzühküseo po thazü; Putho u küsü kümüzako mo u küthi künyiko khi püyi te; süzi die po püh kümüzüo thi tsühyi.
english: that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through Isaiah the prophet, saying: "He took our infirmities, and bore our diseases."

chokri: Süsa Jisu thüma krode püh Pu hupü küba ngo küsüce, puko potasü lishico ku tano die Pu zü khasü.
english: Now when Jesus saw great multitudes around him, he gave the order to depart to the other side.

chokri: Sücesü lüsiküsethomi püh Puce vori die Pu yisü, Kümütha-o no kühopühra vo sheri I nsa müdzi tole, zisü.
english: A scribe came, and said to him, "Teacher, I will follow you wherever you go."

chokri: Jisu pu yisü, müsührüko ri uce ne, mo tüyo rako ri u kro ne, eli thümanuo Pu pi kha thothü küyi thiri di; zisü.
english: Jesus said to him, "The foxes have holes, and the birds of the sky have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head."

chokri: Müthaküyimi kükremi püh ri Puce, Nyepoo apo vo apo khrüh va mürate; zita.
english: Another of his disciples said to him, "Lord, allow me first to go and bury my father."

chokri: Eli, Jisu pu yisü, a sa müdziyite, mo küsako po utho küsako khrüh vate, zita.
english: But Jesus said to him, "Follow me, and leave the dead to bury their own dead."

chokri: Süsa Pu püzu lü küyice Pu müthaküyiko pu sa müdzita.
english: When he got into a boat, his disciples followed him.

chokri: Sücesü Yhie züküzholü tükhra kümüre thi süri, mo tükhra küyeri küta na züküzho rükhü tho püzu-o whüyita, süri Pu züh zü zo.
english: Behold, a great tempest arose in the sea, so much that the boat was covered with the waves, but he was asleep.

chokri: Sücesü müthaküyiko Puce vori Pu küsüh die sü, Nyepoo hako küla süte, hako kata tozü te; zita.
english: They came to him, and woke him up, saying, "Save us, Lord! We are dying!"

chokri: Süsa Pu süko yisü, Yhie! Neko kümülü kütsako, neko dipüh na müprüh ri zota-a? Sidie pu süri die tükhra mo züküzho rükhü-o kükha va, süsa rütü züh ta.
english: He said to them, "Why are you fearful, oh you of little faith?" Then he got up, rebuked the wind and the sea, and there was a great calm.

chokri: Eli thümako u malhü thi die sü, thüma hihi dipüh bi küti mapüh ta shehe! Tükhra mo züküzhotho ri Pu khüzüh küta hi, zita.
english: The men marveled, saying, "What kind of man is this, that even the wind and the sea obey him?"

chokri: Süsa Pu süo prüsü lishico Gergesenesmi cejülü tso küyice, küsü rüpü po u kübü pü kütami küna mhakhre lüno pari Pu züh küsühyi, unyi zhosü püh kümüre thi die mipüh ripo ta sü sholü vori yi sü bata.
english: When he came to the other side, into the country of the Gergesenes, two people possessed by demons met him there, coming out of the tombs, exceedingly fierce, so that nobody could pass by that way.

chokri: Sücesü Yhie unyi se die sü; Jihova nuo Jisu; No hanyi züh dipüh thi ta? No putü tso kümolü ha müthi münyi to vori yo me? zita.
english: Behold, they cried out, saying, "What do we have to do with you, Jesus, Son of God? Have you come here to torment us before the time?"

chokri: Sücesü thüvo kro künye püh vo rapeco mha ngüti ta rü;
english: Now there was a herd of many pigs feeding far away from them.

chokri: Thürü küsü rüpüko Puce u müzhemülo die sü; “No ha hu sü lize ha hu püh thüvo kroo lü süte,” zita.
english: The demons begged him, saying, "If you cast us out, permit us to go away into the herd of pigs."

chokri: Süsa Pu süko yisü, ye tate, zisü, Süna puko ta pari die tasü thüvo kroo dolü lüta; sücesü, Yhie, thüvo kro süo ta rüthü sü dzüküzho shice thikha lü prü die dzülü mülhü khri tso va.
english: He said to them, "Go!" They came out, and went into the herd of pigs: and behold, the whole herd of pigs rushed down the cliff into the sea, and died in the water.

chokri: Sücesü süko kükhüko ta nadelü vo die mha dipüh püh thita sheri mo küsü rüpü po u kübü pü küta yo dipüh thita sheri küti posü.
english: Those who fed them fled, and went away into the city, and told everything, including what happened to those who were possessed with demons.

chokri: Süsa Yhie! Nadelü thüma mütü Jisu züh küsüh tozu die prarita; Süsa puko pungo küyice Pupo ta puko rüna prühta no die Puce shota.
english: Behold, all the city came out to meet Jesus. When they saw him, they begged that he would depart from their borders.

chokri: Süsa Jisu püzu püh lü bayi die tasü Putho Pu ra vota.
english: He entered into a boat, and crossed over, and came into his own city.

chokri: Sücesü Yhie! Mi lasami püh püh pu zilü süyi die rhapüh Puce vori: sücesü Jisu puko kümülü ngo sü die Pu küthi-o yisü; Anu n zü veyite, n küphomako va n prü va ho, zita.
english: Behold, they brought to him a man who was paralyzed, lying on a bed. Jesus, seeing their faith, said to the paralytic, "Son, cheer up! Your sins are forgiven you."

chokri: Sücesü lüsiküseko humi ulülü no sü, thüma hio Jihova tha yozo, zibata.
english: Behold, some of the scribes said to themselves, "This man blasphemes."

chokri: Eli Jisu puko lüdoko seyi die puko yisü, Neko dipüh na ne lülü mha küsu müdoyo la? zita.
english: Jesus, knowing their thoughts, said, "Why do you think evil in your hearts?

chokri: N küphomako va n prü vaho; zi küti küpo mo sü die tayite, zi küti küpo nyi dipüh-o po rüyikuta
english: For which is easier, to say, 'Your sins are forgiven;' or to say, 'Get up, and walk?'

chokri: Eli neko po thümanuo cejü hilü ri mi küphoma va süyi küve küku ba küti seyi kütona; si die Pu lasao yisü; sü nzi pühyi die ta n celü vo tate, zisü.
english: But that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins..." (then he said to the paralytic), "Get up, and take up your mat, and go up to your house."

chokri: Süsa pu sü die ta pu celü vota.
english: He arose and departed to his house.

chokri: Süze makroo sü ngo küsüce puko malhü thita, sidie Jihova küku süsübi küti püh thüma küprü na Pu shuh ta.
english: But when the multitudes saw it, they marveled and glorified God, who had given such authority to men.

chokri: Süsa Jisu sülü püthü vo küzüce Matthew li küti-oe khazhonu kükhrü balü ba die pu ngoyi; mo Pu süo yisü; A sa müdzi yite, zisü. Süsa pu ri sü die ta Pu sa müdzi ta.
english: As Jesus passed by from there, he saw a man called Matthew sitting at the tax collection office. He said to him, "Follow me." He got up and followed him.

chokri: Süsa Pu hi tozu die lü celü ba küyice khazhonu kükhrüko mo küphomako kükro vori die Jisu mo Pu sadziko züh bayi.
english: It happened as he sat in the house, behold, many tax collectors and sinners came and sat down with Jesus and his disciples.

chokri: Sücesü Phariseeko sü ngo sü die müthaküyiko yisü, Neko kümütha-o dipüh na khazhonu kükhrüko mo küphomako züh mhati mhakra yo la? zita.
english: When the Pharisees saw it, they said to his disciples, "Why does your teacher eat with tax collectors and sinners?"

chokri: Eli Jisu süo se sü die puko yisü, küsührhomi daruküsemi süh mori ve, eli sükoe küthimi na zo; zisü.
english: When Jesus heard it, he said to them, "Those who are healthy have no need for a physician, but those who are sick do.

chokri: Neko vo die I-e rüsuküthio mori ngokümüzhe anüku, zi püh kümüta züo co seyite. Kükrenamoli, I-e kümathoko mori küphomako po thülü küdeyi küto na küvori zo.
english: But you go and learn what this means: 'I desire mercy, and not sacrifice,' for I came not to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance."

chokri: Süsa John sadziko-e Puce vori die sü, Dipüh na hako mo Phariseeko tsükünu kümvo yo, mo n sadzi ko-e mvo yo mo-a?
english: Then John's disciples came to him, saying, "Why do we and the Pharisees fast often, but your disciples don't fast?"

chokri: Jisu pukoce po die; zhosao celü küba nunekoe zhosao puko züh kübalü no ulü su die thükri thi batayo me? Eli tüsoko vori to; sücesü mi puko celü no zhosao züh tata ze puko kümvo tato.
english: Jesus said to them, "Can the friends of the bridegroom mourn, as long as the bridegroom is with them? But the days will come when the bridegroom will be taken away from them, and then they will fast.

chokri: Süze mipüh ri khü, küsa cekhro püh kügwü mükhu yomo, kükrenamoli püh mükhu küsü khü-oe kükreo cekhro pü tato, sücesü cekhro mürüh ku vato.
english: No one puts a piece of unshrunk cloth on an old garment; for the patch would tear away from the garment, and a worse hole is made.

chokri: Mori mi khubühzü küsa püh thigibüh kügwükolü sü yomo, Kükrenamoli mhabüh süo ga ta to, sidie khubühzü ri rüla mo thigibühri müka vato. Süri mi khubühzü küsa püh thigibüh küsalü sü mayo, süze künanyi mükrü püh mayo.
english: Neither do people put new wine into old wineskins, or else the skins would burst, and the wine be spilled, and the skins ruined. No, they put new wine into fresh wineskins, and both are preserved."

chokri: Pu sükoce mha hiko po kübalü, Yhie, Mi mhu küzho thi kütami püh vori Pu rüsu die sü, a nupü tsü cehi sate, süri no vori die n be sho püh puyo sü zote, süze pu rhühyi ta zoto.
english: While he told these things to them, behold, a ruler came and worshiped him, saying, "My daughter has just died, but come and lay your hand on her, and she will live."

chokri: Süsa Jisu sü die Pu mo Pu sadziko küzüh süo müdzi vo ta.
english: Jesus got up and followed him, as did his disciples.

chokri: Sücesü Yhie, thünomi tse küriküna thüza krüh ta kütapü püh Pu sacovori die Pu khüphre nyi sü.
english: Behold, a woman who had an issue of blood for twelve years came behind him, and touched the tassels of his garment;

chokri: Kükrenamoli pue, I Pu khünyita zori nyi sü lize müsayi ta zoto, zi die lü küta na.
english: for she said within herself, "If I just touch his garment, I will be made well."

chokri: Eli Jisu rüh pra pu ngoyi die pu yisü, rülipü n züveyi tate, n kümülü tho nthi kümüsa lotsüh vaho, zisü, mo sütü lüsü thünopü müsayi ta.
english: But Jesus, turning around and seeing her, said, "Daughter, cheer up! Your faith has made you well." And the woman was made well from that hour.

chokri: Süze Jisu mülhi süo ce tsoyi die thümako lila khu mo münyo münyi pu küzü ngoyi die;
english: When Jesus came into the ruler's house, and saw the flute players, and the crowd in noisy disorder,

chokri: Pu süko yisü, neko thüthi müra süte, kükrenamoli rüli hipü sa tamo; eli züh züzo, zita. Süri süko Pu krühnyi bata.
english: he said to them, "Make room, because the girl isn't dead, but sleeping." They were ridiculing him.

chokri: Eli thümako rüdü küta sa Pu celü lü die süpü be cesü, mo süpü süri ta.
english: But when the crowd was put out, he entered in, took her by the hand, and the girl arose.

chokri: Süsa mha hio dzüh cejü süo lü mütü sevo ta.
english: The report of this went out into all that land.

chokri: Sidie Jisu thüthi sülüno tata küzüce mhücemi küna-e se zo die Puce; No David nuo, hanyi phimüzhe zo süte, zi bata.
english: As Jesus passed by from there, two blind men followed him, calling out and saying, "Have mercy on us, son of David!"

chokri: Süze Pu celü lüri tice, mhüce nyiri ta Puce lüri, mo Jisu unyi kütso die sü, nenyi I mha hihi thiyive li küti mülü tü me? Zisü. Unyi sü, izo, Nyepoo, zita.
english: When he had come into the house, the blind men came to him. Jesus said to them, "Do you believe that I am able to do this?" They told him, "Yes, Lord."

chokri: Süsa Jisu unyi mhü brü die sü, nenyi kümülü bi die thi küyi yo thiyi te, zisü.
english: Then he touched their eyes, saying, "According to your faith be it done to you."

chokri: Süsa unyi mhü mhürho parita; mo Jisu unyi yisü, nenyi püh mipüh ceri po hite, zisü.
english: Their eyes were opened. Jesus strictly charged them, saying, "See that no one knows about this."

chokri: Eli unyi tapra tice Pu dzüh kümüle süo püh rüna sülü mütü küza vota.
english: But they went out and spread abroad his fame in all that land.

chokri: Süsa puko tapra küzüce, Yhie! Mi thürüküsü po u kübü küta zü po küthomi püh züh Puce vori.
english: As they went out, behold, a mute man who was demon possessed was brought to him.

chokri: Sidie thürüküsüo hu küvace, süo züri po yita, mo thüma kroo u malhü thi die; mha hihi bi küti Israel mi cejülü ngo mo zolu, süzita.
english: When the demon was cast out, the mute man spoke. The multitudes marveled, saying, "Nothing like this has ever been seen in Israel!"

chokri: Süri, Phariseekoe sü; Pu thürüküsuko küde-o züh die thürüküsuko hu küta zo, zi die pota.
english: But the Pharisees said, "By the prince of the demons, he casts out demons."

chokri: Süsa Jisu rüna nadekolü mo natsühkolü whi die puko synagogueko lü mi mütha mo tüyoküde züyiküve po püh mice sü, süze thüma dolü küthi künyi lünyiko thi küsührho vota.
english: Jesus went about all the cities and the villages, teaching in their synagogues, and preaching the Gospel of the Kingdom, and healing every disease and every sickness among the people.

chokri: Eli Pu thüma kroo ngo küsüce, puko ngo püh Pu lü müzhe ta, kükrenamoli puko tüko u kükhü küdi bi müza mo küzaküze ta küta na.
english: But when he saw the multitudes, he was moved with compassion for them, because they were harassed and scattered, like sheep without a shepherd.

chokri: Süsa Pu müthaküyikoce po die, rüce-e krophi, eli, mhathomi-e tsari zo, zita.
english: Then he said to his disciples, "The harvest indeed is plentiful, but the laborers are few.

chokri: Süna neko yi Nyepoo po mhathomi kütsüh sü kütona shote, zisü
english: Pray therefore that the Lord of the harvest will send out laborers into his harvest."

chokri: Süsa Jisu Pu müthaküyi kürikünako ci püh Puce süyi die, puko po müsakümo rüpüko huyi küve, küthi künyi mo küsü kümüza kükrekre ti mütü thi küsührhoyi küve küku püh puko prü sü.
english: He called to himself his twelve disciples, and gave them authority over unclean spirits, to cast them out, and to heal every disease and every sickness.

chokri: Süze kütsüh küsü kürikünako za hikohi; Kürao Simon lie ciyo küti-o mo pu sazüh-o Andrew, Zebedee nu James mo pu sazüh-o John;
english: Now the names of the twelve apostles are these. The first, Simon, who is called Peter; Andrew, his brother; James the son of Zebedee; John, his brother;

chokri: Philip mo Bartholomew; Thomas mo Matthew khazhonu kükhrüo, Alphaeus nu James, mo Thaddaeus,
english: Philip; Bartholomew; Thomas; Matthew the tax collector; James the son of Alphaeus; and Lebbaeus, whose surname was Thaddaeus;

chokri: Canaanmi Simon, mo Jisu tü küsüo Iscariot Judas sa.
english: Simon the Canaanite; and Judas Iscariot, who also betrayed him.

chokri: Jisu-e mi kürikünako kütsüh die pukoce; Neko mülükümomi sholü vohi; mo Samaritanmi rüna pühlü ri lü hite;
english: Jesus sent these twelve out, and charged them, saying, "Don't go among the Gentiles, and don't enter into any city of the Samaritans.

chokri: Eli tasü Israelmi müdi küva koko celü vote,
english: Rather, go to the lost sheep of the house of Israel.

chokri: Mo neko vo küyice; tüyo küde münoto taho; zi küti posüte;
english: As you go, preach, saying, 'The Kingdom of Heaven is at hand!'

chokri: Küthimi thi küsührho süyi, leprami thi küsührho süyi, küsami phu mürhüh sü, küsü rüpüko hu vayi; neko müthu ngoyi mo müthu püh mi prü süte.
english: Heal the sick, cleanse the lepers, and cast out demons. Freely you received, so freely give.

chokri: Ne presa bühlü suna, mori rüka mo presathi pühri pü tahi;
english: Don't take any gold, nor silver, nor brass in your money belts.

chokri: Mori ne rüvüh lakho, ne bola küna, ne pheku mori ne thü ri püh tahite, kükrenamoli, mhaküthimi-e uva ngoti züzo kütina.
english: Take no bag for your journey, neither two coats, nor shoes, nor staff: for the laborer is worthy of his food.

chokri: Süze ne rüna nadelü lüri mori natsühlü lüri, sopüh celü vo zü shi küti kütso die voyi, mo lata kümothe ce sülü bazoyite.
english: Into whatever city or village you enter, find out who in it is worthy; and stay there until you go on.

chokri: Süze no ce sülü lüküyice galiphi püh ce sülü süte;
english: As you enter into the household, greet it.

chokri: Mo ce süo putü lize ne liphi po ce sülü ba küyio thiyi, süri ce süo pütü mo lize ne liphi po ne yo la vori kütao thiyite.
english: If the household is worthy, let your peace come on it, but if it isn't worthy, let your peace return to you.

chokri: Mo thüma kühopühri ne zühyi muta lize, mori ne zhopo rünyi mu ta lize, ne ce süo lü mori rüna süo lüno ta pari küzüce, ne pheyo nyophu kükhu vate.
english: Whoever doesn't receive you, nor hear your words, as you go out of that house or that city, shake off the dust from your feet.

chokri: I neko ce potü süto, zünyo küti küto tüsonha Sodom mo Gomarrah nyi kümüjoe rüna süo kümüjo ceri yheyi rüyi ku zoto.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, it will be more tolerable for the land of Sodom and Gomorrah in the day of judgment than for that city.

chokri: Yhie, Tüko-e sace dolü küvo bi I neko kütsüh sü to zü ho; nekoe tünyhi do küve bi zoyite, mo mükhro zho küve biyite.
english: "Behold, I send you out as sheep in the midst of wolves. Therefore be wise as serpents, and harmless as doves.

chokri: Eli nekoe thüma yo münuyite, kükrenamoli süko neko tüpüh mülhiko kühulü süto, mo puko synagogueko lüno neko vüto tina.
english: But beware of men: for they will deliver you up to councils, and in their synagogues they will scourge you.

chokri: Mo mi aza na neko züh küzhoko mo küdeko mhuzülü voto, kükrenamoli süko ri mo mülükümoko mhüzülü ri zhopo püh thisü kütona.
english: Yes, and you will be brought before governors and kings for my sake, for a testimony to them and to the Gentiles.

chokri: Eli mi neko tü küsüce, neko dipüh bi die mha po to sheli küti lü ne lü künyi thi hite; kükrenamoli putü vori küyice nepo dipüh po toshi küti khasü to tina.
english: But when they deliver you up, don't be anxious how or what you will say, for it will be given you in that hour what you will say.

chokri: Sücesü nethono moli neko Poo Rüpüo nelü kübao tho mha posü küto na.
english: For it is not you who speak, but the Spirit of your Father who speaks in you.

chokri: Sülize u sazüh-o tho u züra-o tüsü mi po dokhritoü po-e u nuneko tü sü to; mo u nunekoe u krüneko mütsu süri die puko tüpüh mipo dokhri to.
english: "Brother will deliver up brother to death, and the father his child. Children will rise up against parents, and cause them to be put to death.

chokri: Mo aza na mi mütü po neko mütsü to. Süri yhie zoba pu küla tso küyio külayi to.
english: You will be hated by all men for my name's sake, but he who endures to the end will be saved.

chokri: Süri mi rüna hi-olü ne müthi kütace ta rüna kükrelü vo tayi; kükrenamoli I neko ce po süto; Thümanuo küvori mhüzü neko Israel rünakolü vo tsoyi külho na.
english: But when they persecute you in this city, flee into the next, for most assuredly I tell you, you will not have gone through the cities of Israel, until the Son of Man has come.

chokri: Müthaküyioe pu kümütha-o ceri zhoku mo, mori ceta-oe pu nyepoo ceri zhoku mo.
english: "A disciple is not above his teacher, nor a servant above his lord.

chokri: Müthaküyioe pu bi mo ceta-oe pu nyepoo bi küyi sasü tsüh zo, Mi celü nyepoo thori yisü Beelzebub litaze, pu celümiko yisü dithili-e cita?
english: It is enough for the disciple that he be like his teacher, and the servant like his lord. If they have called the master of the house Beelzebul, how much more those of his household!

chokri: Süna süko müprüh ta hite; kükrenamoli mhapühri sühpra mi mhüngo thi modie whü püh ma küta di, mori mipo se mo küto na küva püh ma küta di zo.
english: Therefore don't be afraid of them, for there is nothing covered that will not be revealed; and hidden that will not be known.

chokri: I küzühlü nekoce po küsüko nekoe püh küvelü posü te; mo neko nyilü mükhrüh po küsüko pühpra cetu-o se süte.
english: What I tell you in the darkness, speak in the light; and what you hear whispered in the ear, proclaim on the housetops.

chokri: Sülize ne mo hio dokhri va zori ne rüpüo dokhri vayi külhoko müprüh ta hite; eli mezalüno ne rüpüri mo ne mo ri müka vayi kütoo müprühyite.
english: Don't be afraid of those who kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul. Rather, fear him who is able to destroy both soul and body in Gehenna.

chokri: Tsükhra küna püh presa püh khriyo mome? Süri neko Poo müdo tazo kümosa süko pühri rütu cejü prü tayo mo.
english: "Aren't two sparrows sold for an assarion? Not one of them falls on the ground apart from your Father's will,

chokri: Eli ne piyo ne pithapriko mütü ri phi tsoyite.
english: but the very hairs of your head are all numbered.

chokri: Süna neko müprüh ta hite, ne tsükhra kükro ceri ne ma neku tina.
english: Therefore don't be afraid. You are of more value than many sparrows.

chokri: Süna thüma kühopühri thüma mhüzülü aza phra yo lize I ri tüyo küba a Po mhuzülü pu za phrato.
english: Everyone therefore who confesses me before men, him I will also confess before my Father who is in heaven.

chokri: Süri thüma kühopühri thüma mhuzülü aza phra mu tayo lize, I ri tüyo küba a Poo mhuzülü pu za phra mu tato.
english: But whoever denies me before men, him I will also deny before my Father who is in heaven.

chokri: I küzüküve kha cejü sü küto na kü vori lüta hite, I küzühküve moli zesho khasü to küvo ri zo.
english: "Don't think that I came to send peace on the earth. I didn't come to send peace, but a sword.

chokri: I-e mipo külükre die unu po upo mütsu, unupü po uzu mütsu, umhüpü po unapü mütsu zi kütona küvori zo.
english: For I came to set a man at odds against his father, and a daughter against her mother, and a daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law.

chokri: Sidie thüma püh ngomu-e putho pu cekrolü süri to.
english: A man's foes will be those of his own household.

chokri: Kühopüh ri aceri pu po pu zu khrüku yo kütimi sümi a thüma thi sümo, mori pu aceri punu mori pu nupü khrüku yo lize pu a thüma thi sümo.
english: He who loves father or mother more than me is not worthy of me; and he who loves son or daughter more than me isn't worthy of me.

chokri: Süze thüma kühopühri putho pu cross püh mo die asa müdzi timi, a thüma thi sümo.
english: He who doesn't take his cross and follow after me, isn't worthy of me.

chokri: Thüma kühopühri pu kürhühro mükrü püh pu züthiyi künyimi pu süo müdi vato; süri thüma kühopühri aza na pu pho müka müdi va lize, pusüo ngo layi to.
english: He who finds his life will lose it; and he who loses his life for my sake will find it.

chokri: Kühopühri neko zühyi yo kütimi a zühyi yo, mo a zühyiyo kütimi a kütsüh küsüo ri zühyi yo.
english: He who receives you receives me, and he who receives me receives him who sent me.

chokri: Sadzühküsemi za lü sadzühküsemi zühyi yo kütimi sadzühküseo zhokhro ngoto.
english: He who receives a prophet in the name of a prophet will receive a prophet's reward: and he who receives a righteous man in the name of a righteous man will receive a righteous man's reward.

chokri: Süze thüma kühopühri müthaküyimi zalü zükohe pühri püh küzhoshüh hiko mipühri da sü lize, I nekoce po süto, Pu mhapüh ceri pu zhokhromüdi va lho.
english: Whoever gives one of these little ones just a cup of cold water to drink in the name of a disciple, most assuredly I tell you he will in no way lose his reward."

chokri: Süsa Jisu-e müthaküyi kürinkünakoce zü potso küva sa Pu sülüno tasü rünakolü vo mi mütha, mo mha popüh mika to vota.
english: It happened that when Jesus had finished directing his twelve disciples, he departed from there to teach and preach in their cities.

chokri: Sülize John küdücelü ba die Khristao mhatho dzühko se küsüce pu sadzimi küna kütsüh sü die, Puce:
english: Now when John heard in the prison the works of Christ, he sent two of his disciples

chokri: No vori to kütao sü me, mo die hapo kükre püh müri la bata? zi die kütso ta.
english: and said to him, "Are you he who comes, or should we look for another?"

chokri: Jisu unyi khü küla die sü, nenyi vo die John ce nenyi küseküngoko püh po süte;
english: Jesus answered them, "Go and tell John the things which you hear and see:

chokri: Mhücemi mha ngoyi bate, pheyhomi sho tayi, leprami müsayi, nyijimi mha khü seyi, küsami phu müsüyi, mo küdimiko ce züyiküveo püh posü bate.
english: the blind receive their sight, the lame walk, the lepers are cleansed, the deaf hear, the dead are raised up, and the poor have good news preached to them.

chokri: Mo thüma kühopühri mhapüh nari ayo jotayo kümomi yheve tho.
english: Blessed is he who finds no occasion for stumbling in me."

chokri: Süsa unyi ta küta sa Jisu-e John dzüh püh thümakro-o ce po shühdü die puko yisü, neko nhatsalü dipüh pe tozü die pra la? Tükhra-e vo tükhrü hü küna küsü püh me?
english: As these went their way, Jesus began to say to the multitudes concerning John, "What did you go out into the wilderness to see? A reed shaken by the wind?

chokri: Süri nekoe dipüh pe tozü die pra-a? Thüma u khüne kümha süh kütimi püh me? Yhei, Thüma u khüne kümünü mo kümha sühyo kütimiko-e küdemi cekolü bayo;
english: But what did you go out to see? A man in soft clothing? Behold, those who wear soft clothing are in king's houses.

chokri: Eli neko dipüh pe tozü die pra la? Sadzühküsemi püh me? I nekoce potü süto, sadzühküsemi ceri zhoku küti püh zo.
english: But why did you go out? To see a prophet? Yes, I tell you, and much more than a prophet.

chokri: Kükrenamoli pu dzüh popüh kümüta: Yhei, I nmhuzülüno a shoyi-o kütsüh süto, mo pu n mhuzülüno n shoko küsüh süto; zipüh kümütao sü pu zo.
english: For this is he, of whom it is written, 'Behold, I send my messenger before your face, who will prepare your way before you.'

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, thünomi yo Ihü küvoriko dolü John mi dzülu khaküsüo ceri zhoku küti süri mozo, süri tüyo küde balü künyithoo zo sheri pu ceri zhoku.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, among those who are born of women there has not arisen anyone greater than John the Baptizer; yet he who is least in the Kingdom of Heaven is greater than he.

chokri: Süze John tülüno vori tsüdo kütso mi tüyo küde phu murimu tate, mo murimu küyimi süo püh uzü thiyi bate.
english: From the days of John the Baptizer until now, the Kingdom of Heaven suffers violence, and the violent take it by force.

chokri: Kükrenamoli John vori kümothe sadzühküsemi mütü mo thüzhoo ri sadzühküse zü po vorizo.
english: For all the prophets and the law prophesied until John.

chokri: Mo neko ri süo ngoyi nyiyo lize, hi-ohi vori too küta Elijah zo ho.
english: If you are willing to receive it, this is Elijah, who is to come.

chokri: Uni künemi po rünyiyi te.
english: He who has ears to hear, let him hear.

chokri: Süri tsüdonumiko hi püh dipüh bi lie pota? Süsü natsimiko-e lhethothilü no mürü thi die huhu yisü:
english: "But to what shall I compare this generation? It is like children sitting in the marketplaces, who call to their companions

chokri: Ha lila khusü; eli ne-e nasu mute ha-e thükri thisü eli ne-e krayi mote, zidie po küsüko bi zo.
english: and say, 'We played the flute for you, and you didn't dance. We mourned for you, and you didn't lament.'

chokri: Kükrenamoli, John vori die mi züh mhati mhakra mo rü, mi pu yisü thürü küsü zühyo lizita.
english: For John came neither eating nor drinking, and they say, 'He has a demon.'

chokri: Thümanuo vori die mi züh mhatimhakra zo, süri puko Pu yisü, Yhei, U coyhu kürüh mo khubüh zo büh, thüsoküyiko mo küphomoko khretho-o sü, zita. Eli, pu nuneko yono mhaseo küve tha süyo.
english: The Son of Man came eating and drinking, and they say, 'Behold, a gluttonous man and a drunkard, a friend of tax collectors and sinners!' But wisdom is justified by her children."

chokri: Sücesü Pu Pu küku mhatho thi shüh küsü rünakolü thülü küdeyi kümo na Pu süko tha shühdü die sü:
english: Then he began to denounce the cities in which most of his mighty works had been done, because they didn't repent.

chokri: Tsee! Chorazin, no thiyite! Tsee! Bethsaida, nori thiyite! Kükrenamoli, mhatho küzho thi puh nece küsüko hi bi die Tyre mo Sidon nyi rünalü ri thisü lize puko-e thazütho gakhrokhü mo nyogwü süh die thülü küdeyi tato murü.
english: "Woe to you, Chorazin! Woe to you, Bethsaida! For if the mighty works had been done in Tyre and Sidon which were done in you, they would have repented long ago in sackcloth and ashes.

chokri: Eli I nekoce posü to, kütso küto tüso nha-e ne rüle ceri Tyre mo Sidon rülee yhieyi veku to.
english: But I tell you, it will be more tolerable for Tyre and Sidon on the day of judgment than for you.

chokri: Süze no Kapernaun, n tho nthi kürükrü püh tü tso bate me? N khipüh prü mezalü sü vato. Kükrena moli, n celü mhatho küzho thi küsüko hi Sodomlü ri thi sü lize Sodom-e tha kütso ri balu to murü.
english: You, Capernaum, who are exalted to Heaven, you will go down to Hades. For if the mighty works had been done in Sodom which were done in you, it would have remained until this day.

chokri: Eli I nce posü to, kütso küto nha-e n rüle ceri Sodom rülee yhieyi veku ta zoto.
english: But I tell you that it will be more tolerable for the land of Sodom, on the day of judgment, than for you."

chokri: Sücesü Jisu-e küla die sü; Apo, tü mo cejü mhu Nyepoo, n müza ve; Kükrenamoli, no mha küsekülüko mhuzülü mha hiko küva püh müta die püh payhoko müsemüngo küsü na.
english: At that time, Jesus answered, "I thank you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth, that you hid these things from the wise and understanding, and revealed them to infants.

chokri: Süzi Kütho, Apo, no n mhuzüce zo-e hizi küti n müdo küta na, zita.
english: Yes, Father, for so it was well-pleasing in your sight.

chokri: Apoo tho mha mütü kha pün a prü süve; Poo zo kümosa mipüh ri nuo seyo mo; mori nuo tho tha püh müsemüngo sü zo kümosa mipühri Poo seyo mo.
english: All things have been delivered to me by my Father. No one knows the Son, except the Father; neither does anyone know the Father, except the Son, and he to whom the Son desires to reveal him.

chokri: Neko kümüzhe mo ne püh müsi küta khüko ace vorite, I kürülü khapüh sümi prüto.
english: "Come to me, all you who labor and are heavily burdened, and I will give you rest.

chokri: Neko a kadu püyi mo a celü mhaseyite, kükrenamoli, I a zho ve, mo ko mo, kitina, süzi lize nelü kürülü ngoyi to.
english: Take my yoke upon you, and learn from me, for I am gentle and lowly in heart; and you will find rest for your souls.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, a kadu pü rüyi, mo apüh ri pü mbro tina.
english: For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light."

chokri: Sütücesü Jisu-e kürülü tüso nha tasü mi yi püthü vozü ru, Pü müthaküyiko müri küta na atalha krüh mürhühti too ta.
english: At that time, Jesus went on the Sabbath day through the grain fields. His disciples were hungry and began to pluck heads of grain and to eat.

chokri: Eli Phariseeko sü ngo sü die, Pu yisü, Yhei, N sadziko kürülüzho nha ri thüzho kümo thiyo zo, zita.
english: But the Pharisees, when they saw it, said to him, "Behold, your disciples do what is not lawful to do on the Sabbath."

chokri: Eli Pu süko yisü, neko David mo pu sadziko-e müri kütace dipüh bi die;
english: But he said to them, "Haven't you read what David did, when he was hungry, and those who were with him;

chokri: Jihova celü lü die pethiküzhoko libi zo kümosa; puri mo pu züh kütako ri po ti küti thüzho kümo rüsucelü mi mhüngo küthi tsükhrüda-o tiyi ta shi küti phi mo zo me?
english: how he entered into the house of God, and ate the show bread, which was not lawful for him to eat, neither for those who were with him, but only for the priests?

chokri: Mori pethiküzhoko dibi die kürülüzho nha kürüsücelü kürülüzho thüzho varhü zori puko küjo di, süzi küti thopüh kümüzü neko phi mo zo me?
english: Or have you not read in the law, that on the Sabbath day, the priests in the temple profane the Sabbath, and are guiltless?

chokri: Süri I nekoce posü to, kürüsüce ceri zhoku küti püh thüthi hilü ba; zita.
english: But I tell you that one greater than the temple is here.

chokri: Süri nekoe I rüsu küthi mori phikümüzhe anüku, zi küti co-o seba yo lize nekoe küjo küdi püh müjo tayi lho moru; zita.
english: But if you had known what this means, 'I desire mercy, and not sacrifice,' you would not have condemned the guiltless.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, thümanuo kürülüzho mhu ri nyepo zo küti na, zita.
english: For the Son of Man is Lord of the Sabbath."

chokri: Süsa Pu sülüno ta pra die tasü puko sinagog celü lü;
english: He departed there, and went into their synagogue.

chokri: Sücesü, Yhei u be sa kütami püh sülü ba, Mo puko Pu müzho küto na Pu kütso die; kürülüzho nha mi thi küsührho küti thüzho me? zita.
english: And behold there was a man with a withered hand. They asked him, "Is it lawful to heal on the Sabbath day?" that they might accuse him.

chokri: Mo Pu süko yisü, ne dolü humi tüko püh ba die süo kürülüzho nha rütu khuholü lü kütace pu vo süo süsa püh pari tayo kümo sopüh ba?
english: He said to them, "What man is there among you, who has one sheep, and if this one falls into a pit on the Sabbath day, won't he grab on to it, and lift it out?

chokri: Sülize thümae di thüdupüh tüko ceri pu ma rüh kuta? Süna kürülüzho nha ri mha küve küthi thü zho zo, zita.
english: Of how much more value then is a man than a sheep! Therefore it is lawful to do good on the Sabbath day."

chokri: Süsa Pu thümao yisü, n be sho püh parite, zisü, mo pu sho püh pari; süce süo ri thi mve püh kükreco bi va.
english: Then he told the man, "Stretch out your hand." He stretched it out; and it was restored whole, just like the other.

chokri: Süsa Phariseeko ta pra die vo puko dipüh bi die Pu dokhri va toshi küti thüdo rhü küka süta.
english: But the Pharisees went out, and conspired against him, how they might destroy him.

chokri: Sücesü Jisu süo seyi die sülüno ta rüde ta; mo thüma kükro Pu sa müdzi vota; mo Pu süko mütü thi küsührho sü.
english: Jesus, perceiving that, withdrew from there. Great multitudes followed him; and he healed them all,

chokri: Sidie Pu süko po Pu dzüh püh mi müse hino die puko kükha va.
english: and charged them that they should not make him known:

chokri: Sidie thazü Isaiah sadzüküse-o po:
english: that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through Isaiah the prophet, saying,

chokri: Yhe, a cetao, I pu kü da küyio, I pu kükhrü thoo, alüzori pu ngo a künü-o; I a Rüpü kha Pu yo süto. Sidie Pu thüco thüpe thi püh mülükümoko ka süto.
english: "Behold, my servant whom I have chosen; My beloved in whom my soul is well pleased: I will put my Spirit on him. He will proclaim justice to the Gentiles.

chokri: Pu mi züh kümürha mori küphüse ri tayi Iho, mori shopü sholiko lü ri mipo Pu khü selho.
english: He will not strive, nor shout; Neither will anyone hear his voice in the streets.

chokri: Pu sheco-o po kuyi ta kümothe, tükhrü prühlipre küzü pühri cephro valho, mo Pue metobüh kükholo ne püh zori brü mhü valho.
english: He won't break a bruised reed. He won't quench a smoking flax, Until he leads justice to victory.

chokri: Sidie shühyieko po Pu zalü u kümüri ne die lhüto, süzi püh kümüta züo thi tsühyi.
english: In his name, the Gentiles will hope."

chokri: Süsa mi thürüküsü po u züh küta u mhüce mo züpokütho püh züh Puce vori, mo Pu süo thi küsührho süva, süsa pu züri po mo mha ri ngo parita.
english: Then one possessed by a demon, blind and mute, was brought to him and he healed him, so that the blind and mute man both spoke and saw.

chokri: Sücesü thüma mütü u malhü thi die sü, hi-ohi David nuo zo mo me? zita.
english: All the multitudes were amazed, and said, "Can this be the son of David?"

chokri: Süri Phariseeko süo se sü die; Thüma hio thürüküsüko küde-o Beelzebub küku süh zo kümosa thürüküsüko huyiyo mo, zita.
english: But when the Pharisees heard it, they said, "This man does not cast out demons, except by Beelzebul, the prince of the demons."

chokri: Jisu puko lüdo seyi die puko yisü, küde kühopühri putho pu püphro ta lize katayo; mo rüna mori ce kühopühri putho pü püphro ta lize thayi yo mo.
english: Knowing their thoughts, Jesus said to them, "Every kingdom divided against itself is brought to desolation, and every city or house divided against itself will not stand.

chokri: Süze Satan tho Satan hu ta lize putho pu püphro vazo, sülize dipüh bi die pu küde thayi veta?
english: If Satan casts out Satan, he is divided against himself. How then will his kingdom stand?

chokri: Mo I-e Beelzebub küku süh die thürüküsüko huyo lize, neko nunekoe sopüh küku süh die süko hu yo la? Süna puko süri die neko sheco thita to.
english: If I by Beelzebul cast out demons, by whom do your children cast them out? Therefore they will be your judges.

chokri: Eli I Jihova Rüpü küku süh die küsü rüpüko huyo lize, süsa Jihova küde nekoce vori tazo.
english: But if I by the Spirit of God cast out demons, then the Kingdom of God has come upon you.

chokri: Süze mipühno puceri kükumi püh celü lü die pu tüpüh pha va müra modie dipüh bi die pu mhako mükayi veta? Pu tüpüh pha küva züh pu mhako khiyi küve zo.
english: Or how can one enter into the house of the strong man, and plunder his goods, unless he first bind the strong man? Then he will plunder his house.

chokri: Kühopühn aceco kümoo a kümütsumi zo, mo thüma kühopühri a züh mha künguyo kümoo süh küho thi vayo.
english: "He who is not with me is against me, and he who doesn't gather with me, scatters.

chokri: Süna I nekoce posü to, küphoma kühopühri mo thüma kütha küho pühri va püh thüma prüto, eli Kümüsa Rüpü kütha-e vapüh thüma prü yilho.
english: Therefore I tell you, every sin and blasphemy will be forgiven men, but the blasphemy against the Spirit will not be forgiven men.

chokri: Mo kühopühri zü po püh thümanuo mütsu küti zo-e vapüh pu prüto; eli kühopühri Kümüsa Rüpü küthami cejü hilü ri mo tüyo ri pu küjo vapüh prü yilho.
english: Whoever speaks a word against the Son of Man, it will be forgiven him; but whoever speaks against the Holy Spirit, it will not be forgiven him, neither in this age, nor in that which is to come.

chokri: Nhasebo-o thi mve sü die pu se ri po veyi, mo lize nhasebo-o thi müsü sü die pu se ri po süta; zite: pu se yo no pu bo ri seyi yo tina.
english: "Either make the tree good, and its fruit good, or make the tree corrupt, and its fruit corrupt; for the tree is known by its fruit.

chokri: Neko nyhibü shühyeko, neko vemo zo die, dibi die mhaküve poyi ta? Kükrenamoli mha pulü chupü küba bi die pu talü po pariyo tina.
english: You offspring of vipers, how can you, being evil, speak good things? For out of the abundance of the heart, the mouth speaks.

chokri: Thüma küve mi pu mülü mhabüh küvelü no mha küve püh pariyo, mo thüma küsümino pu mülü mhabühlü no mha küsü püh pariyo.
english: The good man out of his good treasure brings out good things, and the evil man out of his evil treasure brings out evil things.

chokri: Eli I nekoce posü to, kütso küto tüsonha-e thüma züthu zürü küpo mütü ri na puco lha küka la zoto.
english: I tell you that every idle word that men speak, they will give account of it in the day of judgment.

chokri: Kükrenamoli n züpo na n yisü müzi li zito, mo n züpo na n müjo ri vazo to tina, zita.
english: For by your words you will be justified, and by your words you will be condemned."

chokri: Süsa lüsiküsemi mo Pheriseemi kropüh Pu yisü, Kümütha-o, ha n celü zasi püh ngo nyiyo le, zisü.
english: Then certain of the scribes and Pharisees answered, "Teacher, we want to see a sign from you."

chokri: Süri Pu süko zü küla die sü, küsü küthi mo kürüzü shühyeko-e zasiko rüda mo phuyo küti zo; eli Jonah sadzühküseo yono zasi thi küsüo zo kümosa zasi kükre pühri kha la süyi lhote;
english: But he answered them, "An evil and adulterous generation seeks after a sign, but no sign will be given it but the sign of Jonah the prophet.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, Jonah-e tüsozho süh mo tüzühzho süh khu küzhoo vadelü küzü bi thümanuo ri tüsozho süh mo tüzühzho süh cejü mülülü züto.
english: For as Jonah was three days and three nights in the belly of the whale, so will the Son of Man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth.

chokri: Zünyoküti küto tüsonha Ninevehmiko süri die tsüdo nulhü hiko züh thato, sidie puko müjo to, kükrenamoli puko Jonah zhopo mülüyi die thülü küdeyi küta na; mo Yhei, Jonah ceri zhoku küti püh hice ba.
english: The men of Nineveh will stand up in the judgment with this generation, and will condemn it, for they repented at the preaching of Jonah; and behold, someone greater than Jonah is here.

chokri: Zünyo küti küto tüsonha mükhroco küdepü süri die tsüdo numi hiko züh tha die süko müjo to; Kükrenamoli pu cejü kümüprühtholü vori die Solomon mhase zü rünyi küti na; süze Yhie! Solomon ceri zhoku küti püh hice ba, zita.
english: The queen of the south will rise up in the judgment with this generation, and will condemn it, for she came from the ends of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and behold, someone greater than Solomon is here.

chokri: Süze müsa kümo rüpüo thüma lüno pra kütace; pu kürülü thüthi phu die cejü küsokolü rühu ta tayo, süri ngoyi mota yo.
english: But the unclean spirit, when he is gone out of the man, passes through waterless places, seeking rest, and doesn't find it.

chokri: Süsa pue sü I tala sü hizü badie pari küta celü la voto; sidie pu la vori tice ce süo müthu mo phro kümüsa mo kütso küzüve püh küma ngoyi.
english: Then he says, 'I will return into my house from which I came out,' and when he has come back, he finds it empty, swept, and put in order.

chokri: Süsa pu ta pra die pu ceri süku küti rüpü thüna zühyi die sülü vori die lhü tayo; süsa thüma süo rüle künuco-e küraco ceri sü thünao tayo. Tsüdo kürüzü numi hiko yori sübi zoto, zita.
english: Then he goes, and takes with himself seven other spirits more evil than he is, and they enter in and dwell there. The last state of that man becomes worse than the first. Even so will it be also to this evil generation."

chokri: Pu thüma kroko züh kürüthi küthalü Yhei, Pu zu mo Pu sazüh neko Pu züh kürüthi tozu vori shozu thata.
english: While he was yet speaking to the multitudes, behold, his mother and his brothers stood outside, seeking to speak to him.

chokri: Süsa humi Puce, Yhei nzu mo n sazüh neko n züh kürüthi nyi die vori ceta tha ho; zisü.
english: One said to him, "Behold, your mother and your brothers stand outside, seeking to speak to you."

chokri: Eli Pu thüma Puce po küsüo yisü, Azu sopüh-a mo a sazüh neko somi-a?
english: But he answered him who spoke to him, "Who is my mother? Who are my brothers?"

chokri: Sidie Pu Pu be shopüh Pu müthaküyiko ceco tha die sü, Yhei, Azu mo a sazühzürako sü!
english: He stretched out his hand towards his disciples, and said, "Behold, my mother and my brothers!

chokri: Kükrenamoli, thüma kühopühri tüyo küba Apoo müdoko thi mo zühyo kütiko sü a sazühzürako, a lipüneko mo azuko zo, zita.
english: For whoever does the will of my Father who is in heaven, he is my brother, and sister, and mother."

chokri: Sünhasü Jisu celüno pari de dzüküzho shico bata.
english: On that day Jesus went out of the house, and sat by the seaside.

chokri: Süsa thüma kro küzho püh vori die Püce künguyi ta, süna Pu püzu pühlü lü die bayi, mo thüma krooe dzüküzho Poo bata.
english: Great multitudes gathered to him, so that he entered into a boat, and sat, and all the multitude stood on the beach.

chokri: Süsa Pü züvelü mha kükro pükoce po die sü: Yhei, Tsaküvami püh tsava tozu die prü:
english: He spoke to them many things in parables, saying, "Behold, a farmer went out to sow.

chokri: Mo pu tsava sü tice; tsa hu rütu shoshi prüta, sidie mürako vori die süko patiyita.
english: As he sowed, some seeds fell by the roadside, and the birds came and devoured them.

chokri: Mo hu rütu sü uzü ve kümo kütsütsürolü prü ta, mo cejü zü müsüh kümo na süko tsü mha süri ta.
english: Others fell on rocky ground, where they didn't have much soil, and immediately they sprang up, because they had no depth of earth.

chokri: Süri süko u me tsü kümüsühlü lü kümo na tüna süri phrü khriva.
english: When the sun had risen, they were scorched. Because they had no root, they withered away.

chokri: Süsari hu rütu tsahu dolü prüta, sidie tsahuko masüri die süko gükhriva.
english: Others fell among thorns. The thorns grew up and choked them:

chokri: Süri hu rütu cejü zü küvelü prüyi die u se hu se krapüh, hu se heshorüh mo hu se sühmüri jiyi.
english: and others fell on good soil, and yielded fruit: some one hundred times as much, some sixty, and some thirty.

chokri: Thüma kühopühri unyi ne die rünyiyi küvemi po rünyiyi te.
english: He who has ears to hear, let him hear."

chokri: Süsa müthaküyiko vori uco kütso die; No dipühna kükremice züve poyo la? zita.
english: The disciples came, and said to him, "Why do you speak to them in parables?"

chokri: Pu süko zü küla die po küti; Kükrenamoli neko po tüyo zü kümüsühko seyi küve khasü eli püko ce khasü mo, zisü.
english: He answered them, "To you it is given to know the mysteries of the Kingdom of Heaven, but it is not given to them.

chokri: Kükrenamoli thüma kühopühri mha püce kübao kha pü prü sasü to; mo pü ne küthi sayi to, süri thüma kühopühri mha püce ba kümoo kha pü prü sa küsüo mori püce kübao ri khi süh tato.
english: For whoever has, to him will be given, and he will have abundance, but whoever doesn't have, from him will be taken away even that which he has.

chokri: Süsü na I pukoce züve lüno mha po süyo, kükrenamoli puko pe yori ngoyi yo mo, rünyiyo ri seyi yomo; mori lü kükre riyi yomo zo tina.
english: Therefore I speak to them in parables, because seeing they don't see, and hearing, they don't hear, neither do they understand.

chokri: Mo süko dzüh thazü Isayae: Nekoe kürünyie rünyi to, eli seyi lho zoto, Mo neko küpe pe zoto, eli ngoyi lho zoto,
english: In them the prophecy of Isaiah is fulfilled, which says,  'By hearing you will hear, And will in no way understand; Seeing you will see, And will in no way perceive:

chokri: Süze thüma hiko u mülü rüdü te, uni ri künito te, mo puko mhü ri kamate; Kükrenamoli, püko mhü püh ngoyi, Mo puko ni püh rünyiyi, Mo puko mülü püh lüyi, sidie thülü küdeyi die apo püko thi küsührho küva kümüprüh na, zi die po püh kümütao thitsühyi küto na.
english: For this people's heart has grown callous, Their ears are dull of hearing, They have closed their eyes; Or else perhaps they might perceive with their eyes, Hear with their ears, Understand with their heart, And should turn again; And I would heal them.'

chokri: Eli neko mhü didüri thü pü kekrenamoli süo mha ngo tina mu neni dithedü thüjo pü sü süo mhakhü se tina.
english: "But blessed are your eyes, for they see; and your ears, for they hear.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, sadzühküsemi kükro ri mo kümathomi kükro ri neko küngoko hi ngo nyi shüh vori, eli süko ngoyi mote, mo puko neko rünyi kütiko rünyi nyi vori eli puko süko rünyiyi mote.
english: For most assuredly I tell you that many prophets and righteous men desired to see the things which you see, and didn't see them; and to hear the things which you hear, and didn't hear them.

chokri: Süna neko tsaküvao züve rünyi sü phite.
english: "Hear, then, the parable of the farmer.

chokri: Thüma kühopühri küde züo rünyiyi, eli pü süo lü kükreyi mo küva lü küsüo vori die tsa pü mülü lü prüh küsüo khi püh tatayo. Hiohi tsa shoshico prü kütao zo.
english: When anyone hears the word of the Kingdom, and doesn't understand it, the evil one comes, and snatches away that which has been sown in his heart. This is what was sown by the roadside.

chokri: Mo mi tsava püh kütsütsürolü sü küvao zoe; zü süo seyi mütha pu nü die züh mhayi yo.
english: What was sown on the rocky places, this is he who hears the word, and immediately with joy receives it;

chokri: Süri pulü pü me kra mve kümo na dopüh libi bayi yo, sidie züo na kümüzhe küti mo kümüthi kümünyi vori küyice pu rülele die pu nümo la tayo.
english: yet he has no root in himself, but endures for a while. When oppression or persecution arises because of the word, immediately he stumbles.

chokri: Süsari tsa rütu tsahu dolü lü kütao ri pu züo seyi zori tsüdo cejü hilü rüleko, mo mi müsü kümüsü ceneko külüko tho züo whu müdi la vayo, sidie use rüthiyi mo tayo.
english: What was sown among the thorns, this is he who hears the word, but the cares of this age and the deceitfulness of riches choke the word, and he becomes unfruitful.

chokri: Mo mi tsava püh cejü zü küvelü sü küyio zoe züo rünyiyi die püco seyi yo, mo pü se rüthiyi die hu se krapüh, hu se hieshorüh mo hu se sühmüri jiyi yo, zita.
english: What was sown on the good ground, this is he who hears the word, and understands it, who most assuredly bears fruit, and brings forth, some one hundred times as much, some sixty, and some thirty."

chokri: Pu züve kükre püh po puko ka die sü, Tüyo küde mipühno tsaküve püh pu yilü prüh küsü bizo.
english: He set another parable before them, saying, "The Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who sowed good seed in his field,

chokri: Eli pu vo züh küta sa pu ngomümi zotshü tsa püh atalha dolü prüh sü va die tata.
english: but while people slept, his enemy came and sowed darnel also among the wheat, and went away.

chokri: Sidie süko tsü süri die use ri rüthi pari küyice zotshü se ri ngo pari ta.
english: But when the blade sprang up and brought forth fruit, then the darnel appeared also.

chokri: Sücesü yi nyepoo ne cetamiko vori die pu yisü, Küzhoo, no tsa küve mpa püh n yilü prüh sü mo me? Sülize dibi die zotshüko ri tsü süri ta?
english: The servants of the householder came and said to him, 'Sir, didn't you sow good seed in your field? Where did this darnel come from?'

chokri: Püsükoce po die, ngomümi püh tho hizi küva zo zisü, süce pü cetako pu yisü Süze no hako po vo süko pa küngu va küto n müdo me? zisü.
english: "He said to them, 'An enemy has done this.' "The servants asked him, 'Do you want us to go and gather them up?'

chokri: Eli pu süko yisü, süzi su, kükrenamoli neko zotshüko pa küvoce atalhako ri pa küva kümüprüh na.
english: "But he said, 'No, lest perhaps while you gather up the darnel, you root up the wheat with them.

chokri: Yi kürüh tü vori kümothe püko po Ihü ba zoyi te, yikürüh tü vori lize I yikürühko ce, neko zotshüko pa künguyi müra die süko pha küngu püh vo melü müto vate, eli atalhakoe küngu püh vo alha celü süyite, zisüto, zita.
english: Let both grow together until the harvest, and in the harvest time I will tell the reapers, "First, gather up the darnel, and bind them in bundles to burn them; but gather the wheat into my barn."'"

chokri: Pu züve kükrepüh püh pukoce po la die sü, Tüyo küde gakresi püh bi zo, mi püh ne süo khipüh vo pü yilü prüh sü;
english: He set another parable before them, saying, "The Kingdom of Heaven is like a grain of mustard seed, which a man took, and sowed in his field;

chokri: Tsa hihi kükreko dolü pusi künyitho püh zo, eli pü tsü süri tice tizhe ga dolü kürükrütho püh thi die süri sühbo bi tayo, sidie tüyo rako vori pü co koyo u rüsühthi thi tayo.
english: which indeed is smaller than all seeds. But when it is grown, it is greater than the herbs, and becomes a tree, so that the birds of the air come and lodge in its branches."

chokri: Pu züve kükre püh pukoce po lasü; Tüyo küde khre bi zo, thünopümi püh süo süh vo thü kümüde rha küchu süh jü sü die thü süo pu pari tsoyi kümothe küva püh müzü ti bizo.
english: He spoke another parable to them. "The Kingdom of Heaven is like yeast, which a woman took, and hid in three measures of meal, until it was all leavened."

chokri: Jisue mha hiko mütülü küzüve po püh thüma kroo kasü; Pue küzüve mo die mhapühri po püh pukoce sü shemo.
english: Jesus spoke all these things in parables to the multitudes; and without a parable, he didn't speak to them,

chokri: Süosü kükrenamoli thazü sadzühküseo po; I ata taga püh züve poto; I cejü thiyi prühlüno küva püh kümüta kümükhrühko po süto; zipüh küma züko thitsühyi küto na.
english: that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through the prophet, saying,  "I will open my mouth in parables; I will utter things hidden from the foundation of the world."

chokri: Süsa Jisu thüma kroo khava die celü lüta süce Pü müthaküyiko Püce lüri di sü; yilü zotshü coo po münu püh hako ka süte; zita.
english: Then Jesus sent the multitudes away, and went into the house. His disciples came to him, saying, "Explain to us the parable of the darnel of the field."

chokri: Pu süko zü küla die sü; Tsa küve prüh küsü mao sü thümanuo zo.
english: He answered them, "He who sows the good seed is the Son of Man,

chokri: Yi süo cejüo zo; tsa küveko sü küdenuko zo, mo zotshü tsa kosü küsüo nüneko zo.
english: the field is the world; and the good seed, these are the children of the Kingdom; and the darnel are the children of the evil one.

chokri: Tsa süo prüh küsüo sü küsüo zo: Yikürüh sü cejü hio küla zo, mo yikürühmiko sü tüyoshoyimiko zo.
english: The enemy who sowed them is the devil. The harvest is the end of the age, and the reapers are angels.

chokri: Süze zotshüko rhüh küngu püh vo melü müto küva bi, cejü hio küla ri sü bi zito.
english: As therefore the darnel is gathered up and burned with fire; so will it be at the end of this age.

chokri: Thümanüo Pü shoyimi kütsüh sü die süko po vo Pu küde balü mha thi kümüsüko mo küsüküthiko mütü phu künguyi to.
