english: The Son of Man will send out his angels, and they will gather out of his Kingdom all things that cause stumbling, and those who do iniquity,

chokri: Sidie süko khapüh melü kügü vato, sülü kra mo uhu thüzhepü bato.
english: and will cast them into the furnace of fire. There will be weeping and the gnashing of teeth.

chokri: Süsa kümathokoe u Poo küde balü vepüh tünace bi ba tato. Kühopühri uni küne mi sümi po rünyi yite.
english: Then the righteous will shine forth like the sun in the Kingdom of their Father. He who has ears to hear, let him hear.

chokri: Tüyo küdee yipro pühlü cene küva püh kümüzü bizo; mipüh ne vo sü ngoyi die küvapüh ma die pü künüpü celü vori die pü mha küneküdi zhüh püh vori süo khri küyi bizo.
english: "Again, the Kingdom of Heaven is like a treasure hidden in the field, which a man found, and hid. In his joy, he goes and sells all that he has, and buys that field.

chokri: Süsa ri tüyo küde lhethomi püh ti ma kürühpü phu tayo küti bizo;
english: "Again, the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who is a merchant seeking fine pearls,

chokri: Pü vo ti ma kürüh süo ngo küyice pü celü vori die pu mha mütü zhüh pü vo süo khriyi ta.
english: who having found one pearl of great price, he went and sold all that he had, and bought it.

chokri: Süsari tüyo küdee khuma püh kügü pühdzüküzholü sü die khu kükrekre küti bo küngu küyi bizo.
english: "Again, the Kingdom of Heaven is like a dragnet, that was cast into the sea, and gathered some fish of every kind,

chokri: Süo chu küyice, puko süo süsa püvo dzüküzho poyo bayi die ucoko küda püh mhabühlü süyi mo uco kümoko püh kügü vayo.
english: which, when it was filled, they drew up on the beach. They sat down, and gathered the good into containers, but the bad they threw away.

chokri: Vo thüma lhü külaco ri sübi zoto, tüyo shoyimi vori die kümathoko dolüno kürüzüko küda kre züh tata to.
english: So will it be in the end of the world. The angels will come forth, and separate the wicked from among the righteous,

chokri: Sidie süko kügü püh me kümüre küthilü sü vato, sidie sülüno kra mo uhü thüzhe pü bata to.
english: and will cast them into the furnace of fire. There will be the weeping and the gnashing of teeth."

chokri: Neko zü hiko co mütü seyi ba me? zita. Mo püko Pu yisü, izo, zita.
english: Jesus said to them, "Have you understood all these things?" They answered him, "Yes, Lord."

chokri: Mo Pü süko yisü, Süna lüsiküseko kühopühri tüyo küdenumi thi küto na cipüh müthayi kütami püh mipüh ne pü celü mhabühlü mha küsa mo kügwü lha püh küpari bizo, zita.
english: He said to them, "Therefore, every scribe who has been made a disciple in the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who is a householder, who brings out of his treasure new and old things."

chokri: Süsa Jisu züve hiko potsüh küva sa thüthi sülüno tata.
english: It happened that when Jesus had finished these parables, he departed from there.

chokri: Süze Pu Pu tho Pü rünalü vori küyice, Pü süko synagogue lü mi mütha. Sücesü mi ungo thi die sü; thüma hiohi dipühceo no mhase hiko mo u malhü mhatho küku hiko ngoyi ta la ha?
english: Coming into his own country, he taught them in their synagogue, so that they were astonished, and said, "Where did this man get this wisdom, and these mighty works?

chokri: Hihi süh mhatho küthio nu zo mo me? Püzu ri Mary zo mo me? Süze pü sazühneko James mo Joseph mo Simon mo Judah hiko mo me?
english: Isn't this the carpenter's son? Isn't his mother called Mary, and his brothers, James, Joses, Simon, and Judas?

chokri: Süze pü lipüneko ri u züh bazo mo me? Sülize Pu dipühceno mha hiko ngoyi ta?
english: Aren't all of his sisters with us? Where then did this man get all of these things?"

chokri: Sidie püko pü yo u nümota, eli Jisu püko yisü, sadzühküsemi pü tho pü rünalü mo pü tho pü cekrolü zo kümosa kükrera mi pü rho kümo di; zita.
english: They were offended by him. But Jesus said to them, "A prophet is not without honor, except in his own country, and in his own house."

chokri: Sidie püko mülü kümu na pü sülü küku mhatho kükro thisü mu ta.
english: He didn't do many mighty works there because of their unbelief.

chokri: Sücesü Herod küdeo Jisu za müle pari küta se die pü cetako yisü,
english: At that time, Herod the tetrarch heard the report concerning Jesus,

chokri: Hiohi John zülu khaküsüo tazo, pü küsalüno rhühla süri tazo, süna umalhü mhatho künye hikohi Püyo thi pari bata zo, zita.
english: and said to his servants, "This is John the Baptizer. He is risen from the dead. That is why these powers work in him."

chokri: Herod süosü hizü pü sazüo Philip cemi Herodias na John tüyi die pü khapüh küdücelü süva.
english: For Herod had laid hold of John, and bound him, and put him in prison for the sake of Herodias, his brother Philip's wife.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, John süo yisü, no thüno süpü yi küti thüzho mo, zi küsü na.
english: For John said to him, "It is not lawful for you to have her."

chokri: Mo pü süo dokhri küva rhü küsüce makroo müprüh ta, kükrenamoli süko John yisü sadzüdküsemi püh thiyo tina.
english: When he would have put him to death, he feared the multitude, because they counted him as a prophet.

chokri: Süri Herod kümünu tüso vori küyice, Herodias nupü nasü püh püko mhüzülü sü die Herod nü thiyita.
english: But when Herod's birthday came, the daughter of Herodias danced among them and pleased Herod.

chokri: Süna thüno süpü püce mha kühopüh sho zoshi pu küshoo püh pu prü toli zi die pu zü khasü va.
english: Whereupon he promised with an oath to give her whatever she should ask.

chokri: Süsa süpü sü müzümüra puzu puce popüh kümüzü bi die sü, No John mi zülu khaküsüo pi püh mükhu pühlü süh vori a prüte, zita.
english: She, being prompted by her mother, said, "Give me here on a platter the head of John the Baptizer."

chokri: Mo küdeo ri pülü kümüzhe ta; süzori pü zü khasü küva na mo thüma pü züh ba die hi kübako na süo püh vo thünopü prü no die pu zü khasü va.
english: The king was grieved, but for the sake of his oaths, and of those who sat at the table with him, he commanded it to be given,

chokri: Sidie pu mi po vo küdücelü John pi veyita.
english: and he sent and beheaded John in the prison.

chokri: Süsa mi pu pi sü püh mükhu pühlü süpü vori die püh rüli süpü prüva, mo süpü süo püh die püzu ce vori ta.
english: His head was brought on a platter, and given to the young lady: and she brought it to her mother.

chokri: Süsa pü sadziko pu rüngu püh vo khrüh va; sidie vori Jisuce posü.
english: His disciples came, and took the body, and buried it; and they went and told Jesus.

chokri: Süsa Jisu zü süo se küyice Pu püzu pühlüno ta pü tsühkre vota; Süri thümako sü sesü die rüna lilü u phe tasü pü sa müdzi vorita.
english: Now when Jesus heard this, he withdrew from there in a boat, to a deserted place apart. When the multitudes heard it, they followed him on foot from the cities.

chokri: Sücesü pü thüma. Kroo ngo küsüce Pu süko phimüzhe die süko küthi künyiko thi küsührho sü.
english: Jesus went out, and he saw a great multitude. He had compassion on them, and healed their sick.

chokri: Süsa thüva vori küyice, pü müthaküyiko Püce vori die sü, thinyi hio thüralü te mo tüsozho ri vote, süna thüma kroo kütsüh püh rünalü sü die püko po vo utho u lüva khritiyi tate, zita.
english: When evening had come, his disciples came to him, saying, "This place is deserted, and the hour is already late. Send the multitudes away, that they may go into the villages, and buy themselves food."

chokri: Eli Jisu pükoce po die; püko po tata mori vezo, neko mhayi püko po tite; zita.
english: But Jesus said to them, "They don't need to go away. You give them something to eat."

chokri: Eli süko püce, hako hicehi tsükhrüda pühngu mo khu küna püh küta zo; zisü.
english: They told him, "We only have here five loaves and two fish."

chokri: pü sü, süko püh ace vorite; zisü.
english: He said, "Bring them here to me."

chokri: Sidie Pü thüma kroo po ki nhayo bayi no sü, mo pü tsükhrüda pühnguko mü khu küna pühyi die tüyo pe die galiphi sü die brüphre püh müthaküyiko belü sü, mo püko süko küza püh makroo prüsü.
english: He commanded the multitudes to sit down on the grass; and he took the five loaves and the two fish, and looking up to heaven, he blessed, broke and gave the loaves to the disciples, and the disciples gave to the multitudes.

chokri: Süsa püko mütü ri süko ti die püko küchü thiyi; mo püko tishoko shi küngu püh khopühne küriküna chu layi.
english: They all ate, and were filled. They took up twelve baskets full of that which remained left over from the broken pieces.

chokri: Süze püko mhati küyiko thüno thünu mo natsimi sa kümo mi nye pühngu müsüh lisi.
english: Those who ate were about five thousand men, besides women and children.

chokri: Süsa Jisue müthaküyiko po pü makroo kütsüh küba doce ta püzu lü lü die tasü pü mhüzü lishico ku ta nosü.
english: Immediately Jesus made the disciples get into the boat, and to go ahead of him to the other side, while he sent the multitudes away.

chokri: Sidie pü makroo kütsüh küva sa, pü sho tozu die takre cejüthu pühyo khota; mo thüva ta zori pü lübi sülü bata.
english: After he had sent the multitudes away, he went up into the mountain by himself to pray. When evening had come, he was there alone.

chokri: Eli tükhrae püzuo mütsu die khra vori küta na süo hü küye püvo zü mütsulü tata.
english: But the boat was now in the middle of the sea, distressed by the waves, for the wind was contrary.

chokri: Sücesü tüzühyo rikhu küvale dao tülü Jisue züyono ta pükoce vorizü.
english: In the fourth watch of the night, Jesus came to them, walking on the sea.

chokri: Eli müthaküyikoe Pü züyono ta vori küzü ngo die müprüh shüh die sü, Rüpü püh tazo sidie u müprüh pü se zota.
english: When the disciples saw him walking on the sea, they were troubled, saying, "It's a ghost!" and they cried out for fear.

chokri: Süri Jisu rükri pükoce po die sü, neko lü ne nüyite, I zo müprüh ta hite, zita.
english: But immediately Jesus spoke to them, saying "Cheer up! I AM! Don't be afraid."

chokri: Süsa Peter Püce po die, Nyepoo no zo lize apori züyono ta nce pheriyite; zita.
english: Peter answered him and said, "Lord, if it is you, command me to come to you on the waters."

chokri: Mo pü sü pherite zisü, sücesü Peter püzuyono ta kiri die Jisuce phe tozü die dzüyono ta süta.
english: He said, "Come!" Peter stepped down from the boat, and walked on the waters to come to Jesus.

chokri: Eli pü khrade kürüh ngo südie müprüh shüh ta, mo rülüprü ta tozü ta. Süna pu sü, Nyepoo no a küla süte, zita.
english: But when he saw that the wind was strong, he was afraid, and beginning to sink, he cried out, saying, "Lord, save me!"

chokri: Süzisü mütha Jisu püpo sho püh pari pü ceyita, sidie pü yisü, Yhei n kümülü kütsao, dipühna no külüdo ta ha? zita.
english: Immediately Jesus stretched out his hand, took hold of him, and said to him, "You of little faith, why did you doubt?"

chokri: Süsa unyi püzulü lüri küyi sa tükhra lazüh ta.
english: When they got up into the boat, the wind ceased.

chokri: Süsa püzulü kütako vori die pü rüsüta, sidie püko sü, No Jihova nuo küthozo; zita.
english: Those who were in the boat came and worshiped him, saying, "You are truly the Son of God!"

chokri: Süsa püko süolü prüh prayitice, tasü küsolü, süosü Genezaretlü prata.
english: When they had crossed over, they came to the land of Gennesaret.

chokri: Sücesü thüma sülü külhüko pü se küyice püko thüma kütsüh püh rüna süshi sümhü mütü sü die küthi künyimiko züh püce vori.
english: When the men of that place recognized him, they sent into all that surrounding region, and brought to him all who were sick,

chokri: Sidie süko. Püce, püko po pü khüphre zori nyisü no die shota; mo süo zori nyi küyi khüko sührhoyita.
english: and they begged him that they might just touch the fringe of his garment. As many as touched it were made whole.

chokri: Süsa Jerusalem lü küvori lüsiküseko mo Phariseekoe Jisu kitso die;
english: Then Pharisees and scribes came to Jesus from Jerusalem, saying,

chokri: Dipühna n sadzikoe thazü pethimi zhoko varhüyo la? Kükrenamoli, puko mhaküti mhüzü u be miltüyo mo tina; zita.
english: "Why do your disciples disobey the tradition of the elders? For they don't wash their hands when they eat bread."

chokri: Eli Pu süko zü küla die sü; neko ri dipüh nai netho ne zhoko na Jihova zü khaküsüko varhü yola? zita.
english: He answered them, "Why do you also disobey the commandment of God because of your tradition?

chokri: Kükrenamoli, Jihova thazü, npo nzu rhoyite, mo thüma kühopühri pupo puzu rüshuhyo lize süo posata te, süzi püh müzü zo.
english: For God commanded, 'Honor your father and your mother,' and, 'He who speaks evil of father or mother, let him be put to death.'

chokri: Eli nekoe po die, thüma kühopühri püpo püzu yisü, No ayono dipüh kümve ngoyi küto müsüh sheli süko mütü müthu kha püh Jihova prüve; süzi küsümi püpo püzu rho mo zori pü kükha bayomo.
english: But you say, 'Whoever may tell his father or his mother, "Whatever help you might otherwise have gotten from me is a gift devoted to God,"

chokri: Sidie nekoe netho ne zhoko na Jihova zü khaküsüko püh kümüthu thi ve.
english: he shall not honor his father or mother.' You have made the commandment of God void because of your tradition.

chokri: Neko küthürakütiko, Isaiah sadzüküseoe neko na mhapo mve shüh püh kümüta hibi:
english: You hypocrites! Well did Isaiah prophesy of you, saying,

chokri: Thüma hiko uta püh a müno voriyo, mo püko ta püh a rhoyo; eli püko lüno a züh kümücuh shüh tayo.
english: 'These people draw near to me with their mouth, And honor me with their lips; But their heart is far from me.

chokri: Eli pükoe thümae zü khaküsü kümütha züko süh mütha die püko rüsu thüdo thi tate; zita.
english: And in vain do they worship me, Teaching as doctrine rules made by men.'"

chokri: Sidie pü makroo ci Püce süyi die püko yisü, nekorünyi die seyi te, zita.
english: He summoned the multitude, and said to them, "Hear, and understand.

chokri: Thüma talü külüko thüma thi mürho vayo mo; süri thüma lünoküpariko thüma va mürho vayo.
english: That which enters into the mouth doesn't defile the man; but that which proceeds out of the mouth, this defiles the man."

chokri: Süsa müthaküyiko vori Püce po die sü; Phariseekoe zü hiko se küyi sa püko nümo ba küta noriseba tatho? zisü.
english: Then the disciples came, and said to him, "Do you know that the Pharisees were offended, when they heard this saying?"

chokri: Jisu püko khü, küla die sü, Tüyo küba Apoe lüsükümo süh mütüko pava zoto.
english: But he answered, "Every plant which my heavenly Father didn't plant will be uprooted.

chokri: Püko po tsüzi balute! Pükoe u mhüküce shotha mo kümüthako zo; sülize mhücemi po mhücemi shotha lize unyi künanyi rütu tükhülü lü tayo.
english: Leave them alone. They are blind guides of the blind. If the blind guide the blind, both will fall into a pit."

chokri: Sücesü Peter Pu yisü, züve hio co küla münü püh hako ka süte, zita.
english: Peter answered him, "Explain the parable to us."

chokri: Süri Jisu sü, nekori tsüri mhase kükreyi mozo me? zita.
english: So Jesus said, "Do you also still not understand?

chokri: Mhakühopühri utalü külü khü u vadelü ki die khapüh covüthilü kügü vayo küti neko se mo zo me?
english: Don't you understand that whatever goes into the mouth passes into the belly, and then out of the body?

chokri: Süri utalü no küpari khü ulüno pariyo, mo süko thüma thi müsu vayo.
english: But the things which proceed out of the mouth come out of the heart, and they defile the man.

chokri: Kükrenamoli ulüno küparikoe, lüdo küsü, küdokhri, perüüküthi, Kürüzü kürügo, kücezü zhopo, mikütha hikohi pariyo küti na.
english: For out of the heart come forth evil thoughts, murders, adulteries, sexual sins, thefts, false testimony, and blasphemies.

chokri: Mha hikohi tho mi thi müsu vayo, eli ube mütü mo die mha küti na mi thi müsü vayo mo; zita.
english: These are the things which defile the man; but to eat with unwashed hands doesn't defile the man."

chokri: Süsa Jisu sülüno ta rüde sü Tyre mo Sidon nyi rünaco vota.
english: Jesus went out from there, and withdrew into the region of Tyre and Sidon.

chokri: Sücesü Yhie! Canaanmipü püh rüna sülüno vori die se zo die sü A phimüzhe zote, Nyepoo no David nuo; anupü küsü rüpü po kübü müsü shüh ta tale; zisü.
english: Behold, a Canaanite woman came out from those borders, and cried, saying, "Have mercy on me, Lord, you son of David! My daughter is severely demonized!"

chokri: Eli pü züpühri popüh süpü khü küla mota, Süsa müthaküyiko Püce vori die pü yisü; pü po tatate, kükrenamoli pü u sa müdzi die se tazote; zita.
english: But he answered her not a word. His disciples came and begged him, saying, "Send her away; for she cries after us."

chokri: Eli pü la sü, a kütsüh püh müdi küva Israelmi kokroko ce küsü zo; zita.
english: But he answered, "I wasn't sent to anyone but the lost sheep of the house of Israel."

chokri: Süsari thüno hipü vori pü rüsü die, Nyepoo a khrühi sü zote, zi bata.
english: But she came and worshiped him, saying, "Lord, help me."

chokri: Eli pü la sü, natsimi lüva kügü püh tüshikoce sü küti pütü mo, zi lata.
english: But he answered, "It is not appropriate to take the children's bread and throw it to the dogs."

chokri: Süri thünopü lasü, kütho zo Nyepoo, süri tüshiko zori u nyepomi mhacoba yono rüra kükiriko pati yozo, zita.
english: But she said, "Yes, Lord, but even the dogs eat the crumbs which fall from their masters' table."

chokri: Süna Jisu pü yisü, n kümülü zhozo ho, n külüo thipüh n küprüo thiyite, zisü. Süsa pü nüpü sütütülü sü sührhoyi ta.
english: Then Jesus answered her, "Woman, great is your faith! Be it done to you even as you desire." And her daughter was healed from that hour.

chokri: Süsa Jisu thinyi sülüno ta sü Galilee dzüküzho mürhe vorita. Sidie pü cejüthuyo kho die süyo baba ta.
english: Jesus departed there, and came near to the sea of Galilee; and he went up into the mountain, and sat there.

chokri: Sücesü thüma kro künye püh Püce vori, mo sükoe pheyhomi, mhücemi, zü po küthomi, lülemi, mo küthikünyi kükrekre kütiko züh die vori, mo Jisu süko mütü thi küsührho sü.
english: Great multitudes came to him, having with them the lame, blind, mute, maimed, and many others, and they put them down at his feet. He healed them,

chokri: Süsa makrooe züpoküthomi züpo küta, lülekütami sührho küta, pheyhomi shotayi küta, mo mhücemi mha ngoyi küta, hiko ngo die u malhü thi die Israel Jihova shühta.
english: so that the multitude wondered when they saw the mute speaking, injured whole, lame walking, and blind seeing--and they glorified the God of Israel.

chokri: Süsa Jisu müthaküyiko ci püh Püce süyi die püko yisü, I thüma kroo phimüzhete, kükrenamoli, püko tha zho süh azüh bate, mo püko mhapühri ti küto bamo, mo I püko po thükhü thi die kütsüh sülho, püko sholü phesari tayi ve tina; zita.
english: Jesus summoned his disciples and said, "I have compassion on the multitude, because they continue with me now three days and have nothing to eat. I don't want to send them away fasting, or they might faint on the way."

chokri: Sücesü müthaküyiko sü, uko nhatsa hilühino dipüh bi die thüma hidühi na kütico ngo püh püko külhuthiyi ve ta? zita.
english: The disciples said to him, "Where should we get so many loaves in a deserted place as to satisfy so great a multitude?"

chokri: Jisu pükoce, neko tsükhrüda didü püta la? Zi die kütso; püko sü, thüna mo khu künyi hu ba, zisü.
english: Jesus said to them, "How many loaves do you have?" They said, "Seven, and a few small fish."

chokri: Süsa pü thüma kroo po ki cejü bayi no die pü zü khasü,
english: He commanded the multitude to sit down on the ground;

chokri: Sidie pü tsükhrüda thünako mo khuko khi pühyi die galiphi sü die cephre püh müthaküyiko belü sü, mo püko süko püh makroo zasü.
english: and he took the seven loaves and the fish. He gave thanks and broke them, and gave to the disciples, and the disciples to the multitudes.

chokri: Sidie püko mütü süko tiyi die u küchu kühi thiyi; süsari ti kümüshoko shi küngu püh khopühne thüna chu layi.
english: They all ate, and were filled. They took up seven baskets full of the broken pieces that were left over.

chokri: Mo sünha mhati küyiko thünothünu mo natsimi sa kümo mi nyeda.
english: Those who ate were four thousand men, besides women and children.

chokri: Süsa pü thüma kroo kütsüh sü va die, püzu pühlü lü die ta sü Magadan rüna taralü vori ta.
english: Then he sent away the multitudes, got into the boat, and came into the borders of Magdala.

chokri: Sücesü Phariseeko mo Sadduceeko vori die pü po tüyono zasi püh thipüh püko ka no die pü müdephi ta.
english: The Pharisees and Sadducees came, and testing him, asked him to show them a sign from heaven.

chokri: Pü süko zü küla die sü, thüva küyice nekoe sü, tü müre bate, tsüsa tü ve tato; ziyo.
english: But he answered them, "When it is evening, you say, 'It will be fair weather, for the sky is red.'

chokri: Süsa küshüo lize, tü sü tato, kükrenamoli, tü müre mo kümhü sü zaza ba terü, ziyo.
english: In the morning, 'It will be foul weather today, for the sky is red and threatening.' Hypocrites! You know how to discern the appearance of the sky, but you can't discern the signs of the times!

chokri: Gwine mo kürüzü shühye hio zasiko libi phu tayo küti zo, Eli Jonah sadzühküseo yono thi küsü zasio zo kümosa zasi kükre pühri khala süyi Ihote; zita. Sidie pü süko kha va die tata.
english: An evil and adulterous generation seeks after a sign, and there will be no sign given to it, except the sign of the prophet Jonah." He left them, and departed.

chokri: Süsa müthaküyiko tasü kükreco vota, eli püko tsükhrüda khiyi rükra mota.
english: The disciples came to the other side and had forgotten to take bread.

chokri: Sücesü Jisu püko yisü, neko Phariseeko mo Sadduceeko khre yono münuyite, zisü.
english: Jesus said to them, "Take heed and beware of the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees."

chokri: Eli püko thoümko dolü küpo die, süsü kükrenamoli ukoe tsükhrüda khiyi rükra mo küta na mütsete; zi bata.
english: They reasoned among themselves, saying, "We brought no bread."

chokri: Jisu süo seyita die püko yisü, neko, kümülü kütsako, dipüh na neko tho neko dolü küpo die, sü kükrenamoli uko tsükhrüda khiyi rükra mo küta na te, süzi yo la?
english: Jesus, perceiving it, said, "Why do you reason among yourselves, you of little faith, 'because you have brought no bread?'

chokri: Neko tsüri lü kükreyi mozolu me? Mori tsükhrüda pühnguko mo mi nye pühnguko mo didü püh shi küngu layi shi kütiko rükra mo la te me?
english: Don't you yet perceive, neither remember the five loaves for the five thousand, and how many baskets you took up?

chokri: Mori tsükhrüda thünako mo nyedako, mo khopühne ditsu shi layi shi kütiko.
english: Nor the seven loaves for the four thousand, and how many baskets you took up?

chokri: Neko dipüh bi die I tsükhrüda rüle po ba kümo, mori neko po Phariseeko mo Sadduceeko khre yono münuyi no küsü ri se kükreyi mota laha?
english: How is it that you don't perceive that I didn't speak to you concerning bread? But beware of the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees."

chokri: Süsa pü püko po tsükhrüda lü khreyo münuyi no bamo die, Phariseeko mo Sadduceeko kümütha zü yo münuyi no küsüco seyi.
english: Then they understood that he didn't tell them to beware of the yeast of bread, but of the teaching of the Pharisees and Sadducees.

chokri: Süsa Jisu tasü Caesarea Philippico vo die Pu müthaküyiko kütso die sü, Thümakoe thümanuo hi yisü sopüh lizü lü bata ha? zisü.
english: Now when Jesus came into the parts of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, saying, "Who do men say that I, the Son of Man, am?"

chokri: Pukoe sü, humi n yisü John mi zülu khaküsüoli, humi Elijah li; mo kükrekoe Jeremiah mori sadzühküsemi püh lizi die poyo le; zisü.
english: They said, "Some say John the Baptizer, some, Elijah, and others, Jeremiah, or one of the prophets."

chokri: Pu süko yisü, süze nekoe a yisü sopüh lizi die lü yo la? zisü.
english: He said to them, "But who do you say that I am?"

chokri: Simon Peter sü, Noe rhühküba Jihova nuo Khristao zo, zisü.
english: Simon Peter answered, "You are the Christ, the Son of the living God."

chokri: Jisu lasü puce po die, No Simon Bar Jonah nuo no yhevetho zo, kükrenamoli, uthi mo uza lüno mo, eli tüyo küba a Po tho hihi po püh n müse müngoküsü zo tina.
english: Jesus answered him, "Blessed are you, Simon Bar Jonah, for flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but my Father who is in heaven.

chokri: I nce potü süto, Noe Peter (Püco kütsü) mo kütsü hio yono a kühuce thito; mo meza kharüko pümünyi vayi lho.
english: I also tell you that you are Peter, and on this rock I will build my assembly, and the gates of Hades will not prevail against it.

chokri: I tüyo küde cabiko yipüh n prüto; mo no cejülü dipüh kha sheli tüyori khato; mo no cejülü dipüh khri sü sheli tüyo ri khri süto; zita.
english: I will give to you the keys of the Kingdom of Heaven, and whatever you bind on earth will be bound in heaven; and whatever you release on earth will be released in heaven."

chokri: Süsa Pü müthaküyiko po Pü Jisu Khristao li küti püh mipüh ceri pohi no die püko ce pota.
english: Then he charged the disciples that they should tell no one that he is Jesus the Christ.

chokri: Süyogwino Jisue müthaküyikoce Pu dipühbi die Jerusalemlü kho mosü shi, mo dibi die mülhiko mo pethiküzhoko mo lüsiküseko belü kümüzhe die sa teshi küti mo Pü zhosüh nha rhühlasü ta küto dzühko püh sükoce po shühdü süta.
english: From that time, Jesus began to show his disciples that he must go to Jerusalem and suffer many things from the elders, chief priests, and scribes, and be killed, and the third day be raised up.

chokri: Süsa Peter Püzüh kre vodie Pü likhu die sü, Nyepoo npo süzi ta süzo, mhapühceri mha hiko po n yo thita kündi zo, zita.
english: Peter took him aside, and began to rebuke him, saying, "Far be it from you, Lord! This will never be done to you."

chokri: Eli pü rürüh vo Peter yisü; Satan, no ta asaco vo tayi, no a shokha pühzo, no Jihova müdolü moli thüma rüle mo thüma zholü ba küti na; zita.
english: But he turned, and said to Peter, "Get behind me, Satan! You are a stumbling-block to me, for you are not setting your mind on the things of God, but on the things of men."

chokri: Süsa Jisu müthaküyiko yisü, thüma kühopühri asa müdzi künyimi putho pu kükhakürühyi die pu cross püh die asa müdziyite.
english: Then Jesus said to his disciples, "If anyone desires to come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow me.

chokri: Kükrenamoli thüma kühopühri pupho mükrü püh pu zü thiyi künyimi pu süo müdi vato; mo thüma kühopühri ana pu pho müka müdi küvami pu süo ngolayi zoto tina.
english: For whoever desires to save his life will lose it, and whoever will lose his life for my sake will find it.

chokri: Süze mipüh cejü mütü prapüh puzü thiyi zori pu kürhühro müka va lizepu dipüh küpra ngoyi ta? Mori mipühe dipüh püh pu kürhühro züh küleyi veta?
english: For what will it profit a man, if he gains the whole world, and forfeits his life? Or what will a man give in exchange for his life?

chokri: Kükrenamoli thümanuo Pu po zapozale süh die Pu shoyimi züh kirito, mo Pu mipühpüh mhatho khüce züh die püko zhokhro thi püh prüto.
english: For the Son of Man will come in the glory of his Father with his angels, and then he will render to everyone according to his deeds.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, hice kütha humi Thümanuo Pu küdelü küvori ngo kümothe küsa ngo Ihozo küti kropüh tha zo; zita.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, there are some standing here who will in no way taste of death, until they see the Son of Man coming in his Kingdom."

chokri: Süsa zho shorüh sa Jisue Peter mo James, mo sü sazüh-o John züh Pü sa die süko züh kre cejüthu kürükrü pühyo vota.
english: After six days, Jesus took with him Peter, James, and John his brother, and brought them up into a high mountain by themselves.

chokri: Sidie Pu puko küngoce Pulhü thi mükreyita, mo Pu küve nace küve bita, süze Pu khüne ri müga püh vekrü ta.
english: He was transfigured before them. His face shone like the sun, and his garments became as white as the light.

chokri: Sücesü yhie, Moses mo Elijah nyi pükoce vori die Pu züh kürüthi ta.
english: Behold, Moses and Elijah appeared to them talking with him.

chokri: Süce Peter Jisu zü küla die sü, Nyepoo uko hicehi ba küta uko na vezo tole; No n müdo lize uko hicehi pro süh thiyi to khe, pühnha, püh Moses na, mo püh Elijah na; zita.
english: Peter answered, and said to Jesus, "Lord, it is good for us to be here. If you want, let's make three tents here: one for you, one for Moses, and one for Elijah."

chokri: Pü züpo küthalü kümhü vekrü küti püh vori die puko jü püyita; mo Yhie! Kümhü süo lü mha khü püh vori die: Hihi anu a khrüo zo, anüthoo sü Pu zo, neko Pu khü rünyiyite zita.
english: While he was still speaking, behold, a bright cloud overshadowed them. Behold, a voice came out of the cloud, saying, "This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased. Listen to him."

chokri: Mo müthaküyiko zü süo, se küsüce rütu prü cejü thorüh pü züta, mo müprüh püh kümüre thita.
english: When the disciples heard it, they fell on their faces, and were very afraid.

chokri: Sücesü Jisu vori puko nyidie sürite, mo müprüh hite, zita.
english: Jesus came and touched them and said, "Get up, and don't be afraid."

chokri: Süze puko mhürho küyice, Jisu libi sa mipühri ba sa mota.
english: Lifting up their eyes, they saw no one, except Jesus alone.

chokri: Süsa puko cejüthu yono kiri küyice, Jisu piko yisü, Thümanio küsalüno rhühla süri ta kümothe neko mha küngoo püh mipüh ceri pohi te; zi die pota.
english: As they were coming down from the mountain, Jesus commanded them, saying, "Don't tell anyone what you saw, until the Son of Man has risen from the dead."

chokri: Sülize müthaküyiko Pu kütso die, sü; sülize dipüh na lüsiküsekoe Elijah po vori müra mozo sü li die poyo la? zita.
english: His disciples asked him, saying, "Then why do the scribes say that Elijah must come first?"

chokri: Süna Jisu puko zü küla die sü, Elijah vori die mha mütü thi mve la zoto kütho.
english: Jesus answered them, "Elijah indeed comes first, and will restore all things,

chokri: Eli I neko ce potü süto, Elijah hizü vori tazo, süri mi pu seyimo die pu yono puko müdo thi vazo, süsübi thümanuo ri puko belü kümüzhe to; zita.
english: but I tell you that Elijah has come already, and they didn't recognize him, but did to him whatever they wanted to. Even so the Son of Man will also suffer by them."

chokri: Süsa müthaküyikori Pu John mi dzülukhaküsüo dzüh pukoce küpo lüyi.
english: Then the disciples understood that he spoke to them of John the Baptizer.

chokri: Süsa puko thüma kroo ce vori küyice, mipüh vori die tüprü Pu mhüzülü shetü püyi die;
english: When they came to the multitude, a man came to him, kneeling down to him, saying,

chokri: Nyepoo anuo phimüzhe süyi, Kükrenamoli pu thürüyosü thi die kümüzhe shüh tate, mo pu tsükünu rütu melü ri lü mo tsükünu dzülü ri prü tata tele.
english: "Lord, have mercy on my son, for he is epileptic, and suffers grievously; for he often falls into the fire, and often into the water.

chokri: Mo I pu züh n sadziko ceri vori, eli puko pu thi küsührhoyi lhote, zisü.
english: So I brought him to your disciples, and they could not cure him."

chokri: Süsa Jisu pola die sü, Yhie! Neko kümülü küdi mo küthothiyi külho shuhyeko, apo zho dithe güh neko züh bata? Apo zho dithe püh neko yo sügüsühie ba ta? Pü züh vorite, zisü.
english: Jesus answered, "Faithless and perverse generation! How long will I be with you? How long will I bear with you? Bring him here to me."

chokri: Süsa Jisu küsü rüpüo küthi sü, süce pu sülüno ta parita, mo sütü lüsü natsi süo sührhoyita.
english: Jesus rebuked him, the demon went out of him, and the boy was cured from that hour.

chokri: Süsa müthaküyiko u tsühkre Jisu ce vori die sü, Hako dipüh na pü huyi mo ta? zita.
english: Then the disciples came to Jesus privately, and said, "Why weren't we able to cast it out?"

chokri: Jisu puko yisü, Neko mülü kümo nazo, I nekoce po süto, neko kümülü gakresi dü pühri ba lize neko cejüthu hio ce po die, no thüthi hilüno ta rüde lishico phe tate, süzi sü zori süo rüde ta zota, mo neko na mhapühri thiyi külho di tazoto.
english: He said to them, "Because of your unbelief. For most assuredly I tell you, if you have faith as a grain of mustard seed, you will tell this mountain, 'Move from here to there,' and it will move; and nothing will be impossible for you.

chokri: Süzizosheri, mha hikohi küsho kümvo lüno molize ta prayi yomo; zita.
english: But this kind doesn't go out except by prayer and fasting."

chokri: Süsa puko Galileelü balu tice, Jisu puko yisü, thümanuo tü püh mi belü sü vato.
english: While they were staying in Galilee, Jesus said to them, "The Son of Man is about to be delivered up into the hands of men,

chokri: Sidie puko Pu dokhri vato, süri Pü zhosüh nha rhühlasü tato, zita. Süna püko mütü ulü sü shüh ta
english: and they will kill him, and the third day he will be raised up." They were exceedingly sorry.

chokri: Sidie puko Capernaumlü vori küzüce tükhrü khrüyo kütimiko Peter ce vori diesü, neko kümüthao khazhonu khrü khrüyo mo me? Sidie kütso ta.
english: When they had come to Capernaum, those who collected the didrachma coins came to Peter, and said, "Doesn't your teacher pay the didrachma?"

chokri: Mo pü sü, I, khrü sü yozo; zisü. Süsa pü celü lüri tice, Jisu püce; Simon, no dipü bi die lüba? Küdenukoe somimi celü khazhonu khrüyoa? Püko tho puko nuneko yo me rüsomi ce khrüyo la? zisü.
english: He said, "Yes." When he came into the house, Jesus anticipated him, saying, "What do you think, Simon? From whom do the kings of the earth receive toll or tribute? From their children, or from strangers?"

chokri: Peter püce po die, rüsomiko celü zo, zisü, Jisu sü, süsa püko nunekoe u kükha di vesüh, zisü.
english: Peter said to him, "From strangers." Jesus said to him, "Therefore the children are exempt.

chokri: Utho süzizosheri, püko lü thi müsü küva kümüprühna; no dzüküzholü prü die n khüsüprüh kügü süte, sidie no khu vori kürathoo tüyi die puta cega süte, sülize no rükathi püh ngoyi to; mo süo püh vo ana ri mo nna ri khapüh süko prü vate, zisü.
english: But, lest we cause them to stumble, go to the sea, and cast a hook, and take up the first fish that comes up. When you have opened its mouth, you will find a stater coin. Take that, and give it to them for me and you."

chokri: Sümüsühcesü, müthaküyiko Jisu ce vori die sü, Tüyo küdelü somi yisü küzhotho thita; zi die kütso sü.
english: In that hour the disciples came to Jesus, saying, "Who then is greatest in the Kingdom of Heaven?"

chokri: Jisu natsimi püh cipüh Püce vori die süo püh puko dolü mütha sü;
english: Jesus called a little child to himself, and set him in the midst of them,

chokri: Sidie po küti, I nekoce potü süto, neko lü küdepüh natsimine hihi biyi kümosa, neko tüyo küdelü lüyi lhozo, zita.
english: and said, "Most assuredly I tell you, unless you turn, and become as little children, you will in no way enter into the Kingdom of Heaven.

chokri: Süze thüma kühopühri pütho pu thi kürünupüh natsimine hihi biyi lize süosü tüyo küdelü küzhotho tazo, zita.
english: Whoever therefore humbles himself as this little child, the same is the greatest in the Kingdom of Heaven.

chokri: Mo thüma kühopühri a zalüno natsimine hihi bi küti pühri zühyiyo kütimi a zühyiyo.
english: Whoever receives one such little child in my name receives me,

chokri: Süri thüma kühopühri a mülüyo küti natsimi künyitho hikohi pühri thi müsüyo lize mha kügütsü püh pü volü khüyi die kügü püh dzü küzholü mülhükhri küvae veku; zita.
english: but whoever causes one of these little ones who believe in me to stumble, it would be better for him that a huge millstone should be hung around his neck, and that he should be sunk in the depths of the sea.

chokri: Mha thikümüsüko na cejü hioe tsee thiyite, Kükrenamoli mhathikümüsü vorimo Iho zo kütina, süri pü na mha thikümüsü püh küvorioe Tsee thiyite!
english: "Woe to the world because of occasions of stumbling! For it must be that the occasions come, but woe to that person through whom the occasion comes!

chokri: Süna n be mori n phe nthi müsü lize süo n yono da püh kügü vate, lalhe die küshothe kürhühlü lü kütae n be künanyi mori n phe künanyi ba die n külhü püh melü sü küva ceri veku.
english: If your hand or your foot causes you to stumble, cut it off, and cast it from you. It is better for you to enter into life maimed or crippled, rather than having two hands or two feet to be cast into the eternal fire.

chokri: Mo n mhü nthi müsü lize, n yono süo kürüla vate, n mhü püh libi die kürhühlü vo kütae n mhü künanyi ba die n kügü püh mezalü sü küva ceri veku.
english: If your eye causes you to stumble, pluck it out, and cast it from you. It is better for you to enter into life with one eye, rather than having two eyes to be cast into the Gehenna of fire.

chokri: Künyitho hiko mipühri müshuh va mo küto na ne münuyi te: Kükrenamoli, I nekoce po süto, Tüyono puko ceco kütha shoyimikoe tüyo küba a Po lhü ngo süh bayo kütina.
english: See that you don't despise one of these little ones, for I tell you that in heaven their angels always see the face of my Father who is in heaven.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, thümanuoe müdi küvako külayi kütona küvori zo.
english: For the Son of Man came to save that which was lost.

chokri: Nekoe dipüh bi die lüyo la ha? Mhaceno mipüh puko krapüh ba die süko dolü püh ta ruta lize; pue hiethücimothüciko kha püh ma die ta cejüthukoyo vo die ru küta koo sü phu zo moto me?
english: "What do you think? If a man has one hundred sheep, and one of them goes astray, doesn't he leave the ninety-nine, go to the mountains, and seek that which has gone astray?

chokri: Sidie Pu süo ngoyi lize, I nekoce po süto, pue puko ru takümo hiethücimothüciko ceri süo na punüku ta zoto.
english: If he finds it, most assuredly I tell you, he rejoices over it more than over the ninety-nine which have not gone astray.

chokri: Süsübi tüyo küba nieko Poe künyitho hiko mipüh pori ka küta Pu müdo mozo.
english: Even so it is not the will of your Father who is in heaven that one of these little ones should perish.

chokri: Sülize n sazüh-o n yo küjo thiva lize, no vo die nenyi tho nenyi lübi kübalü pü küjo po püh pu kate, pu n khü rünyiyi ta lize no pu ngoyi te.
english: "If your brother sins against you, go, show him his fault between you and him alone. If he listens to you, you have gained back your brother.

chokri: Pu n zü rünyi mü ta lize, no mipüh mori mi küna züh nsa vote, sidie zhopo mi küna küsüh talüno zü kühopühri thi kümüziyi to.
english: But if he doesn't listen, take one or two more with you, that at the mouth of two or three witnesses every word may be established.

chokri: Mo pu süko züri rünyi mu talize, püh kühüce po süte; süri pu kühuo khü ri rünyi mu ta lize, pupo n mhüzülü mülükümomi mo thüsoküyimi bi tate.
english: If he refuses to listen to them, tell it to the assembly. If he refuses to hear the assembly also, let him be to you as a Gentile or a tax collector.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, neko cejülü mha kühopühri khava lize tüyo ri khava zoto, mo neko cejülü mha kühopühri khri sü lize tüyo ri khri sü zoto.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, whatever things you will bind on earth will be bound in heaven, and whatever things you will release on earth will be released in heaven.

chokri: Süsari I nekoce po süto, neko cejülü mi küna zori külürhüh die mha kühopühri sho lize, tüyo küba Apo tho mha süo thisü sümi prüto.
english: Again, assuredly I tell you, that if two of you will agree on earth concerning anything that they will ask, it will be done for them by my Father who is in heaven.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, mi küna küsüh likhu zori aza sün kühu küngu kübara I süko dolü ba zoto tina.
english: For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there I am in the midst of them."

chokri: Süsa Peter Puce vori die sü, Nyepoo a sazüh-o ayo küjo küthi va didü kütso ta lize, apo pü küjo va pü prü ta? Va thüna kütso me? zita.
english: Then Peter came and said to him, "Lord, how often shall my brother sin against me, and I forgive him? Until seven times?"

chokri: Jisu sü pu yisü, va thüna kütso no die I nce po mo, süri va hiethüna thi thüna kütso ri to, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "I don't tell you until seven times, but, until seventy times seven.

chokri: Süna tüyo küdee küdemi püh pu cetako po puko mhatho dzüh kha kümüse sü no küta bizo.
english: Therefore the Kingdom of Heaven is like a certain king, who wanted to reconcile accounts with his servants.

chokri: Sidie müse küsüce mipüh ne-e pupo thoküprü nye küri pü küba püh züh püce vori.
english: When he had begun to reconcile, one was brought to him who owed him ten thousand talents.

chokri: Süri pu pupo thi tsoyi lho kütana pu nyepooe süo po pu cemi, pu nuneko mo pü mha kübako mütü zhüh pü vo püpo susü nota.
english: But because he couldn't pay, his lord commanded him to be sold, with his wife, his children, and all that he had, and payment to be made.

chokri: Süce ceta süo tüprü pu rüsu die; Nyepoo a khü zasü te, süze I npo mütü thi sü vato, zi sü.
english: The servant therefore fell down and kneeled before him, saying, 'Lord, have patience with me, and I will repay you all!'

chokri: Süsa ceta süo ne nyepoo pu phimüzhe die pu khasü va, mo pu poko ri va pu prü va.
english: The lord of that servant, being moved with compassion, released him, and forgave him the debt.

chokri: Süri ceta süo ta pra tice, pu besüh ceta kükremi püh pupo duli krapüh pü küzümi püh ngoyi rü pu süo tüyi die pu vo küneyi die sü, no a popu kütako su süte, zita.
english: "But that servant went out, and found one of his fellow servants, who owed him one hundred denarii, and he grabbed him, and took him by the throat, saying, 'Pay me what you owe!'

chokri: Sücesü ceta pu besüh süo tüprü pu phelü züyi die puce sho die sü, a phimüzhe die tsühilute, I ri npo thi nprü tole zisü.
english: "So his fellow servant fell down at his feet and begged him, saying, 'Have patience with me, and I will repay you!'

chokri: Süri pu mu die pupo susü kümothe pu züh vo küdecelü süva.
english: He would not, but went and cast him into prison, until he should pay back that which was due.

chokri: Sücesü ceta besüh kükrekoe ceta hio dipüh thi ta sheli ti ngo sü die puko lü su shüh ta, süna puko tavo puko nyepoo ce dipüh bi ta sheli küti mütü püh po sü.
english: So when his fellow servants saw what was done, they were exceedingly sorry, and came and told to their lord all that was done.

chokri: Süsa pu nyepoo pu ci püh vori die puce, Yhie, No ceta n roküneo no n müzhemülo küta na I n popühko mütü va püh n prü süe.
english: Then his lord called him in, and said to him, 'You wicked servant! I forgave you all that debt, because you begged me.

chokri: I n phimüzhe küsübi die nori ceta n besühko phimüzhe ti müsüh mo me?
english: Shouldn't you also have had mercy on your fellow servant, even as I had mercy on you?'

chokri: Sidie pü nepoo pulü rüda shuh die ceta hio pu popühko mütü susü kümothe pu tü püh mi müthimünyiyo küti küdece kükhüko belü süva.
english: His lord was angry, and delivered him to the tormentors, until he should pay all that was due to him.

chokri: Süsü bi ne kühopühri ne mülü lüno ne sazümi küjoko va püh prü kütho thiva molize tüyo küba a Po ri neko yo süsü bi ta zoto.
english: So my heavenly Father will also do to you, if you don't each forgive your brother from your hearts for his misdeeds."

chokri: Süze Jisu zü hiko pothü küva sa Pu Galilee lüno tasü Jordan rü shi Judea mü rhelü vorita.
english: It happened when Jesus had finished these words, he departed from Galilee, and came into the borders of Judea beyond the Jordan.

chokri: Mo thüma kro küzho shuh püh Pu züh vori mo Pu süko mütü thi küsührho sü.
english: Great multitudes followed him, and he healed them there.

chokri: Sücesü Phariseeko Püce vori Pu müdephi die sü; mipüh-e mha kühopüh nari pü cemi kha küva thüzho me? zita.
english: Pharisees came to him, testing him, and saying, "Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife for any reason?"

chokri: Pu sükoce po die sü, süprühlü thüma thi küsüoe thüpumi mo thünomi thi sü.
english: He answered, "Haven't you read that he who made them from the beginning made them male and female,

chokri: Mo Pu po die, hihi na thüpuoe pupo puzu khava die pu cemi züh püh thita to; sidie unyi küzüh thipüh thi tato.
english: and said, 'For this cause a man shall leave his father and mother, and shall join to his wife; and the two shall become one flesh?'

chokri: Süna punyi mi küna thisa mota die küzüh thipüh thi tato. Süsü na Jihovae thi küsa sü küvao thüma po brükho vahi te; zita.
english: So that they are no more two, but one flesh. What therefore God has joined together, don't let man tear apart."

chokri: Süko Pu yisü, Sülize dipüh na Moses-e thazü u nopüne va küva lüsi khasü die pu khava no küti po süa? zita.
english: They asked him, "Why then did Moses command us to give her a bill of divorce, and divorce her?"

chokri: Pu sükoce po die, Nekolü kükhrikürüh na Mosae neko po u cemine khava no küsü zo, eli süprühlüe süzi sümo; zita.
english: He said to them, "Moses, because of the hardness of your hearts, allowed you to divorce your wives, but from the beginning it has not been so.

chokri: I nekoce po süto, thüma kühopühri kürügü kürüzü na zo kümosa pu cemi kha va die thüno kükre yi lize pu rügü rüzü ta zo; thüma kühopühri pu kha küvapü yi lize pu ri rügü rüzü tazo, zita.
english: I tell you that whoever divorces his wife, except for sexual immorality, and marries another, commits adultery; and he who marries her when she is divorced commits adultery."

chokri: Pu müthaküyiko Pu yisü, thüma pu cemine yo süzi tayo lize ceyo kümoe veku; zita.
english: His disciples said to him, "If this is the case of the man with his wife, it is not expedient to marry."

chokri: Eli, Pu pukoce, küku kha u prü küsümi zo kümosa thüma zü hio zühtso küyi di.
english: But he said to them, "Not all men can receive this saying, but those to whom it is given.

chokri: Kükrenamoli thüma ceyo mo küta hi humi uzune valüno münu püh vori tayo, humi thüma müdolüno süzi tayo, humi tüyo küde na u tho u ceyo thi mu tayo; thüma kühopühri zü hihi zühyi küvemi po zühyite; zita.
english: For there are eunuchs who were born that way from their mother's womb, and there are eunuchs who were made eunuchs by men; and there are eunuchs who made themselves eunuchs for the Kingdom of Heaven's sake. He who is able to receive it, let him receive it."

chokri: Sücesü mi Jisu po pu be shopüh nyi die sho süno die natsimiko züh Puce vori; eli Pusadziko süko küthita.
english: Then little children were brought to him, that he should lay his hands on them and pray; and the disciples rebuked them.

chokri: Süri Jisu po die, Natsimiko po ace vorite, mo süko kha hite; Kükrenamoli, tüyo küdee süko züzo tina.
english: But Jesus said, "Allow the little children, and don't forbid them to come to me; for to such belongs the Kingdom of Heaven."

chokri: Sidie Pu be shopüh süko yo süsü die Pu sülüno ta la ta.
english: He laid his hands on them, and departed from there.

chokri: Sücesü Yhie, Mipüh Püce vori die sü, Kümütha keveo I küshothe kürhüh ngoyi küto na mha küve dipühpüh thi mosüa? Sidie kütso.
english: Behold, one came to him and said, "Good teacher, what good thing shall I do, that I may have eternal life?"

chokri: Süce Pu süo yisü; No dithi-e a yisü küveo liyo la? Mipüh zo kümosa küve kükre di; süosü Jihova zo, süri no kürhühlü lünyiyo lize, no zü khaküsüko thi mo zühyi te, zita.
english: He said to him, "Why do you call me good? No one is good but one, that is, God. But if you want to enter into life, keep the commandments."

chokri: Pu kütsola die, dipüh-o ta? zisü. Jisu po la die; No mi dokhri sü, no rügü rüzü sü no mi rügo sü, no kücezü zhopo thi sü,
english: He said to him, "Which ones?" Jesus said, "'You shall not murder.' 'You shall not commit adultery.' 'You shall not steal.' 'You shall not offer false testimony.'

chokri: Npo nzu rhoyite, süze no n sühzanumi khrü püh ntho n kükhrü biyite, süzi püh kümüzüko zo, zita.
english: 'Honor your father and mother.' And, 'You shall love your neighbor as yourself.'"

chokri: Khresao sü Püce, I a natsilüno mha hiko mütü thimo züh sürite, dipüh ba sa lua? Zita.
english: The young man said to him, "All these things I have observed from my youth. What do I still lack?"

chokri: Jisu sü püce, No vezhosüyi nyi lize vo die n mha n züko zhüh püh küdimiko prü vate, sülize noe tüyo n cene neyi tato, sidie vori a sa müdzi tate, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "If you want to be perfect, go, sell what you have, and give to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; and come, follow me."

chokri: Süri khresa hio zü süo se küyice pu thü susa die tata, kükrenamoli pu mhaküne shüh mi kütina.
english: But when the young man heard the saying, he went away sad, for he was one who had great possessions.

chokri: Süsa Jisu müthaküyiko, yisü, I nekoce potü süto, künemi püh tüyo küdelü lü küto rüh shüh zo.
english: Jesus said to his disciples, "Most assuredly I say to you, a rich man will enter into the Kingdom of Heaven with difficulty.

chokri: Sü sari I nekoce potü süto, Künemi püh Jihava küdelü lü küto ceri ut püh po thüprüh celü lü küta rüyiku zoto.
english: Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to go through a needle's eye, than for a rich man to enter into the Kingdom of God."

chokri: Sücesü müthaküyiko zü süo se puko malhü thiri ta die sü, süzi ta lize sopühno külayi veta? zita.
english: When the disciples heard it, they were exceedingly astonished, saying, "Who then can be saved?"

chokri: Süsa Jisu puko pe türü die sü puko yisü, Thümae hihi thiyi rüh zo, eli Jihovae mha mütü thiyi vezo, zita.
english: Looking at them, Jesus said, "With men this is impossible, but with God all things are possible."

chokri: Süsa Peter Pu zü küla die sü, Yhie ha mha mütü khatso va die n sa müdzita te; mo ha dipüh ngoyi ta? zita.
english: Then Peter answered, "Behold, we have left everything, and followed you. What then will we have?"

chokri: Jisu pükoce po die sü, I nekoce po süto, Thümanuo Pu küde zapozale küthi balü ba die mha thi küsala küti tüce, neko ri küdeba kürikünalü ba die Israelmi shühye kürikünako ne küti to, zita.
english: Jesus said to them, "Most assuredly I tell you that you who have followed me, in the regeneration when the Son of Man will sit on the throne of his glory, you also will sit on twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.

chokri: Süze thüma kühopühri, aza na uce ukro, mori u sazühzüra, u lipüne, mori u pone, mori u cemine, mori u zune, mori u tü u cejü kha küva mi pu südü thükra ngo layito, mo pu küshothe kürhüh ngoyi to.
english: Everyone who has left houses, or brothers, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands, for my name's sake, will receive one hundred times, and will inherit eternal life.

chokri: Süri kürami kükro nu tato, mo künumi kükro rata to zita.
english: But many will be last who are first; and first who are last.

chokri: Süze tüyo küdee mipühne küshüh-o rüna sü die vo mi po pu khübüh yilü prü mhathi küto na zhokra thüma küphu bizo.
english: "For the Kingdom of Heaven is like a man who was the master of a household, who went out early in the morning to hire laborers for his vineyard.

chokri: Mo sücesü pu mhathomi süko züh die pühnha dulili tozu die küpoyi die süko po puyilü prüta.
english: When he had agreed with the laborers for a denarius a day, he sent them into his vineyard.

chokri: Süsa pu bavüdo süh-o lüri ta vorü thüma kropüh mhapühri thimo die lhethothilü küba ngoyi.
english: He went out about the third hour, and saw others standing idle in the marketplace.

chokri: Süna pu sükoce nekori a khübüh yilü prüte, süze I neko po didüpüh ngoyi zü sheli püh neko prü tomo; zisü die süko ri po taprüta.
english: To them he said, 'You also go into the vineyard, and whatever is right I will give you.' So they went their way.

chokri: Süsa pu bavüdo shorüh-olü ri mo thüci-olüri sübi die mi kütsüh sü.
english: Again he went out about the sixth and the ninth hour, and did likewise.

chokri: Süsari pu bavüdo küripühkri-olüri rühu pradie kükre kropüh kümükrethi die tha küba ngoyi die süko yisü; Neko dithi die zhotü mhapühri thi mo die hizi bata la? Zi die kütso sü.
english: About the eleventh hour he went out, and found others standing idle. He said to them, 'Why do you stand here all day idle?'

chokri: Süko pu yisü, kükrenamoli mipühri ha zho khri kümo na zo, zita Pu süko yisü; nekori ayilü prüte, süze ne didüpüh ngoyi zü sheli püh ne prüto, zisü.
english: "They said to him, 'Because no one has hired us.' "He said to them, 'You also go into the vineyard, and you will receive whatever is right.'

chokri: Süsa thüva vori küyice yi nyepoo pu shoyiko yisü, mhathomako ciyi die künuthoo lü voikürathoo kütso puko zho püh prü süte, zisü.
english: When evening had come, the lord of the vineyard said to his steward, 'Call the laborers and pay them their wages, beginning from the last to the first.'

chokri: Sücesü ba küripühkrilü u zhokhri küyiko ri vori die püko mipüh dulili ngo ve thiyi.
english: "When those who were hired at about the eleventh hour came, they each received a denarius.

chokri: Eli prü, kürathoko vori tice, pukoe mice ri kroku ngoyi küto müri ba, eli puko ri mipüh dulili ngo küyi zo.
english: When the first came, they supposed that they would receive more; and they likewise each received a denarius.

chokri: Süna puko süo ngo küyice, puko nyepo thüma küve süo yo panyo die sü,
english: When they received it, they murmured against the master of the household,

chokri: thüma vori künu hikohi bavüdo püh mha küthi zo, süri noe süko püh ha zhotü tüna külü hie kümüzhe die mhathi kütako dümi te, zita.
english: saying, 'These last have spent one hour, and you have made them equal to us, who have borne the burden of the day and the scorching heat!'

chokri: Eli pu süko mipüh yisü, A züh-o; I n yo kükri shemo ho, No azüh duli püh lüno kütakhoyi mo me?
english: "But he answered one of them, 'Friend, I am doing you no wrong. Didn't you agree with me for a denarius?

chokri: N züo pühyi die tata te; I püh n küprü bi die püh künutho hiko ri prü zoto.
english: Take that which is yours, and go your way. It is my desire to give to this last just as much as to you.

chokri: I atho a mha püh a müdo thi küti thüzho mo me? I ve küti na no ango püh n mhü külo te me? zisü.
english: Isn't it lawful for me to do what I want to with what I own? Or is your eye evil, because I am good?'

chokri: Süsü bi die künumi rata to, mo kürami nu tato; Jisu Pu süh dzüh küpo va süh-o
english: So the last will be first, and the first last. For many are called, but few are chosen."

chokri: Süsa Jisu Jerusalem lü kho küzüce, müthaküyi kürikünako züh kre ta die Pu sholü süko yisü.
english: As Jesus was going up to Jerusalem, he took the twelve disciples aside, and on the way he said to them,

chokri: Yhie, Uko Jerusalemlü kho züe, mo mi thümanuo tüpüh pethiküzhoko mo lüsiküseko belü süto, sidie Pu müzho die Pu dokhri vano tato.
english: "Behold, we are going up to Jerusalem, and the Son of Man will be delivered to the chief priests and scribes, and they will condemn him to death,

chokri: Sidie Pu püh mülükümoko belü sü die mi po Pu krühnyi, pu vü mo Pu püh cross yono gu vato.
english: and will hand him over to the Gentiles to mock, to scourge, and to crucify; and the third day he will be raised up."

chokri: Süsa Zebedee nü nyi zu pu nunyi züh die Puce vori die shetüprü Pu rüsu die Püce mhapüh sho.
english: Then the mother of the sons of Zebedee came to him with her sons, kneeling and asking a certain thing of him.

chokri: Mo Pu süpü yisü, No dipüh sho nyi yo la? zisü. Süpü Pu yisü; No anu nyi hi mipüh po n küde balü n zaco mo kükreo po n veco zi bayi küto thi a prüte; zita,
english: He said to her, "What do you want?" She said to him, "Command that these, my two sons, may sit, one on your right hand, and one on your left hand, in your Kingdom."

chokri: Eli Jisu po la die sü, No sho küzüo se die sho ba mozo, Nenyie I kra too küba heo krayi ve me? Mori I baptaiz thipü kübao lü nenyi ri baptaiz thiyi ve me? zita. Punyi sü, hanyi sü thiyi ve zo, zita.
english: But Jesus answered, "You don't know what you are asking. Are you able to drink the cup that I am about to drink, and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with?" They said to him, "We are able."

chokri: Pu sünyi yisü, Nenyie I kra too küba heo sü krayi vezoto kütho, mo I baptaiz thipü kübalü nenyi baptaizthiyi vezo, Eli nenyi po a zaco mori a veco ba küto sü a müdo mo süri süosü khapüh a Po tho kha prü tozü küsüh kümütao prüto, zita.
english: He said to them, "You will indeed drink my cup, and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with, but to sit on my right hand and on my left hand is not mine to give; but it is for whom it has been prepared by my Father."

chokri: Sücesü mi küriko süo se küsüce puko unyi sazüh züranyi yo puko lü rüdata.
english: When the ten heard it, they were indignant with the two brothers.

chokri: Mo Jisu puko cipüh Puce süyi die sü, neko se bato: Mülükümomi küdenukoe mi mhu künyepo küso bayo, sidie kükumi po püko mhü kükhayi tayo.
english: But Jesus summoned them, and said, "You know that the rulers of the Gentiles lord it over them, and their great ones exercise authority over them.

chokri: Eli neko dolü zoe süzi tayi lho, süri neko dolü somi-e küzhotho thinyi yo sheli sümi po neko thüküo thiyite.
english: It shall not be so among you, but whoever desires to become great among you shall be your servant.

chokri: Mo neko dolü küratho thinyi yo kütio po nekodolü cetao thiyi te.
english: Whoever desires to be first among you shall be your bondservant,

chokri: Süsü bi thümanuo ri mi po Pu shoyi thi toa mori mi shoyi thi tozü mo thüma kükro pho rha kütona Pu kürhühro khasü tozu die küvori zo.
english: even as the Son of Man came not to be served, but to serve, and to give his life as a ransom for many."

chokri: Süsa püko Jericho lüno ta pra küzüce, thüma kro küzho püh Pu züh tata.
english: As they went out from Jericho, a great multitude followed him.

chokri: Sücesü Yhie, mhücemi küna shoshice ba die Pu sü sholü vori küzü se südie, müyi müto die, Yhie, Nyepoo no David nüo, ha phimüzhe süte zi bata.
english: Behold, two blind men sitting by the road, when they heard that Jesus was passing by, cried out, "Lord, have mercy on us, you son of David!"

chokri: Süri makroo pünyi po kümükre bata no die pünyi küthi ta; Eli pünyi se küyieku die, No Nyepoo David nuo hanyi phimüzhe zo süyi, zi bata.
english: The multitude rebuked them, telling them that they should be quiet, but they cried out even more, "Lord, have mercy on us, you son of David!"

chokri: Sücesü Jisu thayi die unyi cisü, sidie unyi yisü dipüh thipüh ne küprü nenyi nüta? zisü.
english: Jesus stood still, and called them, and asked, "What do you want me to do for you?"

chokri: Unyi sü, Nyepoo, hanyi mhü po mha ngoyi zhe zita.
english: They told him, "Lord, that our eyes may be opened."

chokri: Süna Jisu unyi phimüzhe die unyi brü sü, süzi mütha unyi mhü mhangoyi ta die Pu sa müdzi ta
english: Jesus, being moved with compassion, touched their eyes; and immediately their eyes received their sight, and they followed him.

chokri: Süsa püko Jerusalem müno vori küzüce tasü Olive cejüthu co Bethphage lü voriyi; mo Jisu müthaküyi mi küna kütsüh sü die;
english: When they drew near to Jerusalem, and came to Bethsphage, to the Mount of Olives, then Jesus sent two disciples,

chokri: Nenyi tasü nenyi rüpeco küba rünao lü lüyi sülü lü mütha mi gadapü püh mu pu nupü sa püh küma ngoyi toho, sünyi phrühyi die züh a cie vori te.
english: saying to them, "Go into the village that is opposite you, and immediately you will find a donkey tied, and a colt with her. Untie them, and bring them to me.

chokri: Mo thüma kühopühri nenyi kütso lize, Nyepooe hinyi süh mosü züle; zi die po süte, Sülize pu sünyi kütsüh sü vazo toho.
english: If anyone says anything to you, you shall say, 'The Lord needs them,' and immediately he will send them."

chokri: Sülize hiohi thi küyice thazü sadzühküseo po püh kümüta.
english: All this was done, that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through the prophet, saying,

chokri: Neko vo Zion nüpüce po süte, Yhie n Küdeoe mününui die gadapü püh, püco gadapü nuo yo bayi die nce vori züho, zidie po püh kümüta züo tsühyi küto na, zisü.
english: "Tell the daughter of Zion, Behold, your King comes to you, Humble, and riding on a donkey, On a colt, the foal of a donkey."

chokri: Sidie müthaküyinyi vo die Jisu pünyice po küsü bi die thiyi.
english: The disciples went, and did just as Jesus commanded them,

chokri: Sidie gadapü mo pünu nyi süh vori die puko khü püh sünyi yo khra sü die Pu po süo bayi.
english: and brought the donkey and the colt, and laid their clothes on them; and he sat on them.

chokri: Süce makroo u ukhüko püh shodelü khra sü, kükrekoe sühco rho püh shokhrasü.
english: A very great multitude spread their clothes on the road. Others cut branches from the trees, and spread them on the road.

chokri: Süsa thümakro Pu mhüzüco kütako ri Pu saco kütako ri se die, Hosanna, David nuo. Nyepoo za süh vori küzüo yhievetho, Hosana kürükrüthoo; zita.
english: The multitudes who went before him, and who followed kept shouting, "Hosanna to the son of David! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord! Hosanna in the highest!"

chokri: Sücesü Pu Jerusalem lü lüri küyice rüna mütü mülümüli die sü; thüma hihi sopüh ta ha? zita.
english: When he had come into Jerusalem, all the city was stirred up, saying, "Who is this?"

chokri: Süsa thüma krooe sü; Hiohi Galilee lü küba Nazareth lüno küvori sadzühküseo Jisu zo, zita.
english: The multitudes said, "This is the prophet, Jesus, from Nazareth of Galilee."

chokri: Süze Jisu kürüsucelü lü die sülü mha zhüh mo mha khri küba mütü huva mo rüka küle küba miz mütü mo thürüvünu zhuh küba mütü phüla kügü va.
english: Jesus entered into the temple of God, and drove out all of those who sold and bought in the temple, and overthrew the money-changers' tables and the seats of those who sold the doves.

chokri: Sidie Pu sükoce po die, A ce püh küshoce thi to, zi die tho püh müta, eli nekoe süo püh kürügomi ce thi ve, zita.
english: He said to them, "It is written, 'My house shall be called a house of prayer,' but you have made it a den of robbers!"

chokri: Sücesü mhücemi mo pheyhomiko kürüsucelü Püce vori, mo Pu süko mütü thi küsührho tso sü.
english: The blind and the lame came to him in the temple, and he healed them.

chokri: Eli pethiküzhoko mo lüsiküseko Pu mha u malhü mhatho thi küsüko, mo natsimiko mo khresa rülimiko kürüsuce shi mhüko mütülü se die; Hosana David nuo, zi küba ngo sü die püko ro shüh die, Pu yisü;
english: But when the chief priests and the scribes saw the wonderful things that he did, and the children who were crying in the temple and saying, "Hosanna to the son of David!" they were indignant,

chokri: No pukoe dipüh po ba shi küti seba me? zita. Süna Jisu puko yisü; Izo; nekoe payhoko mo no kübako talü no n küshüh thi mve lotsüh süzo zi küti mhapüh ceri phi mo zo me? zita.
english: and said to him, "Do you hear what these are saying?" Jesus said to them, "Yes. Did you never read, 'Out of the mouth of babes and nursing babies you have perfected praise?'"

chokri: Süsa Pu puko kha va die tasü Bethani rüna lü vo die sülü bata.
english: He left them, and went out of the city to Bethany, and lodged there.

chokri: Sütücesü Pu küshüh-o rüna tala sü rüna nadeo lü la vori küzüce; Pu müri ta.
english: Now in the morning, as he returned to the city, he was hungry.

chokri: Süce Pu shoshice shedübo püh ngo sü die ta süce vori, eli pu se pühri ngo mo die pu nyi libi küba zota, süna Pu süo yisü thayogwino n se pühri ji sa hi tate, zisü. Mo süzi sü mütha shedübo süo sa rügwi ta.
english: Seeing a fig tree by the road, he came to it, and found nothing on it but leaves. He said to it, "Let there be no fruit from you forever!" Immediately the fig tree withered away.

chokri: Mo müthaküyiko süo ngo küsüce püko malhü thi die sü, dithelüno shedüboo rügwi ta she he? zita.
english: When the disciples saw it, they marveled, saying, "How did the fig tree immediately wither away?"

chokri: Jisu püko zü küla die sü, l nekoce potü süto, Mhaceno neko rüsüh rüna külho kümülü ba lize; neko shedübo hio yo thi küta libi mori neko cejüthu hio ri yisü, no ta rüde dzüküzholü lü tate; zisü zori süo thiyi zoto,
english: Jesus answered them, "Most assuredly I tell you, if you have faith, and don't doubt, you will not only do what is done to the fig tree, but even if you told this mountain, 'Be taken up and cast into the sea,' it would be done.

chokri: Süze neko mha kühopühri thiyi küto mülükhro die sho lize süko ngoyi zoto, zita. Jisu ktikü dzüh kütso küta
english: All things, whatever you ask in prayer, believing, you will receive."

chokri: Süsa Pu kürüsucelü vori die mimütha kübace, pethiküzhoko mo thüma do lü mülhiko Püce vori die sü, no dipüh küku süh die mha hiko thiyo la? Mo sopühno küku hiko püh n prü sü la, zi die kütso ta.
english: When he had come into the temple, the chief priests and the elders of the people came to him as he was teaching, and said, "By what authority do you do these things? Who gave you this authority?"

chokri: Süsa Jisu püko zü küla die sü, Iri nekoce mhapüh kütso to, mo nekori ace posü lize I ri dipüh küku süh die mha hiko thiyo shi küti neko ce po süto, zita.
english: Jesus answered them, "I also will ask you one question, which if you tell me, I likewise will tell you by what authority I do these things.

chokri: John dzülu khaküsüo dipühceo no vori la? Tüyono vori me? Thüma celü no vori la? Si die kütso sü. Sücesü püko tho püko dolü kürüthi die sü, uko Puce tüyono vori zo zisü mo Pu uko yisü, süze dithi die neko pu mülüyi mo ta? zita to.
english: The baptism of John, where was it from? From heaven or from men?" They reasoned with themselves, saying, "If we say, 'From heaven,' he will ask us, 'Why then did you not believe him?'

chokri: Eli puko sü, thüma celüno vori zo zisü to ri thümako müprüh, kükrenamoli, thümako pu yisü sadzühküsemi püh lizi die lüyo tina; zi bata.
english: But if we say, 'From men,' we fear the multitude, for all hold John as a prophet."

chokri: Sidie püko Jisu zü küla die sü, Hako poyilho, zita. Süsa Pu süko yisü I ri dipüh küku süh die mha hikohi thiyo sheli küti nekoce poyilho, zita.
english: They answered Jesus, and said, "We don't know." He also said to them, "Neither will I tell you by what authority I do these things.

chokri: Süri nekoe dipüh thili die lü ta? Mipüh-e pu nu küna ne, mo pu kürao yisü anu; no tha prü die u khübüh yilü mhathi te, zisü.
english: But what do you think? A man had two sons, and he came to the first, and said, 'Son, go work today in my vineyard.'

chokri: Pu po die sü I prüyi lho; zita. Eli künuco pu lü küdeyi die prüta.
english: He answered, 'I will not,' but afterward he changed his mind, and went.

chokri: Süsa pu vo mi künao ce süsü bi die po sü; süce pue sü, I prüto, nyiepoo, süzi sü die prü mo ta.
english: He came to the second, and said the same thing. He answered, 'I go, sir,' but he didn't go.

chokri: Sünyi sopüh-o pü nyi po müdo thi süa? Ukoe sü kürao zo, zisü; Jisu puko yisü, I nekoce potü süto, thüsoküyiko mo tükhrümiko neko züra tüyo küdebalü lü tato. Zita.
english: Which of the two did the will of his father?" They said to him, "The first." Jesus said to them, "Most assuredly I tell you that the tax collectors and the prostitutes are entering into the Kingdom of God before you.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, John-e kümatho zho süh nekoce vori, süri neko pu mülüyi mu te, süri thüsoküyiko mu tükhrümiko pu mülüyi, Eli neko jüo ngo zori künuco pu mülüyi kütona ne lü küdeyi mu te, zita.
english: For John came to you in the way of righteousness, and you didn't believe him, but the tax collectors and the prostitutes believed him. When you saw it, you didn't even repent afterward, that you might believe him.

chokri: Züve kükre püh rünyi yite; Thazü mipühnee khübüh yi püh teyi, sidie pu cokhakha püh süo mütuyi; süsari khübüh zü gü küto thüthi süyi, sidie pu rikhüba püh thi sü die khapüh yitemi kropüh mülü va die tasü rüna kümücu shüh pühlü vo ta;
english: "Hear another parable. There was a man who was a master of a household, who planted a vineyard, set a hedge about it, dug a winepress in it, built a tower, leased it out to farmers, and went into another country.

chokri: Süsa khübüh seko ra küyi tü vori kütace, pu süko rayiküto na shoyimi kropüh kütsüh püh yite süko ce süsü.
english: When the season for the fruit drew near, he sent his servants to the farmers, to receive his fruit.

chokri: Sücesü yiteko pu shoyi süko tüyi die mipüh vüva, mipüh dokhri va, mo kütsü püh mi kükre püh vava.
english: The farmers took his servants, beat one, killed another, and stoned another.

chokri: Süsari Pu shoyi kürako ceri kroku ti kütsüh la sü, süri puko liko yo bi die thi lata.
english: Again, he sent other servants more than the first: and they treated them the same way.

chokri: Süri künuthoo pu putho pu nuo kütsüh püh sükoce sü la die sü, puko ri a nuo sü rho mütse zo, süzi ba.
english: But afterward he sent to them his son, saying, 'They will respect my son.'

chokri: Eli yiteko sü pu nuo ngo küsüce, püko tho püko dolü küpo die, Hiohi pu ka küyio zo, khe! Uko pu dokhri va die pu ka yiyi ta khe.
english: But the farmers, when they saw the son, said among themselves, 'This is the heir. Come, let's kill him, and seize his inheritance.'

chokri: Sidie puko pu tüzüh nhaphü pra die pu dokhri va.
english: So they took him, and threw him out of the vineyard, and killed him.

chokri: Süze khübüh yi nyepo süo vori tice, pu yite süko yo dipüh bi ta ta? zitsü
english: When therefore the lord of the vineyard comes, what will he do to those farmers?"

chokri: Süko puyisü, pu thüma küsü süko müka va die pu khübüh yi süko kha püh pütü tüce khübüh se mülhü püh prü sü küto yite kükremiko belü sü vato; zita.
english: They told him, "He will miserably destroy those miserable men, and will lease out the vineyard to other farmers, who will give him the fruit in its season."

chokri: Jisu puko yisü ce küthikoe kütsü kha küva tsüo mi süo khi püh u külü tsü küzhoo thite Hihi Nyepoo tho thi küsü zo, mo süosü u mhüngoce u malhü zo; zi püh kümüzü neko phi mo zo me? zita.
english: Jesus said to them, "Did you never read in the Scriptures, 'The stone which the builders rejected, The same was made the head of the corner. This was from the Lord. It is marvelous in our eyes?'

chokri: Süna I nekoce po süto, neko celüno tüyo küde khi püh vo use pariyi küto shuye püh prü vato.
english: "Therefore I tell you, the Kingdom of God will be taken away from you, and will be given to a nation bringing forth its fruits.

chokri: Sidie thüma kühopühri rütu kütsü süo yo küprümi rhaphre vato, mo kütsü süo rütu kühopüh yori prü lize sümi nyophre püh nyophu thi vato, zita.
english: He who falls on this stone will be broken to pieces, but on whoever it will fall, it will scatter him as dust."

chokri: Sücesü pethiküzhoko mo Phariseekoe Pu züve süo se küyice; puko na po bazo küti seyi.
english: When the chief priests and the Pharisees heard his parables, they perceived that he spoke about them.

chokri: Süri puko ube sho püh Puyo sü tozü rhü küsüce thüma kroo müprü ta, kükrenamoli, puko Jisu yisü sadzühküsemi püh thiyo küti na.
english: When they sought to seize him, they feared the multitudes, because they considered him to be a prophet.

chokri: Süsa Jisu küzüve die püko khü küla la die sü.
english: Jesus answered and spoke again in parables to them, saying,

chokri: Tüyo küdee küdemi püh-e punu nolülhü küsüh küsü bi zo.
english: "The Kingdom of Heaven is like a certain king, who made a marriage feast for his son,

chokri: Sidie Pu pu shoyiko kütsüh püh müzümüra müse püh kümako ci, eli süko vori muta.
english: and sent out his servants to call those who were invited to the marriage feast, but they would not come.

chokri: Süsari pu shoyi kükreko kütsüh sü die; Vo die cipüh kümakoce po zo süte, Yhie! I thüvalhüo küsühyi te, atho müdoko mo ace ari u pho küveko dokhri yi die mha mütü küsüh püh mate, nolülhüo lü vori no die ci süte, zisü.
english: Again he sent out other servants, saying, 'Tell those who are invited, "Behold, I have made ready my dinner. My oxen and my fatlings are killed, and all things are ready. Come to the marriage feast!"'

chokri: Süri puko süo lü kürübro die utho u sholulü vota, mipü putho pu yilü prüta, kükremi püh pu lhetho sholü vota.
english: But they made light of it, and went their ways, one to his own farm, another to his merchandise,

chokri: Mo kükrekoe pu shoyiko tüyi die süko brü kümünga mo dokhri va.
english: and the rest grabbed his servants, and treated them shamefully, and killed them.

chokri: Eli küdeo mha sükose küyice pu lü rüda ta sidie pa riwhümi kütsüh sü die küdokhri süko müka va mo puko rüna ri müto va,
english: When the king heard that, he was angry, and he sent his armies, destroyed those murderers, and burned their city.

chokri: Süsa pu pu cetako yisü, nolülhüo küsühyite, eli müzümüra cipüh kümakoe tülhü hiolü voriyi sümo te,
english: "Then he said to his servants, 'The wedding is ready, but those who were invited weren't worthy.

chokri: Süna neko shopükolü vo die thüma küngo khü po nolülhüo lü voriyi no ci süte, zisü.
english: Go therefore to the intersections of the highways, and as many as you may find, invite to the marriage feast.'

chokri: Süna ceta süko pra die shopükolüno thüma küngo küve küsü mütü ci künguyi, sidie rüsomiko vori tülhü ceo chuyi ta.
english: Those servants went out into the highways, and gathered together as many as they found, both bad and good. The wedding was filled with guests.

chokri: Sücesü küdeo puphremiko pe tozu die celü lüri tice mipüh nolü kühi khüne süh mo die ba küti ngoyi
english: But when the king came in to see the guests, he saw there a man who didn't have on wedding clothing,

chokri: Süna Pu süoce podie, A züh-o, no dibi die nolü lhülü kühi khüne süh mo die vori ba ta la? Zi die kütso ta. Sücesü pu mha pühri poyi mota.
english: and he said to him, 'Friend, how did you come in here not wearing wedding clothing?' He was speechless.

chokri: Sücesü küdeo pu cetako yisü, neko, vo pu phe pube phayi die püh vo shozu küzühlü kügü vate; sidie sülüno kra mo uhu thüzhe pu bata to, zita.
english: Then the king said to the servants, 'Bind him hand and foot, take him away, and throw him into the outer darkness; there is where the weeping and grinding of teeth will be.'

chokri: Kükrenamoli kükro ciyi, eli küda küyi-e tsazo, zita.
english: For many are called, but few chosen."

chokri: Sücesü Phariseeko vo kürüthi die dibi die Pu züpolü Pu tüyi toshi küti kürüthi.
english: Then the Pharisees went and took counsel how they might entrap him in his talk.

chokri: Sidie pukoe puko sadziko po, Herodiamiko sa die kütsüh püh Püce sü die sü, Kümüthao, no zütho zo, mo kütho tülüno Jihova zhoko tha püh mi kayo küti, mo no mipühri müprüh tayo kümo ha se bazo, kükrenamoli no mipühri rho mükre tayo kümo na.
english: They sent their disciples to him, along with the Herodians, saying, "Teacher, we know that you are honest, and teach the way of God in truth, no matter who you teach, for you aren't partial to anyone.

chokri: Süna no dipüh lüyo sheli hace po süte, Caesar khrü khrü küti hi thüzho me moa? zisü.
english: Tell us therefore, what do you think? Is it lawful to pay taxes to Caesar, or not?"

chokri: Jisu püko külü seiyi die sü, Neko küthürakütiko, neko dipüh na a müdephi yo la?
english: But Jesus perceived their wickedness, and said, "Why do you test me, you hypocrites?

chokri: Khazhonu dulio püh a müka sü ka zisü, Süce puko ri dulio püh pu ka sü.
english: Show me the tax money." They brought to him a denarius.

chokri: Süsa Pu süko yisü, Marheo hi sopüh marhea? Mo hio sopüh züa? Zidie kütso sü.
english: He asked them, "Whose is this image and inscription?"

chokri: Puko sü Pu yisü, Caesar zo, zita. Süsa pu süko yisü, süze Caesar züko püh Caesar prüvate, mo Jihova züko püh Jihova prü vate; zita
english: They said to him, "Caesar's." Then he said to them, "Give therefore to Caesar the things that are Caesar's, and to God the things that are God's."

chokri: Puko zü hiko se küsüce puko malhü thita. Sidie Pu khava die utho u sholülü vota.
english: When they heard it, they marveled, and left him, and went away.

chokri: Sünhasü küsami rhühlasü lho lie poyo küti Sadduceeko vori Pu kütso die sü,
english: On that day Sadducees (those who say that there is no resurrection) came to him. They asked him,

chokri: Kümüthao, Moses po küti, mi püh punu di die sata lize, pu sazüh-o po pu cemi yi die pu zürao shühye mülhü süte; zi die popüh ma.
english: saying, "Teacher, Moses said, 'If a man dies, having no children, his brother shall marry his wife, and raise up seed for his brother.'

chokri: Süze hizü ha dolü sazühzüra mi thüna ne. Süce kürathoo ceyo küyice pu küthi ne ta die sata, mo punu pühri di; süsa pu cemi va püh pu sazüh-o prüva.
english: Now there were with us seven brothers. The first married and died, and having no seed left his wife to his brother.

chokri: Mi künao ri, süh-o ri süzi vo thünao kütso ta.
english: In like manner the second also, and the third, to the seventh.

chokri: Künuthoco thüno süpü ri sata.
english: After them all, the woman died.

chokri: Süzi lize rhühlaküsü nha thüno süpü sü puko mi thünako dipüh-o cemi thi tata? Kükrenamoli, puko mütü süpü püh u cemi thi va tina, zita.
english: In the resurrection therefore, whose wife will she be of the seven? For they all had her."

chokri: Jisu puko khü küla die sü, neko kütho lüsi ri semo, mo Jihova küku ri semo die kükri tayo zo.
english: But Jesus answered them, "You are mistaken, not knowing the Scriptures, nor the power of God.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, rhühlaküsü nha puko thüno ri yilho mori mhi ri lho, sidie tüyo shoyimi bi ta zoto tina.
english: For in the resurrection they neither marry, nor are given in marriage, but are like God's angels in heaven.

chokri: Küsami rhühlaküsü nha rüle na Jihovae po küsü.
english: But concerning the resurrection of the dead, haven't you read that which was spoken to you by God, saying,

chokri: Abraham Jihova, Isaac Jihova, mo James Jihova; zipüh kümüta nekoe phi mo zo me? Jihovae küsako Jihova mo kürhühko Jihova ri zo, zita.
english: 'I am the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob?' God is not the God of the dead, but of the living."

chokri: Sücesü thüma kroko süko se küsüce Pu kümütha züko na puko malhü thi ta.
english: When the multitudes heard it, they were astonished at his teaching.

chokri: Süri Phariseekoe Jisue Sadduceeko zü va müdi küva se sü die vo künguyi.
english: But the Pharisees, when they heard that he had put the Sadducees to silence, gathered themselves together.

chokri: Mo puko dolü thüzhoküsemi püh Pu küdo tozu die sü;
english: One of them, a lawyer, asked him a question, testing him.

chokri: Kümüthao, thüzholü zü dipüh-o küzhothoa? zita.
english: "Teacher, which is the greatest commandment in the law?"

chokri: Jisu pucepo die, no n mülü mütü süh mo n kürhühro mütü süh mo n külü mütü süh n Nyepoo Jihova khrü mo rhoyi te;
english: Jesus said to him, "'You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart, and with all your soul, and with all your mind.'

chokri: Hihi zü thürao mo zü kha küsü küzho thoo zo.
