english: This is the first and great commandment.

chokri: Süsa künao lize hihi, No n sühzanumi khrü püh ntho n kükhrü biyite.
english: A second likewise is this, 'You shall love your neighbor as yourself.'

chokri: Thüzho mütü mo sadzühküsemi zü mütü ri thüzho hinyi püh u zübo thi ta zo, zita. Khrista dzüh kütso küta
english: The whole law and the prophets depend on these two commandments."

chokri: Süsa Phariseeko vo Küngu küyice, Jisu püko kütso die sü,
english: Now while the Pharisees were gathered together, Jesus asked them a question,

chokri: Neko Khristao yisü sopüh lizi die lüyo la? Pu sopüh nu la? Zisü.
english: saying, "What do you think of the Christ? Whose son is he?" They said to him, "Of David."

chokri: Puko Pu yisü David nuo zo, zisü. Pu süko yisü, sülize, David dibi die thazü Rüpüo züh die Pu yisü;
english: He said to them, "How then does David in the Spirit call him Lord, saying,

chokri: Nyepooe a Nyepoo ce; N ngomuko khapüh n phekhro süva kümothe No a zaco bazo yite; zita?
english: 'The Lord said to my Lord, Sit on my right hand, Until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet?'

chokri: David süce Pu yisü Nyepoo li ta ze; süo dibi die pu nu ta?
english: "If then David calls him Lord, how is he his son?"

chokri: Süsa mipühri Püce mhapühri poyi kündita; süzomori sünha yogwino mi pühri Püce mha kütso sa müprühta.
english: No one was able to answer him a word, neither dared any man from that day forth ask him any more questions.

chokri: Süsa Jisu kürüsuce lüno ta pra die ta tazü tice, Pu müthaküyikoe mha püh Kürüsuce thi kümako tha Pu ka tozu die Puce vori.
english: Jesus went out from the temple, and was going on his way. His disciples came to him to show him the buildings of the temple.

chokri: Sücesü Jisu puko yisü, Neko mha hikohi ngo ba zotho? I nekoce po süto; Mha hikohi mütü phu kütu va mo die kütsü püh pori küpiba pü bayi lho; zita.
english: But he answered them, "Don't you see all of these things? Most assuredly I tell you, there will not be left here one stone on another, that will not be thrown down."

chokri: Süsa Pu Olive cejüthuyo ba küyice, müthaküyiko mükhrüh Puce vori die sü; Mha hikohi dipüh küthi ce tata? Mo hio vorita küto zasi, mocejüo thüla küta zasiko püh hakoce po süte, zita.
english: As he sat on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to him privately, saying, "Tell us, when will these things be? What is the sign of your coming, and of the end of the age?"

chokri: Sücesü Jisu puko zü küla die sü, mipo neko Shuh va mo küto na lala bayite;
english: Jesus answered them, "Be careful that no one leads you astray.

chokri: Mhakükrenamoli, thüma kükro aza süh vori die, I Khristao zo; zidie thüma kükro shüh züh tata to tina.
english: For many will come in my name, saying, 'I am the Christ,' and will lead many astray.

chokri: Süzomoli, neko thüriküthi mo thürithi küto dzüh küpo shuh küti se to; sücesü neko lü müyhu müzhe ta mo küto lü zoyite. Kükrenamoli, mha hikohi vori moyi lho zo tina; süri süo thülao mo.
english: You will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you aren't troubled, for all this must happen, but the end is not yet.

chokri: Sücesü shühye püh-e shühye kükre püh phimu, küde püh-e küde kükre püh phimu sürito, süsari thükre, thüpühsüh, ceyice sü küti, cejü büh kükrekre kütiko lü süri to.
english: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom; and there will be famines, plagues, and earthquakes in various places.

chokri: Süri mha hikohi mütü kümüzhe küto thürako zo.
english: But all these things are the beginning of birth pains.

chokri: Sücesü mi neko tüpüh kümüzhe kütikolü sü die neko dokhri to. Sidie aza na shühye mütü po neko mütsü to.
english: Then they will deliver you up to oppression, and will kill you. You will be hated by all of the nations for my name's sake.

chokri: Sidie thüma kükro ri a yo jota to Mo huhu tüpüh mi belü süto, mo mi püh mipüh mütsu tato.
english: Then many will stumble, and will deliver up one another, and will hate one another.

chokri: Süze kücezü sadzühküse kükro süri die thüma kükro shuh kütse züh tata to.
english: Many false prophets will arise, and will lead many astray.

chokri: Mo mha küsü krothori kütana thüma kükro kükhrü müko tato.
english: Because iniquity will be multiplied, the love of many will grow cold.

chokri: Süri hie zo tha pütüti küyi mi külayi zoto.
english: But he who endures to the end, the same will be saved.

chokri: Sülize shühye mütü mhüzülü zhopo püh thisü küto na cejü mütülü küde züyi küve hio po püh mi mütha tso sü zoto; sü züh thülao vori to.
english: This Gospel of the Kingdom will be preached in the whole world for a testimony to all the nations, and then the end will come.

chokri: Süna thazü Daniel sadzühküseo po popüh kümüta; mhava kümürho shuh süküto mo üzü küzüh thizo küto vori die kümüsathiolü tha küyi ngo küyice; zü süo phiyo kütimi po seyite.
english: "When, therefore, you see the abomination of desolation, which was spoken of through Daniel the prophet, standing in the holy place (let the reader understand),

chokri: Sücesü Judea lü kübami po ta sü cejüthuyo vo tate.
english: then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains.

chokri: Mo cejüthuyo kübami po mhapühri khiyi tozü die la kiri hite.
english: Let him who is on the housetop not go down to take out things that are in his house.

chokri: Mori yilü kütamiko po u khü khiyi tozu die la vori hite.
english: Let him who is in the field not return back to get his clothes.

chokri: Eli sücesü phosimo kütako mo u nune no kübakoe thiyite!
english: But woe to those who are with child and to nursing mothers in those days!

chokri: Süri neko ta küto tü süo po tüsühce mori kürülü tü nha mo küto na sho ba yite.
english: Pray that your flight will not be in the winter, nor on a Sabbath,

chokri: Kükrenamoli, sücesü thüma po kümüzhe püh kümüre thi die cejü thiyi prühlünovori tsü kütso mori hisari mhapühceri süsü biyi külho pü thizoto küti na.
english: for then there will be great oppression, such as has not been from the beginning of the world until now, no, nor ever will be.

chokri: Süze pu tüsozho süko thi kümüzü süzo kümosa mipühri külaküyi ngoyi lho zoto. Süri küdaküyiko züve na tüsozho süko thi müzü süto.
english: Unless those days had been shortened, no flesh would have been saved. But for the sake of the chosen ones, those days will be shortened.

chokri: Sücesü mi nekoce Khristao lice ba mori hice ba ziri; mülü hite.
english: "Then if any man tells you, 'Behold, here is the Christ,' or, 'There,' don't believe it.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, Khrista kücezü mo sadzühküse kücezü süri die mha zasi kümüre mo u malhü mhathoko thi püh mi müka to; sidie thiyi küvethe küda küyiko ri shu kütse züh tato tina.
english: For there will arise false christs, and false prophets, and they will show great signs and wonders, so as to lead astray, if possible, even the chosen ones.

chokri: Yhie! I müzümüra nekoce po sü va züho.
english: "Behold, I have told you beforehand.

chokri: Süna mi nekoce, Yhie! Pu nhatsalüba, ziri vo hite; Yhie! Pu kümükhrühra ba, ziri mülü hite.
english: If therefore they tell you, 'Behold, he is in the wilderness,' don't go out; 'Behold, he is in the inner chambers,' don't believe it.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, nathoco tü küprüh sü lize nakrocori ve voyo küti bi thümanuo küvori ri süsü bi zoto tina.
english: For as the lightning comes forth from the east, and is seen even to the west, so will be the coming of the Son of Man.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, kühopühra ri küsamo küzüra thirhako ri vo sülü Küngu to.
english: For wherever the carcass is, there will the vultures be gathered together.

chokri: Kümüzhe küti tüsozho süko vota mütha nace züh tato; mo khri vesü mu tato, sü libizo mo ri thünyiko ri tüyo no rüra tato, mo tüyo küku mütü ri sü küna vato.
english: But immediately after the oppression of those days, the sun will be darkened, the moon will not give its light, the stars will fall from the sky, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken;

chokri: Sidie tüyono Thümanuo zasi thipüh mika süto; Sücesü cejü küta thüma lünyiko kra tato, sidie püko thümanuo küku süh die zapozale thi die tüyono kümhülü kiri küzü ngoto.
english: and then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in the sky. Then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of the sky with power and great glory.

chokri: Sücesü Pu Pu shoyimi kütsüh püh süko po thütsü khu kümüre thi süto, sidie puko po tüyo lapühcono vo kükreco kütso tükhra küdako lüno Pue küdaküyiko phu Künguto.
english: He will send out his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they will gather together his chosen ones from the four winds, from one end of the sky to the other.

chokri: Süze shedüboo yono küzüve küsü nekoe seyite, pücoko müzü la die; pu nyi nyisa thü pari kütace; nekoe tülü tate zi küti seyiyo.
english: "Now from the fig tree learn this parable. When its branch has now become tender, and puts forth its leaves, you know that the summer is near.

chokri: Süsü bi die neko mha hikohi ngo küyice, pu tü müno te, cekhace thate; zi küti seyite.
english: Even so you also, when you see all these things, know that it is near, even at the doors.

chokri: I neko ce potü süto, mha hikohi mütü thi tsühyi kümothe, tsüdo nulhü hiohi di talho.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, this generation will not pass away, until all these things are accomplished.

chokri: Tü mo cejü di tato, eli, azüko di ta lhozo.
english: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.

chokri: Süri pu tüsozho mo pü bavüdoo mipühri semo, A po zo kümosa tüyo shoyimiko ri semo.
english: But no one knows of that day and hour, not even the angels of heaven, but my Father only.

chokri: Süri Noah tüce bi thümanuo küvori tüce ri sü bi zoto.
english: "As the days of Noah were, so will be the coming of the Son of Man.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, sücesü dzü de süri ta kümothe mo Noah püzu rülü ta kümothe mi mhati mha kra, thüno yi mo mhi bazo.
english: For as in those days which were before the flood they were eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage, until the day that Noah entered into the ark,

chokri: Sidie zü kro süri die puko vopü ta kümothe püko se bamo; thümanuo küvori ri süsü bi zoto.
english: and they didn't know until the flood came, and took them all away, so will be the coming of the Son of Man.

chokri: Sücesü mi küna yilü tato, mipüh khiyi tato, mo kükreo kha vato.
english: Then two men will be in the field: one will be taken and one will be left;

chokri: Thünomi küna mha kügünyo süh die mhagü thato, mipüh khiyi mo kükreo khavato.
english: two women grinding at the mill, one will be taken and one will be left.

chokri: Süna neko khü ba zoyite, kükrenamoli neko Nyepoo küvori tü sekümo na.
english: Watch therefore, for you don't know in what hour your Lord comes.

chokri: Süri neko hio se bato; mhaceno ce nyepomi püh-e kürügomi rikhu küvale ditsüolü vori to sü küti se ba lize puce khü münu ba die kürügomi po vori pu ce rhe va lho.
english: But know this, that if the master of the house had known in what watch of the night the thief was coming, he would have watched, and would not have allowed his house to be broken into.

chokri: Süna neko ri bayite; Mhakükrenamoli, neko lüba kümo bavüdo pühlü thümanuo vori zoto tina. Küzütho mo kürüzü ceta
english: Therefore also be ready, for in an hour that you don't expect, the Son of Man will come.

chokri: Süze sopühno ceta küzüthoo mo pu do küveo thi die pu nyepomi po pu thipüh celü nyepo thi die pütü tüce mhapüh püko prü kübao thi ta?
english: "Who then is the faithful and wise servant, whom his lord has set over his household, to give them their food in due season?

chokri: Pu nyepoo küvori tüce süsü bi thi ba die ngoyi küto ceta süo yhevetho zo.
english: Blessed is that servant whom his lord finds doing so when he comes.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, pu thüma süo po pu mha mütü mhu nyepo thi tato.
english: Most assuredly I tell you that he will set him over all that he has.

chokri: Süri kürüzü cetao pulü no sü, a nyepoo vori münu yo;
english: But if that evil servant should say in his heart, 'My lord is delaying his coming,'

chokri: Sidie pu ceta besüh kükreko vü mo küthi shühdü tato; mo kümüzühmiko züh die ti mo kra müzüh bato;
english: and begins to beat his fellow-servants, and eat and drink with the drunken,

chokri: Ceta süo ne nyepoo pu lüba kümo tüsoo lü mo pu müri ba kümo bavüdoolü vori tato.
english: the lord of that servant will come in a day when he doesn't expect it, and in an hour when he doesn't know it,

chokri: Sidie pu dothü küna thiva die pu püh küthüra kütiko kroolü sü vato; sülüno kra mo uhu thüzhe pu bata to.
english: and will cut him in pieces, and appoint his portion with the hypocrites; there is where the weeping and grinding of teeth will be.

chokri: Sücesü tüyo küdee rülimi phosüh küri u metobüh püh vo zhosao sho müri küti bizo.
english: "Then the Kingdom of Heaven will be like ten virgins, who took their lamps, and went out to meet the bridegroom.

chokri: Puko mi pühngu udo ve; mo mi pühngu udo su.
english: Five of them were foolish, and five were wise.

chokri: Mo udo küsukoe u mütobüh püh küyice püko metobühlü u mezü khasüyi mota.
english: Those who were foolish, when they took their lamps, took no oil with them,

chokri: Süri udo küvekoe u mezübüh ri mo u metobüh ri pühyi.
english: but the wise took oil in their vessels with their lamps.

chokri: Süce zhosao vori münu kütace püko mütü rünyi die züh prüta.
english: Now while the bridegroom delayed, they all slumbered and slept.

chokri: Sücesü müsotülu mi se die, Yhie zhosao vori züho, neko vo pu züh küsühte; zisü.
english: But at midnight there was a cry, 'Behold! The bridegroom is coming! Come out to meet him!'

chokri: Süce rüli süko mütü süri die u metobüh lo kütso ve thiyi.
english: Then all those virgins arose, and trimmed their lamps.

chokri: Süce udo küdikoe udo küveko yisü, ne mezü hu püh ha prüte, ha metobüh mhü tazü mo, zita.
english: The foolish said to the wise, 'Give us some of your oil, for our lamps are going out.'

chokri: Süri udo küvekoe lasü, süziyi süte, kükrenamoli süzi va lize uko mütü tsomo tato; ne tho vo die tir küzühmi celü khri küyi-e veku tato, zita.
english: But the wise answered, saying, 'What if there isn't enough for us and you? You go rather to those who sell, and buy for yourselves.'

chokri: Sidie pukoe khrito vo küta dolü zhosao vorita, mo kürüdepü ba kütakoe zhosao züh die nolü Ihülü lüta, sidie cekha khayita.
english: While they went away to buy, the bridegroom came, and those who were ready went in with him to the marriage feast, and the door was shut.

chokri: Süsaco rüli kükreko ri vori die sü, Nyepoo, Nyepoo khri hako prüte, zisü.
english: Afterward the other virgins also came, saying, 'Lord, Lord, open to us.'

chokri: Eli Pu süko khü küla die sü, I nekoce potü süto, I neko semo, zita.
english: But he answered, 'Most assuredly I tell you, I don't know you.'

chokri: Süna neko khü mo la bazoyite, kükrenamoli neko thümanuo küvori tüsozhoko mo pu bavüdo se kümo na.
english: Watch therefore, for you don't know the day nor the hour in which the Son of Man is coming.

chokri: Süzomori tüyo küdee mipühne rüvüh rüna kümücuh pühlü vota küzüce; pu pu cetako ci püh püce süyi die pu celü mhako küza püh puko mülü küsü bizo.
english: "For it is like a man, going into another country, who called his own servants, and entrusted his goods to them.

chokri: Sücesü pü süko mipüh püh thiyi küve küsüra die thoküprü pühngü püh mipüh prüsü, kükremipüh küna kha prü, kükreo püh kha prüsü; sidie pu rüvüh ta.
english: To one he gave five talents, to another two, to another one; to each according to his own ability. Then he went on his journey.

chokri: Süsa thoküprü pühngu ngo küyioe süko süh vo tülhe thi die, thoküprü kükre pühngu prayi.
english: Immediately he who received the five talents went and traded with them, and made another five talents.

chokri: Sübi die küna ngo küyio ri vo südü küna mveyi.
english: In like manner he also who got the two gained another two.

chokri: Eli thoküprü püh ngo küyioe vo die cejü sü prü die pu nyepoo mha sü püh küva müta va.
english: But he who received the one went away and dug in the earth, and hid his lord's money.

chokri: Süze tülhü ta die ceta süko Nyepoo la vori die puko ci sü die puko lhe kütso.
english: "Now after a long time the lord of those servants came, and reconciled accounts with them.

chokri: Sücesü thoküprü pühngu ngoküyio pu thoküprü kükre pühngu sa püh vori die sü; Nyepoo no thoküprü pühngu püh a prü süe, mo Yhie! I kükre pühngu sa mve yi ve; zisü.
english: He who received the five talents came and brought another five talents, saying, 'Lord, you delivered to me five talents. Behold, I have gained another five talents besides them.'

chokri: Süsa pu Nyepoo pu yi sü; “tso süe no ceta küve mo küzüthoo, no mha küdopühlü ri zütho ba küyi na I n po mha kükrolü künyepo to; no ri vori die n Nyepoo züh n nü bata te;” zita.
english: "His lord said to him, 'Well done, good and faithful servant. You have been faithful over a few things, I will set you over many things. Enter into the joy of your lord.'

chokri: Süze thoküprü küna ngoküyio ri vori die sü, Nyepoo no thoküprü küna püh a prü süe, mo Yhie! I sü mhü thoküprü küna mve sayi te, zisü.
english: "He also who got the two talents came and said, 'Lord, you delivered to me two talents. Behold, I have gained another two talents besides them.'

chokri: Pu Nyepoo pu yisü, “tso süe no ceta küve mo küzüthoo, no mha küdopühlü ri zütho ba küyi na I n thi püh mha kükro mhu künyepo süto, ta vori die n Nyepoo züh nnü bayite,” zita.
english: "His lord said to him, 'Well done, good and faithful servant. You have been faithful over a few things, I will set you over many things. Enter into the joy of your lord.'

chokri: Süsa thoküprü püh ngoküyio vori die sü; Nyepoo no thüma nlü kürüh shüh püh ti I seyo; no prüh sü kümo ra ri rühyo, mo nyira sü kümo ra ri pa Küngu tayo;
english: "He also who had received the one talent came and said, 'Lord, I knew you that you are a hard man, reaping where you did not sow, and gathering where you did not scatter.

chokri: Süna I müprüh die n thoküprüo püh vo cejü khro küva püh müta ho, Yhie! N zü sü hice ba zo; zisü.
english: I was afraid, and went away and hid your talent in the earth. Behold, you have what is yours.'

chokri: Pu Nyepoo pu yisü, no küthüro mo mhathikümütsü cetao, I tsava sü kümora ri rühyo, mo nyira sü kümo rari pa Küngu tayo ti no se kütho tomo!
english: "But his lord answered him, 'You wicked and slothful servant. You knew that I reap where I didn't sow, and gather where I didn't scatter.

chokri: Sülize, no a rüka püh vo kalemi celü sü mati müsüh süze I vori tice a rüka mo pu pra küsa ngo küyi müsüh,
english: You ought therefore to have deposited my money with the bankers, and at my coming I should have received back my own with interest.

chokri: Süna neko pu celüno thoküprüo khi püh vo thoküprü küri kübao prü vate.
english: Take away therefore the talent from him, and give it to him who has the ten talents.

chokri: Kükrenamoli, mha pu belü kübao kha püh sa süto; mo pu kro küthikuyi to, süri thüma kühopühri mha pu belü ba kümoo pu belü kübao ri khi püh tata to kütina.
english: For to everyone who has will be given, and he will have abundance, but from him who has not, even that which he has will be taken away.

chokri: Süze neko mveyi kümo cetao kügü püh shozu küzühlü sü vate, sülüno kra mo uhu thüzhe pü bato.
english: Throw out the unprofitable servant into the outer darkness, where there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.'

chokri: Süze thümanuo zapozale thi die Pu shoyi kümüsako mütü züh Pu sa küvorice sücesü Pu zapozale küthi küde bayo bato.
english: "But when the Son of Man comes in his glory, and all the holy angels with him, then he will sit on the throne of his glory.

chokri: Mo thüma lünyi mütü züh vori Pu mhüzülü Künguto. Sidie tüko kükhümi-e tünyiko dolüno tükoko la kreyi tayo küti bi die Pu mi kho kükre püh la küna thi vato.
english: Before him all the nations will be gathered, and he will separate them one from another, as a shepherd separates the sheep from the goats.

chokri: Pu tükoko püh pu zaco süyito süri tünyikoe püh Pu veco sü vato.
english: He will set the sheep on his right hand, but the goats on the left.

chokri: Süsa Küde Pu zaco kübako yisü apo galiphi püh neko küprüko, neko voridie cejü thiyi prühlüno küsüh püh kümüta kedebao gwüyite;
english: Then the King will tell those on his right hand, 'Come, blessed of my Father, inherit the Kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world;

chokri: Kükrenamoli I müri tarü neko mhapüh apo ti, I thüri tarü neko mhapüh apo krayi, I rüsomi thi tarü neko a müsoyi;
english: for I was hungry, and you gave me food to eat; I was thirsty, and you gave me drink; I was a stranger, and you took me in;

chokri: I müthu tarü neko khümüne püh a whü, I mhathi tarü neko vori a tükhrüh mo I küdücelü ba rü neko ace vori tina.
english: naked, and you clothed me; I was sick, and you visited me; I was in prison, and you came to me.'

chokri: Sücesü kümathoko Pu khü küla die sü, Nyepoo, No di küthice müri ta die hako mhapüh nva thisü, mori thüri ta die hako mhapüh npo kra la? zito.
english: "Then the righteous will answer him, saying, 'Lord, when did we see you hungry, and feed you; or thirsty, and give you a drink?

chokri: Mo küdi küthice no rüsomi thi ta die hako n zühyi, mori müthu ta die hako khümüne püh n whu süa?
english: When did we see you as a stranger, and take you in; or naked, and clothe you?

chokri: Mori di küthice no mhathi zü mori küdücelü ba die hako nce vori la? zito.
english: When did we see you sick, or in prison, and come to you?'

chokri: Sücesü küdeo puko zü küla die sü, I nekoce potü süto, neko a sazüh künyitho hiko mipüh yori thi küsüsa ayo thi küsü bizo, zitato.
english: "The King will answer them, 'Most assuredly I tell you, inasmuch as you did it to one of the least of these my brothers, you did it to me.'

chokri: Süsa Pu Pu veco kübakoce po die, neko rüshu küpüko, neko tasü küshothe me, thürüküsüo mo püshoyiko na küsühpüh kümüta lü vo tate;
english: Then he will say also to those on the left hand, 'Depart from me, you cursed, into the eternal fire which is prepared for the devil and his angels;

chokri: Kükrenamoli, I müri tarü, neko mha püh apo timo, I thüri zürü neko mhapüh apo kramo;
english: for I was hungry, and you didn't give me food to eat; I was thirsty, and you gave me no drink;

chokri: I rüsomi thi tarü neko azühyi mute, I müthu tarü neko khümüne püh a mbemüne mo, I mhathi zürü mo I küdecelü barü neko vori a pe mo, zita to.
english: I was a stranger, and you didn't take me in; naked, and you didn't clothe me; sick, and in prison, and you didn't visit me.'

chokri: Süsa sükori Pu isü, Nyepoo, diküthice no müri zü, mori thüri zü, mori rüsomi thi zü, mori müthu zü, mori süzü, mori küdecelü zü die hako n ngo die n thükü sü mu ta la? zito.
english: "Then they will also answer, saying, 'Lord, when did we see you hungry, or thirsty, or a stranger, or naked, or sick, or in prison, and didn't help you?'

chokri: Süsa Pu süko zü küla die, I nekoce potü süto, nekoe künyitho hiko yori thisü mo küta sü a yo ri thisü mota zo, zita to.
english: "Then he will answer them, saying, 'Most assuredly I tell you, inasmuch as you didn't do it to one of the least of these, you didn't do it to me.'

chokri: Sidie puko po tasü küshothe kümüthilü vo tato, mo kümathokoe küshothe kürhühlü vo tato.
english: These will go away into eternal punishment, but the righteous into eternal life."

chokri: Süze Jisu zü hiko pothü küsüsa, Pu Pu sadziko yisü,
english: It happened, when Jesus had finished all these words, that he said to his disciples,

chokri: Zho küna sa cüküvonye nye ta küto neko ri seba, mo thümanuo tüpüh gu va no die mi Pu tüsüto, zita.
english: "You know that after two days the Passover is coming, and the Son of Man will be delivered up to be crucified."

chokri: Sücesü pethiküzhoko mo lüsiküseko mo mi dolü mülhiko vo die Caiaphas li küti pethiküzhoo ceta zholü Künguyi.
english: Then the chief priests, the scribes, and the elders of the people were gathered together in the court of the high priest, who was called Caiaphas.

chokri: Sidie püko do ve shüh die Jisu tüpüh dokhri va küto kürüthi.
english: They took counsel together that they might take Jesus by deceit, and kill him.

chokri: Süri püko poti, thüma dolü kübvü küta kümüprüh na, thünye tüso nha ta sü, zita.
english: But they said, "Not during the feast, lest a riot occur among the people."

chokri: Süsa Jisu Bethanilü Simon mpa küthio celü kübace,
english: Now when Jesus was in Bethany, in the house of Simon the leper,

chokri: Thünomipü püh alabaster tir püma kürüh shüh püh süh vori die, Pu hi kübalü süo la püh Pu piyo sü.
english: a woman came to him having an alabaster jar of very expensive ointment, and she poured it on his head as he sat at the table.

chokri: Eli Pu sadziko sü ngosü die puko ro die sü, dipüh na mha hikohi püh müka va zü shi?
english: But when his disciples saw this, they were indignant, saying, "Why this waste?

chokri: Kükrenamoli, tir hihi püh mhama kükro khriyi die püh küdikütsakhumi vaphi süyi vezo küti na; zita.
english: For this ointment might have been sold for much, and given to the poor."

chokri: Süri Jisu süo seyi die pükoce, Neko dipüh na thüno hipü küyhu yo la? Pu ayo mha küve thi sü zoe,
english: But Jesus, knowing this, said to them, "Why do you trouble the woman? Because she has done a good work for me.

chokri: Küdimikoe neko zühsüh bayo zo, süri I neko züh süh bayi Iho.
english: For you always have the poor with you; but you don't always have me.

chokri: Pu tir hihi lapüh amoyo küsü, Pu a kükhrüh ne küsüh sü künyi na zo.
english: For in pouring this ointment on my body, she did it to prepare me for burial.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, cejü mütü züyiküve hio püh zhopo thisü küto mütülü, thüno hipü mhathi küsü hi kürükra ri sa po zoto, zita.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, wherever this Gospel is preached in the whole world, what this woman has done will also be spoken of as a memorial of her."

chokri: Sücesü Iscariot Judas li küti mi kürikünako mipüh pethiküzhoko ce vo,
english: Then one of the twelve, who was called Judas Iscariot, went to the chief priests,

chokri: Mopu sükoce, l pu tüpüh neko prü sü lize neko dipühpüh a prüta? zisü. Süce puko rüka sühmüri phi püh pu prü sü.
english: and said, "What are you willing to give me, that I should deliver him to you?" They weighed out for him thirty pieces of silver.

chokri: Mo süyo gwino Pu tüsü küto tü küve ri bata.
english: From that time he sought opportunity to betray him.

chokri: Süsa khre yisü kümo tsükhrüda küti nye thüra nha müthaküyiko Jisu ce vori die sü, No hakopo dipüh ceono cüküpranye küsüh püh npo küti n müdo ta? zisü.
english: Now on the first day of unleavened bread, the disciples came to Jesus, saying to him, "Where do you want us to prepare for you to eat the Passover?"

chokri: Süsa Pu sükoce, neko rüna nadeolü lü die mipüh ce, Kümüthaoe, atü tso bate, I müthaküyiko züh die n ce lüno cüküpra nye nyeto, süzi ba le, zi süte, zita.
english: He said, "Go into the city to a certain person, and tell him, 'The Teacher says, "My time is at hand. I will keep the Passover at your house with my disciples."'"

chokri: Sidie müthaküyikoe Jisu pükoce po küsü bi die thiyi, sidie puko cuküpra Ihüo küsühyi.
english: The disciples did as Jesus commanded them, and they prepared the Passover.

chokri: Süsa thüva voritice, Pu mi kürikünako züh bayi,
english: Now when evening had come, he was reclining at the table with the twelve disciples.

chokri: Mo püko mhati küyice, Pu süko yisü, I nekoce potü süto, neko mipüh atü püh mi belü süto, zita.
english: As they were eating, he said, "Most assuredly I tell you that one of you will betray me."

chokri: Sücesü püko lü sü püh kümüre thita, sidie mi pühpüh Pu yisü, Nyepoo süosü I no me? Zive thita.
english: They were exceedingly sorrowful, and each began to ask him, "It isn't me, is it, Lord?"

chokri: Mo Pu püko khüküla diesü, Mipüh pu be pühlü azüh mükhu pühlü süh küsüo tsü tho atü püh mi belü süto, zita.
english: He answered, "He who dipped his hand with me in the dish, the same will betray me.

chokri: Tho püh küma bi die, thüma nuo tata to, Eli puna thümanuo tüpüh mi belü küsüoe; Tsee thiyite! Pu münu püh vori kümoe veku to murü.
english: The Son of Man goes, even as it is written of him, but woe to that man through whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would be better for that man if he had not been born."

chokri: Sücesü, Judas, Pu tü sü kütooe sü, Kümüthao, süosü Ino me? zisü. Süce Pue püce, no posü tazo; zita.
english: Judas, who betrayed him, answered, "It isn't me, is it, Rabbi?" He said to him, "You said it."

chokri: Süsa püko mhati kübalü Jisu tsükhrüdao khi püh die galiphi sü die cethiyi; sidie Pu khi püh müthaküyiko prü die sü, Yi püh tiyite, hihi amozo.
english: As they were eating, Jesus took bread, gave thanks for it, and broke it. He gave to the disciples, and said, "Take, eat; this is my body."

chokri: Süsa Pu tüheo püh Jihova shüh sü die khipüh püko prü die sü, neko hiohi yipüh kra ve thiyite;
english: He took the cup, gave thanks, and gave to them, saying, "All of you drink it,

chokri: Kükrenamoli, hiohi aza, küzütsüh küzükho küyi küsao, thüma kükro küphoma rhayi küto na mükrüh küsüozo.
english: for this is my blood of the new covenant, which is poured out for many for the remission of sins.

chokri: Eli, I nekoce potü süto; I apo küdebalü neko züh die khübühzü küsa krata küto tüsoo tsoyi kümothe, I tha yogwino khübühbo hio se yono kra sayi lhote; zita.
english: But I tell you that I will not drink of this fruit of the vine from now on, until that day when I drink it anew with you in my Father's Kingdom."

chokri: Süsa püko küzüh tsale püh thiyi die ta sü Olive cejüthuo khota.
english: When they had sung a hymn, they went out to the Mount of Olives.

chokri: Süsa Jisu pükoce po die, Neko mütü ri tsüzi ayo jo ve thita to, Kükrenamoli, I tüko kükhüo vü süto, mo tüko kroko ta küpreyo tato, zidie thopüh müta tina.
english: Then Jesus said to them, "All of you will be made to stumble because of me tonight, for it is written, 'I will strike the shepherd, and the sheep of the flock will be scattered.'

chokri: Süri I rhühlasü küta sa I neko züra ta sü Galilee lü vo tato, zita.
english: But after I am raised up, I will go before you into Galilee."

chokri: Peter Pu khü küla die sü, Mi mütü n yo jota zori, I mhapühceri n yo jota lhozo, zita.
english: But Peter answered him, "Even if all will be made to stumble because of you, I will never be made to stumble."

chokri: Jisu sü püce, I nce potü süto, süosü, tsüzi thüvü kükhu mhüzü no va süh aza phra mu ta to, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "Most assuredly I tell you that tonight, before the rooster crows, you will deny me three times."

chokri: Peter sü Puce, Apo n züh sa mosü ta lizo shi I mhapühceri n phra mu ta lhozo; zita. Müthaküyiko mütü ri süzi ve thite.
english: Peter said to him, "Even if I must die with you, I will not deny you." All of the disciples also said likewise.

chokri: Süsa Jisu puko züh die Gethsemane liti thinyi pühlü vori die Pu müthaküyiko yisü, I lilü vo die sho kübace neko hice bayite, zita.
english: Then Jesus came with them to a place called Gethsemane, and said to his disciples, "Sit here, while I go there and pray."

chokri: Sidie Pu Peter mo Zebedee nunyi züh vo die Pülü kümüzhe shun bata.
english: He took with him Peter and the two sons of Zebedee, and began to be sorrowful and severely troubled.

chokri: Süsa Pu puko yisü, Alü kümüzhe püh sata küto thi zote, Neko hice ba die a züh khü ba yite.
english: Then he said to them, "My soul is exceedingly sorrowful, even to death. Stay here, and watch with me."

chokri: Sidie Pu küdo kümücuh zalü phe die tüprü zührüh pü die küsho thi die Yhie! Apo, mhaceno thiyi ve to lize, tühe hio püh a thürü vate, zita. Süri a müdo mo n müdo thiyite, zita.
english: He went forward a little, fell on his face, and prayed, saying, "My Father, if it is possible, let this cup pass away from me; nevertheless, not what I desire, but what you desire."

chokri: Süsa Pu müthaküyikoce vori die püko züh küzü ngo küyice, Pu Peter yisü, neko bavüdo pühri azüh khü bayi Ihozo te me?
english: He came to the disciples, and found them sleeping, and said to Peter, "What, couldn't you watch with me for one hour?

chokri: Küdo kütilü lü ta mo küto na neko khü mo la bazo yite: Rüpüo ce lacoe thinyi bazo kütho, eli thio celacoe müza te.
english: Watch and pray, that you don't enter into temptation. The spirit indeed is willing, but the flesh is weak."

chokri: Süsa Pu va künaolü la vo sho die, Yhie! Apo, apo tühe hio kra mo die khavayi lho zo to lize ntho n müdo thiyite, zita.
english: Again, a second time he went away, and prayed, saying, "My Father, if this cup can't pass away from me unless I drink it, your desire be done."

chokri: Süze Pu la Vori die puko zühzü zo küti ngoyi, kükrenamoli puko mhürhoyi lhozo zü küta na.
english: He came again and found them sleeping, for their eyes were heavy.

chokri: Mo Pu puko khava die va süh-o lü la vo die hi zü küpocoko po shola bata.
english: He left them again, went away, and prayed a third time, saying the same words.

chokri: Süsa Pu ta Pu sadzikoce vori die puko yisü, neko tsüe züh mo rülüyite, Yhie, pütüo vorite, mo mi thümanuo tüpüh küphomako belü süva to bate.
english: Then he came to his disciples, and said to them, "Sleep on now, and take your rest. Behold, the hour is at hand, and the Son of Man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.

chokri: Sürite, die uko tazü ta khe, Yhie a tüsü küto-oe vori bate, zita.
english: Arise, let's be going. Behold, he who betrays me is at hand."

chokri: Süsa Pu züpo küthalü Yhie! Judas kürikünako dolü mi püh-e pethiküzhoko mo thüma dolü mülhiko celüno zesho mo sühdü küpüh thüma krodepüh züh die vori thata.
english: While he was still speaking, behold, Judas, one of the twelve, came, and with him a great multitude with swords and clubs, from the chief priest and elders of the people.

chokri: Süsa Pu tüsü küto maoe sü mhüzü zasi püh püh puko prü die; I vo die mbo sü kütoo sü pu zoho, neko Pu tüyi te zi püh mata.
english: Now he who betrayed him gave them a sign, saying, "Whoever I kiss, he is the one. Seize him."

chokri: Si die pu Jisu ce pheri die, Küveo thiyite, Kümüthao; zidie Pu mbo sü.
english: Immediately he came to Jesus, and said, "Hail, Rabbi!" and kissed him.

chokri: Süsa Jisu pu yisü, A züh-o, no dipühna hice bata; zisü, Süsa puko vori die puko be püh Jisu yo sü die Pu tüyita.
english: Jesus said to him, "Friend, why are you here?" Then they came and laid hands on Jesus, and took him.

chokri: Sücesü Jisu züh kütako mipüh pu be yho pra pu zesho süzühyi die püh pethiküzhoo cetami püh ni müta va.
english: Behold, one of those who were with Jesus stretched out his hand, and drew his sword, and struck the servant of the high priest, and struck off his ear.

chokri: Süri Jisu pu yisü, n zeshoo püh u balü süla vate, kükrenamoli, zesho sühyo kütimi zesho yono kata zoto küti na, zita.
english: Then Jesus said to him, "Put your sword back into its place, for all those who take the sword will die by the sword.

chokri: Me, no I tsühi ri Apoce sho sü lize Pue tüyoshoyimi legion küriküna küzü ri kütsüh süyi lho lizu lü ba me?
english: Or do you think that I couldn't ask my Father, and he would even now send me more than twelve legions of angels?

chokri: Eli, süzi ta lize dibi die Kütholüsilü züko thi tsühyi ta? zita.
english: How then would the Scriptures be fulfilled that it must be so?"

chokri: Sütücesü, Jisu thüma kroo yisü, neko zesho mo sühdü püh die kürügomi kütü bi die atü to vori zü me? I tüsonha Kürüsucelü neko züh ba die mütha vori zo, eli, sücesü neko a tüyi mo.
english: In that hour Jesus said to the multitudes, "Have you come out as against a robber with swords and clubs to seize me? I sat daily in the temple teaching, and you didn't arrest me.

chokri: Eli mha hikohi thi kütae kütholüsilü sadzühküse züko po tsühyi küto na zo, zisü. Süsa müthaküyiko Pu kha va die ta tso ta.
english: But all this has happened, that the Scriptures of the prophets might be fulfilled." Then all the disciples left him, and fled.

chokri: Süsa Jisu tü küyiko Pu züh die pethiküzhoo Caiaphas celü, lüsiküseko mo mülhiko vo Küngu kübara vota.
english: Those who had taken Jesus led him away to Caiaphas the high priest, where the scribes and the elders were gathered together.

chokri: Süri Peter-e u küla pe zova tozu die Pu sa müdzi zo Pethiküzhoo celü vo die; sülüno pu cetako zühbata.
english: But Peter followed him from a distance, to the court of the high priest, and entered in and sat with the officers, to see the end.

chokri: Süsa pethiküzhoko, mülhiko mo müthi kühu mütüri Jisu dokhri va küto na; Puyo kütho kümo zhopoko phu süta.
english: Now the chief priests, the elders, and the whole council sought false testimony against Jesus, that they might put him to death;

chokri: Eli, kücezü zhopo kükro vori zori puko zhopo utü pühri ngoyi mota, Künuco mi küna vori die sü;
english: and they found none. Even though many false witnesses came forward, they found none. But at last two false witnesses came forward,

chokri: Po küti Thüma hiohi po die, I-e Jihova rüsuceo dorhü va die zhosüh nha süo thi la sü vayi vezo, ziyo ho; zita.
english: and said, "This man said, 'I am able to destroy the temple of God, and to build it in three days.'"

chokri: Sücesü Pethiküzhoo süri die sü Pu yisü, No mhapühri küla sü Iho zo me? N kümütsu zhopoko hi dibi ta?
english: The high priest stood up, and said to him, "Have you no answer? What is this that these testify against you?"

chokri: Süri Jisu kümükrethi bata, Süsa Pethiküzhoo Pu yisü, I-e Jihova rhüh tayo kütio zalüno rüshu zo die poto, süosü noe Jihova nuo Khrista zo me mo sheri hace po süte, zita.
english: But Jesus held his peace. The high priest answered him, "I adjure you by the living God, that you tell us whether you are the Christ, the Son of God."

chokri: Jisu pu yisü, No posü vazo; süzori I nce potü süto; Hisa nekoe Thümanuoe Kükuthoo zaco bayi die tüyono kümhülü vori küzü ngoto, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "You have said it. Nevertheless, I tell you, henceforth you will see the Son of Man sitting at the right hand of Power, and coming on the clouds of the sky."

chokri: Süsa Pethiküzhoo pu khüne cerhü die sü, Pu Jihova kütha zü pote, ukoe tsüsa dipüh zhopo kükre phu sa ta? Yhie nekori Pu Jihova kütha khü seyite, zita.
english: Then the high priest tore his clothing, saying, "He has spoken blasphemy! Why do we need any more witnesses? Behold, now you have heard his blasphemy.

chokri: Nekoe dipüh Iü yoa? zisü. Pükoe pola die sü, Pue sata sü ta zo, zita.
english: What do you think?" They answered, "He is worthy of death!"

chokri: Süsa pükoe mhütsa püh Pu züyo sü, duthü püh Pu vü mo kükrekoe bezi püh Pu vü, sidie sü;
english: Then they spit in his face and beat him with their fists, and some slapped him,

chokri: No Khristao, sopühno n vü sheli tha sadzühküse zü hace po süte, zita.
english: saying, "Prophesy to us, you Christ! Who hit you?"

chokri: Sücesü Peter-e ceta shozuco barü, rülimi pü püh puce vori die sü, No ri Galileemi Jisu züh tayo zoe, zita.
english: Now Peter was sitting outside in the court, and a maid came to him, saying, "You were also with Jesus, the Galilean!"

chokri: Eli, Peter süko mütü mhüzülüno mo lizo die sü, No dipüh po ba sheli I se mo, zita.
english: But he denied it before them all, saying, "I don't know what you are talking about."

chokri: Süsaripu ceta pari tice rülimi kükre püh ri pu ngo sü die süce kübako yisü; Thüma hio ri Nazaretmi Jisu züh tayo zo, zita.
english: When he had gone out onto the porch, someone else saw him, and said to those who were there, "This man also was with Jesus of Nazareth."

chokri: Süri pu moli zo die rüshukhu zo die sü, I thüma süosü semo zo, zita.
english: Again he denied it with an oath, "I don't know the man."

chokri: Süsa zaco, süshice kübako püce vori die sü; Nori püko dolü mipüh zo küthozo, n züpolüno n seyi tazo, zita.
english: After a little while those who stood by came and said to Peter, "Surely you are also one of them, for your speech makes you known."

chokri: Sücesü pu rüshu büh zo die sü, I thüma süo semo zo, zita. Mo süzisü mütha thüvü khuta.
english: Then he began to curse and to swear, "I don't know the man!" Immediately the rooster crowed.

chokri: Süsa Peter-e, Jisu pu yisü, No tsüzi thüvü kükhu mhüzü va süh a müla tato; süzi küma jüo rükravoriyi; Sidie pu shozu vo die kra püh kümüre thita.
english: Peter remembered the word which Jesus had said to him, "Before the rooster crows, you will deny me three times." He went out and wept bitterly.

chokri: Süsa tüso pari mütha pethiküzhoko mu thüma dolü mülhiko mütü vori Küngu die puko Jisu müzho die Pu dokhri va küto na kürüthi.
english: Now when morning had come, all the chief priests and the elders of the people took counsel against Jesus to put him to death:

chokri: Sidie puko Pu phayi die züh vo Pontius Pilate puko nadelü governor belü süva.
english: and they bound him, and led him away, and delivered him up to Pontius Pilate, the governor.

chokri: Sücesü Judas Pu tü küsüoe mi Jisu müzho küva ngo sü die pülü kümüzhe shüh die rüka sühmüriko khi la püh vo pethiko mo mülhiko prü die sü.
english: Then Judas, who betrayed him, when he saw that Jesus was condemned, felt remorse, and brought back the thirty pieces of silver to the chief priests and elders,

chokri: I-e küzho küdimi püh thüza mükrü too küzü hi phomate; zita. Süri puko sü, süsü hayo mo ntho lüyite; zita.
english: saying, "I have sinned in that I betrayed innocent blood." But they said, "What is that to us? You see to it."

chokri: Süsa pu rüka süko kügü püh Kürüsucelü sü va die ta vo pütho kürüshokhri ta.
english: He threw down the pieces of silver in the sanctuary, and departed. He went away and hanged himself.

chokri: Süsa pethiküzhoko rüka süko pühyi die sü, hihi thüza ma zo tina püh raka bühlü küsü thüzho mo, zita.
english: The chief priests took the pieces of silver, and said, "It's not lawful to put them into the treasury, since it is the price of blood."

chokri: Süna puko kürüthi die, rüsomi kükhrüh thi thi küto na rüka süko püh le küthio yi pro püh khriyi.
english: They took counsel, and bought the potter's field with them, to bury strangers in.

chokri: Süna tsüdo ri yi süo püh thüza yi, zidie ciyo.
english: Therefore that field was called "The Field of Blood" to this day.

chokri: Sücesü, thazü Jeremiah sadzühküseo po; I-e Israelmi nuneko humi po Pu ma shepüh kümüta bi die; puko rüka sühmüri pühyi die,
english: Then that which was spoken through Jeremiah the prophet was fulfilled, saying, "They took the thirty pieces of silver, The price of him upon whom a price had been set, Whom some of the children of Israel priced,

chokri: Süh vo Nyepoo ace po küsü bi die püh le küthio yi, khriyi, zi püh kümüta züo po tsühyi küto na.
english: And they gave them for the potter's field, As the Lord commanded me."

chokri: Sücesü Jisu rüna sülü governor mhüzülü tha küyice governor Pu kütso die sü, No Jewmi küdeo me? zita. Jisu pu yisü, N küpo sü zo, zita.
english: Now Jesus stood before the governor: and the governor asked him, saying, "Are you the King of the Jews?" Jesus said to him, "So you say."

chokri: Sülize, pethiküzhoko mo mülhiko Pu kümüzho zü po zü zori Pu mhapühri küla mota.
english: When he was accused by the chief priests and elders, he answered nothing.

chokri: Sücesü Pilate Pu yisü, puko n kümütsu zü di thüdüpüh po ba sheli no se ba mo me? zisü.
english: Then Pilate said to him, "Don't you hear how many things they testify against you?"

chokri: Süri Jisu pu khü küla sü shemo zo küta na küzhoo po pu malhü thita.
english: He gave him no answer, not even one word, so that the governor marveled greatly.

chokri: Sülize thünye süo tülü sü küzhooe thüma kroo müdo kütso die küzümi püh kha küsü thüzho tayo.
english: Now at the feast the governor was accustomed to release to the multitude one prisoner, whom they desired.

chokri: Sücesü pükoe küzü zalemi püh pu za Barabbas li küti püh ba.
english: They had then a notable prisoner, called Barabbas.

chokri: Süna puko vori küngu küyice, Pilate puko kütso die sü, A po sopüh kha püh neko küprü neko nü ta? Barabbas to me? Jisu Khrista li kütio ta? zisü.
english: When therefore they were gathered together, Pilate said to them, "Whom do you want me to release to you? Barabbas, or Jesus, who is called Christ?"

chokri: Kükrenamoli, thüma hikohie Pu ngo puko ro die Pu tü küsü Pilate-e se küba na.
english: For he knew that because of envy they had delivered him up.

chokri: Süzomori pue sheti balü ba kütice pu cemi-e shoyi püh kütsüh püce sü die, No thüma kümatho hio yo mhapühri thi hite, kükrenamoli, I tha a mholüno Pu na kümüzhe shüh zo küti thi ho, zi küta na.
english: While he was sitting on the judgment seat, his wife sent to him, saying, "Have nothing to do with that righteous man, for I have suffered many things this day in a dream because of him."

chokri: Süri pethiküzhoko mo mülhikoe Barabbas shoyi mo Jisu püh gu va no die makroo kühi ta.
english: Now the chief priests and the elders persuaded the multitudes to ask for Barabbas, and destroy Jesus.

chokri: Sücesü küzhoo püko yisü, unyi mi küna dolü apo sopüh-o püh neko küprü neko müdo ta? zisü. Mu pukoe sü Barabbas li kütio to li zita.
english: But the governor answered them, "Which of the two do you want me to release to you?" They said, "Barabbas!"

chokri: Pilate püko yisü, süze apo Jisu Khrista li kütio püh dibi va ta? zisü.
english: Pilate said to them, "What then shall I do to Jesus, who is called Christ?" They all said to him, "Let him be crucified!"

chokri: Puko mütü sü, pu püh guva te; zita küzhoo la sü, Pu dipüh thi kükri küva na ta? zisü. Süri puko se mütoku die sü, Pu püh gu vate; zita.
english: But the governor said, "Why? What evil has he done?" But they cried out exceedingly, saying, "Let him be crucified!"

chokri: Süsa Pilate-e ku küyio moli mha kübvüku pari ta küzü ngo die, zü püh vori die makroo mhüzülü pu be mütüdie sü, netho pete, I thüma kümatho hio za na küjo ayo di ho, zita.
english: So when Pilate saw that nothing was being gained, but rather that a disturbance was starting, he took water, and washed his hands before the multitude, saying, "I am innocent of the blood of this righteous person. You see to it."

chokri: Süzi küsüce thüma mütü se die sü, pu za po hayo ri mo hanu hane yori vorite, zita.
english: All the people answered, "May his blood be on us, and on our children!"

chokri: Süsa pu Barabbas kha püko prüva, mo pu Jisu vü sü die pu püh guva no die kha puko belü süva.
english: Then he released to them Barabbas, but Jesus he flogged and delivered to be crucified.

chokri: Süsa governor riwhumiko po Jisu züh die müthi kühu celü lü mo riwhu kroo mütü vori die Pu hu püyi ta.
english: Then the governor's soldiers took Jesus into the Praetorium, and gathered the whole garrison together against him.

chokri: Sidie puko Po khüne celhü va die khüne müreve küti püh khi püh Pu yo gu sü;
english: They stripped him, and put a scarlet robe on him.

chokri: Süsa puko tsahu kürepüh küde pirüh thiyi die püh Pu piyo sü, mo tükhrathü püh püh Pu be u zaco sü. Sidie shetü Pu mhüzülü prü Pu krühnyi die, Judako küdeo küveo thiyite zi bata.
english: They braided a crown of thorns and put it on his head, and a reed in his right hand; and they kneeled down before him, and mocked him, saying, "Hail, King of the Jews!"

chokri: Sidie puko mhütsa püh Pu rüshu mo tükhrathü püh Pu pi vü.
english: They spat on him, and took the reed and struck him on the head.

chokri: Süsa puko Pu krühnyi küti thoko thitsüh küvasa Pu khüo Ihüva die Pu tho Pu khüo khi püh Pu yo sü. Sidie Pu püh guva tozu die Pu züh tata.
english: When they had mocked him, they took the robe off of him, and put his clothes on him, and led him away to crucify him.

chokri: Süze puko tavo küzüce Cyrene püh pu za Simon li küti püh ngoyi die pu kümu thi püh pu po Jisu cross püh.
english: As they came out, they found a man of Cyrene, Simon by name, and they compelled him to go with them, that he might carry his cross.

chokri: Süsa püko Golgatha, uco mi pi khuro li küti thüthi pühlü vori küyice;
english: They came to a place called "Golgotha," that is to say, "The place of a skull."

chokri: Puko khübühzü püh kükhrozü sa küre kütipüh Pu po kra nosü, süri Pu süo mütha die kra muta.
english: They gave him sour wine to drink mixed with gall. When he had tasted it, he would not drink.

chokri: Süsa puko Pu püh guva die Pu khüne ri püh cethi khüle thiva die puko tho küzayita. Süosü sadzüh küseo po püh kümüta, Puko tho a khüne küzayi, mu puko a khüneko yo cethi khüle thi; zi püh kümtao thitsühyi kütona.
english: When they had crucified him, they divided his clothing among them, casting lots,

chokri: Sidie puko süce ba die Pu khü bata.
english: and they sat and watched him there.

chokri: Süsa puko Pu pi mhuyo Pu kümüzho zü tho die, Hiohi. Jisu, Jüdami küdeo zi püh ma.
english: They set up over his head the accusation against him written, "THIS IS JESUS, THE KING OF THE JEWS."

chokri: Sücesü kürügomi küna, mi püh Pu zaco mo mi püh Pu veco zidie püh Pu sa gu püh ma,
english: Then there were two robbers crucified with him, one on his right hand and one on the left.

chokri: Sücesü thüma pheliphe küti mütü pigü die Pu kürhe die sü;
english: Those who passed by blasphemed him, wagging their heads,

chokri: No kürüsuce dorhü va die zho süh nha thi lasü va kütoo, N tho n külayite, No Jihova nuo kütho lize; cross yono ta kiri te, zi bata.
english: and saying, "You who destroy the temple, and build it in three days, save yourself! If you are the Son of God, come down from the cross!"

chokri: Süsü bi pethiküzhoko ri lüsiküseko mo mülhiko züh die, Pue mi kükremi külayiyo, eli,
english: Likewise the chief priests also mocking, with the scribes, the Pharisees, and the elders, said,

chokri: Pu tho Pu külayi lho, mhaceno Pu Israelmi küdeo lize, Pu tho tsühi cross yono ta kiri te, sülize hari Pu mülüyi to; zi die Pu krühnyi bata.
english: "He saved others, but he can't save himself. If he is the King of Israel, let him come down from the cross now, and we will believe in him.

chokri: Pu Jihova mülüyo erü, Pue Pu zühyi to lize, Pupo tsühi Pu küla süte, Kükrenamoli, Pue I Jihova nuo zo, zi die poyo kütina.
english: He trusts in God. Let God deliver him now, if he wants him; for he said, 'I am the Son of God.'"

chokri: Süzomoli Pu sa gu pu küzü kürügonyi zori süsü bi die Pu kürhe ta.
english: The robbers also who were crucified with him cast on him the same reproach.

chokri: Süsa bavüdo shorüh-o lüno vo thücio kütso cejü mütü zühbüh pü bata.
english: Now from the sixth hour there was darkness over all the land until the ninth hour.

chokri: Süze bavüdo thücio müsühce Jisu se müto die sü, Eli, Eli, lama sabacthani, püco, A Jihova, A Jihova, No dithi die a kha va laha? zita.
english: About the ninth hour Jesus cried with a loud voice, saying, "Eli, Eli, lima sabachthani?" That is, "My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?"

chokri: Sücesü thüma süce küthakoe süo se küsü ce sü, Thüma hio Elijah ci ba te, zita.
english: Some of them who stood there, when they heard it, said, "This man is calling Elijah."

chokri: Süze püko mi püh-e rükri ta vo die mha kümütsükhü püh kükhro zülü sühyi die püh vo Pu po kra no die püh Pu prü.
english: Immediately one of them ran, and took a sponge, and filled it with vinegar, and put it on a reed, and gave him a drink.

chokri: Eli kükrekoe sü, hilu note, Elijah ta vori die Pu küla sü to me lho sheli uko pe za balu khe, zita.
english: The rest said, "Let him be. Let's see whether Elijah comes to save him."

chokri: Süsa Jisu müyi müto la sü die Pu rüpü kha sü va.
english: Jesus cried again with a loud voice, and yielded up his spirit.

chokri: Mo sütü tülüsü Kürüsucelü khü lhapüh kümüzüo pu pilü lüno prü u küla kütso kro küna thi ta, cejü ri rüna ta, mo kütsüko ri prota.
english: Behold, the veil of the temple was torn in two from the top to the bottom. The earth quaked and the rocks were split.

chokri: Mo mhakhreko ri pata, sülize züh küta kümüsami kükro ri la süri ta.
english: The tombs were opened, and many bodies of the saints who had fallen asleep were raised;

chokri: Mo süko mhakhreko lüno pari die Pu rhühlasü kütasa rüna kümüsaolü vo die thüma kükro mhüngo thita,
english: and coming out of the tombs after his resurrection, they entered into the holy city and appeared to many.

chokri: Sücesü riwhumi kra mhü küzhoo mu pu züh tha die Jisu khü kübakoe; ceyice sü küta mo mha thi kütako ngo sü die, müprüh püh kümüre thi die sü, Hiohi Jihova nuo kütho zo, zita.
english: Now the centurion, and those who were with him watching Jesus, when they saw the earthquake, and the things that were done, feared exceedingly, saying, "Truly this was the Son of God."

chokri: Sülize Galilee lüno Jisu sa müdzi die Pu shoyi thi küvori thünomi kropüh ri, rapeco ba die mhako pe ba.
english: Many women were there watching from afar, who had followed Jesus from Galilee, serving him.

chokri: Süko dolü Magdalin Mary, Jacob mo Joseph nyi zu Mary mo Zebedee nunyi zupü, süzi ba.
english: Among them were Mary Magdalene, Mary the mother of James and Joses, and the mother of the sons of Zebedee.

chokri: Süsa thüva vori küyice, Joseph, Arimathiami künemi püh, püri Jisu sadzi thi kütami püh vori.
english: When evening had come, a rich man from Arimathaea, named Joseph, who himself was also Jesus' disciple came.

chokri: Pu Pilate ce vo die Jisu mo sho, mo Pilate-e süo püh pu prüsü nosü.
english: This man went to Pilate, and asked for Jesus' body. Then Pilate commanded the body to be given up.

chokri: Süsa Joseph thümoo pühyi die linen khü kümüsa pühlü küzüyi die;
english: Joseph took the body, and wrapped it in a clean linen cloth,

chokri: Süh vo pu tho tsüpüh ho püh kümüta pühlü khrühva, sidie kütsü künyepüh kütu püh mhakhreo müka va die tata.
english: and laid it in his own new tomb, which he had hewn out in the rock, and he rolled a great stone to the door of the tomb, and departed.

chokri: Süze Magdaline Mary mo Mary kükrepü unyi mhakhreo mhüzülü bata.
english: Mary Magdalene was there, and the other Mary, sitting opposite the tomb.

chokri: Sülize mha küsühküti tüsoo sa nha Phariseeko mu pethiküzhoko vori de Pilate mhüzülü Künguyi.
english: Now on the next day, which was the day after the Preparation Day, the chief priests and the Pharisees were gathered together to Pilate,

chokri: Sidie pukoe sü, Küzhoo, mi küdoyo küti thüma hiohi Pu rhüh kübace, I zho süh nha rhühlasü tato, zi küti küpo ha rükra ba le;
english: saying, "Sir, we remember what that deceiver said while he was still alive: 'After three days I will rise again.'

chokri: Süna zho süh kütso mhakhreo khü münu bayi küto azah khasü te, Kükrenamoli, Pu sadziko tüzüh züh vori die Pu mo rügo püh tata die thümako ceno Pu küsa lüno rhühlasü te, zidie po ta küto kümüprüh na, sülize kümüda thülakoe thürako ceri süku tato, zita.
english: Command therefore that the tomb be made secure until the third day, lest perhaps his disciples come at night and steal him away, and tell the people, 'He is risen from the dead;' and the last deception will be worse than the first."

chokri: Pilate puko yisü, rikhu zühyi die neko tho vo thiyi küvethe khü vayite, zisü.
english: Pilate said to them, "You have a guard. Go, make it as secure as you can."

chokri: Süna puko ta vo mhakhreo yo thishühthi kütsüo yo soma vüva die rikhu kha püh khü mata.
english: So they went with the guard and made the tomb secure, sealing the stone.

chokri: Süze kürülüzho tsüh ta die deobado thürao thita to küzüce, Magdaline Mary mo Mary kükrepü unyi mhakhreo pe tozu die vo.
english: Now after the Sabbath, as it began to dawn on the first day of the week, Mary Magdalene and the other Mary came to see the tomb.

chokri: Mo Yhie sücesü ceyice sü mürüh shühta, kükrenamoli, Nyepoo shoyiooe tüyono kiri die kho mhakhre talüno kütsüo phü kütu va die süyo baba küta na.
english: Behold, there was a great earthquake, for an angel of the Lord descended from the sky, and came and rolled away the stone from the door, and sat on it.

chokri: Pu züe ve püh tü küprüh küsü bita; mo pu khüne müga püh makrekro bita.
english: His appearance was like lightning, and his clothing white as snow.

chokri: Sülize, rikhukoe Pu kümüprüh thono puko sü künakütu püh küsami bi pu züta.
english: For fear of him, the guards shook, and became like dead men.

chokri: Sücesü tüyo shoyioe thünonyi yisü, Nenyi müprüh hite, kükrenamoli nenyie mi Jisu gu küvao phuzü zo küti I se küba na.
english: The angel answered the women, "Don't be afraid, for I know that you seek Jesus, who has been crucified.

chokri: Pu hilü ba mote, Pu po küsü bi, die rhühla süte, pheri die Pu püh kümüzü thilü pete, zita.
english: He is not here, for he has risen, just like he said. Come, see the place where the Lord was lying.

chokri: Süna ta mha vo die Pu küsa lüno rhühlasü küta püh Pu müthaküyikoce posüte, Mo Yhie! Pu neko züra sü Galileelü vo ta züho, neko sülüno Pu ngoyi to, ho, Yhie, I nekoce posü vaho zita.
english: Go quickly and tell his disciples, 'He has risen from the dead, and behold, he goes before you into Galilee; there you will see him.' Behold, I have told you."

chokri: Süsa pünyie müprüh mo unyi nü püh kümüre thi die ta külülhü mhakhreo prüh vo müthaküyiko ce po sü kütona vota.
english: They departed quickly from the tomb with fear and great joy, and ran to bring his disciples word.

chokri: Sidie unyi tavo küzüce, Yhie! Jisu vori unyi züh küsühyi die sü, Küveo thiyite, zita. Süce pünyi tavo Pu phe sho pühyi die Pu rüsu ta.
english: As they went to tell his disciples, behold, Jesus met them, saying, "Rejoice!" They came and took hold of his feet, and worshiped him.

chokri: Süsa Jisu unyi yisü, nenyi müprüh ta hi die ta vo a sazühneko po ta Galilee lü vo no die po süte. Puko sülüno a ngoyi to ho, zisü.
english: Then Jesus said to them, "Don't be afraid. Go tell my brothers that they should go into Galilee, and there they will see me."

chokri: Süsa pünyi vo küzüce, Yhie! Rikhuko humi rüna nadeolü vori die mhathi kütako püh pethiküzhoko ce po sü va.
english: Now while they were going, behold, some of the guards came into the city, and told the chief priests all the things that had happened.

chokri: Sidie ukoe mülhiko züh Künguyi die puko züh kürüthi die rüka kükro püh rikhuko prüva.
english: When they were assembled with the elders, and had taken counsel, they gave a large amount of silver to the soldiers,

chokri: Sidie puko yisü, nekoe Pu müthaküyiko tüzüh-o vori die hako züh küzülü Pu rügo püh tata ho, zi küti po va te, zita.
english: saying, "Say that his disciples came by night, and stole him away while we slept.

chokri: Mo mhaceno mha hikohi se sü küzhoo nyilü lü ta lize hako tho münu die pu rüthi va to mo, sidie neko mürhüyi tato, zita.
english: If this comes to the governor's ears, we will persuade him and make you free of worry."

chokri: Süna puko rükao pühyi die, puko tarho küsü bi die pota, süna tha kütso Jewmi dolü zü hihi süh po küye tata.
english: So they took the money and did as they were told. This saying was spread abroad among the Jews, and continues until this day.

chokri: Süsa müthaküyi kürikünako ta sü Galileelü cejüthu pühyo hizü Jisu puko ce po püh küma yo vota.
english: But the eleven disciples went into Galilee, to the mountain where Jesus had sent them.

chokri: Sidie puko Pu ngo küyice prü Pu rüsa ta, eli humi külüdo ta.
english: When they saw him, they bowed down to him, but some doubted.

chokri: Mo Jisu pükoce vori die pükoce mhapo die sü, Tüyo rimo cejü ri küku mütü kha a prüve.
english: Jesus came to them and spoke to them, saying, "All authority has been given to me in heaven and on earth.

chokri: Süna neko ta vo die thüma mütü mütha püh a sadzi thiyi, sülize Poo, Nuo mo Kümüsa Rüpü zalüno süko püh dzülu pu süyi te;
english: Therefore go, and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit,

chokri: Sidie puko po I nekoce po küsüko thi mo zühyi kütona mütha süte. Sülize, Yhie! I künu künu kütso ri neko züh süh ta zoto süzi sü. Amen.
english: teaching them to observe all things that I commanded you. Behold, I am with you always, even to the end of the age." Amen.

chokri: Poo Nu Jisu Khrista züyiküve shühdü.
english: The beginning of the Gospel of Jesus Christ, the Son of God.

chokri: Thazü Isaiah sadzüküseo lüsidalü; yhie, N zü küngomhuzü I a shoyio kütsüh süto. Pu n shoko küsüh süto.
english: As it is written in the prophets, "Behold, I send my messenger before your face, Who will prepare your way before you.

chokri: Mipüh nhalü sedie, nieko Nyepoo sho küsühyite. Pu shopriko thi kümüziyite; zidie; thopüh kümüta bi die;
english: The voice of one crying in the wilderness, 'Make ready the way of the Lord! Make his paths straight!'"

chokri: John nhatsa lüno dzülu püh mi prü, mu mipo u küphoma lü rüdeyi die küjo vayi küto dzülu küpü po püh mi mütha.
english: John came baptizing in the wilderness and preaching the baptism of repentance for forgiveness of sins.

chokri: Sidie mi Judea cejü mütü mu Jerusalem lüno ta vori die u küphoma phra sü die Jordan rü lüno dzülu pü vethiyi.
english: All the country of Judea and all those of Jerusalem went out to him. They were baptized by him in the Jordan river, confessing their sins.

chokri: Süze John hi Utma khü be, thigi shepha püh pu shepha, kopre mu mükhidzü ti.
english: John was clothed with camel's hair and a leather belt around his loins. He ate locusts and wild honey.

chokri: Sidie pu mi mütha die, Mi püh asa vori küzüo sü a ceri kuku; I nekü prü Pu pheku riphrüyi sümo.
english: He preached, saying, "After me comes he who is mightier than I, the thong of whose sandals I am not worthy to stoop down and loosen.

chokri: Ie dzü lüno neko püh dzülu pü vori kütho zo, eli Pu Kümüsa Rüpü lüno neko püh dzülu püto, zita.
english: I baptized you in water, but he will baptize you in the Holy Spirit."

chokri: Süsace Jisue Galilee cejü lü Nazareth lüno voridie Jordan lün John po dzülu püh Pu prüsü.
english: It happened in those days, that Jesus came from Nazareth of Galilee, and was baptized by John in the Jordan.

chokri: Mu dzü lüno ta prari mütha Pu tü rüko küsü ngo, sidie Kümüsa Rüpüo mükhro bi die kiri Puyo bayita.
english: Immediately coming up from the water, he saw the heavens parting, and the Spirit descending on him like a dove.

chokri: Sücesü tüyo mhakhü püh vori die po küti; No sü a nu a khrüthoo, I n ngo a künüthoo zo, zisü.
english: A voice came out of the sky, "You are my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased."

chokri: Mu süzi mütha Rupüo tho pu hü zü nhatsa lü vota.
english: Immediately the Spirit drove him out into the wilderness.

chokri: Süze pu zho hieda nhatsalü ba die Satan po Pu küdo; sidie Pu sülü nhathiko züh ba; süri tüyo shoyimiko Pu shoyi thi bata.
english: He was there in the wilderness forty days tempted by Satan. He was with the wild animals; and the angels were ministering to him.

chokri: Süsa mi John tü püh küdüce lü sü küva sa, Jisue Galilee lü vori die Poo küdie züyiküve po püh mi mütha die sü;
english: Now after John was taken into custody, Jesus came into Galilee, preaching the Gospel of the Kingdom of God,

chokri: Putü sü yite, Poo küde sü müno tote, ne lü küdeyi die züyiküveo mülüyite, zita.
english: and saying, "The time is fulfilled, and the Kingdom of God is at hand! Repent, and believe in the Gospel."

chokri: Sidie Pu Galilee dzükütü shicota vo küzüce, Pu Simon mu pu sazüh-o Andrew unyi khuma püh zülü kügü zü die ngoyi, uni khu kütümi zo tila.
english: Passing along by the sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and Andrew the brother of Simon casting a net in the sea, for they were fishermen.

chokri: Süze Jisu uni yisü, Neni asa müdziyite, süze I neni po thüma kütümi thi tato, zisü.
english: Jesus said to them, "Come after me, and I will make you into fishers for men."

chokri: Süzi sü mütha uni u khuma khava die ta Pusamüdzita.
english: Immediately they left their nets, and followed him.

chokri: Süsari Pu taza phe küzüce Zebedee nu James mu pu sazüh-o John uniri püzu lü uni khuma mükhu ba die ngoyi.
english: Going on a little further from there, he saw James the son of Zebedee, and John, his brother, who were also in the boat mending the nets.

chokri: Süsa Pu vapühlü punyi cisü, mu punie puni po Zebedee mu u zhokhri züh küta shoyiko kha püzu lü müzü va die ta Pusa müdzi ta.
english: Immediately he called them, and they left their father, Zebedee, in the boat with the hired servants, and went after him.

chokri: Süsa puko ta sü Capenaum lü lüri küyice, kürülüzho nha Pu tasü Synagogue lü lü die mi mütha.
english: They went into Capernaum, and immediately on the Sabbath day he entered into the synagogue and taught.

chokri: Mu mi Pu kümütha züko la mi malhü thita; kükrelamori, Pue lüsiküseko bi mo die u kuku künethomi püh thi die mi mütha küta la.
english: They were astonished at his teaching, for he taught them as having authority, and not as the scribes.

chokri: Sülize, kürüsüce sülüsü müsakümo rüpü po u kübü kütami püh ba, mu pue se die sü;
english: Immediately there was in their synagogue a man with an unclean spirit, and he cried out,

chokri: Nazareth Jisu! No hazüh dipüh thita? No hamüka vato vori züme? No sopüh sü küti I se ba, No Poo Kümüsao zo, zita.
english: saying, "Ha! What do we have to do with you, Jesus, you Nazarene? Have you come to destroy us? I know you who you are: the Holy One of God!"

chokri: Süze Jisu pu küthi die sü, Cuthi tayi mu pu lüno ta prari tayi, zisü.
english: Jesus rebuked him, saying, "Be quiet, and come out of him!"

chokri: Sücesü müsakümo rüpüoe thümao müthimünyi shuh va die se müto zo die prarita.
english: The unclean spirit, convulsing him and crying with a loud voice, came out of him.

chokri: Süsa thümako u malhü thi die puko tho udolü kütso die, hihi dibi ta la ha? Kümütha kükre püh te! Puküku neshühdie müsakümo rupüo küthi mu süko ri Pu khü züh küta hi! Zita.
english: They were all amazed, so that they questioned among themselves, saying, "What is this? A new teaching? For with authority he commands even the unclean spirits, and they obey him!"

chokri: Sidie Pu kümülee vapüh lü Galilee mu sühzanu mütü se vota.
english: The report of him went out immediately everywhere into all the region of Galilee and its surrounding area.

chokri: Süsa puko Synagogue lüno prari mütha; James mu John ni sa die puko ta sü Simon mu Andrew ni celü vota.
english: Immediately, when they had come out of the synagogue, they came into the house of Simon and Andrew, with James and John.

chokri: Sücesü Simon ne zu rüce die uzilü zü rü pukoe sü pü jüh püh vo Pu ce po mha sü.
english: Now Simon's wife's mother lay sick with a fever, and immediately they told him about her.

chokri: Süze Pu sü pü ce pheri die Pu be ceyi die phu süti pu rüce la mhata. Sidie sü pü puko shoyi thita.
english: He came and took her by the hand, and raised her up. The fever left her, and she served them.

chokri: Süsa thüva nace lü küta sa thümakoe küthi küni kükrekre kütiko mu thürü küsü po u kübü kütako züh Pu ce vori.
english: At evening, when the sun had set, they brought to him all who were sick, and those who were possessed by demons.

chokri: Mu rüna sülü thüma mütü vori die cekha ce künguyita.
english: All the city was gathered together at the door.

chokri: Sidie Pu küthi kükrekre thi küta kükro thi nve sü, mu küsü rüpü kükro ri huva, mu süko pori züpo muta, kükrelamori, sükoe Pu sopüh sü ti se küba la.
english: He healed many who were sick with various diseases, and cast out many demons. He didn't allow the demons to speak, because they knew him.

chokri: Süsa Pu küshuo tüso münu kümolü süri die ta mi küdilü vo küsho thi bata.
english: Early in the night, he rose up and went out, and departed into a deserted place, and prayed there.

chokri: Süze Simon mu pu züh kütako ta Pu phu vori die pungo küyice.
english: Simon and those who were with him followed after him;

chokri: Pu yisü, thüma mütü nphu züte, zisü.
english: and they found him, and told him, "Everyone is looking for you."

chokri: Mu Pu süko yisü, uko ta rüna kükreolü ri vo die apo sülüri zhopo thi sü khe, kükrelamori I süsü la küvori zo tila, zita.
english: He said to them, "Let's go elsewhere into the next towns, that I may preach there also, because for this reason I came forth."

chokri: Sidie pu Galilee mütü lü vo puko Synagogueko lü vo puko Synagogueko lü lü zhopo thi mu küsü rüpüko huva.
english: He went into their synagogues throughout all Galilee, preaching and casting out demons.

chokri: Süsa leprami püh vori Pu mhuzülü shetü tsü Pu ce sho die; No n müdo lize a thi kümüsayi vezo, zita.
english: There came to him a leper, begging him, kneeling down to him, and saying to him, "If you want to, you can make me clean."

chokri: Mu Jisu pu phimüzhe küta la Pube chopü punyi die sü, A müdo zo, No müsayi tate, zisü.
english: Being moved with compassion, he stretched out his hand, and touched him, and said to him, "I want to. Be made clean."

chokri: Sülize Pu züpo sü mütha lepra sü puyono di mhata, sidie pu müsayita.
english: When he had said this, immediately the leprosy departed from him, and he was made clean.

chokri: Süsa Pu süo ce po die, No püh mipüh ceri pohi zote.
english: He strictly warned him, and immediately sent him out,

chokri: Eli vo die ntho npüh sekrüo müka sü die Moses-e po küsü bi nthi kümüsayi küta rütho thipüh puko ce süte.
english: and said to him, "See you say nothing to anybody, but go show yourself to the priest, and offer for your cleansing the things which Moses commanded, for a testimony to them."

chokri: Süzi sü die pu kütsüh va. Eli Pu ta pra die mhathi küta süo püh po kümüre thi shühdü ta. Süla Pumhulhe thi zo zü nade lü lüriyi sü ta die nhatsalü bata, mu thinyi mütü lüno thümako Pu ce vori.
english: But he went out, and began to proclaim it much, and to spread about the matter, so that Jesus could no more openly enter into a city, but was outside in desert places: and they came to him from everywhere.

chokri: Süsa ri zho hu sa Jisue Capernaum lü lüri, mu thümakoe Pu celü vori ba küta seyita.
english: When he entered again into Capernaum after some days, it was heard that he was in the house.

chokri: Süsa thüma kükro vori künguyi ta, mu thüma krori küta la cekha kütso ri uthi di zota, sidie Pu süko ce züo püh posü.
english: Immediately many were gathered together, so that there was no more room, not even around the door; and he spoke the word to them.

chokri: Süsa pukoe lasami püh mida po kükrepüh die züh puce vori.
english: Four people came, carrying a paralytic to him.

chokri: Süze pukoe thüma kroo la Pu müno voriyi sü küta la Pu küba müdü tülü cetu hopha sü die pu ziyo yono pu püh kürünu sü.
english: When they could not come near to him for the crowd, they removed the roof where he was. When they had broken it up, they let down the mat that the paralytic was lying on.

chokri: Jisu puko kümülü ngo küsüce lasao yisü, anu, n küphomako va n prü vaho, zisü.
english: Jesus, seeing their faith, said to the paralytic, "Son, your sins are forgiven you."

chokri: Süri lüsiküse süce kübakoe utho ulü lüno sü;
english: But there were some of the scribes sitting there, and reasoning in their hearts,

chokri: Dipüh la hiohi Poo kütha zü poyo shi? Poo zo kümosa sopühn mi küphoma va süyi veta? Zi bata.
english: "Why does this man speak blasphemies like that? Who can forgive sins but God alone?"

chokri: Süzisü mütha, Jisu Pu rupü lüno lüdoko seyi die puko yisü, dithi die nekoe ne lüno mhahikohi lüdo bata?
english: Immediately Jesus, perceiving in his spirit that they so reasoned within themselves, said to them, "Why do you reason these things in your hearts?

chokri: Lasao yisü, N küphoma va n prü vaho, zi küsü mori sü die nzi püh shotayi te, zi küsünyi dipüh-o po rüyi kuta?
english: Which is easier, to tell the paralytic, 'Your sins are forgiven;' or to say, 'Arise, and take up your bed, and walk?'

chokri: Eli puko Thümanuoe cejüo yo küphomako ri vasüyi küve kuku ba küti seyi küto la pue lasao ce.
english: But that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins"--he said to the paralytic--

chokri: I nce po süyo, sü nzi pühyi die ta n celü votate, zisü.
english: "I tell you, arise, take up your mat, and go to your house."

chokri: Süsa pu vapühlü sü pu zi pühyi die mi mütü mhuzülüno taprata, sidie mi mütü po u malhü thi die Poo shu die sü, hae mha hizi küti ngomozo, zita.
english: He arose, and immediately took up the mat, and went out in front of them all; so that they were all amazed, and glorified God, saying, "We never saw anything like this!"

chokri: Süsa Puta dzüküzho shico vo ta, mu thüma kro mütüri ta Pu ce vori, sidie Pu süko mütha sü.
english: He went out again by the seaside. All the multitude came to him, and he taught them.

chokri: Mu Pu tavo küzü se, Pu Alphaeus nu Levi-e khazhanu kükhrü celü badie ngo küyice, pu n yisü, Asa müdziyite, zisü, mu pu ta Pusa müdzi ta.
english: As he passed by, he saw Levi, the son of Alphaeus, sitting at the tax office, and he said to him, "Follow me." And he arose and followed him.

chokri: Süsa Jisu pu celü mhati tozu die vo ba küyice, khazhonu kükhrümi küphomami kükro ri vori die Jisu mu Pu sadziko züh bayi, kükrelamori puko thüma kükrota mu süko Pusamüdzi ta.
english: It happened, that he was reclining at the table in his house, and many tax collectors and sinners sat down with Jesus and his disciples, for there were many, and they followed him.

chokri: Süze lüsiküseko mu Phariseeko Jisue khazhanu kükhrü mu küphomako züh die mhati küba ngo sü die Pu sadziko yisü; dipüh la Pu khazhonu kükhrüko mu küphomako züh mhati mhakra yo la! Zita.
english: The scribes and the Pharisees, when they saw that he was eating with the sinners and tax collectors, said to his disciples, "Why is it that he eats and drinks with tax collectors and sinners?"

chokri: Jisu sü sesü die puko yisü, küsührhomi daru küsemi süh mori ve, süri küthimie süh mosü, Ie kümathomi ci mori küphomami po thülü küdeyi no küvori zo, zita.
english: When Jesus heard it, he said to them, "Those who are healthy have no need for a physician, but those who are sick. I came not to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance."

chokri: Sücesü John sadziko mu Phariseeko sadzikoe mvo ba, mu pukoe vori die Pu yisü, dipüh la John sadziko mu Phariseekoe mvo yo, mu nsadzikoe mvo yo mo la zi die kütso ta.
english: John's disciples and the Pharisees were fasting, and they came and asked him, "Why do John's disciples and the disciples of the Pharisees fast, but your disciples don't fast?"

chokri: Jisu puko Zü küla die sü, Zhosao cebülü küba nunekoe zhosao puko züh kübalüno mvo ba tayo ma! Zhosao puko züh küba the pukoe mvo batayi kündi.
english: Jesus said to them, "Can the groomsmen fast while the bridegroom is with them? As long as they have the bridegroom with them, they can't fast.

chokri: Putü vori to, sücesü mi puko celüno zhosao züh ta küta nha pukoe mvo tato.
english: But the days will come when the bridegroom will be taken away from them, and then will they fast in that day.

chokri: Mipüri khü küsapü khü kügwü yo mükhu yomo, süzi lize khü küsao khü kügwüo cekhro pü tayo, sidie pa müsu ku tayo.
english: No one sews a piece of unshrunk cloth on an old garment, or else the patch shrinks and the new tears away from the old, and a worse hole is made.

chokri: Mipühri khubühzü küsa püh thigibüh kügwülü sü yomo, mhaceno süzi lize khubühzü küsaoe thigibüh-o püpha vato, sidie khubühzü krüh prari ta mu thigibüh ri müka vato, süri mi khubühzü küsa püh thigibüh küsalü süyo.
english: No one puts new wine into old wineskins, or else the new wine will burst the skins, and the wine pours out, and the skins will be destroyed; but they put new wine into fresh wineskins."

chokri: Kürülüzho püh nha Pu tasü ata yiko püthü vo zürü. Pu müthaküyikoe ata siko mürhü shudü ta.
english: It happened that he was going on the Sabbath day through the grain fields, and his disciples began, as they went, to pluck the ears of grain.

chokri: Süsa Phariseeko Pu yisü. Yhie puko dipüh la kürülüzho nha thüzho kümo thiyo zo la! Zita.
english: The Pharisees said to him, "Behold, why do they do that which is not lawful on the Sabbath day?"

chokri: Pu süko yisü, Neko David-e dibi die pu mu pu züh kütako müri kütace;
english: He said to them, "Did you never read what David did, when he had need, and was hungry--he, and they who were with him?

chokri: Abiathar pethiküzhoo tüce, Jihova rüsucelü lü die pethiküzhoko zo kümosa kükremi po ti küti thüzho kümo mi mhüngo küthi tsükhrüdao khi tiyi mu püh pu sadziko ripo ti shi küti phi mayo mo me!
english: How he entered into the house of God when Abiathar was high priest, and ate the show bread, which it is not lawful to eat except for the priests, and gave also to those who were with him?"

chokri: Sidie Pu süko yisü, Thüma la kürülüzho thi küsüzo: kürülü zho la thüma thisü mo.
english: He said to them, "The Sabbath was made for man, not man for the Sabbath.

chokri: Süzilize, thümanuoe kürülüzho mhuri nyepo zo zita.
english: Therefore the Son of Man is lord even of the Sabbath."

chokri: Süsa Jisu Synagoguelü lalü, mu sülü besa kütami pühba.
english: He entered again into the synagogue, and there was a man there who had his hand withered.

chokri: Süna pukoe Pu müjo kütola Pu kürülüzho nha süo thi küsührho sü tome lhoshi küti riba.
english: They watched him, whether he would heal him on the Sabbath day, that they might accuse him.

chokri: Süce Jisu ube sakütao yisü, No midolüno süri te zisü.
english: He said to the man who had his hand withered, "Stand up."

chokri: Sidie Pu süko yisü, kürülüzho nha mhaküve küthi thüzhotome mhaküsü küthi ta? Kürhühro küla küti me? Dokhri küti ta? Zisü. Eli puko kümükrethi ta.
english: He said to them, "Is it lawful on the Sabbath day to do good, or to do harm? To save a life, or to kill?" But they were silent.

chokri: Süze puko lü kürüh lü püh Pu lüsü mu Pulü rüda die rürüh pra lico hico pedie puko pe die, thümao yisü n be sho süte, zisü mu pu shosü, sidie pube süo thi nve püh kükreco bi va.
english: When he had looked around at them with anger, being grieved at the hardening of their hearts, he said to the man, "Stretch out your hand." He stretched it out, and his hand was restored as healthy as the other.

chokri: Süsa Phariseeko ceta vo mütha Herodianmiko züh die dibi die Pu müka va to shi küti rhüta.
english: The Pharisees went out, and immediately conspired with the Herodians against him, how they might destroy him.

chokri: Süri Jisu Pu müthaküyiko züh die ta sü dzüdeco vota, süze Galilee lüno.
english: Jesus withdrew to the sea with his disciples, and a great multitude followed him from Galilee, from Judea,

chokri: Thüma krode püh pusa müdzita, süzomoli Judea lü mu Jerusalem lü, mu Idumaea lüno mu Jordan cu küvo cori mu Tyre mu Sidon kümütu mütü lü makroe Pu dipüh thi sü shi küti se sü die ta Puce vori.
english: from Jerusalem, from Idumaea, beyond the Jordan, and those from around Tyre and Sidon. A great multitude, hearing what great things he did, came to him.

chokri: Süze Pu müthaküyiko po püzu püh khapüh Pu müno süma nodie posü, kükrelamori makroo po Pu gü zo vo kütila.
english: He spoke to his disciples that a little boat should stay near him because of the crowd, so that they wouldn't press on him.
