chokri: Süsari pu kükremi püh kütsüh sürü pukoe süo dokhriva, mu kükre kükrori kütsüh sürü pukoe humi vü mu kükreko dokhriva.
english: Again he sent another; and they killed him; and many others, beating some, and killing some.

chokri: Süsa pu mipüh süosü putho punu pu khrüthoo balu, pue sü, ukoe a nuo rho mutes; zidie künuthoolü süo kütsüh püh pukoce sü.
english: Therefore still having one, his beloved son, he sent him last to them, saying, 'They will respect my son.'

chokri: Süri yite sükoe puko tho küpo die, hiohi pu lüprao zo, khe! Uko pu dokhri va khe, sülize pu mhako uko zü thita to; zita.
english: But those farmers said among themselves, 'This is the heir. Come, let's kill him, and the inheritance will be ours.'

chokri: Sidie uko pu tüyi die pu dokhri püh khubühyi nhaphülü kügü va.
english: They took him, killed him, and cast him out of the vineyard.

chokri: Süzita lize khubühyi nyepoo dibi tata? Pu vori die yite süko müka vato mu khubühyio püh kükremi prü vato.
english: What therefore will the lord of the vineyard do? He will come and destroy the farmers, and will give the vineyard to others.

chokri: Cethokoe kha küva tsüo; süo po ukülü tsü küzhoo thite.
english: Haven't you even read this Scripture: 'The stone which the builders rejected, The same was made the head of the corner.

chokri: Süosü Nyepoo yono tazo; mu umhüce u malhü tazo; ziküti kütholüsi züo nekoe phi mo zo me?
english: This was from the Lord, It is marvelous in our eyes'?"

chokri: Süsa pukoe Pu tü küyi rhü süta, eli thümako müprühta kükrelamori, pue züve po küsüo puko mütsu die po küsü se küyi la, sidie puko Pu khava die tata.
english: They tried to seize him, but they feared the multitude; for they perceived that he spoke the parable against them. They left him, and went away.

chokri: Sülize Pu zü pojo tüyi künyi la pukoe Phariseeko mu Herodiami hu kütsüh püh Puce sü.
english: They sent some of the Pharisees and of the Herodians to him, that they might trap him with words.

chokri: Mu süko vori die Pu yisü, Kümüthao, Noe züthozo mu mipühri müprüh yo mo küti ha seba, kükrelamori, noe thüma lhüri pe ta mozo die kütholüno Poo shoko po püh mütha süyo tina. Caesar khrükhrü küti thüzho me moa?
english: When they had come, they asked him, "Teacher, we know that you are honest, and don't defer to anyone; for you aren't partial to anyone, but truly teach the way of God. Is it lawful to pay taxes to Caesar, or not?

chokri: Hapo khrü to me moa? Süri Pu süko thüra seyi die sü, neko dipüh la a müdo phi yola? Duli püh püh vori a müka te; zisü.
english: Shall we give, or shall we not give?" But he, knowing their hypocrisy, said to them, "Why do you test me? Bring me a denarius, that I may see it."

chokri: Mu puko süo süh voriyi, mu Pu uko yisü, hihi sopüh marhe mu sopüh za la zisü, puko Caesar zo; zita.
english: They brought it. He said to them, "Whose is this image and inscription?" They said to him, "Caesar's."

chokri: Jisu puko zü küladie, Caesar züko püh Caesar prü vate, mu Poo züko püh Poo prü vate, zita, mu pukoe Pu la uko malhü thita.
english: Jesus answered them, "Render to Caesar the things that are Caesar's, and to God the things that are God's." They marveled greatly at him.

chokri: Sülize rhülaküsü di lie poyo küti Sadduceeko Puce vori Pu kütso die sü.
english: There came to him Sadducees, who say that there is no resurrection. They asked him, saying,

chokri: Kümüthao, Mosae tho ha prü küsü, mhaceno mipüh zürao pu nune di die sata, sidie sata, sidie pu cemi yi die pu zürao yie mülhü no sü.
english: "Teacher, Moses wrote to us, 'If a man's brother dies, and leaves a wife behind him, and leaves no children, that his brother should take his wife, and raise up offspring for his brother.'

chokri: Süze thazü sazühzüra mi thüna ne, kürathooe thünoyi eli punu di die sata.
english: There were seven brothers. The first took a wife, and dying left no offspring.

chokri: Mu pu sasoo süpü yiyi, eli süo ri punu pühri di die sata, mu süh-o ri süsü bita.
english: The second took her, and died, leaving no children behind him. The third likewise;

chokri: Sidie mi thünako mütü süpü yi, süri unu di die sata. Mütü salü thünopü ri sata.
english: and the seven took her and left no children. Last of all the woman also died.

chokri: Sülize rhühla küsü tülü puko lasü tice süpü sopüh cemi thita? Kükrelamori, mi thünako mütü süpü yipüh u cemi thiva tila? Zisü.
english: In the resurrection, when they rise, whose wife will she be of them? For the seven had her as a wife."

chokri: Jisu puko zü küla die sü, neko kütholüsi mori Poo küku se kümo hihi la kukri tata mome?
english: Jesus answered them, "Isn't this because you are mistaken, not knowing the Scriptures, nor the power of God?

chokri: Mi küsako dolüno rhülasü kütace thüno yi mori tümhi thisü yomo eli tüyo shoyimi bi tayo.
english: For when they will rise from the dead, they neither marry, nor are given in marriage, but are like angels in heaven.

chokri: Süri küsako mu süko rhühla küsü la zoe neko Moses lüsidalü sühprülü dibi die Poo puce po die; I Abraham Po Isaac Po mu James Po zo, zi küma nekoe phi mo zo me?
english: But about the dead, that they are raised; haven't you read in the book of Moses, about the Bush, how God spoke to him, saying, 'I am the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob?'

chokri: Pue küsako Poo mori kürhühko Po zo, mu nekoe kukri müzho shüh tayo zo.
english: He is not the God of the dead, but of the living. You are therefore badly mistaken."

chokri: Süsa lüsiküsemi püh-e puko kümüli küba mu Jisu puko zü küla nve küva sesü die ta vori pu kütso die;
english: One of the scribes came, and heard them questioning together. Knowing that he had answered them well, asked him, "Which commandment is the greatest of all?"

chokri: Dipühoe zü kha küsü mütüko dolü küra thoo la? zisü. Jisu pu zü küla die; Zü khaküsü kürathoo sü; Yhie Isreal! Rünyiyite, Nyepooe Poo zo, Nyepooe püh libi zo.
english: Jesus answered, "The greatest is, 'Hear, Israel, the Lord our God, the Lord is one:

chokri: Mu noe n mülü süh, nkürhühro mütü süh, n külü mütü süh mu n küku mütü süh Nyepoo Jihova khrüte.
english: you shall love the Lord your God with all your heart, and with all your soul, and with all your mind, and with all your strength.' This is the first commandment.

chokri: Mu zü khaküsü künao lizo hizi; N sühzanumi khrü püh ntho n kükhrü biyite. Zü khaküsü kükre pühri hinyihi ceri zhoku ti di zo; zita.
english: The second is like this, 'You shall love your neighbor as yourself.' There is no other commandment greater than these."

chokri: Süsa lüsiküseoe Pu yisü, vezo, Kümüthao, noe Poo püh libizo, mu Pu mo kümosa kükredi.
english: The scribe said to him, "Truly, teacher, you have said well that he is one, and there is none other but he,

chokri: Mu u mülü mütü, uküsekülü mütü, u kürhühro mütü, mu u kuku mütü süh, Pu khrüyi no küti hi müto püh rüthoküthi mu rüsu küthi mütü ceri veku li küti küpo hi küthotü po sü zo; zita.
english: and to love him with all the heart, and with all the understanding, with all the soul, and with all the strength, and to love his neighbor as himself, is more important than all whole burnt offerings and sacrifices."

chokri: Süsa pu mutes shüh die zü küla küsü ngo die Jisu pu yisü, No Poo küde züh kümüprüh bamo zo; zita, mu mipühri Puce mha kütso sa rürüh ta.
english: When Jesus saw that he answered wisely, he said to him, "You are not far from the Kingdom of God." No one dared ask him any question after that.

chokri: Süsa Jisu kürüsucelü mi mütha kübace Pu lasü, dibi die lüsiküseko Khrista David nuo lizi yo la?
english: Jesus responded, as he taught in the temple, "How is it that the scribes say that the Christ is the son of David?

chokri: Kükrelamori, David-e Kümüsa Rüpü lüno; Nyepooe a Nyepoo ce; I n ngomuko kha püh n phekhra thiva kümothe a zaco bazoyite, zisü tila.
english: For David himself said in the Holy Spirit, 'The Lord said to my Lord, Sit at my right hand, Until I make your enemies the footstool of your feet.'

chokri: David thori Pu yi Nyepoo lita lize, süo dibi die Pu nu tata? Zita. Süsa thüma kro küzhoo unü shüh die Pu khü rünyiyi.
english: Therefore David himself calls him Lord, so how can he be his son?" The common people heard him gladly.

chokri: Süze Pu kümütha zü lüno pukoce po die; lüsiküseko yo neko menuyi te;
english: In his teaching he said to them, "Beware of the scribes, who like to walk in long robes, and to get greetings in the marketplaces,

chokri: Süko u khüne kürüchu süh die shota, lhethothikolü mipo u külu, Synagoguelü thüba küralü ba, tülhüko lü küzhomi balü ba, zi küti uko nüyo.
english: and the best seats in the synagogues, and the best places at feasts:

chokri: Sükosüe samepüko tütiyi tayo, mu küthüra die küsho thi müshoyo, hikoe kümüjo ngo mükro kuto.
english: those who devour widows' houses, and for a pretense make long prayers. These will receive greater condemnation."

chokri: Süze Jisue mhangubüh rapeco kübace thümakoe dibi die u rükako püh mhangubühlü sü bas hi küti peba, mu mhakünemikoe mhakükro kügü süba.
english: Jesus sat down opposite the treasury, and saw how the multitude cast money into the treasury. Many who were rich cast in much.

chokri: Sücesü thüno samepü mhaküdipü püh-e vori die dapra küna puco presa püh kügü sü.
english: A poor widow came, and she cast in two small brass coins, which equal a quadrans coin.

chokri: Süsa pu müthaküyiko cipüh Puce süyi die puko yisü; I neko ce Potü süto, mi mhakha mhangubühlü küsüko dolü thüno same mhaküdipü hi mha khasü kükro thozo.
english: He called his disciples to himself, and said to them, "Most assuredly I tell you, this poor widow gave more than all those who are giving into the treasury,

chokri: Kükrelamori, mie u küswu küle küba lüno khasü, eli hipüe küditho lüri pu kübadü mu pu süh lhü küto mütü khasü küva la; zita.
english: for they all gave out of their abundance, but she, out of her poverty, gave all that she had to live on."

chokri: Sidie Pu kürüsucelü lüno tapra küzüce, Pu müthaküyiko Puce, Kümüthao yhie, Kütsüko ri mu ceküthiko ri dibizo die thita shehe! Zisü.
english: As he went out of the temple, one of his disciples said to him, "Teacher, see what kind of stones and what kind of buildings!"

chokri: Jisu Puko zü kül; a die; no ce künye hiko ngo bame? Kütsü phu kütu va mo die pühri po küpiba pü bayi lho, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "Do you see these great buildings? There will not be left here one stone on another, which will not be thrown down."

chokri: Sülize Pue kürüsuce rüpeco Olive cejütu yo ba kübace Peter, James, John mu Andrew uko mükhrüh Pu kütso diesü;
english: As he sat on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter, James, John, and Andrew asked him privately,

chokri: Mha hikohi dipüh küthice tato sheli hace po süte; mu mha hikohi thi tsüyi ta to küzüce dipüh püh bata? Zi die kütso ta.
english: "Tell us, when will these things be? What is the sign that these things are all about to be fulfilled?"

chokri: Jisu puko khü küla diesü; mipüh pori ne shu kütse züh tata mo küto la münuyite.
english: Jesus, answering, began to tell them, "Be careful that no one leads you astray.

chokri: Kükrelamori. Thüma kükro aza lün vori die; I no zo; zidie mi kükro shu züh tata to tila.
english: For many will come in my name, saying, 'I am he!' and will lead many astray.

chokri: Süri neko thüri küthi mu riwhü khü küpo küzüko se küsüce neko lü kühoküro thita hite kükrelamori, mha hikohi vori moyi lho zo tila; süri thülao molu.
english: "When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, don't be troubled. For those must happen, but the end is not yet.

chokri: Sücesü shühye püh shühye püh mütsü, mu küde püh küde püh phimu süri to; mu thüthi kükrekre tiko lü ceyice süto, mu thükre mu kümüzhe kütiko süri to, mha hikohi kümüzhe püh kümüre thi küto thürako zo.
english: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places. There will be famines and troubles. These things are the beginning of birth pains.

chokri: Süri neko tho ne rüle peyite. Kükrelamori, mi neko tü püh müthikühukolü mu Synagogko lü süto. Mi neko tsali vüto sidie aza la mu puko mhuzülü zhopo püh thi sü küto la mi neko züh die küzhoko mu küdeko ce voto.
english: But watch yourselves, for they will deliver you up to councils. You will be beaten in synagogues. You will stand before rulers and kings for my sake, for a testimony to them.

chokri: Süsheri züyiküveo püh shühyie mütü ce posü mürato.
english: The Gospel must first be preached to all the nations.

chokri: Süri mi neko züh ta vo neko kha püh mi belü küsüce, nekoe dipüh po teshi, mori, lü teshi küti müdo die ne lü künyi thi hite. Eli bavüdo süo lü npo dipüh pono zi sheli süo poyite; kükrelamori, nekoe mori Kümüsa Rüpü tho po ba zo tila.
english: When they lead you away and deliver you up, don't be anxious beforehand, or premeditate what you will say, but say whatever will be given you in that hour. For it is not you who speak, but the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Sücesü u zürao tho u sazüo tüsü mi po dokhrito, mu upo tho unu tüsü mipo dokhrito, mu ununekoe ukrüneko mütsu süri die mi po süko dokhrito.
english: "Brother will deliver up brother to death, and the father his child. Children will rise up against parents, and cause them to be put to death.

chokri: Mu a za la mipo neko mütü mütsü to, süri hie zo tha thüla tso küyio külayi to.
english: You will be hated by all men for my name's sake, but he who endures to the end, the same will be saved.

chokri: Süri Daniel sadzühküseo popu jüh po püh kümüta; mhava mürho zo küto kümütsü thi zo kütioe ta vori putha zü kümolü tha küyi ngo küyice, sücesü phiyo kütimi po se kükreyi te; sülize Judealü kübako po ta sü cejütuko yo vo tayi.
english: But when you see the abomination of desolation, spoken of by Daniel the prophet, standing where it ought not (let the reader understand), then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains,

chokri: Mu cejütuyo kübako po celü mha khiyi tolizu die cejü kiri hite.
english: and let him who is on the housetop not go down, nor enter in, to take anything out of his house.

chokri: Mu yilü kütako po u khüne khiyi tozu die rürüh la vori hite.
english: Let him who is in the field not return back to take his cloak.

chokri: Süri sütüceko sü u nulhüpü ba mori unune no kübako kümüzhe shüh zoto.
english: But woe to those who are with child and to those who nurse babies in those days!

chokri: Eli neko ta küto tü sü po tüsühce mo küto la sho bayite.
english: Pray that your flight won't be in the winter.

chokri: Kükrelamori, sütüceko sü kümüzhe püh Pooe mha mülhü küsü prühlü no vori tsü kütsori südüsü kümüzhe küti di mu hisa ri süziyi külho thizo to tila.
english: For in those days there will be oppression, such as there has not been the like from the beginning of the creation which God created until now, and never will be.

chokri: Mhaceno Nyepooe tüsozhoko thi müzü sü mo tipühthilize, mipühri külayi lho tazo mütse, Süri küda küyiko zhozhi külü la Nyepooe tüsozhoko thi müzü süto.
english: Unless the Lord had shortened the days, no flesh would have been saved; but for the sake of the chosen ones, whom he picked out, he shortened the days.

chokri: Mu sülize thüma kühopühri neko yisü, Yhie, Khrista hice ba mori lice ba zi zori mülü hite.
english: Then if anyone tells you, 'Look, here is the Christ!' or, 'Look, there!' don't believe it.

chokri: Kükrelamori, kücezü Khristako mu kücezü sadzühküseko süri die zasiko mu u malhü mhathoko thi püh mi kato, sidie thiyi küvethe küda küyiko ri shu züh rütse tato.
english: For there will arise false christs and false prophets, and will show signs and wonders, that they may lead astray, if possible, even the chosen ones.

chokri: Süri nekoe münuzo yite, Yhie, I müzümüra lü mha mütü püh nekoce posü vaho.
english: But you watch. "Behold, I have told you all things beforehand.

chokri: Süri kümüzhe küti tüsozho süko sa nace zühta to, mu khri ri pu küve khasü mu tato.
english: But in those days, after that oppression, the sun will be darkened, the moon will not give its light,

chokri: Mu thümiko rüra tato, sülize tüyo kukuko sü küna vato.
english: the stars will be falling from the sky, and the powers that are in the heavens will be shaken.

chokri: Sidie ukoe Thümanuo kuku mu zapo zale thi die kümhülü no vori küzü ngoto.
english: Then they will see the Son of Man coming in clouds with great power and glory.

chokri: Süsa Pu Pu shoyimi kütsüh püh cejü küla lüno vo tüyo küla kütso tükhra dako lüno Pu küda küyiko phu künguyi to.
english: Then he will send out his angels, and will gather together his chosen ones from the four winds, from the ends of the earth to the ends of the sky.

chokri: Shedüboo yono neko züveo seyite, Pücoko müzü layi die pu nyi nyisa thü prari küzüce, nekoe tülü tate, ziyo.
english: "Now from the fig tree, learn this parable. When the branch has now become tender, and puts forth its leaves, you know that the summer is near;

chokri: Süsübi neko ri mha hikohi thi vori küta ngo küyice, süsü müno tüte, cekhace bate, zi küti seyite.
english: even so you also, when you see these things coming to pass, know that it is near, at the doors.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, mha hikohi thi vori ta kümothe, tsüdo külhüko hi mhapühceri di ta lho.
english: Most assuredly I say to you, this generation will not pass away until all these things happen.

chokri: Tüko dita to, eli azüko mhapühceri di tayi lho.
english: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.

chokri: Süri tüso süo mu bavüdo süo la zoe Poo zo kümosa tüyo shoyimi mori nuo zori mipühri semo.
english: But of that day or that hour no one knows, not even the angels in heaven, nor the Son, but only the Father.

chokri: Münu bayite, khü mu la mu sho ba zoyite, kükrelamori, nekoe di küthice to sü se kümo la.
english: Watch, keep alert, and pray; for you don't know when the time is.

chokri: Mipühnee rüna kümüprüh pühlü vota küzüce küku kha püh pu cetako mu mhatho u thütsüh püh süko prü sü mu ceko kükhüo po mha pe münu ba no sü va ta küta bizo.
english: "It is like a man, traveling to another country, having left his house, and given authority to his servants, and to each one his work, and also commanded the doorkeeper to keep watch.

chokri: Süla neko khü mu la bazo yite, kükrelamori, nekoe ce nyepoo dipüh küthi ce vori tosü se kümo la, thüva to me, müso tülu to me, modie thüvü kükhu to me, küswüho to shi se kümo la.
english: Watch therefore, for you don't know when the lord of the house is coming, whether at evening, or at midnight, or when the rooster crows, or in the morning;

chokri: No züh küzülü Pupo mha vori die n ngoyi tamo küto la.
english: lest coming suddenly he might find you sleeping.

chokri: Khü mu la ba zoyite, zi küsü hi nekoce ri mu kükreko ce ri mütü po süho.
english: What I tell you, I tell all: Watch."

chokri: Sülize zhoküna sa cühküpra nye mu khre khasü kümo tsükhrüda küti nye nye to Bata; mu sekrüko mu lüsiküsekoe küdoda die Pu tü püh dokhri va küto rhü bata.
english: It was now two days before the feast of the Passover and the unleavened bread, and the chief priests and the scribes sought how they might sieze him by deception, and kill him.

chokri: Eli pukoe sü; thümako mha kübü küta kümüprüh la thünye nha su, zita.
english: For they said, "Not during the feast, because there might be a riot of the people."

chokri: Sülize Pu Bethani lü Simon lepraküthio celü rülü kübace thünomi püh tir rüh küve uma kürüh alabaster büh püh püh vori die dophayi die rüh püh piyo sü.
english: While he was at Bethany, in the house of Simon the leper, as he sat at the table, a woman came having an alabaster jar of ointment of pure nard-- very costly. She broke the jar, and poured it over his head.

chokri: Sücesü humi unü mo die sü, dipüh la tir müka püh hi tala?
english: But there were some who were indignant among themselves, saying, "Why has this ointment been wasted?

chokri: Kükrelamori, hihi püh duli krasüh küzü khriyi die püh küdi kütsakhu mi vaphi süyi ve zoe. Zidie ukoe süpü yo münyota.
english: For this might have been sold for more than three hundred denarii, and given to the poor." They grumbled against her.

chokri: Eli Jisu sü, pu kübühi. Neko dipüh la pu küyhu bala? Pu a la mha küve thi sü zoe.
english: But Jesus said, "Leave her alone. Why do you trouble her? She has done a good work for me.

chokri: Kükrelamori, küdimie neko züh ba süh yo, mu nekoe kühopü tüce ri puko La mha küzüve thinyi lize thiyi ve zo; süri I neko züh ba sühyi lho.
english: For you always have the poor with you, and whenever you want to, you can do them good; but you will not always have me.

chokri: Pue thi küzü dü thiva zo; Pu müzü müra a kükhrüh ne la tir püh amo künhü sü to küvori zo.
english: She has done what she could. She has anointed my body beforehand for the burying.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, cejülü züyiküve hio püh zhopoh thi sü küto mütülü thüno hipü mhathi küsü hi kürükra ri sapo zoto, zita.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, wherever this Gospel may be preached throughout the whole world, that which this woman has done will also be spoken of for a memorial of her."

chokri: Süsa Iscariot Judas kürikünako mipüh, Jisu tüpüh sekrüko belü sü küto rhü die puko ce vo.
english: Judas Iscariot, who was one of the twelve, went away to the chief priests, that he might deliver him to them.

chokri: Mu süo se sü die puko nü die raka püh pu prü küto uzü khasü. Süsa pu dibi lie Pu tüsü to shi küti ri bata.
english: They, when they heard it, were glad, and promised to give him money. He sought how he might conveniently deliver him.

chokri: Sülü khreyisü kümo tsükhrüda küti nye thüra nha puko cühküpra nye konuo dokhri küyice Pu sadziko Pu kütso die, no cuhküpra nye nye küto la hako po dipühceo küsüh küsü n müdo ta? Zisü.
english: On the first day of unleavened bread, when they sacrificed the Passover, his disciples asked him, "Where do you want us to go and make ready that you may eat the Passover?"

chokri: Süze Pu müthaküyi mi küna kütsüh die unyi yisü, nenyi ta nadelü lüyite, sülize mipüh ü lekhu püh pü küta sühyi toho, pu sa müdziyi te.
english: He sent two of his disciples, and said to them, "Go into the city, and there you will meet a man carrying a pitcher of water. Follow him,

chokri: Mu pu kühopühra lü zori, nenyi ce nyepoo ce; kümüthaoe, A po asadziko züh die cühküpranye nye kütola rüso ba diceo bala? Zidie kütso ü le, zite; zisü.
english: and wherever he enters in, tell the master of the house, 'The Teacher says, "Where is the guest room, where I may eat the Passover with my disciples?"'

chokri: Sülize Pu müsozu cebüh künye pühlü khü khra sü die küsüh püh küma tha nenyi ka toho. Sülüsü uko la küsüyi te zita.
english: He will himself show you a large upper room furnished and ready. Make ready for us there."

chokri: Mu Pu sadzinyi ta nadelü prari küyice, pu unyi ce po küsü bitü die ngoyi, sidie nnyi puko la cühküpranyeo küsühyi.
english: His disciples went out, and came into the city, and found things as he had said to them, and they prepared the Passover.

chokri: Süsa thüva ce Jisue Pu sadzi mi kürikünako züh voriyi.
english: When it was evening he came with the twelve.

chokri: Sidie uko ki bayi die mhati kübace, Jisue sü, I nekoce potü süto, neko dolü mipüh a züh mhati kübao atü süto, zita.
english: As they sat and were eating, Jesus said, "Most assuredly I tell you, one of you will betray me -- he who eats with me."

chokri: Süsa puko u lü su shüh die mi püh püh Pu yisü, süosü I me? Ive thita.
english: They began to be sorrowful, and to ask him one by one, "Surely not I?" And another said, "Surely not I?"

chokri: Eli, Pu uko zü küla die sü, süosü kürikünako mi püh ube püh a züh mükhu pühlü süh kübao zo zita.
english: He answered them, "It is one of the twelve, he who dips with me in the dish.

chokri: Thümanuoe Pu jüh tho püh kümüta bi die tata to. Süri Thümanuo tüpüh mi belü küsüoe tse! Thiyite! Kükrelamori, thüma süo münu püh vo kümoe pu la veku to murü; zita.
english: For the Son of Man goes, even as it is written about him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would be better for that man if he had not been born."

chokri: Sülie uko mhati kübace, Jisu tsükhrüda pühyi die galiphi sü, sidie cethi püh uko prü sü. Sidie sü, püh tiyite; hihi amoo; zisü.
english: As they were eating, Jesus took bread, and when he had blessed, he broke it, and gave to them, and said, "Take, eat. This is my body."

chokri: Süsa Pu tühe püh die galiphi küsü sa püh puko. Prüsü, mu uko mütü süo püh krayi.
english: He took the cup, and when he had given thanks, he gave to them. They all drank of it.

chokri: Süze Pu uko yisü, hihi aza, thüma mütü la mükrüh küsü zütsühzükho küsao;
english: He said to them, "This is my blood of the new covenant, which is poured out for many.

chokri: I neko ce potü süto, I Poo küdelü khubühü küsao Krata küto tüsoo tso kümothe khubühbo yono küprari se pühri mütha sayi lhote, zita.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, I will no more drink of the fruit of the vine, until that day when I drink it anew in the Kingdom of God."

chokri: Süsa tsale püh thiyi die puko tasü Olive cejütuyo kho ta.
english: When they had sung a hymn, they went out to the Mount of Olives.

chokri: Süze Jisu puko yisü, Tho püh kümüta bi die neko mütü tsüzi ayo jota tato; I tüko kükhüo vüsü to mu tükoko ta kütsapu ta to; ipüh ma; ita.
english: Jesus said to them, "All of you will be made to stumble because of me tonight, for it is written, 'I will strike the shepherd, and the sheep will be scattered.'

chokri: Süri I rhülasü küta sa neko züra tasü Galileelü vo tato;
english: However, after I am raised up, I will go before you into Galilee."

chokri: Eli Peter Pu yisü kükremiko mütü n yo jota to zori I lho; zita.
english: But Peter said to him, "Although all will be offended, yet I will not."

chokri: Mu Jisu Pu yisü, I nce potü süto, tha, tsüzi thüvü khu künao küta mhuzü no vasü aza po mu tato, ita.
english: Jesus said to him, "Most assuredly I tell you, that you today, even this night, before the rooster crows twice, you will deny me three times."

chokri: Süri pu pu he hie thiku die sü, A po nzüh sa mosu ta zori I mhapühce ri n müla valho zo, zita. Mu puko mütü ri süsü bi die pove thita.
english: But he spoke all the more, "If I must die with you, I will not deny you." They all said the same thing.

chokri: Süsa puko tasü Getsemane li küti thinyi pühlü vorü, mu Pu Pu sadziko yisü; I shoba kütace neko hice bayite; zisü.
english: They came to a place which was named Gethsemane. He said to his disciples, "Sit here, while I pray."

chokri: Sidie Pu Peter, James mu John uko züh Pu sa vo, süze Pu Pu lü kümüzhe püh kümüre thita.
english: He took with him Peter, James, and John, and began to be greatly troubled and distressed.

chokri: Mu Pu sükoce, I alü kümüzhe vo sata to bate, neko hice ba die khü bayite; zita.
english: He said to them, "My soul is exceedingly sorrowful, even to death. Stay here, and watch."

chokri: Sülize Pu tüzaphe die tüprü cejü zürüh pü die; thiyive to lize bavüdo süo püh Pu thürü va no die sho bata.
english: He went forward a little, and fell on the ground, and prayed that, if it were possible, the hour might pass away from him.

chokri: Sidie Pu sü; Aba Apo! No mha mütü thiyive zo, tühe hio püh a thürü vate, süri a müdo mori n müdo thiyite, zita.
english: He said, "Abba, Father, all things are possible to you. Please remove this cup from me. However, not what I desire, but what you desire."

chokri: Süsa Pu ta pheri die puko züh küzü ngoyi, Süla Pu Simon Peter yisü, no zühzü zo ma? No bavüdo püh ri a züh khü bayi lho ta me?
english: He came and found them sleeping, and said to Peter, "Simon, are you sleeping? Couldn't you watch one hour?

chokri: Neko müdo küphi lülü ta mo küto la khü mu la bazo yite, Rüpüoe thinyi bazo, eli uthioe thathite, zita.
english: Watch and pray, that you may not enter into temptation. The spirit indeed is willing, but the flesh is weak."

chokri: Süsa Pu sala phe die küra küsho bi die sho la bata.
english: Again he went away, and prayed, saying the same words.

chokri: Sülize Pu la pheri tice pukoe züh züzo die ngoyi, kükrelamori, puko mhürhoyi lhozo kütala. Mu uko Pu zü külayi küto do ri seyi mota.
english: Again he returned, and found them sleeping, for their eyes were very heavy, and they didn't know what to answer him.

chokri: Süsa Pu va süh-olü la vori die puko yisü, tsüe zühyi mu rülüyite, tsüsa tsüh te, pu bavüdo sü vorite. Yhie! Thümanuo sü tüpüh küphomako belü süva to bate.
english: He came the third time, and said to them, "Sleep on now, and take your rest. It is enough. The hour has come. Behold, the Son of Man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.

chokri: Süri die uko tavo ta khe, Yhie! Atü sü kütoo sü müno vorite, zita.
english: Arise, let us be going. Behold, he who betrays me is at hand."

chokri: Süzisü mütha, Pu zü po balu tilü, Judas kürikünako mipühe sekrüko, lüsiküseko mu mülhiko celüno zesho mu sühdü küpüh thüma krode püh züh vorita.
english: Immediately, while he was still speaking, Judas, one of the twelve, came--and with him a multitude with swords and clubs, from the chief priests, the scribes, and the elders.

chokri: Pu tüsü kütoe müzümüra züsi püh puko prü die, I Pu mbo sü kütoo süo zoho, Pu tüyi die münu vota te; zi püh müzü.
english: Now he who betrayed him had given them a sign, saying, "Whoever I will kiss, that is he. Seize him, and lead him away safely."

chokri: Süsa vori mütha ta müzi Jisu ce vori die sü, kümüthao kümüthao, zidie Pu mbo sü.
english: When he had come, immediately he came to him, and said, "Rabbi! Rabbi!" and kissed him.

chokri: Süsa thümako u be püh Puyo sü die Pu tüyita.
english: They laid their hands on him, and seized him.

chokri: Eli u shice küthako mipüh-o u zesho süzühyi die püh sekrüo cetao ni müta dü va.
english: But a certain one of those who stood by drew his sword, and struck the servant of the high priest, and cut off his ear.

chokri: Süsa Jisu puko yisü, nekoe kürügomi kütü bi die zesho mu küthü süh vori zü me?
english: Jesus answered them, "Have you come out, as against a robber, with swords and clubs to seize me?

chokri: I tüsonha neko züh kürüsucelü ba die mütha vorizo, süri neko atüyi mo. Eli, tsüe kütholüsi züo po tsühyi küto la hizi küta zo; zita.
english: I was daily with you in the temple teaching, and you didn't arrest me. But this is so that the Scriptures might be fulfilled."

chokri: Süsa mütü Pu kha va die tata.
english: They all left him, and fled.

chokri: Sücesü khresamine püh-e linen khü püh pu phothu küzü pü die Pusamüdzi zü mu khresakoe pu tüyi.
english: A certain young man followed him, having a linen cloth thrown around himself, over his naked body. The young men grabbed him,

chokri: Eli, pu pu linen khü khava die phothu die tata.
english: but he left the linen cloth, and fled from them naked.

chokri: Sülize puko Jisu züh sekrüo celü vota; mu sekrüko, mülhiko mu lüsiküseko mütü vori Puce künguyi.
english: They led Jesus away to the high priest. All the chief priests, the elders, and the scribes came together with him.

chokri: Süsa Peter kümücu lüno Pü sa müdzi vori die tazo sekrüküzhoo celü müthi kühu bolü lüyi. Sidie küzhoko züh ba die me shice putho pu hü mülü ba.
english: Peter had followed him from a distance, until he came into the court of the high priest. He was sitting with the officers, and warming himself in the light of the fire.

chokri: Süsa sekrüko, mu müthi kühu Jisu dokhri va küto la Pu kümütsu zhopo phu; eli pühri ngoyi mota.
english: Now the chief priests and the whole council sought witnesses against Jesus to put him to death, and found none.

chokri: Kükrelamori, mi kükro kücejü zhopo phuyi eli puko zhopoko kümha mota.
english: For many gave false testimony against him, and their testimony didn't agree with each other.

chokri: Süsa humi süri cejü die Pu kümütsu zhopo po die sü;
english: Some stood up, and gave false testimony against him, saying,

chokri: Pue po die, I thübe püh küthi rüsüce hi müka va die zho süh dolü thübe süh thi kümo kükre püh thi vato; zidie poti ha se le; zita.
english: "We heard him say, 'I will destroy this temple that is made with hands, and in three days I will build another made without hands.'"

chokri: Mu hilü hi ri puko zhopo kümha mota.
english: Even so, their testimony did not agree.

chokri: Süsa sekrüküzhoo mi dolüno süthayi die Jisu kütso die; No mhapühri küla sü lho zo me? Hiko dipüh po n mütsu tha la? Zita.
english: The high priest stood up in the midst, and asked Jesus, "Have you no answer? What is it which these testify against you?"

chokri: Süri Pu kümükrethi die mhapühri po mota. Süri sekrüküzhoe Pu kütso la die sü; No Khristao, thüjoküpüthoo nu me? Zisü.
english: But he stayed quiet, and answered nothing. Again the high priest asked him, "Are you the Christ, the Son of the Blessed?"

chokri: Mu Jisue sü, Izo! Mu nekoe Thümanuoe kükuthoo zaco ba die tüyo kümhülu lün vori küzü ngoto; zita.
english: Jesus said, "I AM. You will see the Son of Man sitting at the right hand of Power, and coming with the clouds of the sky."

chokri: Süsa sekrüküzhoo pu khü cekhro die sü, uko dipüh zhopo phu la sa ta?
english: The high priest tore his clothes, and said, "What further need have we of witnesses?

chokri: Neko ri Pue Poo kütha khü seyite, Nekoe dithili ta? Zisü. Mu puko mütü Pue sasü tazo lie Pu müjota.
english: You have heard the blasphemy! What do you think?" They all condemned him to be worthy of death.

chokri: Sidie humi mhütsa püh Puyo sü, mu Pu zü whü va die dothü püh pu vü, sidie Pu yisü, sopühn nvü sheli hace sadzühzü po süte; zita, sülize küzhoko bezi püh Pu vü.
english: Some began to spit on him, and to cover his face, and to beat him with fists, and to tell him, "Prophesy!" The officers struck him with the palms of their hands.

chokri: Sücesü Peter süne ce bo mükhroku barü sekrü küzhoo cetapü pü kiri.
english: As Peter was in the courtyard below, one of the maids of the high priest came,

chokri: Mu pu Peter me mügu küba ngoyi die pu petü die sü nori Nazarenmi Jisu züh tayo ze; zita.
english: and seeing Peter warming himself, she looked at him, and said, "You were also with the Nazarene, Jesus!"

chokri: Süri pu mo lie sü; I semo mu n küpoco süri semo zo ho; zita. Sidie putasü zünyocebo saco prata. Sücesü thüvü khu ta.
english: But he denied it, saying, "I neither know, nor understand what you are saying." He went out on the porch, and the rooster crowed.

chokri: Süsari ceta süpü pungo la sü die, süshice tha kübakoce, hio ri puko zo; zita.
english: The maid saw him, and began again to tell those who stood by, "This is one of them."

chokri: Mu pu süri moli zita, mu putü husa süce küthakoe Peter yisü, nori puko zo küthozo noe Galileemi mu n züpo lün seyi te, zita.
english: But he again denied it. After a little while again those who stood by said to Peter, "You truly are one of them, for you are a Galilean, and your speech shows it."

chokri: Pü rüswu zo no po ketsü neko sopü po ba sheri I thüma süo se mo
english: But he began to curse, and to swear, "I don't know this man of whom you speak!"

chokri: Sücesü thüvü khu künao ta, mu Peter puce; no thüvü khu künao küta mhuzü vasüh A müla tato; zi küsü züo rükrayi, sidie süo lü die pu krata.
english: The rooster crowed the second time. Peter remembered the word, how that Jesus said to him, "Before the rooster crows twice, you will deny me three times." When he thought about that, he wept.

chokri: Süsa tüsoyi mütha küswüh-o rüna sekrükühukoe kühu püh ci sü die pethiko mu lüsiküseko mu müthi kühu mütü Jisu phayi die Pu züh vo Pilate ce süva.
english: Immediately in the morning the chief priests, with the elders and scribes, and the whole council, held a consultation, and bound Jesus, and carried him away, and delivered him up to Pilate.

chokri: Mu Pilate Pu kütso die; no Jewmi küdeo me? zisü. Pu pu zü küla die; No po küsüo sü zo, zita.
english: Pilate asked him, "Are you the King of the Jews?" He answered, "So you say."

chokri: Mu sekrüküzhoko mha kükro püh Pu müzho; eli Pu mhapühri küla muta.
english: The chief priests accused him of many things.

chokri: Süla Pilate Pu kütso la die, no mhapühri po lho zo me? Yhie mi mha di dü püh püh n mü Zho bata? zita.
english: Pilate again asked him, "Have you no answer? See how many things they testify against you!"

chokri: Süri Jisu mhapühri küla mo zo kütala Pilate pu malhü thita.
english: But Jesus made no further answer, so that Pilate marveled.

chokri: Sülie thünye Pühlü mi puce küzü püh kha u prü nodie sho lie süo kha küsü thüho ta.
english: Now at the feast he used to release to them one prisoner, whom they asked of him.

chokri: Sücesü Barabbas li küti püe mi sorkari kümütsu mhatho thi küsüce midokhri küva la tü püh süko zühn kha küma püh ta.
english: There was one called Barabbas, bound with those who had made insurrection, men who in the insurrection had committed murder.

chokri: Süze thümakoe ta khori die Pilate po hizü thi küvori bi die thi püh puko prü no die sho sü.
english: The multitude, crying aloud, began to ask him to do as he always did for them.

chokri: Eli Pilate pukoce; Apo Judako küdeo püh neko küprü neko müdoto me? Zi die kütso.
english: Pilate answered them, saying, "Do you want me to release to you the King of the Jews?"

chokri: Kükrelamori, sekrüküzhooe Pu phimu die tü küsü se küba la.
english: For he perceived that for envy the chief priests had delivered him up.

chokri: Süri sekrüküzhokoe pupo Barabbas püh puko prü sü noti makroo hüsü.
english: But the chief priests stirred up the multitude, that he should release Barabbas to them instead.

chokri: Süri Pilate puko zü küla die, sülize apo Jewmi küdeo püh dipüh thi vata? Zisü.
english: Pilate again asked them, "What then should I do to him whom you call the King of the Jews?"

chokri: Mu pukoe se müto zodie sü; Pu püh guva te; zita.
english: They cried out again, "Crucify him!"

chokri: Eli, Pilate lasü; Pue dipüh küjo thi küva la ta? Zi la sü. Süri puko se müto ku die sü; Pu püh guva te, zilata.
english: Pilate said to them, "Why, what evil has he done?" But they cried out exceedingly, "Crucify him!"

chokri: Süla Pilate makroo nü thi küva lü die Barabbas kha puko prü va, mu pu Jisu vü sü die Pu püh guva nodie kha puko belü süva.
english: Pilate, wishing to please the multitude, released Barabbas to them, and handed over Jesus, when he had flogged him, to be crucified.

chokri: Süsa riwhümiko Pu züh sheticelü lüta. Sidie puko kro mütü ci künguyi.
english: The soldiers led him away within the court, which is the Praetorium; and they called together the whole cohort.

chokri: Sidie müreda küti khü püh Pu whü sü, mu tsahu küde pirüh thiyi die püh Pu piyo sü.
english: They clothed him with purple, and weaving a crown of thorns, they put it on him.

chokri: Sidie pukoe; Jewmi küdeo, thi te; zi die Pu külu.
english: They began to salute him, "Hail, King of the Jews!"

chokri: Mu pukoe tükhrathü püh Pu pi vü, mhütsa püh Pu va, mu nükü prü Pu külu, zi.
english: They struck his head with a reed, and spat on him, and bowing their knees, did homage to him.

chokri: Sülize puko Pu püh küthükhrüh küva sa, Pu khü müreda kütio khiva die Pu Pu khü püh Pu yo sü. Sidie pu gu va küto la Pu züh prari ta.
english: When they had mocked him, they took the purple off of him, and put his own garments on him. They led him out to crucify him.

chokri: Süsa pukoe Cyrene püh Simon, Alexander mu Rufus nyi poe yi lüno vori küzüce pu kümu thi püh Pu kruso püh.
english: They compelled one passing by, coming from the country, Simon of Cyrene, the father of Alexander and Rufus, to go with them, that he might bear his cross.

chokri: Sidie puko Pu züh die Golgatha puco mi pikhuro li küti pühlüvori.
english: They brought him to the place called Golgotha, which is, being interpreted, "The place of a skull."

chokri: Süsa pukoe hezo püh daru thi küva mir pü püh Pupo kra nota, eli Pu kra mu ta.
english: They offered him wine mixed with myrrh to drink, but he didn't take it.

chokri: Sülize pukoo Pu püh gu küvasa, Pu khüko püh somi zalü prari teshi die cethi khüle thi.
english: Crucifying him, they parted his garments among them, casting lots on them, what each should take.

chokri: Mu sücesü bavüdo süh-olü Pu püh gu va.
english: It was the third hour, and they crucified him.

chokri: Mu u pilü Pu kümüjo zü tho die, Jewmi küdeo; zi die tho püh ma.
english: The superscription of his accusation was written over him, "THE KING OF THE JEWS."

chokri: Sülize pukoe kürügomi küna; püh Pu zaco mu püh Pu veco zi die püh pu sa gu.
english: With him they crucified two robbers; one on his right hand, and one on his left.

chokri: Sücesü kütholüsilü; Pu püh thüzho küvarhüko saphiyite zi küti züo ti tsühyi.
english: The Scripture was fulfilled, which says, "He was numbered with transgressors."

chokri: Sülize thüma pheliphe ti mütü pingü die; Hu! No kürüsuceo dorhü va die zho süh nha thi la kütoo.
english: Those who passed by blasphemed him, wagging their heads, and saying, "Ha! You who destroy the temple, and build it in three days,

chokri: N tho n külayi die cross yono ta kirite; zi die Pu thata.
english: save yourself, and come down from the cross!"

chokri: Süsa bi sekrüküzhoko mu lüsiküseko ri Pu krünyi die huhu yisü, Pue kükremi külayiyo, eli putho Pu külayi lho; zi bata.
english: Likewise, also the chief priests mocking among themselves with the scribes said, "He saved others. He can't save himself.

chokri: Khrista, Israelmi küdeo! Pupo tsühi ri cross yono ta kirite, hapo ngo die mülüyi küto la; zi bata. Süze pu sa gu pü küba nyi ri Pupo müsü ta.
english: Let the Christ, the King of Israel, now come down from the cross, that we may see and believe him." Those who were crucified with him insulted him.

chokri: Süze bavüdo shorüholü no vo thüci kütso zühbüh pü bata.
english: When the sixth hour had come, there was darkness over the whole land until the ninth hour.

chokri: Süsa bavüdo thüciolü Jisu se müto die sü; Eloi, Eloi, lamasabakthani, puco a Jihova, no dithie a khava la ha? Zita.
english: At the ninth hour Jesus cried with a loud voice, saying, "Eloi, Eloi, lama sabachthani?" which is, being interpreted, "My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?"

chokri: Süsü se sü die u shice kübako humie sü; Co! Pu eli ci züta ho; zita.
english: Some of those who stood by, when they heard it, said, "Behold, he is calling Elijah."

chokri: Süsa mi püh-e ta vo mha kümütsü khü püh kükhro zü mütsüyi die püh tükhrüthü yo süyi die püh pu po kra tozuta. Sidie sü Elijah vori Pu pühyi to ma lho shelhi pesüyi; zita.
english: One ran, and filling a sponge full of vinegar, put it on a reed, and gave it to him to drink, saying, "Let him be. Let's see whether Elijah comes to take him down."

chokri: Sülize, Jisu müyi müto sü die Pu rüpü khasü va.
english: Jesus cried out with a loud voice, and gave up the spirit.

chokri: Sücesü, kürüsucelü khü u pilü lüno prü u phe kütso kro küna thita.
english: The veil of the temple was torn in two from the top to the bottom.

chokri: Mu riwhümi kra mhu küzhooe rapeco ba die Pu se müto sü die Pu rüpü khasü küva ngo küsüce; Hiohi Poo nu kütho zo; zita.
english: When the centurion, who stood by opposite him, saw that he cried out like this and breathed his last, he said, "Truly this man was the Son of God!"

chokri: Sülize thünomi kümücu lüno tha die pe kübako; Magdalin Mary, James mu pu sazüh-o nyi zu Mary Jose mu Salome;
english: There were also women watching from afar, among whom were both Mary Magdalene, and Mary the mother of James the less and of Joses, and Salome;

chokri: Pu Galileelü kübace Pu shoyi thi küvoriko; mu mi kükro Jerusalem lüno Pu züh khori.
english: who, when he was in Galilee, followed him, and served him; and many other women who came up with him to Jerusalem.

chokri: Süsa thüva vorita mu kürülü tüsozhola mha küsüh mo küsu mhüzüce;
english: When evening had now come, because it was the Preparation Day, that is, the day before the Sabbath,

chokri: Arimathiami Joseph thürho küpü, krüta mu pu thori Poo küde küvori müri tayo küti püh thüpu shüh die vori Pilate ce Jisu mo sho.
english: Joseph of Arimathaea, a prominent council member who also himself was looking for the Kingdom of God, came. He boldly went in to Pilate, and asked for Jesus' body.

chokri: Süsa Pilate-e Pu satü ta me moshi küti se küto la, kra pi küzhoo ci sü die pu sa küta tü puce kütso.
english: Pilate marveled if he were already dead; and summoning the centurion, he asked him whether he had been dead long.

chokri: Sidie krapi küzhoo celü setü küyi bi die pu thümoo püh Joseph prüva.
english: When he found out from the centurion, he granted the body to Joseph.

chokri: Sülize pu linen khü khriyi mu Pu mo püh kiri die linen khüo püh küzüyi die Pu püh vo tsüpüh ho küma mhakhrelü va. Sidie kütsü phu küla püh mhakhre ta müka va.
english: He bought a linen cloth, and taking him down, wound him in the linen cloth, and laid him in a tomb which had been cut out of a rock. He rolled a stone against the door of the tomb.

chokri: Mu Magdalin Mary mu Joseph ne zu Mary unyi Pu püh kükhrüh thi ngo.
english: Mary Magdalene and Mary, the mother of Joses, saw where he was laid.

chokri: Süsa kürülü tüsozhoo vota küzüce Magdalin Mary, Jokob ne zu Mary mu Salome ukoe pühvo Pu künhü küto la mharüh küthünyi khiyi;
english: When the Sabbath was past, Mary Magdalene, and Mary the mother of James, and Salome, bought spices, that they might come and anoint him.

chokri: Sidie kürlü zho sa tüsozho küra nha küshu rüna nace prari küzüce pukoe mhakhrelü vori.
english: Very early on the first day of the week, they came to the tomb when the sun had risen.

chokri: Mu pukoe uko tho küpo die, Sopüh po uko la mhakhre talü kütsüo phu sü ta? Zi zü.
english: They were saying among themselves, "Who will roll away the stone from the door of the tomb for us?"

chokri: Eli pukoe to süri tice utsüe rütu küta ngoyi, kütsüo nyeritila.
english: for it was very big. Looking up, they saw that the stone was rolled back.

chokri: Mu ukoe mhakhrelü lü tice, khresami püh khü müga rütsa ti be die thüzaco ba ngo. Süla uko malhü thita.
english: Entering into the tomb, they saw a young man sitting on the right side, dressed in a white robe, and they were amazed.

chokri: Eli pu ukoce, müprühite, nekoe mipo Pu gu küva Nazarenemi Jisu phuzü, eli Pu rhühlasüte, Pu hilü ba mote, neko tho Pu püh küma thi pe phi; zita.
english: He said to them, "Don't be amazed. You seek Jesus, the Nazarene, who has been crucified. He has risen. He is not here. Behold, the place where they laid him!

chokri: Eli neko tavo die Pu müthaküyiko mu Peter ce po süte, Yhie! Pu neko züra Galileelü vota ho; nekoce po küsü bi die neko sülü Pu ngoyi toho; zita
english: But go, tell his disciples and Peter, 'He goes before you into Galilee. There you will see him, as he said to you.'"

chokri: Süsa uko prari die mhakhre lüno rükri tata, mu puko u künü pu rüsü zota. Sülize puko müprüh pu huhu rüthi mota.
english: They went out, and fled from the tomb, for trembling and astonishment had come on them. They said nothing to anyone; for they were afraid.

chokri: Süze kürülüzho sa küra nha pu rhühlasü die ta vo pue pu yonu küsü rüpü thüna hu küva pü Magdaline Mary mhüngo thi müra sü.
english: Now when he had risen early on the first day of the week, he appeared first to Mary Magdalene, from whom he had cast out seven demons.

chokri: Süla süpü tavo die Pu züh ba küvoriko kra mu ulüsü kübako ce posü.
english: She went and told those who had been with him, as they mourned and wept.

chokri: Süri Pue rhühba mu süpü mhüngo thi küsü sü se küsüce mülüyi mota.
english: When they heard that he was alive, and had been seen by her, they disbelieved.

chokri: Mha hiko sa Pu rünalü vo die Pu rhi kükre tilüno mi küna mhüngo thisü.
english: After these things he was revealed in another form to two of them, as they walked, on their way into the country.

chokri: Mu pukoe ta vo die kükreko ce posü, süri süko ri mülü mota.
english: They went away and told it to the rest. They didn't believe them, either.

chokri: Künuco pukoe vo rülü kübace Pu ta vori mi kürikpünako mhüngo thisü mu puko lü kürüh la puko lükhuta, kükrelamori, pukoe mi kükremi Pu rhühlasü küta küngoko süri mülü kümo la.
english: Afterward he was revealed to the eleven themselves as they sat at the table, and he rebuked them for their unbelief and hardness of heart, because they didn't believe those who had seen him after he had risen.

chokri: Pu uko yisü, Neko cejü mütülü vo die züyiküveo püh thüma mütü ce po süyi,
english: He said to them, "Go into all the world, and preach the Gospel to the whole creation.

chokri: Kühopüri mülüküyi no dzülu pü küyio külayito, vele kühopüri mülüyi kümoo müjo vato.
english: He who believes and is baptized will be saved; but he who disbelieves will be condemned.

chokri: Mülüyi mülüküyiko yo zasi hiko tato; Puko aza lü thürüküsuko huyi to, uko khü küsa süh mha poto,
english: These signs will accompany those who believe: in my name they will cast out demons; they will speak with new languages;

chokri: Uko tünyhi khi pühyito; ukoe thürüh krayita zori uko va müsu valho, uko küthimi yo ube shosü lize süko sürhoyito, zita.
english: they will take up serpents; and if they drink any deadly thing, it will in no way hurt them; they will lay hands on the sick, and they will recover."

chokri: Pu ukoce züpon sü küva sa, Pu züh tüyo khota, sidie Poo zaco bata.
english: So then the Lord Jesus, after he had spoken to them, was received up into heaven, and sat down at the right hand of God.

chokri: Mu pukoe ta vo die kühopühra ri zhopo thi vota. Nyepoo puko züh mhathi mu zasiko yono züo thi kümütü vota.
english: They went out, and preached everywhere, the Lord working with them, and confirming the word by the signs that followed. Amen.

chokri: Thüma kekro udolü mhathi müsemengo kesüko tho kesaso tutu sü keto thi phisü,
english: Since many have undertaken to set in order a narrative concerning those matters which have been fulfilled among us,

chokri: Süculü püsa meji jüo choyiko umhüpü kengo zhopo kethiko belü khapü uko tsü süte.
english: even as those who from the beginning were eyewitnesses and ministers of the word delivered them to us,

chokri: Mhape menu kevoce I sheri tho meve shu sü keto alü mpeyi te, vemirekri Theophilus.
english: it seemed good to me also, having traced the course of all things accurately from the first, to write to you in order, most excellent Theophilus;

chokri: N po kethoo setüyi ketola mhathi kevoko hijü nce po kesübi.
english: that you might know the certainty concerning the things in which you were instructed.

chokri: Judah kedo Herod tüce, Zacharea Thevo kezho thiba, Abijah thevo yelü kevorimi pücemi Elizabeth no Aaron yemi.
english: There was in the days of Herod, the king of Judea, a certain priest named Zacharias, of the priestly division of Abijah. He had a wife of the daughters of Aaron, and her name was Elizabeth.

chokri: Uni kenani Jihova mhüjülü matho mezi dehü, thezhoko mu ukrüzhoko lü mejo va kehomi, thi mu züno khakesü kolü.
english: They were both righteous before God, walking blamelessly in all the commandments and ordinances of the Lord.

chokri: Vele uni nudimi, Elizabeth nudipü mu uni kenani pethi zho rata.
english: But they had no child, because Elizabeth was barren, and they both were well advanced in years.

chokri: Pü mesülü thevo mhatho thi Jihova mhüjülü kebace.
english: Now it happened, while he executed the priest's office before God in the order of his division,

chokri: Chethi khüle (heve hesu) kethilü ta kere shücelü mhathüpü Jihova reshü ti pü mesü ta.
english: according to the custom of the priest's office, his lot was to enter into the temple of the Lord and burn incense.

chokri: Hitülü, mhathüpü reshü thi kebace thüma metüko chozuco kech thiba.
english: The whole multitude of the people were praying outside at the hour of incense.

chokri: Süsa tüyo Niepoo choyimi pü pü mhüngo, thisüta kethü reshü khü uzaco.
english: An angel of the Lord appeared to him, standing on the right side of the altar of incense.

chokri: Zecharia süo ngokesüce pü kere de mpe shuta.
english: Zacharias was troubled when he saw him, and fear fell upon him.

chokri: Vele tüyo choyio püücepoti “mpe hite” n kecho se süte, Zecharia cemi Elizabeth thepumi pü hüyi to, no püza thopü John thi süte.
english: But the angel said to him, "Don't be afraid, Zacharias, because your request has been heard, and your wife, Elizabeth, will bear you a son, and you shall call his name John.

chokri: No njükeve mu kenüngoyito, pü menu keyi thüma kekro unü to.
english: You will have joy and gladness; and many will rejoice at his birth.

chokri: Pü Niepoo mhüjülü zhophito, pü kemenu mhüjüri Kemesa Rüpü püzü tato.
english: For he will be great in the sight of the Lord, and he will drink no wine nor strong drink. He will be filled with the Holy Spirit, even from his mother's womb.

chokri: Pü Isreal thüma kekro thi redepü Niepoo uko Rüo ce süto.
english: He will turn many of the children of Israel to the Lord, their God.

chokri: Elijah rüpüh mu pü keku pü de pü mhüjülü tavoto, mikrüne melü thi rüdepü ununeko yo süto, mathokemoko (jüzü kemoko) thi rede pü kemezi mhase lü sü vato, thüma kopo keredepü Niepoo la u kesüpü ba ketola.
english: He will go before him in the spirit and power of Elijah, 'to turn the hearts of the fathers to the children,' and the disobedient to the wisdom of the just; to make ready a people prepared for the Lord."

chokri: Zecharia tüyochoyio ce poti, kedipü bide I süo seyi veta? I pethite acemi sheri tütse kükrote.
english: Zacharias said to the angel, "How can I be sure of this? For I am an old man, and my wife is well advanced in years."

chokri: Tüyochoyio püfü kelasü, I Gabriel. I Jihova mhüjülü thayo, A ketsüpü nce posüno zisü, mu jüyikeve hio khi püvo n metsosü.
english: The angel answered him, "I am Gabriel, who stands in the presence of God. I was sent to speak to you, and to bring you this good news.

chokri: Vele tsühi, no afü melü mo ketala, pütütülü süko thitso vori tato, no jü poyi ho batato; hiko thitsü vori kemothe.
english: Behold, you will be silent and not able to speak, until the day that these things will happen, because you didn't believe my words, which will be fulfilled in their proper time."

chokri: Sütüce thümako Zecharia füba, m kedipüla pü kereshücelü thothü mecho bata sheri.
english: The people were waiting for Zacharias, and they marveled that he delayed in the temple.

chokri: Pü taprari, pü ukoce jüpo yi mota, mu uko kelüce pü kehothimori kereshücelü zümho ngota metse, pübe chopü ukoce thakako mengo bata de jüpoyi mo bata.
english: When he came out, he could not speak to them, and they perceived that he had seen a vision in the temple. He continued making signs to them, and remained mute.

chokri: Pütü tsovori ta de ta pücelü vota.
english: It happened, when the days of his service were fulfilled, he departed to his house.

chokri: Hisalü pücemi Elizabeth nuneyi, tükhri püngu puce kre redü ba,
english: After these days Elizabeth, his wife, conceived, and she hid herself five months, saying,

chokri: Thenopü poti, Niepoo tho hio thisü pü aphimüzhie de a thüma dolü I zhoshü keta khipü düve.
english: "Thus has the Lord done to me in the days in which he looked at me, to take away my reproach among men."

chokri: Tekhri shurü sa Jihova tüyochoyio Gabriel ketsüpü Galilee rüna lü Nazareth lüsü.
english: Now in the sixth month, the angel Gabriel was sent from God to a city of Galilee, named Nazareth,

chokri: Reliphosüpü pü Joseph zü kephokhava, pü David shuyemi. Reliphosüpü za Mary.
english: to a virgin pledged to be married to a man whose name was Joseph, of the house of David. The virgin's name was Mary.

chokri: Tüyochoyio puce pode, kelüsüho, Niepoo khrü kepüpü, Niepoo nzü bateho,
english: Having come in, the angel said to her, "Rejoice, you highly favored one! The Lord is with you. Blessed are you among women!"

chokri: Vele thenopü jü süko la pü vedi phita, side pü mha süko lüpü dipü la pü kelü tasheri.
english: But when she saw him, she was greatly troubled at the saying, and considered what kind of salutation this might be.

chokri: Tüyochoyio Mary ce poti, mpe hite, Mary, no Jihova nüpü thibate.
english: The angel said to her, "Don't be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God.

chokri: N nobulü no nuneyito thepumipü. Püza thopü Jisu thite.
english: Behold, you will conceive in your womb, and bring forth a son, and will call his name 'Jesus.'

chokri: Pü kezhomi thito, pü cüpü kerekrüthoo nu thito, Niepo Jihova ne shuye David kedeba la pü putsüto.
english: He will be great, and will be called the Son of the Most High. The Lord God will give him the throne of his father, David,

chokri: Pü Jacob cekro kechothe kekhato, pü kedeba thüla kedithito.
english: and he will reign over the house of Jacob forever. There will be no end to his Kingdom."

chokri: Mary tüyochoyio cepode, dipübi siziyi veta, I reli phosa püpü zotila?
english: Mary said to the angel, "How can this be, seeing I am a virgin?"

chokri: Tüyochoyio pode, Kemesa Rüpü n yo vorito, kerekrüthoo tho n mhozhuyito, sizide nuranu menuyiyito, pü mesato, side pü cüpü Jihova nu thito.
english: The angel answered her, "The Holy Spirit will come on you, and the power of the Most High will overshadow you. Therefore also the holy one who is born from you will be called the Son of God.

chokri: Tsüdoce n celümi pü Elizabeth pü pethi züde nune pü bate, pü nune tekhri shurü bate, nudipü le ketao sü.
english: Behold, Elizabeth, your relative, also has conceived a son in her old age; and this is the sixth month with her who was called barren.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova la mhapüri thiyi kesu bamo tila.
english: For everything spoken by God is possible."

chokri: Mary po kesü, I hiceba Niepo theküpü; n kepo biyite apono, süsa tüyochoyio pü khava tata.
english: Mary said, "Behold, the handmaid of the Lord; be it to me according to your word." The angel departed from her.

chokri: Süsa Mary rekri tavo Judea rünalü cejütu yo kehüko cevo.
english: Mary arose in those days and went into the hill country with haste, into a city of Judah,

chokri: Pü tavo Zecharia celü Elizabeth kelüsü.
english: and entered into the house of Zacharias and greeted Elizabeth.

chokri: Elizabeth Mary pü kelü kesü fü se kesüce, pü nu püvalü kebao rehüta. Elizabeth Kemesa Rüpü püchuyita.
english: It happened, when Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, that the baby leaped in her womb, and Elizabeth was filled with the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Side füphra meto süta, thenomi dolü thejo kepütho nopü, n nobu sheri thejo püzo.
english: She called out with a loud voice, and said, "Blessed are you among women, and blessed is the fruit of your womb!

chokri: A niepoo zu ace kevori hi kedipü bita?
english: Why am I so favored, that the mother of my Lord should come to me?

chokri: Kekrelamori no akelü kesü fü se kesüce anu avalü kebao pünüde rehü bate.
english: For behold, when the voice of your greeting came into my ears, the baby leaped in my womb for joy!

chokri: Thenopü Niepoo puce kepo fü thitsüsü keto melü keyiümi thejo kepütho.
english: Blessed is she who believed, for there will be a fulfillment of the things which have been spoken to her from the Lord!"

chokri: Mary poti, akhri amenyü Niepoo rho kerekrüsüte;
english: Mary said, "My soul magnifies the Lord.

chokri: Arüpü sheri Jihova akelakeyi-o la pünü bate.
english: My spirit has rejoiced in God my Savior,

chokri: Kekrelamori pü I kethathi pü citapü khrü mekre sü ketala, kethozo tsüsahi (hisaco) nushunuye metü a cüpü thejo kepü zi tato.
english: For he has looked at the humble state of his handmaid. For behold, from now on, all generations will call me blessed.

chokri: Kekrelamori kekuthoo ayo mha kezho thi sü ketala, kemesa sü püza.
english: For he who is mighty has done great things for me. Holy is his name.

chokri: Pü phikemezhe sü somi pü mpe yo sheri sükoyo, süsü nushünuye metülü tato.
english: His mercy is for generations of generations on those who fear him.

chokri: Püboyo pü keku thaka thisüte, kemeko kemeha ketako umelü ukelülü süko hupü preve.
english: He has shown strength with his arm. He has scattered the proud in the imagination of their heart.

chokri: Kekuko kedebalü pü meki süte, side renu ketako phu mesüve.
english: He has put down princes from their thrones. And has exalted the lowly.

chokri: Khü theri meri ketako mhakeve khapü düsüte, mu kenemiko po methu tate.
english: He has filled the hungry with good things. He has sent the rich away empty.

chokri: Pü theküo Isreal khrühi sü, pü phikemezhe püsa lü sala keyilü.
english: He has given help to Israel, his servant, that he might remember mercy,

chokri: Pü ukrü utsüpumi koce reshu pü kemetao Abraham mu shuyeko kecho phra kesü.
english: As he spoke to our fathers, To Abraham and his seed forever."

chokri: Mary side tüsozho khri sü püzü bade ta pücelü la vota.
english: Mary stayed with her about three months, and then returned to her house.

chokri: Elizabeth nuzü tü vorita, side thepumi pü menuyi.
english: Now the time that Elizabeth should give birth was fulfilled, and she brought forth a son.

chokri: Pü zanumiko, pü celümiko, Niepoo püphi mezhe kesü seyi, side uko püzü uko nüphi.
english: Her neighbors and her relatives heard that the Lord had magnified his mercy towards her, and they rejoiced with her.

chokri: Zho tütha nha uko nuo yi kerü la vori, side uko püza thopü Zacharia thisü tole rhüba, püpo zapü püza thito leno.
english: It happened on the eighth day, that they came to circumcise the child; and they would have called him Zacharias, after the name of the father.

chokri: Vele püzu poti, “mole, püzapü John sito.”
english: His mother answered, "Not so; but he will be called John."

chokri: No thenopü ce poti, ne celümi mipüri theza siziti di,
english: They said to her, "There is no one among your relatives who is called by this name."

chokri: Süsa uko püpoce thebepü thakade püza thopü sopü thinyü basheri.
english: They made signs to his father, what he would have him called.

chokri: Pü lesi pü thosü ketocho, “püza John” uko metü ungo thita,
english: He asked for a writing tablet, and wrote, "His name is John." They all marveled.

chokri: Metha püta jüpo parita, pü meyi kekha dita, side pü jüpo vüta, Jihova Tshü (chu)
english: His mouth was opened immediately, and his tongue freed, and he spoke, blessing God.

chokri: Kempe süzanu metüyo vota, hiko ju kepo Judea cejütu rüna metülü vota.
english: Fear came on all who lived around them, and all these sayings were talked about throughout all the hill country of Judea.

chokri: Süo kesekhü mhalü keta, nu hio kedipü bi süri toshi? Kekrelamori Niepoo be püzü tazo ketila.
english: All who heard them laid them up in their heart, saying, "What then will this child be?" The hand of the Lord was with him.

chokri: Süsa Zecharia Kemesa Rüpü püchu pü saju pota,
english: His father, Zacharias, was filled with the Holy Spirit, and prophesied, saying,

chokri: Niepoo Isreal mi Rüo po thejo kepüo thite kekrelamori pü thümako phimüzhe mekre sü uko rhayi ketala.
english: "Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, For he has visited and worked redemption for his people;

chokri: Pü kelakeyi keku shüpü ukola kha süte, pü cetao David cekrolü.
english: And has raised up a horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David

chokri: Thajü saju kepo kemesako talü popü kemetabi; uko ngomuko
english: (As he spoke by the mouth of his holy prophets who have been from of old),

chokri: Belü ukelasü toleno somi uko ngo metsü tayo sheri.
english: Salvation from our enemies, and from the hand of all who hate us;

chokri: Pü phikemezhe khasü tole, reshü pü ukrü utsüpumi c ekesübi, pü kemesa fükho püsalüyi.
english: To show mercy towards our fathers, To remember his holy covenant,

chokri: Pü reshüpü upotsa Abraham cekesü.
english: The oath which he spoke to Abraham, our father,

chokri: Ungomumiko belü ukelayi keto khapü uketsü, side pü choyithi mu mpe keyi
english: To grant to us that we, being delivered out of the hand of our enemies, should serve him without fear,

chokri: Kemesalü, mu kemezilü tüsonha pü mhüjüce utülü.
english: In holiness and righteousness before him all the days of our life.

chokri: Mu no, nu hio cüpü kerekrüthoo saju kepoo sizito, kekrelamori no Niepoo mhüjülü pücho kesü vo ketola.
english: And you, child, will be called a prophet of the Most High, For you will go before the face of the Lord to make ready his ways,

chokri: Kelakeyi mhase khapü püthümako tsü süto, uko kejo kemu va keyi.
english: To give knowledge of salvation to his people by the remission of their sins,

chokri: Jihova ngokemezhe kene, mesayo cephropü utsü kiri keti.
english: Because of the tender mercy of our God, Whereby the dawn from on high will visit us,

chokri: Keve khapü kezülüketako vakesü, mu keso khrilü ta ketako, uphecho tüpü kezükeve lü kesü.
english: To shine on those who sit in darkness and the shadow of death; To guide our feet into the way of peace."

chokri: Natsio mazhoi mu rüpülü kuyi, pü rayholü tade kenuco Isreal methi mhüngo thi vori.
english: The child was growing, and becoming strong in spirit, and was in the desert until the day of his public appearance to Israel.

chokri: Augustus kedeo celü thezhopü khakesü, cejü metü theza thosü node posü.
english: Now it happened in those days, that a decree went out from Caesar Augustus that all the world should be enrolled.

chokri: Theza thopü lesilü kesü theratho-o tüce Quirinius Syria lü Angh thiba.
english: This was the first enrollment made when Quirinius was governor of Syria.

chokri: Thüma metü uzatho ketola ta utho ura vota.
english: All went to enroll themselves, everyone to his own city.

chokri: Joseph sheri Galilee rüna Nazareth lü ta Judea lükho, David nadelü Bethlehem lü, kekrelamori pü David shuyemi tila.
english: Joseph also went up from Galilee, out of the city of Nazareth, into Judea, to the city of David, which is called Bethlehem, because he was of the house and family of David;

chokri: Pü Mary züde tavo, uni kevakha meta tila, mu thenopü nunepüta.
english: to enroll himself with Mary, who was pledged to be married to him as wife, being pregnant.

chokri: Uni ta kevoce thenopü nuzütü vorita.
english: It happened, while they were there, that the day had come that she should give birth.

chokri: Thenopü thepumipü menuyi de fünyepü pü kezhü sü, de khapü metho mhatibayo sümezü, kekrelamori resomi kerelü thilü uni badi ketala.
english: She brought forth her firstborn son, and she wrapped him in bands of cloth, and laid him in a feeding trough, because there was no room for them in the inn.

chokri: Teko kefüko thera yilü tayo, tüzülü teko krofü mu la bayo,
english: There were shepherds in the same country staying in the field, and keeping watch by night over their flock.

chokri: tüyo Niepoo choyimi ta ukoce vori de Niepoo keve pü uko keba khüko vamve yita, mu uko mpe shuta.
english: Behold, an angel of the Lord stood by them, and the glory of the Lord shone around them, and they were terrified.

chokri: Tüyochoyio ukoce poti mpe hite, hihe, I theju kevepü khi nekoce vorizütila; thümapo unüphi keto thümametüko
english: The angel said to them, "Don't be afraid, for behold, I bring you good news of great joy which will be to all the people.

chokri: Kekrelamori tha David nadelü kelakeyipü Niepoo Khrista sü menu yite.
english: For there is born to you, this day, in the city of David, a Savior, who is Christ the Lord.

chokri: Zasi hihi nekozü tato, neko nuranu-o fünhe pü kezhüpü cüripo mhaküti bayo khapü mezü de ngo yito.
english: This is the sign to you: you will find a baby wrapped in strips of cloth, lying in a feeding trough."

chokri: Tüyochoyio züde tüyo krode Jihova chusü;
english: Suddenly, there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly host praising God, and saying,

chokri: Püco the kesü, kerekrütho Jihova po zapozale thiyite, cejülü thümako po kezükeve and thümala mhakeve kelü thite.
english: "Glory to God in the highest, On earth peace, good will toward men."

chokri: Tüyochoyimiko ta ketasa, uko khava ta tüyo khota, süsa teko kefüko hunehuce poti, khe uko tsühi ta Bethlehem lü vo tole, Niepoo uko ce po kesüko pe sükhe.
english: It happened, when the angels went away from them into the sky, that the shepherds said one to another, "Let's go to Bethlehem, now, and see this thing that has happened, which the Lord has made known to us."

chokri: Uko ta rekri vori de Mary, Joseph mu nuranu methoco ba-o züde uko ngoyi.
english: They came with haste, and found both Mary and Joseph, and the baby was lying in the feeding trough.

chokri: Uko süo ngo keyice, ukoce po kesüko khapü uko mesesü, nuranu-o ju kepoko.
english: When they saw it, they publicized widely the saying which was spoken to them about this child.

chokri: Theju süko keseko metü ungo phita, teko kefüko po kesükola.
english: All who heard it wondered at the things which were spoken to them by the shepherds.

chokri: Vele Mary mhasüko metü khapü pumelülü mhalü bata.
english: But Mary kept all these sayings, pondering them in her heart.

chokri: Teko kefüko salatata, Niepoo po kemele mu püchu, mhahiko metü se mu ngo keyila ukoce po kesübi.
english: The shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all the things that they had heard and seen, just as it was told them.

chokri: Nuo yirü ketola tüsozho tütha tsota, püza thopü Jisu thisü, püzu nobulü hü keyi mhüjü tüyo choyio thüza putsü kesüo
english: When eight days were fulfilled for the circumcision of the child, his name was called Jesus, which was given by the angel before he was conceived in the womb.

chokri: Thenopü thi kemesa keyi, Moses zholü thopü kemeta tüsozho tso ketasa, püzü Jerusalem lükho, pü khapü Niepoo mhüjülü sü ketola.
english: When the days of their purification according to the law of Moses were fulfilled, they brought him up to Jerusalem, to present him to the Lord

chokri: Thezho lesilü thopü kemeta, thepu nuranu püzu nobu khri (he) kepario Niepoo mhüjülü mesale poto.
english: (as it is written in the law of the Lord, "Every male who opens the womb shall be called holy to the Lord"),

chokri: Niepoo thezho lesilü thopü kemeta bide kereshü thipü Niepoo tsüto; therüvü kena mu mekhro kena.
english: and to offer a sacrifice according to that which is said in the law of the Lord, "A pair of turtledoves, or two young pigeons."

chokri: Jerusalem lü thümapü püza Simeon lezi tipüta, thüma hio mhatho, mu kereshülü tayo; Isreal mi thelü kelupü fü mu meri tayo; Kemesa Rüpü püzüta.
english: Behold, there was a man in Jerusalem whose name was Simeon. This man was righteous and devout, looking for the consolation of Israel, and the Holy Spirit was on him.

chokri: Kemesa Rüpü puce mese kesü, Niepoo Khrista kengo mhüjü püpo sata hole zi tayo.
english: It had been revealed to him by the Holy Spirit that he should not see death before he had seen the Lord's Christ.

chokri: Pü Kemesa Rüpü züta de kereshücelü lüri nuranu Jisu krüneko püzü kereshücelü vori; thezho thopü kemetako thipü püyo sü ketola.
english: He came in the Spirit into the temple. When the parents brought in the child, Jesus, that they might do concerning him according to the custom of the law,

chokri: Nu süo püpüboyo süyi, de reliphripü Jihova tsüsü, de poti.
english: then he received him into his arms, and blessed God, and said,

chokri: Niepoo tsüsa n cetao po tatate, pü kenülü n jüpo bide.
english: "Now you are releasing your servant, Master, According to your word, in peace;

chokri: Kekrelamori amhü khipü n kelakeyio ngo kevala.
english: For my eyes have seen your salvation,

chokri: No kesüpü thüma metü mhüjülü sü ketala.
english: Which you have prepared before the face of all peoples;

chokri: Gentilemiko la kevepü mu Isreal n thümako la zapozale.
english: A light for revelation to the Gentiles, And the glory of your people Israel."

chokri: Joseph mu püzuni mha süko la uningo thibata, pü kepo fükola.
english: Joseph and his mother were marveling at the things which were spoken concerning him,

chokri: Simeon reliphri pü uko tsüsü, de Mary ce poti, Hihe, nu hiola Isreal mi kekro kritato mu tosü yiri to, ti thisüte, mu zasi popü kemeta pü kemetsülari.
english: and Simeon blessed them, and said to Mary, his mother, "Behold, this child is set for the falling and the rising of many in Israel, and for a sign which is spoken against.

chokri: I le, zechopü n melü kerhü thizoto, thüma melü metüko khipü hala sü ketola.
english: Yes, a sword will pierce through your own soul, that the thoughts of many hearts may be revealed."

chokri: Anna sitipü saju kepopü leno tayo, theno süpü Phanuel nopü, Asher mi ye; theno süpü pethi tsa shuta, süpü tütse thüna pü nopu zühü pü reli phosalü.
english: There was one Anna, a prophetess, the daughter of Phanuel, of the tribe of Asher (she was of a great age, having lived with a husband seven years from her virginity,

chokri: Samepü süo tütse hetütha da, pü kereshücelü cutayomo, vele tüso tüzü mevo, mu kechothide Jihova choyi thi bayo,
english: and she had been a widow for about eighty-four years), who didn't depart from the temple, worshipping with fastings and petitions night and day.

chokri: Pütü süce tavoride Niepoo chuta, Jerusalem lü urha küyi fü meri kebako ce püju pü metükoce posü.
english: Coming up at that very hour, she gave thanks to the Lord, and spoke of him to all those who were looking for redemption in Jerusalem.

chokri: Niepoo thezho lesilü thopü kemetako thitso kevasa uko sala ta Galilee lü Nazareth uko nadelü kita.
english: When they had accomplished all things that were according to the law of the Lord, they returned into Galilee, to their own city, Nazareth.

chokri: Natsio ma sü rüpülü metüyi, mhasepü pü chuyi, Jihova ngokemezhe püyo ta.
english: The child was growing, and was becoming strong in spirit, being filled with wisdom, and the grace of God was upon him.

chokri: Hitüce, Jisu krüni Jerusalem lü cukevo nyelü vo süyo, tütse mütsü.
english: His parents went every year to Jerusalem at the feast of the Passover.

chokri: Pü tütse kerikena ketace uko ta Jerusalem thenye lükho, uko zhoce thiyo tibi,
english: When he was twelve years old, they went up to Jerusalem according to the custom of the feast,

chokri: Uko thezhoko tso ketasa tasala vo tazü natsio Jerusalem lü thothü bata, Joseph mu püzu ni süo sebamo.
english: and when they had fulfilled the days, as they were returning, the boy Jesus stayed behind in Jerusalem. Joseph and his mother didn't know it,

chokri: Vele uni püsheri uko krolü tazo hoti lüba, zhopü chotalü vota; uko pükroko ce mu ucekroko celü pü phuvo.
english: but supposing him to be in the company, they went a day's journey, and they looked for him among their relatives and acquaintances.

chokri: Uko pü phu medita, süla ta Jerusalem lü lakho püphu.
english: When they didn't find him, they returned to Jerusalem, looking for him.

chokri: Zhosü sa uko vo pü ngoyi kereshücelü bade, lesikesethoko dolü bade uko fü reni mu mhaketso ziba.
english: It happened after three days they found him in the temple, sitting in the midst of the teachers, both listening to them, and asking them questions.

chokri: Püfü keseko ukongophita, pü miketso mu mifü kela kesüko se kesüce.
english: All who heard him were amazed at his understanding and his answers.

chokri: Uko tavo püngo keyice ukongophita, püzu puce poti, anu, no dithide haniyo hibi ta? Hihe, npo hani lü kemezhephi de nphu tate.
english: When they saw him, they were astonished, and his mother said to him, "Son, why have you treated us this way? Behold, your father and I were anxiously looking for you."

chokri: Pü unice poti, dithide neni aphu züta? Neni I apocelü pü mhatho thimokesu bati semo zome?
english: He said to them, "Why were you looking for me? Didn't you know that I must be in my Father's house?"

chokri: Uni pü kepoco seyi mota, unice posü zori
english: They didn't understand the saying which he spoke to them.

chokri: Pü uni züde ta Nazareth lü kita de uni zü bata; vele püzu mhahiko kepo metü pumelülü rekra tazo.
english: And he went down with them, and came to Nazareth. He was subject to them, and his mother kept all these sayings in her heart.

chokri: Jisu mhase lüri mu püchosheri ma keheyi, thüma mu Jihova khrüpü.
english: And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature, and in favor with God and men.

chokri: Tiberious Caesar kede thi keba tüce, Pontius Pilate-e Judea lü governor (Angh) thiba, mu Herod Galilee lü tetrarch (kezho) thiba, pü sazüo Philip Ituraca lü tetrarch thiba, trachinitis khü kosa mu lysanias sheri Abiline lü tetrarch thiba.
english: Now in the fifteenth year of the reign of Tiberius Caesar, Pontius Pilate being governor of Judea, and Herod being tetrarch of Galilee, and his brother Philip tetrarch of the region of Ituraea and Trachonitis, and Lysanias tetrarch of Abilene,

chokri: Annas mu Caiphais ni thevokezhotho thiba, Jihova jü john cevori, Zacharias nu nhatsalü ketao.
english: in the high priesthood of Annas and Caiaphas, the word of God came to John, the son of Zacharias, in the wilderness.

chokri: Jordan rükhü kejovakeyi mu melü vode kephomalü thelü redekeyi mu jülo kepü pü metha.
english: He came into all the region around the Jordan, preaching the baptism of repentance for remission of sins.

chokri: Isaiah saju kepoo lesilü thopü kemeta, nhatsalü seketa fü poti, neko Niepoo cho kesüyite, pü chodeko thi kemeziyite.
english: As it is written in the book of the words of Isaiah the prophet, "The voice of one crying in the wilderness, 'Make ready the way of the Lord. Make his paths straight.

chokri: Cejü razhoko lü vato, mu cejütu mu cejütu kerenuko metü thi renu vato, chokesu kereviko thi kemezi vato, mu cho meju kemoko thi kemeju vato.
english: Every valley will be filled. Every mountain and hill will be brought low. The crooked will become straight, And the rough ways smooth.

chokri: Uthiupho kenekhü kelakeyi Jihova süngoto,
english: All flesh will see God's salvation.'"

chokri: Makro ta püce jülo püto kevoriko cepoti, nhibü shuyeko, sopü lekhu vori kezü nekopo tayino posü de ta vorizü sheri?
english: He said therefore to the multitudes who went out to be baptized by him, "You offspring of vipers, who warned you to flee from the wrath to come?

chokri: Thelü redekeyi se zhüyi keshü pü vorite, neko lulu kelü, hapotsa Abraham siotilühite; I nekoce posüto, Jihova ketsühiko sheri khipü Abraham nuneko thiyi vetila.
english: Bring forth therefore fruits worthy of repentance, and don't begin to say among yourselves, 'We have Abraham for our father;' for I tell you that God is able to raise up children to Abraham from these stones!

chokri: Tsühi sheri merü khapü süboko phelümezü ve, sübo kehopüsheri use kevezhüyi kemoko dathüpü melü süvato,
english: Even now the axe also lies at the root of the trees. Every tree therefore that doesn't bring forth good fruit is cut down, and thrown into the fire."

chokri: Thümako püketsoti, süsa hakopo dipü thita?
english: The multitudes asked him, "What then must we do?"

chokri: Pü ukofü kela kesü, “ubola kena kebami po khapü kedimi zükezayite, ketico (themu) kebami ri sübi khapü kedimi zü kezayite.”
english: He answered them, "He who has two coats, let him give to him who has none. He who has food, let him do likewise."

chokri: Mahomi sheri jülo pü ketola vori, kemethao, hakopo dipü bize veta?
english: Tax collectors also came to be baptized, and they said to him, "Teacher, what must we do?"

chokri: Pü ukoce poti, mhakhapü nekopo thino kesüko kezü pi miyo mhakhihite.
english: He said to them, "Collect no more than that which is appointed to you."
