english: But Peter, standing up with the eleven, lifted up his voice, and spoke out to them, "You men of Judea, and all you who dwell at Jerusalem, let this be known to you, and listen to my words.

chokri: Kekrelamori hiko mezü thamozo, neko lü kebabi, tsühi bavüdo sü zolu.
english: For these aren't drunken, as you suppose, seeing it is only the third hour of the day.

chokri: Vele hihi thajü Joel saju keseo popü metatizo.
english: But this is what has been spoken through the prophet Joel:

chokri: Pütü thelaco mha hiziti vorito Jihova pokesü, I a Rüpü rüpü nuhü metüyo süto, thepu nuko mu nenethenomiko saju poto, nene khresamiko zümho ngoto, mu ketsamiko umho mato.
english: 'It will be in the last days, says God, That I will pour out my Spirit on all flesh. Your sons and your daughters will prophesy. Your young men will see visions. Your old men will dream dreams.

chokri: Athekümiko mu atheküpüko yo a Rüpü rü süto pütü süce mu uko saju poto.
english: Yes, and on my servants and on my handmaidens in those days, I will pour out my Spirit, and they will prophesy.

chokri: I tüyo zasi ungotiko thi mengo süto, cejülü sheri zasiko thi süto, thüza mu me, kemhü mekho.
english: I will show wonders in the sky above, And signs on the earth beneath; Blood, and fire, and billows of smoke.

chokri: Nace zü tato, khri thüza meve tato, Niepo kevori tüsozho kezho mhüjü.
english: The sun will be turned into darkness, And the moon into blood, Before the great and glorious day of the Lord comes.

chokri: Süsa somino Niepoo za cüyi sheri sümi kelayito,
english: It will be, that whoever will call on the name of the Lord will be saved.'

chokri: Ne Israel miko jü hiko reni yite, Nazarethmi Jisu Jihova medolü nekola zasi, keku, ungo mhatho, neko dolü Jihova püzü thi mu nekori se mu ngo süte.
english: "Men of Israel, hear these words! Jesus of Nazareth, a man approved by God to you by mighty works and wonders and signs which God did by him in the midst of you, even as you yourselves know,

chokri: Pü tüpü neko tsüsü süculü mharhü mu mejü sekeba Jihova medola, neko püpü Cross yo guve thüma kesuko belü pü dokhri ve.
english: him, being delivered up by the determined counsel and foreknowledge of God, you have taken by the hand of lawless men, crucified and killed;

chokri: Vele Jihova pü phü merhü süte, kesalü pü phrü süte, kekrelamori kesa kekupo pü tüpü bata ti thiyi ve motila.
english: whom God raised up, having freed him from the agony of death, because it was not possible that he should be held by it.

chokri: David sheri püla popü meta, I Niepoo amhüjülü mejümera ngo süyo, kekrelamori pü azaco ta mu I mhapüri thathi taho.
english: For David says concerning him, 'I saw the Lord always before my face, For he is on my right hand, that I should not be moved.

chokri: Süla amelü rethu bate, ameyi sheri unü bate, sizomori athi apho sheri püyo kemerilü relü yito.
english: Therefore my heart was glad, and my tongue rejoiced. Moreover my flesh also will dwell in hope;

chokri: Kekrelamori no apho khapü mezalü sü vaho, mori no n Kemesao khapü kekalü sü vaho.
english: Because you will not leave my soul in Hades, Neither will you allow your Holy One to see decay.

chokri: No kerhü cho thapü ameka kesü I seyite, nkebara apo anü tsüyi yo.
english: You made known to me the ways of life. You will make me full of gladness with your presence.'

chokri: Ne Israelites aramiko, apono nekoce potü süte uko potsa David sü sate mu pü khrü riva, pü mhakhre sheri tsühi azü bazo tha ketso.
english: "Brothers, I may tell you freely of the patriarch David, that he both died and was buried, and his tomb is with us to this day.

chokri: Püno saju kepo mipü, Jihova reshu de püce po kesü, nshuyelü (nsünralü) mipü uthiupho kethi pü nkedebalü ba yito.
english: Therefore, being a prophet, and knowing that God had sworn with an oath to him that of the fruit of his body, according to the flesh, he would raise up the Christ to sit on his throne,

chokri: Pü mejümera sede po kesü Khrista rhüla kesü ju po, püpho khapü mezalü süva kemo, mori pümo sheri reta kemo.
english: he foreseeing this spoke about the resurrection of the Christ, that neither was his soul left in Hades, nor did his flesh see decay.

chokri: Jisu hio Jihova phü merhü süte, süo hako metü kese kengo zhopo kozo.
english: This Jesus God raised up, to which we all are witnesses.

chokri: Püthi kerekrüpü Jihova zaco sü kevabi, u Po pü püyi ketabi jükhapü kemeta (reshu) Kemesa Rüpü lapü süte neko se mu ngo keba hio.
english: Being therefore exalted by the right hand of God, and having received from the Father the promise of the Holy Spirit, he has poured out this, which you now see and hear.

chokri: Kekrelamori David tükoyo sütamo zori poti, “Niepoo a Niepoo cepoti, no azaco ba yite.
english: For David didn't ascend into the heavens, but he says himself, 'The Lord said to my Lord, "Sit by my right hand,

chokri: I nngomuko pü nphezho thiva kemothe.”
english: Until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet."'

chokri: Süla ne Israel thümako metü se kemesa yite, Jihova Jisu thipü Niepoo mu Messiah thi süte, neko püpü gu kevao.
english: "Let all the house of Israel therefore know assuredly that God has made him both Lord and Christ, this Jesus whom you crucified."

chokri: Süsa tsühi hio uko sesü, uko melü rhüsü, uko Peter mu apostleko cepoti, azüneko hakopo kedipü bize veta?
english: Now when they heard this, they were cut to the heart, and said to Peter and the rest of the apostles, "Brothers, what shall we do?"

chokri: Süsa Peter ukoce pode, neko metü thelü redeyite, side Jisu Khrista zalü kephoma va keyi jülo pü yite, size neko Kemesa Rüpü mhaphrü ngo yito.
english: Peter said to them, "Repent, and be baptized, everyone of you, in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of sins, and you will receive the gift of the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Popü kemeta jü neko la mu neko nuneko lazo, mu kemecuco keta miri la, Niepoo uko Rüo cü keyiko metü la.
english: For to you is the promise, and to your children, and to all who are far off, even as many as the Lord our God will call to himself."

chokri: Mu pü jü kekro posasü mu uko tarho risü, nushunuye kesuko dolü neko kela yite.
english: With many other words he testified, and exhorted them, saying, "Save yourselves from this crooked generation!"

chokri: Süsa püjü unüde khikeyiko jülo püyi, tüso sünha uko sa keyiko thüma piphi nye sü.
english: Then those who gladly received his word were baptized. There were added that day about three thousand souls.

chokri: Uko ukhapü apostleko kemetha jüzü thi mu kemekro siba zota, tsükhri cephro ti mu kecho thi sizi bata.
english: They continued steadfastly in the apostles' teaching and fellowship, in the breaking of bread, and prayer.

chokri: Kemelü miko pepü merethita, ungo mhatho mu zasiko apostleko thi tata.
english: Fear came on every soul, and many wonders and signs were done through the apostles.

chokri: Melü keyiko kezü kengu bata, mu mhako pü zhürhü thita.
english: All who believed were together, and had all things in common.

chokri: Uko mha uzhüko zhuyi, side kezapü thüma metüko tsü, mipüpü khimo kesu dü.
english: They sold their possessions and goods, and distributed them to all, according as anyone had need.

chokri: Uko kereshücelü tüsonha kezü lüpü thi de tsükhri cephroti, kecho thi, de hunehu celü mhati mu ulü kenü lebi po chupü bata.
english: Day by day, continuing steadfastly with one accord in the temple, and breaking bread at home, they took their food with gladness and singleness of heart,

chokri: Jihova chu, thüma metü po ukongo unü. Niepoo thüma khapü kehu sa mekro sü, tüsonha kelayi mo kesu dü.
english: praising God, and having favor with all the people. The Lord added to the assembly day by day those who were being saved.

chokri: Pünha Peter mu John ni ta kereshücelü khozü kecho kethi tülü, theva ba süce.
english: Peter and John were going up into the temple at the hour of prayer, the ninth hour.

chokri: Thümapü uzu valü lahe ketapü püvo sülü ba de mhakhrü ti bayo, tüsonha kereshü ceta ceprace, kharü za Züverizo, sitilü, mi kereshüce sülü kevoko ce mha cho bayo.
english: A certain man who was lame from his mother's womb was being carried, whom they laid daily at the door of the temple which is called Beautiful, to ask gifts for the needy of those who entered into the temple.

chokri: Thüma süo Peter mu John ni kereshücelü tavo kezü ngode unice mhacho ta.
english: Seeing Peter and John about to go into the temple, he asked to receive gifts for the needy.

chokri: Peter pümhüpü thüma süo pe türü sü John sade, side poti, Hani pe türü süte.
english: Peter, fastening his eyes on him, with John, said, "Look at us."

chokri: Sübi püri uni petüsü, mhahu uni celü ngoyi keto meride,
english: He listened to them, expecting to receive something from them.

chokri: Süsa Peter pode, rakathi mu suna I pü tamo, vele I pü ketao khapü ntsü süto; Jisu Khrista Nazareth mi zalü sütha süte, de ta süte.
english: But Peter said, "Silver and gold have I none, but what I have, that I give you. In the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth, get up and walk!"

chokri: Pübe püzaco tüsüsa sü, de cemesüsü, sisü metha püro pü kerüko metü vorita.
english: He took him by the right hand, and raised him up. Immediately his feet and his ankle bones received strength.

chokri: Pü prüsüde thayita, chota yita, mu uni züde ta kereshücelü lüta; chota, prü rehü, mu Jihova chu zita.
english: Leaping up, he stood, and began to walk. He entered with them into the temple, walking, leaping, and praising God.

chokri: Mu thüma metüko pü chota de Jihova chu keta ngo.
english: All the people saw him walking and praising God.

chokri: Mu uko se mu ngo keba thüma süo Kereshüce cepra Kezüve lü ba de mha khrüti kebao zo; uko püpe de uko ngo mu umha bata, püyo kedipü thi süta sheri.
english: They recognized him, that it was he who used to sit begging for gifts for the needy at the Beautiful Gate of the temple. They were filled with wonder and amazement at what had happened to him.

chokri: Laheo Peter mu John ni sameji ta, thüma metü Solomon cehükhro ta kehuzü, ungo shu mu ungodapü thimo tha.
english: As the lame man who was healed held on to Peter and John, all the people ran together to them in the porch that is called Solomon's, greatly wondering.

chokri: Peter süo ngosü de thümako ce poti, ne Israel thümako neko dito mha hiola neko ngo bata? Mori kedipüla hako pesü bata? Hako kekulü mori hako kemesalü thüma hio thipü chotayi tele bame?
english: When Peter saw it, he responded to the people, "You men of Israel, why do you marvel at this man? Why do you fasten your eyes on us, as though by our own power or godliness we had made him walk?

chokri: Abraham, Isaac, mu Jacob ko Rüo, mu uko potsako Rüo, pünu Jisu pü thechu therho zapo zale thisü; neko pü tüpü Pilate-e mhüjülü pü melava, Pilate-e no pü khasüva keto lüzo ta sheri.
english: The God of Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, the God of our fathers, has glorified his Servant Jesus, whom you delivered up, and denied in the presence of Pilate, when he had determined to release him.

chokri: Vele neko Kemesao mu kejüthoo melave, mu kedokhrimi yinyü kute khapü neko tsüvano site.
english: But you denied the Holy and Righteous One, and asked for a murderer to be granted to you,

chokri: Side Kehü kepoo dokhri ve, Jihova pü sa ketalü püphü merhüyi; süo hako kengo zhopo kozo.
english: and killed the Prince of life, whom God raised from the dead, to which we are witnesses.

chokri: Pü zalü kemelülü püza melü keyilü thüma hio thipü meco süte, neko se mu ngobate, kemelü khapü püyo ba keyila püthipü neko metü mhüjülü vetsütso süte.
english: By faith in his name has his name made this man strong, whom you see and know. Yes, the faith which is through him has given him this perfect soundness in the presence of you all.

chokri: Tsühi, azüneko, neko kemelolü mhatho hiko thi kesü I seba, mu nekopi kezhoko sheri.
english: "Now, brothers, I know that you did this in ignorance, as did also your rulers.

chokri: Vele mha hiko Jihova saju kepoko talü thaka metazo, Khrista kemezhe keto, pü süko thitsü süte.
english: But the things which God announced by the mouth of all his prophets, that Christ should suffer, he thus fulfilled.

chokri: Neko süla thelü rede yite, neko tala vorite, size neko kephomako vayi ketola, relü thsizi keti tüpü Niepoo celü vori ketola.
english: "Repent therefore, and turn again, that your sins may be blotted out, so that there may come times of refreshing from the presence of the Lord,

chokri: Jisu Khrista ketsüpü neko ce sü keto po metha (se) süzo.
english: and that he may send Christ Jesus, who was ordained for you before,

chokri: Mhako uthilü vori tsoyi kemothe püpo tüyo bazo, Jihova saju kepo kemesako talü popü meta mha hiko metü cejü thiyi culü.
english: whom heaven must receive until the times of restoration of all things, which God spoke long ago by the mouth of his holy prophets.

chokri: Kekrelamori Moses sheri ukrü utsüpumiko cepoti, neko sazü jüra dolü Niepoo neko Rüo saju kepopü khapü neko tsüto, abi ketipü. Neko püfü metüko reni yite pü neko ce kedipü poto sheli.
english: For Moses indeed said to the fathers, 'The Lord God will raise up a prophet for you from among your brothers, like me. You shall listen to him in all things whatever he says to you.

chokri: Thüma sopüno saju kepo süofü renimu ta sheli süo thümako dolü pa cele vato.
english: It will be, that every soul that will not listen to that prophet will be utterly destroyed from among the people.'

chokri: Saju kepoko metü, Samuel celü vo süsaco ketso tsüdo tühi po tazo.
english: Yes, and all the prophets from Samuel and those who followed after, as many as have spoken, they also told of these days.

chokri: Neko saju kepo süko nuneko zo, mu Jihova züde kejütsü kejükho keyi uko poneko zo, Abraham, I nshuyeyo thejo khapü cejülü shuyekoyo keye süto.
english: You are the children of the prophets, and of the covenant which God made with our fathers, saying to Abraham, 'In your seed will all the families of the earth be blessed.'

chokri: Jihova pü theküo phü merhü kesüsa, pü ketsüpü neko ce sü keratho thisü, jopü neko tsüsü ketola, neko mha kesukolü neko rede keyiko metü.
english: God, having raised up his servant, Jesus, sent him to you first, to bless you, in turning away everyone of you from your wickedness."

chokri: Uni thümako ce jüpo kebalü thevoko, kereshüce kekha ketiko, mu Sadducees uni cevori.
english: As they spoke to the people, the priests and the captain of the temple and the Sadducees came to them,

chokri: Jisu kesalü rhüla sü keta uni popü thümako metha ba keta sepü uko nümo shuta.
english: being upset because they taught the people and proclaimed in Jesus the resurrection from the dead.

chokri: Uko tavori de uni tüpü tüso süsanha ketso khapü bata, kekrelamori theva ketala.
english: They laid hands on them, and put them in custody until the next day, for it was now evening.

chokri: Vele thüma jüo reni keyiko melüyita, piphi thüma süko nye püngu.
english: But many of those who heard the word believed, and the number of the men came to be about five thousand.

chokri: Sü sanha uko mipi kekha ketiko, mehimiko, mu mhakeseko tavo Jerusalem lü kenguyi.
english: It happened in the morning, that their rulers, elders, and scribes were gathered together in Jerusalem.

chokri: Anna pethi kezhoo, Caiaphas, John, mu Alexander, mu thevoo cekroko.
english: Annas the high priest was there, with Caiaphas, John, Alexander, and as many as were relatives of the high priest.

chokri: Uni khapü uko dolü metsulü sü, de uni ketsoti, neni kedipü kekulü mori sopü zalü mhatho hihi thisüta?
english: When they had stood them in the middle of them, they inquired, "By what power, or in what name, have you done this?"

chokri: Süsa Peter Kemesa Rüpü po püchu püde poti, ne thüma kekhayo tiko mu Israel mehi miko.
english: Then Peter, filled with the Holy Spirit, said to them, "You rulers of the people, and elders of Israel,

chokri: Mhace neko tha tüso hilü hani mhatho keve thi pü renga keta thüma hiyo kesü senyü lize, dipü colü pü thimeve süta sheri.
english: if we are examined today concerning a good deed done to a crippled man, by what means this man has been healed,

chokri: Neko metü seyite, mu Israel miko metü, Jisu Khrista Nazareth mi zalü ho, neko püpü gu kevao, Jihova püphü merhü süte, pü zalü thüma hio neko dolü vede tha bate.
english: be it known to you all, and to all the people of Israel, that in the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth, whom you crucified, whom God raised from the dead, in him does this man stand here before you whole.

chokri: Jisu hio neko cekethiko pü kha keva tsüo süo khipü pükülü tsüo thiketao.
english: He is 'the stone which was regarded as worthless by you, the builders, which has become the head of the corner.'

chokri: Kelakeyi mharapüri ta mozo, kekrelamori tükhro thüma dolü kelakeyi thüza kekrepüri tamo zo tila.
english: There is salvation in none other, for neither is there any other name under heaven, that is given among men, by which we must be saved!"

chokri: Tsühi uko Peter mu John ni kethepu ngo de lükeyi uni mhasemo mu maho mizo side uko ngo bata, uko sekeyi uni Jisu zütayo.
english: Now when they saw the boldness of Peter and John, and had perceived that they were unlearned and ignorant men, they marveled. They recognized that they had been with Jesus.

chokri: Kerenga thümao uni zü tha ketha pe de uko mhapüri pü uni mejo keto thiyi suta.
english: Seeing the man who was healed standing with them, they could say nothing against it.

chokri: Vele uko po kesü unipo kehu khü prata no sü, side utho uko dolü kerethi bata.
english: But when they had commanded them to go aside out of the council, they conferred among themselves,

chokri: Uko kepode uko uniyo kedipü thita? Kekrelamori ungo mhatho kemelepü thipü Jerusalem lü kehüko mese mengo süte; mu uko süo mole sizi yi hote.
english: saying, "What shall we do to these men? Because indeed a notable miracle has been done through them, as can be plainly seen by all who dwell in Jerusalem, and we can't deny it.

chokri: Vele süo keyepü thüma dolü süsa mo ketola, uko uni kethi kedü va khe; unipo thüza hio posapü mipü ceri sümo ketola.
english: But so that this spreads no further among the people, let's threaten them, that from now on they don't speak to anyone in this name."

chokri: Uko uni cüsü de unice poti Jisu za posa ho mu pü mi metha ri hino sü.
english: They called them, and charged them not to speak at all nor teach in the name of Jesus.

chokri: Vele Peter mu John ni ukofü kelasü de poti Jihova mhüjülü püfü kereni ceri nekofü kezü pütüku tome moshi, nekotho lü phite.
english: But Peter and John answered them, "Whether it is right in the sight of God to listen to you rather than to God, judge for yourselves,

chokri: Kekrelamori ha zowe ha kese kengo mhathoko pomo taho.
english: for we can't help telling the things which we saw and heard."

chokri: Uni kethikedü kevasa uni kha süva, uniyo kemejo thiyi su ketala, kekrelamori thüma krokola; thümako metü Jihova chu zapozale thibata, mhatho thi kesüo la.
english: When they had further threatened them, they let them go, finding no way to punish them, because of the people; for everyone glorified God for that which was done.

chokri: Kekrelamori kerenga thüma süo püyo zasi mu ungo mhatho thi kesürho kesüo pü kehüzho tütse heda ketala ri sa.
english: For the man on whom this miracle of healing was performed was more than forty years old.

chokri: Uko khasü kevasa uni ta ukromice vota, de tavo ukoce thevoko mu mehiko unice dipü pota sheri metüpü posü.
english: Being let go, they came to their own company, and reported all that the chief priests and the elders had said to them.

chokri: Uko süko sekeyice metü lüpü thide se Jihova ce süta, uko poti, Niepoo no Jihova zo, tü mu cejü thi kesüo, jü kezho mu sükolü ketako metü.
english: When they heard it, they lifted up their voice to God with one accord, and said, "O Lord, you are God, who made the heaven, the earth, the sea, and all that is in them;

chokri: No nthekü David talü kepo, dipüla therüna miko ulü reda baya, mu thümako kemethu lü baya?
english: who by the mouth of your servant, David, said, 'Why do the nations rage, And the peoples plot a vain thing?

chokri: Cejülü kedemiko uthalü tha, mikekha ketiko vo kebupü, uko Niepoo metsu toli, mu pü Khristao (Messiah) sheri.
english: The kings of the earth take a stand, And the rulers take council together, Against the Lord, and against his Christ.'

chokri: Kekrelamori nade hilü Herod mu Pontius Pilate-e kenani, Judah kemoko pü Israel thümako sa, uko kezüde ntheküo Kemesa Jisu metsu, no kenhü keyio.
english: For truly, in this city against your holy servant, Jesus, whom you anointed, both Herod and Pontius Pilate, with the Gentiles and the people of Israel, were gathered together

chokri: Kekrelamori nbepü thisü toli süculü lü mu rhüpü ketako.
english: to do whatever your hand and your council foreordained to happen.

chokri: Tsühi Niepoo uko thedü füko pe süte, thepu de poyi keto khapü ntheküko tsü süte.
english: Now, Lord, look at their threats, and grant to your servants to speak your word with all boldness,

chokri: Nbe chopü thi kesürho keyi zasiko mu ungo mhathoko nnu kemesa Jisu zalü thisü ketola.
english: while you stretch out your hand to heal; and that signs and wonders may be done through the name of your holy Servant Jesus."

chokri: Uko side kecho thi kebace uko keba thethilü renata, uko metü Kemesa Rüpü po uchu de uko thepulü Jihova jü po tata.
english: When they had prayed, the place was shaken where they were gathered together. They were all filled with the Holy Spirit, and they spoke the word of God with boldness.

chokri: Melü keyi makro kezüde thipü phopü mu lüpü thita, mori uko mhakebakopü utho uzhüle siti pori mota; vele mhakebako khipü zhürhü thita.
english: The multitude of those who believed were of one heart and soul. Not one of them claimed that anything of the things which he possessed was his own, but they had all things in common.

chokri: Apostleko keku kezhopü Niepo Jisu rhülasüketa zhopo thita, ngokemezhe uko metüyo ba shuta.
english: With great power, the apostles gave their testimony of the resurrection of the Lord Jesus. Great grace was on them all.

chokri: Mori uko dolü kedi ketsakhu basa mota, kekrelamori uce mu ucejü kebamiko zhuyi ta, mha zhu keyiko presa pü vori.
english: For neither was there among them any who lacked, for as many as were owners of lands or houses sold them, and brought the proceeds of the things that were sold,

chokri: Süko püvo apostleko phelü sü, kezapü mipüpü khimo kesubi uko tsüsü.
english: and laid them at the apostles' feet, and distribution was made to each, according as anyone had need.

chokri: Joses püza tho kedepü Barnabas thi kesüo, (püco thelü tho kemenü nu); pü Levi mipü, pü Cyprus rünalü vori.
english: Joses, who by the apostles was surnamed Barnabas (which is, being interpreted, Son of Encouragement), a Levite, a man of Cyprus by race,

chokri: Pü cejü kebao zhuyi de presa pü vori de pü apostleko phelü sü.
english: having a field, sold it, and brought the money and laid it at the apostles' feet.

chokri: Vele mipü za Ananias mu pücemi za Sapphira uni mhapü zhuyi.
english: But a certain man named Ananias, with Sapphira, his wife, sold a possession,

chokri: Püma hu sipü mezüta, pücemi sheri süo sezo, kedopü pü vori, süo khapü apostleko phelü sü.
english: and kept back part of the price, his wife also being aware of it, and brought a certain part, and laid it at the apostles' feet.

chokri: Vele Peter unice poti, Ananias no dipüla Satan po nmelü thipü Kemesa Rüpü kedo tole zita, side yimako hu mesho khapü mezüta?
english: But Peter said, "Ananias, why has Satan filled your heart to lie to the Holy Spirit, and to keep back part of the price of the land?

chokri: Hijü nbelü ketace nzhüzo mome? Yi süo zhu keyice ri süsü nza zo mome, mo ntho nmedo zo mome? Ditole nmelülü mha hiziti medo yita? No thümace meda keba zo mori Jihova ce meda bate.
english: While you kept it, didn't it remain your own? After it was sold, wasn't it in your power? How is it that you have conceived this thing in your heart? You haven't lied to men, but to God."

chokri: Ananias süo sesü mu metha retu tsüta, de pü rüpü kha süva; theju süo keseko metü mpe shuta.
english: Ananias, hearing these words, fell down and died. Great fear came on all who heard these things.

chokri: Khresako tavo süo juyi de pütata, de pü püvo chozu khrüva.
english: The young men arose and wrapped him up, and they carried him out and buried him.

chokri: Bavüdo sü vo ketasa, pücemi sübi ketako semode tavori.
english: About three hours later, his wife, not knowing what had happened, came in.

chokri: Peter theno süpüce poti, Cejü zhu keyi ma tsüko zome? Ace posüte, Thenopü poti ile, tsüzu zole.
english: Peter answered her, "Tell me whether you sold the land for so much." She said, "Yes, for so much."

chokri: Süsa Peter püce pode, Kedipü bide neni kenani medo kerhüde Kemesa Rüpü Niepoo medo phi tole zita? Hihe, nnopu püvo khrü kevako phezi cekhalü lürizü, mu uko npüvo tato.
english: But Peter asked her, "How is it that you have agreed together to tempt the Spirit of the Lord? Behold, the feet of those who have buried your husband are at the door, and they will carry you out."

chokri: Sisücu thenopü retu püphelü kita de sata, khresako talü püngo de sa ketala püpü tata, de püvo pü nopu kekhrü thice khrüva.
english: She fell down immediately at his feet, and died. The young men came in and found her dead, and they carried her out and buried her by her husband.

chokri: Kehucelü metü mpe phita, mu süo kesekhü mi metü meche phita.
english: Great fear came on the whole assembly, and on all who heard these things.

chokri: Mu apostleko belü zasi mu ungo mhatho thipü thümako dolü sü shuta, uko metü kezü pü thide Solomon cehükhro bazo.
english: By the hands of the apostles many signs and wonders were done among the people. They were all with one accord in Solomon's porch.

chokri: Kekremiko uko zü kemekro mpeta, vele thümako uko pomeve phita.
english: None of the rest dared to join them, however the people honored them.

chokri: Sizo sheri kemelümiko pü Niepoo krolü sayi bazo, thepu miko sheri mu theno miko sheri thüma kekro.
english: More believers were added to the Lord, multitudes of both men and women.

chokri: Side kethi miko püvo chopü kolü, thezi koyo, theba koyo, khapü mezü, ketsatho lüri Peter khri po sükoyo va sü ketola, pü ta kevoce.
english: They even carried out the sick into the streets, and laid them on cots and mattresses, so that as Peter came by, at the least his shadow might overshadow some of them.

chokri: Jerusalem khü mhüko lü nadekolü makro tavorita, kethi miko züde, mu therü kesupo ukebü ketako sheri, uko mipüpü ti thi kesürho sü.
english: Multitudes also came together from the cities around Jerusalem, bringing sick people, and those who were tormented by unclean spirits: and they were all healed.

chokri: Süsa thevo kezhoo uko mejo sürita, mi püzü kebako metü, Saduceeko uko krünyü süta.
english: But the high priest rose up, and all those who were with him (which is the sect of the Sadducees), and they were filled with jealousy,

chokri: Uko tüpü thejüce kolü süta.
english: and laid hands on the apostles, and put them in public custody.

chokri: Vele tüyo Niepoo choyi miko tüzülü thejüceko cekha khri süta, de uko zü prarita;
english: But an angel of the Lord opened the prison doors by night, and brought them out, and said,

chokri: Side uko cepoti, ta kereshücelü vote mu thümako ce kehü hio po süte.
english: "Go stand and speak in the temple to the people all the words of this life."

chokri: Uko süo seyi metha keshu rüna ta kereshücelü vota, side mi metha bata. Vele thevo kezhoo mu püzü kebako tavori de kehuko cüsü, mu Israelmi kekha ketako ketsüpü thejücelü sü de uko tüyi ketola.
english: When they heard this, they entered into the temple about daybreak, and taught. But the high priest came, and those who were with him, and called the council together, and all the senate of the children of Israel, and sent to the prison to have them brought.

chokri: Vele thejücelü kezhoko tavori tice thejücelü uko phu medita, uko bamote side pota.
english: But the officers who came didn't find them in the prison. They returned and reported,

chokri: Thejüce khapü meta zole, mu cekha kefüko tha bazo; vele hako cekha khrilü tice uko mipüri ba mote.
english: "We found the prison shut and locked, and the guards standing before the doors, but when we opened them, we found no one inside!"

chokri: Kereshücelü kezhoko mu thevo kezhoko süo seyi tice uko lü tsakhuta kedipü bitü ta sheri.
english: Now when the high priest, the captain of the temple, and the chief priests heard these words, they were very perplexed about them and what might become of this.

chokri: Süsa mipü tavori de poti, Hihe, neko tüpü thejücelü kesü thümako tavo kereshücelü sütha de mi metha bate.
english: One came and told them, "Behold, the men whom you put in prison are in the temple, standing and teaching the people."

chokri: Kereshücelü kezhoo mu kefüko tavo uko züyi, uko kehi kemu thi mode, kekrelamori thüma kekro ba tila süko mpe tade, ketsüpü uko vata yive tila.
english: Then the captain went with the officers, and brought them without violence, for they were afraid that the people might stone them.

chokri: Uko tüzüvo methi kehu mhüjülü sü de thevo kezhoo uko ketso.
english: When they had brought them, they set them before the council. The high priest questioned them,

chokri: Pü poti, hako nekoce posü mome? Nekopo thüma hio zalü mi metha hite sizide, vele Hihe, neko kemethajü khipü Jerusalem chu süte, thüma hio zapü hakoyo sü keto nekelü bate.
english: saying, "Didn't we strictly charge you not to teach in this name? Behold, you have filled Jerusalem with your teaching, and intend to bring this man's blood on us."

chokri: Süsa Peter mu apostleko po kelakesü, Hako thüma jü kezüo ceri Jihova jüzü thimo suku.
english: But Peter and the apostles answered, "We must obey God rather than men.

chokri: Upotsaneko Rüo Jisu phü merhü süte, neko püpü süyo gude dokhri kevao.
english: The God of our fathers raised up Jesus, whom you killed, hanging him on a tree.

chokri: Jihova püthi kerekrüpü püzaco Kede mu Kelakeyio thi süte, Israel mikopo thelü redeyi ketola, de kephoma vayi ketola.
english: God exalted him with his right hand to be a Prince and a Savior, to give repentance to Israel, and remission of sins.

chokri: Hako hio kese kengo zhopoko zo, mu Kemesa Rüpü sheri, Jihova khapü püfü kezüko tsü kesü.
english: We are His witnesses of these things; and so also is the Holy Spirit, whom God has given to those who obey him."

chokri: Uko süo sekesüce uko melü thishuta side uko dokhri va keto lü rhüta.
english: But they, when they heard this, were cut to the heart, and determined to kill them.

chokri: Süce Pharisee mipü Gamaliel, thezho kesemi, miri pürho phiyo, tha de poti, apostleko khapü dopü bate.
english: But one stood up in the council, a Pharisee named Gamaliel, a teacher of the law, honored by all the people, and commanded to put the apostles out for a little while.

chokri: Ukocepoti, Ne Israel thümako neko menu yite, neko thüma hiko pü kedipü thenyü ba sheri.
english: He said to them, "You men of Israel, be careful concerning these men, what you are about to do.

chokri: Kekrelamori hijü vapü Theudas tasüri, püri mipü zoleti kemüha sü; thüma krada mesüpü püzü kesajita; süo dokhri ve, mu thüma püsa meji ketako phova side süko ba mote.
english: For before these days Theudas rose up, making himself out to be somebody; to whom a number of men, about four hundred, joined themselves: who was slain; and all, as many as obeyed him, were dispersed, and came to nothing.

chokri: Thüma süo salü Judas süri Galilee lü khazhonu kekhrü tüce, thüma kekro püsa meji ta; pü sheri dite, thüma dithedü püsaji thita sheri süko metü pre dite.
english: After this man, Judas of Galilee rose up in the days of the enrollment, and drew away some people after him. He also perished, and all, as many as obeyed him, were scattered abroad.

chokri: Tsühi, I nekoce po keto süze, nekobe kelayite thüma hikoyo, uko khasü vate, mhace mharhü mori mhatho hio thüma celü vori tisa ditato.
english: Now I tell you, withdraw from these men, and leave them alone. For if this counsel or this work is of men, it will be overthrown.

chokri: Vele mhace Jihova celü vori tisa, neko süo meniyiho; neko Jihova züde kemetsu tazo to tila.
english: But if it is of God, you will not be able to overthrow it, and you would be found even to be fighting against God!"

chokri: Uko pükepo züta, side uko apostleko cüpü vüva, side ukopo Jisu zapü posa hino kekhava, de uko kha süva.
english: They agreed with him. Summoning the apostles, they beat them and charged them not to speak in the name of Jesus, and let them go.

chokri: Uko methi kehulü ta prata, uko püzalü kemenga keti thizüzo tila uko rethu de tata.
english: They therefore departed from the presence of the council, rejoicing that they were counted worthy to suffer dishonor for Jesus' name.

chokri: Tüsonha kereshücelü mu celükolü Jisu Khrista pü mimetha keti tümo zo bata.
english: Every day, in the temple and at home, they never stopped teaching and preaching Jesus, the Christ.

chokri: Hitüce pü sajiko kro prari ketala Greekmiko Hebrewmiko yo panyo süta, kekrelamori uko nopü sameko rele lümo ketala tüsonha mha keza tilü.
english: Now in those days, when the number of the disciples was multiplying, a complaint arose from the Grecian Jews against the Hebrews because their widows were neglected in the daily service.

chokri: Süsa mi kerikenako saji makroko cüsü de ukoce poti, hako Jihova jü khameta de mizlü renaba ketosü püco bamo.
english: The twelve summoned the multitude of the disciples and said, "It is not appropriate for us to forsake the word of God and serve tables.

chokri: Azüneko, süla neko dolü thüma keve thüna phuyite, Kemesa Rüpü uchu keti mu mhase timi, uko süko po mhatho hilü peyi ketola.
english: Therefore select from among you, brothers, seven men of good report, full of the Holy Spirit and of wisdom, whom we may appoint over this business.

chokri: Vele hako zono kecholü mu zhopolü hatü khasü bazoto.
english: But we will continue steadfastly in prayer and in the ministry of the word."

chokri: Jü süo thüma metü unüta, uko side Stephen kedayi, Kemesa Rüpü uchupü mu kemelü keve; Philip, Prochorus, Niconor, Timon, Parmenas, Nicolas (Antioch mi Greek mi vele Judah zho zü ketami) hiko kedayi.
english: These words pleased the whole multitude. They chose Stephen, a man full of faith and of the Holy Spirit, Philip, Prochorus, Nicanor, Timon, Parmenas, and Nicolaus, a proselyte of Antioch;

chokri: Süko züvo apostleko mhüjülü sü, side uko ubechopü ukoyo süde kecho thisü.
english: whom they set before the apostles. When they had prayed, they laid their hands on them.

chokri: Jihova jü makehe keye vota, thüma kekro Jerusalem lü saji thishu vorita, thevomi kekro ri kemelü jüzü thi vorita.
english: The word of God increased and the number of the disciples multiplied in Jerusalem exceedingly. A great company of the priests were obedient to the faith.

chokri: Stephen keku mu kemelü neshu, de zasi ungo mhathoko thipü thümako dolü süta.
english: Stephen, full of faith and power, performed great wonders and signs among the people.

chokri: Side thüma kropü synagogue lü Ukekhakedi Cyrenemi, Alexandriami, Ciliciami mu miko Stephen zü keprüli bata.
english: But some of those who were of the synagogue called "The Libertines," and of the Cyrenians, of the Alexandrians, and of those of Cilicia and Asia arose, disputing with Stephen.

chokri: Vele uko püzü ketüyi hota kekrelamori mhase mu Kemesa Rüpü lü pü mhapo ketakola.
english: They weren't able to withstand the wisdom and the Spirit by which he spoke.

chokri: Süsa uko kemekhrülü thümahu hüsü de ukopo poti Hako pü Moses jüko Jihova tha keti sele sizita.
english: Then they secretly induced men to say, "We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses and God."

chokri: Side uko thümako hüsü, mu mehiko, lesi keseko, pü metsu vorita; side pü tüzü methi kehulü vo.
english: They stirred up the people, the elders, and the scribes, and came against him and seized him, and brought him in to the council,

chokri: Kemeda zhopo thi de poti, thüma hio thethi kemesahio mu thezho thalice.
english: and set up false witnesses who said, "This man never stops speaking blasphemous words against this holy place and the law.

chokri: Kekrelamori hako pü kepo sewe, Jisu Nazareth mi thethi hio thimesu vatole zi, mu Moses zho khapü uketsüko thikede vatolezi.
english: For we have heard him say that this Jesus of Nazareth will destroy this place, and will change the customs which Moses delivered to us."

chokri: Methi kehulü kebako metü püpe türü thipü bata, püzü kengoce tüyo choyimi zü bide ngota.
english: All who sat in the council, fastening their eyes on him, saw his face like it was the face of an angel.

chokri: Süsa thevo kerekrüo pü ketso de poti, mha süko ketho zome?
english: The high priest said, "Are these things so?"

chokri: Pü poti, thümako mu asazü jürako, aponeko, reni süte; Jihova zapozale kethio upotsa Abraham mengosü, pü Mesopotamia lü kebace, pü Charran lü kehü mhüjü.
english: He said, "Brothers and fathers, listen. The God of glory appeared to our father Abraham, when he was in Mesopotamia, before he lived in Haran,

chokri: Püce poti, n rünalü mu n cekrolü tapra tate, de ta cejü I thapü nmeka sü ketolü vo tate.
english: and said to him, 'Get out of your land, and from your relatives, and come into a land which I will show you.'

chokri: Süsa pü ta Chaldean cejülü vori, de Haran lü hü bata. Püpo sa ketasa, Jihova püpo rede tavo tsü keba thethi hiolü hüta.
english: Then he came out of the land of the Chaldaeans, and lived in Haran. From there, when his father was dead, God moved him into this land, where you are now living.

chokri: Sülü kalüzhü mhapüri khapü pü tsümo, phezi düpüri khasü mozo; sizo sheri jükha kesü püpo süo yitole sisü, püshupüye pori, süketso pünu di.
english: He gave him no inheritance in it, no, not so much as to set his foot on. He promised that he would give it to him for a possession, and to his seed after him, when he still had no child.

chokri: Jihova püce kepo, nnuneko cejü sekemolü revüvotato; uko tavo mijü thitato, side mipo uko meshu süto tütse kradapü.
english: God spoke in this way: that his seed would live as aliens in a strange land, and that they would be enslaved and mistreated for four hundred years.

chokri: Shuye nekopü thejü kethio I pe süto, Jihova posü, süsalü uko taprarito, side thethi hilü achoyi thito.
english: 'I will judge the nation to which they will be in bondage,' said God, 'and after that will they come out, and serve me in this place.'

chokri: Pü yikerü khapü uko tsüsü; mu Abraham Isaac ngoyi, zho tütha nha püyi rüsü: Isaac Jacob menuyi, mu Jacob upotsaneko mi kerikena menusü.
english: He gave him the covenant of circumcision. So Abraham became the father of Isaac, and circumcised him the eighth day. Isaac became the father of Jacob, and Jacob became the father of the twelve patriarchs.

chokri: Upotsaneko püngo ukorode Joseph tüpü zhuva Egypt mice, vele Jihova püzüta.
english: "The patriarchs, moved with jealousy against Joseph, sold him into Egypt. God was with him,

chokri: Pü kemezhe zori pü kelayi, mhase pü pütsüsü mu Pharoah Egypt kedeo po püngo unüyi, side püthipü Angh thisü Egypt cejü metülü mu pücelü zo sheri.
english: and delivered him out of all his afflictions, and gave him favor and wisdom before Pharaoh, king of Egypt. He made him governor over Egypt and all his house.

chokri: Egypt mu Canaan cejü metülü kemekre vorita, kemezhe shuta, upotsaneko keti kekra ngoyi hota;
english: Now a famine came over all the land of Egypt and Canaan, and great affliction. Our fathers found no food.

chokri: Vele Jacob sekeyi Egypt lü ketico bati sesü, pü uponeko ketsü sü therao va.
english: But when Jacob heard that there was grain in Egypt, he sent out our fathers the first time.

chokri: Va kenalü Joseph püpü püjürako mesesü, Joseph cekroko püvo Pharaoh mengosü.
english: On the second time Joseph was made known to his brothers, and Joseph's race was revealed to Pharaoh.

chokri: Joseph uko ketsüpü pücekroko mu püpo Jacob cüyi ta, mi hethüna püngu.
english: Joseph sent, and summoned Jacob, his father, and all his relatives, seventy-five souls.

chokri: Süla Jacob ta Egypt lü kita, side sülü püri mu upotsaneko ri sülü sata.
english: Jacob went down into Egypt, and he died, himself and our fathers,

chokri: Uko mo püvo Shechem lü khrüva, Abraham mhakhre thi Hammor nuneko ce presapü khri keyi thilü.
english: and they were brought back to Shechem, and laid in the tomb that Abraham bought for a price in silver from the children of Hamor of Shechem.

chokri: Vele jüpopü kemeta pütü tso keyice, Jihova Abraham ce popü kemetajü, thümako ma kro sürita Egypt lü.
english: "But as the time of the promise came close which God had sworn to Abraham, the people grew and multiplied in Egypt,

chokri: Kede kekrepü Joseph sekemopü sürita.
english: until there arose a different king, who didn't know Joseph.

chokri: Pü ushuye yo thedo püde uponekopo ununeko kegüdü vanota, side ukopo sata ketola.
english: The same took advantage of our race, and mistreated our fathers, and forced them to throw out their babies, so that they wouldn't stay alive.

chokri: Pütü sülü Moses menuyi, züve rizo, tekhri sü püpo celü theküba.
english: At that time Moses was born, and was exceedingly handsome. He was nourished three months in his father's house.

chokri: Püpü kegü düva, süce Pharoah nupü pü püvo pünu thide theküyi.
english: When he was thrown out, Pharaoh's daughter took him up, and reared him as her own son.

chokri: Moses Egypt lü mhaseko seyi, jülü sheri mu mhatholü sheri kushu.
english: Moses was instructed in all the wisdom of the Egyptians. He was mighty in his words and works.

chokri: Pü tütse heda ketace pümelülü tavo pücekroko Israel miko pesü nyüsata.
english: But when he was forty years old, it came into his heart to visit his brothers, the children of Israel.

chokri: Mipü meshu ba keta ngode püsa thasü ketilü Egypt mipü kekhu va.
english: Seeing one of them suffer wrong, he defended him, and avenged him who was oppressed, striking the Egyptian.

chokri: Pükelüce pü cekromiko Jihova pükhrühi süde uko kelakeyi seyi totho ziri uko süo seyi mota,
english: He supposed that his brothers understood that God, by his hand, was giving them deliverance; but they didn't understand.

chokri: Süsanha pü tavo uko mhüngo thisü mu mikena kezheba ngo, pü unipo kezüveta nyüde unice poti, azüneko neko sazüjüra zole, ditole hunehu nükemo thiba?
english: "The day following, he appeared to them as they fought, and urged them to be at peace again, saying, 'Sirs, you are brothers. Why do you wrong one another?'

chokri: Vele mipü püzanuo nümo thikebao tasü Moses khupü düva, de poti, sopü nthipü hani ne mpe hani kekha keti thisü?
english: But he who did his neighbor wrong pushed him away, saying, 'Who made you a ruler and a judge over us?

chokri: No adokhri va tolime? No ndo Egypt mipü yo thi kesübi.
english: Do you want to kill me, as you killed the Egyptian yesterday?'

chokri: Süsa jü hio keselü Moses takhi Median cejülü ta vota, sülü thepumi kena menuyi.
english: Moses fled at this saying, and became a stranger in the land of Midian, where he became the father of two sons.

chokri: Tütse heda tso ketasa, tüyo Niepoo choyi mipü Sinai cejütuyo nhatsalü sübopü meto keba melipülü püzü kerethi.
english: "When forty years were fulfilled, an angel of the Lord appeared to him in the wilderness of Mount Sinai, in a flame of fire in a bush.

chokri: Moses süo kengoce püngo thita, pü taphe süo petole menophe, Niepoo füphra pü meseta.
english: When Moses saw it, he wondered at the sight. As he came close to see, a voice of the Lord came to him,

chokri: Sülü poti, I npotsaneko Rüo, Abraham Rüo, Isaac Rüo, mu Jacob Rüo. Süsa Moses meprüpü reshüta, side pe mpe ta.
english: 'I am the God of your fathers, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob.' Moses trembled, and dared not look.

chokri: Süsa Niepoo püce poti, npheyo npheku phrü vate, kekrelamori no thakeba thethilü mesa tila.
english: The Lord said to him, 'Take your sandals off of your feet, for the place where you stand is holy ground.

chokri: Athümako Egypt lü methi meni keba I ngo bate, uko panyo kebakori I se süte, süla I taki uko kelayi ketola kirizü. Tavote, I nketsüpü Egypt lü sü ketola.
english: I have surely seen the affliction of my people that is in Egypt, and have heard their groaning. I have come down to deliver them. Now come, I will send you into Egypt.'

chokri: Moses hio uko pü mela kevao, sopü npo hako sheketi mu hako kekha keto thisü? Thüma süo Jihova pü ketsüpü uko kekha mu uko kela tozü, tüyo choyio sünhyo lü pü mengo kesüo bepü uko kela süto.
english: "This Moses, whom they refused, saying, 'Who made you a ruler and a judge?'--God has sent him as both a ruler and a deliverer by the hand of the angel who appeared to him in the bush.

chokri: Pü uko zü prasü, Egypt cejülü zasiko mu ungo mhathoko thipü mekasü, Kemere jü kezholü, mu rayho thilü tütse hedako.
english: This man led them out, having worked wonders and signs in Egypt, in the Red Sea, and in the wilderness for forty years.

chokri: Hiohi Moses Israel mikoce po kebao, Niepoo neko Rüo neko dolü saju kepopü khapü neko tsü süto, abi tipü, neko püfü reni yite.
english: This is that Moses, who said to the children of Israel, 'The Lord our God will raise up a prophet for you from among your brothers, like me.'

chokri: Hiohi püzo, nhatsalü kehuko zü ketao, tüyo choyimi Sinai cejütulü jüpo kesüo, upotsa neko zü ketao, jüpo kese khapü utsü kesüo.
english: This is he who was in the assembly in the wilderness with the angel that spoke to him on Mount Sinai, and with our fathers, who received living oracles to give to us,

chokri: Upotsa neko püfü zümu keta, sizo mori pü khupü düva, uko melüpü Egypt lü latsüta.
english: to whom our fathers wouldn't be obedient, but rejected him, and turned back in their hearts to Egypt,

chokri: Uko Aaron cepode, therü marheko thipü hako mhüjülü süte, kekrelamori Moses hio Egypt cejülü hako züpra kesüo püyo dipü bita sheri hako semote.
english: saying to Aaron, 'Make us gods that will go before us, for as for this Moses, who led us out of the land of Egypt, we don't know what has become of him.'

chokri: Pütü sülü uko methonepü thiyi, side uko kereshü thipü marhe reshüta, side ukobe mhathopü uko rechüta.
english: They made a calf in those days, and brought a sacrifice to the idol, and rejoiced in the works of their hands.

chokri: Vele Jihova ukoyo renüta, side uko khapü tüyo ketako reshüta, süo thajü saju kepoko lesilü thopü metati, O Israel cekroko, neko khonu kesamo khapü areshü tome, tütse hedako dolü nhatsalü ketace?
english: But God turned, and gave them up to serve the host of the sky, as it is written in the book of the prophets, 'Did you offer to me slain animals and sacrifices Forty years in the wilderness, O house of Israel?

chokri: Thiyi hozole, neko kereshüce thipü Moloch tsü, tüyo thenyüko rüo Raphan, neko therü hiko thipü reshü; süla I neko celepü Babylon saco süvato.
english: You took up the tent of Moloch, The star of your god Rephan, The figures which you made to worship. I will carry you away beyond Babylon.'

chokri: Upotsaneko nhatsalü kereshüce zhopo thi vori, püpo thi süno püce kepoko Moses mengosü mu püpo uhü sübi thinosü.
english: "Our fathers had the tent of the testimony in the wilderness, even as he who spoke to Moses commanded him to make it according to the pattern that he had seen;

chokri: Upotsaneko Joshua züde süo püvori, uko Rüo shuyeko hu keva tüce. Süo khapü metazo tavo David ketso.
english: which also our fathers, in their turn, brought in with Joshua when they entered into the possession of the nations, whom God drove out before the face of our fathers, to the days of David,

chokri: Jihova David ngo pünüyi Jacob cekroko züde thethi pülü hü keto phu sünosü.
english: who found favor in the sight of God, and asked to find a habitation for the God of Jacob.

chokri: Vele Solomon pula cepü thisü.
english: But Solomon built him a house.

chokri: Sizosheri Kerekrütho-o no thebepü kethi kereshücelü hü yomo, saju keseko kepobi.
english: However, the Most High doesn't dwell in temples made with hands, as the prophet says,

chokri: Tüsü akedeba, cejüsü aphezho, neko kedipü ce thipü atsüta? Niepoo sizipo, mori thethi ala kerelü dipü ba?
english: 'heaven is my throne, And the earth a footstool for my feet. What kind of house will you build me?' says the Lord; 'Or what is the place of my rest?

chokri: Abe mha metü hiko thisü mome?
english: Didn't my hand make all these things?'

chokri: Neko neküyi kehoko umelü uni yirü kemoko, neko pütü metülü Kemesa Rüpü nümo thi süyo, neko potsa neko bi neko ri sizi süyo.
english: "You stiff-necked and uncircumcised in heart and ears, you always resist the Holy Spirit! As your fathers did, so you do.

chokri: Saju kesekoyo nepotsaneko sopü methi kemo ba? Uko Ketho kemezio vori keto kepoko dokhri tsosüte, tsühi neko püpü zhu kevako mu pü dokhri kevakozo.
english: Which of the prophets didn't your fathers persecute? They killed those who foretold the coming of the Righteous One, of whom you have now become betrayers and murderers.

chokri: Neko kedapü tüyo choyio thezho khakesüko thi mu zü ketola, vele neko thi mu züyi mote. (Ketsüpü Stephen zhe)
english: You received the law as it was ordained by angels, and didn't keep it!"

chokri: Uko süko se kesüce uko melü thizode püyo uko hu thezhe püyi.
english: Now when they heard these things, they were cut to the heart, and they gnashed at him with their teeth.

chokri: Vele pü Kemesa Rüpüpo püchu püyi de tüyo pe türü bata, mu Jihova zapozale kethi ngosü, Jisu Jihova zaco keba ngo.
english: But he, being full of the Holy Spirit, looked up steadfastly into heaven, and saw the glory of God, and Jesus standing on the right hand of God,

chokri: Pü poti, Hihe, I tüko khri kesü ngo bate, Themanuo Jihova zaco sütha thate.
english: and said, "Behold, I see the heavens opened, and the Son of Man standing at the right hand of God!"

chokri: Uko füphra meto shudeuko niko meka yita, ukometü kezü püthide püyo ta vota.
english: But they cried out with a loud voice, and stopped their ears, and rushed at him with one accord.

chokri: Pü tüpü nade saco prata, ketsüpü püva, uko füneko khapü khresamipü phece kha mezü, püza Saul.
english: They threw him out of the city, and stoned him. The witnesses placed their garments at the feet of a young man named Saul.

chokri: Uko ketsüpü Stephen zhe, Pü kecho thide, “Niepo Jisu arüpü püyi tate.”
english: They stoned Stephen as he called out, saying, "Lord Jesus, receive my Spirit!"

chokri: Pü chütüyi, sesü, “Niepoo kephoma hio pü ukoyo sü hite.” Pü jü süo posü mu züta.
english: He kneeled down, and cried with a loud voice, "Lord, don't hold this sin against them!" When he had said this, he fell asleep.

chokri: Saul kedokhri hio pü medo zole siziba. Pütü süce Jerusalem lü kehuko methi shuta, uko metü tapre Judea, Samaria, khü umhükolü vota; apostleko lebi zota.
english: Saul was consenting to his death. A great persecution arose against the assembly which was in Jerusalem in that day. They were all scattered abroad throughout the regions of Judea and Samaria, except for the apostles.

chokri: Kemathoko Stephen püvo khrü va, de uko püla thekri thisü.
english: Devout men buried Stephen, and lamented greatly over him.

chokri: Saul lano kehupo kerekra thi, cepüpülü talü de thepu miri mu theno miri tüpü thejü celü sü.
english: But Saul ravaged the assembly, entering into every house, and dragged both men and women off to prison.

chokri: Süla uko pre ta ketako jüo zhopo thi vota.
english: Therefore those who were scattered abroad went around preaching the word.

chokri: Süsa Philip ta Samaria nadelü ki, sülü Khrista zhopo thipü ukoce sü.
english: Philip went down to the city of Samaria, and proclaimed to them the Christ.

chokri: Thümako lüpü thi Philip pokesüko unü shude reniyi, pü ungo mhatho thi kesükori ngo mu reniyi.
english: The multitudes listened with one accord to the things that were spoken by Philip, when they heard and saw the signs which he did.

chokri: Kekrelamori mesakemo rüpüko semeto de ukoyo ketakoyo taprata, lasako mu pheyho miko kekro thi kesürhosü.
english: For unclean spirits came out of many of those who had them. They came out, crying with a loud voice. Many who had been paralyzed and lame were healed.

chokri: Nade sülü thümako rethu shuta.
english: There was great joy in that city.

chokri: Vele thümapü süce ba püza Simon, nade sülü kemedu thenyü thiyo, Samaria thümako po pü melü phiyo, side püpü thüma kezho mipü zole sibayo.
english: But there was a certain man, Simon by name, who used to practice sorcery in the city, and amazed the people of Samaria, making himself out to be some great one,

chokri: Pü füko reni mu zü tayo thüma kezhotholü ki kenitho ketso, thüma hio Therü kezhoo keku khiyo side melüba.
english: to whom they all listened, from the least to the greatest, saying, "This man is that great power of God."

chokri: Pü thenyü medukola pütü kecho thümakopo pü melü mu pürho tayo.
english: They listened to him, because for a long time he had amazed them with his sorceries.

chokri: Vele Philip Jihova kede kethi mu Jisu Khrista zapü zhopo thi kesüko melü ketala uko jülopüyi, thenokori mu thepukori.
english: But when they believed Philip preaching good news concerning the Kingdom of God and the name of Jesus Christ, they were baptized, both men and women.

chokri: Simon sheri melü yita, pü jülopü keyice pü Philip sameji de ungo mhathoko mu zasi thi kesüko pepü pü mahüthi püngo thita.
english: Simon himself also believed. Being baptized, he continued with Philip. Seeing signs and great miracles occuring, he was amazed.

chokri: Tsühi apostleko Jerusalem lü kebako Samaria lü sheri Jihova jüko melüyi keta sesü, uko Peter mu John ni ketsüsü.
english: Now when the apostles who were at Jerusalem heard that Samaria had received the word of God, they sent Peter and John to them,

chokri: Uni taki keyice ukola kecho thisü, Kemesa Rüpü ukopo ngoyi ketola.
english: who, when they had come down, prayed for them, that they might receive the Holy Spirit;

chokri: Kemesa Rüpü sütüce uko mipü yori vo molu, uko Niepo Jisu yolü jülopü keyi zolu tila.
english: for as yet he had fallen on none of them. They had only been baptized in the name of Christ Jesus.

chokri: Süsa unibe chopü ukoyosü, side uko Kemesa Rüpü ngoyi.
english: Then they laid their hands on them, and they received the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Simon apostleni ngoti unibe chopü miyo süze Kemesa Rüpü kha mitsü kesü ngo, süla pü presapü uni tsüsü.
english: Now when Simon saw that the Holy Spirit was given through the laying on of the apostles' hands, he offered them money,

chokri: Unice poti, keku hio khapü asheri tsü süte, side apo abe chopü miyo kesüce mipori Kemesa Rüpü ngoyi ketola.
english: saying, "Give me also this power, that whoever I lay my hands on may receive the Holy Spirit."

chokri: Vele Peter püce pode n presapo nzü shü tate, kekrelamori nlü kelü presapü Kemesa Rüpü khri keyi kelüla.
english: But Peter said to him, "May your silver perish with you, because you thought you could obtain the gift of God with money!

chokri: No hilü kesa keto mori nzari bamo, kekrelamori nkelü Jihova mhüjülü mezi kemola.
english: You have neither part nor lot in this matter, for your heart isn't right before God.

chokri: Süla no mhakesu hilü thelü rede yite, side Jihova ce kecho thi yite, mhace nkelü kesu hiolü nkejo vayiri sehomo.
english: Repent therefore of this, your wickedness, and ask God if perhaps the thought of your heart may be forgiven you.

chokri: Kekrelamori nmelülü kekhu mu kesu kelü ba, mesakemopo nphapü ta.
english: For I see that you are in the gall of bitterness and in the bondage of iniquity."

chokri: Süsa Simon pode, ala Niepoo ce kecho thisüte, nkepoko püpori ayo vorimo ketola.
english: Simon answered, "Pray for me to the Lord, that none of the things which you have spoken happen to me."

chokri: Uni sülü Niepoo jü zhopo thi kevasa ta sala Jerusalem lü khota, Jüyikeve pü Samaria rüna kekrolü zhopo thi sü.
english: They therefore, when they had testified and spoken the word of the Lord, returned to Jerusalem, and preached the Gospel to many villages of the Samaritans.

chokri: Tüyo Niepoo choyimi Philip cepode, Tasüte, de ta Jerusalem mekhroco Gaza lü kite, kesacejü lü.
english: But an angel of the Lord spoke to Philip, saying, "Arise, and go toward the south to the way that goes down from Jerusalem to Gaza. This is a desert."

chokri: Pü tasü süco vota, Hihe, mipü Ethiopiami, phove mipü, Candace kedepü celü kezho kekutho mipü, cene metü kekhi mipü, pü Jerusalem lü kho de kereshü thi.
english: He arose and went; and behold, there was a man of Ethiopia, a eunuch of great authority under Candace, queen of the Ethiopians, who was over all her treasure, who had come to Jerusalem to worship.

chokri: Ta sala vo tazü, gura gariyo ta, de Isaiah saju kese lesiko phrita.
english: He was returning and sitting in his chariot, and was reading the prophet Isaiah.

chokri: Süsa Kemesa Rüpü Philip cepode, Ta meno phete, side ta gura gariyo kute.
english: The Spirit said to Philip, "Go near, and join yourself to this chariot."

chokri: Philip tasü pücephe, pü Isaiah phri keta sesü, süla püce poti, no phri keta se bame?
english: Philip ran to him, and heard him reading Isaiah the prophet, and said, "Do you understand what you are reading?"

chokri: Püpode, dipübi seyita, humi ace posü kemosa? Philip po püzüde gura gariyo ku püzü bayite sita.
english: He said, "How can I, unless someone explains it to me?" He begged Philip to come up and sit with him.

chokri: Pü phri keta süo hiohi, tekonu kedokhri bi püzüvo, tekonu püma kebümi mhüjülü kemekre kethabi, püta taga chemo.
english: Now the passage of the Scripture which he was reading was this, "He was led as a sheep to the slaughter. As a lamb before his shearer is silent, So he doesn't open his mouth.

chokri: Püthi zhoshu kesülü kemezilü thimo, somi pü nushünuye poyi veta? Kekrelamori pü kerhüro cejülü khipü tate.
english: In his humiliation, his judgment was taken away. Who will declare His generation? For his life is taken from the earth."

chokri: Phoveo Philip cepode, saju kepoo sopüju poba? Pütho püju me mode thüma kekre ju poba?
english: The eunuch answered Philip, "Who is the prophet talking about? About himself, or about someone else?"

chokri: Süsa Philip püta taga de püce poti, lesi sülü shudü thide po, side Jisu ju posü.
english: Philip opened his mouth, and beginning from this Scripture, preached to him Jesus.

chokri: Uni cholü tavo kezüce, jü süce keba ngoyi; phoveo püce poti, Hihe, hice jü bale, apo jülo kepü khati bamotho?
english: As they went on the way, they came to some water, and the eunuch said, "Behold, here is water. What is keeping me from being baptized?"

chokri: Philip püce poti, no nmelü metü khi melüyi ta tisa no jülo püyive. Pü poti, Jisu Khrista Jihova nuzo, I melüte.
english: And Philip said, If thou believest with all thine heart, thou mayest. And he answered and said, I believe that Jesus Christ is the Son of God.

chokri: Pü gura gari po thayite zisü, uni kenani ta jülü lü, Philip mu Phoveo ni, side püpü jülo püsü.
english: He commanded the chariot to stand still, and they both went down into the water, both Philip and the eunuch, and he baptized him.

chokri: Uni jülü taprari, Kemesa Rüpü Philip khipü tata, phoveo püngo samota, mu pü cholü pünü rechü de ta vota.
english: When they came up out of the water, the Spirit of the Lord caught Philip away, and the eunuch didn't see him any more, for he went on his way rejoicing.

chokri: Vele Philip tavo Azotus lü mipo püngoyi, pü ta kevo nadekolü zhopo thi vota, tavo Caesarea lü tsoyi kemothe.
english: But Philip was found at Azotus. Passing through, he preached the Gospel to all the cities, until he came to Caesarea.

chokri: Sütüce Saul thedüfü phra mu kedokhri thita, Niepoo saji mikoyo, ta thevo kezhoo ce vode;
english: But Saul, still breathing threats and slaughter against the disciples of the Lord, went to the high priest,

chokri: Pücelü lesi pü Damascus lü ki Synagogues (kereshüce) kolü mhace thüma humi Choo lü keta ngoyi lize, thenomi sheri mori thepumi sheri pü süko tüzü Jerusalem lü vori ketola.
english: and asked for letters from him to the synagogues of Damascus, that if he found any who were of the Way, whether men or women, he might bring them bound to Jerusalem.

chokri: Pü revü Damascus kemenoce vori, rekri tüyo kevepü tatsü pükhü metü va vekrüta;
english: As he traveled, it happened that he got close to Damascus, and suddenly a light from the sky shone around him.

chokri: Pü retu cejü kita, pü mhafüpü püce kepo se, Saul, Saul, no ditole ameshu ta?
english: He fell on the earth, and heard a voice saying to him, "Saul, Saul, why do you persecute me?"

chokri: Mu pü poti, Niepoo no sopü? Niepoo puce poti, I Jisu no meshu ketao, no phechopü tsahu mesü keti nla rüshü zoto?
english: He said, "Who are you, Lord?" The Lord said, "I am Jesus, whom you are persecuting.

chokri: Pü reshü zode mpe püngo thi bata, Niepoo no apo kedipü thita? Niepoo puce poti, Tasüte, de ta nadelü kite, mu npo kedipü thino sheri nce po süto.
english: But rise up, and enter into the city, and you will be told what you must do."

chokri: Püzü revü keta thümako mhapüri poyisu bata, thefü-o se, vele mipüri ngomo.
english: The men who traveled with him stood speechless, hearing the sound, but seeing no one.

chokri: Saul cejü retu kezülü tasüri, pü mhürho süri, pü mhapüri ngo mota; vele uko pübe süsayi, side püzü Damascus lü ki.
english: Saul arose from the ground, and when his eyes were opened, he saw no one. They led him by the hand, and brought him into Damascus.

chokri: Pü zhosü mhangomo bata, mhari timo, jüri kramo.
english: He was without sight for three days, and neither ate nor drank.

chokri: Damascus lü kemelümipü ba, püza Ananias, Niepoo zümholü pücepo, Ananias side pücü, pü I hiceba, (we sisü) Niepoo.
english: Now there was a certain disciple at Damascus named Ananias. The Lord said to him in a vision, "Ananias!" He said, "Behold, it's me, Lord."

chokri: Niepoo püce po, Tasüte, ta chopü Straight (chokemezi) lü kite, Judas cekromi mipü püza Saul, Tarsus lü kevori mipü, ketso vote, kekrelamori pü kecho thi bate.
english: The Lord said to him, "Arise, and go to the street which is called Straight, and inquire in the house of Judas for one named Saul, a man of Tarsus. For behold, he is praying,

chokri: Pü zümholü mipü Ananias leno tavo pübe chopü püyosü, püpo mhangoyi tate sitha tingo.
english: and in a vision he has seen a man named Ananias coming in, and laying his hands on him, that he might receive his sight."

chokri: Süsa Ananias püfü kelasü, Niepoo I thüma kekro celü thüma hio ju seti pü Jerusalem lü kemesakoyo mhakesüshu thipü süti se;
english: But Ananias answered, "Lord, I have heard from many about this man, how much evil he did to your saints at Jerusalem.

chokri: Thüma hiceko la pü thevoko celü keku choyi de nza kecüko metü tüyi ketola.
english: Here he has authority from the chief priests to bind all who call on your name."

chokri: Vele Niepoo püce pode tavote, kekrelamori I pükedapü amhabü thitole ba, aza khipü Jewmi kemokoce, kedekoce, mu Israel nunekoce posü ketola.
english: But the Lord said to him, "Go your way, for he is my chosen vessel to bear my name before the nations and kings, and the children of Israel.

chokri: Kekrelamori I püpo ala kemezhe ketoko thapü püka süto.
english: For I will show him how many things he must suffer for my name's sake."

chokri: Süla Ananias tavo de ta pücelü lü, pübe chopü püyosü, Asazüo, Saul, Niepoo Jisu cholü no tavori kezüce nmengo kesüo, aketsüsüle, npo nmhü mhangoyi ketola, Kemesa Rüpü po nchu yite.
english: Ananias departed, and entered into the house. Laying his hands on him, he said, "Brother Saul, the Lord, who appeared to you on the road by which you came, has sent me, that you may receive your sight, and be filled with the Holy Spirit."

chokri: Sisü metha pümhülü mhakra retu keta thide pü mhango yita, tasü de jülo püyi.
english: Immediately something like scales fell from his eyes, and he received his sight. He arose and was baptized.

chokri: Pü mhati keyisa püthi kemetüyi. Süsa pütühu Damascus lü kemelü miko züde kemekroba.
english: He took food and was strengthened. Saul stayed several days with the disciples who were at Damascus.

chokri: Pü mezi Khrista zhopo thita Synagogues (kereshüce) kolü, pü Jihova nuzole sita.
english: Immediately in the synagogues he proclaimed the Christ, that he is the Son of God.

chokri: Vele püfü keseko uko ngo bata, Jerusalem lü püza kecükoyo mhathi mesu uko methimeni keta thüma hio zo mome? Süo thi keto kelüla mu uko tüpü thevoko ce vo ketola mome?
english: All who heard him were amazed, and said, "Isn't this he who in Jerusalem made havoc of those who called on this name? And he had come here intending to bring them bound before the chief priests!"

chokri: Vele Saul pü keku neku prata, mu Jews miko zü kemetsu ta Damascus lü kehüko, hiohi Khrista zoleti pota.
english: But Saul increased more in strength, and confounded the Jews who lived at Damascus, proving that this is the Christ.

chokri: Tüsozho kekro saco Jews miko pü dokhri va keto rhü bata.
english: When many days were fulfilled, the Jews conspired together to kill him,

chokri: Vele uko Saul re de rizo thi keba se vorita, uko tüso tüzü pü dokhri va ketola kharü kolü püfü re bata.
english: but their plot became known to Saul. They watched the gates both day and night that they might kill him,

chokri: Süla sajiko tüzülü püpü merhalü khasüde kharücelü metsa süva.
english: but his disciples took him by night, and let him down through the wall, lowering him in a basket.

chokri: Pü Jerusalem lü vokeyice sajiko züde bata, vele uko metü pü methi bata; uko kemelü mipü thi keta uko melü mota.
english: When Saul had come to Jerusalem, he tried to join himself to the disciples; but they were all afraid of him, not believing that he was a disciple.

chokri: Vele Barnabas tavo püzü sajiko dolü vori, side pü cholü Niepoo zü kesüti ukoceposü. Side pü kedipü bide Damascus lü thepu shude Jisu ju po kesü kori sa posü.
english: But Barnabas took him, and brought him to the apostles, and declared to them how he had seen the Lord in the way, and that he had spoken to him, and how at Damascus he had preached boldly in the name of Jesus.

chokri: Pü Jerusalem lü ukozü tapra talü thi ba. Pü Jisu Niepoo zole ti thepu shude püza po bata,
english: He was with them entering into Jerusalem,

chokri: Side Greek miko (Hellenist) zü ketü bata, vele uko pü dokhri va keto rhüta.
english: preaching boldly in the name of the Lord. He spoke and disputed against the Grecian Jews, but they were seeking to kill him.

chokri: Kemelüko süo se keyice püzü Caesarea lü vota, side pü ketsüpü Tarsus lü süva.
english: When the brothers knew it, they brought him down to Caesarea, and sent him off to Tarsus.

chokri: Sübide kehuko Judea, Galilee mu Samaria kolü tarho thi kethepu sü, ukopo Niepoo mpe de pü chothalü hü, Kemesa Rüpü thelü tho melu ketilü uko kro prata.
english: So the assemblies throughout all Judea and Galilee and Samaria had peace, and were built up. They were multiplied, walking in the fear of the Lord and in the comfort of the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Peter hitüce kemelüko dolü tapra talü thi bayo, pü ta Lydda lü kehüko kemelü kocevo.
english: It happened, as Peter went throughout all those parts, he came down also to the saints who lived at Lydda.

chokri: Sülü mipüza Aeneas siti ba, püzilü tütse tütha zütata, lasa kethi thide.
english: There he found a certain man named Aeneas, who had been bedridden for eight years, because he was paralyzed.

chokri: Peter pücepode, Aeneas! Jisu Khrista nthi nve sütaho, Tasütate, de nzi püyite. Sizi sü metha pü tasüta.
english: Peter said to him, "Aeneas, Jesus Christ heals you. Get up and make your bed!" Immediately he arose.

chokri: Lydda mu Sharon lü kehüko sü ngode Niepoo melüyita.
english: All who lived at Lydda and in Sharon saw him, and they turned to the Lord.

chokri: Tabitha, kemelü mipü Joppa lü hüyo, püzaco Dorcas; theno hipü mhakeve thi shuyo mu mhakha mitsü shuyo.
english: Now there was at Joppa a certain disciple named Tabitha, which when translated, means Dorcas. This woman was full of good works and acts of mercy which she did.

chokri: Sizi tavo mhathita, de sata; uko jüpü pükhrüva de khapü cemesoyo kha mezü.
english: It happened in those days that she fell sick, and died. When they had washed her, they laid her in an upper chamber.

chokri: Lydda Joppa kemenoce ba, kemelüko seketi Peter sülü bale sesü, uko mikena ketsüpü pücesü, püpo tamhai ukoce vorino posü.
english: As Lydda was near Joppa, the disciples, hearing that Peter was there, sent two men to him, imploring him not to delay in coming to them.

chokri: Süsa Peter tasüde uko züvota. Pü ta ukoce vori mu uko püzüde cemesolü ku, samepüko metü pükri kraba, bola mu fümene püthi kesüko kha pü mekaba, pü rhü kebace kethiko.
english: Peter got up and went with them. When he had come, they brought him into the upper chamber. All the widows stood by him weeping, and showing the coats and garments which Dorcas had made while she was with them.

chokri: Vele Peter uko metüpo chozu prata, chütüyi de kecho thisü; Pü kesamo ce taphe de pü cüsü, Tabitha! Tasürite. Pü mhürho sürita, tasü Peter ngoyi, de bayita.
english: Peter put them all out, and kneeled down and prayed. Turning to the body, he said, "Tabitha, get up!" She opened her eyes, and when she saw Peter, she sat up.

chokri: Pübepü pücesüthasü, kemelü miko mu samepüko cüsü de pü merhüpü uko tsüsü.
english: He gave her his hand, and raised her up. Calling the saints and widows, he presented her alive.

chokri: Joppa lü kehüko metü süo sede Niepoo melüyi.
english: And it became known throughout all Joppa, and many believed in the Lord.

chokri: Pü tüsozho kekro Joppa lü bata, Simon thiyi kethi mipü celü.
english: It happened, that he stayed many days in Joppa with one Simon, a tanner.

chokri: Thümapü Cornelius ziti Caesarea lü tayo, Italimi paheko krapi kezho thiyo.
english: Now there was a certain man in Caesarea, Cornelius by name, a centurion of what was called the Italian Regiment,

chokri: Thüma kematho, pücekro metü khipü Jihova khrimeprü tayo, mha mechü khapü mitsü miza shuyo tipü, pütü metülü kecho thi bayo.
english: a devout man, and one who feared God with all his house, who gave gifts for the needy generously to the people, and always prayed to God.

chokri: Pü zümholü tüyo Jihova choyimipü ngo keba thecüce (sü), de süo püce poti, Hei, Cornelius.
english: At about the ninth hour of the day, he clearly saw in a vision an angel of God coming to him, and saying to him, "Cornelius!"

chokri: Pü tosüpe de mpeta, Niepoo dipüla? Püce poti, Nkechoko mu nmhazako rekrata keto sekho Jihova mhüjülü vote.
english: He, fastening his eyes on him, and being frightened, said, "What is it, Lord?" He said to him, "Your prayers and your gifts to the needy have gone up for a memorial before God.

chokri: Thümahu ketsüpü Joppa lü süte, Simon püza thopü Peter thi ketao cüsüte.
english: Now send men to Joppa, and get Simon, who is surnamed Peter.

chokri: Pü thiyi kethimipü Simon celü baho, püce jükezho khüceba, pü npo dipü thiti mesü sheri posüto.
english: He lodges with one Simon, a tanner, whose house is by the seaside."

chokri: Tüyo choyi Cornelius ce po kevasa pü thekümi kejütho püfüsü kebami kena ketsüsü.
english: When the angel who spoke to him had departed, Cornelius called two of his household servants and a devout soldier of those who waited on him continually.

chokri: Pü sekeyiko metü pü ukoce posü de uni ketsüpü Joppa lü sü.
english: Having explained everything to them, he sent them to Joppa.

chokri: Süsanha uni cholü tavozü, vo nade menoyi, Peter keba thecüce (theva keba süce) cetuyo vo kecho thi ketola.
english: Now on the next day as they were on their journey, and got close to the city, Peter went up on the housetop to pray at about noon.

chokri: Pü merita de mhatinyü ketala uko keredetha, süce pü renyüta.
english: He became hungry and desired to eat, but while they were preparing, he fell into a trance.

chokri: Pü tükhri kesü ngo, mhabüpü retu püce kiri, küda kethi fü püyo cejü lü kiri.
english: He saw heaven opened and a certain container descending to him, like a great sheet let down by four corners on the earth,

chokri: Sülü khonu pheda kepü cejülü gu ketako, thiko, tüyo rako metü ta.
english: in which were all kinds of four-footed animals of the earth, wild animals, reptiles, and birds of the sky.

chokri: Füphrapü püce vori, Peter tasü de dokhri tite.
english: A voice came to him, "Rise, Peter, kill and eat!"

chokri: Vele Peter poti, Hole, Niepoo; I mhapü ceri mesakemo keho tiyo mozole.
english: But Peter said, "Not so, Lord; for I have never eaten anything that is common or unclean."

chokri: Vakenao füphrao püce posala, Jihova thi mesa kesüo no po merho hite.
english: A voice came to him again the second time, "What God has cleansed, you must not call unclean."

chokri: Hihi vasü thipü pü mengosü, mhabü süo khipü tüyo khota.
english: This was done three times, and immediately the vessel was received up into heaven.

chokri: Peter zümho mha süo püco dipüle sheri pü lü kebace, Cornelius thüma ketsü kesüni Simon ce ketso vorita, de cekhrice thatha.
english: Now while Peter was very perplexed in himself what the vision which he had seen might mean, behold, the men who were sent by Cornelius, having made inquiry for Simon's house, stood before the gate,

chokri: Uni Simon Peter lezi ketao ketsode cesülü balemhame.
english: and called and asked whether Simon, who was surnamed Peter, was lodging there.

chokri: Peter zümhoco lü kebace, Hihe, misü nphu züho.
english: While Peter was pondering the vision, the Spirit said to him, "Behold, three men seek you.

chokri: Tasüte, de taki uko zü vote, mhapüri lü kedodu hite kekrelamori I uko ketsü sü tila.
english: But arise, get down, and go with them, doubting nothing; for I have sent them."

chokri: Süsa Peter taki Cornelius thüma ketsü kesüko ceki, de poti Hihe, I neko phukevori-o le, kedipüla neko aphu vorizüa?
english: Peter went down to the men, and said, "Behold, I am he whom you seek. Why have you come?"

chokri: Uko püce pode, Cornelius thipahe krapi kezhoo thüma kejütho, Jihova mpe, Judah miko dolü pomeve shuyo tipü, tüyo choyi kemesami püce poti thüma ketsüpü ncüsü de npo ta püce vono süle, side püpo dipü thino sheri jüko reniyi no bale.
english: They said, "Cornelius, a centurion, a righteous man and one who fears God, and well spoken of by all the nation of the Jews, was directed by a holy angel to invite you to his house, and to listen to what you say."

chokri: Süsa Peter thüma süko cüpü celü sü de ukopo sülü bata. Süsanha Peter uko züde ta vota, mu Joppa lü kemelü miko hu püzü tavo.
english: So he called them in and lodged them. On the next day Peter arose and went out with them, and some of the brothers from Joppa accompanied him.

chokri: Süsanha uko tavo Caesarea tsoyi. Cornelius uko füba, pücekro miko mu pü khrethoko cüsü kenguyi.
english: On the next day they entered into Caesarea. Cornelius was waiting for them, having called together his relatives and his near friends.

chokri: Peter tavori zütice Cornelius tavo püzü kesü, side neküki püphece pü reshüta.
english: When it happened that Peter entered, Cornelius met him, fell down at his feet, and worshiped him.

chokri: Vele Peter püphü mesüsü, de poti, sütha yite; I sheri thüma zole.
english: But Peter raised him up, saying, "Stand up! I myself am also a man."

chokri: Püzü tade kerethi vozü, pü talü thüma kekro kengupü keba ngoyi.
english: As he talked with him, he went in and found many gathered together.

chokri: Pü ukoce poti, Jew mipü thüma kekremi zü kemekroyo kemo neko ri seba, mori ta shuye kekremi ce voyo kemo sheri; vele Jihova amengo de ace poti, apo mipü sheri popü mesakemomi mori matu kehomi si hino süle.
english: He said to them, "You yourselves know how it is an unlawful thing for a man who is a Jew to join himself or come to one of another nation, but God has shown me that I shouldn't call any man unholy or unclean.

chokri: Süla I mhapüri kechodu mozode tavorizü, aketsü kesübi, süla neko kedipü kelüla acüsüa?
english: Therefore also I came without complaint when I was sent for. I ask therefore, why did you send for me?"

chokri: Cornelius poti, zhoda vo ketace, tsütü mesücehi, basüce, (thecü) I cetuyo mevo de kecho thi kebace, mipü vekrü zode fü kemega be akhüce thatha.
english: Cornelius said, "Four days ago, I was fasting until this hour, and at the ninth hour, I prayed in my house, and behold, a man stood before me in bright clothing,

chokri: Pü ace poti, Cornelius nkecho se bate, mu no mhapü mitsü miza keti rekra taketo Jihova mhüjülü vote.
english: and said, 'Cornelius, your prayer is heard, and your gifts to the needy are remembered in the sight of God.

chokri: Thüma ketsüpü Joppa lü süte, Simon püza thopü Peter thi kevao cü süte, pü Simon thiyi kethio celü baho jükezho poce, pü tavori ze npo dipü thito sheri posüto.
english: Send therefore to Joppa, and summon Simon, who is surnamed Peter. He lodges in the house of Simon a tanner, by the seaside. When he comes, he will speak to you.'

chokri: Rekri I thüma ketsüsü, mu no vori ketahi veshute. Hice hako metü Jihova mhüjülü bate, Jihova posü ketoko reni ketola.
english: Therefore I sent to you at once, and it was good of you to come. Now therefore we are all here present in the sight of God to hear all things that have been commanded you by God."

chokri: Peter püta chopü ukoce poti Jihova mipüri rho mekreyo kemo kethozo.
english: Peter opened his mouth and said, "Truly I perceive that God doesn't show favoritism;

chokri: Vele shuye kehopülü sheri sopüno pü mpe mu kemezilü mhathi yo sheri pü sümizüyiyo.
english: but in every nation he who fears him and works righteousness is acceptable to him.

chokri: Jihova jü khapü Israel nuneko tsü, Jisu Khrista kezükeve popü mi metha, Pü metüko pi Niepoo zo.
english: The word which he sent to the children of Israel, preaching good news of peace by Jesus Christ--he is Lord of all--

chokri: Jü süo neko metü sebate, Judea metülü po keye vote, Galilee lü John mipü jülompü keti zü zhopo shudü thi.
english: that spoken word you yourselves know, which was proclaimed throughout all Judea, beginning from Galilee, after the baptism which John preached;

chokri: Jihova dipü bide Kemesa Rüpü mu Keku pü Nazareth mi Jisu kenhüsü, pü mhakeve thishu, kethi miko thi kesürho sü, therü kesupo ukebü ketako thi mevesü, kekrelamori Jihova püzü ketala.
english: even Jesus of Nazareth, how God anointed him with the Holy Spirit and with power, who went about doing good and healing all who were oppressed by the devil, for God was with him.

chokri: Hako se mu ngo keti zhopo kozo, Jewmi cejülü mu Jerusalem lü; uko püpü süyo guva de pü dokhri ve.
english: We are witnesses of everything he did both in the country of the Jews, and in Jerusalem; whom they also killed, hanging him on a tree.

chokri: Jihova zhosünha püphü merhüve, side pü mhotsu mi mengosü.
english: God raised him up the third day, and gave him to be revealed,
