chokri: Süla ukepo thümapü kemelüla püthi kemathoyite, thezholü mhathoko la zomo.
english: We maintain therefore that a man is justified by faith apart from the works of the law.

chokri: Pü Judahmiko lebi la zome? Judahmi kemoko lari zo mome? Ile, Israelmi kemoko larizo.
english: Or is God the God of Jews only? Isn't he the God of Gentiles also? Yes, of Gentiles also,

chokri: Kese kengo Jihova sü pü lebizo, Kemelüla yikerümiko thikemezi yito, yirü kemoko ri kemelüla mezi yito.
english: since indeed there is one God who will justify the circumcised by faith, and the uncircumcised through faith.

chokri: Süsa kemelülü uthezhoko kha kemechü thiva tome? Sizi mozo, uthezhoko thi süyo.
english: Do we then nullify the law through faith? May it never be! No, we establish the law.

chokri: Uko süsa kedipü pota, uthi uphoco Abraham ukrü utsüpu-ola kedipü meve ba?
english: What then will we say that Abraham, our forefather, has found according to the flesh?

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace Abraham mhathola püthi kemezi yi ta lize süla kemeko mori zapozale thita lize, Jihova mhüjülü mozo.
english: For if Abraham was justified by works, he has something to boast about, but not toward God.

chokri: Kethojülü kedipü poba? Abraham no Jihova melü, süla pükhi kemathomi le side poyo
english: For what does the Scripture say? "Abraham believed God, and it was accounted to him for righteousness."

chokri: Tsühi mipü mhathola püzhokhro khapütsü süze süsü ngokemezhe lamo, thepo therü lamo vele pü ngoti mesü.
english: Now to him who works, the reward is not counted as grace, but as debt.

chokri: Vele mipü mhatho thimo zori pü kemelüla mezikemokolü püthi kemeziyi ta lize, kemelüla kemezimi thite.
english: But to him who doesn't work, but believes in him who justifies the ungodly, his faith is accounted for righteousness.

chokri: David ri thejo kepü thümao jupo, mhatho thimo zori Jihova püpü mezile zita.
english: Even as David also pronounces blessing on the man to whom God counts righteousness apart from works,

chokri: Somi kejo kemuko vava, somi kephomako whuva sheri suko mthejo kepütho.
english: "Blessed are they whose iniquities are forgiven, Whose sins are covered.

chokri: Thüma somi Niepoo püyo kephoma mi zimo ta sheri sümi thejo kepütho.
english: Blessed is the man whom the Lord will by no means charge with sin."

chokri: Thejo kepütho hihi popü yikerümi lebi yo süyome? Me popü yirükemomi yori süya? Upoti, Abraham kemelüla kemathomi le phriyite.
english: Is this blessing then pronounced on the circumcised, or on the uncircumcised also? For we say that faith was accounted to Abraham for righteousness.

chokri: Kedipü bide püsa phri yita? Püyi kerüce me? Püyi rükemolü ta? Püyi kerülü mo vele yirükemolü.
english: How then was it counted? When he was in circumcision, or in uncircumcision? Not in circumcision, but in uncircumcision.

chokri: Pü zasi ngokeyi yikerüpü kemelü kematho mohor vü pütsü, süce pü yirükemomi zolu püpo kemelümi po thi ketola; süko yirükemomi zo sheri: kematho süpü ukoyo sü ketola.
english: He received the sign of circumcision, a seal of the righteousness of the faith which he had while he was in uncircumcision, that he might be the father of all those who believe, though they be in uncircumcision, that righteousness might also be accounted to them.

chokri: Yikerüko po vele yikerüko lebimo, vele somi uko po Abraham kemelü cholü tayo sheri, sütüce pü yirü mozolu.
english: The father of circumcision to those who not only are of the circumcision, but who also walk in the steps of that faith of our father Abraham, which he had in uncircumcision.

chokri: Kekrelamori reshujü kha püketsü, püpo cejü kalü-o thitole zi, süsü khapü Abraham, mori püshuye ketsü thezho-ola mo; vele kemelü yo matho keyi lazo.
english: For the promise to Abraham and to his seed that he should be heir of the world wasn't through the law, but through the righteousness of faith.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace thezhola kalü thite zize, kemelü khipü kemechü thive; reshujü ri pü kemechü thisa vazo.
english: For if those who are of the law are heirs, faith is made void, and the promise is made of no effect.

chokri: Kekrelamori thezhola lekhuri vori, süla thezho kedira vajo keta bamo.
english: For the law works wrath, for where there is no law, neither is there disobedience.

chokri: Süla kemelüla ngokemezhe ngoyive, thelalü reshujü süpo pütsa metükoyo vo ketola; thezho keneko lebi yo zomo, vele Abraham kemelü kene metükoyo: püpo uko metü po thi ketola.
english: For this cause it is of faith, that it may be according to grace, to the end that the promise may be sure to all the seed, not to that only which is of the law, but to that also which is of the faith of Abraham, who is the father of us all.

chokri: Jihova mhüjülü u melü keta, pü kesami thi merhü süyo; mhapüri kedilü tsü kebakohi thisü.
english: As it is written, "I have made you a father of many nations." This is in the presence of him whom he believed: God, who gives life to the dead, and calls the things that are not, as though they were.

chokri: Melü rüshu zo sheri melü keyi kemeri, püpo shuye kekro po kethisü; pokesübi nshuye po süthito.
english: Who in hope believed against hope, to the end that he might become a father of many nations, according to that which had been spoken, "So will your seed be."

chokri: Kemelü thathi tamozo, püthipüphola zono tsühi kesami bita sheri, pü tütse krapüta mori Sara nobu sheri saketabi mechü keta lüsü.
english: Without being weakened in faith, he didn't consider his own body, already having been worn out, (he being about a hundred years old), and the deadness of Sarah's womb.

chokri: Jihova reshujü lüpü püvedi (tsüle) melükemo thi tamo, vele kemelü kushü bazo: zapozale pü Jihova tsü bazo.
english: Yet, looking to the promise of God, he didn't waver through unbelief, but grew strong through faith, giving glory to God,

chokri: Reshujü melütüde meji zovotso, Jihova pokesüo thiyi vezo sita.
english: and being fully assured that what he had promised, he was able also to perform.

chokri: Sizi keyila püpü kemathomile zita.
english: Therefore it also was "reckoned to him for righteousness."

chokri: Jüko tsühi tho kesü pülebila zomo,
english: Now it was not written that it was accounted to him for his sake alone,

chokri: Vele uko metüla, uko Niepo Jisu kesalü phumerhü kesü melü keyiko metü yo sizito.
english: but for our sake also, to whom it will be accounted, who believe in him who raised Jesus, our Lord, from the dead,

chokri: Uko kekri ketakola pü khasü, m uko pokemesa yiketola püphü merhülayi.
english: who was delivered up for our trespasses, and was raised for our justification.

chokri: Kemelü uthi kemeziyi ketala Niepo Jisu Khrista yono Jihova zü kezüve bate.
english: Being therefore justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ;

chokri: Kemelüyo upüce voyi de pü ngokemezhelü thate, kemeri keneyo rechü Jihova zapozale la.
english: through whom we also have our access by faith into this grace in which we stand. We rejoice in hope of the glory of God.

chokri: Sülebizomo, ukemethiko lüri zapozale khasüyo, kemethilü sügüsühe keti ngoyi ti useba.
english: Not only this, but we also rejoice in our sufferings, knowing that suffering works perseverance;

chokri: Sügüsühe tilü voketa mhase ngoyi, voketa mhaseko lü ukemeri ngoyi yo.
english: and perseverance, proven character; and proven character, hope:

chokri: Ukemeri sü thenga kha utsü yomo, kekrelamori Jihova kekhrü kha umelü keyoko Kemesa Rüpü püutsü sü.
english: and hope doesn't disappoint us, because God's love has been poured out into our hearts through the Holy Spirit who was given to us.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko kumo kebatüce, pütü tülü Khrista umesakemo kehülü zori ukola sasü.
english: For while we were yet weak, at the right time Christ died for the ungodly.

chokri: Kekrelamori khatho mipü kemesamila sari sütome shemo, sizosheri thüma kevemi la mpe mo zode sari yivezo.
english: For one will hardly die for a righteous man. Yet perhaps for a righteous person someone would even dare to die.

chokri: Vele Jihova pükekhrü kha umetso kesü uko phoma bazolu tilü Khrista ula sasü.
english: But God commends his own love toward us, in that while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us.

chokri: Sizitsü piri püzala uko thi kemeziva kethozo, uko pülano lekhulü ukelayite.
english: Much more then, being now justified by his blood, we will be saved from God's wrath through him.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace, uhijü püngomu thiketace, pünu sa kesüla u Jihova züde kezüveyi, siti lebimo pükerhüla ukelayite.
english: For if, while we were enemies, we were reconciled to God through the death of his Son, much more, being reconciled, we will be saved by his life.

chokri: Sülebimori u Niepo Jisu Khrista yono Jihova la kemeko unüyiyo, pü uphosü thi kesü ungoyi ketala.
english: Not only so, but we also rejoice in God through our Lord Jesus Christ, through whom we have now received the reconciliation.

chokri: Mhakekrelamori mipüyono kephoma cejü metülü vorita, süla kesari vori; m kesa thüma metüyo tata kekrelamori uko phoma ketala.
english: Therefore, as sin entered into the world through one man, and death through sin; and so death passed to all men, because all sinned.

chokri: Kephoma sü thezho mhüjü tazo, vele kephoma sü thüma mejo molu thezho kedila.
english: For until the law, sin was in the world; but sin is not charged when there is no law.

chokri: Sizitazo sheri kesasü Adam lü vo Moses ketso de tazo, thüma phomapü Adam kephoma bizo mo sheri, thümapü hü hisa voriketo pü bi.
english: Nevertheless death reigned from Adam until Moses, even over those whose sins weren't like Adam's disobedience, who is a foreshadowing of him who was to come.

chokri: Vele methu kha kesüsü pünümo kethi lamo. Kekrelamori mipü kekri kesüla thüma kekroyo kesa votasüze, Jihova ngokemezhe Jisu Khrista yo mechü kha uketsü süo ceri kroku keti mikekroyo bate.
english: But the free gift isn't like the trespass. For if by the trespass of the one the many died, much more did the grace of God, and the gift by the grace of the one man, Jesus Christ, abound to the many.

chokri: Mechü kha kesüo mipüyo kephoma vori ketao bimo. Sheco sheri kemejo meji vori ketabi, vele methu ketsü süo kejo kemu kekro thi kemeziyi ketola.
english: The gift is not as through one who sinned: for the judgment came by one to condemnation, but the free gift came of many trespasses to justification.

chokri: Kekrelamori mipüla kephoma upi kekha ketabi, ngokemezhe mechü kha kesülü uthi kemezi keyi Jisu Khrista yo u kehü süo ngoyi.
english: For if by the trespass of the one, death reigned through the one; so much more will those who receive the abundance of grace and of the gift of righteousness reign in life through the one, Jesus Christ.

chokri: Süla mipüvajo kevalü ukemejo sheco thüma metüyo vorita, sübide mipüla mechü kha kesü kemathoyo thüma metü thikemezi keyi kehü ri vori.
english: So then as through one trespass, all men were condemned; even so through one act of righteousness, all men were justified to life.

chokri: Kekrelamori mipü jüzü thimo ketala metüko kha kephomami thita, sübi mipü jüzü thi keyila thüma kekro thi kemathoyi to.
english: For as through the one man's disobedience many were made sinners, even so through the obedience of the one will many be made righteous.

chokri: Thezho vori ketala kejokemu krophita. Vele kephoma krota zori kekhrü (ngokemezhe) süpiri kroshüte.
english: The law came in besides, that the trespass might abound; but where sin abounded, grace did abound more exceedingly;

chokri: Kephomala kesa kede thita, siri ngokemezhe kematho kehülü Jisu Khristala Kechothe kede thi tato.
english: that as sin reigned in death, even so might grace reign through righteousness to eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.

chokri: Süsa ukedipü pota? Uko kephomalü basa tome, ngokemezhe po kroyi ketola?
english: What shall we say then? Shall we continue in sin, that grace may abound?

chokri: Suto, (kenitho) u kephomalü sate, u dipüthide sülü hüsa bata?
english: May it never be! We who died to sin, how could we live in it any longer?

chokri: Jülopükeyikhü u Jisu Khrista kesalü jülopüyi tati neko semo zome?
english: Or don't you know that all we who were baptized into Christ Jesus were baptized into his death?

chokri: Süla upüzüde pükesalü ukhrüve, Khrista kesalü rhüla sü püpo zapozale thisü, sübide uri kehükesalü ta keyi mesü.
english: We were buried therefore with him through baptism to death, that just like Christ was raised from the dead through the glory of the Father, so we also might walk in newness of life.

chokri: Kekrelamori usheri pükesazü upü lü kevala püzüde rhülari zoto.
english: For if we have become united with him in the likeness of his death, we will also be part of his resurrection;

chokri: Usekeba, uma kevüo kha püsa cross yo guve, kephomala umo satazoto, hilano ukephoma choyi thi hote.
english: knowing this, that our old man was crucified with him, that the body of sin might be done away with, so that we would no longer be in bondage to sin.

chokri: Kekrelamori mipü saketasü kephoma thisahote.
english: For he who has died has been freed from sin.

chokri: Tsühi mhace u Khrista züde sata lize, umelüketi püzüde rhüri zoto.
english: But if we died with Christ, we believe that we will also live with him;

chokri: Sekeba Khrista kesalü rhüla süketala sala sahote, kesa püpi de sa hote.
english: knowing that Christ, being raised from the dead, dies no more. Death no more has dominion over him!

chokri: Kekrelamori pü saketi kephomala vapü sa, vele pü kerhüsü Jihova la rhüyi.
english: For the death that he died, he died to sin one time; but the life that he lives, he lives to God.

chokri: Hibide nekori kephomala sato, vele Therüola rhüyito Jisu Khrista uko Niepoo lano.
english: Thus also consider yourselves also to be dead to sin, but alive to God in Christ Jesus our Lord.

chokri: Kephomapo nthinmoyo kede thihite, n menyüko jüzümo ketola.
english: Therefore don't let sin reign in your mortal body, that you should obey it in its lusts.

chokri: N moyo zatho kehopüri pü mezikemo thi kephomalü vota hite, vele kesalü rhüla kesü kehüpü hüte Therüola, nmo zathoko khi kemezilü Jihova mhanyo thite.
english: Neither present your members to sin as instruments of unrighteousness, but present yourselves to God, as alive from the dead, and your members as instruments of righteousness to God.

chokri: Kekrelamori kephoma npi de saho, no thezho khrikhro bamo ketala; vele ngokemezhe khrikhro bate.
english: For sin will not have dominion over you. For you are not under law, but under grace.

chokri: Süsa dipü? Kephoma thi tome, kekrelamori u thezho khrikhro bamote, vele ngokemezhe khro baketala?
english: What then? Shall we sin, because we are not under law, but under grace? May it never be!

chokri: Neko semo zome? No sopü füzüthi yoshi no pü thekümi tazo; kephomathi kesalü kevo tome mori kemezi jüzüthi de kerhülü voto sheli?
english: Don't you know that to whom you present yourselves as servants to obedience, his servants you are whom you obey; whether of sin to death, or of obedience to righteousness?

chokri: Vele Jihova meza, vapü no kephoma jüthi, vele nmelüpü nmetha kesüko jüzü thi vori takezüla.
english: But thanks be to God, that, whereas you were bondservants of sin, you became obedient from the heart to that form of teaching whereunto you were delivered.

chokri: Sizide kephomalü süphra püprari ketala no kematho cetami thite.
english: Being made free from sin, you became bondservants of righteousness.

chokri: I thüma zhorelelü poba, kekrelamori nthinmo kethathila; kekrelamori hiju vapü no nmozathoko pü kerholü mesakemo thi m thila ketabi; tsüo nmozathoko khi kemezilü sü keta kemesa cetami thi tate.
english: I speak in human terms because of the weakness of your flesh, for as you presented your members as servants to uncleanness and to wickedness upon wickedness, even so now present your members as servants to righteousness for sanctification.

chokri: Kekrelamori no kephoma ceta thi ketace, kemezi nkekha bamo.
english: For when you were servants of sin, you were free in regard to righteousness.

chokri: Süla no süce kemeve kedipü ngoya? Tsü sükola menga tate; mhasüko püthülalü kesa zo.
english: What fruit then did you have at that time in the things of which you are now ashamed? For the end of those things is death.

chokri: Vele tsühi, kephomalü nsüphra prarite; Jihova cetami thite, kemesase zhüyi, püthülaze kechothe kehü ngoyi.
english: But now, being made free from sin, and having become servants of God, you have your fruit of sanctification, and the result of eternal life.

chokri: Kekrelamori kephoma zhokhro sü kesazo; vele Jihova khakesü no kechothe kehü, Jisu Khrista u Niepoo yo ngoyi.
english: For the wages of sin is death, but the free gift of God is eternal life in Christ Jesus our Lord.

chokri: Neko semome, (I thezho kesekoce kepo) thezho khi mipü kehüthe pü kekhapü taya?
english: Or don't you know, brothers (for I speak to men who know the law), that the law has dominion over a man for as long as he lives?

chokri: Kekrelamori thenomipü pünopu rhükebathe thezhopo pü kekhapü tayo, vele pünopu sataze; thezhopo pü kekhapü ketao pünopu ceco phrüve.
english: For the woman that has a husband is bound by law to the husband while he lives, but if the husband dies, she is discharged from the law of the husband.

chokri: Süla mhace, pünopu rhüba zori thepu kekrepüce nhita lize sükhapü thepukezüpü ziyo; vele pünopu sata lize thezho pü phati ba mote: süla pü thepukezüpü mo, pü thepu kekrece nezori.
english: So then if, while the husband lives, she is joined to another man, she would be called an adulteress. But if the husband dies, she is free from the law, so that she is no adulteress, though she is joined to another man.

chokri: Sübide akhreazüko, nekori Khrista moyola thezholü sate; neko mikekrepüce nhi ceyo ri vete, süsü kesalü rhüla keyio, Jihova yo use zhüyi ketola.
english: Therefore, my brothers, you also were made dead to the law through the body of Christ, that you would be joined to another, to him who was raised from the dead, that we might bring forth fruit to God.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko uthiumo medolü hü ketace thezhoko uthipü kephoma reyo ketila umoyo zathoko khi kesa mhathoko thi tayo.
english: For when we were in the flesh, the sinful passions which were through the law, worked in our members to bring forth fruit to death.

chokri: Vele tsühi uko thezhoo mhüjü uko süphrayite, uko tüphapü keta-olü sa tayo; thezho kevü thopü kemeta yo mori kehü kesa rüpülü hü keti mesü.
english: But now we have been discharged from the law, having died to that in which we were held; so that we serve in newness of the spirit, and not in oldness of the letter.

chokri: Süsa uko kedipü pota? Thezhoo kephoma me? Motozo, I kephoma sü semo, vele thezho ace süo po süyo: uthi upho kemenyüsü I kedipü sheri semo, vele thezholü süsü po kesü, “No mha meho menyü ho” sisü.
english: What shall we say then? Is the law sin? May it never be! However, I wouldn't have known sin, except through the law. For I wouldn't have known coveting, unless the law had said, "You shall not covet."

chokri: Vele thezho süsü kesela pütü keve süpü apo mhakemeho kemenyü metü thi süyo. Thezhoo zo kemosa kephoma sü kesa zo.
english: But sin, finding occasion through the commandment, produced in me all kinds of coveting. For apart from the law, sin is dead.

chokri: Kekrelamori I vapü thezho sa mode hü, vele thezho kha kesü vorita, sizi kephoma sü ayo rhü vorita, sizi I sata.
english: I was alive apart from the law once, but when the commandment came, sin revived, and I died.

chokri: Thezho khakesü mipo hüyi ketola zo vele ala süsü kesa thita.
english: The commandment, which was for life, this I found to be for death;

chokri: Kekrelamori kephoma thezho khakesüo khipü akedova de adokhri va.
english: for sin, finding occasion through the commandment, deceived me, and through it killed me.

chokri: Thezho sü mesazo, thezho thinzü no khakesü ri mesazo; mezi m ve zo.
english: Therefore the law indeed is holy, and the commandment holy, and righteous, and good.

chokri: Mhakeve thinode khakesü athi mesa vame? Simozo, vele kephoma sü kephoma hü mengo süyo; mhakevelü kesa mhatho ayo mesü süyo: thinzüno thezho kha kesülü kephoma umha keti kekro vori tayo.
english: Did then that which is good become death to me? May it never be! But sin, that it might be shown to be sin, by working death to me through that which is good; that through the commandment sin might become exceeding sinful.

chokri: Kekrelamori u sekeba thezho sü rüpü zhüzo, vele Ino themo (uthiumo) pü kephomalü zhu keva.
english: For we know that the law is spiritual, but I am fleshly, sold under sin.

chokri: Süla I thinyü kemoko thi tayo, kekrelamori I thi kenyüko thi yo mo; I ngo kemetsüko anü de thi tayo.
english: For I don't know what I am doing. For I don't practice what I desire to do; but what I hate, that I do.

chokri: Mhace I thinyü kemoko thita yosüze, I thezho keve se m anü keti ba.
english: But if what I don't desire, that I do, I consent to the law that it is good.

chokri: Tsü süsa, thi kebakosü I thiba mote; vele kephoma ayo hü ketao tho thi tate.
english: So now it is no more I that do it, but sin which dwells in me.

chokri: Kekrelamori I se keba athi amoyo mha keve hüta mozo, kemezi sü I thinyüzo vele I süsü thiyi hota yole.
english: For I know that in me, that is, in my flesh, dwells no good thing. For desire is present with me, but I don't find it doing that which is good.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhakeve sü I menyüzo vele I süko thiyi yomo, vele mhakesuko thinyümo zori I süko thi tayo.
english: For the good which I desire, I don't do; but the evil which I don't desire, that I practice.

chokri: Tsühi mhace I thinyü kemo thita yo ze, süosü I thi ba motazo; vele kephoma ayo hü ketao tho thi tate.
english: But if what I don't desire, that I do, it is no more I that do it, but sin which dwells in me.

chokri: Mhakeve thi kenyü süsü ala thezho püzo, mhakesu-o akemenoce ta süyo.
english: I find then the law, that, to me, while I desire to do good, evil is present.

chokri: Kekrelamori I Jihova zho anü alü keta thümao samejide.
english: For I delight in God's law after the inward man,

chokri: Vele ayo zathoko la thezhopü tati ngoyi, ayo zathoko thezho metsuta akelüce; de süko atüpü thejü thiva kephoma thezholü ayo zathoko yo.
english: but I see a different law in my members, warring against the law of my mind, and bringing me into captivity under the law of sin which is in my members.

chokri: I thüma hesheherü, sopüno kesamo hi-olü asüphra süta?
english: What a wretched man I am! Who will deliver me out of the body of this death?

chokri: I Jisu Khrista yono Jihova meza thorile. Süla I akelüpü Jihova zho choyi thiyo, vele athi amo khi kephoma zholü thejü thiyo.
english: I thank God through Jesus Christ, our Lord! So then with the mind, I myself serve God's law, but with the flesh, the sin's law.

chokri: Süla tsüo kemejo dide Jisu Khrista yo ba ketako, somi uthi upho menyülü tamo ta de Rüpü chothalü tata sheri.
english: There is therefore now no condemnation to those who are in Christ Jesus, who don't walk according to the flesh, but according to the Spirit.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jisu Khrista yono Rüpü kehü thezho kephoma m kesalü asüphra pari te.
english: For the law of the Spirit of life in Christ Jesus made me free from the law of sin and of death.

chokri: Kekrelamori uthi umo kethathila thezholü thiyi ho tate, Jihova pünu thüma kephoma hübide uthi umoyo kephoma mejo ve.
english: For what the law couldn't do, in that it was weak through the flesh, God did, sending his own Son in the likeness of sinful flesh and for sin, he condemned sin in the flesh;

chokri: Sizide kemezi zho uyo thitsüyi ketola, uthi upho menyülü mode Rüpülü hü tato.
english: that the ordinance of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit.

chokri: Kekrelamori uthi upho menyülü kehüko uthi upho medo züyo, vele Rüpülü kehüko Rüpü medoko lü m züyo.
english: For those who live according to the flesh set their minds on the things of the flesh, but those who live according to the Spirit, the things of the Spirit.

chokri: Upho medoko kesazo, vele Rüpü medo kelüsü kerhü m thelükemenü.
english: For the mind of the flesh is death, but the mind of the Spirit is life and peace;

chokri: Kekrelamori upho lüdosü Jihova medo metsuyo, süo Jihova zho khro ta kemola; mori tari yihozo.
english: because the mind of the flesh is hostile towards God; for it is not subject to God's law, neither indeed can it be.

chokri: Süla upho medolü ketako Jihova nü thiyi hozo tila.
english: Those who are in the flesh can't please God.

chokri: Vele neko upho medolü tamote, vele Rüpü medolü tate; mhace Rüpü nemelülü hüta süze. Tsü mhace thüma kehopüri Khrista Rüpü uyo kedimi sümi püzhü mote.
english: But you are not in the flesh but in the Spirit, if it is so that the Spirit of God dwells in you. But if any man doesn't have the Spirit of Christ, he is not his.

chokri: M Khrista neyo ta süze, upho umoco no kesamite kephomala; vele kemezila Rüpülü rhü yito.
english: If Christ is in you, the body is dead because of sin, but the spirit is alive because of righteousness.

chokri: Vele mhace Rüpü Jisu thi merhü kesüo n yo hüta süze, Khrista phu merhü keyio nemori phü merhü süto Rüpü neyo hü ketao no.
english: But if the Spirit of him who raised up Jesus from the dead dwells in you, he who raised up Christ Jesus from the dead will also give life to your mortal bodies through his Spirit who dwells in you.

chokri: Süla akhreko, uko uthi upho nüthiketola umo kenü popü tamo.
english: So then, brothers, we are debtors, not to the flesh, to live after the flesh.

chokri: Mhace uthi menyülü hüyo süze neko sa zoto, vele Rüpülü kehüla uthi menyüko khava süze neko rhüyito.
english: For if you live after the flesh, you must die; but if by the Spirit you put to death the deeds of the body, you will live.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova Rüpü chotha zü keyiko metü Jihova nune thizo ketola.
english: For as many as are led by the Spirit of God, these are children of God.

chokri: Kekrelamori neko tüpü thejü kethi mha mpe ti rüpü ngoyimo, vele neko züpü nuthonu kethi Rüpü ngoyi de süla u krati, Abba, Apo siyo.
english: For you didn't receive the spirit of bondage again to fear, but you received the Spirit of adoption, by whom we cry, "Abba! Father!"

chokri: Jihova Rüpü urüpü zü kese yo (zhopo) uko Jihova nune thi keta.
english: The Spirit himself testifies with our spirit that we are children of God;

chokri: Uko pü nune ta lize uko pü kalümi ri tazo, Jihova kalü, Khrista zü kesade; mhace u püzü kemezhe yo lize, upüzüde zapozaleri thi kesazo ketola.
english: and if children, then heirs; heirs of God, and joint-heirs with Christ; if indeed we suffer with him, that we may also be glorified with him.

chokri: Kekrelamori I lüti tsükehülü kemezhe ketiko pü hisa zapozale uyo mengosü ketoko zü kemede shü mozo.
english: For I consider that the sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory which will be revealed toward us.

chokri: Thi m rhe kesümetü Jihova nuneko pü mengosü keto menyüde fü bazo.
english: For the creation waits with eager expectation for the children of God to be revealed.

chokri: Mehükesüko kemethu püzo, utho umedolü mo, vele mipü mha mehü kesüo kemeripü thisü.
english: For the creation was subjected to vanity, not of its own will, but because of him who subjected it, in hope

chokri: Kekrelamori mehü kesüko metü kecekere thimolü uko kelapü zapozale Jihova nune thi ketola.
english: that the creation itself also will be delivered from the bondage of decay into the liberty of the glory of the children of God.

chokri: Kekrelamori methümehü kesüko metü panyo m kemenu mezhe melo bayo tha ketso.
english: For we know that the whole creation groans and travails in pain together until now.

chokri: Süko lebimo, vele uko Rüpü se kerako sheri uko melülü panyo m melo tazo; ukopü nuthonu kethi m uko pho rha keyi fü tazo.
english: Not only so, but ourselves also, who have the first fruits of the Spirit, even we ourselves groan within ourselves, waiting for adoption, the redemption of our body.

chokri: Kemeriyo uko kelayi ketala, kengolü kemerisü kemeri mo; thümapü mhango baketasa kedipü merisaba?
english: For we were saved in hope, but hope that is seen is not hope. For who hopes for that which he sees?

chokri: Vele mhace u ngokemo meri ba süze süsa u sügüsühe de süo fübatayo.
english: But if we hope for that which we don't see, we wait for it with patience.

chokri: Sübide Rüpü ri ukethathikolü ukhrühi bayo, kekrelamori u chokezüko ri seyomo; vele Rüpü no usülü mehimelo de upoyi kehoko ri cho bayo.
english: In the same way, the Spirit also helps our weaknesses, for we don't know how to pray as we ought. But the Spirit himself makes intercession for us with groanings which can't be uttered.

chokri: Rüpü umelülü ukelü kedipü bashi keti phuvo seyi yo, kekrelamori pü kemelümiko la Jihova kelülü mehimelo bayo.
english: He who searches the hearts knows what is on the Spirit's mind, because he makes intercession for the saints according to God.

chokri: Usekeba Jihova kekhrümiko mhakehopü thizori mhakevela thiyo, pümedo thi ketola cükeyiko.
english: We know that all things work together for good for those who love God, to those who are called according to his purpose.

chokri: Kekrelamori pü mejü sekeba bide uko khi pülünu thisü Nuo hü bide, püpo sazüjürako dolü nurao thi.
english: For whom he foreknew, he also predestined to be conformed to the image of his Son, that he might be the firstborn among many brothers.

chokri: Süpiri pülünu thi kesüko süko cüriyi, cükeyiko süko thi kemeziriyi, m thikemezi keyiko thipü zapozale ri thisü.
english: Whom he predestined, those he also called. Whom he called, those he also justified. Whom he justified, those he also glorified.

chokri: Süsa uko kedipü hikola pota? Mhace Jihova ukola tisa, sopüno uko (ngomu) metsuyi veta?
english: What then shall we say about these things? If God is for us, who can be against us?

chokri: Pünu zori kela vamozode uko metüla pü püprasü, pü mhakekre kehopü ri kha utsü sü motome?
english: He who didn't spare his own Son, but delivered him up for us all, how would he not also with him freely give us all things?

chokri: Sopüno Jihova kedaketako mejo ketoba? Jihova tho thi kematho süte.
english: Who could bring a charge against God's chosen ones? It is God who justifies.

chokri: Sopü mi mejo ta? Khrista süla satade rhüla süte, Püvo Jihova zaco bate; ukola pü mezhemelo sü bayo.
english: Who is he who condemns? It is Christ who died, yes rather, who was raised from the dead, who is at the right hand of God, who also makes intercession for us.

chokri: Sopü uthikhoyi veta Khrista kekhrülü? Kemezhe ketilü, lüzhelü, methimeni tilü mori kemekrelü, füne kedilü (mechü), kempelü, zecholü hibitilü ta tome?
english: Who shall separate us from the love of Christ? Could oppression, or anguish, or persecution, or famine, or nakedness, or peril, or sword?

chokri: Hizi thometa, nlano tüsonha ha dokhri sütayo, uko khi tenyü tekopübi kedokhrilü.
english: Even as it is written, "For your sake we are killed all day long. We were accounted as sheep for the slaughter."

chokri: Simo, hiko metülü pü kekhrüla ukukeyisari kulayi yo.
english: No, in all these things, we are more than conquerors through him who loved us.

chokri: Kekrelamori I lükeyi kesasheri, mori kerhü sheri, tüyo choyimi sheri, mori thezhoko sheri, mori kekuko sheri, mori tsükehü mori hisa vori ketoko sheri.
english: For I am persuaded, that neither death, nor life, nor angels, nor principalities, nor things present, nor things to come, nor powers,

chokri: Mori kerekrü sheri, mori kerelü sheri, mori khonu kehopü sheri, Jihova kekhrülü uthikho vaho, Jisu Khrista uko Niepoo lano.
english: nor height, nor depth, nor any other created thing, will be able to separate us from the love of God, which is in Christ Jesus our Lord.

chokri: I Khrista zalü jütho poyo, I cejü mozo, akelümedo sheri süsüzo ziba m Kemesa Rüpü sheri azhopo zo.
english: I tell the truth in Christ. I am not lying, my conscience testifying with me in the Holy Spirit,

chokri: Kemeshi kezhopü ayota m amelülü lüzhepü ba.
english: that I have great sorrow and unceasing pain in my heart.

chokri: Kekrelamori a kemenyü Khrista po a khreko (asazüjürako) sülü areshu va veze, athi a za lü a cekroko.
english: For I could wish that I myself were accursed from Christ for my brothers' sake, my relatives according to the flesh,

chokri: Somi Israelmiko ta, somi nuthonu kethi khatsü, m zapozale, m kejükho keyi, thezho kha kesü, Jihova choyi kethi, m reshüko.
english: who are Israelites; whose is the adoption, the glory, the covenants, the giving of the law, the service, and the promises;

chokri: Somi uponeko, uthi uzalü Khrista hü kevori, somi metükopi thejo kepü Jihova kechothela kha kesü, Amen.
english: of whom are the fathers, and from whom is Christ as concerning the flesh, who is over all, God, blessed forever. Amen.

chokri: Süsü Jihova jü mhathiyi ho ketala mo. Kekrelamori Israelmi metü Israelmi mo.
english: But it is not as though the word of God has come to nothing. For they are not all Israel, that are of Israel.

chokri: Mori uko Abraham shuye metü pünune zomo, vele Isaac yo nshuye mehü süto.
english: Neither, because they are Abraham's seed, are they all children. But, "In Isaac will your seed be called."

chokri: Püco süo, uthiumo nuneko Jihova nuneko mo, rele reshupü meta keti nuneko pü shuye.
english: That is, it is not the children of the flesh who are children of God, but the children of the promise are counted as a seed.

chokri: Kekrelamori khapü kemeta jüo, I pütü hice vorito; m Sara thepu nupü ngoyito.
english: For this is a word of promise, "At the appointed time I will come, and Sarah will have a son."

chokri: Sülebi kemo, Rebecca sheri mi püyono nu hükeyi, uko potsa Isaac yono.
english: Not only so, but Rebecca also conceived by one, by our father Isaac.

chokri: Uko mipüri menuyi kemolü, mori mhakeve sheri mori mhakesu sheri mhathopüri thisü kemolü; Jihova po kedakeyi mhathoo lamo vele cükeyi thisü ketola.
english: For being not yet born, neither having done anything good or bad, that the purpose of God according to election might stand, not of works, but of him who calls,

chokri: Thenopüce pokesü, pethiopo natsio choyi thito.
english: it was said to her, "The elder will serve the younger."

chokri: Hibide thopü meta, I Jacob ngo anü, vele I Esau ngometsü.
english: Even as it is written, "Jacob I loved, but Esau I hated."

chokri: Süsa uko kedipü pota? Jihova mezikemo huneme? Sizi mozo.
english: What shall we say then? Is there unrighteousness with God? May it never be!

chokri: Kekrelamori pü Mosesce kepo, I phimezhe süketomiyo phimezhe süto; kekhrü mhatho thisü ketomiyo kekhrü mhatho khasüto.
english: For he said to Moses, "I will have mercy on whom I have mercy, and I will have compassion on whom I have compassion."

chokri: Süla thümayomo thitole medo keta mori süsü huzo kevo, vele Jihova tho phikemezhe kha kesü.
english: So then it is not of him who wills, nor of him who runs, but of God who has mercy.

chokri: Ketholesilü Pharoahce pokesü, mhatho hila I nmehüsü, n-yono akekupü mengosü m cejümetülü azapü mesesü ketola.
english: For the Scripture says to Pharaoh, "For this very purpose I caused you to be raised up, that I might show in you my power, and that my name might be published abroad in all the earth."

chokri: Süla pütho sopü phi mezhe süto kedayi sheri pü sümi tsü süyo, m pütho somi lü thi merü süto sheri sümi lü thi merü vayo. (Jihova lekhu m phi kemezhe).
english: So then, he has mercy on whom he desires, and he hardens whom he desires.

chokri: No ace hizi poto, Dipülü akejo ngoyi tade? Sopüno pümedo varhüyi veta?
english: You will say then to me, "Why does he still find fault? For who withstands his will?"

chokri: Vele nothümao, nosopüle Jihova züde kemeliyi veta? Thikesüo (mhathoo) püthi kesüoce no ditono athipü hihi bisüva? Sizi potome.
english: But indeed, O man, who are you to reply against God? Will the thing formed ask him who formed it, "Why did you make me like this?"

chokri: Le kethio leyo pü keku ba mome? Renyopü khipü therholeri m zhoshüleri thiyiyo.
english: Or hasn't the potter a right over the clay, from the same lump to make one part a vessel for honor, and another for dishonor?

chokri: Mhace Jihova pülekhu mengo sütori, pükeku mesesü tori; sügüsühede pütü kecho thade khapü lekhulü meka keva zhükozo.
english: What if God, willing to show his wrath, and to make his power known, endured with much patience vessels of wrath made for destruction,

chokri: Pü zapozale kene khipü leko mese mengo sü ketola, mejümera kesüpü meta de ukopo zapozale thito.
english: and that he might make known the riches of his glory on vessels of mercy, which he prepared beforehand for glory,

chokri: Sübi uko cüyi ketakori, Judahmi lebimo vele u Judah kemokori samo tome?
english: us, whom he also called, not from the Jews only, but also from the Gentiles?

chokri: Pü Hosealü kepobi, athüma kemoko cüpü athüma thito; I khrüyo kemoko khrü süto.
english: As he says also in Hosea, "I will call them 'my people,' which were not my people; And her 'beloved,' who was not beloved."

chokri: Neko athümakomo, sizi keta sülü, neko rhüketa Jihova mako sizide potato.
english: "It will be that in the place where it was said to them, 'You are not my people,' There they will be called 'children of the living God.'"

chokri: Isaiah sheri Israelmikola setayo, Israelko thono kropü tesünyo jükezholü keba bita zori mikedopü lebi meha keyi zo tato.
english: Isaiah cries concerning Israel, "If the number of the children of Israel are as the sand of the sea, It is the remnant who will be saved;

chokri: Pü mhatho thitsü süto, kemezilü thi mejü vato; cejülü mhatho Niepoo thi meze sütato.
english: For He will finish the work and cut it short in righteousness, Because the LORD will make a short work upon the earth."

chokri: Isaiah hijü saju poketabi, Niepoo krodeko mhace uko meha sükemo sa uko Sodom m Gomorrah bitato.
english: As Isaiah has said before, "Unless the Lord of Hosts had left us a seed, We would have become like Sodom, And would have been made like Gomorrah."

chokri: Uko süsa kedipü pota? Israel kemoko mezi kemo kemejiko kemezi meji vorita, kemelü kemeziko zo sheri mejita.
english: What shall we say then? That the Gentiles, who didn't follow after righteousness, attained to righteousness, even the righteousness which is of faith;

chokri: Vele Israelmi kemezi thezho kezüko kemezi thezholü ba mote.
english: but Israel, following after a law of righteousness, didn't arrive at the law of righteousness.

chokri: Dipüla mota? Kekrelamori uko kemelü khimo ketala, vele uko mhathoko lebi lizu thezhoko thita. Phezi kemesü tsüoyo uko phe meshü ve.
english: Why? Because they didn't seek it by faith, but as it were by works of the law. They stumbled over the stumbling stone;

chokri: Hizi tho meta, Hihe, I Zionlü ketsüpü shümeta, süolü miko phe meshü tato, minümo kethi tsü; somi pü melüyi mo sheri thenga thi taho.
english: even as it is written, "Behold, I lay in Zion a stumbling stone and a rock of offense; And no one who believes in him will be disappointed."

chokri: Hihe, akhreko, amelü kemenyü m Therüoce akecho Israelmiko kelayiketola.
english: Brothers, my heart's desire and my prayer to God is for Israel, that they may be saved.

chokri: I lüketi uko Therüola lüni ba, vele süosü mhaselü mote.
english: For I testify about them that they have a zeal for God, but not according to knowledge.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko Jihova kemezi semote, side ukotho uko kemezi phu tate, uko khapü Jihova kematholü sü yomo.
english: For being ignorant of God's righteousness, and seeking to establish their own righteousness, they didn't subject themselves to the righteousness of God.

chokri: Kekrelamori Khrista sü kemelümi metükola thezho kemezi thülao zo.
english: For Christ is the fulfillment of the law for righteousness to everyone who believes.

chokri: Moses thezho kemezi thosüzo, somi thezho süko thi mzüyi sheri rhüyi zoto.
english: For Moses writes about the righteousness of the law, "The one who does them will live by them."

chokri: Vele kemezi kemelüyo kevori, nmelülü hizi lüta yomo, “Sopü tüyo kirita? Püco, sopü Khrista zü kiri ta?
english: But the righteousness which is of faith says this, "Don't say in your heart, 'Who will ascend into heaven?' (that is, to bring Christ down);

chokri: Mori, sopüpo mezalü kita (kesami rüna)? Püco, sopüpo Khrista kesalü zü prari ta?
english: or, 'Who will descend into the abyss?' (that is, to bring Christ up from the dead.)"

chokri: Vele süsü dipü poba? Jüosü nmenobazo ntalü m nmelülü. Jü süo ha nece po ketao zo.
english: But what does it say? "The word is near you, in your mouth, and in your heart;" that is, the word of faith, which we preach:

chokri: No mhace ntapü Jisu Niepoo zo ti phrayi süze, nemelü pü kesalü Jihova püphü merhü yitazo ti melüyi süze, ne kelakeyi ngo yito.
english: that if you will confess with your mouth the Lord Jesus, and believe in your heart that God raised him from the dead, you will be saved.

chokri: Kekrelamori thüma umelüpü kematho melüyi tisa püthi kemezi yiyo, pütapü phra keyi la kelayiyo.
english: For with the heart, one believes unto righteousness; and with the mouth confession is made unto salvation.

chokri: Kekrelamori ketholesi poti, kehopüri pumelü keyimi thenga thitaho.
english: For the Scripture says, "Whoever believes in him will not be disappointed."

chokri: Judahmi m Greekmi nidolü kekreho tila, Niepo püzo siti pücükeyiko metüla baphi.
english: For there is no distinction between Jew and Greek; for the same Lord is Lord of all, and is rich to all who call on him.

chokri: Kekrelamori kehopüri Niepoo za cükeyi khü kelayi zoto.
english: For, "Whoever will call on the name of the Lord will be saved."

chokri: Kedipü bide pü melü kemoko pücü yita? M kedipü bide püfüse kemoko pü melüyi ta? M kedipü bide kemetha dize uko reni yita?
english: How then will they call on him in whom they have not believed? How will they believe in him whom they have not heard? How will they hear without a preacher?

chokri: M kedipü bide uko ketsüsü moze vopota? Hizi thometa, Kezükeve jüyi kepoko phezi dithedüri züveshi, jüyikeve kethi kenüjüko pü kevoriko phe didü züve shi!
english: And how will they preach unless they are sent? As it is written: "How beautiful are the feet of those who preach the Gospel of peace, Who bring glad tidings of good things!"

chokri: Vele Israel uko metüko jüyikeve züyi mote. Kekrelamori Isaiah ri hizi popü meta, Niepoo, sopü ha jüpo kesüko melü yita?
english: But they didn't all listen to the glad news. For Isaiah says, "Lord, who has believed our report?"

chokri: Süla kerenilü kemelü voriyo, Jihova jüko reni keyilü.
english: So faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of God.

chokri: Vele akepo, uko semo zome? Setüzo, uko füphra cejü metülü vote; uko jüko cejü vala ketsolü vote.
english: But I say, didn't they hear? Yes, most assuredly, "Their sound went out into all the earth, Their words to the ends of the world."

chokri: Vele akepo, Thürace Moses poti, thüma kemo kropü püsü nekopo nekoro kene thi süto, mhasekemo kenyo shuyepü khipü neko lüda thizo süto.
english: But I ask, didn't Israel know? First Moses says, "I will provoke you to jealousy with that which is no nation, With a nation void of understanding I will make you angry."

chokri: Vele Isaiah thepu shude poti, aphuta kemo kropüpo angoyi, akhipü aketsota kemoko mese mengosü.
english: Isaiah is very bold, and says, "I was found by those who didn't seek me. I was revealed to those who didn't ask for me."

chokri: Vele pü Israelmice poti, Tüsozho metü I abo chopü jüzü kemo ulü ketako umezi kephuko tsü thazo.”
english: But as to Israel he says, "All day long I stretched out my hands to a disobedient and contrary people."

chokri: Thüma metüpo kekuko khrikhro ta yi khe, Jihova zo kemosa keku bamo; Kekusü Jihova kha kesüzo.
english: Let every soul be in subjection to the higher authorities, for there is no authority except from God, and those who exist are ordained by God.

chokri: Kehopüri keku zükemumi sü Jihova kha kesüo metsuyo; zükemumi sü kemejo mesüyito.
english: Therefore he who resists the authority, withstands the ordinance of God; and those who withstand will receive to themselves judgment.

chokri: Kekrelamori mikekha ketisü mhakeve kethimi la kethi kedü ti zhümo, vele kesu kethi milazo. Süla no kekusü mpe mome? Size mhakeve thiyi te süsa n mejo taho.
english: For rulers are not a terror to the good work, but to the evil. Do you desire to have no fear of the authority? Do that which is good, and you will have praise from the same,

chokri: Kekrelamori keku kekhimi sü Jihova choyi kethimi zo mhakeve thi ketola. Vele no mhakesu thi ketosa nla kempe püte, zechosü kemethu püla khi yomo; vele Jihova choyi thide kesumi yo pü lekhu khasü ketola.
english: for he is a servant of God to you for good. But if you do that which is evil, be afraid, for he doesn't bear the sword in vain; for he is a minister of God, an avenger for wrath to him who does evil.

chokri: Süla no lekhu khro keta lebi kemo nmelülü pütü kethi lari pükhro ta yite.
english: Therefore you need to be in subjection, not only because of the wrath, but also for conscience' sake.

chokri: Kekrelamori nepüco hilari khazhonu khrüyo, uko Jihova choyimi zo; süla uko mhatho hihi thiyo.
english: For this reason you also pay taxes, for they are ministers of God's service, attending continually on this very thing.

chokri: Tsükezüo khatsü zote, khazhonu tsüti mesüko khatsü süte; mhanyo khi keyiko püma shuyo tiko shusü tsüte: mpe kezüko mpe te, therho tsükezüko khatsüte.
english: Give therefore to everyone what you owe: taxes to whom taxes are due; customs to whom customs; respect to whom respect; honor to whom honor.

chokri: Mipü pori pü hite, vele hunehu khrüsa yite; mikhrü ketimisü thezhoo thitsü süyo.
english: Owe no one anything, except to love one another; for he who loves his neighbor has fulfilled the law.

chokri: Süla ne kekhrükezü hi, No mi dokhri hi, No rego shü, No cejü nri ti zhopo thisu, No mha meho menyü su, zümoze kesu jükhakesü kekreko ceri thomejüku kesü nsüzanumi khrüpü ntho nkekhrübiyite.
english: For the commandments, "You shall not commit adultery," "You shall not murder," "You shall not steal," "You shall not give false testimony," "You shall not covet," and whatever other commandments there are, are all summed up in this saying, namely, "You shall love your neighbor as yourself."

chokri: Kekhrü süzanumi nümo thi yomo, süla kekhrü no thezho thitsü süyo.
english: Love doesn't harm a neighbor. Love therefore is the fulfillment of the law.

chokri: Hipi sheri neko pütü seba, tsühi zükebalü cokeyi tüte; kekrelamori umelükeyi tüceri tsühi kelakeyi menokute.
english: Do this, knowing the time, that it is already time for you to awaken out of sleep, for salvation is now nearer to us than when we first believed.

chokri: Tüzüzhoko vote, tüso menote; süla kezülü mhathoko khavade kevelü rineko süyi khe.
english: The night is far gone, and the day is near. Let's therefore throw off the works of darkness, and let's put on the armor of light.

chokri: Kejütholü tayi khe, tüso ketabi, zokra kemezüthide mha kebüta hili; utho umedothide nyonyü m ti kramezüpü ta hiri, müzü kezhenyüsa m mhameho ta hiri.
english: Let us walk properly, as in the day; not in reveling and drunkenness, not in sexual promiscuity and lustful acts, and not in strife and jealousy.

chokri: Vele Jisu Khrista khi bemene yite, uthi upho nüthi ketola mhapüri thihi; sükola kemenyüko lü bahi.
english: But put on the Lord Jesus Christ, and make no provision for the flesh, for its lusts.

chokri: Somi kemelülü thathi ta sheri sümi züyite, vele ne setükemola kemeli tiko thi bahi.
english: Now receive one who is weak in faith, but not for disputes over opinions.

chokri: Mipüno mhametü tizori ve sibato, kekremipü ga lebi titsü zori semo.
english: One man has faith to eat all things, but he who is weak eats only vegetables.

chokri: Mhati kebao po tikemo-o the (retsü) tahite, ti kemoo pori ketio thita hite; kekrelamori Jihova püzüyi ketala.
english: Don't let him who eats despise him who doesn't eat. Don't let him who doesn't eat judge him who eats, for God has received him.

chokri: No sopü lezide mithekümi mejo ba? Pü nepo-o tho thayi sheri mode tatsü ta to sheri pezoto, Uko thayi zoto ketho Kekrelamori Jihova uko thi methayi vetila.
english: Who are you who judge another's servant? To his own lord he stands or falls. Yes, he will be made to stand, for God has power to make him stand.

chokri: Mipüno tüsozhopü lümekre ba yive, kekremipü tüsometü kemhakebi zori bato; Thüma kehopüpori umelülü mhalü metsüyite.
english: One man esteems one day as more important. Another esteems every day alike. Let each man be fully assured in his own mind.

chokri: Pü tüsozho rho kebao Niepoo la rhoba, sübi tüsozho rho kemoo Niepoo la tüsozho rhomo ba. Ketio Niepoola tiba, tikemo-o Niepoo la timoba; Jihova kemeza pote.
english: He who observes the day, observes it to the Lord; and he who does not observe the day, to the Lord he does not observe it. He who eats, eats to the Lord, for he gives God thanks. He who doesn't eat, to the Lord he doesn't eat, and gives God thanks.

chokri: Kekrelamori uhükeba utho ula hübamo, mipüri pütho pula sari yomo.
english: For none of us lives to himself, and none dies to himself.

chokri: Uhükeba sheri Niepoo la hübayo, usata sheri Niepoo la sa tayo; süla urhüba sheri mori sata to sheri Niepoo zhüzo.
english: For if we live, we live to the Lord. Or if we die, we die to the Lord. If therefore we live or die, we are the Lord's.

chokri: Mhaco hihila Khrista sasü m rhüla süte, sizi keyila pü kesami m kerhümi kenani la Niepo thi ketola.
english: For to this end Christ died, rose, and lived again, that he might be Lord of both the dead and the living.

chokri: Vele no kedipüla nsazüo mori nlipü mejoya? Ditono nsazüo mori nlipü retsüya? Kekrelamori uko metü Jihova mhüjülü uko jünyo keti phrüzo ketola.
english: But you, why do you judge your brother? Or you again, why do you despise your brother? For we will all stand before the judgment seat of Christ.

chokri: Thopümetati hibi, Niepoo poyo, I rhüketabi thüma metü a mhüjülü khütü phrü zoto; uko meyipü Jihova phra phrü zoto.
english: For it is written, "'As I live,' says the Lord, 'to me every knee will bow. Every tongue will confess to God.'"

chokri: Süla uko kehopüri Therüoce ukoju keha phrü zoto.
english: So then each one of us will give account of himself to God.

chokri: Uko süla hunehu lümejo sahi takhe, siti moli thephe kemesü kha usazü jüra mori ulipüne phe kemesü thide upo retuta keve thi molekhe.
english: Therefore let's not judge one another any more, but judge this rather, that no man put a stumbling block in his brother's way, or an occasion for falling.

chokri: I Niepo Jisu la melü m sekeba, mhapüyori mesa kemo bamo, vele somi pütho lüde mesa kemo thi taze pula mesa mote.
english: I know, and am persuaded in the Lord Jesus, that nothing is unclean of itself; except that to him who considers anything to be unclean, to him it is unclean.

chokri: Mhace nketila nsazüo mori nlipü nümo thi taze no kekhrülü hüta mote, nketila püpo mhalü tahite, Khrista pulari sasü ketabi.
english: Yet if because of food your brother is grieved, you walk no longer in love. Don't destroy with your food him for whom Christ died.

chokri: Süla nkeve pomeshü mo ketola.
english: Then don't let your good be slandered,

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova kede kethisü keti kekra zomo, vele kemezi m kezükeve, m Kemesa Rüpü lü unü keyi.
english: for the Kingdom of God is not eating and drinking, but righteousness, peace, and joy in the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Kekrelamori mha hizi keyi sü Khrista yitho kethi Ther-o po ukhi keyi m thüma nü thi keyi zo.
english: For he who serves Christ in these things is acceptable to God and approved by men.

chokri: Uko süla kezükeve mhathoko huzo yikhe, mha sizi keyilü hunehu thi mve yiyo tila.
english: So then, let us follow after things which make for peace, and things by which we may build one another up.

chokri: Themusü Jihova mhatho jü medi zo vamo. Mhametüko mesazo, vele sopüno lümesude ti sheri pula sü thi merho süyo.
english: Don't overthrow God's work for food's sake. All things indeed are clean, however it is evil for that man who creates a stumbling block by eating.

chokri: Themu tikemo m hezo kra kemo ve, mori mhakehopü sheri nsazüjüra m nlipü neko thimeshü, nümo thi, m thikethathi lize.
english: It is good to not eat meat, drink wine, nor do anything by which your brother stumbles, is offended, or is made weak.

chokri: No kemelü bame? Jihova mhüjülü khiyi te. Thüma kehopüri thitole lükeyilü pütho pülü mejo kemoo kenütho.
english: Do you have faith? Have it to yourself before God. Happy is he who doesn't judge himself in that which he approves.

chokri: Pü melütü mode ti süze pütho pü mejove, kekrelamori pü kemelü süde timo ketala; mhakehopülü sheri kemelü kedira kephoma zo.
english: But he who doubts is condemned if he eats, because it isn't of faith; and whatever is not of faith is sin. (14:24) Now to him who is able to establish you according to my Gospel and the preaching of Jesus Christ, according to the revelation of the mystery which has been kept secret through long ages, (14:25) but now is revealed, and by the Scriptures of the prophets, according to the commandment of the eternal God, is made known for obedience of faith to all the nations; (14:26) to the only wise God, through Jesus Christ, to whom be the glory forever! Amen.

chokri: Ukekumiko kethathiko khrühi timesü, utho unü umedo thita mode.
english: Now we who are strong ought to bear the weaknesses of the weak, and not to please ourselves.

chokri: Thüma kehopüri usüzanumi nüthi de hunehu thi nveyi khe.
english: Let each one of us please his neighbor for that which is good, to be building him up.

chokri: Kekrelamori Khrista zori pütho pünü thita mo, vele süo thopü metati, mikemeshu pü uko zhoshüthi kesüko ayo kurite.
english: For even Christ didn't please himself. But, as it is written, "The reproaches of those who reproached you fell on me."

chokri: Hijü thopü metatiko ukopo seyi ketola thopü meta, uko sügüsühe m hunehu thi kethepu de ketholesiyo ukemeri ba ketola.
english: For whatever things were written before were written for our learning, that through patience and through encouragement of the Scriptures we might have hope.

chokri: Tsüo Jihova sügüsühe keti m thokemelu kha netsü kesü nekopo Khrista zhorele bide hunehu zü kelürhü bayite.
english: Now the God of patience and of encouragement grant you to be of the same mind one with another according to Christ Jesus,

chokri: Sizi neko kelürhü füpü thide Therüopo zapozale thiyite, uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista Po.
english: that with one accord you may with one mouth glorify the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Sizide neko hunehu züyite, Khrista ri uko züpü Jihova zapo zalelü kesübi.
english: Therefore receive one another, even as Christ also received you, to the glory of God.

chokri: Tsü akepo, Kekrelamori Khrista ri yikerülü thekümi thi hijü Jihova reshupü utsüpumi tsü kemetako thitsü sü ketola.
english: Now I say that Christ has been made a minister of the circumcision for the truth of God, that he might confirm the promises given to the fathers,

chokri: Sizi keyilü Judahmi kemokopori phikemezhe ngoyi de Therüopo zapozale thiyi ketola, hizi thopü meta, I hila nzapü Judahmi kemoko ce posüto, n zapü chele süto.
english: and that the Gentiles might glorify God for his mercy. As it is written, "Therefore will I give praise to you among the Gentiles, And sing to your name."

chokri: Posa kesü, Niepoo chuyite püthümakozüde, ne Judahmi kemoko.
english: Again he says, "Rejoice, you Gentiles, with his people."

chokri: Süsari Niepoo chuyite, ne Judahmi kemoko püpo meto süte, nethüma metüko.
english: Again, "Praise the Lord, all you Gentiles! Let all the peoples praise him."

chokri: Isaiah ri pokesü, Jesse meyo kevoripü Judah kemoko kekhato, Judahmi kemoko pümelüto.
english: Again, Isaiah says, "There will be the root of Jesse, He who arises to rule over the Gentiles; On him will the Gentiles hope."

chokri: Tsüo kemeri kha uketsü Jihova celü kemelüla kenü m kezükeve po neko lü ba thishü thi bayite, side kemeri neshu, Kemesa Rüpü kekulü.
english: Now may the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in hope, in the power of the Holy Spirit.

chokri: I nekoyo athepu bate, azüko, nekoyo keve nephi bate, ngokeyimhaseri seshu bate, hunehu tahi tarhoyi rivebate.
english: I myself am also persuaded about you, my brothers, that you yourselves are full of goodness, filled with all knowledge, able also to admonish others.

chokri: Sizizo sheri akhrüko, thepu zode neko mesela kesü copü Jihova ngokemezhe kha aketsüla.
english: But I write the more boldly to you in part, as reminding you, because of the grace that was given to me by God,

chokri: Apo Judahmi kemokola Jihova choyi thi jüyikeve kepo thevomipü thide Judahmi kemoko po züyi keve, Kemesa Rüpü thi kemesa kesübi.
english: that I should be a servant of Christ Jesus to the Gentiles, ministering as a priest the Gospel of God, that the offering up of the Gentiles might be made acceptable, sanctified by the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Jisu Khrista zalü, I Jihova la amhathopü kemeha zori pücoba.
english: I have therefore my boasting in Christ Jesus in things pertaining to God.

chokri: Kekrelamori Khrista kha atsü kemoko mhapüri po keto athepu bamo, Judahmi kemokopo jüzülü bayi ketola jülü m mhatho lüri.
english: For I will not dare to speak of any things except those which Christ worked through me, for the obedience of the Gentiles, by word and deed,

chokri: Kemesa Rüpü kekulü zasiko m ungo mhathoko thikesü, Jerusalem lüsheri, pükhüko Illyricum lüsheri, I Khrista jüyikeve poshu süte.
english: in the power of signs and wonders, in the power of God's Spirit; so that from Jerusalem, and around as far as to Illyricum, I have fully preached the Gospel of Christ;

chokri: I Jüyikeve po ketola ahe thi züzo, thethi dipüce Khrista zapo mesemo balusheri; Kekrelamori I tavo mikekremi shüdüyo mhathi batari sehomo.
english: yes, making it my aim to preach the Gospel, not where Christ was already named, that I might not build on another's foundation.

chokri: Hibide thopümezü, Püposü kemora ukopo ngoto; seyokemora ukopo seyito.
english: But, as it is written, "They will see, to whom no news of him came. They who haven't heard will understand."

chokri: Kekrelamori mhahizi tila apo nekoce vori mode achokha tate.
english: Therefore also I was hindered these many times from coming to you,

chokri: Vele tsüo, hico ala mhatho baphi mote, I hijü tütse kekro menyü ketabi nekoce vori nyü bate.
english: but now, no longer having any place in these regions, and having these many years a longing to come to you,

chokri: I Spainlü kevo züde nekoce vorito, arevü cholü tavoride neko zükesü keto melüba de nekopo aketsü kesüri thito; vapü neko züde pütü donepü anü keyibi.
english: whenever I journey to Spain, I will come to you. For I hope to see you on my journey, and to be helped on my way there by you, if first I may enjoy your company for a while.

chokri: Vele tsüzova I ta Jerusalem lü vode kemesakoce choyi thisüto.
english: But now, I say, I am going to Jerusalem, serving the saints.

chokri: Kekrelamori Macedonia m Achaia lü kebako mhahu khapü Jerusalem lü kemesako kedi vaphi sünyü de kekhrüsü ketala.
english: For it has been the good pleasure of Macedonia and Achaia to make a certain contribution for the poor among the saints who are at Jerusalem.

chokri: Uko mhatho hithinyüde thisüte, süla uko popü shusü. Kekrelamori Judahmi kemoko rüpülü ceneyo zhürhü thi ketabi, themoyo mhatho sheri uko thipü süko tsüsüte.
english: Yes, it has been their good pleasure, and they are their debtors. For if the Gentiles have been made partakers of their spiritual things, they owe it to them also to serve them in fleshly things.

chokri: I mhatho hiko thitso kevasa, mhapü ketakokhi uko tsü kevasalü; I ta Spain lü kevo cholü neko züde kesüto.
english: When therefore I have accomplished this, and have sealed to them this fruit, I will go on by way of you to Spain.

chokri: I melütü keba, nekoce kevorice Khrista Jüyikeve thejo khapü neko tsü thishuthi süto.
english: I know that, when I come to you, I will come in the fullness of the blessing of the Gospel of Christ.

chokri: Azüneko, I nekoce kecho, Niepo Jisu Khrista zalano, m Kemesa Rüpü kekhrülü, neko azüde Therüoce ala cho ba zote.
english: Now I beg you, brothers, by our Lord Jesus Christ, and by the love of the Spirit, that you strive together with me in your prayers to God for me,

chokri: Judealü melükemoko celü akelayi ketola, m Jerusalem lü kemesako amhatho hi uko nüde khiyi ketola.
english: that I may be delivered from those who are disobedient in Judea, and that my service which I have for Jerusalem may be acceptable to the saints;

chokri: Sizide apo Jihova medolü anüde nekoce vori ketola, neko pori nenü salayi keto.
english: that I may come to you in joy through the will of God, and together with you, find rest.

chokri: Tsühi Jihova celü thelü kemenü po neko metü züba yite. Amen.
english: Now the God of peace be with you all. Amen.

chokri: I uko lipü-o Phoebe ketsüpü nekoce süzüho, pü Cenchrea kehucelü yitho kethi püpü.
english: I commend to you Phoebe, our sister, who is a servant of the assembly that is at Cenchreae,

chokri: Niepoo zalü pü züyite, kemesako meso keyi bide, pü mhatho dipülü neko kekhrühi sü moze shüba sheli pü khrühi süte; pü thüma kekro kekhrühi khimo keshülü khrühi bayo: sübi a yo sheri sizi ba yo tila.
english: that you receive her in the Lord, in a way worthy of the saints, and that you assist her in whatever matter she may need from you, for she herself also has been a helper of many, and of my own self.

chokri: Priscilla m Aquila ni kelu süte, uni akekhrühimi Jisu Khrista zalü.
english: Greet Prisca and Aquila, my fellow workers in Christ Jesus,

chokri: Alano uni kehüri (univo) kha süzo, Uni lebi kemeza zomori Judahmi kemo kehuce kolü kebako metüla.
english: who for my life, laid down their own necks; to whom not only I give thanks, but also all the assemblies of the Gentiles.

chokri: Sübi unicelü kehu sheri kelu süte. Akekhrü-o Epaenatus kelu süte, Achaia lü püse kerao Khrista ceco.
english: Greet the assembly that is in their house. Greet Epaenetus, my beloved, who is the first fruits of Achaia to Christ.

chokri: Mary rho süte, pü ukola mhatho thi shu kesüla.
english: Greet Mary, who labored much for us.

chokri: Andronicus m Junia ni kelu süte, ashuyemi, m azüde thejü kethini, apostlemi dolü seta moze keshüni, uni amhüjü Khrista se ta ketani.
english: Greet Andronicus and Junias, my relatives and my fellow prisoners, who are notable among the apostles, who also were in Christ before me.

chokri: Amplias kelü süte Niepoo zalü akhrüo.
english: Greet Amplias, my beloved in the Lord.

chokri: Urbane, Khrista zalü hako kekhrühio, m Stachys akekhrü-o kelü süte.
english: Greet Urbanus, our fellow worker in Christ, and Stachys, my beloved.

chokri: Apelles Khrista nü medo-o kelü süte, Aristobulus cekrolü kebako kelü süte.
english: Greet Apelles, the approved in Christ. Greet those who are of the household of Aristobulus.

chokri: Herodion ashuyemi, kelü süte, Narcissus cekro kebako Niepoo melü ketako kelü süte.
english: Greet Herodion, my kinsman. Greet them of the household of Narcissus, who are in the Lord.

chokri: Tryphena m Tryphosa Niepoola mhathi kebani kelü süte. Persis Niepoola mhathi shu kesüo kelu süte.
english: Greet Tryphaena and Tryphosa, who labor in the Lord. Greet Persis, the beloved, who labored much in the Lord.

chokri: Rufus Niepoo keda keyio m püzupü azurizo kelü süte.
english: Greet Rufus, the chosen in the Lord, and his mother and mine.

chokri: Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermas, Patrobas, Hermes, usazüjüra m lipüneko sülü cekroko kelü süte.
english: Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas, and the brothers who are with them.

chokri: Philologus, Julia, Nereus, pülipü, m Olympas, m kemesako metü süko zükebako kelü süte.
english: Greet Philologus and Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints who are with them.

chokri: Kemesami kemeboti khi hunehu kelü süte. Khrista kehuko neko kelü süho.
english: Greet one another with a holy kiss. The assemblies of Christ greet you.

chokri: Tsüo azüneko, I nekoce choyo, kedipüla neko thezho seyi ketako varhü m keza kekre ti prarita yosheri süko seyite; m süko thera yite.
english: Now I beg you, brothers, look out for those who are causing the divisions and occasions of stumbling, contrary to the doctrine which you learned, and turn away from them.

chokri: Kekrelamori süko Niepoo Jisu Khrista choyi thi mori utho uva yitho thita yo, uko jükeve m kemenü jüpode thüma kemoko shu ketse tayo.
english: For those who are such don't serve our Lord, Jesus Christ, but their own belly; and by their smooth and flattering speech, they deceive the hearts of the innocent.

chokri: Kekrelamori neko jüzü kethi chozu metü seba, süla I anü tayo nekola; sizosheri I nekopo kevelü tsü mhase tanyü: vele mhakesukolü nejomo yite.
english: For your obedience has become known to all. I rejoice therefore over you. But I desire to have you wise in that which is good, but innocent in that which is evil.

chokri: Jihova kezükevelü Satanpü nephekhro kedü vato mecho mode. Uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista ngokemezhepo neko züba yite. Amen.
english: And the God of peace will quickly crush Satan under your feet. The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.

chokri: Timothy, mhatholü abesüo, süsa Lucius m Jason, Sosipater, ashuyeko neko kelü süho.
english: Timothy, my fellow worker, greets you, as do Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater, my relatives.

chokri: I Tertius, lesi hio kethoo Niepoo zalü neko kelü süho.
english: I, Tertius, who write the letter, greet you in the Lord.

chokri: Gaius aso-o, m kehu metü neko kelü süho. Erastus nadelü presa kesüo neko kelü süho, m Quartus usazüo sheri.
english: Gaius, my host and host of the whole assembly, greets you. Erastus, the treasurer of the city, greets you, as does Quartus, the brother.

chokri: Jisu Khrista uko Niepoo kekhrüpo neko metü züba yite.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all! Amen.

chokri: Tsüo Jisu Khrista Jüyikeve I po ketao lü Jihova tho neko thi kemetü yito hala püpra ketekhri kethi mese mengo kesü yono, cejü thiyi culü kevapü ketako.
english: Now to him that is of power to stablish you according to my gospel, and the preaching of Jesus Christ, according to the revelation of the mystery, which was kept secret since the world began,

chokri: Vele tsüno süko mese süte, m sajukeseko popü kemetako süculü keta Jihova kha kesüjüko; shuye metüpo kemelülü jüzü thi keyi.
english: But now is made manifest, and by the scriptures of the prophets, according to the commandment of the everlasting God, made known to all nations for the obedience of faith:

chokri: Pülebi mhakese Jihova po zapozale thiyi te Jisu Khrista yono kechothe. Amen.
english: To God only wise, be glory through Jesus Christ for ever. Amen.

chokri: Paul cüpü Jisu Khrista sajimi (apostle) Jihova medolü, mu Sosthenes uko züo.
english: Paul, called to be an apostle of Jesus Christ through the will of God, and our brother Sosthenes,

chokri: Corinth lü Jihova kehuko cekesü, Khrista Jisu yo thi kemesa keyiko mu cükeyiko, mu kekreko sheri kesa Jisu Khrista za lü cükeyiko, uko Niepoo mu hako sheri sa.
english: to the assembly of God which is at Corinth; those who are sanctified in Christ Jesus, called to be saints, with all who call on the name of our Lord Jesus Christ in every place, both theirs and ours:

chokri: Phikemezhe mu kezükeve Jihova uko po mu Niepo Jisu Khrista celü kevori po neko züba yite.
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: I pütü metülü kethezü khapü Jihova tsüsü bayo, kekrelamori Jihova ngokemezhe khapü neko tsüsü ketala Jisu Khrista zalü.
english: I always thank my God concerning you, for the grace of God which was given you in Christ Jesus;

chokri: Kekrelamori mhakeho pülü sheri neko püyo nethi mene süte, ne jüpolü mu mhaselü metülü.
english: that in everything you were enriched in him, in all speech and all knowledge;

chokri: Neko dolü Khrista zhopo thi kemetü süte,
english: even as the testimony of Christ was confirmed in you:

chokri: Süla neko Rüpü mhaphrüko tsakhu mo te, uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista mengo sü keto fü keba bi.
english: so that you come behind in no gift; waiting for the revelation of our Lord Jesus Christ;

chokri: Pü sheri thela ketso neko thi kemetü vo zoto, side nekopo thece kedi thivo Niepo Jisu Khrista tüsozho ketso bayi keto la.
english: who will also confirm you until the end, blameless in the day of our Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Jihova sü jüthozo, pula neko cüpü Nuo krotholü süyi, Jisu Khrista uko niepoo.
english: God is faithful, through whom you were called into the fellowship of his Son, Jesus Christ, our Lord.

chokri: Tsühi, I nekoce melo süyo, sazü jürako mu lipü neko, Niepo Jisu Khrista yolü püthi ketako, neko dolü kezü püthi lükerhü ti
english: Now I beg you, brothers, through the name of our Lord, Jesus Christ, that you all speak the same thing and that there be no divisions among you, but that you be perfected together in the same mind and in the same judgment.

chokri: Kekrelamori Chloe thümako tavori ace mhapoti, kemeliti neko dolü baketa, asazüko mu alipü neko.
english: For it has been reported to me concerning you, my brothers, by those who are from Chloe's household, that there are contentions among you.

chokri: Akepoco, neko mipüpü ti, I Apollo ceco, mori I Paul ceco, mori I Cephas ceco, mori I Khrista ceco.
english: Now I mean this, that each one of you says, "I follow Paul," "I follow Apollos," "I follow Cephas," and, "I follow Christ."

chokri: Khrista kezaphro vateme? Paul nekola cross yo sa süme? Mori Paul neko khapü jülopü süme?
english: Is Christ divided? Was Paul crucified for you? Or were you baptized into the name of Paul?

chokri: I Niepoo meza ba I neko mipüri kha jülo mpü sümo Crispus mu Gaius nilebi sasü.
english: I thank God that I baptized none of you, except Crispus and Gaius,

chokri: Molize neko azalü jülopü tele zita ketola,
english: so that no one should say that I had baptized you into my own name.

chokri: Süsa sheri I jülo khapü Stephanas cekroko tsüsü, süpi kezü I jülo khakesü semo I jülo khasasü me mo sheri.
english: (I also baptized the household of Stephanas; besides them, I don't know whether I baptized any other.)

chokri: Kekrelamori Khrista apo jülo khasü ketola aketsü sümo, vele jüyikeve po ketola zo, mhapokese mhase fümo, siziti Khrista cross keku thimedi kevapü.
english: For Christ sent me not to baptize, but to preach the Gospel--not in wisdom of words, so that the cross of Christ wouldn't be made void.

chokri: Kekrelamori cross jüyikevesü kata ketoko la kenyo jüzo, vele uko kelayi ketako la Jihova keku lü.
english: For the word of the cross is foolishness to those who are dying, but to us who are saved it is the power of God.

chokri: Süo ju hiziti thopü meta, “I mhakeseko mhase thimedi vato,” mu mhakeve kesu lü keseko thi kethathi süto
english: For it is written, "I will destroy the wisdom of the wise, I will bring the discernment of the discerning to nothing."

chokri: Mhakeseko mhase dipüce vota? Lesi keseko dipüce tata? Tsükehülü thezho khipü kemeli ketako dipüce vota? Jihova mhase kemoko thipü cejülü mhakeseko thisü ta mome?
english: Where is the wise? Where is the scribe? Where is the lawyer of this world? Hasn't God made foolish the wisdom of this world?

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova mhaselü, cejüopo Jihova seyi mote uko mhaselü, Jihova kelülü, uko mhasekemo zhopo lü somi melüyi sheri sükopo kelakeyi ngoyi ketala.
english: For seeing that in the wisdom of God, the world through its wisdom didn't know God, it was God's good pleasure through the foolishness of the preaching to save those who believe.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jew miko sazi menyü yo, Greek miko mhase jü phu yo.
english: For Jews ask for signs, Greeks seek after wisdom,

chokri: Vele uko Khrista pü cross yo gu keva zhopo kethi Jew miko la uphe kemesü püzo, mu Jew kemoko la kenyo jü.
english: but we preach Christ crucified; a stumbling block to Jews, and foolishness to Greeks,

chokri: Vele cüyi ketako, Jew miko sheri mu Greek miko sheri kenani Khrista hi Jihova kekuo zo, mu Jihova mhaselü jü.
english: but to those who are called, both Jews and Greeks, Christ is the power of God and the wisdom of God.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova kenyo zori thüma mhase ce veku, mu Jihova kemeza (kethathi) zori thüma keku ce kuku.
english: Because the foolishness of God is wiser than men, and the weakness of God is stronger than men.

chokri: Nekecü lü süte, asazüjürako mu alipü neko, neko thüma zhorele lü mhakese phimi zomo, kekumi zo rimo, cekro kerekrülü menu keyimi ri zomo.
english: For you see your calling, brothers, that not many are wise according to the flesh, not many mighty, and not many noble;

chokri: Vele Jihova kerenuko kedapü kerekrüko nga thi süte, mhase kemoko kedapü mhakeseko po thenga thiyi, kukemoko kedapü kekuko po thenga thiva.
english: but God chose the foolish things of the world that he might put to shame those who are wise. God chose the weak things of the world, that he might put to shame the things that are strong;

chokri: Jihova cejülü kerenuko mu khakevako keda yite, mhapüri kemoko khipü mhapüri thi süte.
english: and God chose the lowly things of the world, and the things that are despised, and the things that are not, that he might bring to nothing the things that are:

chokri: Süla mipüpori Jihova mhüjülü kemeko kemeha ta mo ketola,
english: that no flesh should boast before God.

chokri: Pü nekola kerhü boo (bodü) (jüri) zo, Khrista Jisu yo, kemezi, thi kemesa keyi, mu rhakeyi.
english: But of him, you are in Christ Jesus, who was made to us wisdom from God, and righteousness and sanctification, and redemption:

chokri: Süsüla thopü kemeta, “sopü kemeko yo sheri püpo Niepoo yo kemeko yite.”
english: that, according as it is written, "He who boasts, let him boast in the Lord."

chokri: I Ta nekoce kevorice, asazüjürako, mu alipü neko, I ketekhri kethi zhopo kethi mhase fülü po vorimo.
english: When I came to you, brothers, I didn't come with excellence of speech or of wisdom, proclaiming to you the testimony of God.

chokri: Kekrelamori I mhakekrepüri setoli lüpü tamo Jisu Khrista lebi zo, mu pü cross sü
english: For I determined not to know anything among you, except Jesus Christ, and him crucified.

chokri: I ta nekoce kevorice thathi mu meche de vori, pü reshü zode vori.
english: I was with you in weakness, in fear, and in much trembling.

chokri: Ajüpoko makro thechu mu mhase fü lümo, vele Rüpü thakalü mu pü kekulü.
english: My speech and my preaching were not in persuasive words of human wisdom, but in demonstration of the Spirit and of power,

chokri: Süla neko kemelü po thüma mhaselü mori Jihova kekulü bayi ketola.
english: that your faith wouldn't stand in the wisdom of men, but in the power of God.

chokri: Vele hako ketsü jü poyo vetsütso tiko dolü, vele cejülü ketsü jümo mori küzhomiko jü mo. Süko kemethu thita yo.
english: We speak wisdom, however, among those who are full grown; yet a wisdom not of this world, nor of the rulers of this world, who are coming to nothing.

chokri: Vele hako Jihova mhase khipoyo ketekhri tiko, mhase kevapü ketako, Jihova cejü bodü mhüjü khapü hako zapozale thi ketola.
english: But we speak God's wisdom in a mystery, the wisdom that has been hidden, which God foreordained before the worlds for our glory,

chokri: Süo cejülü kezho miko setamo, uko setayo lize uko zapozale Niepoo khipü cross (nphemedü süyo) gu valho.
english: which none of the rulers of this world has known. For had they known it, they wouldn't have crucified the Lord of glory.

chokri: Vele thopü kemeta umhüpü ngo kemo, mori uni khipü reni kemomori thüma melülü lü kemo Jihova kesüpü metate pü khrüyo kezhoko la.
english: But as it is written, "Things which an eye didn't see, and an ear didn't hear, Which didn't enter into the heart of man, These God has prepared for those who love him."

chokri: Vele Jihova süko kehapü hako meka süte pü Rüpü lüno, kekrelamori Rüpü mhametüko phu tayo, ile, Jihova zhü kerelüko.
english: But to us, God revealed them through the Spirit. For the Spirit searches all things, yes, the deep things of God.

chokri: Kekrelamori thüma sopü thüma zhüko zori sebata, thüma rüpü kesezo kemosa? Thürüo zhüko sü thüma püri semo, vele Jihova Rüpü süko se.
english: For who among men knows the things of a man, except the spirit of the man, which is in him? Even so, no one knows the things of God, except God's Spirit.

chokri: Tsüdo ngokeyi uko cejülü rüpü mo, vele Jihova Rüpü, ukopo uma thi mode Jihova khakesü mhako seyi ketola.
english: But we received, not the spirit of the world, but the Spirit which is from God, that we might know the things that were freely given to us by God.

chokri: Hako poketako thüma mhase pü metha keta jüko mo, vele Kemesa Rüpü metha ketako, rüpülü mhathoko khipü rüpülü zhüko zü kemede.
english: Which things also we speak, not in words which man's wisdom teaches, but which the Holy Spirit teaches, comparing spiritual things with spiritual things.

chokri: Vele uthiupho kepü thüma Jihova Rüpü zhüko seyi yomo, süko kenyo (mhase kemo) zhüzo siyo, mori süko seri yiho, kekrelamori süko rüpülü mhakeve kesu se kekre yiyo tila.
english: Now the natural man doesn't receive the things of God's Spirit, for they are foolishness to him, and he can't know them, because they are spiritually discerned.

chokri: Vele rüpü thümako mhametü pe lü tayo, sizo sheri pütho zono mipüri mejo ta yomo.
english: But he who is spiritual discerns all things, and he himself is judged by no one.

chokri: Kekrelamori sopü no Niepoo lüdoko sebata, side pücho thasü tome? Vele hako Khrista lüdo khipü tate.
english: "For who has known the mind of the Lord, that he should instruct him?" But we have Christ's mind.

chokri: Asazüjürako I nekoce rüpü zhüko poyi su, vele uthiumo laco, natsi miko ce kepo jü.
english: Brothers, I couldn't speak to you as to spiritual, but as to fleshly, as to babies in Christ.

chokri: I nojü khapü neko vathisü, themu khapü neko va thisümo, kekrelamori neko dolü tsüdo süko khiyiho, mori thiri yiho tila.
english: I fed you with milk, not with meat; for you weren't yet ready. Indeed, not even now are you ready,

chokri: Kekrelamori neko tsüri uthi upho medo kethilü bazolu, mhakemenyü kesoti ba, kelalati, süla neko uthi upho lüdolü tazo side thüma zhorele lü hübata mome?
english: for you are still fleshly. For insofar as there is jealousy, strife, and factions among you, aren't you fleshly, and don't you walk in the ways of men?

chokri: Neko humi poti, I Paul ceco, mu kekreo poti I Apollo ceco, hihi neko uthi upho medolü bata mome?
english: For when one says, "I follow Paul," and another, "I follow Apollos," aren't you fleshly?

chokri: Paul sü sopü mu Apollo sü thüma sopü, vele uni yithomizo, uni yono neko melüyi, Niepoo khapü thüma püpü tsü kesü bi?
english: Who then is Apollos, and who is Paul, but servants through whom you believed; and each as the Lord gave to him?
