chokri: Deobado zho theranha neko mhakha kesüko püvo kengu meta vate, Jihova neko po mha kepra kemeve thi keyibi I tavori tice süko püvo kengu bata mo ketola.
english: On the first day of the week, let each one of you save, as he may prosper, that no collections be made when I come.

chokri: Mu I tavori tice neko sopü neko medolü neko lesitho kesü khipü apo ketsüsü keto la, neko mephromevode kha Jerusalem lü kesü.
english: When I arrive, I will send whoever you approve with letters to carry your gracious gift to Jerusalem.

chokri: Mu mhace I tavota lize, uko zü kesa votato.
english: If it is appropriate for me to go also, they will go with me.

chokri: Tsühi I Mecedonia chozü tavori to, mu sülü ta neko ce vori to.
english: But I will come to you when I have passed through Macedonia, for I am passing through Macedonia.

chokri: Mu I tüsü tüco neko celü batato, I keho thi sheri arevü cholü neko azü vori te.
english: But with you it may be that I will stay, or even winter, that you may send me on my journey wherever I go.

chokri: I chodelü tsühi neko zü kesü mota, vele pütü dopü neko celü thothü süto, ziti melü ba, mhace Niepoo pü medo to lize.
english: For I do not wish to see you now in passing, but I hope to stay a while with you, if the Lord permits.

chokri: Vele I Ephesus lü Pentecost vori kemothe thothü bata to.
english: But I will stay at Ephesus until Pentecost,

chokri: Kekrelamori moze kesu pü cekha kezho pü khripü atsü metate; mu sülü kemetsumiko kekroba.
english: for a great and effective door has opened to me, and there are many adversaries.

chokri: Tsühi mhace Timothy vori lize, püpo methi mpe hide neko zübata te; kekrelamori pü sheri amhatho bi mhathi tazo tila.
english: Now if Timothy comes, see that he is with you without fear, for he does the work of the Lord, as I also do.

chokri: Süla mipüpori pü khapü mhatho kemo thiva hite, vele püpo krokrü de bayi te, side püpo ta ace vorite, I püzü kesünyü keba pü usazüjürami zo tila.
english: Therefore let no one despise him. But set him forward on his journey in peace, that he may come to me; for I expect him with the brothers.

chokri: Usazüo Apollos la I püpo ta neko ce vorinyü shuba, usazüjürako züde; vele pü medolü lize tha südo ce püta vori hole zi bate, vele pütü püla pütü mu thiyi kevece vori toshe.
english: Now concerning Apollos, the brother, I strongly urged him to come to you with the brothers; and it was not at all his desire to come now; but he will come when he has an opportunity.

chokri: Neko fü mu laba zote, kemelü lü tha metü pü bate thepumi thipü bate, metü meco yite;
english: Watch! Stand firm in the faith! Be courageous! Be strong!

chokri: Ne mhametülü kekhrü lü mhathi bazote.
english: Let all that you do be done in love.

chokri: I nekoce choyo, sazüjürako, neko Stephanas cekro ju seba tho, Achoia mhatho se zhürathoko, mu uko kemesako yitholü uko nüphayi keho thi tazo.
english: Now I beg you, brothers (you know the house of Stephanas, that it is the first fruits of Achaia, and that they have set themselves to minister to the saints),

chokri: Neko sheri sübi ti thite, mu kehopü sheri hako zü mhathi ketako yo; kekhrühi kesüko.
english: that you also be in subjection to such, and to everyone who helps in the work and labors.

chokri: Staphanas, Fortunatos mu Achaicus hiko kevori la anüshuzo; kekrelamori neko celü tsakhu kebako uko khasü neko tsüsü ketala.
english: I rejoice at the coming of Stephanas, Fortunatus, and Achaicus; for that which was lacking on your part, they supplied.

chokri: Uko a rüpü thi merhüsü mu nekothi kesürhü kesüla, süla neko sübi thisü bazote, süko bi tiko yo.
english: For they refreshed my spirit and yours. Therefore acknowledge those who are like that.

chokri: Asialü kehuko neko kelu süzüho; Aquila mu Priscilla ni sheri kelushu süho Niepoo zalü, unicelü kehu kebako metü.
english: The assemblies of Asia greet you. Aquila and Priscilla greet you much in the Lord, together with the assembly that is in their house.

chokri: Uko sazüjürako metü neko kelu süzüho; neko kemesa kemebo keti zholü hunehu mebo süte;
english: All the brothers greet you. Greet one another with a holy kiss.

chokri: I Paul atho abe pü ne kelu süho.
english: This greeting is by me, Paul, with my own hand.

chokri: Mhace thüma kehopü sheri Niepoo khrü kemomi püpo Anathema Maranatha thi tate.
english: If any man doesn't love the Lord Jesus Christ, let him be accursed. Come, Lord!

chokri: Ngokemezhe kekhrü uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista po neko zü ba keyio thite.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.

chokri: A kekhrü po neko yo ba yite, Jisu Khrista zalü. Amen.
english: My love to all of you in Christ Jesus. Amen.

chokri: Paul, Jihova müdolü Jisu Khrista apostle, mu uzüo Timothy ni püh Jihova kühu Corinth lü küba mu Achaia lü küba kümüsako mütü cie küsü:
english: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, and Timothy our brother, to the assembly of God which is at Corinth, with all the saints who are in the whole of Achaia:

chokri: ngokümüzhie mu thülükümünü Poo Jihova mu Nuo Jisu Khrista cielü küvoo po nieko zü ba küyio thiyite.
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Jihova pothüchuh-o püyite, u Nyepo Jisu Khrista Po, ngokümüzhie Po mu thokümülu mütü Poo,
english: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of mercies and God of all comfort;

chokri: Pü ha müzhie mütülü halü thomülu sü, sino hari müzhie kühopühri kübami lü thomüluyi yo, Jihova thokümülu püh halü thomülu küsüo süh no.
english: who comforts us in all our affliction, that we may be able to comfort those who are in any affliction, through the comfort with which we ourselves are comforted by God.

chokri: Ha Khrista la müzhie ri ngoyiyo küzho bi, Khristaeno thokümülu ri kha ha tsü yo.
english: For as the sufferings of Christ abound to us, even so our comfort also abounds through Christ.

chokri: Mu ha kümüzhieyi ri süo nie po thülükülu mu külaküyi ngoyi kütola, mu ha thokümülu ngoyi zorei süo niepo tho kümülu ngoyi kütola, süo nieri ha müzhie bi kümüzhieküyilü sügüsühe yi tsüsa.
english: But if we are afflicted, it is for your comfort and salvation. If we are comforted, it is for your comfort, which produces in you the patient enduring of the same sufferings which we also suffer.

chokri: Mu ha kümüri nieko mütü zoyito, kükrelamole nie hazü kümüzhieyo küzho bi hazü künüri ngoyito tsüla.
english: Our hope for you is steadfast, knowing that, since you are partakers of the sufferings, so also are you of the comfort.

chokri: Süla ha küzüko Asia lü kümüzhie kütsü hayo küvo niepo shiemo bansa mo, süo müdeyi kündi pü thizo, mu rhüyiküto ri lü mota zo:
english: For we don't desire to have you uninformed, brothers, concerning our affliction which happened to us in Asia, that we were weighed down exceedingly, beyond our power, so much that we despaired even of life.

chokri: ha hatho hayolü küsa zhokhro kha ha tsü kütsü lüta; kükrelamole ha thipüh hapo hatho ha mülüta mono Jihova küsami rei thi mürhüyi yo küzhoo münguyi kütola;
english: Yes, we ourselves have had the sentence of death within ourselves, that we should not trust in ourselves, but in God who raises the dead,

chokri: Pü tüsüh kürüh hilü ha süphrayi mu ha külasü mu Pü hisari küsalü u külasüto.
english: who delivered us out of so great a death, and does deliver; on whom we have set our hope that he will also still deliver us;

chokri: Süla nieri hazü kükhoyo no küchothi yi tsüsa ngokümüzhie püh güu küsü la mi kükro ha sühlü kümüza poto.
english: you also helping together on our behalf by your supplication; that, for the gift bestowed on us by means of many, thanks may be given by many persons on your behalf.

chokri: Ha künüo sü hihi, halü thori ha zhopo thiküba ha uzhotü mu müsamüzi no ciedzü hio mu nieko mhüdzülü müku no ciedzü mhashieo mo vele Niepoo ngokümüzhie püh nieko zü hü küba la.
english: For our boasting is this: the testimony of our conscience, that in holiness and sincerity of God, not in fleshly wisdom but in the grace of God we behaved ourselves in the world, and more abundantly toward you.

chokri: Ha thopüh nie kütsü mha kükre mo, vele nie phri mu shieyi küveko zo, süla nie shie mütsüyi küto müri yo.
english: For we write no other things to you, than what you read or even acknowledge, and I hope you will acknowledge to the end;

chokri: Nie hayolü hu shieküyi la Niepoo Jisu zho nha nie hala nienü to mu hari niela hanüyi to.
english: as also you acknowledged us in part, that we are your boasting, even as you also are ours, in the day of our Lord Jesus.

chokri: I hi shietü kütsüla hidzü nieko cie vo müra kütsü lüsü, sino nieko po künü kürükri ngoyi kütola.
english: In this confidence, I was determined to come first to you, that you might have a second benefit;

chokri: I Macedonia lü küvoce nieko püthü mu Macedonia lü la nieko ce vo mu Judea lü küvoce nieko po a cho phi tsü lüh.
english: and by you to pass into Macedonia, and again from Macedonia to come to you, and to be sent forward by you on my journey to Judea.

chokri: I siton lü kütsüce I lü kürüjo me? Mori I thipho müdo züno to, mo simo?
english: When I therefore was thus determined, did I show fickleness? Or the things that I purpose, do I purpose according to the flesh, that with me there should be the "Yes, yes" and the "No, no?"

chokri: Vele Jihova no dzütho tsü bino, hadzü püh niecie küsüto mori mo simo,
english: But as God is faithful, our word toward you was not "Yes and no."

chokri: ri Silvanus mu Timothy hako püh niecie zhopo thiküsüo Jihova Nuo, Jisu Khrista, yolü pütü mütülü to sitsüo zo.
english: For the Son of God, Jesus Christ, who was preached among you by us, by me, Silvanus, and Timothy, was not "Yes and no," but in him is "Yes."

chokri: Kükrelamole Jihova po küsüko pü oh siyo süla ha Amen sipüh Jihova zapozaleo yo süyo.
english: For however many are the promises of God, in him is the "Yes." Therefore also through him is the "Amen," to the glory of God through us.

chokri: Pü Khrista yolü uko thi kümütü sü mu ha kütsü püh niecie sü;
english: Now he who establishes us with you in Christ, and anointed us, is God;

chokri: Püh hayo soma vüve mu hetü ropüri kha ha mülülü süve.
english: who also sealed us, and gave us the down payment of the Spirit in our hearts.

chokri: I Jihova za cüpüh a zhopo thiyo süo I tsüo va Corinth lü vori mo küta nieko la küve zo.
english: But I call God for a witness to my soul, that I didn't come to Corinth to spare you.

chokri: Ha nie kümülümho kükha te sitsüo mo vele nie künü po kroyi kütola nie kükhrühi mi zo, kükrelamole nie kümülü lü tha mütü kübala.
english: Not that we have lordship over your faith, but are fellow workers with you for your joy. For you stand firm in faith.

chokri: I nieko lü thi müshü la mo kütola nieko cie vo mo küto müdoyi te
english: But I determined this for myself, that I would not come to you again in sorrow.

chokri: I nieko lü thi müshüsü tsüsa sopüh alü tho müluyi veta, I ulü thimüshüküsüko zo kümosa?
english: For if I make you sorry, then who will make me glad but he who is made sorry by me?

chokri: Süla I dzü thopüh nieko cie sü kükrelamole a küvo tüce a thipüh anüyi kütsü müsüh mako yolü alü thi müshü küva kümüprü la, I nieko mülükhro küba a künüo sü nieko mütü nü zo kütsüla.
english: And I wrote this very thing to you, so that, when I came, I wouldn't have sorrow from them of whom I ought to rejoice; having confidence in you all, that my joy would be shared by all of you.

chokri: Süo I kümüzhie mu alü thi no amhüdzü mükri zono nieko lü thi müshü vamo vele I nieko khrüshüba kütsü nieko po sheyi küto la thosü.
english: For out of much affliction and anguish of heart I wrote to you with many tears, not that you should be made sorry, but that you might know the love that I have so abundantly for you.

chokri: Vele humi ulü shütari süo alü thi müshüvamo vele küdopüh nieko mütü thi müshüve.
english: But if any has caused sorrow, he has caused sorrow, not to me, but in part (that I not press too heavily) to you all.

chokri: Sümi makro u müjoküta tsüpi sazho khatsü sa mori ve,
english: Sufficient to such a one is this punishment which was inflicted by the many;

chokri: vele nie uko küjova mu ulü thomüluyi te, pü lüzhiepo püthi müshü tsüntsova mo kütola.
english: so that on the contrary you should rather forgive him and comfort him, lest by any means such a one should be swallowed up with his excessive sorrow.

chokri: Süla I nieko po sümi khrü kütsü tha uka lasü no choyo.
english: Therefore I beg you to confirm your love toward him.

chokri: Hihi lano I thopüh nieko ce küsü nieko mha mütülü dzüzü tühlü ba memasi tsü sheyikütola.
english: For to this end I also wrote, that I might know the proof of you, whether you are obedient in all things.

chokri: Nieko mi kühopüh küjo ri vasü tayo Iri vasü vayo. I vatsü küva süo nieko lano Khrista mhüdzülü vatsü vayo.
english: Now I also forgive whomever you forgive anything. For if indeed I have forgiven anything, I have forgiven that one for your sakes in the presence of Christ,

chokri: Satan po uko yolü u mhopü thimokütola: kükrelamole uko pü doko shemo ba motsüla.
english: that no advantage may be gained over us by Satan; for we are not ignorant of his schemes.

chokri: I Troas lü Khrista dzüyiküve poto küvoce ri Niepoo yolü ciekha khri a tsüsü,
english: Now when I came to Troas for the Gospel of Christ, and when a door was opened to me in the Lord,

chokri: vele a sazüo Titus ngoyi mo kütala a lü rüyiyi mota, süla ta Macedonia lü vote.
english: I had no relief for my spirit, because I didn't find Titus, my brother, but taking my leave of them, I went out into Macedonia.

chokri: Jihova müza, pü Khrista yolü ha süta pü kuküyi müshesüyo mu hayolü Püh sheküyi rüh küthünyü thüthi kühorapühri müshe süyo kütsü la.
english: Now thanks be to God, who always leads us in triumph in Christ, and reveals through us the sweet aroma of his knowledge in every place.

chokri: Süo ha Jihova mhüdzülü Khrista rüh küveo thite, külayi kütako mhüdzülü ri mu kataküzüko mhüdzülü ri:
english: For we are a sweet aroma of Christ to God, in those who are saved, and in those who perish;

chokri: Kropüh la küsalü no küsalü küvocho mu kükreko la kürhülü no kürhülü küvocho. Mu somi si kütsü thiyi shüh-a?
english: to the one a stench from death to death; to the other a sweet aroma from life to life. Who is sufficient for these things?

chokri: Hano thüma kükro Jihova dzü thimüshüh kütsü bimo: vele ha pü mhüdzülü müzi, mu Nyepoo mhüdzücie ha Khrista la dzü po yo.
english: For we are not as so many, peddling the word of God. But as of sincerity, but as of God, in the sight of God, we speak in Christ.

chokri: Hatho ha zhopo thi swudü la tome? Me kropüh thiyo tsübi ha zhopo lüsi püh tsü mori niece püh mozho shü me?
english: Are we beginning again to commend ourselves? Or do we need, as do some, letters of commendation to you or from you?

chokri: Nie ha zhopo lüsi ha mülü lü thopüh kütako zo süo thüma mütü po she mu phriyi küto la.
english: You are our letter, written in our hearts, known and read by all men;

chokri: Mo nie Khrista yolü ha zhopo lüsi, lüsidzü püh rhemo vele rhü tayo küzho Jihova ropü yolü thoyi, kütsüyo mo vele nie mülü lüthoyi te.
english: being revealed that you are a letter of Christ, ministered by us, written not with ink, but with the Spirit of the living God; not in tablets of stone, but in tablets that are hearts of flesh.

chokri: Si kütsü Khrista yo ha kümülü Jihova yo nyiete;
english: Such confidence we have through Christ toward God;

chokri: Süo ha cieco ha küve nyiete sitsüo mo vele ha küve süo Jihova cielü küvo zo.
english: not that we are sufficient of ourselves, to account anything as from ourselves; but our sufficiency is from God;

chokri: Pü ha thipüh dzütsüdzükho küsao yitho thisü; süo lüsikho mo vele ropü lüno; kükrelamole lesikho mha thikhri vayo vele ropü kürhü khasüyo.
english: who also made us sufficient as servants of a new covenant; not of the letter, but of the Spirit. For the letter kills, but the Spirit gives life.

chokri: Siyo kha kürüh vaküto küsa yithoo kütsülü tho küsüo thürho vepüh kümüre thi Israelmiko pa Moses zü küveo mürayi kündi küthio,
english: But if the service of death, written engraved on stones, came with glory, so that the children of Israel could not look steadfastly on the face of Moses for the glory of his face; which was passing away:

chokri: Ropü yithoo didüpüh süce thürho nyiepü ta?
english: won't service of the Spirit be with much more glory?

chokri: Süla kümüjo chothoo zori u thürho nyie tsüsa, kümatho yithoo sücie thürho nyie küchüh moto me?
english: For if the service of condemnation has glory, the service of righteousness exceeds much more in glory.

chokri: Küra pü thürho küba süo dite kükrelamole süce thürhopü tsüo vo kütala.
english: For most assuredly that which has been made glorious has not been made glorious in this respect, by reason of the glory that surpasses.

chokri: Thimüdi küvao thori pü thürho nyie lezho basüh kütoo sücie thürho nyie rükri.
english: For if that which passes away was with glory, much more that which remains is in glory.

chokri: Ha saju si kütsü nyie kütsüla mükrü chiemono dzüpo tayo.
english: Having therefore such a hope, we use great boldness of speech,

chokri: Süo Moses-e no mhapüh püzü yoyi ta no Israelmiko pono külalü thürho küveo di kütsü ngomo kütao bimo.
english: and not as Moses, who put a veil on his face, that the children of Israel wouldn't look steadfastly on the end of that which was passing away.

chokri: Vele uko lü thimürüh vano uko dzükho küvüo phri kütsüce küyo süo thari bayo zo, küyo süo Khrista yo khiva yo.
english: But their minds were hardened, for until this very day at the reading of the old covenant the same veil remains, because in Christ it passes away.

chokri: Vele tha kütsori Moses küphri ce küyo süo uko mülü yopüh bayo.
english: But to this day, when Moses is read, a veil lies on their heart.

chokri: Siri Nyepoo cieco va kütasa küyo süo khiva yo.
english: But whenever one turns to the Lord, the veil is taken away.

chokri: Siyo Nyepoo sü Ropü zo, mu Nyepoo Ropü kübara, u kükha di tayo.
english: Now the Lord is the Spirit and where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is liberty.

chokri: Mu uko mütü uzü yo mono khriva lü küngo bi Nyepo zale ngo no süo uthi küdepüh pü rhü bi mama thapühlü kükrepühlü payiyo, süo Nyepoo celü vori sü Ropüo.
english: But we all, with unveiled face beholding as in a mirror the glory of the Lord, are transformed into the same image from glory to glory, even as from the Lord, the Spirit.

chokri: Ha ngokümüzhie ngoyi mu yitho hio ngokütsüla ha chomüza tayo mo.
english: Therefore seeing we have this ministry, even as we obtained mercy, we don't faint.

chokri: Si kütsüo mole ha kümükhrü kümüvako khave, küdove tsü cholü mo, mori kücejü lü Niepoo dzüko khimo vele küthoo zhopo thi mu mipo sülü ha lüdo ri sheyi küve thi tayo.
english: But we have renounced the hidden things of shame, not walking in craftiness, nor handling the word of God deceitfully; but by the manifestation of the truth commending ourselves to every man's conscience in the sight of God.

chokri: Mhanuü süo küvata tsüsa kata kütoko mhüdzülü zo
english: Even if our Gospel is veiled, it is veiled in those who perish;

chokri: Cedzü hio ropüko süko thülü mhüo thi mücie ve, zale küthi Khrista dzüyiküve Nyepoo Jihova rhü thi küpüo po uko vamve mo kütola.
english: in whom the god of this world has blinded the minds of the unbelieving, that the light of the Gospel of the glory of Christ, who is the image of God, should not dawn on them.

chokri: Ha hatho ha zhopo thiyo mo vele Khrista u Nyepoo zhopo thiyo mo ha pü cieta zo.
english: For we don't preach ourselves, but Christ Jesus as Lord, and ourselves as your servants for Jesus' sake;

chokri: Süo Jihova “küveo po küzüo va mveyite” si küsüo Khrista zülü ha mülü vamve sü.
english: seeing it is God who said, "Light will shine out of darkness," who has shone in our hearts, to give the light of the knowledge of the glory of God in the face of Jesus Christ.

chokri: Vele cienyie hio rünyo püh küthi büh yolü ta, süo ve lotsü kütsü kükuo Jihova yo mu hayo bamo kütsü thasü kütola.
english: But we have this treasure in clay vessels, that the exceeding greatness of the power may be of God, and not from ourselves.

chokri: Lucohico ha dzü kümüzhie yo, süla halü thathi tamo; halü dzü kühokürü thisü yo, vele hathipüh ha vedi vamo.
english: We are pressed on every side, yet not crushed; perplexed, yet not to despair;

chokri: Ha müthimünyi, vele ha khava mo; hatsahavü, vele ha müka vamo;
english: pursued, yet not forsaken; struck down, yet not destroyed;

chokri: Utü mütülü Khrista süh sü püh tayo, süo mipo hayo Khrista kürhü kübao sheyi kütola.
english: always carrying in the body the putting to death of the Lord Jesus, that the life of Jesus may also be revealed in our body.

chokri: Ha rhüküba hio Khrista la mipo püh küsa choco süsüyo, süo thimüshü vayiküve mo hio lü Khrista yo kürhü küba tha mika sü kütola.
english: For we who live are always delivered to death for Jesus' sake, that the life also of Jesus may be revealed in our mortal flesh.

chokri: Sino küsao hayo mhathiyo vele kürhüo nieyo mha thiyo.
english: So then death works in us, but life in you.

chokri: Uko kümülülü u ropü kürhüte thadzü thopüh kümüta “I mülü süla I po” hari sü mülü süla poyo.
english: But having the same spirit of faith, according to that which is written, "I believed, and therefore I spoke." We also believe, and therefore also we speak;

chokri: Nyepoo Jisu thi mürhü küsüo Khrista yo hari thimürhüyito hapüh nie sa uko züpüh voto.
english: knowing that he who raised the Lord Jesus will raise us also with Jesus, and will present us with you.

chokri: Mha hiko mütü nieko la zo, süo ngokümüzhie po kükremi tso mükro mama küyi zü Nyepoo zale chuh küchü mamayi kütola.
english: For all things are for your sakes, that the grace, being multiplied through the many, may cause the thanksgiving to abound to the glory of God.

chokri: Süla halü thathi yomo si kütsüo mole ha chozou mao thi katazü zori thülü mao tüsonha küsa mama züzo.
english: Therefore we don't faint, but though our outward man is decaying, yet our inward man is renewed day by day.

chokri: Kümüzhie za kütsüo hi pütü dopüh la küchothe zalethi küto müshio thipüh müdeyi kündi thi tazüe,
english: For our light affliction, which is for the moment, works for us more and more exceedingly an eternal weight of glory;

chokri: Kükrelamole hano küngoko whuzü mo vele ngokümoko whuzüe: küngoko sü pütü dopüh lazo vele ngokümoko küchothe zhü.
english: while we don't look at the things which are seen, but at the things which are not seen. For the things which are seen are temporal, but the things which are not seen are eternal.

chokri: Ha shebate, cedzü hilü thümoo ce tsü hü küba hio nrhüh ta zori, ha Jihova ce ha ce püh ba, süo thübe püh thimo mu küchothe tüyo ba küto ce.
english: For we know that if the earthly house of our tent is dissolved, we have a building from God, a house not made with hands, eternal, in the heavens.

chokri: Tsü kühü hilü ha mühimülo no tüyo ce sü po ha whuyi küto münyü yo.
english: For most assuredly in this we groan, longing to be clothed with our habitation which is from heaven;

chokri: Süo püh whuyi kütasa ha müchüh sa mo tato.
english: if so be that being clothed we will not be found naked.

chokri: Süla dzükhüce hilü kühü tüce ha mühimülo yo, süo rhüva kütolü mo vele ha whu sayi kütola, sino ditayi kühoo po katayi küve hio müzoyi tato.
english: For indeed we who are in this tent do groan, being burdened; not that we desire to be unclothed, but that we desire to be clothed, that what is mortal may be swallowed up by life.

chokri: Hiolü ha rüde thiküsüo sü Jihova zo, Pü Ropüo hetü püh thi hatsü ve.
english: Now he who made us for this very thing is God, who also gave to us the down payment of the Spirit.

chokri: Süla ha thüpu swu bayo, ha thümo ce hiolü kübace Nyepoo zü kümücu bayo tsü she.
english: Being therefore always of good courage, and knowing that, while we are at home in the body, we are absent from the Lord;

chokri: Ha küngoo lü mono kümülü lü tayo.
english: for we walk by faith, not by sight.

chokri: Thümo hio khava no Nyepoo zü bata nsa pü tsü ha thüpu shu bayo.
english: We are of good courage, I say, and are willing rather to be absent from the body, and to be at home with the Lord.

chokri: Süla ha ce hio lü bari mori Pü nü thiyi ton thühe thiyo.
english: Therefore also we make it our aim, whether at home or absent, to be well pleasing to him.

chokri: Kükrelamole u mütü Khrista mi kütsoküto bao mhüdzülü tha mütu zoto mu sülü u kühopühri mhatho küve ri küshü ri uzho ngoyito.
english: For we must all be revealed before the judgment seat of Christ; that each one may receive the things in the body, according to what he has done, whether good or bad.

chokri: Süla Nyepoo khri kümükrü she küyi bi miri hüyo, vele Jihova no ha rüle she mveyo, mu nieri nielülü ha she mve batho tsü mülüyo.
english: Knowing therefore the fear of the Lord, we persuade men, but we are revealed to God; and I hope that we are revealed also in your consciences.

chokri: Ha nie mhüdzülü hathohachu la nsa mo, vele niepo hala thüchu püyi nsa yo, sino niepo mi u mülülü mono chozu utho uchuyoküzhoko mhüdzülü thaka thiyi küto la.
english: For we are not commending ourselves to you again, but speak as giving you occasion of boasting on our behalf, that you may have something to answer those who boast in appearance, and not in heart.

chokri: Ha nyotata ri süo Nyepoo la zo, mücie bari süo nieko la zo.
english: For if we are beside ourselves, it is for God. Or if we are of sober mind, it is for you.

chokri: Süo Khrista kükhrüo tho ha hü zü ta kütala, süla ha lütüyi küta mipüh no mütüsühlü sa küva la, süla mütüko sate.
english: For the love of Christ constrains us; because we judge thus, that one died for all, therefore all died.

chokri: Pü mütüko sühlü save, sino rhü ta kütako po utho ula hü mono ula sa mu rhüyi kütao ceco hüyi küto la.
english: He died for all, that those who live should no longer live to themselves, but to him who for their sakes died and rose again.

chokri: Süla ha tsü mipühri thümoo ceco she tamote, ha thadzü Khrista ri thümoo ceco she vele tsüno sübi mote.
english: Therefore we know no one after the flesh from now on. Even though we have known Christ after the flesh, yet now we know him so no more.

chokri: Süla thüma kühopühri Khrista yo bata tsüsa püh kühü küsa te, mha küvüko dite mu hie mütü küsatsüte.
english: Therefore if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation. The old things have passed away. Behold, all things have become new.

chokri: Mu hiko mütü Jihova celü vori, Pü Khrista yo uzü küzüveyi te, mu vetho küthi yitho kha hatsü sü;
english: But all things are of God, who reconciled us to himself through Jesus Christ, and gave to us the ministry of reconciliation;

chokri: Süo Khrista yolü Jihova cedzüo zü vetho thiyi, sino uko küjoko püh uko müjomo no vetho dzüyio püh uko tsüsüte.
english: namely, that God was in Christ reconciling the world to himself, not reckoning to them their trespasses, and having committed to us the word of reconciliation.

chokri: Süla ha Khrista sühlümi te, sino Nyepoo no hayo nie cüyo. Ha Khrista sühlü thi niepo Jihova zü vetho thiyi no cüyo.
english: We are therefore ambassadors on behalf of Christ, as though God were entreating by us. We beg you on behalf of Christ, be reconciled to God.

chokri: Uko la küphoma she kümoo thipüh phoma ve, süo uko po püyo Nyepo Jihova mhüdzülü mathoyi küto la.
english: For him who knew no sin he made to be sin on our behalf; so that in him we might become the righteousness of God.

chokri: Küzüko ha niepo Jihova ngokümüzhie püh Macedonia kühuko lü küsü sheyi nsa;
english: Moreover, brothers, we make known to you the grace of God which has been given in the assemblies of Macedonia;

chokri: Uko kümüzhie püh rükhurüyi küzü lüri unü phayi ho küba mu thükre po uko cienyie huyi ta küzü lüri uko cieco mphrü zono mha khasü.
english: how that in much proof of affliction the abundance of their joy and their deep poverty abounded to the riches of their liberality.

chokri: I uko zhopo thito uko thiyiküve mu thiyiküve mhori unü sai zono ulücü lü khasü.
english: For according to their power, I testify, yes and beyond their power, they gave of their own accord,

chokri: Kümüsako phikümüzhie mhatho hi thibü toleno hace mülo zo,
english: begging us with much entreaty to receive this grace and the fellowship in the service to the saints.

chokri: Mu hio ha müri küba bimo, vele uko ukha Nyepoo tsü müra va no Jihova müdolü kha hatsü sü.
english: This was not as we had hoped, but first they gave their own selves to the Lord, and to us through the will of God.

chokri: Süla ha Titus hidzü thi swüdüküyi bi nieko cie kümphrü mhatho hio thitsü sü moyo küshü pü hüsü.
english: So we urged Titus, that as he made a beginning before, so he would also complete in you this grace.

chokri: Süla nie mha kühopühlüri ve--kümülüri, küpolüri, mhashelüri, nierha küthilüri, mu hakhrü kütsülüri--sübi mphrü kütsü mhatho hilü ri thi mve sü te.
english: But as you abound in everything, in faith, utterance, knowledge, all earnestness, and in your love to us, see that you also abound in this grace.

chokri: I thüzho bizo no niece po bamo vele nie thülükütho thino mi khrüyokütsü thasüküto la.
english: I speak not by way of commandment, but as proving through the earnestness of others the sincerity also of your love.

chokri: Nieko u Nyepoo Jisu Khrista ngokümüzhie mhathoo she bate, pü mhanye zori nieko la mha küdimi thite, sino nieko po mha künyemi thite.
english: For you know the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ, that, though he was rich, yet for your sakes he became poor, that you through his poverty might become rich.

chokri: Mu hilü I nieko tarhosü nsa, süo nieko humi nzisa thi swüdüküyi zo mono mhahu thi nsa,
english: I give a judgment in this: for this is expedient for you, who were the first to start a year ago, not only to do, but also to be willing.

chokri: Küba mhatho süo ri thitsüyite, siyi tsüsa nie thi nsa kübako ri thitsüyi to.
english: But now complete the doing also, that as there was the readiness to be willing, so there may be the completion also out of your ability.

chokri: Thi nsa kütsüo ba kütsüsa, püyolü kübao sü yiyi ve, püyolü ba kümoo mono.
english: For if the readiness is there, it is acceptable according to what you have, not according to what you don't have.

chokri: A küpoo no nieko po kümüzhie mu kükremi po rüyi kütoo mo.
english: For this is not that others may be eased and you distressed,

chokri: Vele kütüyi kütola tsü nie cienyie püh uko küdi vaphisü mu uko cienyie püh nieko küdi vaphi süzino kütüyi küto la.
english: but for equality. Your abundance at this present time supplies their lack, that their abundance also may become a supply for your lack; that there may be equality.

chokri: Süsü thopüh kümüta “kükro künguküyio ri rükriyi mo mu kütsa künguküyio ri müdo tamo.”
english: As it is written, "He who gathered much had nothing left over, and he who gathered little had no lack."

chokri: Vele Jihova müza, pü Titus lü thipüh alü bi nieko phi ulüni küyila.
english: But thanks be to God, who puts the same earnest care for you into the heart of Titus.

chokri: Pü ha lüdo ri yiyi zo, vele pütho nieko ce vori küto ulüni shuta zo.
english: For he indeed accepted our exhortation, but being himself very earnest, he went out to you of his own accord.

chokri: Kühu mütülü dzüyiküve mütha kütsü la mi püsheyo tsü a sazüo ri sa püzü kütsü sü zü.
english: We have sent together with him the brother whose praise in the Gospel is known through all the assemblies.

chokri: Sü lübimo vele kühuko püpo hazü rüvü no ngokümüzhie mhatho hio thi zhochümo Nyepoo za thikümüle kütola küdasü.
english: Not only so, but who was also appointed by the assemblies to travel with us in this grace, which is served by us to the glory of the Lord himself, and to show our readiness.

chokri: Süo mphrüno khaküsü mhatho hio lü mipo ha lü müjo mokütola.
english: We are avoiding this, that any man should blame us concerning this abundance which is administered by us.

chokri: Ha külü Nyepoo mhüdzülü lübi mono thüma mhüdzülüri mütsümüziyi kütola.
english: Having regard for honorable things, not only in the sight of the Lord, but also in the sight of men.

chokri: Süsa ha zümi püh püh uni sa kütsü sü zü, ha va kükro pü dojü kütsü lü mha kükrolü pülüküni thizo tsü ngoyi, pü tsüno nieko yo pü kümüri nyietü kütala ulünyi pfü sa taho.
english: We have sent with them our brother, whom we have many times proved earnest in many things, but now much more earnest, by reason of the great confidence which he has in you.

chokri: Titus zotsü ha besüh mi mu nieko choyi mizo, mu uzüni ri kühu choyimi, Khista zaleo lano.
english: As for Titus, he is my partner and fellow worker for you. As for our brothers, they are the apostles of the assemblies, the glory of Christ.

chokri: Süla mhütsu zono kühuo mhüdzülü nie kükhrüo mu ha niela thürho püyo küzho thasü te.
english: Therefore show the proof of your love to them in front of the assemblies, and of our boasting on your behalf.

chokri: A po kümüsako kükhrühi ju tho nieko tsü mori ve,
english: It is indeed unnecessary for me to write to you concerning the service to the saints,

chokri: Nieko sü thi nsa batsü I she ba tsüla, süla I Macedoniami mhüdzülü Achaia nzisa kürüdeyi te sino nieko la kümühayi, mu nieko lünyio la uko mi kükro hüyi;
english: for I know your readiness, of which I boast on your behalf to them of Macedonia, that Achaia has been prepared for a year past. Your zeal has stirred up very many of them.

chokri: Sizori I uzüko kütsüküsü no ha niela kümüha kütako po dzüchü thita mo kütola: I nieko thiyito le po küsü bi nieko po kürüdeyi kütola,
english: But I have sent the brothers that our boasting on your behalf may not be in vain in this respect, that, just as I said, you may be prepared,

chokri: Simo tsüsa Macedonia lü humi ha zü vodeno nie kürüdeyi kümo ngoyi ta tsüsa ha münga tato, nie mülükhropü kübalü.
english: so that I won't by any means, if there come with me any of Macedonia and find you unprepared, we (to say nothing of you) should be disappointed in this confident boasting.

chokri: Süla I lü kütsü uzüko müdzümüra kütsüpüh nieko ciesü no nieko himhüdzü phrapüh kümüta bi nieko kümuthi tsüo mono nie nüsai no khaküsüko kürüdeyi tayo ve küto lü kütsü la.
english: I thought it necessary therefore to entreat the brothers that they would go before to you, and arrange ahead of time the generous gift that you promised before, that the same might be ready as a matter of generosity, and not of greediness.

chokri: Püco no hihi: kühopühri tsava müdo küsüo rüh mütsa to, mu kühopühri tsava münyhü küsüo rüh mükro to.
english: Remember this: he who sows sparingly will also reap sparingly. He who sows bountifully will also reap bountifully.

chokri: Kühopühri ulü u mpe küyi bi khasü moyoshü, ulüsühsayi mori thimoyoshümo sihi, kükrelamole Nyepoo Jihova unüsai no khaküsümi phi unüyo.
english: Let each man give according as he has determined in his heart; not grudgingly, or under compulsion; for God loves a cheerful giver.

chokri: Mu Jihova thüjo kükretsü mütü püh nie kuchuhkühi thisüyive, sino mha kühopühlüri nie küchuhkühikhasüno nie münyhü süo püh mhatho küve thiyito.
english: And God is able to make all grace abound to you, that you, always having all sufficiency in everything, may abound to every good work.

chokri: Süo thopüh kümüta, “Pü mha küzapüh lucehice süve, püh küdimiko zave; Pü kümatho küchothe bato.”
english: As it is written, "He has scattered abroad, he has given to the poor. His righteousness remains forever."

chokri: Kühopühri tsapüh tsa küvami tsü küsüo mu kütico püh lüva thi küsümi nie cienye mu nie bete, tsa mu mhatho sheri thimükro süto.
english: Now may he who supplies seed to the sower and bread for food, supply and multiply your seed for sowing, and increase the fruits of your righteousness;

chokri: Nie mphrüshü küsüla mha mütü lü niethi münyesü, mu süla hayo nie Nyepoo kümüza poto.
english: you being enriched in everything to all liberality, which works through us thanksgiving to God.

chokri: Kükrelamole yitho hio kümüsako tsakhu vaphi kütsülübi mo no tsole kükremi kükro po küthüzü püh Jihova tsüyo.
english: For this service of giving that you perform not only makes up for lack among the saints, but abounds also through many givings of thanks to God;

chokri: Yitho hio thi dojü küsülü uko Jihova chuhyito nie thi kürünu püh Khrista dzüyiküveo khro süküyi la, mu uyo mu kükremi yori mphrü küsüla.
english: seeing that through the proof given by this service, they glorify God for the obedience of your confession to the Gospel of Christ, and for the liberality of your contribution to them and to all;

chokri: Uko niela cho kübace nie münyüto, süo Jihova ngokümüzhe rükri zo kütsü küba la.
english: while they themselves also, with supplication on your behalf, yearn for you by reason of the exceeding grace of God in you.

chokri: Jihova müzave pophayi kündi thügüuo la.
english: Now thanks be to God for his unspeakable gift!

chokri: I Paul Khrista zhoküve mu kümünü lü nieko ce poyo, nieko zü kübace mününui yo vele nieko zü bamo kütace nieko yo a dzü rüh tayo:
english: Now I Paul, myself, entreat you by the humility and gentleness of Christ; I who in your presence am lowly among you, but being absent am of good courage toward you.

chokri: I nieko ce choyo, süo apo nieko dülü küvoce apo a dzü rüh tamo küto mülü, I vo kütsü sa ha thinpho müdolü tatho no lüyo küzhoko yo poto küba bi.
english: Yes, I beg you that I may not, when present, show courage with the confidence with which I intend to be bold against some, who consider us to be walking according to the flesh.

chokri: Hatho thinpho zü hü baluri thümari zhoo bi thithüri thiyo mo.
english: For though we walk in the flesh, we don't wage war according to the flesh;

chokri: Ha rinyie sühyo küzhoko ciedzüo rinyie bimo vele velotsühkütsü küku cohu ri dzürhüyiküve küku sühyo.
english: for the weapons of our warfare are not of the flesh, but mighty before God to the throwing down of strongholds,

chokri: Sü püh mi mhalü kühopühri u thi kürükrü sü Jihova mhashe mütüyo küzhoko nüda, sino ulüdoko tüpüvo Khrista dzüzü lü süyo.
english: throwing down imaginations and every high thing that is exalted against the knowledge of God, and bringing every thought into captivity to the obedience of Christ;

chokri: Nie dzüzü lü voyi kütasa dzüzü thi tsoyi mo kütako müjosü kütola ha küsüh pü bate.
english: and being in readiness to avenge all disobedience, when your obedience will be made full.

chokri: Niemhü püh nie mhüdzülü küngoko pesü yi, kühopühri Khista zhü küta mülükhro yo tsüsa, sümi po hari Khrista zhü küta lüyi te.
english: Do you look at things only as they appear in front of your face? If anyone trusts in himself that he is Christ's, let him consider this again with himself, that, even as he is Christ's, so also we are Christ's.

chokri: Nyepoo apo nie thimüshüva mole nie phü müsü küsü küku kha atsü küsüo la I kümühari za tazori I münga tayi ho.
english: For though I should boast somewhat abundantly concerning our authority, (which the Lord gave for building you up, and not for casting you down) I will not be disappointed,

chokri: I lüsi thopüh nieko kücieküru küto la mo.
english: that I may not seem as if I desire to terrify you by my letters.

chokri: Uko po kütsü “pü lüsiko lü püdzü müshi mu kushu; vele mhütsu zotsü thathi mu püdzüpo mhapühri zo mo,” siyo
english: For, "His letters," they say, "are weighty and strong, but his bodily presence is weak, and his speech is despised."

chokri: Sümi po hi sheyi te, ha küdice lüsi lü po küsü bi ha küvoce ri sübin thizo to.
english: Let such a person consider this, that what we are in word by letters when we are absent, such are we also in deed when we are present.

chokri: Siyo hatho hathi mükre mori hapüh utho uchuhyo küzhomi zü kümüdeyo mo. Vele ukotho uko dolü kümüde mu huhu popüh kümüde süzi küzho uco she kümola.
english: For we are not bold to number or compare ourselves with some of those who commend themselves. But they themselves, measuring themselves by themselves, and comparing themselves with themselves, are without understanding.

chokri: Vele ha kümüha küyeyi ho, Jihova che hatsü küsü hapo pühvo nie tsono küsü pi kümühayi ho.
english: But we will not boast beyond proper limits, but within the boundaries with which God appointed to us, which reach even to you.

chokri: Ha niece vo kütsüce ta chuhküzü vori mo, mu ha Khrista dzüyiküveo püh niece vo küratho thizo.
english: For we don't stretch ourselves too much, as though we didn't reach to you. For we came even as far as to you with the Gospel of Christ,

chokri: Sino hatho hachuh küyie tamo, kükremi mhatho lano; vele ha kümüri nie kümülü po ve kühü mu nie dülü ha mhatho po ma müzho küchüyi,
english: not boasting beyond proper limits in other men's labors, but having hope that as your faith grows, we will be abundantly enlarged by you in our sphere of influence,

chokri: Sino hapo dzüyiküveo po nie müchuh vo kükremi ceri voyi, süzino hapo mi mhathoko la kümüha tamo.
english: so as to preach the Gospel even to the parts beyond you, not to boast in what someone else has already done.

chokri: Kühopühri kümüha küzhoo Nyepoo la kümühayi te.
english: But "he who boasts, let him boast in the Lord."

chokri: Thüma utho uchuh kütsüo yiyiyomo, vele Nyepoo püchuh küsüo uzho
english: For it isn't he who commends himself who is approved, but whom the Lord commends.

chokri: Atho künyodzü küdopüh pota zori nieko sügüsühüyi te; nieko sühüyi yo.
english: I wish that you would bear with me in a little foolishness, but indeed you do bear with me.

chokri: I kümüsa lü nieko rüyoyo, nie nopu püh takho thi mütate, niepüh rüli phosü püh bi khi Khrista cie süva tono.
english: For I am jealous over you with a godly jealousy. For I married you to one husband, that I might present you as a pure virgin to Christ.

chokri: Vele I müprü kütsü tünyhio püdo veshu no Eve küdo küva bi, nielü Khrista cieco nie sührhü mu müsamüzi ta kütsü külüo sühpüh ta küta müprü yo.
english: But I am afraid that somehow, as the serpent deceived Eve in his craftiness, so your minds might be corrupted from the simplicity that is in Christ.

chokri: Kükrelamole humi vono ha poyo kümo Jisu kükrepüh püh zhopo thisü, mori nie ropü ngoyi kümo küsapüh ngoyi, mori dzüyiküve nie ngoyikümo kükrepüh pühvo tsüsa nie süo yiyitayi ve.
english: For if he who comes preaches another Jesus, whom we did not preach, or if you receive a different spirit, which you did not receive, or a different gospel, which you did not accept, you put up with that well enough.

chokri: A külü iri apostle kürükrüthoko ceri tsü pfü mo.
english: For I reckon that I am not at all behind the very best apostles.

chokri: I dzü küpo do shemo zori mhashemo bamo; süo nie mha colünyi mu dolünyi lü mütsümüce nie kave.
english: But though I am unskilled in speech, yet I am not unskilled in knowledge. No, in every way we have been revealed to you in all things.

chokri: I küjo hu thi teme? Nieko thi kümüle sü kütola akhi kürünu no Nyepoo Jihova dzüyio küveo müchuh nieko mütha tsüla.
english: Or did I commit a sin in humbling myself that you might be exalted, because I preached to you God's Gospel free of charge?

chokri: I kühu kükreko rügoyi te uko kükhrühi püh nieko choyi thi tsülü,
english: I robbed other assemblies, taking wages from them that I might serve you.

chokri: Mu I nieko zü ba no tsakhuyi kütalüri I nieko mipühri müzhie thimo, kükrelamole uküzü Macedonia lü küvoko a tsakhuko pühvo ta tsüla. I sino nie müzhie thimo te mu hisa ri nie müzhie thi ho.
english: When I was present with you and was in need, I wasn't a burden on anyone, for the brothers, when they came from Macedonia, supplied the measure of my need. In everything I kept myself from being burdensome to you, and I will continue to do so.

chokri: Khrista cielü küvo küthoo ayo ba tsüla, a künü hio Achaia ciejü lümipühri a khaküyi di.
english: As the truth of Christ is in me, no one will stop me from this boasting in the regions of Achaia.

chokri: Ditsüna? I nieko khrü kümo la me? Jihova tho küsheo.
english: Why? Because I don't love you? God knows.

chokri: I tsü thiyo küzhoko thiba zoto, sino yitho lü u thürho ha zü kütüyi to rikütako khayi to.
english: But what I do, that I will do, that I may cut off occasion from them that desire an occasion, that in which they boast, they may be found even as we.

chokri: Kükrelamole süko kücejü sajuküshemi zo, mhaküdo no Khrista apostle küthi müdeküthi kropüh zo.
english: For such men are false apostles, deceitful workers, masquerading as Christ's apostles.

chokri: Süzo tsü mha ungo mo, Satan zori küveo choyimi do thiyo tsüla.
english: And no wonder, for even Satan masquerades as an angel of light.

chokri: Süla pü choyimi kümatho choyimi do thiri zhokre zomo, külalü uko tho umhathoo zü küsüh to.
english: It is no great thing therefore if his ministers also masquerade as servants of righteousness, whose end will be according to their works.

chokri: I po sühla yo, mipühri po apüh künyomi le lühi, mhanuü sitsüpüh thiri künyomi püh thino a züyi, sino a po kümüha zayi.
english: I say again, let no one think me foolish. But if so, yet receive me as foolish, that I also may boast a little.

chokri: I thüpu no kümühayo küzho hio Nyepoo zhopo mono künyomi bi no poyo.
english: That which I speak, I don't speak according to the Lord, but as in foolishness, in this confidence of boasting.

chokri: Mi kükro thüma zhorüle lü kümühayo küzho bi iri kümühato.
english: Seeing that many boast after the flesh, I will also boast.

chokri: Nieko nie nüsai no künyomi dzüzüyiyo nietho nie püh mhasheleno.
english: For you bear with the foolish gladly, being wise.

chokri: Nieko mipüh niepüh udzü thizori, niepüh uthitü thizori, mori nieyo kütüpro zori, mori uthi kürükrü mori bezi püh niezü vü zori nie sümi dzüzü thiyo.
english: For you bear with a man, if he brings you into bondage, if he devours you, if he takes you captive, if he exalts himself, if he strikes you on the face.

chokri: I müngazo, ha sü kütso thiküyi küku bamo. Vele mi mha kühopühlüri thüpu no kümüha tsüsa, I künyomi bi dzü poto iri sülü kümühayi ve.
english: I speak by way of disparagement, as though we had been weak. Yet however any is bold (I speak in foolishness), I am bold also.

chokri: Süko Hebrewmi me? Iri zo. Süko Israelmi me? Iri zo. Süko Abraham yiemi me? Iri zo.
english: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Israelites? So am I. Are they the seed of Abraham? So am I.

chokri: Süko Khrista yithomi me? I künyomi bino poto; I püko ce vepü; I püko ce uyi thi mükropü, thüdzü ri thi mükropü, mi aküvü ri kropü, tsükünu sata nu zo.
english: Are they servants of Christ? (I speak as one beside himself) I am more so; in labors more abundantly, in prisons more abundantly, in stripes above measure, in deaths often.

chokri: Jewmi pova pühngu a küvü heda pühmo thücü.
english: Five times from the Jews I received forty stripes minus one.

chokri: Vasüh sühpüh avü, vapüh kütsüpüh ava, vasüh püzu shüta, tüsozho püh mu tüzüzho püh dzülü ta,
english: Three times I was beaten with rods. Once I was stoned. Three times I suffered shipwreck. I have been a night and a day in the deep.

chokri: Tsükünu rüvüh lü kürü lü kümüthi zü küsüh, sühkütimi belü ri kümüthi zü küsüh, atho athüma yolü ri kümüthi züh küsüh, mülükümomi belü ri kümüthi züh küsüh, nade lüri kümüthi züh küsüh, nha dolü ri kümüthi züh küsüh, dzüküzholü ri kümüthi züh küsüh, uzümi kücedzüko belü ri kümüthi züh küsüh;
english: I have been in travels often, perils of rivers, perils of robbers, perils from my countrymen, perils from the Gentiles, perils in the city, perils in the wilderness, perils in the sea, perils among false brothers;

chokri: Kümüzhie mu kürüh mürha, tüzüzho kükro zümo, müri mu thüri, tsükünu tükhü thi, süh mu phochü ta.
english: in labor and travail, in watchings often, in hunger and thirst, in fastings often, and in cold and nakedness.

chokri: Sümho ri I potsoyi kümo tüsonha kühuko la alü kümüzhie tayo.
english: Besides those things that are outside, there is that which presses on me daily, anxiety for all the assemblies.

chokri: Sopüh thathiyi no I thathi mota? Sopüh müjo küvace I alüshü mota?
english: Who is weak, and I am not weak? Who is caused to stumble, and I don't burn with indignation?

chokri: I kümüha mozho shüyo athathiko popüh kümüha to.
english: If I must boast, I will boast of the things that concern my weakness.

chokri: Jihova u Nyepoo Jisu Khrista nie Po, küchothe thüchuh küpüo I müda mo tsü sheba.
english: The God and Father of the Lord Jesus Christ, he who is blessed forevermore, knows that I don't lie.

chokri: Damacus lü küzhoo Aretas küdeo khro kübao atüyi tono Damascus nadeo khüba,
english: In Damascus the governor under Aretas the king guarded the city of the Damascenes desiring to arrest me.

chokri: Vele mürha lü a püh cohu küvecelü mükisü no apo pü belü tayi.
english: Through a window I was let down in a basket by the wall, and escaped his hands.

chokri: Kümüha morive, sülü küprakümve pühri bamo tsüla, vele vemho Nyepoo khi amüka küsü posü to.
english: It is doubtless not profitable for me to boast. For I will come to visions and revelations of the Lord.

chokri: Khrista ceco thüma püh tücie kürinda vo kütace zü tü hasüh-o lü kho, thümoo same samosü I shemo Nyepoo tho küsheo.
english: I know a man in Christ, fourteen years ago (whether in the body, I don't know, or whether out of the body, I don't know; God knows), such a one caught up into the third heaven.

chokri: I thüma si kütsü she thümoo same thümoo samo shi I shemo Nyepoo Jihova tho küsheo.
english: I know such a man (whether in the body, or outside of the body, I don't know; God knows),

chokri: Sino poshü kütsü khü kropüh she, thüma po poshü kütsü khü.
english: how he was caught up into Paradise, and heard unspeakable words, which it is not lawful for a man to utter.

chokri: Thüma hio sühlü I kümüha to: vele utho uceco kümühayi ho, a thathio lüzo kümosa.
english: On behalf of such a one I will boast, but on my own behalf I will not boast, except in my weaknesses.

chokri: I kümüha nsa zori I kümülo mi bi ho, kükrelamole I küthoo poto. Vele I sülü a küthüyi te, sino mipo a küngo mu a khü küsheo pi alü mükho ta mo kütola.
english: For if I would desire to boast, I will not be foolish; for I will speak the truth. But I forbear, so that no man may account of me above that which he sees in me, or hears from me.

chokri: A po mha tha aka küsüko lü alü müzhori ta mo kütola tsahu püh püh athi lü süve Satan choyimi po amüthi süto no apo athi müzhori ta mo küto la.
english: By reason of the exceeding greatness of the revelations, that I should not be exalted excessively, there was given to me a thorn in the flesh, a messenger of Satan to buffet me, that I should not be exalted excessively.

chokri: I Nyepoo ce vasüh cho, hio khiva no sideno.
english: Concerning this thing, I begged the Lord three times that it might depart from me.

chokri: Vele pü ace po kütsü, “A ngokümüzhie sü n la tsühzo, a kükuo no küthathi thipü ve zhochüyi yo tsüla.” Süla I athathio lü kümüha tsü anüpüte, Khrista kükuo po ayo bayi to tsüla.
english: He has said to me, "My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness." Most gladly therefore I will rather glory in my weaknesses, that the power of Christ may rest on me.

chokri: Süla I Khrista lano thathi, thatha lü, mhakürü, kümüthikümünyi mu zhoswü pü kütsü anüte, süo I thathi kübace ku batayo tsüla.
english: Therefore I take pleasure in weaknesses, in injuries, in necessities, in persecutions, in distresses, for Christ's sake. For when I am weak, then am I strong.

chokri: I nyoza te, nieko a kümu thipüh hilü süvae. I nieko celü thüchuh püyitsü müsüh, I mhathomharo mo vele apostle küzhothoko cieri tsüpü chiemo.
english: I have become foolish in boasting. You compelled me, for I ought to have been commended by you, for in nothing was I inferior to the very best apostles, though I am nothing.

chokri: Apostel kütho zasi tha nieko ka süte sügüsühü, zasiko mu ungomhathoko mu küku mhathoko lü.
english: Truly the signs of an apostle were worked among you in all patience, in signs and wonders and mighty works.

chokri: Nieko mha dipüh lü kühu kükreko cethathipüa? I apüh nieko müzhie thi kümoomho. Hihi la a küjo vasüte.
english: For what is there in which you were made inferior to the rest of the assemblies, unless it is that I myself was not a burden to you? Forgive me this wrong.

chokri: Hei tsüo va hi nieko cie votoleno kürüde kütsü va süh-o taho. Mu I nieko müzhie thiho, kükrelamole I nieko mha phuzü mo nieko phuzü tsüzo; ununie po ukrünie ve müdo mole ukrünie po ununie ve müdoyo tsüla.
english: Behold, this is the third time I am ready to come to you, and I will not be a burden to you; for I seek not your possessions, but you. For the children ought not to save up for the parents, but the parents for the children.

chokri: I a nüsai no kütsisü to nieko la kütsi süto, I nieko khrü mükropü mu nieko a khrü mütsapü to me?
english: I will most gladly spend and be spent for your souls. If I love you more abundantly, am I loved the less?

chokri: Ala nieko püh thimo tsü lüyi, nieko po kütsü ado veno thüdo püh nieko tüyi tale siyo.
english: But be it so, I did not myself burden you. But, being crafty, I caught you with deception.

chokri: I humi kütsü püh nieko ce küsüce nieko yo küprakümve hu ngoyi ta me?
english: Did I take advantage of you by anyone of them whom I have sent to you?

chokri: I Titus kütsü sü, uzümi püh sa kütsüsü. Titus nieko yo kütüpro ta me? Hani ropü pühlü mhathi mo me? Hani phecie kümhano ta mome?
english: I exhorted Titus, and I sent the brother with him. Did Titus take any advantage of you? Didn't we walk in the same spirit? Didn't we walk in the same steps?

chokri: Hie hatho hayoyi küto lü yotho sino lü ba me? Ha Khrista yolü no Jihova mhüdzülü poyo. Ha mha kühopüh thiri nie thi mveyi küto la zo.
english: Again, do you think that we are excusing ourselves to you? In the sight of God we speak in Christ. But all things, beloved, are for your edifying.

chokri: I müprü küba a küvoce nieko a medo bi ba ngoyi mo mori nieko angopüh nieko müdo biyi mota sino kümüli, huhu ngo uro, lükhulüha, küzüküshü, uzhozhü külü, huhu tha, Sali thi, ko küka mu kübvü kütsü süh küta müprü.
english: For I am afraid that by any means, when I come, I might find you not the way I want to, and that I might be found by you as you don't desire; that by any means there would be strife, jealousy, outbursts of anger, factions, slander, whisperings, proud thoughts, riots;

chokri: I laküvoice a Jihova po athi kürünu no apo hidzü phoma küva müsakümo, peü, mu küthünga mhathoko lü rüdeyi kümola apo uko kri zo küta müprü.
english: that again when I come my God would humble me before you, and I would mourn for many of those who have sinned before now, and not repented of the uncleanness and sexual immorality and lustfulness which they committed.

chokri: I tsüo vasüh-o nieko ce vozü. thübü kühopühri zhopo küna mori süh bayi moyoshü.
english: This is the third time I am coming to you. "At the mouth of two or three witnesses shall every word established."

chokri: I niecie küvo cie phoma küvako mu kükreko ri tarho sü mu tsü nieko zü ba kümo cie nieko tarho lasü zü, a küvoce süko yo azho veyi ho.
english: I have said beforehand, and I do say beforehand, as when I was present the second time, so now, being absent, I write to those who have sinned before now, and to all the rest, that, if I come again, I will not spare;

chokri: Kükrelamole nieko Khrista ayo dzüpoyo kütsü zhopo she nsa yo tsüla. Pü nieko yo ba kütsü thathi namo vele kushu no batsüla.
english: seeing that you seek a proof of Christ who speaks in me; who toward you is not weak, but is powerful in you.

chokri: Hidzü pü thathi no mipo püpüh vüve, vele Jihova küku la rhüh tate. Hari thathi no püyo hü, vele nieko cie küvoce püzü no Jihova küku lü hü süto.
english: For he was crucified through weakness, yet he lives through the power of God. For we also are weak in him, but we will live with him through the power of God toward you.

chokri: Nietho nie pesüte nie kümülü lü hü ba memo si. Nietho nie dojü süte, Khrista yo hü ba memo si? Nie uzholü hüyi ba mota motho!
english: Test your own selves, whether you are in the faith. Test your own selves. Or don't you know as to your own selves, that Jesus Christ is in you?--unless indeed you are disqualified.

chokri: A kümüri nie ha uzhomo kütsü ngoyi hotho siyo.
english: But I hope that you will know that we aren't disqualified.

chokri: Ha Jihova cie niepo küshü thita mo kütola cho bayo, ha dojü kütsülü uzho kütsümi thiyi kütoo la mono niepo uzho thi hüyi küto lano, hatho küshümi thi ta zori.
english: Now I pray to God that you do no evil; not that we may appear approved, but that you may do that which is honorable, though we are as reprobate.

chokri: Ha mhapühri thipüh küthoo mutsu tayi ndi, vele küthoo la mhathi zoto.
english: For we can do nothing against the truth, but for the truth.

chokri: Ha thathi mu nie ku küba cie hanü bayo. Mu ha kücho sü niepo ve lotsüh küyio zo.
english: For we rejoice when we are weak and you are strong. And this we also pray for, even your perfecting.

chokri: Süla I nieko chücie ba kümocie dzü hiko thosü zü, süo a küvoce apo Nyepoo küku kha atsü küsü nieko dzürhüva mole thi mütü sü kütoo püh nieko yo müchie ta mo kütola.
english: For this cause I write these things while absent, that I may not deal sharply when present, according to the authority which the Lord gave me for building up, and not for tearing down.

chokri: Külalü, küzüko, vetsüzo voyi. Niecho kütso kümüziyi, adzü züyi, külürhü bayi, küzüve bayi; mu kükhrü Jihova künüo nieko zü bayi to.
english: Finally, brothers, rejoice. Be perfected, be comforted, be of the same mind, live in peace, and the God of love and peace will be with you.

chokri: Kümüsa mbo püh huniehu külü süte.
english: Greet one another with a holy kiss.

chokri: Kümüsako mütü nie külü süho.
english: All the saints greet you.

chokri: Nyepoo Jisu Khrista ngokümüzhie, Jihova kükhrü, mu Kümüsa Ropü krothoo po nieko mütü zü ba küyio thiyi te. Amen.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, the love of God, and the communion of the Holy Spirit, be with you all. Amen.

chokri: Paul apostle mipü, thüma celü mo, vele Jisu Khrista mu Poo Jihova celü, püthi merhü kesüo.
english: Paul, an apostle (not from men, neither through man, but through Jesus Christ, and God the Father, who raised him from the dead),

chokri: Uko sazüjürako azü kebako, thopü Galatiamiko ce kesü.
english: and all the brothers who are with me, to the assemblies of Galatia:

chokri: Phikezhe kekhrü po neko yo ba keyi thite, mu thelü kenü Jihova ukopo celü kevori mu u Niepo Jisu Khrista celü kevori.
english: Grace to you and peace from God the Father, and our Lord Jesus Christ,

chokri: Uko kephomako la pü khapü utsüsü, side tsüdo cejülü mha kesuko lü uphuyi ketola, Jihova mharhülü mu uko Poo zalü.
english: who gave himself for our sins, that he might deliver us out of this present evil age, according to the will of our God and Father--

chokri: Püpo kechothe zapozale thiyite; Amen (jüpo mu lesi ketholü).
english: to whom be the glory forever and ever. Amen.

chokri: Ango zo, (umahü) neko rekri (dithemolü) Khrista phikemezhe kekhrü jüyi kevelü neko cükeyilü rede keta.
english: I marvel that you are so quickly deserting him who called you in the grace of Christ to a different gospel;

chokri: Süosü thüma kekremi mo, vele humi neko kebü kesü Khrista jüyikeve thipü kebü kesü.
english: and there isn't another gospel. Only there are some who trouble you, and want to pervert the Gospel of Christ.

chokri: Vele hako sheri, mori tüyo jüyi mitho tülü kiri zo sheri, jüyikeve hako zhopo thiketa mode kekre zhopo thita lize püpo reshu kepüo thitate.
english: But even though we, or an angel from heaven, should preach to you any gospel other than that which we preached to you, let him be cursed.

chokri: Himhüjü hako poketa bi, mu tsühi sheri I pokesü bi, mhace thüma humi zhopo kekre potayo lize hako ngokeyi jüyikeve kemopü, poyo lize püpo reshu kepüo thite.
english: As we have said before, so I now say again: if any man preaches to you any gospel other than that which you received, let him be cursed.

chokri: I thüma nü, tsühi, thinyü de jüpo züme, mori Jihova nü thinyü zü? Mori I thüma medo thi kenyü phu züme? Kekrelamori I thüma nü medo thinyü ta yo lize I Khrista cetami kethi mesümo.
english: For am I now seeking the favor of men, or of God? Or am I striving to please men? For if I were still pleasing men, I wouldn't be a servant of Christ.

chokri: Vele I jükeve po keta hio thüma celü vorimo siti I zhopo thi neko cesü yo.
english: But I make known to you, brothers, concerning the Gospel which was preached by me, that it is not according to man.

chokri: Kekrelamori I süo thüma celü ngoyi mo tila, mori I süo metha sümo, vele Jisu Khrista celü kehala kesüzo.
english: For neither did I receive it from man, nor was I taught it, but it came to me through revelation of Jesus Christ.

chokri: Neko thajü Jewmiko mha kepo keti keba sesü te, uko nanifü, dipü bide I Jihova kehu methi meni, thi kesü pi kezü sheri, mu süo vameka süri.
english: For you have heard of my way of living in time past in the Jews' religion, how that beyond measure I persecuted the assembly of God, and ravaged it.

chokri: Jewmiko a shuyelü anani kütso meveyi, azü ketü kethedü tiko dülü ukopi thisü; aponeko zho relekolü alü keni mezüri ta ketala.
english: I advanced in the Jews' religion beyond many of my own age among my countrymen, being more exceedingly zealous for the traditions of my fathers.

chokri: Vele Jihova pünü pü medo ketace, pü azu nobulü athi süphra mekre mu pü kekhrü kene lü acüyi.
english: But when it was the good pleasure of God, who separated me from my mother's womb, and called me through his grace,

chokri: Pünu kehala ace sü, apo therünamiko ce jüyikeve poketola, sizi metha I uthi uza medo zü tamo.
english: to reveal his Son in me, that I might preach him among the Gentiles, I didn't immediately confer with flesh and blood,

chokri: Sizo mori I ta Jerusalem lüri vomo, amhüjü apostle thi ketako celü, vele I ta Arabia lü vo, mu ta sala Damascus lü vori;
english: nor did I go up to Jerusalem to those who were apostles before me, but I went away into Arabia. Then I returned to Damascus.

chokri: Süsa tetse sü (3) sa lü I tavo Peter zü kesü ketola, mu zho keripüngu (15) püzü ba.
english: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to visit Peter, and stayed with him fifteen days.

chokri: Vele I apostle kekreko ngomo, James Niepoo sazüo lebi ngo.
english: But of the other apostles I saw no one, except James, the Lord's brother.

chokri: Tsühi I lesi thopü neko tsü kesüko, Hihe, Jihova mhüjülü I meda mozo.
english: Now about the things which I write to you, behold, before God, I'm not lying.

chokri: Süsa laco I ta Syria mu Cilicia khüko whivo.
english: Then I came to the regions of Syria and Cilicia.

chokri: Judealü kehuceko se bamo, Khrista lü ta ketako.
english: I was still unknown by face to the assemblies of Judea which were in Christ,

chokri: Vele uko seti lebi, “thajü uko methi meni ketao tsüdo jüyikeve zhopo thipü pü meka keva kehuko ce süba tele.”
english: but they only heard: "He who once persecuted us now preaches the faith that he once tried to destroy."

chokri: Mu uko ala Niepoo zapo zale thisü ta.
english: And they glorified God in me.

chokri: Süsa tetse kerida sa I ta Jerusalem lü sala vo, Barnabas zü devo mu Titus zü asa mejita.
english: Then after a period of fourteen years I went up again to Jerusalem with Barnabas, taking Titus also with me.

chokri: Mu resü reva keta I kehapü uko mese sü, I jüyikeve zhopo thipü Gentilemi (Jewkemoko) dolü sü, side tavo kemelemiko zü kesüsü, sizimolize I thi ketako kemethu thiva moketola.
english: I went up by revelation, and I laid before them the Gospel which I preach among the Gentiles, but privately before those who were respected, for fear that I might be running, or had run, in vain.

chokri: Sütüce Titus, pü Greekmi pü püyirü molu, azüta, pü kemuthi püyi kerülü sü molu.
english: But not even Titus, who was with me, being a Greek, was compelled to be circumcised.

chokri: Kekrelamori kemeda sazüjürako, ulüba kemolü tavori mekhrü zode ure ula ta ukekha kedilü Khrista Jisu yo ungo keyilü utüzüvo thejü thiva veba tila.
english: This was because of the false brothers secretly brought in, who stole in to spy out our liberty which we have in Christ Jesus, that they might bring us into bondage;

chokri: Sükola thethi pü tsüsü, mu hathi kerenu pütsü, bavüdo püri kemo jüyikeve ketho po nekozü sezi sü tavo ketola.
english: to whom we gave no place in the way of subjection, not for an hour, that the truth of the Gospel might continue with you.

chokri: Vele thüma hiko mhapüri zomo sheri mhapü bi ketako, kehopü bi sheri, uko la hayo mhapüri zo tamo; Jihova thümapü ri rho mekre ta yomo, thüma mhapüri zokemoko mhapü bi ketako la, I süko la mhapüri bizo ta mozo.
english: But from those who were reputed to be important (whatever they were, it makes no difference to me; God doesn't show partiality to man)--they, I say, who were respected imparted nothing to me,

chokri: Vele mha kedekesü pü uko kengoce, yirü kemokola jüyikeve kha amelü keva, sübi yikerümiko la jüyikeve kha Peter melü sü.
english: but to the contrary, when they saw that I had been entrusted with the Gospel for the uncircumcision, even as Peter with the Gospel for the circumcision

chokri: Kekrelamori Peter yikerü kola apostle mhatholü thizü zo, sübi Gentilemiko la jüyikeve kushuzo ayo sheri.
english: (for he who appointed Peter to the apostleship of the circumcision appointed me also to the Gentiles);

chokri: James, Cephas, John hiko bodü tsüko jüyikeve kha amelü kesü yirü kemoko la uko se mu ngo keyice sübi yi kerü miko la jüyikeve kha Peter melüsü; siti ngoyi.
english: and when they perceived the grace that was given to me, James and Cephas and John, they who were reputed to be pillars, gave to me and Barnabas the right hand of fellowship, that we should go to the Gentiles, and they to the circumcision.

chokri: Uko mhakedimila mhalü rekra sü ti mesüzo ziti lebi, sübi apo sheri sülü mhatho thivota keto ketsü süto.
english: They only asked us to remember the poor--which very thing I was also zealous to do.

chokri: Vele Peter ta Antioch lü vori, I püzü ketüta pü mhüjülü mhotsu zode, pü mejota;
english: But when Peter came to Antioch, I resisted him to the face, because he stood condemned.

chokri: Kekrelamori sümhüjü James celü voriti, pü Gentile (Jewkemomi) zü mhati, vele uko tavori tice pü resüta, de kre tata; side yi kerüko mpe ta.
english: For before some people came from James, he ate with the Gentiles. But when they came, he drew back and separated himself, fearing those who were of the circumcision.

chokri: Jewmiko sübi püzü kreta, sübi zode Barnabas sheri ukro kre ketako zü tata.
english: And the rest of the Jews joined him in his hypocrisy; so that even Barnabas was carried away with their hypocrisy.

chokri: Vele uko pütülü jüyikeve kemezilü tamo ketala (ketholü tamo) I uko metü mhüjülü mhotsu zode Peter ce pota, mhace no Jewmipü lize Gentilemi zhorele hüta teme, Jewmiko zholü hü mode, sizi lize dipüla Gentilemiko kemu thi ukopo Jewmiko zhoko züno ziyo?
english: But when I saw that they didn't walk uprightly according to the truth of the Gospel, I said to Peter before them all, "If you, being a Jew, live as the Gentiles do, and not as the Jews do, why do you compel the Gentiles to live as the Jews do?

chokri: Uko süculü Jewmi, mu Gentile mimo kephomako kro.
english: "We, being Jews by nature, and not Gentile sinners,

chokri: Thezholü mipüri thi kematho yimo ziti uko seba, vele Jisu Khrista kemelü lüzo, süla uko Jisu Khrista melü tate, side Khrista yo lü uko thi kematho yi ketola, kemelülü; thezho kezülü mozo; kekrelamori thezho mhatho kethilü mipü thi uphosheri thi kemathoyi mo
english: yet knowing that a man is not justified by the works of the law but through the faith of Jesus Christ, even we believed in Christ Jesus, that we might be justified by faith in Christ, and not by the works of the law, because no flesh will be justified by the works of the law.

chokri: Vele mhace uko thikemathoyi ketola Khrista phu kevoce uko kephomalü tazo siti ngoyiyo, size Khrista kephoma kezhoo teme? Kenitho (Jihova po süo khava te).
english: But if, while we sought to be justified in Christ, we ourselves also were found sinners, is Christ a servant of sin? Certainly not!

chokri: Kekrelamori I meka kevao thi salazü zü ketala, I vajo ketami tazo.
english: For if I build up again those things which I destroyed, I prove myself a law-breaker.

chokri: Kekrelamori I thezho zü ketalü la thezholü sate, side I therüo la rhüyi to.
english: For I, through the law, died to the law, that I might live to God.

chokri: I Khrista zü Cross yo guve, siri I rhütazo, süo I moli Khrista lü zo, (Khrista alü rhü ta ketala), kehü I tsü hü kebahi athiapho Jihova Nu kemelülü hü tate, pü a kekhrülü, pü kha atsükesülü.
english: I have been crucified with Christ, and it is no longer I that live, but Christ living in me. That life which I now live in the flesh, I live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me, and gave himself up for me.

chokri: I Jihova kekhrü thi kechoza va mozo, mhace kemezi thezho kezülü vorito lize, süsa Khrista ula sa kesüo kemethu thite.
english: I don't make void the grace of God. For if righteousness is through the law, then Christ died for nothing!"

chokri: O kemelü Galatiamiko, sopü neko kedo va side neko ketho jüzü thi mota, Jisu Khrista mhüjülü thaka kesü kha Cross yo gu sala tozüme?
english: Foolish Galatians, who has bewitched you not to obey the truth, before whose eyes Jesus Christ was openly set forth among you as crucified?

chokri: Mhahio I neko celü lebi sekeyizo, neko Kemesa Rüpü ngokeyi thezho kezülü me? Mori kemelü reni keyilü ta?
english: I just want to learn this from you. Did you receive the Spirit by the works of the law, or by hearing of faith?

chokri: Neko melo shu bateme? Kemesa Rüpülü shudüyi side neko uthi upholü thitsütso sü tüme?
english: Are you so foolish? Having begun in the Spirit, are you now completed in the flesh?

chokri: Neko mhakekrolü kemezhe kesü kemethu lü teme mhace süo tsühi kemethu thi teme?
english: Did you suffer so many things in vain, if it is indeed in vain?

chokri: Pü Kemesa Rüpü mhatho thi kesüo, mha ungo thisü neko dolü; süo thezho kezülü thi sümo, mori kemelü reni kesülü thi süta?
english: He therefore who supplies the Spirit to you, and works miracles among you, does he do it by the works of the law, or by hearing of faith?

chokri: Abraham Jihova melükeyi, mu pü phipü kemezimi thi keyi.
english: Even as Abraham "believed God, and it was counted to him for righteousness."

chokri: Kemelü ketako sheri phripü Abraham nuneko thi keta neko se batho.
english: Know therefore that those who are of faith, the same are children of Abraham.

chokri: Ketholesi hijü popü kemeta Jihova tho therünamiko kemelülü thi kemathoyi keto jüyikeve Abraham ce zhopo thi kesü mhüju n yono shuye metüpo thejo ngoyito siti popü meta.
english: The Scripture, foreseeing that God would justify the Gentiles by faith, preached the Gospel beforehand to Abraham, saying, "In you all the nations will be blessed."

chokri: Süla uko kemelü lü ketako Abraham kemelü kevelü thejo ngoyi te.
english: So then, those who are of faith are blessed with the faithful Abraham.

chokri: Kekrelamori thejoo lü mhathi ketakhü thezholü reshuve, thopü kemeta, kehopüri thezho metü thitsomo ketami thezholü thopü kemeta reshu sümi yo ku tato.
english: For as many as are of the works of the law are under a curse. For it is written, "Cursed is everyone who doesn't continue in all things that are written in the book of the law, to do them."

chokri: Vele mipü sheri Niepoo mhüngoce thi kematho sümo, süo sizi tüzo, sejomo, kekrelamori “kemathomi kemelü la hüyi to.”
english: Now that no man is justified by the law before God is evident, for, "The righteous will live by faith."

chokri: Thezho sü kemelü me, vele thümao süo zü mu thiketako hüyi to.
english: The law is not of faith, but, "The man who does them will live by them."

chokri: Khrista thezholü reshu pü ketako uko phorha thisü, pü thipü uko la reshü kepü thisü, süo thopü kemeta, “kehopüri süyo kegumi po reshu kepüo thite,”
english: Christ redeemed us from the curse of the law, having become a curse for us. For it is written, "Cursed is everyone who hangs on a tree,"

chokri: Sizi keyilü Abraham thejo po Gentilemi yo vori ketola Khrista Jisu yolü no: sizi keyilü ukopo reshujü thipü kemeta Kemesa Rüpü ngoyi ketola.
english: that the blessing of Abraham might come on the Gentiles through Christ Jesus; that we might receive the promise of the Spirit through faith.

chokri: Asazüjürako, I thüma zhorelelü jüpo ba; süo sizi sheri I thüma jü kholü siri mhace süo kethota lize, thümapüri süo kedeva, mori thi medi keva thita ho; mori sa mekro ri süho.
english: Brothers, I speak like men. Though it is only a man's covenant, yet when it has been confirmed, no one makes it void, or adds to it.

chokri: Tsühi Abraham mu pütsa la thejo reshujü khameta, pütsa kekrola mo vele püsi pülazo, mu usi süo Khrista zo.
english: Now the promises were spoken to Abraham and to his seed. He doesn't say, "To seeds," as of many, but as of one, "To your seed," which is Christ.

chokri: Akepo, jükho hijü kethozo ti mesekesü, Jihova Khrista lü ta, thezho tetse krada sümeri keta sari süo thi rede (medi) vamo, side jükha kesü süo mhapüri mo keta thimo.
english: Now I say this. A covenant confirmed beforehand by God in Christ, the law, which came four hundred thirty years after, does not annul, so as to make the promise of no effect.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace kalü süo thezholü ta lize, süo jü reshu khakesü lü mote; vele Jihova jü reshu kesü thipü Abraham tsüsü
english: For if the inheritance is of the law, it is no more of promise; but God has granted it to Abraham by promise.

chokri: Size dipü la thezho choyi thiba? Süo sakesü kekrelamori vajoketako thipü popü kemeta lü voriyi ketola, mu süo tü mu cejü ni dolü choyi kethiko belü süculü thopü kemetala; tüyochoyimiko belü.
english: What then is the law? It was added because of transgressions, until the seed should come to whom the promise has been made. It was ordained through angels by the hand of a mediator.

chokri: Tümu cejüni dolü choyi kethi süo mipü zomo, vele Jihova sü pü lebizo.
english: Now a mediator is not between one, but God is one.

chokri: Thezho Jihova jü khakesü reshu süo metsu teme? Keni (motozo-Jihova po süo khavate). Kekrelamori thezho khakesü hüyi ketola lize, kemezi sü thezho kha kesü lazo.
english: Is the law then against the promises of God? Certainly not! For if there had been a law given which could make alive, most assuredly righteousness would have been of the law.

chokri: Vele ketholesi metüko phoma keta posü ve, Jisu Khrista melü keyi lü reshujü khasüko tsü ketola.
english: But the Scriptures shut up all things under sin, that the promise by faith in Jesus Christ might be given to those who believe.

chokri: Vele kemelü kevori mhüjü uko thezho khro tata, hisa laco kehala sü keto kha me tata.
english: But before faith came, we were kept in custody under the law, shut up to the faith which should afterwards be revealed.

chokri: Süla thezho sü lesicelü uketha mi akhi püvo Khrista celü sü ketoo, side kemelü lü uthi kemathoyi ketola
english: So that the law has become our tutor to bring us to Christ, that we might be justified by faith.

chokri: Vele kemelü vori ketasa uko lesicelü kemetha khro bamote.
english: But now that faith has come, we are no longer under a tutor.

chokri: Kekrelamori neko metü Jihova nune thite, Jisu Khrista melü keyi lü.
english: For you are all children of God, through faith in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Kekrelamori neko thüma kekro Khrista yolü jülopüyi mu Khrista thi beyite.
english: For as many of you as were baptized into Christ have put on Christ.

chokri: Sülü Jew mori Greek kekremote, mori thejümi mori ukekha kedimi kekremo, mori thenomi mori thepumi kekre mote, kekrelamori neko metü Khrista Jisu lü püthi ketala.
english: There is neither Jew nor Greek, there is neither slave nor free man, there is neither male nor female; for you are all one in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Mu mhace neko Khrista zhüta lize neko Abraham tsa (si) kote, mu pü kelü ri tazo püpo keta jülü.
english: If you are Christ's, then you are Abraham's seed and heirs according to promise.

chokri: Tsühi a kepo, kalüo zo sheri pü natsi kebathe micetami zü kekremo, pü tho metüpi Niepo thi bazori.
english: But I say that so long as the heir is a child, he is no different from a bondservant, though he is lord of all;

chokri: Vele pü kemetha mu püpi kekhati püpo keda metayo.
english: but is under guardians and stewards until the day appointed by the father.

chokri: Uko sheri sübizo, uko natsi kebece, cejülü zho cebi uko phapü tazo (kemelümiko thezholü rhayi keta).
english: So we also, when we were children, were held in bondage under the elements of the world.

chokri: Vele pütü tsovori ketasa, Jihova pü Nuo ketsüsü, thenomipü yo pü thisü, thezholü pü thiyi.
english: But when the fullness of the time came, God sent out his Son, born to a woman, born under the law,

chokri: Thezho khro ketako rhayi ketola, side upo pü nutho thita ketola.
english: that he might redeem those who were under the law, that we might receive the adoption of children.

chokri: Mu neko nutho thi ketala Jihova pü Rüpü ketsü (pü nu Rüpü) pü umelü lü sü, side pü kra “Abba, Apo” siba.
english: And because you are children, God sent out the Spirit of his Son into your hearts, crying, "Abba, Father!"

chokri: Süla neko cetami mote vele nutho nu thi te, mu mhace pünu thita lize pü kalümi sheri thite Khrista yo lüno.
english: So you are no longer a bondservant, but a son; and if a son, then an heir of God through Christ.

chokri: Sisheri neko Jihova se kemoce neko Therü kemoko choyi thita.
english: However at that time, not knowing God, you were in bondage to those who by nature are not gods.

chokri: Vele tsühi, neko Jihova seyi te, mori Jihova neko se bate, dipü bide neko regü sala vo khrü ketimi kethathi zhokereyilü vo tata, sülü neko thejü kethi kemenyü lü vo sala ta tome?
english: But now that you have come to know God, or rather to be known by God, why do you turn back again to the weak and miserable elements, to which you desire to be in bondage all over again?

chokri: Neko tüsozhoko, tekhriko mu pütüko, mu tetseko phi bayo,
english: You observe days, months, seasons, and years.

chokri: I neko methi (mpe) ba tele, molize I mhatho thipü neko yo kesü kemethu thita ketola.
english: I am afraid for you, that I might have wasted my labor for you.

chokri: Asazüjürako, I neko ce choyo, “abiyite” kekrelamori I sheri neko bizo tila, neko areza sümo
english: I beg you, brothers, become as I am, for I also have become as you are. You did me no wrong,

chokri: Neko seba I therace kukemolü (kethathilü) I jüyikeve zhopo thi neko ce vori.
english: but you know that because of weakness of the flesh I preached the Gospel to you the first time.
