chokri: Ala medo kephi sü upho uthi neko mela va kemo, mori lümo tamo, vele akhipü tüyo jüyimi pü bi, Jihova celü kevori, Khrista Jisu celü. (Galatiami thezho kezülü thejo medi keva).
english: That which was a temptation to you in my flesh, you didn't despise nor reject; but you received me as an angel of God, even as Christ Jesus.

chokri: Süsa neko kedipü thejo poba? I neko jüko seba, neko mhace thiyi vetolize, netho nemhüko sheri celapü atsü va keto thizo;
english: What was the blessing you enjoyed? For I testify to you that, if possible, you would have plucked out your eyes and given them to me.

chokri: I neko ce jütho kepola neko akhipü ne ngomuni thita mome?
english: So then, have I become your enemy by telling you the truth?

chokri: Uko ne thipü neko hüshüsü, vele vetamo, ile, uko neko saphri mote, ne ukoyo mhathi sü ketala.
english: They zealously seek you in no good way. No, they desire to alienate you, that you may seek them.

chokri: Vele mhakevelü ulü hü tive pütü metülü, mu I neko züba tice lebi mo (thezho mu ngokemezhe ni kezü tayomo).
english: But it is always good to be zealous in a good cause, and not only when I am present with you.

chokri: A nune keniko, I thenomi nunu vathi thide Khrista neko lülü hüyi kemothe.
english: My little children, of whom I am again in travail until Christ is formed in you--

chokri: I tsühi neko zü keba menyü zole, mu afü redesü, kekrelamori I neko melü tüyi kemola.
english: but I could wish to be present with you now, and to change my tone, for I am perplexed about you.

chokri: Ace posüte, neko thezho khro ta kenyüko, neko thezho reni sü mo teme?
english: Tell me, you that desire to be under the law, don't you listen to the law?

chokri: Thopü kemeta, Abraham pünu kenane, mipü thezhokhro keta nu mu kekre ukekha diti nu.
english: For it is written that Abraham had two sons, one by the handmaid, and one by the free woman.

chokri: Vele thezhokhro ketao nu uthiupho zholü nu; vele kekhakedi thenopü nu jü popü kemetalü.
english: However, the son by the handmaid was born according to the flesh, but the son by the free woman was born through promise.

chokri: Süosü jüpü kemede kesü, mha hinihi jükho kena, püo lize Sinai cejütu yo Agar yo hü keyi thezho khro ketapü.
english: These things contain an allegory, for these are two covenants. One is from Mount Sinai, bearing children to bondage, which is Hagar.

chokri: Agar sü Sinai tuyo Arabia lü, mu Jerusalem lü fükho tsühi thi kesü mu pü nune zü thejü thi keta pü.
english: For this Hagar is Mount Sinai in Arabia, and answers to the Jerusalem that exists now, for she is in bondage with her children.

chokri: Vele Jerusalem lü kebao upi, süo ukekha kedi, süpü uko metü zu.
english: But the Jerusalem that is above is free, which is the mother of us all.

chokri: Süo thopü kemeta, Rechü süte, no nudipü thopha prari te, no menu vathi thi kemopü, krasüte, methu ketapü pünu kekro menu süte, pünopu pü kebace kro ku te.
english: For it is written, "Rejoice, you barren who don't bear. Break forth and shout, you that don't travail. For more are the children of the desolate than of her who has a husband."

chokri: Tsühi uko sazüjüra kethiko Isaac celü kevori nuko, jüphrapü kemetalü.
english: Now we, brothers, as Isaac was, are children of promise.

chokri: Vele uthi upho medolü menu keyi nuneko tsühi Rüpülü nuko methi meni kebako.
english: But as then, he who was born according to the flesh persecuted him who was born according to the Spirit, so also it is now.

chokri: Sizo sheri thopü kemeta dipü biba? Thenopü mu pünu thezhokhro ketani hu meta ve, thezhokhro ketapü mu pünuni po ukekha kedi pü mu pünuni kalü thiho.
english: However what does the Scripture say? "Throw out the handmaid and her son, for the son of the handmaid will not inherit with the son of the free woman."

chokri: Süla tsühi, azüneko, uko thezhokhro ketapü nuneko mote, vele ukekha kedipü nu te.
english: So then, brothers, we are not children of a handmaid, but of the free woman.

chokri: Süla tha metüyi te, Khrista ne phrüsü kevasa, mu thejü rophalü lü sala hite.
english: Stand firm therefore in the liberty by which Christ has made us free, and don't be entangled again with a yoke of bondage.

chokri: Hihe I Paul nekoce poba, mhace neko yirü tolize Khrista nekola kemeve bamo.
english: Behold, I, Paul, tell you that if you receive circumcision, Christ will profit you nothing.

chokri: Kekrelamori I yi kerü koce po keba, pü thezhoko metü thi keto thepo kepü mi thi te.
english: Yes, I testify again to every man who receives circumcision, that he is a debtor to do the whole law.

chokri: Khrista nekola mhapüri kemo thite, neko thezholü nethi kemezi yita lize, neko ngokemezhelü retute.
english: You are alienated from Christ, you who desire to be justified by the law. You have fallen away from grace.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko Kemesa Rüpü yo kemezi kemeri meri ba kemelülü.
english: For we, through the Spirit, by faith wait for the hope of righteousness.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jisu Khrista yolü yi kerü sü mhapüri zomo; mori yirü kemosheri mhapüri zo tamo, vele kekhrülü kemelü mhathi kesü.
english: For in Christ Jesus neither circumcision amounts to anything, nor uncircumcision, but faith working through love.

chokri: Neko tave shubate, sopü nekopo ketho jüzü kethilü neko kede süta?
english: You were running well! Who interfered with you that you should not obey the truth?

chokri: Neko kehi kemu thipü neko cüyi mo.
english: This persuasion is not from him who calls you.

chokri: Khre kedopü la pükro metü kra tayo.
english: A little yeast grows through the whole lump.

chokri: I Niepoo la neko yo akemeri ba, ne mhakekre lüta mo zotho, vele pü neko kebü kesüo sopü sheri sheco püyo kuto.
english: I have confidence toward you in the Lord that you will think no other way. But he who troubles you will bear his judgment, whoever he is.

chokri: Mu asazüjürako mhace I yikerü metha ta lizo I dipüla mipo amethi zo tata? Süsa Cross nümo kethi thela thi tate.
english: But I, brothers, if I still preach circumcision, why am I still persecuted? Then the stumbling-block of the cross has been removed.

chokri: Uko tavo neko kebü kebako a kemenyü ukopo tapra ta lize veto.
english: I wish that those who disturb you would cut themselves off.

chokri: Kekrelamori, asazüjürako neko cüpü ukekha kedilü süve, nekopo nenü nemedo thita keto lamo, uthi upho medokolü, vele kekhrülü hunehu khrühi keti.
english: For you, brothers, were called for freedom. Only don't use your freedom for gain to the flesh, but through love be servants to one another.

chokri: Kekrelamori thezho metü jüpülü thitso sü, jü süosü lü, no nsüzanu khrüpü ntho nkekhrü bi süte.
english: For the whole law is fulfilled in one word, in this: "You shall love your neighbor as yourself."

chokri: Mhace neko hunehu mece mu tati ba lize, menu yite, neko hunehu mezo tita mo ketola (thimesa keyi sü Rüpü lüzo, thezho lümo).
english: But if you bite and devour one another, be careful that you don't consume one another.

chokri: I hio po, neko Rüpü tayite, mu ne thi nepho kemenyü thita hite.
english: But I say, walk by the Spirit, and you won't fulfill the lust of the flesh.

chokri: Kekrelamori uthi upho kemenyü sü Rüpü metsuyo, mu Rüpü nü sü uthi upho kemenyü metsu yo, mu uninü kekre; süla neko kemenyü thinyüsa vele thiyi ho tayo.
english: For the flesh lusts against the Spirit, and the Spirit against the flesh; and these are contrary to one other, that you may not do the things that you desire.

chokri: Vele mhace Rüpülü keta neko, thezho lüta mote.
english: But if you are led by the Spirit, you are not under the law.

chokri: Tsühi, uthi upho mhathoko mese bate, süko dipü (hikohi) kekhrükezü, kethenga mhatho, mesakemo, mha meho menyü.
english: Now the works of the flesh are obvious, which are: adultery, sexual immorality, uncleanness, lustfulness,

chokri: Marhe kereshü kethenyü, kephi metsü, kelakre, kemedu (chüphri) lüda, kemehye, mishu kedo, kethera (vajo).
english: idolatry, sorcery, hatred, strife, jealousies, outbursts of anger, rivalries, divisions, heresies,

chokri: Mi resa, kedokhri, kemezü, yoyi kemo, sübiti; I thajü nekoce posü ve, sübiti; thi ketako tüyo kedeba kalü thiyi hozo.
english: envyings, murders, drunkenness, orgies, and things like these; of which I forewarn you, even as I also forewarned you, that those who practice such things will not inherit the Kingdom of God.

chokri: Vele Rüpü seko, kekhrü, kenü, thelü kerüyi, sügüsühe mecho, uzho menü keti, keve, kemelü.
english: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness,

chokri: Renunhe, ukethükerü, thezho kehopüri süko kemetsu bamo.
english: gentleness, and self-control. Against such things there is no law.

chokri: Khrista yo ketako uthi upho mu mhamenyü ketako khipü Cross yo guve.
english: Those who belong to Christ have crucified the flesh with its passions and lusts.

chokri: Mhace u Rüpü hüta lize uko Rüpü lü chotayi tokhe.
english: If we live by the Spirit, let's also walk by the Spirit.

chokri: Uko kemethu kemerü zapozaleko menyü tahi takhe; hunehu lüda kethi mu hunehu menyü zimo lekhe.
english: Let's not become conceited, provoking one another, and envying one another.

chokri: Sazüjürako, mhace humi kekri keta püyo vorita lize, ne rüpüthümako sübi tiko züla pü uthilü sü vate, rüpü kemenülü, netho nerelece medo sü, molize nesheri medo kephi sübiti neyo ku tari semo tila.
english: Brothers, even if a man is caught in some fault, you who are spiritual must restore such a one in a spirit of gentleness; looking to yourself so that you also aren't tempted.

chokri: Neko humelü luni khiyite, mu Khrista zho thitso süte.
english: Bear one another's burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ.

chokri: Kekrelamori humi mhapüri zomosheri utho ulüpü mhapü bizo ba lize pütho püshü kedo tate.
english: For if a man thinks himself to be something when he is nothing, he deceives himself.

chokri: Thüma kehopüri pü mhatho seyi te, mu pütho pü mhatho lü pünü yito, kekremi mhatholü mori.
english: But let each man test his own work, and then he will take pride in himself and not in his neighbor.

chokri: Kekrelamori thüma kehopüri utho ulü ni (umezhe) püyi zoto tila.
english: For each man will bear his own burden.

chokri: Pü mi kemethao jülü mhakeve popü mipo seyi keve thisü te.
english: But let him who is taught in the word share all good things with him who teaches.

chokri: Mipo neshu va hite, Jihova sü thekrü thenyü zomo kekrelamori kehopüri tsava (prü) kesüo pü süo rüla zoto.
english: Don't be deceived. God is not mocked, for whatever a man sows, that will he also reap.

chokri: Kekrelamori uthi upholü tsava kesüo, pü uthi upholü keka rü sala zoto tila. Vele Rüpülü tsava kesüo pü Rüpülü kechothe kerhü rüla zoto.
english: For he who sows to his own flesh will from the flesh reap corruption. But he who sows to the Spirit will from the Spirit reap eternal life.

chokri: Mu mha keve kethilü ho meza ta hikhe, kekrelamori pütü tülü uko rüla zoto tila, uko mhace phesa tamo lize.
english: Let us not be weary in doing good, for we will reap in due season, if we don't give up.

chokri: Uko pütü keve kebace bi uko thüma metü koyo mhakeve thisü khe, metüko ceri kerekri thipü kemelü lü kebako cekroyo thisü khe.
english: So then, as we have opportunity, let's do what is good toward all men, and especially toward those who are of the household of the faith.

chokri: Neko ngo bate, atho abe khipü lesi kecho thopü neko tsü kesü.
english: See with what large letters I write to you with my own hand.

chokri: Thüma kekro ukemenyü uthouthi upho khipü neko meka kesü neko kemu thipü yirü keto thi bate, Khrista Cross-o methimeni sü keto lebizo.
english: As many as desire to look good in the flesh, they compel you to be circumcised; only that they may not be persecuted for the cross of Christ.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko yi kerüko lebi thezho kezümi zomo, vele neko po yirü keto menyü ba, side nethi nepho pi uko zapozale thiyi ketola.
english: For even they who receive circumcision don't keep the law themselves, but they desire to have you circumcised, that they may boast in your flesh.

chokri: Vele Jihova po khavate (kenithove) I nekoyo zapozale thi ketosa, uko Niepoo Cross lebizo. Püyo ala cejükemenyü metü khipü guve; mu I sheri cejüo la agu sü vazo.
english: But far be it from me to boast, except in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ, through which the world has been crucified to me, and I to the world.

chokri: Kekrelamori Khrista Jisu la yikerü sü mhapüri zo tamo, mori yirü kemo sheri, vele thüma kesa thi keta.
english: For in Christ Jesus neither is circumcision anything, nor uncircumcision, but a new creation.

chokri: Thezho hibi tilü kelakhü, mikekro sheri, thelü kemenüpo uko zü tate, mu phi kemezhe, mu Isreal Rüo yo ketako.
english: As many as walk by this rule, peace and mercy be on them, and on God's Israel.

chokri: Tsüyovi mipü pori akebü hite, ayo athiapho yo thekuko ta Niepoo Jisu la.
english: From now on, let no one cause me any trouble, for I bear the marks of the Lord Jesus branded on my body.

chokri: Sazüjürako Niepo Jisu Khrista ngokemezhe po neko rüpü zü ta keyi thite. Amen.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit, brothers. Amen.

chokri: U Jihova müdolü Jisu Khrista yitho thi küta Paul-e thopüh Jisu Khrista yolü jütho küba Ephesus lü kümüsako ce küsü.
english: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, to the saints who are at Ephesus, and the faithful in Christ Jesus:

chokri: u Jihova u Po mu Nyepoo Jisu Khrista celü ngokümüzhe mu küzühküveo po neko züh bayi.
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Khrista tüyolü küvo Ropü thüjoko püh uko prü küsüo Nyepoo Jisu Khrista ne Po po thüjo küpü-o thiyi.
english: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us with every spiritual blessing in the heavenly places in Christ;

chokri: Uko po pü kükhrülü kümüsa mu kürho dakümo thiyi kütona cedzü mejuküyi mhüdzü uko küdaküyi kümha.
english: even as he chose us in him before the foundation of the world, that we would be holy and without blemish before him in love;

chokri: Pütho pünü pü müdo kümhade Jisu Khrista yolü uko thükü püh pü nu nuthonu thiyi küto na küsühtü püh mütate.
english: having predestined us for adoption as children through Jesus Christ to himself, according to the good pleasure of his desire,

chokri: Pü ngokümüzhe zapozale küthi-o swüyikütona uko khapüh pü kükhrüko thiyite.
english: to the praise of the glory of his grace, by which he freely bestowed favor on us in the Beloved,

chokri: Püza yolü mu pü ngokümüzhe küzholü uko rhaküyi mu u küphoma vaküyi ngoyite.
english: in whom we have our redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of our trespasses, according to the riches of his grace,

chokri: Side uko po thüdo küve mhase mu küsekülü lü mhaneyi u küswu külhü thiyi.
english: which he made to abound toward us in all wisdom and prudence,

chokri: Püthopünü pü müdo mu rhüpüh küta kümha uko po pü müdo kümükhrükümüvako seyite.
english: making known to us the mystery of his will, according to his good pleasure which he purposed in him

chokri: Side pütü chiepüh kütako tsü küyice tüyo kütako mu cedzülü kütako mütü po Khrista yolü küzüh püh thiyi küto na.
english: to an administration of the fullness of the times, to sum up all things in Christ, the things in the heavens, and the things on the earth, in him;

chokri: Pü müdzümüra rhüpüh küta pü mhase mu pü müdolü mha mütü thiyiyo küzho kümha uko po thüka gwüyite.
english: in whom also we were assigned an inheritance, having been foreordained according to the purpose of him who works all things after the counsel of his will;

chokri: Side uko Khrista mülü ra küyi kopo pü zapozale küthiyo swüyi kütona.
english: to the end that we should be to the praise of his glory, we who had before hoped in Christ:

chokri: Nüko püküthodzüo mu külaküyi dzüyiküveo seküyice pü mülüyite. Pü mülüküyi na popühküta Kümüsa Ropü mohor ri vüyite.
english: in whom you also, having heard the word of the truth, the Gospel of your salvation,--in whom, having also believed, you were sealed with the Holy Spirit of promise,

chokri: U rhaküyi püh khriküva ceneko ngoyi de pü zapozale küthiyo swüyi kümothe, püe kalü-o na lhetü thive.
english: who is a pledge of our inheritance, to the redemption of God's own possession, to the praise of his glory.

chokri: Süna I ri nüko Nyepoo Jisu kümülüko mu kümüsako mütü khrü kütsü se küyice.
english: For this cause I also, having heard of the faith in the Lord Jesus which is among you, and the love which you have toward all the saints,

chokri: A küchokolü nüko zapo mu mütü mode küthüzü khasü süh bayo zo.
english: don't cease to give thanks for you, making mention of you in my prayers,

chokri: Sübide u Jihova Nyepoo Jisu Khrista zapozale Poo po thüdoküve Ropü mu mi seyiyo kümo se küyi pü mhase püh nüko prü küto na.
english: that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give to you a spirit of wisdom and revelation in the knowledge of him;

chokri: Nüko mhase mhüyo po mhürho yide; pü ucü küyi kümüri mu kümüsako gwüyi küto zapozale küthi ceneko seyi küto na.
english: having the eyes of your hearts enlightened, that you may know what is the hope of his calling, and what are the riches of the glory of his inheritance in the saints,

chokri: Mu mülüküyiko yolü pü küku kümüre thizo kütsü thiküsü seyi kütona.
english: and what is the exceeding greatness of his power toward us who believe, according to that working of the strength of his might

chokri: Pü küku mhatho Khrista yolü thi küsü, küsalü pü phu mürhüh sü mu pü po vo tüyo thüthilü pü zaco ba küta.
english: which he worked in Christ, when he raised him from the dead, and made him to sit at his right hand in the heavenly places,

chokri: Püza poküzhoko yi, kükukoyi, kümütükoyi mu mi kükhayoküzhoko, tsüdo külhü lübi zomode thasa vokütoko ceyi thüza mütü mhu kürükrü-o thive.
english: far above all rule, and authority, and power, and dominion, and every name that is named, not only in this age, but also in that which is to come.

chokri: Mu püe mhamütü püh püphekhrosü vade püpo Kühu mütü piyothite.
english: He put all things in subjection under his feet, and gave him to be head over all things for the assembly,

chokri: Kühu süo pümozo, püe süyo swüpü mu mhamütülü püe bayo.
english: which is his body, the fullness of him who fills all in all.

chokri: Mu püe nüko küjo küthi mu küphoma lü sa küzüko thi mürhü süve.
english: You were made alive when you were dead in transgressions and sins,

chokri: Süyolü nüko vapüh cedzü-o zhozüh tükhralü küta küku küde nuko zhozüh mu ropü tsüdo dzüzühthiyimo küta nuneko yolü mhathi kütayolülhüta.
english: in which you once walked according to the course of this world, according to the prince of the powers of the air, the spirit who now works in the children of disobedience;

chokri: Süko dolü ukoyi vapüh uthi münyiko lülhü, thiyo külümünyiko thide, kükremi kümha lükhuo nuneko thi tate.
english: among whom we also all once lived in the lust of our flesh, doing the desires of the flesh and of the mind, and were by nature children of wrath, even as the rest.

chokri: Veli u Jihova ngokümüzhe mu pü kükhrü küzhona uko khrüyite.
english: But God, being rich in mercy, for his great love with which he loved us,

chokri: Uko thüzho küvarhü na sa kütalü Khrista zühde uko thi mürhühyi mu pü ngokümüzhelü uko külayite.
english: even when we were dead through our trespasses, made us alive together with Christ (by grace you have been saved),

chokri: Pü zühde uko phuyi mu uko po Khrista Jisu zühde pü kübathi tüyolü bayi küve thisüte.
english: and raised us up with him, and made us to sit with him in the heavenly places in Christ Jesus,

chokri: Side thasa külhüko po uko yolü Khrista Jisu na püe ngokümüzhe zhophi küsü mu pü kütsüküveko ngoyi küto na.
english: that in the ages to come he might show the exceeding riches of his grace in kindness toward us in Christ Jesus;

chokri: Kümülü na ngokümüzhe lü nüko külayi nüko küve namo veli Jihova müthu kha küsü nazo.
english: for by grace you have been saved through faith, and that not of yourselves; it is the gift of God,

chokri: U mhatho na mo side mipühyi po kümüko tamo küto na.
english: not of works, that no one would boast.

chokri: Kükrenamoli uko-e pübe mhathokozo, Jisu Khrista yolü uko pomhatho küveko thiyi kütona, süyo na u Jihova müdzümüra uko posülü tayi küto küsüh püh mütate.
english: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works, which God prepared before that we would walk in them.

chokri: Süna nüko rükra süte vapüh thi yolü Jewkümomithi, thübe püh küthithiyolü ugi rühkümomi thi.
english: Therefore remember that once you, the Gentiles in the flesh, who are called "uncircumcision" by that which is called "circumcision," (in the flesh, made by hands);

chokri: Sütüce Khrista küdimi, rüso thide pü ceneko Israelmi züh kürhühmo, popühküta dzütsüdzükholü rüvümi thide ukümüri di, cedzülü u Jihova küdi mi thita.
english: that you were at that time separate from Christ, alienated from the commonwealth of Israel, and strangers from the covenants of the promise, having no hope and without God in the world.

chokri: Vapüh nüko Jisu Khrista zühde kümüno tamo veli Khrista zana nükozühde pü müno vote.
english: But now in Christ Jesus you who once were far off are made near in the blood of Christ.

chokri: Püe uko na küzühküveo pütho ukodolü külakre kütsü sajoyo dophro vade mütü po püh thiyi.
english: For he is our peace, who made both one, and broke down the middle wall of partition,

chokri: Thüzho lü thimo lizo küsuko na küngomu küta pü thi yolü süko khavade künani po thüma küsa thide püyolü püh thi mu küzühveyi.
english: having abolished in the flesh the hostility, the law of commandments contained in ordinances, that he might create in himself one new man of the two, making peace;

chokri: Side künani po u Jihova zühde cross yolü thümo püh thiyi kütona küngokümuo müsave.
english: and might reconcile them both in one body to God through the cross, having killed the hostility thereby.

chokri: Mu püe vode püzüh kümüprüh kütako yi mu kümüno kütako ceyiküzühküve püh zhopo thisü.
english: He came and preached peace to you who were far off and to those who were near.

chokri: Süna püyolü uko mütüpo Ropü pühlü u Jihova ce voyi küve thiküyizo.
english: For through him we both have our access in one Spirit to the Father.

chokri: Süna tsüyo nüko rüsomi mu rüvümi mote, veli kümüsako zühde thüyepüh mu u Jihova cekrolü piphi miko thite.
english: So then you are no longer strangers and foreigners, but you are fellow citizens with the saints, and of the household of God,

chokri: Apostelko mu sadzuküseko pümeo ju küsü ce yolü uko bayi mu Jisu Khristae ce sülü ukülü tsü küzhoo thiyi.
english: being built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets, Christ Jesus himself being the chief cornerstone;

chokri: Pü yolü ce photü kükhü kürüh pü Nyepoo na kümüsa rüsuce pühthiyi.
english: in whom the whole building, fitted together, grows into a holy temple in the Lord;

chokri: Pü yolü nükoyi Ropü lüno Jihova po ba kütsü ce püh thiyite.
english: in whom you also are built together for a habitation of God in the Spirit.

chokri: I Paul nüko Judakümoko zhozhü külü na Jisu Khrista dzu thi tate.
english: For this cause I, Paul, am the prisoner of Christ Jesus on behalf of you Gentiles,

chokri: Mhanu nükoyi u Jihova ngokümüzhe lü nüko khapüh a mülü küvaseyi lizo.
english: if it is so that you have heard of the administration of that grace of God which was given me toward you;

chokri: Püe kümükhrü kümüva dzüko püh a müse müngo süde I-e küdzütholü thopüh nüko prü küvako.
english: how that by revelation the mystery was made known to me, as I wrote before in few words,

chokri: Nüko süko phide a mhasee Khrista celü dzü kümüsühkozo kütsü seyito.
english: by which, when you read, you can perceive my understanding in the mystery of Christ;

chokri: Süo vapüh thüma nuko po seyi mote. Veli Ropü lüno külha püh pükümüsa Apostelko mu sadzuküseko mhüngo thisüte.
english: which in other generations was not made known to the children of men, as it has now been revealed to his holy apostles and prophets in the Spirit;

chokri: Mha süo Judakümoko pori pü kalüko thidemopüh thi mu Khrista dzüyiküve lüno po püh kümüta koyi zhürhüh thite.
english: that the Gentiles are fellow heirs, and fellow members of the body, and fellow partakers of his promise in Christ Jesus through the Gospel,

chokri: u Jihova ngokümüzhe kha a prü süde pü küku küsührhü kütsümhatho na I ri püyithomi thiyi.
english: of which I was made a servant, according to the gift of that grace of God which was given me according to the working of his power.

chokri: I-e kümüsako dolü kütsüo ceyi tsüku kütsüyo, ngokümüzhe lü khapüha küprü Khrista celü phuphayi külho ceneko püh Judakümoko ce zhopothi küto na.
english: To me, the very least of all saints, was this grace given, to preach to the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ,

chokri: Thüma mütüko po u Jihova mhamütü thi küsüyo küra thoce cedzü-o mhüdzülü küvapüh kütako Jisu Khrista yolü jü kümüsühko ngoyi.
english: and to make all men see what is the administration of the mystery which for ages has been hidden in God, who created all things through Jesus Christ;

chokri: Side tsü tüyolü mhakükhayo küzhoko mu kükuko po kühu yolü Jihova doküve lünyiko seyi kütona.
english: to the intent that now through the assembly the manifold wisdom of God might be made known to the principalities and the powers in the heavenly places,

chokri: A Nyepoo Jisu Khrista yolü küchothe pü mharhü püh kütako thitsüküsü zo.
english: according to the eternal purpose which he purposed in Christ Jesus our Lord;

chokri: Süyo na uko pü kümülü lü u küthüpu neyi mu püzühde küse küyi zo.
english: in whom we have boldness and access in confidence through our faith in him.

chokri: Süna I nüko po zapozale thiyi küto na kümüzhe kübako lüpüh nükolü thathi tahi noyo.
english: Therefore I ask that you may not lose heart at my troubles for you, which are your glory.

chokri: Mha süo na u Nyepoo Jisu Khrista Niepo mhüdzülü chietü pü de.
english: For this cause, I bow my knees to the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ,

chokri: Pü yolü tüyo mu cedzülüri thüye zatho mütü thoyi.
english: from whom every family in heaven and on earth is named,

chokri: Pü po pü zapozale küthi cene kopüh nüko prü, pü Ropü po küku khanüko lhülü mao thi mükusü küto na.
english: that he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, that you may be strengthened with power through his Spirit in the inward man;

chokri: Side kümülü lü Khrista po nüko mülülü bayi mu nüko me pokralü pükükhrülü bayi kütona.
english: that Christ may dwell in your hearts through faith; to the end that you, being rooted and grounded in love,

chokri: Mu pü kümüsako mütü zühde pü küzho, kücho, kümüsüh mu kürükrüseyi ve küto na.
english: may be strengthened to comprehend with all the saints what is the breadth and length and height and depth,

chokri: Khrista kükhrü se küyi na mhase ngoyi de u Jihova celü u küswukülhu thiyite.
english: and to know Christ's love which surpasses knowledge, that you may be filled with all the fullness of God.

chokri: Tsüo pü küku uko yolü mhathi kütao züh uko cho mu lüyi külho mhu uko thi müne mükro phi süte.
english: Now to him who is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that works in us,

chokri: Khrista Jisu zalü zapozale küthi-o po tüpho mütü mu cedzü külakütso pü kühulü bayi. Amen.
english: to him be the glory in the assembly and in Christ Jesus to all generations forever and ever. Amen.

chokri: Sülizo I Nyepoo dzü thi kütayo, nüko po u cüküyi kümha kümüsa külhülü lhüyino nüko hüsü züho.
english: I therefore, the prisoner in the Lord, beg you to walk worthily of the calling with which you were called,

chokri: Thülürünu, mününu, ulücho mu kükhrü süh humihu khrühi ba zoyi.
english: with all lowliness and humility, with patience, bearing with one another in love;

chokri: Ropü lü küzüh püh küthi mu küzühküve na u phapüh püh thi küva-ozüh süh tayite.
english: being eager to keep the unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace.

chokri: Nüko cüpüh u sadzü püh na cü küyi kümha, thümo püh mu Ropüyi pühtazo.
english: There is one body, and one Spirit, even as you also were called in one hope of your calling;

chokri: Nyepoo püh, kümülüyi püh dzüluyi püh.
english: one Lord, one faith, one baptism,

chokri: Mütüko Jihova u Po püh, pü mha mütüko mhu, mütüko züh ta mumütüko lü tate.
english: one God and Father of all, who is over all, and through all, and in us all.

chokri: Veli thüma mipüh püh kütsü Khrista müde küsü dü ngokümüzhe pühprüve.
english: But to each one of us was the grace given according to the measure of the gift of Christ.

chokri: Süo na pühi kümha de po; püe müsolü kho küta ce thüma kükro tüpüh küdzü thive mu müthu mha lünyi küzapüh thümako prüve.
english: Therefore he says, "When he ascended on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts to men."

chokri: Sülizo pü cedzü kürünulü tsü vade pü züh tüyolü kho küta co küdipüh-a?
english: Now this, "He ascended," what is it but that he also first descended into the lower parts of the earth?

chokri: Püe kürünulü kide tü müsotholü vo küta-e mha mütülü püe swupüba kütayo zo.
english: He who descended is the one who also ascended far above all the heavens, that he might fill all things.

chokri: Mu pütho humi po apostle thi, humi po sadzuküsemi thi, humi podzüyiküve zhopomithi, humi po pastor mu kümüthami thiyite.
english: He gave some to be apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, shepherds and teachers;

chokri: Side kümüsako küsüh püh yitholü süde Khrista moo thi müzho yiküto na.
english: for the perfecting of the saints, to the work of serving, to the building up of the body of Christ;

chokri: Uko mütü po kümülü lü mu u Jihova nuo mhase lü püh thide velotsü kütsü thüma püh thiyi de Khrista zho küve dü thiyi küto na.
english: until we all attain to the unity of the faith, and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to a full grown man, to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ;

chokri: Side kümüthadzü tükhra kümha kütsüko, thüma kütsürü doko, küdove de miswü küdoyo küzho mharhüko po natsimi kümha de u swü püh licohico va kütsü thisa lhote.
english: that we may no longer be children, tossed back and forth and carried about with every wind of doctrine, by the trickery of men, in craftiness, after the wiles of error;

chokri: Veli Khristae u piyo thi küta züh de kükhrü süh küthoo püh pode mha mütü lü mümayi yo.
english: but speaking truth in love, we may grow up in all things into him, who is the head, Christ;

chokri: Thümo pühyo zatho kükrekre küba mütü kükhü kürüh tüpü mu uküku ngotsoyi de uko mhatho u müsüh-o thitsü püh mo püh thiyi dekükhrü lü müma zhoyi yo.
english: from whom all the body, being fitted and knit together through that which every joint supplies, according to the working in measure of each individual part, makes the body increase to the building up of itself in love.

chokri: Süna Nyepoo zalü a küpo mu zhopo hio; nüko-e Judakümoko vokümüthu kümürü lüdoko süh tayo küzhoko kümha de lhü tasu.
english: This I say therefore, and testify in the Lord, that you no longer walk as the rest of the Gentiles also walk, in the futility of their mind,

chokri: Püko mhase zühta, mhase kümo uko yo ta mu uko lükürüh na u Jihova kha küsü kürhüh lü uko khikho kre yite.
english: being darkened in their understanding, alienated from the life of God, because of the ignorance that is in them, because of the hardening of their hearts;

chokri: Uko tho u khapüh kürütsü küthi müniko lü müvo mu uko mühomüniko sühde müsakümo mhatho mütü thi tayo.
english: who having become callous gave themselves up to lust, to work all uncleanness with greediness.

chokri: Veli nüko Khrista dzu seyi mozo lume?
english: But you did not learn Christ that way;

chokri: Nüko pü se küyi ce Jisu yolü küba küthoo tho nüko müthapüh tate.
english: if indeed you heard him, and were taught in him, even as truth is in Jesus:

chokri: Süna nüko vo küta külhükügwü-o, u swükütse kütsü müniko na u thimüsu vayo küzho zhoko rhü vate.
english: that you put away, as concerning your former way of life, the old man, that grows corrupt after the lusts of deceit;

chokri: Mu Ropü lü nüko lü yi thi küsayi.
english: and that you be renewed in the spirit of your mind,

chokri: Mu Ukümünupü-e thiküsü kümatho mu küthotülü müsakütsü kümhathüma küsao khi bayi.
english: and put on the new man, who in the likeness of God has been created in righteousness and holiness of truth.

chokri: Side kücedzü küpoko khava, thüma mütü u sühzanumi ce kütho-opoyi. Tükrenamoli uko thümo pühlü zatho kükrekre kütsüko zo tsüna.
english: Therefore, putting away falsehood, speak truth each one with his neighbor. For we are members one of another.

chokri: Nüko nümo de küphoma thi vahi, nüko lü rüda de nace mülü vahi.
english: "Be angry, and don't sin." Don't let the sun go down on your wrath,

chokri: Thürü küsuo ba müra hi.
english: neither give place to the devil.

chokri: Rügoyo küzhoko po rügo sa mota de u be süh mha küveko thiyisidemhapüh kütsakhuko vaphi yi küto na.
english: Let him who stole steal no more; but rather let him labor, working with his hands the thing that is good, that he may have something to give to him who has need.

chokri: Dzü küsu pühyi po n talü prahi, veli kürünyimi thi n ve süyo küzhongokümüzhe lü dzü küveko poyi.
english: Let no corrupt speech proceed out of your mouth, but such as is good for building up as the need may be, that it may give grace to those who hear.

chokri: Rhaküyi tüsozhoo na mohor vüyi küta kümha de Ukümünupü kümüsa Ropü-o nükümo thi vahi.
english: Don't grieve the Holy Spirit of God, in whom you were sealed for the day of redemption.

chokri: Nüko yolü mha kükhuko lükhulüdami kürhekütsü dzüküsu küpo mu külhakütsüko kha vayi.
english: Let all bitterness, wrath, anger, outcry, and slander, be put away from you, with all malice.

chokri: Sülizo u Jihova ri Khrista zalü nüko küjo va küva kümha de humihu ngomüzhe, thülümünü, küjo va küprü mu khreü küprüyi.
english: And be kind to one another, tenderhearted, forgiving each other, just as God also in Christ forgave you.

chokri: Pü kükhrü nuneko thide u Jihova sadziko thi zoyi.
english: Be therefore imitators of God, as beloved children.

chokri: Khristae uko kükhrü na pü tho pü khasü de uko na u Jihova ce mürhüh rotho, mharüh küthünyipü thi püh rüsu thi küva kümha de nükopü kükhrülü tayi.
english: Walk in love, even as Christ also loved you, and gave himself up for us, an offering and a sacrifice to God for a sweet-smelling fragrance.

chokri: Veli nüko kümüsako thi küyi züh kürütsü küthi, müsakümoko mumhakümüho hiko po nüko dolü pra sahi.
english: But sexual immorality, and all uncleanness, or covetousness, let it not even be mentioned among you, as becomes saints;

chokri: Mha küsukürhomori kümülo dzü küpo, moyi dzüthudzürü küyu uvazü kümoko pohi de küthüzü khasü ba zoyi.
english: nor filthiness, nor foolish talking, nor jesting, which are not appropriate; but rather giving of thanks.

chokri: Mha hio nüko seba; thetheküyiko, müsakümo, mha kümüho thüma mu thürümarhe kürüsukoe u Jihova mu Khrista küdelü lüyi lho.
english: Know this for sure, that no sexually immoral person, nor unclean person, nor covetous man, who is an idolater, has any inheritance in the Kingdom of Christ and God.

chokri: Thüma pühyi po dzüthudzürükolü u swü küdovahi, kükrenamoli mhahiko na u Jihova lükhue dzüzüh thiyimo küta nuneko yolü voküta na
english: Let no one deceive you with empty words. For because of these things, the wrath of God comes on the children of disobedience.

chokri: Moyi süko zühde küdorhüh hi.
english: Therefore don't be partakers with them.

chokri: Nüko vapüh küzüh lü ta veli tsüo Nyepoo na küvelü bate; süna küveo nuneko thide küve lü tayi.
english: For you were once darkness, but are now light in the Lord. Walk as children of light,

chokri: Kükrenamoli Ropü se-e mha mütü lü uzhove, matho mu kütho poyotsüna.
english: for the fruit of the Spirit is in all goodness and righteousness and truth,

chokri: Side u Jihova po yiyi küsü thiyi yo.
english: proving what is well-pleasing to the Lord.

chokri: Mu küzühlü küta u mhatho se vüyiyo kümoko zühde kükrotho hidesüko müjo süyi.
english: Have no fellowship with the unfruitful works of darkness, but rather even reprove them.

chokri: Püko kümükhreü lü thiyo küzho mhatho sükoe poyi münga zo.
english: For the things which are done by them in secret, it is a shame even to speak of.

chokri: Veli mha kühopühyi thatha zühyi kütako mhatho küveo lü ngomülemülu yiyo, kükrenamoli kühopühyi ngo mülemülu küyi khüko küveo na zo kütsü na.
english: But all things, when they are reproved, are revealed by the light, for everything that is revealed is light.

chokri: Süna püe pode; züh kübako coyiküsa lü to süyi mu Khristae püküvekhapüh nüko prüto.
english: Therefore he says, "Awake, you who sleep, and arise from the dead, and Christ will shine on you."

chokri: Kümülomi kümha mode mhaküsemi thide mütse phrü de tayi.
english: Therefore watch carefully how you walk, not as unwise, but as wise;

chokri: Pü tüsozhoko vemo kütana pütü-o rhayi.
english: redeeming the time, because the days are evil.

chokri: Mhasekümomi kümha hide mhaküsemi thi u Jihova müdoko seyite.
english: Therefore don't be foolish, but understand what the will of the Lord is.

chokri: Mu hezo krade müzüh hi, sülü küyekütsü küba na; veli Ropü püh uküswu thiyi.
english: Don't be drunken with wine, in which is dissipation, but be filled with the Spirit,

chokri: Chele, küthotsale, mu ropü tsaleko thipüh humihu rüthi, ne mülü lükünü tsale thi mu küle püh Nyepoo ce süyi.
english: speaking to one another in psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; singing, and singing praises in your heart to the Lord;

chokri: U Nyepoo Jisu Khrista zalü küthüdzü khapüh u Jihova u Poo prü süh bayi.
english: giving thanks always concerning all things in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, to God, even the Father;

chokri: U Jihova Khrita küshülü humihu khrikhro bayi.
english: subjecting yourselves one to another in the fear of Christ.

chokri: Mi cemineko Nyepoo celü küta kümha ne nopüneko khrikhro bayi.
english: Wives, be subject to your own husbands, as to the Lord.

chokri: Kükrenamoli mi nopüne-e u cemi piyo, Khristae kühu piyo mu pümoyo külaküyi ri thisa.
english: For the husband is the head of the wife, and Christ also is the head of the assembly, being himself the savior of the body.

chokri: Kühu-e Khrista khrikhro küta kümha mi cemineko ri mha mütülü nenopüneko dzü zühyi.
english: But as the assembly is subject to Christ, so let the wives also be to their own husbands in everything.

chokri: Khrista ri kühu khrü de pü pho kha küsü kümha mi nopuneko ri necemineko khrüyi.
english: Husbands, love your wives, even as Christ also loved the assembly, and gave himself up for it;

chokri: Side dzüo püh dzü kümha khrüküva bide müsa mu rhorao bayi kütona.
english: that he might sanctify it, having cleansed it by the washing of water with the word,

chokri: Kürhodamo, thükudi, müsa mu the kümo kühu küdzüve püh thide pütho yiyi küsü thiyi küto na.
english: that he might present the assembly to himself gloriously, not having spot or wrinkle or any such thing; but that it should be holy and without blemish.

chokri: Side mi nopuneko utho upho kümha de u cemineko khrüyi pücemine khrüyo küzhoko utho u khrü kübazo.
english: Even so ought husbands also to love their own wives as their own bodies. He who loves his own wife loves himself.

chokri: Thüma mipühyi pü tho püthi ngomütsü mode Nyepoo pü kühuküthükü kümha de pü vathi mu thükü tarho tayi.
english: For no man ever hated his own flesh; but nourishes and cherishes it, even as the Lord also does the assembly;

chokri: Kükrenamoli uko pü mo, püthi mu pü ro lü zatho kükrekre tsüko zo.
english: because we are members of his body, of his flesh and bones.

chokri: Mha hio na thümae pü po pü zu kha vade pü cemine züh püh thitato mu püni thipüh thi tato.
english: "For this cause a man will leave his father and mother, and will be joined to his wife. The two will become one flesh."

chokri: Mha hihi kümükhreü kümüva dzü küzho pühveli a küpo-e Khrista mu pükühu dzu küpozo.
english: This mystery is great, but I speak concerning Christ and of the assembly.

chokri: Süna mi nopuneko ne cemine khrüpüh n tho n kükhrü kümhayi mu mi nopüneko yi ne nopune khrikhro ta küto pe türü zoyi.
english: Nevertheless each of you must also love his own wife even as himself; and let the wife see that she respects her husband.

chokri: Mi nuneko Nyepoo zalü ne krüneko dzü zühyi, sizo pü tüzo kütsü na
english: Children, obey your parents in the Lord, for this is right.

chokri: Ne po ne zu rhoyi, dzü hio khaküsü dzü küratho-o.
english: "Honor your father and mother," which is the first commandment with a promise:

chokri: Südziyi lizo ne na veto mu ne cedzü lü rhüh choyi to.
english: "that it may be well with you, and you may live long on the earth."

chokri: Mu mikrüneko nüko nuneko lü va kürüda hi, veli Nyepoo zalü püko tahitarho mu thükü müzho süyi.
english: You fathers, don't provoke your children to wrath, but nurture them in the discipline and instruction of the Lord.

chokri: Cetako nüko thiyolü ne mhu kükhayo küzhoko khritshürüsüsayi mulü püh thide Khrista yolü küta kümha de uko dzüzüh yi.
english: Servants, be obedient to those who according to the flesh are your masters, with fear and trembling, in singleness of your heart, as to Christ;

chokri: Thüma nü thi küto na mi mhüngoce lübi yitho thita mode Khrista cetami thide ne mülü lü u Jihova müdo-o thiyi.
english: not in the way of service only when eyes are on you, as men-pleasers; but as servants of Christ, doing the will of God from the heart;

chokri: Nüko thüma yi thi moli Nyepoo yi thi ba kütsü na nüko küsührhüh zode yitho thiyi.
english: with good will doing service, as to the Lord, and not to men;

chokri: Midzü küthi-o ri kümoo ri se yite. Thüma mhatho küve thi küsüko mütü Nyepoo celü zhokhro ngoyi zoto.
english: knowing that whatever good thing each one does, he will receive the same again from the Lord, whether he is bound or free.

chokri: Mu mimhu nyepomiko ne cetami küthiküdü zo tahi, kükrenamoli tüyoküba mütüko khrükütü kütsüo nemhu nyepothi küba na.
english: You masters, do the same things to them, and give up threatening, knowing that he who is both their Master and yours is in heaven, and there is no partiality with him.

chokri: A kükhrükodzü vala lü, Nyepoo küku mu kümütü lü nüko thüpubayi
english: Finally, be strong in the Lord, and in the strength of his might.

chokri: u Jihova rineko khi püyi side thürü küsuo dorhüko ne mütsuküphece thayi ve küto na.
english: Put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil.

chokri: Uko-e u thi u za züh kümürha moli küzhokoyi, kükukoyi, cedzü hilü küzühlü kütako kükhayo küzhokoyi mu tüyolü küsu ropükoyi zühde kümürhayo küzho na.
english: For our wrestling is not against flesh and blood, but against the principalities, against the powers, against the world's rulers of the darkness of this age, and against the spiritual hosts of wickedness in the heavenly places.

chokri: Süna u Jihova rineko khi püyi de tüsozho küsu nha thayi vekütona mu side thazoyi.
english: Therefore, put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to withstand in the evil day, and, having done all, to stand.

chokri: Side küthoo süh ne checo phayi, kümathoo püh ne mülü küyoo thiyi.
english: Stand therefore, having the utility belt of truth buckled around your waist, and having put on the breastplate of righteousness,

chokri: Küzühküve, dzüyiküve püh ne küsüh küsüo püh ne pheku thiyi.
english: and having fitted your feet with the preparation of the Gospel of peace;

chokri: Mha mütü mhu kümülü giyo khi püyi side kürüdzüo me püh lüce tsaküthiko brühmhüyi küto na.
english: above all, taking up the shield of faith, with which you will be able to quench all the fiery darts of the evil one.

chokri: Mu külaküyi püh ne pirüh thiyi mu ropü zecho süo u Jihova dzüo khi pühyi.
english: And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God;

chokri: Cho mütü mo de cho dolüni thi mu ropü lü ne müzhe mülo, khwülila mu rhorhü pü de kümüsako nayi choba zoyi.
english: with all prayer and requests, praying at all times in the Spirit, and being watchful to this end in all perseverance and requests for all the saints:

chokri: A nayi choba zoyite side dzü hayi küve püh a prü küto na mu dzüpotoli a ta müku küyi ce thüpu de dzüyiküve küsühkürülüko po püh pükopo seyive küto na.
english: on my behalf, that utterance may be given to me in opening my mouth, to make known with boldness the mystery of the Gospel,

chokri: Süyo na a phapüh yitho thi küyi kümha a popo molizo küsuo thüpüde poyi küto na.
english: for which I am an ambassador in chains; that in it I may speak boldly, as I ought to speak.

chokri: Kükhrü sazüho mu dzüthode Nyepoo yitho thiyoküzho-o Tychicus celü a mhatho mu I di püh thiyo shi kütsü nüko seyi to.
english: But that you also may know my affairs, how I am doing, Tychicus, the beloved brother and faithful servant in the Lord, will make known to you all things;

chokri: Mhatho süyo na a tho pü kütsü püh nüko ce süho, side nüko po hani mhathoko seyi de nüko lü thüpuyi küto na.
english: whom I have sent to you for this very purpose, that you may know our state, and that he may comfort your hearts.

chokri: Küzühküve po a kükhrüko züh bayi mu kükhrü lü kümülü u Jihova Poo mu Nyepo Jisu Khrista celü küvo-o po nüko züh bayi,
english: Peace be to the brothers, and love with faith, from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Ngokümüzhe po kütho thide u Nyepo Jisu Khrista khrüyo küzhoko züh bayi te. Amen.
english: Grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ with incorruptible love. Amen.

chokri: Khrista Jisu cetani Paul mo Timothy uni-e khapüh Philppi lü keba Khrista Jisu lü keta kemesako, pethimiko mu dikonko ce kesü:
english: Paul and Timothy, servants of Jesus Christ; To all the saints in Christ Jesus who are at Philippi, with the overseers and deacons:

chokri: U Kemenupü u Poo mu Niepo Jisu Khrista celü kepari ngokemezhe mu thelü kemenüo po nieko züh ba keyio thiyite.
english: Grace to you, and peace from God, our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: I nieko rükra kesümetsüh Kemenupü meza bayo zo;
english: I thank my God whenever I remember you,

chokri: I nieko la cho kesü metsüh a nüswüdie cho bayo zo;
english: always in every request of mine on behalf of you all making my requests with joy,

chokri: Dzüyikeve na thüra lü vo tsüketso a züh kebedu kekhrühi vo tsoküyi na nieko müza ve.
english: for your partnership in furtherance of the Gospel from the first day until now;

chokri: Silizo nieko yo lü mhakeve thi swüdü kesüko thi zovo Jisu Khrista tüsozhonha thitsüh sü keto I mülüzo.
english: being confident of this very thing, that he who began a good work in you will complete it until the day of Jesus Christ.

chokri: Silizo nieko a melü lü baketina nieko ri hiko biyi keto I lüzüzo, kekrelamori I kedzükethi lü ri kesatha kesü, dzüyikeve na tha mütü kesülüri nieko ri azüh ngokemezhe kerhühzo ketina.
english: It is even right for me to think this way on behalf of all of you, because I have you in my heart, because, both in my bonds and in the defense and confirmation of the Gospel, you all are partakers with me of grace.

chokri: Silizo I Jisu Khrista kekhrü sühdie nieko menyiphi bayo keti Kemenupü tho se ba.
english: For God is my witness, how I long after all of you in the tender mercies of Christ Jesus.

chokri: I nieko po thelüo lüri, mhase lüri nie kekhrü po kro mama keto la cho bayozo.
english: This I pray, that your love may abound yet more and more in knowledge and all discernment;

chokri: Sidie nieko po kevethoo thiyiketo na, mesamezi mu jota mo zovo Khrista kevori tsoyi keto na.
english: so that you may approve the things that are excellent; that you may be sincere and without offense to the day of Christ;

chokri: Khrista kemathosheo püh nie kechu thiyidie mipo Kemenupü chu mu Püza po kemeleyite.
english: being filled with the fruits of righteousness, which are through Jesus Christ, to the glory and praise of God.

chokri: A kezühko, hijü a yolü mhakehopühri thikesüko dzüyikeve khavakütao mole po mekrokuyi keto I nieko po süsü shensa.
english: Now I desire to have you know, brothers, that the things which happened to me have turned out rather to the progress of the Gospel;

chokri: Kükrelamori Khrista na I kedzü thi leketi kedeo rifüko mu thüma kükremiko pori seyi kütona.
english: so that it became evident to the whole praetorian guard, and to all the rest, that my bonds are in Christ;

chokri: Siketio mori Niepoo lüketa uzühmi kekroco a phayi keta na melükechüsayi die methimozo no Kemenupü dzüo po kehüsate.
english: and that most of the brothers in the Lord, being confident through my bonds, are more abundantly bold to speak the word of God without fear.

chokri: Thüma kropüh-e küthüro mo mizüh kümürha küto la Khrista popüh mi mütha, Vele thüma humi lüthilüdo küve süh Khrista zhopo thisü.
english: Some indeed preach Christ even out of envy and strife, and some also out of good will.

chokri: Thüma kropüh-e apo dzüyikeve yopüh sünoo a kedayi keta se die a kekhrü na thisü
english: The former insincerly preach Christ from selfish ambition, thinking that they add affliction to my chains;

chokri: Vele kro kekreo no a phazüh keta apo alü kemezhe tono, mo azüh kelürhüh nyi mo keta la Khrista zhopo thisü.
english: but the latter out of love, knowing that I am appointed for the defense of the Gospel.

chokri: Silizo dibia? Küthera zori mori tüthothi ri kehopühbiri Khrista dzu povazo süna I anü.
english: What does it matter? Only that in every way, whether in pretense or in truth, Christ is proclaimed. I rejoice in this, yes, and will rejoice.

chokri: Ye, I anüte, nieko kücho na mu Jisu Khrista Ropü kekhrühi lü a kelayi tazo.
english: For I know that this will turn out to my salvation, through your supplication and the supply of the Spirit of Jesus Christ,

chokri: I sari rhühri kehopühthi ri jo kemenga taho, mo thepuzo üno hidzübi tsüri a yolü Khrista po zale thizoto, süosü a kemerio zo.
english: according to my earnest expectation and hope, that I will in no way be disappointed, but with all boldness, as always, now also Christ will be magnified in my body, whether by life, or by death.

chokri: I rhühta ri Khrista na zo, Satato ri a la meveku tizo.
english: For to me to live is Christ, and to die is gain.

chokri: Deri I amo hio rhüh ba no mhakeve thiyi velizo; dipüh keda tosü I semo.
english: But if I live on in the flesh, this will bring fruit from my work; yet I don't make known what I will choose.

chokri: I süni dolü ba, I tata no vo Khrista züh batanyi, süo vekuzoto keti na.
english: But I am in a dilemma between the two, having the desire to depart and be with Christ, which is far better.

chokri: Deri sitazori I rhüh keta no nieko na vevü.
english: Yet, to remain in the flesh is more needful for your sake.

chokri: Nieko po mesa bayiketo na mu nieko kemelü lü nienüyi keto na I nieko zühba zovo molizo kesü I lüyi.
english: Having this confidence, I know that I will remain, yes, and remain with you all, for your progress and joy in the faith,

chokri: Kükrelamori apo nieko züh küngoladie nieko po ala Khrista Jisu yolü nieko nüsayi keto na.
english: that your rejoicing may abound in Christ Jesus in me through my presence with you again.

chokri: Nieko Khrista dzüyikeve na nie zhorüle pütüthi bazoyite, I nieko zühbari mori apo nieko ropü lü kezüh püh thi metü keba, lüpüh thi dzüyikeve kemelü lü hütüketi a po seketo na.
english: Only let your manner of life be worthy of the Gospel of Christ, that, whether I come and see you or am absent, I may hear of your state, that you stand firm in one spirit, with one soul striving for the faith of the Gospel;

chokri: Nie kemetsümi po nie kedüvahi. Hiohi puko na keka zasi pühzo, deri nie na Kemenupü cekevo kelakeyi zasio zo.
english: and in nothing frightened by the adversaries, which is for them a proof of destruction, but to you of salvation, and that from God.

chokri: Khrista zalü khapüh nieko tsükesüe nie po melüketo na lübi mo, deri nieko po ri Pü na kemezhe sü keto na.
english: Because it has been granted to you on behalf of Christ, not only to believe in him, but also to suffer on his behalf,

chokri: Kükrelamori I thadzü a rhathi kevo nieko ngovate mu tsüri süsü kemha bazoketi nieko ri sekeba kemha nieko ri nie rhathiyi keto na.
english: having the same conflict which you saw in me, and now hear is in me.

chokri: Thelalü, akezühko, Niepoo yolü nienüyite, I ketho sa thori a kebvümo nieko na keveozo.
english: Finally, my brothers, rejoice in the Lord. To write the same things to you, to me indeed is not tiresome, but for you it is safe.

chokri: Nie tüshiko na nie ceriyite, mhathokeshü kethi mako, yikürühmi do thikütako yolü u ceriyite.
english: Beware of the dogs, beware of the evil workers, beware of the false circumcision.

chokri: Uko uyi kürühmi küthoko, mu uko ropü lü Kemenupü rüshüyo, mu Khrista Jisu yolü unü tayo, uthi yolü küthiko mülü ta mo.
english: For we are the circumcision, who worship God in the Spirit, and rejoice in Christ Jesus, and have no confidence in the flesh;

chokri: Humi uthi yolü küthi mülüketi mesüh le lizo, I süko ceri mülüku ti mesüh.
english: though I myself might have confidence even in the flesh. If any other man thinks that he has confidence in the flesh, I yet more:

chokri: I a menukeyi zho thütha nha ayi rüh keyimi, I Israel swüyiemi, Benjamin yie lü hükevorimi, I Hebrewmi, thezhoo lü lizo I Pheriseemi.
english: circumcised the eighth day, of the stock of Israel, of the tribe of Benjamin, a Hebrew of Hebrews; concerning the law, a Pharisee;

chokri: Kesührhüh co lüsü lizo I kehu kemeswumi, thezhoo lüketako züno mathoyi kezho co lüsülizo mipüh ri a kejo püh ri ngoyi ho.
english: concerning zeal, persecuting the assembly; concerning the righteousness which is in the law, found blameless.

chokri: Deri thadzü mhakehopüh ri a mhüdzüce ve siketako tsüno süko Khrista na mhapüh ri mote.
english: However, what things were gain to me, these have I counted loss for Christ.

chokri: Sizo kütho, mu I Niepo Khrista Jisu mhase kevethoo mede süyo I mhatho püh ri mote, apo pü na mha süko metüko medi tsove, silizo I Khrista ngoyi mu püyolü ngoyi ketoko la I mha süko püh nyorho khakevako bitazo.
english: Yes most assuredly, and I count all things to be loss for the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus, my Lord, for whom I suffered the loss of all things, and count them nothing but refuse, that I may gain Christ

chokri: Side thezhoo lü ketako zühkeyina I matho küyi krayi mo deri Khrista yolü ngo küyizo.
english: and be found in him, not having a righteousness of my own, that which is of the law, but that which is through faith in Christ, the righteousness which is from God by faith;

chokri: I Khrista züh küseyi die pü rhühlakesü kekuo ri seyi mu pü kemezhe kesüko lü pü züh kemezhe die a zhorüle ri po pü kesace zho züh kemhayi keto na.
english: that I may know him, and the power of his resurrection, and the fellowship of his sufferings, becoming conformed to his death;

chokri: Sidie I ri thiyi veyo kesako dolü rhühlakesümi thiyi keto na.
english: if by any means I may attain to the resurrection from the dead.

chokri: I tsü süko tsoyite simo mori vetsühte simolu, vele I süko tsoyiketo la huzüzo. Süsüna Khrista Jisu ri a püh pü thüma thiküyizo.
english: Not that I have already obtained, or am already made perfect; but I press on, if it is so that I may take hold of that for which also I was taken hold of by Christ Jesus.

chokri: Azühko, I süko tsoyi keto atho ri thiyiketo lümozo, deri I mha püh a lüdo lüba, süsü asaco kebako lü mozo die amhüdzüco hu vozüzo.
english: Brothers, I don't regard myself as yet having taken hold, but one thing I do. Forgetting the things which are behind, and stretching forward to the things which are before,

chokri: U Kemenupü Khrista Jisue mhapühpüh atsü tono kesolü a kecü I mha süo huzüzo.
english: I press on toward the goal for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Süsüna uko pethi ketako, ulü sükemha lütsoyi tokhe, mu nieko lü mhakekre huri lüba lizo Kemenupü süko ri thapüh nieko meka süto.
english: Let us therefore, as many as are perfect, think this way. If in anything you think otherwise, God will also reveal that to you.

chokri: Sizori uko tavo tsokeyi züh, ta sasüyi tokhe.
english: Nevertheless, to the extent that we have already attained, let us walk by the same rule. Let us be of the same mind.

chokri: Azühko, nieko ri a do zühyite, siyo hako nieko mhüdzü rade tha süko pe n türütüro thiyite.
english: Brothers, be imitators together of me, and note those who walk this way, even as you have us for an example.

chokri: Kükrenamori I thüma kükro jü tsükünu niekoce posüh bayo mu tsüri a mhüdzüküto thide nieko ce pova, thüma süko Khrista Cross ngomuko zo.
english: For many walk, of whom I told you often, and now tell you even weeping, as the enemies of the cross of Christ,

chokri: Thüma sükosü na thülao sü küka, uko Kemünupü sü uko vade, uko nga sü uko zhopo zhole, mu uko cejü lü mhako lü kütazo.
english: whose end is destruction, whose god is the belly, and whose glory is in their shame, who think about earthly things.

chokri: Deri uko na cenyie sü tülüta, mu uküla küyio Niepo Jisu Khrista küvo khüba.
english: For our citizenship is in heaven, from where we also wait for a Savior, the Lord Jesus Christ;

chokri: Püthori pü müdo thide mha mütüko thipüh pü khrikhro süyive, mu pü küku süo püh umo mhathokümo hio ri thiküsapüh pümo vezo küzü züh kümhayi tato.
english: who will change the body of our humiliation to be conformed to the body of his glory, according to the working by which he is able even to subject all things to himself.

chokri: Süla a züko, I khrü mu münyü bayo küzhoko, a künü mu küdepirüko, nieko Niepoo yolü tha mütü bazoyi te a kükhrüko.
english: Therefore, my brothers, beloved and longed for, my joy and crown, so stand firm in the Lord, my beloved.

chokri: I Euodia mu Syntyche ni po Niepoo yolü lüpü thiyi no rüda yo.
english: I exhort Euodia, and I exhort Syntyche, to think the same way in the Lord.

chokri: Mu I n ceri choyo, a besü küthoo, thüno hini ri khrühi süte, uni dzüyiküveo la Clement hani mu uzü kükreko kürhü lesida lü uza küniekori khrühi shu sü tsüla.
english: Yes, I beg you also, true yoke-fellow, help these women, for they labored with me in the Gospel, with Clement also, and the rest of my fellow workers, whose names are in the book of life.

chokri: Niepoo yolü nienü süh tayite, I küposa polayo nienüyite.
english: Rejoice in the Lord always! Again I will say, Rejoice!

chokri: Mipo nie künüo sheyite, Niepoo küvori tü müno bate.
english: Let your gentleness be known to all men. The Lord is at hand.

chokri: Mhapü la ri nie lü müco hi, vele kücho mu mülolü küthüzü lü nie mhacho pü Niepoo müshe zoyi.
english: In nothing be anxious, but in everything, by prayer and petition with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God.

chokri: Siyi tsüsa Niepoo celü thülü kümünü, mhashe mütü ce vevü kütsüo n mülü mu n lüdo mütü Khrista Jisu yo kükhapü bayito.
english: And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Külalü, küzüko, mha dipüko kütho, mha dipüko thürho, mha dipüko müzi, mha dipüko müsa, mha dipüko züve, mha dipüko mphrü, mha velotsü kütsü, mhahu chuyiküve ba tsüsa süko lü zoyi.
english: Finally, brothers, whatever things are true, whatever things are honorable, whatever things are just, whatever things are pure, whatever things are lovely, whatever things are of good report; if there is any virtue, and if there is any praise, think about these things.

chokri: Nieko a celü sheyi, khiyi, rünyiyi mu ngoküyiko thiyi, si tsüsa Niepoo künüo nieko zü bayito.
english: The things which you learned, received, heard, and saw in me: do these things, and the God of peace will be with you.

chokri: I Niepoo yo a nü shu bate, nieko a rüle rükra la küsüla, nieko a rüle müdo bazo vele süo thisü küto tü ngoyi mo vote.
english: But I rejoice in the Lord greatly, that now at length you have revived your thought for me; in which you did indeed take thought, but you lacked opportunity.

chokri: I nieko ce mha rüda kütsüla hio po bamo kükrelamole I mha kübako pü anü küba do she kütsüla.
english: Not that I speak in respect to lack, for I have learned in whatever state I am, to be content in it.

chokri: I mütümügü kütsü do ri she, mu I münyhümünyhü kütsü do ri she; mha kühopü lüri u kühi küthi mu müri kütsü, küthüvü mu kümüzhie kütsü do ri she.
english: I know how to be humbled, and I know also how to abound. In everything and in all things I have learned the secret both to be filled and to be hungry, both to abound and to be in need.

chokri: I mha kühopüri thiyi ve Khrista a thi müku küsüo lü.
english: I can do all things through Christ, who strengthens me.

chokri: Kühopü biri nieko a müzhie küzaküyi la nieko müzari zoho.
english: However you did well that you shared in my affliction.

chokri: Nie Philippiko nieko thori she ba vele dzüyiküve mhatho thürao lü I Macedonia lü ta kütace kühu kükre püri a zü kübedu mha khasü mori ngoyi mo, nieko lübi zo
english: You yourselves also know, you Philippians, that in the beginning of the Gospel, when I departed from Macedonia, no assembly shared with me in the matter of giving and receiving but you only.

chokri: I Thessalonia lü küba ceri nieko a khrühi lasü.
english: For even in Thessalonica you sent once and again to my need.

chokri: I nieko ce mha müri tsüla mo, vele püshe zhü mve sapü nieko cenye ba sasü küto lazo.
english: Not that I seek for the gift, but I seek for the fruit that increases to your account.

chokri: I mooküshü mütü ngoyi te, sü küzü ri ngoyite, a kühi thisüte Epaphroditus celü mha kütsü küsüko ngoyino, küthünyü mu u rüh küve rüshü, rütho mu Niepoo künü yiyi küshü rüshü.
english: But I have all things, and abound. I am filled, having received from Epaphroditus the things that came from you, a sweet-smelling fragrance, an acceptable and well-pleasing sacrifice to God.

chokri: Mu Niepoo pütho nieko tsakhu khüko lü Khista Jisu zaleo la nieko khrühi sü to.
english: My God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Uko Niepoo mu u Poo po küchothe zapozale thiyite. Amen.
english: Now to our God and Father be the glory forever and ever! Amen.

chokri: Khrista Jisu yolü kümüsako mütü külü süte. U zümi a zü kübako mütü nieko külü süho.
english: Greet every saint in Christ Jesus. The brothers who are with me greet you.

chokri: Kümüsako mütü nieko külü süho, bahorei Caesar cielüko.
english: All the saints greet you, especially those who are of Caesar's household.

chokri: Niepoo Jisu Khrista ngokümüzhieo po nieko müt zü bayite. Amen.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.

chokri: Paul, Jisu Khrista la apostle kethi Jihova medolü, mu Timothy uko sazüo.
english: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, and Timothy our brother,

chokri: Kemesako mu Khrista kemelü lü keta sazüjürakohi Colossae lü kebako ce kesü, ngokemezhe po neko züba keyi thite, Jihova ukopo mu uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista celü kevori.
english: to the saints and faithful brothers in Christ at Colossae: Grace to you and peace from God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: U kethezü kha Jihova uko Po mu uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista tsü sü yoho, neko la kecho thisü zi bayo.
english: We give thanks to God the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, praying always for you,

chokri: Hako Khrista Jisu celü ne kemelü se keyi, mu neko kemesako kekhrü khasü keba se keyico.
english: having heard of your faith in Christ Jesus, and of the love which you have toward all the saints,

chokri: Kekrelamori tülü nekola kemeri khapü kemeta, neko himhüjü seba keta jüyikeve kethojülü.
english: because of the hope which is laid up for you in the heavens, of which you heard before in the word of the truth of the Gospel,

chokri: Nekoce vorite, cejü metülü bi, mu use kene zhüyi keta, neko yo sheri sübi bate, neko süo se keyi yovi, sünha Jihova ngokemezhe ketholü seyite.
english: which has come to you; even as it is in all the world and is bearing fruit and growing, as it does in you also, since the day you heard and knew the grace of God in truth;

chokri: Neko Epaphras, hako choyi mipü seba, pü neko la Khrista yitho melü keshü mipü,
english: even as you learned of Epaphras our beloved fellow servant, who is a faithful minister of Christ on our behalf,

chokri: Pü Rüpü lü neko kekhrü kehalasü.
english: who also declared to us your love in the Spirit.

chokri: Püco hiola hako sheri süo sekeyi tüsonha, nekola kechothi tümo bazo teho, mu mhase mhalü mu pü medolü ketsü mu rüpülü mhalü keyi khapü neko chu kesü menyü ba.
english: For this cause, we also, since the day we heard this, don't cease praying and making requests for you, that you may be filled with the knowledge of his will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding,

chokri: Neko Niepoo medolü tayi keshü, mu mhatho keve use zhü chu keyi, mu Jihova celü mhase vekehü keyi.
english: that you may walk worthily of the Lord, to please him in all respects, bearing fruit in every good work, and increasing in the knowledge of God;

chokri: Keku metülü uthi kemeco kesü, pü keku zapozale lü, sügüsühe mu kerülü tha keyi unüzode.
english: strengthened with all power, according to the might of his glory, for all endurance and perseverance with joy;

chokri: Kethezü kha upo tsü kesü, uthipü ukopo kevelü kalü thi mu ngokeyimi thi kesü kemesako.
english: giving thanks to the Father, who made us fit to be partakers of the inheritance of the saints in light;

chokri: Sopü kezülü usüphra sü sheri, sülü kekuo belü, side uthi kedepü pü nu pükhrüo kedebalü kesü.
english: who delivered us out of the power of darkness, and translated us into the Kingdom of the Son of his love;

chokri: Neko pü zalü rhakeyi ngoyi te, kephoma vakeyi sheri.
english: in whom we have our redemption, the forgiveness of our sins;

chokri: Pü ngoyo kemo Jihova hü thipü, khonuko nurao.
english: who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of all creation.

chokri: Kekrelamori püyo mhametü thisü, tülü kelako, mu cejülü ketako, kengo zhüri ngokemo zhüri; kede ba kene mori mipi kekha ti sheri thezho kerekrüko, mori kekuko, püyo mha metü thiyi, pülazo.
english: For by him were all things created, in the heavens and on the earth, things visible and things invisible, whether thrones or dominions or principalities or powers; all things have been created through him, and for him.

chokri: Pü mha metü mhüjü ta, mu püyo mha metü dü mu gu püba.
english: He is before all things, and in him all things are held together.

chokri: Pü sü upio zo, kehü; shüdü theralü ta, kesa dolü rhüla kesü kerathoo, mhametüko pü keta seyi ve ketola.
english: He is the head of the body, the assembly, who is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead; that in all things he might have the preeminence.

chokri: Kekrelamori pü po medosü püyo mha metü chupüta (kehü metü chu püta).
english: For all the fullness was pleased to dwell in him;

chokri: Mu Cross yo thüza khi vetho thisü, püyo mhametü zü kezüveyi, akepo, cejülü keta metü sheri mü tülü mha keta metü sheri.
english: and through him to reconcile all things to himself, by him, whether things on the earth, or things in the heavens, having made peace through the blood of his cross.

chokri: Mu neko, pütü huce ne melülü keretse mhathoko la püzü kemecu te, siri tsühi pü nekozü kezüve yite.
english: You, being in past times alienated and enemies in your mind in your evil works,

chokri: Pü thi püpho pü mesasü neko thi kemesa mu mejo va keho mu pümhüjülü po mesu vamo keto.
english: yet now he has reconciled in the body of his flesh through death, to present you holy and without blemish and blameless before him,

chokri: Mhace neko krokrü de kemelülü tasüyi lize, mu jüyikeve kemeri lü resarena tamo, neko sekeyi bi, zhopo thipü tükhro keta kehü metüce kesü, sülü I Paul athipü apo yitho mipü thite.
english: if it is so that you continue in the faith, grounded and steadfast, and not moved away from the hope of the Gospel which you heard, which is being proclaimed in all creation under heaven; of which I, Paul, was made a servant.

chokri: Somi I neko la kemezhe kesülü rechü ba sheri athi apho Khrista la methi kesü, sülü thayo sheri, süo sü kehuce zo.
english: Now I rejoice in my sufferings for your sake, and fill up on my part that which is lacking of the afflictions of Christ in my flesh for his body's sake, which is the assembly;

chokri: Süla athipü yitho mipü thisü, Jihova mhatho keza kekre kesü nekola akhasü, Jihova füko thi tsosü ketola.
english: of which I was made a servant, according to the stewardship of God which was given me toward you, to fulfill the word of God,

chokri: Mha ketekhri thi kehepü metülü mu nuhü metü lü kevapü kemeta, vele tsühi süo khipü kemesako mese mengo sü bate.
english: the mystery which has been hidden for ages and generations. But now it has been revealed to his saints,

chokri: Jihova cesücene süko zapozale kethi ketekhri zhü khi Gentile miko mese sü bate, Khrista neko yo ketao, zapozale kemeri.
english: to whom God was pleased to make known what are the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory;

chokri: Hako zhopo kethi, thüma kehopü pori menuyino sü, mu thüma kehopü sheri methosü mhase ketsü dolini kethilü; side thüma kehopü sheri thipü vetsütso ti thi Khrista Jisu ce sü ketola.
english: whom we proclaim, admonishing every man and teaching every man in all wisdom, that we may present every man perfect in Christ Jesus;

chokri: Sü süla I sheri mhatho thi ba, unütha thi mhatho kethilü alü kushu zode süo thi tazo.
english: for which I also labor, striving according to his working, which works in me mightily.

chokri: Kekrelamori I nekopo sekenyü sü I dithedü alü kethetü basheri, neko la mu Laodicea lü kebako la mu athi apho zü kesü kemoko la.
english: For I desire to have you know how greatly I struggle for you, and for those at Laodicea, and for as many as have not seen my face in the flesh;

chokri: Uko melüko thomelu sü keto, kekrelamori kekhrü uzo kerhüpü kebala, mu kesekelü chupü keta ceneko, ketekhri ti Jihova medolü, mu u Po mu Khrista yolü.
english: that their hearts may be comforted, they being knit together in love, and gaining all riches of the full assurance of understanding, that they may know the mystery of God, both of the Father and of Christ,

chokri: Püyo kevapü keta cene metü ketsü mu kesekelü mhase.
english: in whom are all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge hidden.

chokri: I hio poba, kemosa humi mikeshüjü pü vori neko kedo tari seho tila,
english: Now this I say that no one may delude you with persuasiveness of speech.

chokri: Kekrelamori athi apho neko zü bamo, siri rüpülü I neko züba, neko zhoko anüba mu pe bazo, mu neko Khrista kemelü ketho thizo keba.
english: For though I am absent in the flesh, yet am I with you in the spirit, rejoicing and seeing your order, and the steadfastness of your faith in Christ.

chokri: Neko Khrista Jisu Niepoo ngoyi ketabi sübi de tayi te püyo.
english: As therefore you received Christ Jesus, the Lord, walk in him,

chokri: Püyo ne mekrayi mu mayite mu kemelü memayite, neko metha kesü bi, thezü (kemeza) krophi keti kha kesü.
english: rooted and built up in him, and established in the faith, even as you were taught, abounding in it in thanksgiving.

chokri: Menuyite, thüma kehopü pori utho ukelü mhase kemethu kemerü pü neko shu ketse mu nejü mesu vamo ketola, thüma zhoreleko, cejülü natsimi mhase, mu Khrista lü kemo zhüko.
english: Be careful that you don't let anyone rob you through his philosophy and vain deceit, after the tradition of men, after the elements of the world, and not after Christ.

chokri: Kekrelamori püyo Jihova pi hüchu püba, püthi püpho kenezhü.
english: For in him all the fullness of the Godhead dwells bodily,

chokri: Mu neko püla tsü mu tsozo, püpiyo thezho metü mu keku sheri.
english: and in him you are made full, who is the head of all principality and power;

chokri: Mü pülü neko sheri yirüpü tate, yikerü süo thebe pü thikemo, uthi upho kephomako khikeva, Khrista yo uthi upho yirü keyi.
english: in whom you were also circumcised with a circumcision not made with hands, in the putting off of the body of the sins of the flesh, in the circumcision of Christ;

chokri: Jülo kepü usa khrü keva, Therü thi kesü mhatholü püzü to süri keta, süo kesalü püphu merhü kesü.
english: having been buried with him in baptism, in which you were also raised with him through faith in the working of God, who raised him from the dead.

chokri: Neko kephomalü satate, netimepho yirü kemolü, pü nezü rhüla süte, ne vajo keta metüko vapü netsü sü.
english: You were dead through your trespasses and the uncircumcision of your flesh. He made you alive together with him, having forgiven us all our trespasses,

chokri: Thokemeta uzho ureleko umetsu ketako metü vave, uzü ketherü keta zhüko, mu chodelü chokhako khidü ve, cross yo gu kevala.
english: wiping out the handwriting in ordinances which was against us; and he has taken it out of the way, nailing it to the cross;

chokri: Thezho kemeleko, kekuko thi medive, pü süko mele melu mese mengo sü süopi kuyi te.
english: having stripped the principalities and the powers, he made a show of them openly, triumphing over them in it.

chokri: Süla mipüpori ne ketico la nelü mejo va hite, kekra (hezo) lari, mori tüsozho kemesa lari, mori tekhri kesa lari, mori Sabbath zhola sheri.
english: Let no man therefore judge you in eating, or in drinking, or with respect to a feast day or a new moon or a Sabbath day,

chokri: Vori keto sükhri biti püzo, süko, vele upho kene sü Khrista zo.
english: which are a shadow of the things to come; but the body is Christ's.

chokri: Mipüpori neko shu ketse va hite, dopü ce lebila zhokhro tüyo choyimi kereshü, tsapha talü mha hiko ngokemolü talüta, uthi upho mhülü kengopo uthi kerekrü kemethulü süyi.
english: Let no one rob you of your prize by a voluntary humility and worshipping of the angels, dwelling in the things which he has not seen, vainly puffed up by his fleshly mind,

chokri: Pü piyo mori ukerü metüko phapü ketao ukerhüjü khi metü metsü kesü, pha mu ro kesapü, Jihova celü ma rekri kehe prari.
english: and not holding firmly to the Head, from whom all the body, being supplied and knit together through the joints and ligaments, grows with God's growth.

chokri: Neko Khrista yolü cejülü kereyi zhoko khi mesa va, mhaceno, sizi dipüla, cejülü kehüzho zü bata, neko thezho kekhiko khro sala lü tatome.
english: If you died with Christ from the elements of the world, why, as though living in the world, do you subject yourselves to ordinances,

chokri: Ni hite, jü hite, ti metha hite, abelü khihite; sitiko.
english: "Don't handle, nor taste, nor touch"

chokri: Süko sü ketako suta zoto, thümazhorele mu jü khapü kemeta kola?
english: (all of which perish with use), according to the precepts and doctrines of men?

chokri: Utho ukelülü reshü ketha medethi, (mipokengolü) renumetsade ukehülü, uthi upho rele lümo, uthi upho menyükolü ukekha keyi di.
english: Which things indeed appear like wisdom in self-imposed worship, and humility, and severity to the body; but aren't of any value against the indulgence of the flesh.

chokri: Mi kemethamiko, ketü lü zhokhro kha thekümiko tsüte; neko Niepoo kemetha pü bati sekeba bi.
english: Masters, give to your servants that which is just and equal, knowing that you also have a Master in heaven.

chokri: Kecholü thisü ba zote (metüva hite) mu kethezü kha kesü fü mu la ba zote.
english: Continue steadfastly in prayer, watching therein with thanksgiving;

chokri: Kecho kethilü hako la sheri choba zote, side Jihova po cekha khripü hako tsüsü jü poyi keve thi ketola, Khrista ketekhri ti po ketola, mha süola atüpü pha püta.
english: praying together for us also, that God may open to us a door for the word, to speak the mystery of Christ, for which I am also in bonds;

chokri: Apo süo thi mese mengoyi ve ketola, I jüposü kezüce.
english: that I may reveal it as I ought to speak.

chokri: Ketsükevelü chota vote chozulü ketakola, pütü rhayi te.
english: Walk in wisdom toward those who are outside, redeeming the time.

chokri: Ne jüpolü menünu, kekhrü kene, thisü tate, metsapü va kesü, side neko mifü kho kesü po kezü seyi ve ketola.
english: Let your speech always be with grace, seasoned with salt, that you may know how you ought to answer each one.

chokri: I dipü bi ba sheri metü Tychicus kehala nekoce süto, pü ukekhrü sazü jüra mipü, mu yitholü kemelü kevepü, mu choyi kethi lü kezü keta Niepoo cetami pü.
english: All my affairs will be made known to you by Tychicus, the beloved brother, faithful servant, and fellow bondservant in the Lord.

chokri: I pü ketsü pü neko ce sü züho, mhaco süo la, püpo neko dipü biba sheri sesü ketola, side pü neko melü thomelu sü ketola.
english: I am sending him to you for this very purpose, that he may know your circumstances and comfort your hearts,

chokri: Onesimus, usazüo kekhrü kemelü kene pü neko mipü zü vori to. Uni tavori de hice dipü thiba sheri neko ce posüto.
english: together with Onesimus, the faithful and beloved brother, who is one of you. They will make known to you everything that is going on here.

chokri: Aristarchus azü thejü thi kebao neko kelü süho, Marcus Barnabas lipü nu jü kha kesüko neko ngo keyi, mhace püta nekoce vori lize püzüyite.
english: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner greets you, and Mark, the cousin of Barnabas (concerning whom you received commandments, "if he comes to you, receive him"),

chokri: Mu Jisu, pü cüpü Justus kethio, pü yi kerü mipü. Hiko lebi azü mhathothi kebako zo, Jihova kederevü la, mu alü thomelu kebako.
english: and Jesus who is called Justus, who are of the circumcision. These are my only fellow workers for the Kingdom of God, men who have been a comfort to me.

chokri: Epaphras, pü neko dolü mipü, Khrista choyi kethimi, neko kelü süho, pü kecholü püyhe thi keba mipü nekola; neko po mesatso mu zhochü de Niepoo medolü thayi ketola.
english: Epaphras, who is one of you, a servant of Christ, salutes you, always striving for you in his prayers, that you may stand perfect and complete in all the will of God.

chokri: Kekrelamori I püju kevekesu metü seba, pü neko la pü rha thi tazo, mu Laodocea lü keba uko sheri. Mu Hierapolis lü kebako sheri. Luke, ukekhrü daru keseo, m Demas neko kelusü.
english: For I testify about him, that he has great zeal for you, and for those in Laodicea, and for those in Hierapolis.

chokri: Laodicea, Nymphas lü keba kehuko sazüjürako kelü kesü, pü celü kehu kebako.
english: Luke, the beloved physician, and Demas greet you.

chokri: Neko lesitho kesü hio phri kesüce, neko dolü, Laodocea lü sheri phri süte, kehulü; sübi lesitho kesü phripü Laodocea lüri süte.
english: Greet the brothers who are in Laodicea, and Nymphas, and the assembly that is in his house.

chokri: Archippus ce posüte, yitholü menuyite, no Niepoo celü ngokeyi thitso sü zote.
english: When this letter has been read among you, cause it to be read also in the assembly of the Laodiceans; and that you also read the letter from Laodicea.
