chokri: I Paul abe pü neko kelü süzüho, A phapü keta rekra sü zote, ngokemezhe po neko züba keyi thi. Amen.
english: Tell Archippus, "Take heed to the ministry which you have received in the Lord, that you fulfill it."

chokri: Paul, Silvanus, mu Timothy lesi thopü Thessalonian miko kehulü kesü, Jihova u Po mu Khrista Jisu celü ketako uko Niepoo; ngokemezhe po neko celü bayite, kezü keve Jihova uko po mu Niepoo Jisu Khrista.
english: Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy, to the assembly of the Thessalonians in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Hako Jihova kethezü khasü süzo bayo nekola, neko zathe de kechothi bayo.
english: We always give thanks to God for all of you, mentioning you in our prayers,

chokri: Neko kemelü mhatho rekra mota yomo, kekhrü mhatho, sügü süheti kemeri Niepoo Jisu Khrista Jihova mhüngolü ukopo.
english: remembering without ceasing your work of faith and labor of love and patience of hope in our Lord Jesus Christ, before our God and Father.

chokri: Sekeba, sazüjüra kethi kehülü, neko keda mekreyi keta.
english: We know, brothers loved by God, that you are chosen,

chokri: Kekrelamori hako jüyi khipü nekoce kevori jüo lebi zomo vele kekulü, rizo mu Kemesa Rüpü, mu setü melütü tilü; neko sekeba hako thüma dipü bitisheri hazhorele neko dolü kebace.
english: and that our Gospel came to you not in word only, but also in power, and in the Holy Spirit, and with much assurance. You know what kind of men we showed ourselves to be among you for your sake.

chokri: Neko hasa mejite, mu Niepoo sajimi thite, kemezhe tilü jüo khiyi, Kemesa Rüpü kenelü.
english: You became imitators of us, and of the Lord, having received the word in much affliction, with joy of the Holy Spirit,

chokri: Süla neko kehü thaka thipü Macedonia mu Achaia lü keba metüko kemelü zasi thisüte.
english: so that you became an example to all who believe in Macedonia and in Achaia.

chokri: Kekrelamori neko yo Niepoo jü keyepü Macedonia mu Achaia lü lebi kemo, vele sükezü therüo kemelü ceco la keye kemeyolü vote, süla hako jüpüri posamori vete.
english: For from you has sounded forth the word of the Lord, not only in Macedonia and Achaia, but also in every place your faith toward God has gone forth; so that we need not to say anything.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko hako tha mengo püsüte, hako zhorele dipü bide ta nekoce vori sheri neko seba, mu neko therümarhe kereshülü regüsü kerhü ketho Jihova püce vori keto.
english: For they themselves report concerning us what kind of a reception we had from you; and how you turned to God from idols, to serve a living and true God,

chokri: Mu pü Nu tülü kevori meri, pü kesalü phu merhü kesü, Jisu zo, lekhu vori ketolü pü uko merhü süve.
english: and to wait for his Son from heaven, whom he raised from the dead-- Jesus, who delivers us from the wrath to come.

chokri: Kekrelamori sazüjürako, neko thozori seba hako ta nekoce kevori, süo kemethu thi va mote.
english: For you yourselves know, brothers, our visit to you wasn't in vain,

chokri: Vele süsa zori hako kemezhe, sü mhüjü hako kha kethengalü sü, neko seba Philippi lü Jihova la hako Jihova jüyikeve thepu shude popü neko cesü ketüshu tilü.
english: but having suffered before and been shamefully treated, as you know, at Philippi, we grew bold in our God to tell you the Gospel of God in much conflict.

chokri: Kekrelamori hako tahi tarho kesüko kemeda jümo, mori keresü kereva mori uhü thimekre tilümo,
english: For our exhortation is not of error, nor of uncleanness, nor in deception.

chokri: Vele Jihova hako melü sü keva jüyikeve süo hako potazo, thüma nü thinyüsa tizhümo, vele Jihova hako melü dojü pe kevazhü.
english: But even as we have been approved by God to be entrusted with the Gospel, so we speak; not as pleasing men, but God, who tests our hearts.

chokri: Kekrelamori mishu keti kethokemojü mhapüceri pophra yomo, neko seba, mori mhakemeho kezhu püri tamozo, Jihova sü zhopozo.
english: For neither were we at any time found using words of flattery, as you know, nor a cloak of covetousness (God is witness),

chokri: Mori thüma celüthechu therho kephu hayo tamo, mori neko celü sheri, mori kekremi celü sheri, ha neko lüzhe kethi khasü tari vezo sheri Khrista la ha apostle thi ketalü.
english: nor seeking glory from men (neither from you nor from others), when we might have claimed authority as apostles of Christ.

chokri: Vele ha nedolü ketace tsümela, natsimi kethekü dipü biyosheri sübi tazo.
english: But we were gentle among of you, as when a nurse cherishes her own children.

chokri: Süla neko yo hanüsa, hako kelü neko po seyi kenyü, Jihova jüyikeve lebimo, veleha kerhüro sheri zo, kekrelamori neko hala khrüri tazo.
english: Even so, affectionately longing for you, we were well pleased to impart to you, not the Gospel of God only, but also our own souls, because you had become very dear to us.

chokri: Kekrelamori sazüjürako, neko rekra ba metse hako thehethi mhatho thi kesü, tüso tüzü metülü mhathothi, kekrelamori hakoyo neko po uma thikemo, hako Jihova jüyikeve zhopo thi pü nece sü.
english: For you remember, brothers, our labor and travail; for working night and day, that we might not burden any of you, we preached to you the Gospel of God.

chokri: Neko süo zhopoko zo, mu Jihova sheri, hako dipü bide, mesa, jütho, mejoyikesu, thide hako nedolü ba vorishi;
english: You are witnesses with God, how holy, righteously, and blamelessly we behaved ourselves toward you who believe.

chokri: Hako dipü bide mi tahitarho, milü thomelu, mu nekehopü pori thino, züno posü, mipone mipü ununeko yo thi kesübi.
english: As you know how we exhorted, comforted, and implored every one of you, as a father does his own children,

chokri: Nekopo Jihova mhüjülü tayi keshü kethi, pü neko cüpü pü kederevü lü mu zapozale lü kesü bi.
english: to the end that you should walk worthily of God, who calls you into his own Kingdom and glory.

chokri: Mhasüo lari hako Jihova kemeza thiphayiho bayo, kekrelamori neko jüzükeyice, hako yo süosesü te, neko thüma celü ngokeyi bi tamo, jü süo kethotüzo ziti, Jihova jü, neko melü keyi bi neko yo süo thi süte.
english: For this cause we also thank God without ceasing, that, when you received from us the word of the message of God, you accepted it not as the word of men, but, as it is in truth, the word of God, which also works in you who believe.

chokri: Kekrelamori neko sheri, züneko, Jihova kehuko Judea lükeba Khrista Jisu lü ketako saji thite; kekrelamori neko neko rünalü kemezhe keyi mhatho kemha kebide kemezhe süte Jewmiko belü.
english: For you, brothers, became imitators of the assemblies of God which are in Judea in Christ Jesus; for you also suffered the same things from your own countrymen, even as they did from the Jews;

chokri: Süko Niepoo Jisu dokhri, mu saju keseko ri dokhri, mu hako sheri methi meni, mu uko Jihova nümothi, mu thüma metü zhotherü.
english: who killed both the Lord Jesus and their own prophets, and drove us out, and didn't please God, and are contrary to all men;

chokri: Hako po Gentile miko ce jüyikeve pohino hako vakha, ukopo kelakeyi ngoyi mo ketola, uko kephoma lü tsü lazo; süla lekhu kerütho ukoyo ku zoto.
english: forbidding us to speak to the Gentiles that they may be saved; to fill up their sins always. But wrath has come on them to the uttermost.

chokri: Vele uko sazüjüra kethiko, dopü neko zü kekho tazo sheri, umelü lü kekho tamo, neko zü kengo sala keto menyü mekroku tate
english: But we, brothers, being bereaved of you for a short season, in presence, not in heart, tried even harder to see your face with great desire,

chokri: Nekoce vori nyüzo, I Paul zo sheri, vapü sala, vele Satan chokha thi bate.
english: because we wanted to come to you--indeed, I, Paul, once and again-- but Satan hindered us.

chokri: Kekrelamori hako kemeri dipü ba sheri, mori kenü mori rerthu keto kede pira? Neko hizo mome Niepoo Jisu Khrista mhüjülü ba keto pü kevori tülü?
english: For what is our hope, or joy, or crown of rejoicing? Isn't it even you, before our Lord Jesus at his coming?

chokri: Kekrelamori nekohi hako zapozale mu kenüzo.
english: For you are our glory and our joy.

chokri: Neko gümechoyi ho baketace neko khapü Athens neko lebi po ba keta veketo lü.
english: Therefore, when we couldn't stand it any longer, we thought it good to be left behind at Athens alone,

chokri: Mu Timothy, hako sazüo ketsü süte, pü Jihova cetao, hako züde yitholü ketao, Khrista jüyikeve mhatholü, neko mesükesü, neko lü thomelu kesü, neko kemelü la.
english: and sent Timothy, our brother and God's servant in the Gospel of Christ, to establish you, and to comfort you concerning your faith;

chokri: Side kethilü neko mipüri thi redeva moketo kekrelamori neko thozori seba hako kedopü sülü sü keta.
english: that no one be moved by these afflictions. For you know that we are appointed to this task.

chokri: Kethozo, hako neko zü batice, thajü vo ketako bi mipo uko methimeni zo metse, nekori seba.
english: For most assuredly, when we were with you, we told you beforehand that we are to suffer affliction, even as it happened, and you know.

chokri: Püco hiola I gübayi hote, I neko kemelü se ketola ketsü süte, molize dophi miko tavo neko kedota ri seho, side hako mhatho kemethu thita lize.
english: For this cause I also, when I couldn't stand it any longer, sent that I might know your faith, for fear that by any means the tempter had tempted you, and our labor would have been in vain.

chokri: Vele tsühi Timothy neko celü ta hico vori tolize side neko kemelü kevaphiti kekhrü theju keve püvori tisa, side neko ha rekra sü keba pükeve hako zü kesü nyüsa sü keba, hako sheri neko zü de kesünyü kebabi.
english: But when Timothy came just now to us from you, and brought us glad news of your faith and love, and that you have good memories of us always, longing to see us, even as we also long to see you;

chokri: Süla sazüjüra kethiko, neko la halü thomelu halü methi keba tülü mu neko kemelü lüpü halü tsakhu keba tülü.
english: for this cause, brothers, we were comforted over you in all our distress and affliction through your faith.

chokri: Kekrelamori tsühi, mhace ne Niepoo kemelü thayi ketasa ha va kesürhü pü bate.
english: For now we live, if you stand fast in the Lord.

chokri: Nekola Jihova kemeza dipü pota, kekrelamori kenü süo nekola hanü ba keta Jihova mhüjülü.
english: For what thanksgiving can we render again to God for you, for all the joy with which we rejoice for your sakes before our God;

chokri: Tüsotüzü metsü neko neko zü ngokenyüla kechothi tso sü keto kelüla;
english: night and day praying exceedingly that we may see your face, and may perfect that which is lacking in your faith?

chokri: Tsühi Jihova pütho ukopo kethi, mu u Niepo Jisu Khrista, hako chotha thipü nekoce sü.
english: Now may our God and Father himself, and our Lord Jesus Christ, direct our way to you;

chokri: Niepoo neko thipü hunehu kekhrü mu krokechü bazoti, mu thüma metüyo, hako nekoyo thi kebabi.
english: and the Lord make you to increase and abound in love one toward another, and toward all men, even as we also do toward you,

chokri: Pü thelalü neko thipü mejova kesu, kemesalü, süde Jihova mhüjülü, uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista kemesako metü pü zü sala kevorice.
english: to the end he may establish your hearts blameless in holiness before our God and Father, at the coming of our Lord Jesus with all his saints.

chokri: Süpi sheri, sazüjürako hako tarho sü züho Niepoo Jisu lano, ne hako celü ngokeyi neko thi kezüko mu Jihova nü kethikolü thite side ngomekro mama yi ketola.
english: Finally then, brothers, we beg and exhort you in the Lord Jesus, that as you received from us how you ought to walk and to please God, that you abound more and more.

chokri: Kekrelamori hako nekopo thi mu züyi keto jü khakesü Jisu Niepoo lano.
english: For you know what charge we gave you through the Lord Jesus.

chokri: Süo therüo medozo tila, neko thi kemesa keyi, mu keregükerezhü lü ne kethü kerüyi.
english: For this is the will of God: your sanctification, that you abstain from sexual immorality,

chokri: Neko kehopüsheri pümhabü thikemesa keyi seti mesü zo, thechu therholü.
english: that each one of you know how to possess himself of his own vessel in sanctification and honor,

chokri: Keregü kerezhü kemeho, Gentile (Jewmi kemoko) Jihova se kemoko bi;
english: not in the passion of lust, even as the Gentiles who don't know God;

chokri: Mipü pori kezükeye tade usazüjüra zhü rego keva pü ta kemo, kekrelamori Niepoo süko metü kethio zo, mu mejümera hako sheri nekoce po mese süve, mu zhopo thisüte.
english: that no one should take advantage of and wrong a brother or sister in this matter; because the Lord is an avenger in all these things, as also we forewarned you and testified.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova ucüpü mesakemolü sümo vele kemesalü sü.
english: For God called us not for uncleanness, but in sanctification.

chokri: Thüma humi süko rhomo lümo lize pü thüma rhokemo moli Jihova rhomote, pü Kemesa Rüpü sheri khapü uko tsü kesü süo.
english: Therefore he who rejects doesn't reject man, but God, who has also given his Holy Spirit to you.

chokri: Vele sazüjüra, lü ta ketako, I tho kesü kha neko tsüzo morive, kekrelamori neko thozo sheri Jihova neko metha kesü hunehu kekhrü.
english: But concerning brotherly love, you have no need that one write to you. For you yourselves are taught by God to love one another,

chokri: Sübi neko usazüjürako Macedonia lü keba metükoyo thisü bate, vele hako nekoce reda yo, sazüjürako, neko thisa sü zote.
english: for indeed you do it toward all the brothers who are in all Macedonia. But we exhort you, brothers, that you abound more and more;

chokri: Neko kemekre kethi do seyite, netho ne mhatho thizote, nbe khi mhatho thite, hako nekopo thino po kesübi.
english: and that you make it your ambition to lead a quiet life, and to do your own business, and to work with your own hands, even as we charged you;

chokri: Neko kejütholü tavo yite chozu kebako lano, mu neko mhapüri kedi thita hite.
english: that you may walk properly toward those who are outside, and may have need of nothing.

chokri: Vele I nekopo melo mhasemo ba nyümo, sazüjürako; züzü ketakola neko lüsu bazo hite, kemeri kedimiko bide.
english: But we don't want you to be ignorant, brothers, concerning those who have fallen asleep, so that you don't grieve like the rest, who have no hope.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace uko Jisu keva mu rhüla sü keta melü tayo lize, uko püzü zü ketako, Jisu lü ketako, Jihova püzü sala vori to.
english: For if we believe that Jesus died and rose again, even so those who have fallen asleep in Jesus will God bring with him.

chokri: Kekrelamori hako Niepoo jü neko ce po süyo, uko rhü kebako mu meshopü kebako Niepoo lavori tice züzü ketako mhüjü süta hozo.
english: For this we tell you by the word of the Lord, that we who are alive, who are left to the coming of the Lord, will in no way precede those who have fallen asleep.

chokri: Kekrelamori Niepoo pütho tülü sefü kiri zoto tila, tülü kehümi füphra, mu Jihova thecü kekhu, mu saketako Khrista celü tade, tasüri rato.
english: For the Lord himself will descend from heaven with a shout, with the voice of the archangel, and with God's trumpet. The dead in Christ will rise first,

chokri: Süsa uko meshopü rhü kebako kesade tüsüpü kemhülü khotato, tükhralü Niepoo zü kesüto, side Niepoo zü tasü tato.
english: then we who are alive, who are left, will be caught up together with them in the clouds, to meet the Lord in the air. So we will be with the Lord forever.

chokri: Sülano jü hiko khi hunehu lü thomelu zo bate.
english: Therefore comfort one another with these words.

chokri: Pütü kekrekre tilü, azüneko, I lesithopü nekoce sümo sheri ve.
english: But concerning the times and the seasons, brothers, you have no need that anything be written to you.

chokri: Kekrelamori Niepoo vori keto keregomi tüzülü vori ketobi neko semeve shuba.
english: For you yourselves know well that the day of the Lord comes like a thief in the night.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko kepo kezükeve mu krü kebaposü, uko rekri keka pü ukoce vori, thenomi nunu vathi bi, uko therüyi ho.
english: For when they are saying, "Peace and safety," then sudden destruction will come on them, like birth pains on a pregnant woman; and they will in no way escape.

chokri: Vele neko, sazüjürako, kezülü bamote, pütü süo keregomi bi tio po neko pi kuyi ta kemo.
english: But you, brothers, aren't in darkness, that the day should overtake you like a thief.

chokri: Neko kevelü nuneko, keheyo nuneko, uko tüzülü thümako mote mori kezülü keta mimo.
english: You are all children of light, and children of the day. We don't belong to the night, nor to darkness,

chokri: Süla uko zü bata hi khe, kekremi bita hikhe, vele uko coba mu rhorhü pü bakhe.
english: so then let's not sleep, as the rest do, but let's watch and be sober.

chokri: Kekrelamori zü kebami sü tüzülü zü bayo, mu mezü ketako sheri tüzülü mezü tayo.
english: For those who sleep, sleep in the night, and those who are drunken are drunken in the night.

chokri: Vele uko, kehelü mako, rhorhü pü bakhe, kemelü mu kekhrü khipü ukhoroyo süyi, mu kelakeyi pira ukemeri kebao püyi;
english: But let us, since we belong to the day, be sober, putting on the breastplate of faith and love, and, for a helmet, the hope of salvation.

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova ukedapü lekhulü süvamo, vele uko Niepo Jisu Khrista yo kelakeyi ngoyi.
english: For God didn't appoint us to wrath, but to the obtaining of salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ,

chokri: Pü ukola sasü ukotho coba sheri mori züzüta sheri uko püzü kesa hü keba mesüzo.
english: who died for us, that, whether we wake or sleep, we should live together with him.

chokri: Süla neko kezüde hunehu lü thomelu ba zote, mu mipüpüthi meve, neko thi ba ketabi.
english: Therefore exhort one another, and build each other up, even as you also do.

chokri: Mu hako nekoce choyo, sazüjürako, neko zü mhatho thi kebako neko dolü kebako Niepoo lü neko pi kebako neko tarho sü züho.
english: But we beg you, brothers, to know those who labor among you, and are over you in the Lord, and admonish you,

chokri: Kekhrülü uko kerekrü zote, ukomhathoko la; mu neko dolü kehüko kezüve bazote.
english: and to respect and honor them in love for their work's sake. Be at peace among yourselves.

chokri: Tsühi, hako neko tarhosü züho, sazüjürako, mikhrota kemuko (kekhayi keho) kedü süte, kethathimiko lü thomelu süte, umelü kediko khrühi süte, thüma metükoyo sügüsühe yite.
english: We exhort you, brothers, admonish the disorderly, encourage the fainthearted, support the weak, be patient toward all.

chokri: Thüma kühopüyo sheri kesu kethiko mhakesu thiasala sü hite; vele mhekeve kethi meji yite, nekotho neko dolü sheri mu mi metüko yori.
english: See that no one returns evil for evil to anyone, but always follow after that which is good, for one another, and for all.

chokri: Pütü metülü nenü tate,
english: Rejoice always.

chokri: Kecho kethi ne lata hi zote.
english: Pray without ceasing.

chokri: Mhakehopülü sheri kethezü khasü zote, nekola hiohi Jisu Khrista la Jihova medo tazo.
english: In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus toward you.

chokri: Rüpü themekü va hite;
english: Don't quench the Spirit.

chokri: Saju kepo mhapüri kemo thi va hite;
english: Don't despise prophesies.

chokri: Mhametü kevekesu pete, mha keveko züyi keto lübü zote.
english: Test all things, and hold firmly that which is good.

chokri: Mha kesu kethilü kengoko metü ne kethü yito.
english: Abstain from every form of evil.

chokri: Jihova thozo nethi kemesa tsü kesü, mu I kechothi kesü neko thi upho, nekerhüro mu ne rüpü mejoyi kesu thi Niepo Jisu Khrista kevori ce sü ketola.
english: May the God of peace himself sanctify you completely. May your whole spirit, soul, and body be preserved blameless at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Neko cü keyio jüthozo, pü thisü zoto.
english: Faithful is he who calls you, who will also do it.

chokri: Sazüjürako hakola kecho thiba zote.
english: Brothers, pray for us.

chokri: Sazüjüra kemesalü kemebo kesü khipü metüko kelu süzüho.
english: Greet all the brothers with a holy kiss.

chokri: I neko po lesitho kesü hio phripü sazüjürako metüce süno neko kechü sü züho.
english: I solemnly charge you by the Lord that this letter be read to all the holy brothers.

chokri: Niepo Jisu Khrista ngokemezhe po neko metü züba keyi thite. Amen.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you. Amen.

chokri: Paul mu Silvanus mu Timothy uko khapüh U Kümünupüh u Po mu u Nyepo Jisu Khrista checho baküta Thessaloniako kühu che küsü:
english: Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy, to the assembly of the Thessalonians in God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ:

chokri: U Kümünupüh u Po mu u Nyepo Jisu Khrista chelü küpra ngokümüzheo mu thülükumünüo po nüko züta küyio thiyite.
english: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Ha küzüko ha noko na u Kümünupüh swü sühkütsü hazhote: mu süzitsü pütü zoto. Kükrelamoli noko kümülüve küthi satazü mu noko kühopüyi huhu khrü küthi mama prayi zükütsü na.
english: We are bound to always give thanks to God for you, brothers, even as it is appropriate, because your faith grows exceedingly, and the love of each and every one of you towards one another abounds;

chokri: Süna ha thozoyi mi neko müswü kütsü khüko lüyi mu kümüzhe kütsü neyo voyoküzho khüko lüyi ne sügü süyhekuzho na ne kümülü lano u Kümünupüh kühuko lü noko na hanüphi tayo.
english: so that we ourselves boast about you in the assemblies of God for your patience and faith in all your persecutions and in the afflictions which you endure.

chokri: Noko kümüzheküzhoko yi u Kümünupüh küde nazo; mu noko po süo ngoyi kütsü thiyiküto na u Kümünupüh müdo-o müzi zolikütsü süko pü zasi pü thipü ba kütsüzo.
english: This is an obvious sign of the righteous judgment of God, to the end that you may be counted worthy of the Kingdom of God, for which you also suffer.

chokri: -8Süzo Nyepo Jisu Khrista tho u Kümünupüh seyokümoko mu u Nyepo Jisu dzüyiküve-o dzüzü thiyokümokoyo pü khüpotoli meto zoküba lüno pu küku pü dzüyiko zü sade tüyo numi mhüngo thizo prüküto che, mu tsüdo noko müthimünyi küzhoko müthi laküto na mu noko tsü kümüzhe küzhoko poyi hazü rülütaküto u Kümünupüh mhüdzü zoe müzizo.
english: Since it is a righteous thing with God to repay affliction to those who afflict you,

chokri: -10Sünha Pu pu kümüsako mhüdzülü uko po pu ngopü ungo zotoli no voküto che dzüyiküveo dzüzü thiyokümoko po Nyepoo dzü mu Pü küku ratsa kerü lüno sazho thide küchothe küka ngoyi to: Noko ha noko che pu zhopo thiküsü dzüo mülüyi tazorü.
english: who will pay the penalty: eternal destruction from the face of the Lord and from the glory of his might,

chokri: Süna ha u Kümünupüh po noko khapü puphre thiyi küsümi thito, mu nepo nezho veyi künyi khüko mu ne kümülü mhatho khüko ku swüde thiyi küto na hayi noko na chosüh bayo zo.
english: To this end we also pray always for you, that our God may count you worthy of your calling, and fulfill every desire of goodness and work of faith, with power;

chokri: Süzi-eno u Kümünupüh mu Nyepo Jisu zao müleyito, mu Khrista Jisu noko yi po pu yolü müleyi to.
english: that the name of our Lord Jesus may be glorified in you, and you in him, according to the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Sülizo ha küzüko, U Nyepo Jisu Khrista la voküta mu uko vo pu mhüdzülü künguküto dzüh ha ne hüpü,
english: Now, brothers, concerning the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, and our gathering together to him, we ask you

chokri: nepo Nyepoo küvo tüsozho tsühi tali kütsü potolino nepo nelü kühoküro thi mhata moyi Ropüh mhase pü na moyi mi dzüna moyi ha chelü lüsi ngoyi no nüko lü kümüzhe mo küto thi süho.
english: not to be quickly shaken in your mind, nor yet be troubled, either by spirit, or by word, or by letter as from us, saying that the day of Christ had come.

chokri: Mipo thüdo kühopüyi sü ne swühite: mi lata müra mu kakütao nuo thüma kürüzüo mi mhüngo thi vokümo lü süyilho.
english: Let no one deceive you in any way. For it will not be, unless the departure comes first, and the man of sin is revealed, the son of destruction,

chokri: Süo u tho u khapü U Kümünupüh düthi moyi mipo u rüsayo küzho khüko ngomu mu putho u Kümünupüh müve thino u Kümünupüh kürüsüce lü bayito.
english: he who opposes and exalts himself against all that is called God or that is worshiped; so that he sits as God in the temple of God, setting himself up as God.

chokri: I Thadzü nüko zü küba che mha sükosü pü nüko che poküsü nüko seyi mota me?
english: Don't you remember that, when I was still with you, I told you these things?

chokri: Sülizo pu po putü tüche prakütona küdipü tsüdo pu kha ba sü nüko yi sebato.
english: Now you know what is restraining him, to the end that he may be revealed in his own season.

chokri: Mu kürüzüo kükuko mi müse müngo mo no tsüyi thi swüdü bate. Eli tsü pu khakübao mipo pu khi müra va mozosu.
english: For the mystery of lawlessness already works. Only there is one who restrains now, until he is taken out of the way.

chokri: Süzüno süsalü kürüzü süo putho mi mhüngo thi prato; Eli Nyepo Jisu ta lü küpra pu thüsü pü süo müka vato, mu pu mi mhüngo thi vode kürüzü süo thi müdi vato.
english: Then the lawless one will be revealed, whom the Lord will kill with the breath of his mouth, and bring to nothing by the brightness of his coming;

chokri: Satan pu hüküsü na kürüzü süo küku mu zasiko mu ungo mhatho küthosu,
english: even he whose coming is according to the working of Satan with all power and signs and lying wonders,

chokri: Mi swüyoküzho khüko sü de vo suta kütoko kütsito; süosü kükrenamoli dzüo züyi moküta la.
english: and with all deception of wickedness for those who are being lost, because they didn't receive the love of the truth, that they might be saved.

chokri: Tsütio uko po küchezü mülütakütona süosü na u Kümünupüh mi po kükritaküto kro po thisüto.
english: Because of this, God sends them a working of error, that they should believe a lie;

chokri: Süzüno küthoo mülü moli küthokümo-o lü unü küta khüko müjo vato.
english: that they all might be judged who didn't believe the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness.

chokri: Süyi Nyepoo khrüküpüh ha küzüko, Ropüh tho ne thi kümüsa yino nepo küthoo mülübüyi no u Kümünupüh süprülü noko küdapü külaküyi checho süpü taküta na ha no noko na u Kümünupüh swüsü tayizüte.
english: But we are bound to always give thanks to God for you, brothers loved by the Lord, because God chose you from the beginning for salvation through sanctification of the Spirit and belief in the truth;

chokri: Pu süosü na ha dzüyiküveo po noko thipü u Nyepo Jisu Khrista zale thiküto checho süyite.
english: to which he called you through our Gospel, for the obtaining of the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Süna ha küzüko thiswü thi thazoyi, mu noko tha dzü zoyi moyi ha lüsi lüno kümütha dzü se küyiko thi mu zütazoyi.
english: So then, brothers, stand firm, and hold the traditions which you were taught by us, whether by word, or by letter.

chokri: Sülizo u Nyepo Jisu Khrista poyi mu u Kümünupüh u poo ngokümüzheo na ukhrü mu küchothe ulü tho mülu mu u sadzuh küve kha u küprüo poyi,
english: Now our Lord Jesus Christ himself, and God our Father, who loved us and gave us eternal comfort and good hope through grace,

chokri: Noko lü tho mülusü mu mhaküve küthi mu dzü lünyiko lü nelü thi kümüve sü küyio thiyite.
english: comfort your hearts and establish you in every good work and word.

chokri: Tsüsa ha küzüko, Nyepoo dzüo po nüko dolü thiyoküzho kümhai kükreko dolü yi thi sazo voyi mu thürho pühyi.
english: Finally, brothers, pray for us, that the word of the Lord may spread rapidly and be glorified, even as also with you;

chokri: Tsü ha poyi thüma mha lükümo mu küruzhümi belü yi ta prayi küto na nüko hana cho sayite: thüma mütüko kumülümi zo morü.
english: and that we may be delivered from unreasonable and evil men; for not all have faith.

chokri: Süyi Nyepoo sü küdzüthoo zo; pu na thi kümütükusü mu kürüzü belü noko külasüto.
english: But the Lord is faithful, who will establish you, and guard you from the evil one.

chokri: Süzo ha noko che mha poküsüko nüko süko thiyi mu tsüsayi, thito ikütsü nüko dzüh zoe ha Nyepoo mülü bayo zo.
english: We have confidence in the Lord concerning you, that you both do and will do the things we command.

chokri: Süzo Nyepoo po noko lü rükhüpü u Kümünupüh chelü küpra kükhrüo mu Khrista chelü küpra sügüsühe küzhoo lü voküyi thite.
english: May the Lord direct your hearts into the love of God, and into the patience of Christ.

chokri: Süzo ha küzüko, ha noko po ne küzümia kühopüyi kühulü tayo kümo mu ne ha chelü kümütha dzü se küyiko züyo kümomi zü kümokro mo küto u Nyepo Jisu Khrista zalü ha dzü kha nüko che süho.
english: Now we command you, brothers, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that you withdraw yourselves from every brother who walks in rebellion, and not after the tradition which they received from us.

chokri: Noko ha doreyi dzü zotsü netho zoyi se bate rü; kükrenamoli ha thadzü nüko dolü küba cheyi miyi zü mo de lhü mozo kütsü na.
english: For you know how you ought to imitate us. For we didn't behave ourselves rebelliously among you,

chokri: Süzomoli ha süchesü mipü belü yi püma thi mo de mha yiketsü moli ha noko mipü lüyi thi kütsakhunyi kümona thathava yi küswüyi mhathi kümüzhe rükharüli zo.
english: neither did we eat bread from anyone's hand without paying for it, but in labor and travail worked night and day, that we might not burden any of you;

chokri: Süosü ha va yiküti putü mo mu süzino moli ha tho thakapü thisü noko ka sünyi kütsü zo
english: not because we don't have the right, but to make ourselves an example to you, that you should imitate us.

chokri: Sizomoli ha noko zü küba cheyi thüma kühopüyi mhathi kümütsü mi, pu po pu lüvayi ti hi süzi ha noko che dzü khasüyo.
english: For even when we were with you, we commanded you this: "If anyone will not work, neither let him eat."

chokri: I dzü hio küpo kükrenamoli ha noko dolü humi u tho u mhatho püyi thi mo no mi küyhu kho mu ki no mire lüyi tayo mokütsü se kütsü nazo.
english: For we hear of some who walk among you in rebellion, who don't work at all, but are busybodies.

chokri: Süna ha thüma süzi kütsümi po rüba no utho uva krati tano kütsü Nyepo Jisu Khrista za sü dzü khasü mu tarho sasü züho.
english: Now those who are that way, we command and exhort in the Lord Jesus Christ, that with quietness they work, and eat their own bread.

chokri: Eli a küzüko, nüko zoe mhakam kühopüyi thi lizo velikütsüko thi ne süsi tahi.
english: But you, brothers, don't be weary in doing well.

chokri: Tsüo thüma kühopüyi lüsi ha yolü thoküsü hadzü züyokümomi, nüko thüma sümi sepü bayi; süzü pu po müngayi küto na neko puzü kümükroyihi.
english: If any man doesn't obey our word in this letter, note that man, that you have no company with him, to the end that he may be ashamed.

chokri: Süzoyi pu khapü ne ngomumi kümha zotahi no ne küzümi kümha no pu tahitarho ta zoyi.
english: Don't count him as an enemy, but admonish him as a brother.

chokri: Süzo thülü thi kümünüyoküzho Nyepo po kühopüyi, kühopülüyi putho nune süo khapü miprü taküyio thiyite.
english: Now may the Lord of peace himself give you peace at all times in all ways. The Lord be with you all.

chokri: I Paul tho ne külüküsü a tho a be pü thosü ho; hiyohi a lüsi khoko lü a chelü zoli kütsü zasi pü zo; I hizi de thoyo.
english: The greeting of me, Paul, with my own hand, which is the sign in every letter: this is how I write.

chokri: U Nyepo Jisu Khrista chelü küpra ngokümüzheo po noko mütüko zü baküyio thiyite.
english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.

chokri: U Kümünupüh ukülaküyio mu Jisu Khrista ukümüri küneo yolü chi mu küdaküyi Paul no thopüh
english: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus according to the commandment of God our Savior, and Christ Jesus our hope;

chokri: Timothy kümülülü punu kütho thikütao ce küsü; ngokümüzhie, kükhrü mu lünüo u Kümünupüh yolü küvo.
english: to Timothy, my true child in faith: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.

chokri: Ino Macedonia lü vode Ephesus lü kübace n pono thüma thüzho kümütha dzü mütha kükri kütiko püh müthahi no posü,
english: As I exhorted you to stay at Ephesus when I was going into Macedonia, that you might charge certain men not to teach a different doctrine,

chokri: Ukopo thüdzü küpo mu upotsaneko dzü küpoko rünyi hino posüh, kükrenamoli süko yolü Kümünupüh mhatho kümülülü thaküsüko moli küzüküsu, ulakükreküti püvo tayo kütila.
english: neither to pay attention to myths and endless genealogies, which cause disputes, rather than God's stewardship, which is in faith--

chokri: Thüzho khaküsü külüyono kükhrü. U külü kümüsa lüno voyo mu utho ulü müzho kümolü lüno voyo.
english: but the end of the charge is love, out of a pure heart and a good conscience and unfeigned faith;

chokri: Thüma humi mha süko pon u küdode pozükümo uco küdiko potate.
english: from which things some, having missed the mark, have turned aside to vain talking;

chokri: Uko no thüzho kümüthami thi nyisa eli uko no dipüh pobashi sede poyomo morei uko poküba kütho zo küti mülü yomo.
english: desiring to be teachers of the law, though they understand neither what they say, nor about what they strongly affirm.

chokri: U münu de thüzhoo süyi lize thüzhoo veti seba.
english: But we know that the law is good, if a man uses it lawfully,

chokri: U seküyi thüzho hi kümathomi na thisü mo eli thüzho zü kümomi mu thüzho kümütsuko, Ukümünupüh se kümoko küphomako, musakümoko, mizü züh kümoko, upo uzu küdokhriko mu thümumi, miküdokhrimi na zo.
english: as knowing this, that law is not made for a righteous man, but for the lawless and insubordinate, for the ungodly and sinners, for the unholy and profane, for murderers of fathers and murderers of mothers, for manslayers,

chokri: Kürügükürüzümi, u tho u zümi yo kethenga kethi, thüma zhü ketimi, mikhwü zu kümoko mi küswü, thüma kücejümi, medade rüswü ketiko miküdo kütami mu kümütha züh zü küthürü kütiko.
english: for the sexually immoral, for homosexuals, for slave-traders, for liars, for perjurers, and for any other thing contrary to the sound doctrine;

chokri: Kümüthazü püh umülü küva küvethoo u Kümünupüh dzüyiküve küthoo zü kürhü zo.
english: according to the Gospel of the glory of the blessed God, which was committed to my trust.

chokri: Jisu Khrista a Nyepoo dzüküpo a kütsüla mu a küda püh apon yitho thi küyila pukümüza poyo.
english: And I thank him who enabled me, Christ Jesus our Lord, because he counted me faithful, appointing me to service;

chokri: Ino vapüh Nyepoo tha mu mülade pu kümülümiko müthimünyi, mikhwü zümo vo zori puno ngokümüzhie püh a tsü kükrelamoli Ino mülümode semode thita kütala.
english: although I was before a blasphemer, a persecutor, and insolent. However, I obtained mercy, because I did it ignorantly in unbelief.

chokri: Jisu Khrista yolü ngokümüzhe püh a kütsukülhu thisü, hihi Jisu Khrista yolü kümülü mu kükhrü lazo.
english: The grace of our Lord abounded exceedingly with faith and love which is in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Hicehi mülüyi küsü kümatho küzütho zü mu yiküsü züsü Jisu Khrista no küphomami külayi kütola cezülü vo, süko dolü Ino küphoumadoo.
english: The saying is faithful and worthy of all acceptance, that Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners; of whom I am chief.

chokri: Eli puno ngukümüzhe püh a tsüsü, side küphomadoo a yolüno Jisu Khrista kükhrü küla kedi thapüh mülü küyimi müka de uko po küchothe külaküyi ngoyi kütola.
english: However, for this cause I obtained mercy, that in me first, Jesus Christ might display all his patience, for an example of those who were going to believe in him for eternal life.

chokri: Küchothe küdeo, puh küla küdio, Kümünupuh pon thürho zapozale mütü püh küyiyo thite.
english: Now to the King eternal, immortal, invisible, to God who alone is wise, be honor and glory forever and ever. Amen.

chokri: Anu Timothy Ino kümüthazü hihi sadzü popüh kümütayo npo müdziyi mu nkunhie thide kümürha non poyo.
english: This charge I commit to you, my child Timothy, according to the prophecies which led the way to you, that by them you may wage the good warfare;

chokri: N kümülü rüderületa hide n lükütho püh thüma u kümülü dzüru rülükütako bita hite.
english: holding faith and a good conscience; which some having thrust away made a shipwreck concerning the faith;

chokri: Thüma sünyisü Hymenaeus mu Alexander, Ino unyi khapüh Satan belüsüve side unyi po u Kümünupüh tha lata mo kütola.
english: of whom is Hymenaeus and Alexander; whom I delivered to Satan, that they might be taught not to blaspheme.

chokri: I nce porasü nyi kübao kütasa kühupon thüma kühopülari cho mu n müzhiemülo mu mi zhopo ri thi mu u Kümünupüh tsü ba zoyite.
english: I exhort therefore, first of all, that petitions, prayers, intercessions, and givings of thanks, be made for all men:

chokri: Side cho kütice Küdekola mu mi mho küzho khüko la ri sade chobazoyite: silize min uküyhu küzhie mo mu upon mizü küzüve mu Ihü de kütholü münu de tayi kütola.
english: for kings and all who are in high places; that we may lead a tranquil and quiet life in all godliness and reverence.

chokri: U külaküyi u Kümünupüh mhüzü ce no siküti pu nüzo kütila.
english: For this is good and acceptable in the sight of God our Savior;

chokri: Puno thüma mütüko pon külaküyi ngoi küti mu kütho mhaseo vo küti punüzo.
english: who desires all people to be saved and come to full knowledge of the truth.

chokri: Süsari u Kümünupüh yozo, sülize u Kümünupüh mu thüma dolü kütha ripuzo puno thüma thiküta Khrista zo.
english: For there is one God, and one mediator between God and men, the man Christ Jesus,

chokri: Puno pupho khapü thüma mütüko rhapü müzüte, süla pütütüce süsüzhopo thisü molizo süte.
english: who gave himself as a ransom for all; the testimony in its own times;

chokri: Süsü la kümülü mu kütho lüno apon Judakümoko kümütha süsü dzüyiküve pü mi mütha mu pü apostle püthi kütola a küdayite mu süsüküthotüzo, cezü mozo.
english: to which I was appointed a preacher and an apostle (I am telling the truth in Christ, not lying), a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.

chokri: Sülano I thüpumi pon kühorapüh kücho thizori ulürüda mori mizü kümülita mode ubenyi pon müsade ube yhopü küchoküthi a müdo.
english: I desire therefore that the men in every place pray, lifting up holy hands without wrath and doubting.

chokri: Süsü bide thünomi pori unga ne mu ulümüsa müzide ukhwüne uzhotüko ukütsopüta küti a müdo; süsari upitha che dolinyi thipüh mori suna mori mhama kürü khwümeko süta moli,
english: In the same way, that women also adorn themselves in decent clothing, with modesty and propriety; not just with braided hair, gold, pearls, or expensive clothing;

chokri: Thünomi kütholüyo kütiko uvaküzüve kütiko süde mhathoküve linyiko thipüh ukütsoyi no süzo.
english: but (which becomes women professing godliness) with good works.

chokri: Thünomi pon mhakühopülüri mikhrikhro bade münude mi ukümüthazüko seyite.
english: Let a woman learn in quietness with all subjection.

chokri: Süzomoli thünomipon sü mi mütha mori thüpumi mhuküzho thi kütamoli münu bade mikhwü rünyiküyi thinyi.
english: But I don't permit a woman to teach, nor to exercise authority over a man, but to be in quietness.

chokri: Kükrelamoli Adam no Eve mhüjü thi müra.
english: For Adam was first formed, then Eve.

chokri: Mu Adam no küdo ketsü lü tamo; veli thünopü no kedoketsülü lüta no phoma ta.
english: Adam wasn't deceived, but the woman, being deceived, has fallen into disobedience;

chokri: Vele thünopüri nu kümünu lüno pü külayito pü kümülü, kükhrü mu kümüsa lü pükhi kürünu püba tsüsa.
english: but she will be saved through her child-bearing, if they continue in faith, love, and sanctification with sobriety.

chokri: Thüma kühopüri kühu kukhwümi yitho thinyiyo küzhomi mha kam küzho phuyo.
english: This is a faithful saying: if a man seeks the office of an overseer, he desires a good work.

chokri: Süla kühu kukhwümi pon mipon puthayi külhomi, pu cemi pülübikünemi mhakuhopü lüri uküthükürü küyimi puzho küvemi mu thümakümünumi, mi müsonyiyo küzhomi mu mi müthayi küsümi molizosu.
english: The overseer therefore must be without reproach, the husband of one wife, temperate, sensible, modest, hospitable, good at teaching;

chokri: Pu kümüzümi mori mi vünyi sayo küzhomi mode thüma kümüzimi molizo su: Pu mizü künyonyi sayo küzhomi mu süceraka mühoyokümomi molizo su.
english: not a drinker, not violent, not greedy for money, but gentle, not quarrelsome, not covetous;

chokri: Puno putho pu celümi ri kükha münu zütayo küzhomi, puneko pori pükhri müprü de puzü züyo küzhomi molize
english: one who rules his own house well, having children in subjection with all reverence;

chokri: Simode thüma kühopuri puthon pu celümi kükhayi semolize puno dipübide u Kümünupüh kühu küsü münuyi veta?
english: (but if a man doesn't know how to rule his own house, how will he take care of the assembly of God?)

chokri: Puno ko müthu tade Satan bi u Kümünupüh pon pu müzhoküva kümüprü la masami zohite.
english: not a new convert, lest being puffed up he fall into the same condemnation as the devil.

chokri: Sizomoli pun mithapüta mu Satan ratho lüno pumapü küta kümüprüla chozoumi mhuzülü ri thürho püyiyo küzhomi molizo su.
english: Moreover he must have good testimony from those who are outside, to avoid falling into reproach and the snare of the devil.

chokri: Süsü bi Dikon shie thüma kümüzimi udzü müdayo kümomi, hezokranyi yo kümomi, kümüthu lüno mizü yinyio kümomi molizosu.
english: Deacons, in the same way, must be reverent, not double-tongued, not addicted to much wine, not greedy for money;

chokri: Süko ulümüzi de kümülü dzü kümüsü sü poyo küzhomi molizo su.
english: holding the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience.

chokri: Sülizo thüma süko rüle küveküsu se mürayi de uko küzho di lize uko pon Dikon kam thiyite.
english: Let them also first be tested; then let them serve as deacons, if they are blameless.

chokri: Dikonpüko ri sübide uzhomüzi mu mitha mi mülüyo küzhomi moli mha kuhopülüri u küthükürüyo küzhomi mu küzüthomi molizo su.
english: Their wives in the same way must be reverent, not slanderers, temperate, faithful in all things.

chokri: Dikonmi ri u nopüne pülübi küti mi, unune mu u celümiko kükhamünu sütayo küzhomi molizo su.
english: Let deacons be husbands of one wife, ruling their children and their own houses well.

chokri: Süsari Dikon thi münu küzhomi u kümülü ri neyi de Jisu Khrista cecho nkümülü thüpu küthi mamayi yo.
english: For those who have served well as deacons gain to themselves a good standing, and great boldness in the faith which is in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Eno nce voze küti lüde dzü hiko thopü nce sü züho.
english: These things I write to you, hoping to come to you shortly;

chokri: Eno bachota zori u Kümünupüh celü kübami uzho küdipü biyi molizosushi npon seba nyi. Ce süsü rhütayo küzho u Kümünupüh kuhu, küthoo kütüco mu punophuyo zo.
english: but if I wait long, that you may know how men ought to behave themselves in the house of God, which is the assembly of the living God, the pillar and ground of the truth.

chokri: Sülize mipu pori unanyilü dzü kümüsü mhase küzhotho sü yisü molikündizo. “Süsü thüma müvee no mi mhingo thivo, pu rüpü yolün puyisü matho zole küti seyi tüyo choyimi pungo, thüma lünyiko dolü no pu dzü popü mi müka: cejü hiyolü külhümi pu mülü, puzüde müso kevetho yolükhote”
english: Without controversy, the mystery of godliness is great: God was revealed in the flesh, Justified in the spirit, Seen by angels, Preached among the nations, Believed on in the world, And received up in glory.

chokri: Siri Rüpüno potü küsü vo künukünuco thüma humi u kümülü khavade uswükütse küti hupühko müdzi tato.
english: But the Spirit says expressly that in later times some will fall away from the faith, paying attention to seducing spirits and doctrines of demons,

chokri: Mu thürü kürüzüko sümi müthaküti dzüko rünyi tato. Therü küsu thümaküve muveva küzhoko. Cejüyo küzhoko mu uko külü ri thügithe müthipuzasi vü küvako bide süko zü mhathi tato.
english: through the hypocrisy of men who speak lies, branded in their own conscience as with a hot iron;

chokri: Thüma süko mipon küsuküri hino mu u Kümünupüh pu kümülüko mu küthoo sekütako pon sükopü putsüde süde ucho thino de thi küsüko tihino tato.
english: forbidding marriage and commanding to abstain from foods which God created to be received with thanksgiving by those who believe and know the truth.

chokri: Siri u Kümünupüh mhathiküsü khüko vetsüzo mu mhakühopüri u süde puza tsüde yiyi kütasa theta morive.
english: For every creature of God is good, and nothing is to be rejected, if it is received with thanksgiving.

chokri: Kükrelamoli u Kümünupüh dzüo la mu u küchola süko thi kümüsayikütala.
english: For it is sanctified through the word of God and prayer.

chokri: No dzü hiko pü nzüko lü mu kütüsü lizo no ntho zori züta küta kümülü dzü mu kümütha dzü küveko thon n thüküpüh n pon Khrista Jisu yitho küvemipü thiyito.
english: If you instruct the brothers of these things, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus, nourished in the words of the faith, and of the good doctrine which you have followed.

chokri: Siri dzü küthüvako mu kütsapüko kühanya küti dzü küpoko rünyi hide küthokülü cho ntho n küphra sü tayite.
english: But refuse profane and old wives' fables. Exercise yourself toward godliness.

chokri: Thüma umo küzhophra küti zono küdopü kümüve zo, siri küthokülüno puküpra kükroba mu tsüdori mu thasa cori kürhü ngoyi küto dzü sülü ba.
english: For bodily exercise has some value, but godliness has value for all things, having the promise of the life which is now, and of that which is to come.

chokri: Dzü hikohi küthotüzo mu zü kütsükütsoyi ri züzo.
english: This saying is faithful and worthy of all acceptance.

chokri: Süsüla u rhütayoküzho u Kümünupüh yolü u sadzü bataküti la sürhü mu utütso thitayo zo. U Kümünupüh sü thüma mütüko külaküyiyo zo, süyi kümülümi la muku.
english: For to this end we both labor and suffer reproach, because we have set our trust in the living God, who is the Savior of all men, especially of those who believe.

chokri: Dzü hikohipü mipon züyi node posü mu süko pu uko müthayite.
english: Command and teach these things.

chokri: Non khriesa bazolu lino mipüri pon ntha nmülüküta thita hite, sikütamoli kümülümi mhuzülü non n dzü lüri mu n zhorüle lüri. Sülize kükhrü, kümülü mu müsade lhü kütilü ri thaka pü thipüh uko müka zoyite.
english: Let no man despise your youth; but be an example to those who believe, in word, in your way of life, in love, in spirit, in faith, and in purity.

chokri: In vo kümothe non kütholüsi phripüh mikaküti mu mitahitarho küti mu mi mütha kütiko lü n yhe thi bazoyite.
english: Until I come, pay attention to reading, to exhortation, and to teaching.

chokri: Non kütsako ubekha n yolü küsüce sadzüküse dzüla Rüpü mhaphrü kha n phrüküvayo sün mhathi mo ba tahite.
english: Don't neglect the gift that is in you, which was given to you by prophecy, with the laying on of the hands of the elders.

chokri: Non mhakühopulüri vekühieyi ba küta thüma kühopü pori seyi kütola non dzü hiko lü terü zode süko thi mu zü bazoyite.
english: Be diligent in these things. Give yourself wholly to them, that your progress may be revealed to all.

chokri: N zho n rülelü zori mu non mi kümütha lüzori münuyite. Non dzü hiko zü bazoyi, kükrelamoli non süzi ba zoyi lize ntho ri mu n dzü kürünyiko ri külayi to kütila.
english: Pay attention to yourself, and to your teaching. Continue in these things, for in doing this you will save both yourself and those who hear you.

chokri: Kütsami yolü dzü kürü pohite; sikutimoli süko yisü n pone bide uko hüzoyite, khresamiri yisü n sazümi bizoyite.
english: Don't rebuke an older man, but exhort him as a father; the younger men as brothers;

chokri: Kütsapümi yisü nzune bizoyi, side ulü müsamüzi zode rülikori yisü nlipüne bizode süko ri lüzoyite.
english: the elder women as mothers; the younger as sisters, in all purity.

chokri: Same hori same küthopühko khrüzoyite.
english: Honor widows who are widows indeed.

chokri: Thüno same horei unune mori u nune nuyie künemiko süko pon uthoucelümi cekro kütho tülü utho ukrüne vaphilaküyi do seyite,
english: But if any widow has children or grandchildren, let them learn first to show piety towards their own family, and to repay their parents, for this is acceptable in the sight of God.

chokri: siri thüno same pulubi zo küta küthomi u Kümünupüh kümülü lü mütütatayo. Süla puno thüva ri külheri cho mu u müzhiemülo tatayo.
english: Now she who is a widow indeed, and desolate, has her hope set on God, and continues in petitions and prayers night and day.

chokri: Süri thüno same rügürüzü pünü pu müdo thi kütami kono rhükübalü satatazo.
english: But she who gives herself to pleasure is dead while she lives.

chokri: Mipo süko thata mo kütola non kühuce dzü hiko posüte.
english: Also command these things, that they may be without reproach.

chokri: Thüma kühopuri putho pu cekro mühoyi külhomi bahori ukümünothoko puno pu kumülü thasü mote, süzi kütami mülükümokomi ceri sükuote.
english: But if anyone doesn't provide for his own, and especially his own household, he has denied the faith, and is worse than an unbeliever.

chokri: Thüpu pü ce libi neta de same thi kütapüh külhüzho tütse hieswürü mhu tazo kümosa süko vaphi kütola uza thohite.
english: Let no one be enrolled as a widow under sixty years old, having been the wife of one man,

chokri: Puno mi mhuzülü ri mhatho küvela thütsüh küpümi molize su; puno natsimi thükü sü, rüso kümüso, kümüsami phe khrü, puno kümüzheküyimi vaphi side mhaküve küthoko sadzi thi küvomi molize su.
english: being approved by good works, if she has brought up children, if she has been hospitable to strangers, if she has washed the saints' feet, if she has relieved the afflicted, and if she has diligently followed every good work.

chokri: Siri thünopü same tse hieswürü khroko vaphihite; süko Khrista müdozü mode kürüzülü lüta lizo uko no nyhitato,
english: But refuse younger widows, for when they have grown wanton against Christ, they desire to marry;

chokri: Side uko dzü kürao va küvala jo tato.
english: having condemnation, because they have rejected their first pledge.

chokri: Side uko mhathi kümütsü dori sede celi kolü mürü tato, side uko mhathimütsüküta zo moli dzüh pozükümokori pode Salithi mu mitha mu pozükümoko pota tato.
english: Besides, they also learn to be idle, going about from house to house. Not only idle, but also gossips and busybodies, saying things which they ought not.

chokri: Süla thüno pethita kümoko pon u ngomumi tha püh tamo kütola mhitade unu münu de ucelümi thüküti a müdo.
english: I desire therefore that the younger widows marry, bear children, rule the household, and give no occasion to the adversary for reviling.

chokri: Kükrelamoli humino tsüri cho vajopüde Satan samüdzi küta ba kütala.
english: For already some have turned aside after Satan.

chokri: Kümülüpuh kühopüri thüno same si küti balize pu kühu va münyi mode putho süko vaphiyite, side kühu pon thüno same küthoko vaphiyite.
english: If any man or woman who believes has widows, let them relieve them, and don't let the assembly be burdened; that it might relieve those who are widows indeed.

chokri: Kühupon pethiko mu kühou küsü munuyo küzhoko bahori dzüyiküvepo mika mi mütha kütilü urhathiyo kütiko rho muku zoyite.
english: Let the elders who rule well be counted worthy of double honor, especially those who labor in the word and in teaching.

chokri: Kütholüsi lüno hihi bide po. “Non metho züde tülhanyi kübace mhapüh puta küra hite” mu “mhathomi puzho ngotiyi zü” siba.
english: For the Scripture says, "You shall not muzzle the ox when it treads out the grain." And, "The laborer is worthy of his wages."

chokri: Kühu pethio yolü mhapuh pata zori mi küna küsü se mu ngotüzomo lize rünyi hite.
english: Don't receive an accusation against an elder, except at the word of two or three witnesses.

chokri: Küsuthi kütami küjo popüh pu mükate, mu kükremi pori müprüyi kütola kühu müthi dolüno thite.
english: Those who sin, reprove in the sight of all, that the rest also may be in fear.

chokri: I nce polaküti Jihova mhuzülü mu Jisu Khrista mhuzülü mu tüyochoyimi küdaküyiko mhuzülüri kümüzi püh posü noyo, mha kühopüh thizori thüma hu khrü mükre mori külalhe de mhapüri thi hite.
english: I charge you in the sight of God, and Christ Jesus, and the chosen angels, that you observe these things without prejudice, doing nothing by partiality.

chokri: Mhalü mode pümozode n be chopüh mipüh yolüri sühite mu mi kükremi küphoma züde kürhühi, eli ntho nkhi kümüsayite.
english: Lay hands hastily on no one, neither be a participant in other men's sins. Keep yourself pure.

chokri: Hisa non dzü libi krazo mode khubuzü küdopüh püh sade krayite kükrelamoli non tsükünu nva thitayo kütila.
english: Be no longer a drinker of water only, but use a little wine for your stomach's sake and your frequent infirmities.

chokri: Humi küsuküthi no mülemulu tayo, side sazho ngoyitayo, siri küjokümo küthi kropüh no kümüjo rüle de pusahu votayo.
english: Some men's sins are evident, preceding them to judgment, and some also follow later.

chokri: Sükümhade thüma mhaküve küthi ri humi mhatho se mhayi tayo, sübide thi kümokori seyi tato.
english: In the same way also there are good works that are obvious, and those that are otherwise can't be hidden.

chokri: Mi pon u Kümünupüh za mu pu kümütha dzüko thaküta kümüprüla mice tathide mi voce püta kütako ponutho u nyepomi rho kütsükütsoyi küzü lüyite.
english: Let as many as are bondservants under the yoke count their own masters worthy of all honor, that the name of God and the doctrine not be blasphemed.

chokri: Sülizo Khristami miceta thi kütami pori u nyepomi yi züde sazüdzüratazo, side uko rhomoküta thita hide uko yitho la küpra kümüve ngoküyilüde mu pu kümülümi kütala puno pu khriethomi tazo küti lüde punüde pü chovi thiyite.
english: Those who have believing masters, let them not despise them, because they are brothers, but rather let them serve them, because those who partake of the benefit are believing and beloved. Teach and exhort these things.

chokri: Dzü hiko popüh müka mu mi tahitarho bazoyite. Thüma kühopüri kütho dzüpüh mi mütha kukri de Jisu Khrista dzüko yi mu kümülü dzürünyi mu talize puno küthüva mu mhapüri sebamote, süla puno mhapuriseyilho.
english: If anyone teaches a different doctrine, and doesn't consent to sound words, the words of our Lord Jesus Christ, and to the doctrine which is according to godliness,

chokri: Thüma süko mhapüri semo zori ko müthu tayo side künyomi bide kütsozü kümoko ri kütso mu mizü kümülitayo. Mha süko lano mingo uroküti, panyoparo, küzhe kümüli, küthaküti, huhu lü müsu kütiko muküthoo thüratayo.
english: he is conceited, knowing nothing, but obsessed with arguments, disputes, and word battles, from which come envy, strife, reviling, evil suspicions,

chokri: Sizomoli ukülü kükreta de huhu lü müsu küta, küthoo seyi mota de süceraka kümüho side mizü kümürhata tayo.
english: constant friction of people of corrupt minds and destitute of the truth, who suppose that godliness is a means of gain. Withdraw yourself from such.

chokri: Siri thüma ulülü unüsayi de kütholüyo küzhomi u kümüve ba zo.
english: But godliness with contentment is great gain.

chokri: Kükrelamoli u mhapüri süde cejü lü vomo mu u mhapüri süde talayi lhozo kütila.
english: For we brought nothing into the world, and we certainly can't carry anything out.

chokri: Siri u kütico mu u khwüne süküyi ba kütasa umhapüri künyo mori ve.
english: But having food and clothing, we will be content with that.

chokri: Siri mhaküne lüyo küzhomi tü dophi mu miratholü, kümüthu kümüri: uthi müsuyo kütilü lütayo: mha süko pon mizupüh de kükalü mu kümüsü lü tayo.
english: But those who are determined to be rich fall into a temptation and a snare and many foolish and harmful lusts, such as drown men in ruin and destruction.

chokri: Sücerüka kümüho no mhaküsu mütü bodüo zo, humi süsü phu tade ukümülü vajopüh tate, mu ulü supüh mhapuh thide kümüzhe phitate.
english: For the love of money is a root of all kinds of evil. Some have been led astray from the faith in their greed, and have pierced themselves through with many sorrows.

chokri: Siri u Kümünupüh thümao non mha hiko thürayi de kümatho, küthokülü, kümülü, kükhrü ulü sügüsühie küti mu thülü kümünü phu yoyite.
english: But you, man of God, flee these things, and follow after righteousness, godliness, faith, love, patience, and gentleness.

chokri: Thüma kümürhayo küzho bide kümülü dzü co n rhathi zoyite, side küchothe kürhü yisü nzüthi zoyite, thazüri süsü la n ciyi mu thümakükro mhuzülü dzü küve süsü po vota zo,
english: Fight the good fight of faith. Lay hold of the eternal life to which you were called, and you confessed the good confession in the sight of many witnesses.

chokri: Mhamütüko mülhüküsü boo u Kümünupüh mu Pontius Pilate mhuzülüdzü küve popüh kütho zhopo thi küsüo Khrista Jisu mhungolüno;
english: I charge you before God, who gives life to all things, and before Christ Jesus, who before Pontius Pilate testified the good confession,

chokri: In npo u Nyepo Jisu Khrista la prüta kümotha ncepo küsü dzüko thi muzü zode mipon dzü süko thata mode süko thiba zoyi no küti a dzü khasüho.
english: that you keep the commandment without spot, blameless, until the appearing of our Lord Jesus Christ;

chokri: Pu küvo sü putho utütü ceno mipon ngoyito; püsü küdeko mhu Küdeozo, nyepoko mhu Nyepoo, küdeko mhu Küdeo sü pulibizo.
english: which in its own times he will show, who is the blessed and only Ruler, the King of kings, and Lord of lords;

chokri: Satayi külhoo sü Pu lübi zo; Puno ungo votso külho küvelü bayo, thümapuri Pun gomo mu ngoriyi lhote, Pu pon thürho pükeyiyo mu küchothe kükuo thite.
english: who alone has immortality, dwelling in unapproachable light; whom no man has seen, nor can see: to whom be honor and eternal power. Amen.

chokri: Künemiko cedzü hihi posüte; uko pon ncene phude kümoko hi mori ukümüri mütüpüh u cenelü sü hite, kükrelamoh süsü küchothe ba küto cene moeli uko pon ukümüri püh Kümünupüh yolü süyite. Kükrelamoli putho cene sü molize kesu mütü püh u kütsüla.
english: Charge those who are rich in this present world that they not be haughty, nor have their hope set on the uncertainty of riches, but on the living God, who richly provides us with everything to enjoy;

chokri: Künemiko pon ucene süde mhaküve küthilü mhane sayi node posüte, side u ceneko süde miprümiza de thüma pon unüyite.
english: that they do good, that they be rich in good works, that they be ready to distribute, willing to communicate;

chokri: Uko mhatho hikohi thiyilize uko no küchothe cene künguküba zo side cene bo küveo swüdüyite.
english: laying up in store for themselves a good foundation against the time to come, that they may lay hold of eternal life.

chokri: Timothy, non mha kam kha n mülü küvayo sü münude sü zoyite, side mithon dzüthuko, mori kücejü dzüko yisü mha küse dzü liyo küzhoko mu küngokümu, müsakümo dzüko thüra zoyite, thüma humi süko zü vo ukümülü khave.
english: Timothy, guard that which is committed to you, turning away from the empty chatter and oppositions of the knowledge which is falsely so called;

chokri: Ngokümüzhe pon nzü ba küyiyo thiyite.
english: which some professing have erred concerning the faith. Grace be with you. Amen.

chokri: Khrista Jisu lü küpa kürhü ngoyi küto dzüo la ukümünupü müdo lü Khrista Jisu ceco apostle thi küyio Paul celü kha,
english: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ through the will of God, according to the promise of the life which is in Christ Jesus,

chokri: Anu akhrüo Timothy ce küsü; U Jihova upo0o mu u Nepo Khrista Jisu celü küpo ngo kümüzhie, kükhrü mu ulü kümünü po n yo ba küyio thiyi te.
english: to Timothy, my beloved child: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.

chokri: I a mhalü müsa müzi no a puotsa neko ri rüshü küvo Ukümünupü rüshü no pü chü bayo. Sino thüva ri kühe-o ri kücho mütü kolü I n rüle rükra süh bayozo.
english: I thank God, whom I serve as my forefathers did, with a pure conscience. How unceasing is my memory of you in my petitions, night and day

chokri: Sio I n mhüdzü kri küsüko rükra vo küyi ce apo ri anuyi kütola n ngo nyüsai baba yo.
english: longing to see you, remembering your tears, that I may be filled with joy;

chokri: Kükrelamori n kümülü kütho tüzo kütsü rükra küyila, kümülü süo sü thadzü n zutsa Lowi mu nzu Ewoniki uni lüta, mu süo nlü ri ta küzü I she tübazo.
english: having been reminded of the unfeigned faith that is in you; which lived first in your grandmother Lois, and your mother Eunice, and, I am persuaded, in you also.

chokri: Hiohila I npo thadzü a beni pü nyo küsü ce no Ukümünupü celü mhaphrü ngo küyio mu mhü mütoyi yo küzho kümha süo mhümüto sasü non n belü khasüzü-e
english: For this cause, I remind you that you should stir up the gift of God which is in you through the laying on of my hands.

chokri: Kükrelamori Ukümünupü upo müprüh ta no kütsü ropü mori kuku mu kükhrü mu ulü kümüzi ropü-o kha cüva kütala.
english: For God didn't give us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and self-control.

chokri: Süla no u nepo zhopüo küthi ceco ri mu pu jü thiküto püh dzüyi küve la kümüzhe zoyi.
english: Therefore don't be ashamed of the testimony of our Lord, nor of me his prisoner; but endure hardship for the Gospel according to the power of God,

chokri: Ukümünupü u mhathoko la mori pütho rhüpü küta küratholü Khrista Jisu la ngo kümüzhe pü u kücüla u külayi mu cüküyi kümüsa Poo u cüyi kütazo.
english: who saved us and called us with a holy calling, not according to our works, but according to his own purpose and grace, which was given to us in Christ Jesus before times eternal,

chokri: Sio tsüno u kulaküyio Khrista Jisu vo mi mhüngo thive; Püe küsa ri thipüh kümüchü püh kümha ve sino dzüyi küve lano rhüyi küto mu ceretayi küho dzu püh mi dzü va n ve yite.
english: but has now been revealed by the appearing of our Savior, Christ Jesus, who abolished death, and brought life and immortality to light through the Gospel.

chokri: A pod züyi küve süo popüh mi müka kütsü mu apostle mu kümütha thi non a küdayite.
english: For this, I was appointed as a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher of the Gentiles.

chokri: Sü-osüla I kümüzhe kütsü hiko ri ngo küyi zo; sizori I münga ta yiho; sizo mori I Pu mülü ta kütao I süosheta yozo, mu I mha pü pu mülü ta küvao Pu süo rükhü rügu sü vo tüsozho küzho nha tso yiri kütsü I shetü batazo.
english: For this cause I suffer also these things. Yet I am not ashamed, for I know him whom I have believed, and I am persuaded that he is able to guard that which I have committed to him against that day.

chokri: No a celü she küyi u sühva mürhü kütsü jüko püh Khrista Jisu celü ngo küyi kümülü mu kürhü lü n mhüdzü thaka püh thipüh tazo yite.
english: Hold the pattern of sound words which you have heard from me, in faith and love which is in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Mhaküve khapüh nbelü süva kütao non lüta küta kümüsaropü po n khrühi no rükhü rügu süh tazo yite.
english: That good thing which was committed to you, guard through the Holy Spirit who dwells in us.

chokri: Asia lü küba mütükoa ceco thamo ta kütsü nori sheba tho. Süko dolü Fusilo mu Humogini uni risa.
english: This you know, that all who are in Asia turned away from me; of whom are Phygelus and Hermogenes.

chokri: Nepo po Onesifera celümi ngokümüzheo thiyite; kükrelamori pü tsü künu vo alü tho mülu sü mu thügiro pü a khüpü küta la ri münga ta mozo kütsüla.
english: May the Lord grant mercy to the house of Onesiphorus, for he often refreshed me, and was not ashamed of my chain,

chokri: Si kütsüo mori pü Rom lü küba ce a phu urha thizo vo angoi zo.
english: but when he was in Rome, he sought me diligently, and found me

chokri: Pupo tüsozho küzho nha Nepoo khrü püyi kütola Nepoo po süo thipüh püyo süküyi-o thiyite, pü Ephesus lüzori mha küve ditsu di thüdü thisü sühküzü nori sheswü bato.
english: (the Lord grant to him to find the Lord's mercy in that day); and in how many things he served at Ephesus, you know very well.

chokri: Süla anu no Khrista celü küpa ngo kümüzhe-o lü mütü mama zo yite.
english: You therefore, my child, be strengthened in the grace that is in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Sio no thüma kükro küshe küngo lü a celü dzü rünyi küyiko, no süko khapü mi kükremi ri müthayi küvemi mipo ri u mülüyi küvemi belü süsüte.
english: The things which you have heard from me among many witnesses, commit the same to faithful men, who will be able to teach others also.

chokri: Nori Khrista Jisu thipahi küvemi kümha no azü kümüzhe yite.
english: You therefore must endure hardship, as a good soldier of Christ Jesus.

chokri: Thüma kühopühri thüpahi kam thiküto ce mha kükre thi u küre yomo; süosü kükrelamori püpo thüpahi thito-ü püza tho küyio nü thiyi kütola.
english: No soldier on service entangles himself in the affairs of life, that he may please him who enrolled him as a soldier.

chokri: Sizomori thüma kühopühri mi zü rüshü küve küka thi kütomi thüzho tüce thi rüshü moo kuküyi pirüh püh pü cü yomü.
english: Also, if anyone competes in athletics, he isn't crowned unless he has competed by the rules.

chokri: Utho thathizo no yi teyi küzhomi, mi kükremi mhüdzü umhatho she ngo rato.
english: The farmers who labor must be the first to get a share of the crops.

chokri: A kupoko lüsüte, Nepoo pütho mha kühopüh lüri mha küshe külü kha n cü süto.
english: Consider what I say, and may the Lord give you understanding in all things.

chokri: Khrista Jisu, rükra ba zo yi; I dzüyi küveo lü popüh mi müka küta kümha Pü küsako dolü rhüla süte, mu Pü David ye-o zo;
english: Remember Jesus Christ, risen from the dead, of the seed of David, according to my Gospel,

chokri: Dzüyiküve süo la küjo küthimi kümha mipo a khüpüh kümüzhe hite küzüzo; siri ukümünupü dzü phakha va zümozo.
english: in which I suffer hardship to the point of chains as a criminal. But God's word isn't chained.

chokri: Süla küdaküyiko po Khrista Jisu yolü küpa kulaküyi püh küchothe zale küthi sa ngoi küto la I mha mütüko lü sügüsühe tayo.
english: Therefore I endure all things for the chosen ones' sake, that they also may obtain the salvation which is in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.

chokri: U Pü züh sa loo Pü züh rhü yito:
english: This saying is faithful: For if we died with him, We will also live with him.

chokri: U sügüsüheyi loo u Pü züh küde thito; u Pü za pomu loo Puri uza pomu tato.
english: If we endure, We will also reign with him. If we deny him, He also will deny us.

chokri: U dzütho mo zori Püe dzütho süh bazo, kükrelamori Püe Pütho Pdzü molen potyi hozo küzüla; dzü hiko küthozo.
english: If we are faithless, He remains faithful. He can't deny himself.

chokri: No uko Po dzü hiko rükrayi no süte. Mu Nepoo küngo ce uko po dzü kümüli hi no süte küpali küzü-e nve küyio mori kürünyimi thi müshü vayo küzüla.
english: Remind them of these things, charging them in the sight of the Lord, that they don't argue about words, to no profit, to the subverting of those who hear.

chokri: Ukümünupü po no ve len po kütola nhe thizo yite, mhatho küve thiyi, sio no münga taho; kütho dzüo küza tü-ü no süzoyi.
english: Give diligence to present yourself approved by God, a workman who doesn't need to be ashamed, properly handling the Word of Truth.

chokri: Sio dzüchü dzürü müsakümo mütsüzoyi; kükrelamori süko poyo küzhoko kütho lümo mamatato küzüla.
english: But shun empty chatter, for they will proceed further in ungodliness,

chokri: Mu udzüko küthiküshü kümha müma tato; süko dolü Huminia mu Filetari sate.
english: and their word will consume like gangrene, of whom is Hymenaeus and Philetus;

chokri: Uni küthoo vajo yite sizing rhüla süküto sütsüvate, sino humi kümülü thorhü va to-üzü.
english: men who have erred concerning the truth, saying that the resurrection is already past, and overthrowing the faith of some.

chokri: Sizori Ukümünupü pü bo dü küsüo mütü bazo, mu süoyo Nepoo Pütho P zhüko sheba zo mu thüma kühopü ri Nepoo za sühyo küzhoko kütho kümoo thürü ta yite, si küzü mohor vüpüh bazo.
english: However God's firm foundation stands, having this seal, "The Lord knows those who are his," and, "Let every one who names the name of the Lord depart from unrighteousness."

chokri: Sio ce küve küzho lüzori mhabü püh Suna mu rükathi pü küthi lübi mori süh mu rünyo ri püh küthi bayo; sio hu thürho püto mu hu thürho pü yiho.
english: Now in a great house there are not only vessels of gold and of silver, but also of wood and of clay. Some are for honor, and some for dishonor.

chokri: Süla thüma kühopühri utho u mükhre kümüsa püh thürho pü kümoko thürüyi loo pü thipüh thürho küpü müsa küta Nepoo po süh mhathiyi küshü mhatho küve mütüko la küla kreküyi mhabü püh thiyi to.
english: If anyone therefore purges himself from these, he will be a vessel for honor, sanctified, and suitable for the master's use, prepared for every good work.

chokri: Tsüo nota khesa rüli münyüko thürayite süzin ulü müzi no u Nepoo za lü cho mülo küzüko züh kümatho. Kümülü, kükhrü u ulü kümünü, hiko sadzi thizo yite.
english: Flee from youthful lusts; but pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace with those who call on the Lord out of a pure heart.

chokri: Vee mhalü kümo mu mha kütso zü kümo kütso küzü dzüko rünyi mo zo yite; süko la mi po kümüli tayo kütsü nori sheba toho.
english: But refuse foolish and ignorant questionings, knowing that they generate strife.

chokri: Sio Nepoo yithomi küpali shü; si küzüo mori kühoph yolü ri uzho veyi moo shü. Mu ulü kükhrü sügü sühe mu mi mütha she moo shü.
english: The Lord's servant must not quarrel, but be gentle towards all, able to teach, patient,

chokri: Ukümünupü tho süko lü thi küdepüh kütho mhashe ceco süyito tho si küzü lüno pu lü münü no kütho ngo kümuko küjo popüh müka no müthayite.
english: in gentleness correcting those who oppose him: perhaps God may give them repentance leading to a full knowledge of the truth,

chokri: Süzi loo Satan sümhüdzü uko tüpüh pü müdo lü süyi ta zori uko pu ratho thüra payi tato.
english: and they may recover themselves out of the devil's snare, having been taken captive by him to his will.

chokri: Süzio tüsozho thülako lü kümüprü tü vo zoto küzü dzü süo sheyite.
english: But know this, that in the last days, grievous times will come.

chokri: Sücesü thüma utho uzhozhü küphu, sühce rüka kümüho, kümüha kümüko, mikütha, ukrü dzü zükümo, mi kreyo kümo, müsakümo.
english: For men will be lovers of self, lovers of money, boastful, arrogant, blasphemers, disobedient to parents, unthankful, unholy,

chokri: U lüshü lüzhe küdi, hüyi küho, Sali küthi, utho ukükhayi kümo, uzhoshü swüküzü, küvengo unükümo,
english: without natural affection, unforgiving, slanderers, without self-control, fierce, no lovers of good,

chokri: Kümüda, midzü rünyi yo kümo, kümüko küzü Ukümünupü kükhrü ceri utho unü unyü thinyü küzümi süto,
english: traitors, headstrong, conceited, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God;

chokri: Süko kütho külü müdeva siri pü kuku shemu tato.
english: holding a form of godliness, but having denied the power thereof. Turn away from these, also.

chokri: Siküzü miri thür tate, süko dolü humi gumülü mi cilü vo thüno udo küdiko shüyi tazü-e; thüno süko küshüthi küswü küba, uko münyü lu-o hio tho uko swü püh tate,
english: For of these are those who creep into houses, and take captive gullible women loaded down with sins, led away by various lusts,

chokri: Uko mi uko kümütha dzü she sheyo vee kütho mhashe ceco voyi chekümo krozo.
english: always learning, and never able to come to the knowledge of the truth.

chokri: Tsüo Jani mu Jambri uni thadzü Moses ngomu küta kümhai hiko ri küthoo ngomu yo; thüma süko uko xceco shüte, mu uko kümlü ceco ri kütho mote.
english: Even as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, so do these also oppose the truth; men corrupted in mind, reprobate concerning the faith.

chokri: Vee süko sa küzü prayiho; kükrelamori hini kümha süko künyo ri mi mütü po sheyi zoto küzüla,
english: But they will proceed no further. For their folly will be evident to all men, as theirs also came to be.

chokri: Siri noe I mi kümütha dzü, azho, amüdo, a kümülü, alü sügüsühe küzü, I mi kükhrü, I sügü pü tha küyi,
english: But you did follow my teaching, conduct, purpose, faith, patience, love, steadfastness,

chokri: Mipo a müthi müni küzü mu Antiok, Ikonia mu Lystra lü ayo phe küzüko kümha I kümüzhe küzüko sadzi thiyite, I kümüzhe küzü süko hüyite, mu süko mütüko lü Nepoo a küla yite.
english: persecutions, and sufferings: those things that happened to me at Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I endured those persecutions. Out of them all the Lord delivered me.

chokri: Süsü kümhai Khrista Jisu ceco kütho lüno hü kün khp mi u müthi müni züto.
english: Yes, and all who desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will suffer persecution.

chokri: Vee thüma kürüzhü mu mi swü she küzhomi miswü mu miri uswü sino shü mamatato.
english: But evil men and impostors will grow worse and worse, deceiving and being deceived.

chokri: Vee no popüh n müka küsüko mu shetü kütako thimu züzo bayite; kükrelamori no sopüh celü dzü sük sheyi süh, küzü sheba ta küzüla.
english: But you remain in the things which you have learned and have been assured of, knowing from whom you have learned them.

chokri: Sizomori non natsi lü kümüsa lüsiko she yite. Khrista Jisu celü küpa kümülüo la süko tho thüdo thasü n müka no npo küla küyi ngoyi küve thiyiyo.
english: From infancy, you have known the sacred writings which are able to make you wise for salvation through faith, which is in Christ Jesus.

chokri: Kütholüsi-e mütü Jihova celü haphra püh pa zo, mu süo kümütha la, mi tahi tarho kütola, mithi nve kütola mu mi küchü püh kütho ceco süyi kütola risa mu mi dzüve lazo,
english: Every writing inspired by God is profitable for teaching, for reproof, for correction, and for instruction which is in righteousness,

chokri: Sino kümünupü thüma po vet süyi no mhatho küve thiyi küshü thomi thiyiyo.
english: that the man of God may be complete, thoroughly equipped for every good work.

chokri: I-e Jihova mu kürhüko mu küsako kütso küto Khrista Jisu mhüjülü, mu Pü vo küto mu P küdethi küto ri n ce a dzü khasü züho.
english: I charge you therefore before God and the Lord Jesus Christ, who will judge the living and the dead at his appearing and his Kingdom:

chokri: Kütho dzüo po mi mütha ba zoyi, putütüce ri putütükümo ceri n tütso thi ba zoyi; sügüsühe mumi mütha mi küjo po mi müka ba zoyi,
english: preach the word; be urgent in season and out of season; reprove, rebuke, and exhort, with all patience and teaching.

chokri: Kükrelamori mi dopüh kümütha dzü u sühkürhü thizo küzü kori rüni muta küto tüpüh vo zoto küzüla, süce sümi unyi müso no kümütha dzü unü unyüko phu küngu phiyito.
english: For the time will come when they will not listen to the sound doctrine, but, having itching ears, will heap up for themselves teachers after their own lusts;

chokri: Sio unyi sü kürüpüh küthoo thüra sü küthokümo dzü ceco va tato.
english: and will turn away their ears from the truth, and turn aside to fables.

chokri: Vee noe mha kühopüh lü zori n mülü müce bazoyi, kümüzheyi, dzüyi küve popüh mi kümütha kam thi ba zoyi, no yitho thito-o kübao thi tsü zoyi.
english: But you be sober in all things, suffer hardship, do the work of an evangelist, and fulfill your ministry.

chokri: Sio a zari küngüsü to-ü bate, tsüo I tata küto türi tso bate.
english: For I am already being offered, and the time of my departure has come.

chokri: Kümürhayo küzhoko dolü küvethoo lü I mizüh kümürha vo tsova, I mi züta küra ka küzülü I ta votsoyite, I a kümülü süh zoba tsoyite.
english: I have fought the good fight. I have finished the course. I have kept the faith.

chokri: Thayowi lü mhatho ba küyi püo khapüh a cü püh müzüte, Nepoo dzütho tü no mi kütso kütoo Pü tho tüsozho küzho nha vo küto u nüyo küzho khüko ri cü phrüto.
english: From now on, there is stored up for me the crown of righteousness, which the Lord, the righteous judge, will give to me on that day; and not to me only, but also to all those who have loved his appearing.

chokri: No müzhe ace votato-o kezü lü n he thi bazote.
english: Be diligent to come to me soon,

chokri: Dema cejü hio lü zhüko vakhrü küzüla a khava no Thessolonia lü vote, Kresken Galatia lü mu Titus ri Damatia lüvo te. Luke lübi azü küba zote.
english: for Demas left me, having loved this present world, and went to Thessalonica; Crescens to Galatia, and Titus to Dalmatia.

chokri: No Mark rizü voyite; choyi küthi ceco I pula kümüve ngoyi zoto küzüla.
english: Only Luke is with me. Take Mark, and bring him with you, for he is useful to me for ministering.

chokri: Tsüo I Tukika kütsüpü Ephesus lü süve.
english: But I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.

chokri: No vo küto ce I thadzü akhü pü Troa lü Karpo belü sü küvao mu lüsidako bahuzori lüsi chüko müku no pü vote.
english: Bring the cloak that I left at Troas with Carpus when you come, and the books, especially the parchments.

chokri: Müsü rükriyo küzhoo Alekander a küdo swüü Nepo tho pu yi cüla süto.
english: Alexander, the coppersmith, did much evil to me. The Lord will repay him according to his works,

chokri: Nori pü yolü n ceriyite; kükrelamori pü adoko ngomu phi kütala.
english: of whom you also must beware; for he greatly opposed our words.

chokri: I a tho a rüle po kürao va mipüh ri ayo püh kütsüo mori a khava no tatsote. Nepoo po uko yolü süola mhapühri thihi.
english: At my first defense, no one came to help me, but all left me. May it not be held against them.

chokri: Vee sücesü Nepoo a tsüce ba athi muku süzo. Süosü kükrelamori apo Pü dzüo po tsüsü küto mu Judakümoko mütü pori süo sheyi küto lazo. Sino Pü losha ta lüri a süh külayi.
english: But the Lord stood by me, and strengthened me, that through me the message might be fully proclaimed, and that all the Gentiles might hear; and I was delivered out of the mouth of the lion.

chokri: Nepoo Pütho mha küshü kühopü lüri a külayi zoto. Sino a külazüh vo tüo küde lü süyi zoto. Pü po küchothe zapozale küthi-o thiyite. Amen.
english: And the Lord will deliver me from every evil work, and will preserve me for his heavenly Kingdom; to whom be the glory forever and ever. Amen.

chokri: Puskila mu Akila uni mu Onesifera celümi ri külusüte.
english: Greet Prisca and Aquila, and the house of Onesiphorus.

chokri: Evasta-e Kornif lü bate; vee Trofima-e mhathi kütala apo pü khapüh Mileto lü süve.
english: Erastus remained at Corinth, but I left Trophimus at Miletus sick.

chokri: No tüsüh mhüdzü ace vo küto ri bazote. Eobolori Poden mu Lino anu Klaudia mu u züko mütüko risa külusüho.
english: Be diligent to come before winter. Eubulus salutes you, as do Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers.

chokri: Nepoo pono n ropü zühba küyio thiyite. Ngokümüzheo porti n züh ba küyio thiyite.
english: The Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Grace be with you. Amen.

chokri: Paul Jihova choyi kethio, mu Jisu Khrista yitholü apostel mipü, Jihova kemelü la kedakeyio, kethoo seyi ketabi kemesazholü hü keta mipü.
english: Paul, a servant of God, and an apostle of Jesus Christ, according to the faith of God's chosen ones, and the knowledge of the truth which is according to godliness,
