chokri: Vele neko ta Sion cejütuyo vorite mu Jihova kehü rüna nadelü tülü keba Jerusalem lü, mu sülü Tüyochoyimiko phiphayikeho ba.
english: But you have come to Mount Zion, and to the city of the living God, the heavenly Jerusalem, and to innumerable hosts of angels,

chokri: Methikehuo mu nurako kehuce Tülü thopü meta, Jihova thüma metüko sheco kethio, mu kemeziko rüpü mhathi meve tsü kesüko.
english: to the general assembly and assembly of the firstborn who are enrolled in heaven, to God the Judge of all, to the spirits of just men made perfect,

chokri: Mu Jisu metsulü thade jükho kesao thi kesüo, mu püza kegü kesüo, Abel ceri mha veku ti pokesüo.
english: to Jesus, the mediator of a new covenant, and to the blood of sprinkling that speaks better than that of Abel.

chokri: Neko püfü pokesüko melavahite, kekrelamori mhace cejülü pokesü jüko zori therayi mota lize uko mhace tülü pokesü süko melava tisa dithedü uko therayi hoku tato.
english: See that you don't refuse him who speaks. For if they didn't escape when they refused him who warned on the Earth, how much more will we not escape who turn away from him who warns from heaven,

chokri: Pü füphra cejü metü kenasüte, vele Pü füphra kesüjü poti, “Sütüce I cejü lebi kena sü mo tato vele Tü sheri sa kena sütato.”
english: whose voice shook the earth, then, but now he has promised, saying, "Yet once more I will shake not only the earth, but also the heavens."

chokri: Jühio posakesü, zasi thaka kesü kena kesü mhako thikeyi zhü süko khavato, mu rena kemoko khapü metato.
english: This phrase, "Yet once more," signifies the removing of those things that are shaken, as of things that have been made, that those things which are not shaken may remain.

chokri: Sübi kede revü renayi kehozhü uko ngoyite, süla uko ngokemezhe khipüh bayi khe, sülü uko Jihova poyi keshü thi Pü rho Pü reshüsa mu kempe thitokhe.
english: Therefore, receiving a Kingdom that can't be shaken, let us have grace, through which we serve God acceptably, with reverence and awe,

chokri: Kekrelamori uko Jihova meketo püzotila.
english: for our God is a consuming fire.

chokri: Sazüjüra kekhrü po bazote.
english: Let brotherly love continue.

chokri: Reso sekemo thüma kemeso rekramota hite, sizi kesülü humi lüba kemolü tüyo choyimi sheri mesoyiyo.
english: Don't forget to show hospitality to strangers, for in doing so, some have entertained angels without knowing it.

chokri: Keropü ropü ketako (thejümi) rekrasüte, uko züde neko sheri pha mu ropü ketabi süte, kemetsulü kemezhe ketako zü nekori kemezhe süte neko sheri tepho pü lü bazoti la.
english: Remember those who are in bonds, as bound with them; and those who are ill-treated, since you are also in the body.

chokri: Kesükeritisü metü la therho püzo, thezi merho kemo, vele thethenu kemeho mu kekhrükezü ketako Jihova mejo motaho.
english: Let marriage be held in honor among all, and let the bed be undefiled: but God will judge the sexually immoral and adulterers.

chokri: Neko mhakepo keti kolü kemeho kemenyü sahi zote, mu ne kedipü ba sheri süko khi ne thevü thita te, kekrelamori püpo kesü, “I neko khavaho mori rekramo taho,” sizi sü.
english: Be free from the love of money, content with such things as you have, for he has said, "I will in no way leave you, neither will I in any way forsake you."

chokri: Süla uthepu shude poyive, “Niepoo sü a kekhrühio zo, mu thüma dipü thipü ayo süto sheri I mpe mo.”
english: So that with good courage we say, "The Lord is my helper. I will not fear. What can man do to me?"

chokri: Neko pi kekha yotiko rekra sala süte, Jihova jü khi nekoce po kesü miko; uko kepo zho dipü bi vorito sheri uko kemelü sameji yite.
english: Remember your leaders, men who spoke to you the word of God, and considering the results of their conduct, imitate their faith.

chokri: Jisu Khrista, ndo sheri, tha sheri mu kechothe kemhazo.
english: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever.

chokri: Thezho ketekhri mu kekrekre tipo uhüpü tata hite, süo sü kekrelamori kekhrü ungokeyi khipü uthi kethepu ketü süyo; ketikekra lümo, süopo umeni dapü tari meveyi yomo tila.
english: Don't be carried away by various and strange teachings, for it is good that the heart be established by grace, not by food, through which those who were so occupied were not benefited.

chokri: U kereshüba püba, miz yo yitho thi kesü thethilü mha keti mezi püri di.
english: We have an altar from which those who serve the holy tabernacle have no right to eat.

chokri: Kekrelamori khonu süko thi upho yo thüza thevo kerekrüo kephoma la kereshü salaco chozulü khipü methü süyo.
english: For the bodies of those animals, whose blood is brought into the holy place by the high priest as an offering for sin, are burned outside of the camp.

chokri: Sübi Jisu sheri pütho püza khapü kharü sa chozu laco kemezhesü.
english: Therefore Jesus also, that he might sanctify the people through his own blood, suffered outside of the gate.

chokri: Uko süla chozu laco ta puce vokhe, thothü thethi sa kharü salaco, püzhoshu kesüko khipü yide.
english: Let us therefore go forth to him outside of the camp, bearing his reproach.

chokri: Ekrelamori hice uko nadelü tasü keto bamo, vele hisa vori ketopü phuzü.
english: For we don't have here an enduring city, but we seek that which is to come.

chokri: Jisu Püyo rütho thechu thisü pü Jihova tsü sü khe, umülü se kethezü kha püza chu süto khe.
english: Through him, then, let us offer up a sacrifice of praise to God continually, that is, the fruit of lips which make confession to his name.

chokri: Vele mhakeve kethi mu mhapü mizü keza tiko rekramo ta hite, kekrelamori rütho süko Jihova pü nüzo tila.
english: But don't forget to be doing good and sharing, for with such sacrifices God is well pleased.

chokri: N pi kekha timiko jüzü thite, mu süko khrikhro tate, süko n kerhüro pe (meza) tayo tila, uko mhatho hisa posü to, ukopo ulüsu mode thite, unüde thisüte; kekrelamori ulüsude thito lize nekola kemeve di tato.
english: Obey your leaders and submit to them, for they watch on behalf of your souls, as those who will give account, that they may do this with joy, and not with groaning, for that would be unprofitable for you.

chokri: Hako lari kechothi süte, ha kelüce halü mezi tazo, mhametülü jütho keta ha medozo.
english: Pray for us, for we are persuaded that we have a good conscience, desiring to live honorably in all things.

chokri: Vele I nekopo thikenyü apo meze la nekoce vori keto thisü te.
english: I strongly urge you to do this, that I may be restored to you sooner.

chokri: Tsühi Jihova ngokemezhe Niepo Jisu sülü khakesü teko kefü kezhoo, jükho thi kesü zalü kecho thela.
english: Now may the God of peace, who brought again from the dead the great shepherd of the sheep with the blood of an eternal covenant, our Lord Jesus,

chokri: Mhatho kehopü lü sheri nethi meve tsütso kesü, pümhüjülü pünü keti nezü mhatho thi tate, Jisu Khrista yolü zapozale kechothe ta keyi thite, Amen.
english: make you complete in every good work to do his will, working in you that which is well pleasing in his sight, through Jesus Christ, to whom be the glory forever and ever. Amen.

chokri: Azüneko I nekoce po kenyü kemezhe zori hunehu tahitarho zote, kekrelamori I lesitho nekoce kesü kedopü lebizo;
english: But I exhort you, brothers, endure the word of exhortation, for I have written to you in few words.

chokri: Usazüo Timothy hesü keva neko se batetho mhace I ta nekoce vori lize püzü vorito mezelü neko zü kesü tato.
english: Know that our brother Timothy has been freed, with whom, if he comes shortly, I will see you.

chokri: Neko pi kekha kebako salam khatsüsü züho, mu kemesamiko metü tsü sasü ho. Italy lü kebako neko kelu süzüho.
english: Greet all of your leaders and all the saints. The Italians greet you.

chokri: Ngokemezhe kekhrüpo neko metü yo bayite. Amen.
english: Grace be with you all. Amen.

chokri: Jihova mu Nepo Jisu Khrista cetao James-e kütsapu ta küta yebo kürikünako ce küsü.
english: James, a servant of God and of the Lord Jesus Christ, to the twelve tribes which are in the Dispersion: Greetings.

chokri: A züneko, medoküphi lüni süh küyice, ne la küve zo kütsü lüyite.
english: Count it all joy, my brothers, when you fall into various temptations,

chokri: Ne kümülü küveküshü medephi küsüyolü sügüsühe kütsü payo kütsü sheyite.
english: knowing that the testing of your faith produces endurance.

chokri: Sügüsühe kütsüo po pü mhatho thi zhochü süte, sileo ne mhapühlüri tsomo tamo de vezhochü mu tsühlitsotato.
english: Let endurance have its perfect work, that you may be perfect and complete, lacking in nothing.

chokri: Neko hümi mhashe dileo, pü po Jihova ce choyite, Pü u müdave mu panyo mo de kha kühopühri tsüyo, mu sü o püh pü tsüh zoto.
english: But if any of you lacks wisdom, let him ask of God, who gives to all liberally and without reproach; and it will be given to him.

chokri: Vele pü po mülükhro mu külüdosa mo de choyite, kükrelamole külüdokütsümi tükhra po hüpüh rükhürüji küzü dzüküzho rüchü bizo kütsü la.
english: But let him ask in faith, without any doubting, for he who doubts is like a wave of the sea, driven by the wind and tossed.

chokri: Thüma sikütsümi po Nepoo celü mhakühopühri ngoyi küto lü hite.
english: For let that man not think that he will receive anything from the Lord.

chokri: Külüdo kütsümi pü chokolü bagüyi yomo.
english: He is a double-minded man, unstable in all his ways.

chokri: Kürünu lalü kütami po pü thi müzhoküsü lü u nüyite.
english: But let the brother in humble circumstances glory in his high position;

chokri: Vele künemi po ri pü thi kürünu küsüce unüyite, kükrelamole pü ri nhabi de ratazoto kütsü la.
english: and the rich, in that he is made humble, because like the flower in the grass, he will pass away.

chokri: Nace thosü pü tüna thi küsüyolü nha chü rüwi vayo; pü püko rüra tayo, mu pü züve shütayo. Süsü bi künemi mhaphumhayi zü ri dita zoto.
english: For the sun arises with the scorching wind, and withers the grass, and the flower in it falls, and the beauty of its appearance perishes. So also will the rich man fade away in his pursuits.

chokri: Dophilü sügüsühe küyimi thüjo küpümi zo, kükrelamole pü medophi küsüyolü thaküyi la Nepoo püh pükhrüyo kütsümi tsütole po phra kümüzü kürhü küde pirüh ngoyi zoto.
english: Blessed is the man who endures temptation, for when he has been approved, he will receive the crown of life, which the Lord promised to those who love him.

chokri: Thüma kühopühri müdoküphi pü ce küvoce, “Jihova a müdophi bate,” si kütsü po hite, mhaküshü püh Jihova küdoyi limo mu pü mipühri müdophiyo mo kütsü la.
english: Let no man say when he is tempted, "I am tempted by God," for God can't be tempted by evil, and he himself tempts no one.

chokri: Vele mi püh püh hi medeküphi pü ce küvoce pü tho pü münyü po pü müsüyi mu pü swükütsiyi küzhozo.
english: But each one is tempted, when he is drawn away by his own lust, and enticed.

chokri: Süsa, pü münyüko nünepüyi, de küphoma münu süyo, mu küphoma pethiküyi zü küsa münusüyo.
english: Then the lust, when it has conceived, bears sin; and the sin, when it is full grown, brings forth death.

chokri: Kükhrü a züneko, mipo u swüvahite.
english: Don't be deceived, my beloved brothers.

chokri: Yophrü küve khümü mhaphrü veyo thi kütsü khü müsoyolü kizo, mu tüyolü küve Poo celü vozo mu pümhakhri kümha rüderüleyo mo.
english: Every good gift and every perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of lights, with whom can be no variation, nor turning shadow.

chokri: Pü tho Pü müdülüno kütho dzülü u mühüsü, side u po pü mhatho she kürao thiyite.
english: Of his own will he brought us forth by the word of truth, that we should be a kind of first fruits of his creatures.

chokri: Kükhrü a züneko, hio sheyite, kühopühri rüni mütsosai, münü dzüpoyi, u lü rüda mhatahi.
english: So, then, my beloved brothers, let every man be swift to hear, slow to speak, and slow to anger;

chokri: Thüma lüdayolü Jihova matho paiyo kümo la.
english: for the anger of man doesn't produce the righteousness of God.

chokri: Süla neko müsa kümo mu rügürüzhü yerizüri kütako khavate, mu ne lü münü de ne ropü külayi ve küto dzülüpüh kümüzüo yiyite.
english: Therefore, putting away all filthiness and overflowing of wickedness, receive with humility the implanted word, which is able to save your souls.

chokri: Vele kürüni lübi de u tho u swüva mole dzüo küthimi thiyite.
english: But be doers of the word, and not only hearers, deluding your own selves.

chokri: Thüma kühopühri dzü rüniyo ri dzü süo thi mu züyo kümomi khriphilü u zü peküsü bizo.
english: For if anyone is a hearer of the word and not a doer, he is like a man beholding his natural face in a mirror;

chokri: Pü tho pü pesü de ta rüde kütasa pü hü dipüh bisi lümo mhatayo kütsü la
english: for he sees himself, and goes away, and immediately forgets what kind of man he was.

chokri: Vele hepha küva vezhochü kütsü zhoo mühosü de mhüdemo baküyimi, rünisü mu lümota mo de thi muzüküyimi, pü mhatholü thüjopü zoto.
english: But he who looks into the perfect law, the law of freedom, and continues, not being a hearer who forgets but a doer of the work, this man will be blessed in what he does.

chokri: Nedolü hümi nani küvemi litsü lüyo ri, u ta kükhayi moleo pütho pü swü bate mu pü nani ri kümüchü zo.
english: If anyone among you thinks himself to be religious while he doesn't bridle his tongue, but deceives his heart, this man's religion is worthless.

chokri: Jihova mu u Poo mhüjü ce kümüsa mu rhokümo nani sü hihi, mürinumi mu samepüko müzhe küvaphi mu cejülü mhaküshü po u va mürho va kümomi zo.
english: Pure religion and undefiled before our God and Father is this: to visit the fatherless and widows in their affliction, and to keep oneself unstained by the world.

chokri: A züneko, zale küthi Nepo Jisu mülüyi küta bi humiyo unü shekreta hite
english: My brothers, don't hold the faith of our Lord Jesus Christ of glory with partiality.

chokri: Mipühne süna bekha ni mu khümüne küve süh de ne kühulü vo mu küdimi püh khümüne küshü süh no vo.
english: For if a man with a gold ring, in fine clothing, comes into your assembly, and a poor man in filthy clothing also comes in;

chokri: Mu süce ne khümüne küve küsüh-o she mükre de puce, no hice thüba küvelü bayite, isi, vele küdio ce, “tsüce thayi mori ki a phekhrolü bayi” sileo.
english: and you pay special attention to him who wears the fine clothing, and say, "Sit here in a good place;" and you tell the poor man, "Stand there," or "Sit by my footstool;"

chokri: Netho ne dolü khokükre mu ne lüdo küshülü mi lü kükreta mome?
english: haven't you shown partiality among yourselves, and become judges with evil thoughts?

chokri: Kükhrü a züneko, rünisüte, Jihova cejü hilü küdimiko küdapüh kümülü ceco mhakünemi mu pü khrüyo kütsümi la dzüphra thisü küva küde rüve kasükalü thita
english: Listen, my beloved brothers. Didn't God choose those who are poor in this world to be rich in faith, and heirs of the Kingdom which he promised to those who love him?

chokri: Vele neko küdimi rhomote. Ne müswü kütsüko mu ne süsazü shetiba lü voyo kütsüko mhaküneko mome?
english: But you have dishonored the poor man. Don't the rich oppress you, and personally drag you before the courts?

chokri: Thüza küve tho püh ne tsü küva süo thayo kütsü süko thozo mome?
english: Don't they blaspheme the honorable name by which you are called?

chokri: Kütholüsi lü küdezhoo ngoküyi “No n sühzanümi khrüpüh n tho n kükhrü biyite” si kütsüo müji tsoyileo, no vezove.
english: However, if you fulfill the royal law, according to the Scripture, "You shall love your neighbor as yourself," you do well.

chokri: Siri ne humiyo ne nü she mükre tale-o ne küjo thita zo, mu sino thüzho po ne müjo püh thezho küvarhümi thi bate.
english: But if you show partiality, you commit sin, being convicted by the law as transgressors.

chokri: Sileo kühopühri thüzho mütü züyo zori, mhaco püh lü vace taleo, mütülü jotazo.
english: For whoever shall keep the whole law, and yet stumble in one point, he has become guilty of all.

chokri: Sileo “kükhrüküzü hi” sizü poküsü “Mi dokhri hi” si kütsü ri pobazo. Süla no mi khrülizü mo zori mi dokhri leo no thüzho küvarhümi thitazo
english: For he who said, "Do not commit adultery," said also, "Do not commit murder." Now if you do not commit adultery, but murder, you have become a transgressor of the law.

chokri: Süla hephahephü zhoo lü ne müzi cope thiküto lü de dzüpo mu thizoyite,
english: So speak, and so do, as men who are to be judged by a law of freedom.

chokri: Vele mi ngomüzhe kümomi ngomüzhe mozo de pü she kütito, siri ngokümüzhee dzünyolü kuyi zoto.
english: For judgment is without mercy to him who has shown no mercy. Mercy triumphs over judgment.

chokri: A züneko, mi pühne pü kümülü baleno pozo ri pü mhatho dileo küdipüh kümve bayo? Pü kümülü sü pü külayi ve me?
english: What good is it, my brothers, if a man says he has faith, but has no works? Can faith save him?

chokri: Mhace ne sazüdzüra mori ne lipüne püh müchü mu thatha va di ta kütsüce.
english: And if a brother or sister is naked and in lack of daily food,

chokri: Neko mipüh sümi ce nelü rüyi tate mu me müguyi mu mhati müguyite, süri umo la sühmoküshü mhapührei khasü moleo küdipüh kümve bayo?
english: and one of you tells them, "Go in peace, be warmed and filled;" and yet you didn't give them the things the body needs, what good is it?

chokri: Süsü bi kümülü ri pü mhatho dileo küsazo.
english: Even so faith, if it has no works, is dead in itself.

chokri: Vele humi sü, noe kümülü ba, I a mhatho ba, süzi poto. N mhatho sa mono n kümülü tha a kasüte, mu I a mhathoyolü a kümülü thasü n kato.
english: Yes, a man will say, "You have faith, and I have works." Show me your faith from your works, and I by my works will show you my faith.

chokri: Jihova püh bazo kütsü no mülüyo, Süsü vezo, thürüküshü zori süsü mülü mu mprü de rüshürüsabayo.
english: You believe that God is one. You do well. The demons also believe, and shudder.

chokri: No mhalükümo-o, kümülü mhatho sa kümosa kümüchüzo kütsü no sheyi to me ma?
english: But do you want to know, vain man, that faith apart from works is dead?

chokri: Ukrü unyü Abraham pü nu Isaac püh rüshübayo khaküsü la pü mhathoyolü pü püh müzi leta mo me?
english: Wasn't Abraham our father justified by works, in that he offered up Isaac his son on the altar?

chokri: No shebato, kümülü pü mhatho zü kübesüh de mhathi, mu mhatho yolü kümülü ve zhochüküyi zo
english: You see that faith worked with his works, and by works faith was perfected;

chokri: Kütholüsi mütsüküva po küsü, Abraham Jihova mülü, sülapü püh matho isite, mu pü cü püh Jihova züo site.
english: and the Scripture was fulfilled which says, "Abraham believed God, and it was accounted to him as righteousness;" and he was called the friend of God.

chokri: No shebato, mipüh-e pü kümülü lübi mole pü mhatho ri sa kütsü la müziyiyo.
english: You see then that by works, a man is justified, and not only by faith.

chokri: Süsü bi, Rahab küthapü ri choyimi müsoyi de sümi kütsü püh cho kükreco sü küva la pü müziyi ta mo me?
english: In like manner wasn't Rahab the prostitute also justified by works, in that she received the messengers, and sent them out another way?

chokri: Süsü la u mo ri u ropü sa moleo küsazo, sübi kümülü ri mhatho sa moleo küsazo.
english: For as the body apart from the spirit is dead, even so faith apart from works is dead.

chokri: Mhaküneko, tsüh rünisüte, thüjüküzü ne ce voküzü la, kra müra süte.
english: Come now, you rich, weep and howl for your miseries that are coming on you.

chokri: Ne ceneko celire züte, mu labühkho khümüneko tizüte,
english: Your riches are corrupted and your garments are moth-eaten.

chokri: Ne suna mu rükathiko mhotshü züte. Mhotshü küzü süo ne mütsü küzü zhopo zo mu me kümha ne thi tiyi tato. Ne thülaco la cene künguyite.
english: Your gold and your silver are corroded, and their corrosion will be for a testimony against you, and will eat your flesh like fire. You have laid up your treasure in the last days.

chokri: Hihe, no küthüdo de n yicümi zho tsümo küta uko zhoo tho shezüte mu yikürühmi she küsükhü shekho Krodeko Nepoo nyi tso bate.
english: Behold, the wages of the laborers who mowed your fields, which you have kept back by fraud, cry out, and the cries of those who reaped have entered into the ears of the Lord of Hosts.

chokri: Ne cejü hilü hü küthügu mu unüunyü thi vate, ne netho ne thi mülüpüh ne zheva küto tüsozhoo khü bate.
english: You have lived delicately on the earth, and taken your pleasure. You have nourished your hearts as in a day of slaughter.

chokri: Ne kümathomi müjo de dokhrivate, sükoe ne müsüh thiyo mo.
english: You have condemned, you have murdered the righteous one. He doesn't resist you.

chokri: A züneko, Nepoo vo kümothe sügüsühe bazote, hihe, yitemi cejülü bete po veyi küto latürü kürao mu künuo khübayo.
english: Be patient therefore, brothers, until the coming of the Lord. Behold, the farmer waits for the precious fruit of the earth, being patient over it, until it receives the early and late rain.

chokri: Ne ri sügüsüheyite, nelü krokrü bate, kükrelamole Nepoo küvo tüte.
english: You also be patient. Establish your hearts, for the coming of the Lord is at hand.

chokri: A züneko, huhu yo panyoparo hite, moleo ne müjotato. Hihe, copeo cekha ce thazo.
english: Don't grumble, brothers, against one another, so that you won't be judged. Behold, the judge stands at the door.

chokri: A züneko, Nepoo za süh sadzüh dzü po küvoko kümüzhe küyilü ri sügüsühe küyi püh thaka thiyite.
english: Take, brothers, for an example of suffering and of patience, the prophets who spoke in the name of the Lord.

chokri: Küthozo, sügüsühe küyimi thüjo küpümi zo kütsü uko lüyo. Ne ri Job sügüsühe küyi dzü she mu thülalü Nepoo mharhü ri ngovate. Nepoo mi phi udzürüzo mu mi ngomüzhe phiyo
english: Behold, we call them blessed who endured. You have heard of the patience of Job, and have seen the Lord in the outcome, and how the Lord is full of compassion and mercy.

chokri: A züneko bahori ne tü ri mori cejü ri po rüswü hite, mori mhakükre ri po rüswü hite, Si kütsüh-o mole neko dzüthozo de ‘I’ leo ‘I’ mu ‘mo’ leo ‘mo’ site, moleo ne müjo tato.
english: But above all things, my brothers, don't swear, neither by heaven, nor by the earth, nor by any other oath; but let your "yes" be "yes," and your "no," "no;" so that you don't fall into hypocrisy.

chokri: Ne dolü mipüh ne kümüzhe ba me? Sümi po kücho thiyite. Mipühne udzüvekrü ba me? Pü po kütshü tsale thiyite.
english: Is any among you suffering? Let him pray. Is any cheerful? Let him sing praises.

chokri: Mipühne mhathi ba me? Pü po kühulü pethimi cüyi de uko po pü la chosüte mu Nepoo zalü tsühdzü püh künhüsüyi,
english: Is any among you sick? Let him call for the elders of the assembly, and let them pray over him, anointing him with oil in the name of the Lord,

chokri: Sileo mülü de choküsü la mhathi küzüo velayito mu Nepoo pü phü müsü süto, mu phoma vari küjo vatsü süto.
english: and the prayer of faith will heal him who is sick, and the Lord will raise him up. If he has committed sins, he will be forgiven.

chokri: Ne sührhoyi küto la ne küjokümoko hunehu ce phravavate, mu huhu la choyiyite, kümathomi kücho kuphi mu u kücho ngoyiyo.
english: Confess your offenses to one another, and pray one for another, that you may be healed. The effective, earnest prayer of a righteous man is powerfully effective.

chokri: Elijah ri uko bi thümanumi zo ru, tüpo rühi tano pü nüthathi choküsü ce, cesüh mu tükhri swürüh cejülü türü sü mota.
english: Elijah was a man with a nature like ours, and he prayed earnestly that it might not rain, and it didn't rain on the earth for three years and six months.

chokri: Süsa pü cho lasü mu tüyo türü khasü, side cejülü mhapo hüla paküyi zo.
english: He prayed again, and the sky gave rain, and the earth brought forth its fruit.

chokri: A züneko, neko dolü humi küthoo mürhü tata de humi pü züh lavo leo.
english: Brothers, if any among you wanders from the truth, and someone turns him back,

chokri: Sümi po sheyite, küjoküthio kükrikütsü cholü ta de pü zü lavo küyiyolü küsalü küphomao ropü külayito muküjokümo kükro whuyi tato.
english: let him know that he who turns a sinner from the error of his way will save a soul from death, and will cover a multitude of sins.

chokri: Peter Jisu Khrista apostle mipü, thüma ta kezakeze pü Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, Bithynia kolü vo ketako ce lesi tho kesü.
english: Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ, to the chosen ones who are living as strangers in the Dispersion in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia,

chokri: Jihova u Po mejümera seketalü kedakeyiko, kemesa Rüpülü thi kemesa keyi, jüzülü mu Jisu Khrista pü kenhü keyi (kegü vakesü) ngokemezhe mu kezü keve po krokeyi thi neko zü bate.
english: according to the foreknowledge of God the Father, in sanctification of the Spirit, that you may obey Jesus Christ and be sprinkled in his blood: Grace to you and peace be multiplied.

chokri: Jihova u Po, uko Niepo Jisu Khrista, pü phikemezhe kekro keba uko mehü kesa sala kesü ukemelü rhürha prari keta Jisu Khrista sa kevasa rhü sala keyi lü.
english: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who according to his great mercy became our father again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,

chokri: Kamu dita keho kalü, merhokemo, rata kemoneko la tülü kesü kerede pü metate.
english: to an incorruptible and undefiled inheritance that doesn't fade away, reserved in heaven for you,

chokri: Jihova kekulü kelayi keta kemelü pütü thelanha hala sü keto la khapü kemeta.
english: who by the power of God are guarded through faith for a salvation ready to be revealed in the last time.

chokri: Neko süla rechü shuba zote, tsühi pütü dopüla mhace mozekesula neko medo kephi kekrolü meshi tari semo.
english: Wherein you greatly rejoice, though now for a little while, if need be, you have been put to grief in various trials,

chokri: Neko kemelü dojü pe keti suna vemo ta keto ceri püma rüku süo melü thü pesü, thechu therho zapozale kethi Jisu Khrista ngovori keto kethilü chusü ketola.
english: that the proof of your faith, which is more precious than gold that perishes even though it is tested by fire, may be found to result in praise, glory, and honor at the revelation of Jesus Christ--

chokri: Neko pükhrü kebao ngomo zori, tsühi neko püngomo sheri, neko pumelü bazo, nerethu mu pophayi keho kenü zapozale chupü keba.
english: whom not having known you love; in whom, though now you don't see him, yet believing, you rejoice greatly with joy unspeakable and full of glory--

chokri: Neko kemelü pü thelalü kenü ngoyi bate, neko kerhüro kelayi ketala.
english: receiving the result of your faith, the salvation of your souls.

chokri: Kelakeyi süo saju kepoko ketso mu phu menu shu, uko pepü kemeta ngokemezhe kekhrü süo ta neko ce vori tale no.
english: Concerning this salvation, the prophets sought and searched diligently, who prophesied of the grace that would come to you,

chokri: Phu keta süo dipü sheri, Khrista Rüpü pü zho pürele dipü bi sheri, uko ce mese kesüko, pühü süo zhopo Khrista kemezhe kesü mhüjü zhopo se tate, mu pü zapozale thiketo süo meji vo ketoko.
english: searching for who or what kind of time the Spirit of Christ, which was in them, pointed to, when he predicted the sufferings of Christ, and the glories that would follow them.

chokri: Hala mese mengo kesü süo süko ce mori, vele ukoce mhasüko yitho kethiko, tsüdo kepoketa jüyikeve zhopo Kemesa Rüpülü nekoce po kesü zo, tüyolü ta kevori; süo tüyo choyiko penyüsa menyü keta.
english: To them it was revealed, that not to themselves, but to you, did they minister these things, which now have been announced to you through those who preached the Gospel to you by the Holy Spirit sent out from heaven; which things angels desire to look into.

chokri: Süla ne melü chepha khipü nechepha yite, rhorhü pü, püthelalü nengokemezhe meri keta Jisu Khrista khi kehala netsü sü keto khivori to.
english: Therefore, prepare your minds for action, be sober and set your hope fully on the grace that will be brought to you at the revelation of Jesus Christ--

chokri: Jüzü nuneko ne mo ketace mehomenyü ketako khi nezho rele thita hite.
english: as children of obedience, not conforming yourselves according to your former lusts as in your ignorance,

chokri: Vele neko cü keyio mesa tibi, sübi ne jüpo jüli lü sheri kemesa zho khi yite.
english: but just as he who called you is holy, you yourselves also be holy in all of your behavior;

chokri: Kekrelamori thopü kemeta, mesa yite, kekrelamori I mesa tila,
english: because it is written, "You shall be holy; for I am holy."

chokri: Mu mhace neko Po kesüce, pü mipü sheri rho mekre yomo, utho u mhatho cebi sübi sheco thi zoto, ne revü tülü nezho mezi tavo tate.
english: If you call on him as Father, who without respect of persons judges according to each man's work, pass the time of your living as strangers here in reverent fear:

chokri: Neko seba ketabi, cemu retati zhüpü nekopho rha sümo, suna mu raka thibi ti, nekopo neko thajü uko zholü mhakepoketi ketako kemethu kemerü thi tayo.
english: knowing that you were redeemed, not with corruptible things, with silver or gold, from the useless way of life handed down from your fathers,

chokri: Vele Jisu Khrista za, püma kerü mu thece kedi.
english: but with precious blood, as of a lamb without spot, the blood of Christ;

chokri: Pü ce ü meju mhüjü pü kedapü metate, vele pü pü pütü thelalü neko mese mengo süte.
english: who was foreknown indeed before the foundation of the world, but was revealed at the end of times for your sake,

chokri: Püyono Jihova melüyi ketola, pü phu merhü sü kesalü, mu zapozale pü putsü, side nekopo nekemelü mu nekemeri khipü Jihova yo sü ketola.
english: who through him are believers in God, who raised him from the dead, and gave him glory; so that your faith and hope might be in God.

chokri: Neko ngokeba nekerhüro thi Kemesa Rüpü jüzü kethilü kethera mozode ne sazüjürako kekhrü, nelü kethothi thelü kemesalü hunehu khrü keba.
english: Seeing you have purified your souls in your obedience to the truth through the Spirit in sincere brotherly affection, love one another from the heart fervently:

chokri: Menu kesalayi keta, kecekere si mori cemu reta keho se, Jihova jülü, kechothe rhü bayo.
english: having been born again, not of corruptible seed, but of incorruptible, through the word of God, which lives and remains forever.

chokri: Kekrelamori uthi upho kene metü ga (nha) bizo mu thüma zapozale metü sheri nyepü bizo; nha revi tayo, mu nyepü sheri nra tayo.
english: For, "All flesh is like grass, And all of man's glory like the flower in the grass. The grass withers, and its flower falls;

chokri: Vele Niepoo jü kechothe tasü zoto, kechothe; mu jü hiohi khi neko ce zhopo thisüyo.
english: But the Lord's word endures forever." This is the word of good news which was preached to you.

chokri: Süla kedoda, kecürü kesu, mharhü lüniko, kethokemo zhopo, mu mhakemeho, mu kesu kepo lüniko khavate.
english: Putting away therefore all wickedness, all deceit, hypocrisies, envies, and all evil speaking,

chokri: Natsimi nuranu bi jü kethoko menyü uzune nojü kemenyü thite, side neko ma meveyi te.
english: as newborn babes, long for the pure milk of the Word, that you may grow thereby,

chokri: Mhace neko Niepoo ngo kemezhe kekhrü ne phizo ziti metha va lize.
english: if indeed you have tasted that the Lord is gracious:

chokri: Rhüketa ketsü pü kevori thümako püyimu de pü mela kevao, vele Jihova pü kedayi ta, side püpo ketsü püma kerüo thito.
english: coming to him, a living stone, rejected indeed by men, but chosen by God, precious.

chokri: Neko sheri rhürha keba ketsü kropü zo, khipü rüpü cepü kethi, thevo kemesa kro, khipü rüpülü rütho ketho, Jihova po khiyi keshü thiyi Jisu Khrista yolü.
english: You also, as living stones, are built up as a spiritual house, to be a holy priesthood, to offer up spiritual sacrifices, acceptable to God through Jesus Christ.

chokri: Süosü ketholesilü sheri thopü meta, Hihe, I Sion lü ketsü kemelepü kha meta, kedakeyi, püma kerü, mu pü melü keyimi uve kedi thita ho;
english: Because it is contained in Scripture, "Behold, I lay in Zion a chief cornerstone, chosen, and precious: He who believes in him will not be disappointed."

chokri: Süla neko pü umakerü melüte, vele uko püjü zükemo kola, ketsü kefüko yi mute, süo pükülü ketsü kemeleo thite.
english: For you therefore who believe is the honor, but for such as are disobedient, "The stone which the builders rejected, Has become the chief cornerstone,"

chokri: Mu uphe kemeshü tsü, tsüpü tsüro umejo kevao jülü umejo (unümo) thi kevako, jüo zü mu ketala; ukopo sizi keto kesüpü kemeta la.
english: and, "A stone of stumbling, and a rock of offense." For they stumble at the word, being disobedient, whereunto also they were appointed.

chokri: Vele neko keda keyi nuhüko, kedemi ye thevoko shuye kemesapü, thüma uhü kekre kropü, nekopo thüma pü chu ketola cü keyi neko kezülü tazo sheri cüpü ungo zoti kevelü süyi ketala.
english: But you are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people for God's own possession, that you may show forth the excellencies of him who called you out of darkness into his marvelous light:

chokri: Thajü vapü thüma kemo thita, vele tsühi Jihova thüma thite; hijü phikemezhe ngoyimo, vele tsühi phikemezhe ngoyi te.
english: who in time past were no people, but now are God's people, who had not obtained mercy, but now have obtained mercy.

chokri: A kekhrüko, anüko, I neko cechoyo, sekemo thüma bi (resomi) mu kemesa revü mi bi, mhakemeho kemenyü kolü ne kethü yite, ukerhüro zü therithi keta ukemetsuko.
english: Beloved, I beg you as foreigners and pilgrims, to abstain from fleshly lusts, which war against the soul;

chokri: Ne jüpo jüliko kemathola; Gentilemiko dolü ketace, neko metsu mu neko khipü thüma kesu kethimi zi ketako, ukoyo neko la mhatho keve thiyi keve mi tari yive, mu uko mhatho keve ngo keyice Jihova khipü zapozale thi süto uko pe vori tice.
english: having good behavior among the nations, so in that which they speak against you as evil-doers, they may by your good works, which they see, glorify God in the day of visitation.

chokri: Nethi kerenupü thüma zhorele kehopü khro ri süyi te Jihova lano; kedemi sheri mu keku kerekrü kori.
english: Therefore subject yourselves to every ordinance of man for the Lord's sake: whether to the king, as supreme;

chokri: Anghko sheri, uko mhakesu kethi miko la khapü metayo, sazho khasü keto, mhakeve kethiko chu sü ketola.
english: or to governors, as sent by him for vengeance on evil-doers and for praise to those who do well.

chokri: Süosü Jihova medozo, neko mhakeve kethila kemelo mhasekemoko thipü kemekre vato.
english: For this is the will of God, that by well-doing you should put to silence the ignorance of foolish men:

chokri: No nkekha kedimi ketabi, pütü süo khi mi keyhu kezhe moli, vele Jihova cetami thi ketabite.
english: as free, and not using your freedom for a cloak of wickedness, but as bondservants of God.

chokri: Thüma metü rhote, usazüjürako khrüte, Jihova mpe zote, kedeo rhote.
english: Honor all men. Love the brotherhood. Fear God. Honor the king.

chokri: Mi thekümiko ne niepomiko metü khriprü te; mhakeve kethimi, hümenu ketako lebi zomori nphemere ketako sheri meprü sa zote.
english: Servants, be in subjection to your masters with all fear; not only to the good and gentle, but also to the wicked.

chokri: Kekrelamori mha hiohi meza züzo tila, mhace thümapü kemezhe zümo zo sheri lüzhe hüpü ketami süo vezo.
english: For it is commendable if someone endures pain, suffering unjustly, because of conscience toward God.

chokri: Mhace nokekrei ketala mi n yo kuta (nthota) lize ne dipü kemeve ba, ne sügü sühe yite, vele mhace ne mhakeve thiyo lize süo la kemezhe zo sheri, sügü sühe yite, süosü Jihova khiyi keve zhüzo.
english: For what glory is it if, when you sin, you patiently endure beating? But if, when you do well, you patiently endure suffering, this is commendable with God.

chokri: Neko hibi cüyi tazo, kekrelamori Khrista sheri uko la kemezhe sü, thaka thi uka sü, side nekopo pü phecelü tayi ketola.
english: For to this you were called, because Christ also suffered for us, leaving you an example, that you should follow his steps,

chokri: Pü phoma mozo mori pü talü sheri kejo kemo ngoyi mo.
english: who did not sin, "neither was deceit found in his mouth."

chokri: Pü mipü meshu kesüce pü miyo kenyo tamo, pü kemezhe keyice pü miyo kethi kedü ti thitamo, vele khapü sheco kemezi kethio melü süve.
english: Who, when he was cursed, didn't curse back. When he suffered, didn't threaten, but committed himself to him who judges righteously;

chokri: Pü ukephomako khipü püphoyo süyi, südüyo (cross yo) side ukephomako la sata zo sheri kemezilü rhü sala yi zoto, pü kevü kuko la uthi kesürho sü.
english: who his own self bore our sins in his body on the tree, that we, having died to sins, might live to righteousness; by whose stripes you were healed.

chokri: Kekrelamori neko tekonuko bita vajo keramotazo sheri, vele tsühi ta sala pükrolü vori sala te; side n kerhüro Bishop thite (kefüo).
english: For you were going astray like sheep; but are now returned to the Shepherd and Overseer of your souls.

chokri: Sübi ne micemi neko ne nopuneko khrikhro taite mhace humi jüo zümo ti ba lize, micemineko mhapo mozori kerethi tilü redeyi ve.
english: In like manner, wives, be in subjection to your own husbands; so that, even if any don't obey the Word, they may be won by the behavior of their wives without a word;

chokri: Neko khriprü de kerethi tilü mesa (uzhove) lize uko süko pe bato.
english: seeing your pure behavior in fear.

chokri: Ne zhove tisü chozu neketso züve ketao mo, nepitha che dolini kethi, suna pü ketsopü, mori mha vava ti pü keretso tipo bamo.
english: Let your beauty be not just the outward adorning of braiding the hair, and of wearing jewels of gold, or of putting on fine clothing;

chokri: Vele thüma süo umelülü resü kevapü keta, mesamo ta keho, suta keho, kemekre kethi rüpü, süosü Jihova mhüjülü püma kerü; mhakezho.
english: but in the hidden person of the heart, in the incorruptible adornment of a gentle and quiet spirit, which is in the sight of God very precious.

chokri: Uzhourele hibiti thajü thenomi kropü kemesa Jihova melü mu utho uketsopü keta unopu neko khrikhro tayo.
english: For this is how the holy women before, who hoped in God, also adorned themselves, being in subjection to their own husbands:

chokri: Sübi Sarah sheri Abraham jüzülü, pü cüpü a niepoo siziyo, neko süpü nu püko, neko mha kevethi keta sasü nethipü methita molize.
english: as Sarah obeyed Abraham, calling him lord, whose children you now are, if you do well, and are not put in fear by any terror.

chokri: Sübi ne minopuneko sheri uko zü mhase sülü hüte, thechu therho kha necemi neko tsüte, mhabü kethathio, mu kezü kerhü kalü thi kesa tilü, side ne kecho khapü chokha thimo ketola.
english: You husbands, in like manner, live with your wives according to knowledge, giving honor to the woman, as to the weaker vessel, as being also joint heirs of the grace of life; that your prayers may not be hindered.

chokri: Thelalü, neko metü lüpü thite, hunehu khrü, mu sazüjüra kekhrü khi kephimezhe te, mi meso nyüsa te, merhe medü te.
english: Finally, be all like-minded, compassionate, loving as brothers, tenderhearted, courteous,

chokri: Mhakesu kha kesu khüpo thihite, mori khazhemeli kethiri, vele kepile ti jopü mi ketsü, mhasüo la neko cüyi, side neko thejo kalü thiyi te.
english: not rendering evil for evil, or reviling for reviling; but instead blessing; knowing that to this were you called, that you may inherit a blessing.

chokri: Kekrelamori kehü kekhrü miko, tüsozho keveko ngonyülize, püpo pü meyi pü mhakesu kepolü pü kethü yite, mu pü mülü kemeda po hite.
english: For, "He who would love life, And see good days, Let him keep his tongue from evil, And his lips from speaking deceit.

chokri: Mhakesu retsü (therayi) mu mhakeve thiyi; püpo mhakeve thiyi, mu kezükeve phuyi, mu süo thite.
english: Let him turn away from evil, and do good. Let him seek peace, and pursue it.

chokri: Kekrelamori Niepoo mhü kemezimi pe bayo, mu pü ni sheri uko kecho la khripü bayo, vele Niepoo püzü khipü mhakesu kethiko metsu tayo.
english: For the eyes of the Lord are on the righteous, And his ears open to their prayer; But the face of the Lord is against those who do evil."

chokri: Pü sopü lezide mhace no mhakeve meji ta lize uko n metsuyi veta?
english: Now who is he who will harm you, if you become imitators of that which is good?

chokri: Vele mhace no kemezi la kemezhe ta lize, no nnüte, mu uko kethi kedü tiko methi hite; mori nlü kemezheri hite.
english: But even if you should suffer for righteousness' sake, you are blessed. "Don't fear what they fear, neither be troubled."

chokri: Vele Niepo Jihova la nmelü thi kemesa yite; vele pütü metülü kerede pü mifü kelasü keto la, mi nce mhaketso kesüko kemeri püco menünu mu mpe sai de po süte.
english: But sanctify the Lord God in your hearts; and always be ready to give an answer to everyone who asks you a reason concerning the hope that is in you, with humility and fear:

chokri: Pütü pümesü kelülü uko n kesu pozo sheri uko kesu kethimi tila, uko cejü medade ketha kemolü n mejo keba menga yito, no Khrista la mha keve kepo ketilü.
english: having a good conscience; that, while you are spoken against as evildoers, they may be disappointed who curse your good manner of life in Christ.

chokri: Süo vekuzo, mhace Jihova medota lize, no mhakeve kethila kemezhe keyi, kesukethi ce sheri.
english: For it is better, if the will of God should so will, that you suffer for doing well than for doing evil.

chokri: Kekrelamori Khrista sheri vapü kephomako la kemezhe sü, kematho mathokemola, side uko züvo Jihova cesü ketola, uthi upholü mesasü, vele rüpülü püthi merhüyi.
english: Because Christ also suffered for sins once, the righteous for the unrighteous, that he might bring you to God; being put to death in the flesh, but made alive in the spirit;

chokri: Süola sheri pü tatsü kesa rüpü thejü thi ketakoce zhopo thisü.
english: in which he also went and preached to the spirits in prison,

chokri: Pütü huce jüzü thikemo, Noah tüco Jihova po v apü sügüsühe mecho, ruo kerede kebace, kerhüro kedopü mitütha meha keyi jüdelü.
english: who before were disobedient, when God waited patiently in the days of Noah, while the ark was being built. In it, few, that is, eight souls, were saved through water.

chokri: Pühü sübi keti uko sheri jülokepü lü ukokelayi, uthiupho mesakemo khrü kemesa kesü zo mo, vele ukelü khapü phra kesü Jihova celaco keva, Jisu Khrista rhüla kesü lazo.
english: This is a symbol of baptism, which now saves you-- not the putting away of the filth of the flesh, but the answer of a good conscience toward God, through the resurrection of Jesus Christ,

chokri: Püta tülü khote, mu Jihova zalaco bate, tüyo choyimiko mu keku keneko, kemecoko metü khapü pükhro süve.
english: who is at the right hand of God, having gone into heaven, angels and authorities and powers being made subject to him.

chokri: Khrista uthi upho khi ukola kemezhe kesübi, uko sheri sübi umelü kerede keyi mesü, kekrelamori püthipüpho lü kemezhe kesüla kephoma thi mote.
english: Forasmuch then as Christ suffered for us in the flesh, arm yourselves also with the same mind; for he who has suffered in the flesh has ceased from sin;

chokri: Püthipüpho kemenyülü hü, mecho samo te, thüma kemenyükolü, vele Jihova medolü tate.
english: that you no longer should live the rest of your time in the flesh for the lusts of men, but for the will of God.

chokri: Neko thajü vo keta kehütülü Gentile (Judakemoko) kelü medo bi hüvori, mhakemeho kemenyü, reyomenyü, hezo krakeye, kezhe kemeli tehütehü thi, mu phikemero therü marhe kereshü kothi.
english: For we have spent enough of our past time doing the desire of the Gentiles, and having walked in lewdness, lusts, drunken binges, orgies, carousings, and abominable idolatries.

chokri: Uko kelüce neko uko zü kemekro mo ketala neko lüpü uhü kekre kropü thite mu mhakesu popü neko tha, mu neko keyeri keta bi potate.
english: They think it is strange that you don't run with them into the same excess of riot, blaspheming:

chokri: Kehopü sheri uju popü kesami mu kerhümi sheri sheco thi ketao mhüjülü sü rhü zoto.
english: who will give account to him who is ready to judge the living and the dead.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace süola jüyikeve zhopo thipü kesami koceri süsa zo; thüma süko uthipholü hü ketako sheri sheco thi ketola, ukozholü, vele Jihova zholü hüyi te rüpülü.
english: For to this end was the Gospel preached even to the dead, that they might be judged indeed as men in the flesh, but live as to God in the spirit.

chokri: Vele pütü thela mhametükola vori umeno bate, neko süla rhorhü pü bayite, mu kecho thide fü mu la bate.
english: But the end of all things is near. Therefore be of sound mind, self-controlled, and sober in prayer.

chokri: Mhametüko pi sheri neko dolü mhakha mi ketsü lü netho thi bazote; kekhrü, mivaphi kesüla kephoma kekro hu kevo yito.
english: And above all things be earnest in your love among yourselves, for love covers a multitude of sins.

chokri: Panyoparo mode hunehu meso bazote.
english: Be hospitable one to another without grumbling.

chokri: Kehopü sheri mhaphrü ngophrü keyibi neko süo khipü hunehu la yitho thiyite, Jihova ngokemezhe kekrekre ti kekro khasüyo tio choyi keve mipü thite.
english: According as each has received a gift, be ministering it among yourselves, as good stewards of the grace of God in its various forms.

chokri: Mhace thümapü jüpo lize püpo Jihova la jüpo kevemi thide posüte, mhace humi yithothi lize Jihova pü keve didü khapüphrü sü sheri püpo sübi thisüte; side Jihova po Jisu Khrista yo zapozale thiyi te, püyo kechothe kechumu mipi kekha keyi püzhüzo, Amen.
english: If any man speaks, let it be as it were oracles of God. If any man serves, let it be as of the strength which God supplies, that in all things God may be glorified through Jesus Christ, to whom belong the glory and the dominion forever and ever. Amen.

chokri: Akhrüko, ne dojü merüshü keto neketekhri ziti lüta hite, neko yo sekemo vori ketakolü.
english: Beloved, don't be astonished at the fiery trial which has come upon you, to test you, as though a strange thing happened to you.

chokri: Vele rethu yite neko sheri Khrista mezheko keza ba ketako, Pü zapozale mesemengo vori ketoce nekonekenü rekrishu zo ketola.
english: But because you are partakers of Christ's sufferings, rejoice; that at the revelation of his glory also you may rejoice with exceeding joy.

chokri: Mhace Khrista zalü ne meshuyo lize, ne kenüko thüma kropüzo, kekrelamori zapozale kethi rüpü Jihova celü vori nekoyo bate; uko lazono pü mha kesu side po, vele neko la pü zapozale kethi zhüzo.
english: If you are insulted for the name of Christ, blessed are you; because the Spirit of glory and of God rests on you. On their part he is blasphemed, but on your part he is glorified.

chokri: Vele neko mikedokhrimi thitamo, mori keregomi, mori kesu kethimi, mori mithipü mipo nekola mere meyhu mezhe ti thitamo.
english: For let none of you suffer as a murderer, or a thief, or an evil doer, or as a meddler in other men's matters.

chokri: Sizo sheri mhace thüma mipü Khristaian mile side kemezhe yo lize püpo menga hite, vele püpo mha süo la Jihova zapozale thi süte.
english: But if one of you suffers for being a Christian, let him not be ashamed; but let him glorify God in this matter.

chokri: Kekrelamori kemejo sü therüo celü vori moze kesula, mu mhace ukoyo süo shudü to lize pütü thelalü Jihova jüyikeve züyo kemo koyo dipü bizo toshi?
english: For the time has come for judgment to begin at the house of God. If it begins first with us, what will happen to those who don't obey the Gospel of God?

chokri: Mu mhace kemeziko mesesazo kelayi tolize dipüce mesakemoko kephomako ngota?
english: "If it is hard for the righteous to be saved, what will happen to the ungodly and the sinner?"

chokri: Süla uko Jihova medola kemezhe bata lize uko kerhüro khapü pütsü pumelü sü mhakeve kethilü jütho mu kemelü keve pü uthi urhe kesü Jihova tsü sükhe.
english: Therefore let them also who suffer according to the will of God in doing good entrust their souls to him, as to a faithful Creator.

chokri: Mehimiko neko dülü kebako, I sheri pethi mehi thi ketabi tarho sü züho, Khrista kemezhe kesü I kengomi mu pü hisa laco zapozale thivori ketolü püzü keza keto püzo.
english: I exhort the elders among you, as a fellow elder, and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, and who will also share in the glory that will be revealed.

chokri: Jihova kro neko dolü kebako vathi süte, süko pe mu rasüte, moze kesulü hite, vele unü umedo kethilü te, mhakemeho kemenyülü hite, vele umelülü kerede püketalü.
english: Shepherd the flock of God which is among you, exercising the oversight, not under compulsion, but voluntarily, not for dishonest gain, but willingly;

chokri: Mo sheri Jihova kalü zhü pi kenyepo ta hite, vele kro süko la thaka kethipü thisüte.
english: neither as lording it over the charge allotted to you, but making yourselves examples to the flock.

chokri: Teko kefü kemeleo mi mhüngo thi vori ketoce neko zapozale pira rata kemopü ngoyi to.
english: When the chief Shepherd is revealed, you will receive the crown of glory that doesn't fade away.

chokri: Sübi ne natsimiko ne khapü pethi mehimiko khro süyite, Ile, neko metü hunehu khrikhro ta yite, mu hü menünu khi beyite, kekrelamori Jihova kemeko ketimi gü vayo, mu kekhrü kene khapü thelü kemenüko tsü süyo.
english: Likewise, you younger ones, be subject to the elder. Yes, all of you gird yourselves with humility, to subject yourselves to one another; for "God resists the proud, but gives grace to the humble."

chokri: Süla neko Jihova keku be khrolü nekehü renu tate, silize pü pütü tülü nethi kerekrü süyi ve tila.
english: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time;

chokri: Ne tsakhu metü khapü püyo süvate, kekrelamori pü netekhrü tayo tila.
english: casting all your worries on him, because he cares for you.

chokri: Rhorhü tate, mhara menu tate, kekrelamori neko metsuketao therü kesuo losha kerü thi, taphe mu phe thide tüti keto phu tayo tila.
english: Be sober and self-controlled. Be watchful. Your adversary the devil, walks around like a roaring lion, seeking whom he may devour.

chokri: Pü kemelü zü ketü tayo, neko sazüjürako kejülü kebako yo kemethi kha kesü se kebala.
english: Withstand him steadfast in your faith, knowing that your brothers who are in the world are undergoing the same sufferings.

chokri: Vele Jihova ngokemezhelü uko cüpü kechothe zapozale kethilü sü keyi Khrista Jisu yolü; süo salü dopü neko kemezhe, neko thi meve tsosü ketola, neko kha shusü, thi kemetüsü, mu nekopo krokrü keyi thisü.
english: But may the God of all grace, who called you to his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after you have suffered a little while, perfect, establish, strengthen, and settle you.

chokri: Püyo zapozale, mu keku kede kethi kechothe ba keyi thite, Amen.
english: To him be the glory and the power forever and ever. Amen.

chokri: Silvanus, kemelü kene neko sazüo yo, akelüce I lesitho mejüsü, tarho sü, mu zhopo thi kesü hiohi Jihova ngokemezhe kethozo, neko tha kebao.
english: Through Silvanus, our faithful brother, as I consider him, I have written to you briefly, exhorting, and testifying that this is the true grace of God in which you stand.

chokri: Kehu Babylon lü kebao, neko kezü keda keyio neko kelü süzü ho; mu anu Marcus sheri sa.
english: She who is in Babylon, chosen together with you, greets you; and so does Mark, my son.

chokri: Kelü kesü neko mhakha mitsü kesü kekhrü pü hunehu mebosü te, kezükeve po neko dolü bayite Khrista Jisu yota ketako metü, Amen.
english: Greet one another with a kiss of love. Peace be to you all who are in Christ Jesus. Amen.

chokri: Simon Peter, cetamipü mu Jisu Khrista apostle mipü sübi kemelü püma kerü ngo yi ketako, therüo kemezi yolü mu uko kelakeyi Jisu Khrista lü ketako cekesü.
english: Simon Peter, a servant and apostle of Jesus Christ, to those who have obtained a like precious faith with us in the righteousness of our God and Savior, Jesus Christ:

chokri: Ngokemezhe mu kezükeve po kro kehü keyi thi bate Jihova mhaselü Jisu uko Niepoo zalü.
english: Grace to you and peace be multiplied in the knowledge of God and of Jesus our Lord,

chokri: Mhaselü uko cüpü zapozale mu kevekene lüsü keyi.
english: seeing that his divine power has granted to us all things that pertain to life and godliness, through the knowledge of him who called us by his own glory and virtue;

chokri: Sülü zho kehükeyi mu jü khakesü reshu püma kerü sheri pü utsü, size kesülü upo sheri thopü kemetazho khipü zhürhü thiyi ve ketola, mha kemeho kataketo cejülü zhoko thera keyilü.
english: by which he has granted to us his precious and exceedingly great promises; that through these you may become partakers of the divine nature, having escaped from the corruption that is in the world by lust.

chokri: Sülü ba keyi, kemenu tho metülü, n kemelü la kevekene khipü basayi; mu kemenulü mhase.
english: Yes, and for this very cause adding on your part all diligence, in your faith supply moral excellence; and in moral excellence, knowledge;

chokri: Mu mhaselü ukethükerü, mu kethükerü keyilü sügüsühe sayi, mu sügüsühe keyilü kemesa kehü sayi.
english: and in knowledge, self-control; and in self-control patience; and in patience godliness;

chokri: Mu kemesa kehülü sazüjüra tsüli veyi, mu sazüjüra yo tsüli ve keyilü mhapü miketsü kekhrü püsayi.
english: and in godliness brotherly affection; and in brotherly affection, love.

chokri: Mhace mhahiko neyo ta lize mu ba meveyi lize, no nse kedi methu keta thi taho, uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista yolü (mhaselü)
english: For if these things are yours and abound, they make you to be not idle nor unfruitful to the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Vele mha hiko kedio pü mhücemi pü tazo, mu mhango mechoyi mo tato; mu hi mhüjülü pü kephomako va kesü pü rekra mo tate.
english: For he who lacks these things is blind, seeing only what is near, having forgotten the cleansing from his old sins.

chokri: Süla asazüjüra neko neko menu de nekecü mu ne kedakeyi thi menu ta lize; mu mhace ne mhahiko thimu züyi lize, neko mhapüceri retu taho.
english: Therefore, brothers, be more diligent to make your calling and election sure. For if you do these things, you will never stumble.

chokri: Uko Niepoo mu kelakeyi Jisu Khrista kechothe kede kethi lü neko la nenü shuzo keti yitho khri netsüto.
english: For thus will be richly supplied to you the entrance into the eternal Kingdom of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.

chokri: Mhasüko la nekopo rekra süta ketolü I neko thipü sizi keto I asalü mota mozo, nekori seba vele neko thipü tsüdo ketholü süyi te.
english: Therefore I will not be negligent to remind you of these things, though you know them, and are established in the present truth.

chokri: Ile, süo pütü zoleti akelüce lübale; I kereshücelü kebathe, uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista thapü ameka kesüla.
english: I think it right, as long as I am in this tent, to stir you up by reminding you;

chokri: Mechokemolü areshüce hio khava to, uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista a mesekesübi; I süo sebate.
english: knowing that the putting off of my tent comes swiftly, even as our Lord Jesus Christ made clear to me.

chokri: Süpi sheri I nekopo thisü kenyü sü, asü salü nekopo mhahiko rekrazo tanyü.
english: Yes, I will make every effort that you may always be able to remember these things even after my departure.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko theju kethokemo udokevelü tho kesüko mejitamo, hako uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista kevori mu pü keku keba thipü neko ce süte, mu neko se bate, vele umhü sheri ketekhri kethi ngo kesü zhopo ba.
english: For we did not follow cunningly devised fables, when we made known to you the power and coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, but we were eyewitnesses of his majesty.

chokri: Kekrelamori pü Jihova celü uko po celü thechu therho mu zapozale ngoyi, füphra pü zapozale verekri zoti vori, “Hiohi anu Puleo, akhrüo, I püngo anüphi ketio.”
english: For he received from God the Father honor and glory, when the voice came to him from the Majestic Glory, "This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased."

chokri: Thefü hiohi tülü kiri ti hako se, hako püzü cejütu kemesao yolü kebace.
english: This voice we heard come out of heaven when we were with him in the holy mountain.

chokri: Hako setü keba prophecy (sajujü) kethozo ti neko khimenu tate, tü keve kezülü mhava meve kesü bi, pütü süo vori kemothe, tüsozho süo thenyü pübi neko melülü ve süri te.
english: We have the more sure word of prophecy; whereunto you do well that you take heed, as to a lamp shining in a dark place, until the day dawns, and the day star arises in your hearts:

chokri: Se keba therao hio, sajukepo jü lesi kekrelü thopü kemeta, chozulaco uco kepo pümo.
english: knowing this first, that no prophecy of Scripture is of private interpretation.

chokri: Kekrelamori saju kepo thajütho thüma celü kevorijü, thüma medo lümo; vele thüma kemesa Jihova celü kevoriko posü, Kemesa Rüpü ukoyo melü kesülü.
english: For no prophecy ever came by the will of man: but holy men of God spoke, being moved by the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Vele kemeda saju kepo thüma dülü tazo, kecejü kemetha sheri tati bi, neko dolü kemekhrülü vajo keva kemelü pü vorito, Niepoo uko khri keyi sheri mela vato, mu rekri shutilü ka keta khipü utho ukoyo vori tato.
english: But there also arose false prophets among the people, as among you also there will be false teachers, who will secretly bring in destructive heresies, denying even the Master who bought them, bringing on themselves swift destruction.

chokri: Mu mikekro uregürezhü meji vo tato, süko la mi kethoco po mesu tato.
english: Many will follow their immoral ways, and as a result, the way of the truth will be maligned.

chokri: Mhakemholü uko kethera ketijüko khi neko pü hethoheli thi tato, uko sheco gümecho ba mo tato tsühi sheri mu uko mejova ketolü zü relü mote.
english: In covetousness they will exploit you with deceptive words: whose sentence now from of old doesn't linger, and their destruction will not slumber.

chokri: Kekrelamori mhace Jihova tüyochoyimiko kephoma thikeva mehasü mota lize, uko khapü mezalü süva, mu uko khapü kezülü ropha pha metava, uko khapü uko jünyo sheco ketolü mezü metate.
english: For if God didn't spare angels when they sinned, but cast them down to Tartarus, and committed them to pits of darkness, to be reserved to judgment;

chokri: Mu cejü kevüo sheri meha sü mote, vele Noah uko mi tütha, kemezi zhopo kethi mipü, mesakemo kola jüde khapü cejülü süta.
english: and didn't spare the ancient world, but preserved Noah with seven others, a preacher of righteousness, when he brought a flood on the world of the ungodly;

chokri: Sodom mu Gomorrah napü nadeni thüpü megünyo thiva, unithi medipü thaka thipü hisa laco kehü mipo mesakemo kehü seta ketola.
english: and turning the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah into ashes, condemned them to destruction, having made them an example to those who would live ungodly;

chokri: Lot mehasü, keretsemiko rethi (jüpojüli) püthi pü pülü kebü methi ketao.
english: and delivered righteous Lot, who was very distressed by the lustful life of the wicked

chokri: Kekrelamori kemezi thüma süo uko dolü hüyo tila, pü uko ngo mu uko füko sepü pü kerhüro thi kemezhe sü uko thezho kemo kethiko la tüsonha pülü kemezhe.
english: (for that righteous man dwelling among them, was tormented in his righteous soul from day to day with seeing and hearing lawless deeds):

chokri: Niepoo medokephiko lü sheri kemesami merhü sü keto pü seba, mu matho kemoko khapü shecolü sazho khasü keto sheri.
english: the Lord knows how to deliver the godly out of temptation and to keep the unrighteous under punishment for the day of judgment;

chokri: Vele uthi upho mesakemo kemeho kemenyülü ketako meku de mu Sorkari rhokemo mila, utho ukelülü uko umedothi tayo, uko mha kesu kepo methi yomo; keve sheri pomesu tayo.
english: but chiefly those who walk after the flesh in the lust of defilement, and despise authority. Daring, self-willed, they are not afraid to speak evil of dignitaries;

chokri: Tüyochoyimi zo sheri, zhoku, kekuneku Niepoo celü kemeli kemejo, metsu ti jüko khipüvo poyomo.
english: whereas angels, though greater in might and power, don't bring a railing judgment against them before the Lord.

chokri: Vele hiko khonu hülü menu kesüko uko mekava ketola mehükesüko, uko lüyi kemo mhakesuko potayo mu ukotho uko kesulü kekakemhü thitato.
english: But these, as unreasoning creatures, born natural animals to be taken and destroyed, speaking evil in matters about which they are ignorant, will in their destroying surely be destroyed,

chokri: Mezi kemo zhokhro ngoyito, kehelü mhakebü kesü unüunyü thi ketako; uko theku kene, thece kene mishu mikedo tipü uko rezhü kethi uko neko züde hi (thenyenye) keba dolü,
english: receiving the wages of unrighteousness; people who count it pleasure to revel in the day-time, spots and blemishes, reveling in their deceit while they feast with you;

chokri: Uko mhülü kekhrükezüti chupü ta, uko kephoma kethilü la mozo, ukethümozo; ukerhüro resürelü kemo uhü thimekre pü umelü lü mhakemehoko thi dojü, natsimiko rephri tayo.
english: having eyes full of adultery, and who can't cease from sin; enticing unsettled souls; having a heart trained in greed; children of cursing;

chokri: Uko chode kemezi rekramo te, vajo te, kera mote, Bosor nu Balaam chode meji tate, pü mezi kemo zhokhro pünü tate.
english: forsaking the right way, they went astray, having followed the way of Balaam the son of Beor, who loved the wages of wrong-doing;

chokri: Vele pü mesa kemola pü lekhu süve, jüpoyo kemo gada sheri thüma fübi saju kepoo kemelo va khata.
english: but he was rebuked for his own disobedience. A mute donkey spoke with man's voice and stopped the madness of the prophet.

chokri: Hikohi jüfülü jü kediko, kemhütürü kedi bi, thüma hikola kechothe kezü revü metate;
english: These are wells without water, clouds driven by a storm; for whom the blackness of darkness has been reserved forever.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko kemethu kemerü reme kezü jü kezho kepoce, uko uthi upho menyüko khi mishu mi ketse tayo; uko utinyü ukranyü kekrota, kemesamiko süko kekri keti kehülü keta therü theratate.
english: For, uttering great swelling words of emptiness, they entice in the lusts of the flesh, by licentiousness, those who are indeed escaping from those who live in error;

chokri: Uko he kesü jüphra süce ukotho keka ceta thita, kekrelamori thüma süphra pü prari kesüo, uko süo pülü thejü thi keropü phava.
english: promising them liberty, while they themselves are bondservants of corruption; for by whom a man is overcome, by the same is he also brought into bondage.

chokri: Mhace uthi merho keta cejülü zhü therü tayi ta lize, Niepoo Jisu Khrista mhaselü la, uko khi sala püvo ukopo thelü ketsakhu zü ketü (sala) mori ve; uko sala ta lize pü thelalü shudü ceri suku tato.
english: For if, after they have escaped the defilement of the world through the knowledge of the Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they are again entangled therein and overcome, the last state has become worse with them than the first.

chokri: Kemezi chode sekemo ukola veku ta zoto, uko süo sesü jükhakesü kemesako sesü de regü sala tsüsa ketace sheri.
english: For it would be better for them not to have known the way of righteousness, than, after knowing it, to turn back from the holy commandment delivered to them.

chokri: Vele ketho jüve (mhsejü) po keta sü ukoyo kute, süo poti, “Teshü (tehi) utho umerü ti sala tayo; thevo jülü pükhrü kemesa (relo) sü sheri sala talü nyobalü reyu tayo.” Sübiti thite.
english: But it has happened to them according to the true proverb, "The dog turns to his own vomit again," and "the sow that had washed to wallowing in the mire."

chokri: Nnhannhalü küta, u seküyi, u mhüri pü ngoküvayo, u tho pede u benyirei püdzüzoküvayo süo kürhü dzüo zo.
english: That which was from the beginning, that which we have heard, that which we have seen with our eyes, that which we saw, and our hands touched, concerning the Word of life

chokri: Kürhü süo pü mi müsemüngo vate, mu hakorei ngoi de pü zhopo thiyo, Silizo küchothe kürhü süo u Poo züküta-o ha müsemüngoküsüo thapü nekoce süyo.
english: (and the life was revealed, and we have seen, and testify, and declare to you the life, the eternal life, which was with the Father, and was revealed to us);

chokri: Süosü hakorei ngo mu se küyio phrapü neko ce süsüyo, mu neporei küveo lü hazü de u Po mu Nuo Jisu Khrista zü kükrotho ta küto la.
english: that which we have seen and heard we declare to you, that you also may have fellowship with us. Yes, and our fellowship is with the Father, and with his Son, Jesus Christ.

chokri: Muhakorei dzü hiko thopü neko ce süyo, nekünüyo po tsüyiküto la Jihova Küve-o zo.
english: And we write these things to you, that our joy may be fulfilled.

chokri: Silizo hako pu celü thüdzu seküyiyo mu phrapüh neko ce küsüo sü Jihova küveo zo, mu küzü pührei püyolü tayo moto zo küti-o zo.
english: This is the message which we have heard from him and announce to you, that God is light, and in him is no darkness at all.

chokri: U püzü kükrothoyo küti poyo de küzülü tayo lizo, u müdabate, mu küthoo thiyiyo mo.
english: If we say that we have fellowship with him and walk in the darkness, we lie, and don't tell the truth.

chokri: Sirei u mhanuü pü küveo lü tayo lizo, püe küvelü tayo küzho kümha deu rei hunehu zü kükrothoyo. Mu pu nu Jisu Khrista za la küphoma mütülü u khrü kümüsa vayo.
english: But if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship with one another, and the blood of Jesus Christ, his Son, cleanses us from all sin.

chokri: Mhanuü u uküphoma bamoü poyo lizo, u tho u swükütsi küba zo. Mu küthoo u yolü bamo.
english: If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.

chokri: Mhanuü u küphomako pophrasü lizo. Pü zoe dzütho mu matho de uküphomako vasütole mu matho kümoko lü u küphoma khrükümüsa sütole bazo.
english: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and righteous to forgive us the sins, and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.

chokri: Mhanuü u küphoma bamoü poyo lizo u pu yisü kücejüo thiyo, mu pudzüko rei ulülü bamo zo.
english: If we say that we haven't sinned, we make him a liar, and his word is not in us.

chokri: A nune kütsüko neko po phomata mo kütola I dzü hiko thopü neko ce süzü ho mu humi mhanuü phomatayo lizo, U poo zü küba u ukil kümathoyo Jisu Khrista bazo.
english: My little children, I write these things to you so that you may not sin. If anyone sins, we have a Counselor with the Father, Jesus Christ, the righteous.

chokri: Mu pue u küphomako la u rütho thiküvayo zo; Sirei uko la lübizomolie cejü mütü la rei sa.
english: And he is the atoning sacrifice for our sins, and not for ours only, but also for the whole world.

chokri: Mu u pü seyita le küti seyiküta kükrelamole u pü dzü khaküsüko züyoküti la zo.
english: This is how we know that we know him: if we keep his commandments.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei I pü seyo isi de pü dzü khaküsüko züyokümomi kücejümi zo, mu küthoo pü lülü ba mo.
english: One who says, "I know him," and doesn't keep his commandments, is a liar, and the truth isn't in him.

chokri: Sirei thüma pü dzüo thüzüsüh kübami Jihova celü küpa kükhrüo pü lülü batsühkütho zosüyolü u pü lü ba leküti seyiyo.
english: But whoever keeps his word, God's love has most assuredly been perfected in him. This is how we know that we are in him:

chokri: Thüma kühopührei pü lülü bayo leküzhomi sümi rei Khrista kümha tüi zü.
english: he who says he remains in him ought himself also to walk just like he walked.

chokri: A khreko I neko ce dzü khaküsü küsa pührei thosümo zo. Sirei dzükhaküsüko küvüo süosü neko nnhanhalü sühkübao zo. Dzükhaküsüo küvüo süosü nnhanhalü seküyi dzüo zo.
english: Brothers, I write no new commandment to you, but an old commandment which you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the word which you heard from the beginning.

chokri: Süsa I dzü khaküsü püh thopüh neko ce süzü, mha süo püyolürei mu neko yolürei kütho zo. Kükrelamole küzüo ditazü mu küveo küthoo zü ve pa bataküzü la.
english: Again, I write a new commandment to you, which is true in him and in you; because the darkness is passing away, and the true light already shines.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei küveo lü bayole side püthopü sazüdzürami mütsüyo küzhomi tsürei küzü lü ba zolu.
english: He who says he is in the light and hates his brother, is in the darkness even until now.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei pü sazüdzürami khrüyo küzhomi küveo lü bayo, mupütü kühopüh cerei püla thüphe kümüsü pührei ba mozo.
english: He who loves his brother remains in the light, and there is no occasion for stumbling in him.

chokri: Ele thüma kühopührei pü sazüdzürami mütsüyo küzhomi küzüo lü bayomu küzüo lü tayo. Mu küzüo pü mhü thi mücieküva la pü dipüh cievozüshi sürei seyo mo.
english: But he who hates his brother is in the darkness, and walks in the darkness, and doesn't know where he is going, because the darkness has blinded his eyes.

chokri: A nuneko kütsüko I thopüh neko ce süsüyo. Kükrelamole, püza-o la neko küphoma vasüküva la.
english: I write to you, little children, because your sins are forgiven you for his name's sake.

chokri: Miponeko nekoe nnhannhalü kütao seyiküta la I thosü neko cesüzü, khriesako, neko küsüo mho kuyiküta la I thopüh neko ce süzü, Anune kütsüko nekoe poo seyiküta la I thopüh neko cesüvate.
english: I write to you, fathers, because you know him who is from the beginning. I write to you, young men, because you have overcome the evil one. I write to you, little children, because you know the Father.

chokri: Mi poneko nekoe nnhannhalü kütao seyiküta la I thopüh neko cesüvate, khresako, nekoe ku, mu Jihova dzüo neko lü bayo mu neko küsüo mhokuyi kütala I thopü neko ce süvate.
english: I have written to you, fathers, because you know him who is from the beginning. I have written to you, young men, because you are strong, and the word of God remains in you, and you have overcome the evil one.

chokri: cejüo rei mu cejülüküta zhüko khrü hizote. Mhanuü thüma kühopührei cejüo khrüyo lizo, u poo celü küvo kükhrüo pülü bamo.
english: Don't love the world, neither the things that are in the world. If anyone loves the world, the Father's love isn't in him.

chokri: Cejü lü zhüko mha süko uthi upho münyiko, mu umhü münyiko cesücene kemeko ketsü ukülhülü kümako küzüko zo, mu süko u poo celü mole, cejüo lü zhü ketsü la.
english: For all that is in the world, the lust of the flesh, the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life, isn't the Father's, but is the world's.

chokri: Mu cejüo mu sülü münyiko ditazü, Sirei thüma kühopührei Jihova nü thiyoküzhomi küchothe bayo.
english: The world is passing away with its lusts, but he who does God's will remains forever.

chokri: A nune kütsüko, thüla tüo sü vobate; mu Khrista ngomuo votazüküti neko seyiküta kümha tsürei Khrista ngomuo kükro sü bate; süyolüsüna thüla tüo sü vo bataüküzü u seyiyo.
english: Little children, these are the end times, and as you heard that the Antichrist is coming, even now many antichrists have arisen. By this we know that it is the end times.

chokri: Süko uko dolü ta pa tazo. Sirei süko u kromi rei mozo; kükrelamole süko u kromi le lizo. Süko u zü bazoto le, sirei sükoe u kromi mozo le küti mi po seyiküto la siküta zo.
english: They went out from us, but they didn't belong to us; for if they had belonged to us, they would have continued with us. But they left, that they might be revealed that none of them belong to us.

chokri: Silizo nekoe kümüsao celü künhüküyi ngoite, mu neko mha mütüko seyiyo.
english: You have an anointing from the Holy One, and you know the truth.

chokri: Neko yisü küthoo semo leno I thopüh neko ce süsü mo; sirei neko süo seyoküzho la mu küthoo lü kücejü pührei ba kümo la.
english: I have not written to you because you don't know the truth, but because you know it, and because no lie is of the truth.

chokri: Jisu-e Khrista zo li küti po phra muyoküzho sa kücejü-osü sopüh ta? U Poo mu pü Nuo phra muyoküzho sü Khrista ngomuo zo.
english: Who is the liar but he who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This is the Antichrist, he who denies the Father and the Son.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei Nuo süo phrasü muyoküzhomi u Poo puceco mo; Thüma kühopührei Nu süo phrayoküzhoo u poo rei puceco ba zo.
english: Whoever denies the Son, the same doesn't have the Father. He who confesses the Son has the Father also.

chokri: Neko zoe nnhannhalü seküyio süo po neko lü bazoi; neko nnhanhalüseküyi süyolü ba ze Nuo lü ba mu u Poo yolü bayito.
english: Therefore, as for you, let that remain in you which you heard from the beginning. If that which you heard from the beginning remains in you, you also will remain in the Son, and in the Father.

chokri: Mu pü thadzü popüh u tsüpü küta küchothe kürhüroo sü dzü süo zo.
english: This is the promise which he promised us, the eternal life.

chokri: Neko swü kütsiva nyiyoküzhoko dzu I dzü süko thopüh neko ce süvate.
english: These things I have written to you concerning those who would lead you astray.

chokri: Silizo, neko zoe pü celü künhüküyi ngoküyi-o neko lü bayo. Süla neko mipo neko müthaküti thi morive; ale pü neko künhüküyi-o tho mha mütüko dzu popüh neko kayo, mu süo kütho zo, mu kücejüo ba mo, süla süo thapüh neko mhüngo thiküsü kümha neko püyolü bayite.
english: As for you, the anointing which you received from him remains in you, and you don't need for anyone to teach you. But as his anointing teaches you concerning all things, and is true, and is no lie, and even as it taught you, you will remain in him.

chokri: Mu silizo, A nune kütsüko, neko püyolü baite: bayi lizo, pu mi mhüngo thi voküto ce pu mhüdzülü mungatayilho.
english: Now, little children, remain in him, that when he appears, we may have boldness, and not be ashamed before him at his coming.

chokri: Pumathoyoküti neko seyiyolizo, kühopührei mathoküzhomi pü yolü u münuyi zoküti nekorei se bato.
english: If you know that he is righteous, you know that everyone who practices righteousness is born of him.

chokri: Hey, u Po u khrüpü küdithüdü püh thi siküti lüsüte. U püsü Jihova nune thitaleküti, Siyilizo, u rei seyita zo.
english: Behold, how great a love the Father has bestowed on us, that we should be called children of God! For this cause the world doesn't know us, because it didn't know him.

chokri: cejüo u se mo kükrelamole pü seyi moküta la zo, uko tsürei Jihova nuneko thite, mu tsüsa u küdipüh kümhato shi mülemülu mozolu. Sirei pü mi mhüngo thi voküto ce pü kümha zotoküti u se bate; Kükrelamole u pü küdipüh kümha ba shi u süo ngo zotoküti la.
english: Beloved, now we are children of God, and it is not yet revealed what we will be. But we know that, when he is revealed, we will be like him; for we will see him just as he is.

chokri: Mu thüma kühopührei pü la sadzu süo künyemi pu müsaküti kümha u po rei u thikümüsayi noyo.
english: Everyone who has this hope set on him purifies himself, even as he is pure.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei küphomathiyo küzhomi thüzho kümo rei thiyo; mu küphomami-e thüzho kümo zo.
english: Everyone who sins also commits lawlessness. Sin is lawlessness.

chokri: Mu neko se mülemülu bate; u küphomako pü taküta-o, mu püyolü küphoma püh rei bamo.
english: You know that he was revealed to take away our sins, and in him is no sin.

chokri: Thümakühopührei nepo yolü ba sühyo küzhomi phomatayo mo; thüma kühopührei phomatayoküzhomi pü ngoirei mo, morei pu seyi rei mo.
english: Whoever remains in him doesn't sin. Whoever sins hasn't seen him, neither knows him.

chokri: A nune kütsüko, mipührei po neko swükütseivahite; thüma kühopührei mathoyoküzhomi pü mathoyoküti kümha sümi rei matho zo.
english: Little children, let no one lead you astray. He who does righteousness is righteous, even as he is righteous.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei phomayoküzhomi thürükürüzhü-o celü zo; Kükrelamole thükürüzhü-o nnhannhalü phoma tata zo küti la Jihova nuo thadzü mi mhüngo thi voriküti kükrelamole pü thürü kürüzhüo mhathoko thi müdivaküto la zo.
english: He who sins is of the devil, for the devil has been sinning from the beginning. To this end the Son of God was revealed, that he might destroy the works of the devil.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei u Niepoo Jihova yolü u münuyi kütami küphoma thitayo mo. Süsü pütsa püyolü basühyo kütila, küphoma thitayo mo.
english: Whoever is born of God doesn't commit sin, because his seed remains in him; and he can't sin, because he is born of God.

chokri: Hihi la Jihova nuneko tha mülemülu süh bazo, mu küshü-o nuneko rei sa, thüma kühopührei mathoküti thiyokümomi sükoe Jihova celü vorimo mu mhapüh cerei u sazüdzüra khrüyiyo mo.
english: In this the children of God are revealed, and the children of the devil. Whoever doesn't do righteousness is not of God, neither is he who doesn't love his brother.

chokri: Silizo upo huniehu khrüyinoküti neko nnhannhalü dzüo seküyi süo zo.
english: For this is the message which you heard from the beginning, that we should love one another;

chokri: Cain kürüzhüo celü pütho pü sazüo dokhrikütakümha thizü mo. Silizo küdipüh la pü süo dokhriva ra? Kükrelamole pü mhathoko zoe süo mu pü sazüo mhathoko müzi zo küti la.
english: unlike Cain, who was of the evil one, and killed his brother. Why did he kill him? Because his works were evil, and his brother's righteous.

chokri: A sazüneko cejüo neko rütsüyozo sherei neko ngo hite.
english: Don't be surprised, my brothers, if the world hates you.

chokri: U u sazümi khrüyoküzho la küsao cuh kürhülü pataküti u se bate. Thümakühopührei mi khrüyokümomi küsalü bayo zo.
english: We know that we have passed out of death into life, because we love the brothers. He who doesn't love his brother remains in death.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei pü sazüdzürami rütsüyoküzhomi mi küdokhrimi zo; mu küchothe kürhü lü mi küdokhrimi lü bayo moüküti neko rei se bayo.
english: Whoever hates his brother is a murderer, and you know that no murderer has eternal life remaining in him.

chokri: Pü püpho khapü u pho sü thivaküta-o la. U süla kükhrü-e küdipüh shiküti seyiyo; Silizo u rei u sazüdzürami la u pho khasüyi zü.
english: By this we know love, because he laid down his life for us. And we ought to lay down our lives for the brothers.

chokri: Siseri thüma kühopührei cejü nyoko bade pü sazüdzürami kütsakhu ngosüri pülülü mi ngomüzhie küprao khayita lizo Jihova pü celü küprao kükhrü küdipüh kümha de pü yolü baita?
english: But whoever has the world's goods, and sees his brother in need, and closes his heart of compassion against him, how does the love of God remain in him?

chokri: A nune kütsüko uko dzü mu u ta lübizomole, mhatho mu kütho süh mikhrüyi khe.
english: My little children, let's not love in word only, neither with the tongue only, but in deed and truth.

chokri: Sülizo, u küthoo lüpazo leküti seyito, mu ulülü rei mhasetüi tato, pü mhodzüce.
english: And by this we know that we are of the truth, and persuade our hearts before him,

chokri: Kükrelamole u lüe umüjoyo lizo, Jihova u lü cezhoku mu mhamütükoseyoküzho la.
english: because if our heart condemns us, God is greater than our heart, and knows all things.
