chokri: Kükhrüko, u lü-e u müjoyo molizo, u Jihovamhodzü lü u küthüpu nebate.
english: Beloved, if our hearts don't condemn us, we have boldness toward God;

chokri: U pü dzü khaküsüko züyo mu pü küngo ce mha pü nüyoküzho la, u mhakühopüh chorei u pücelü ngoiyo mu süko püceyo pünü.
english: and whatever we ask, we receive from him, because we keep his commandments and do the things that are pleasing in his sight.

chokri: Mu püdzü kha u ceküsü kümha u po Pün u Jisu Khrista zalü mülüyi de hunehu khrüi no küti, süo pü dzü zo.
english: This is his commandment, that we should believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and love one another, even as he commanded.

chokri: Mu thüma kühopührei u khaküsüko züyoküzhomi pülü bayo mu pürei süo lü bayo. Silizo pu u lü bayo le küti pü khapüh u kütsü Ropüo la u süo seyiyo.
english: He who keeps his commandments remains in him, and he in him. By this we know that he remains in us, by the Spirit which he gave us.

chokri: Kükhrüko, neko ropü kühopührei mülüta mole ropüsüko Jihova celüvo memosiküti ra münuyite; Kükrelamole kücejü sadzu kükro pra cejüo lüta küta la.
english: Beloved, don't believe every spirit, but test the spirits, whether they are of God, because many false prophets have gone out into the world.

chokri: Neko hi kümha de Jihova Ropüo seyite, ropü kühopührei Jisu Khrista yisü püthipümo thipü de vo zo leküti phrayo küzho khwü Jihova celü vozo.
english: By this you know the Spirit of God: every spirit who confesses that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is of God,

chokri: Mu ropü kühopührei Jisu phrayo kümo khwü Jihova celü vo mo zo, musüosü Khrista ngomuo ropü zo, süo vo zoto leküti neko püdzu seyitazo, mu pu tsürei vo cejüo lütate.
english: and every spirit who doesn't confess that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is not of God, and this is the spirit of the antichrist, of whom you have heard that it comes. Now it is in the world already.

chokri: Neko Jihova celü vo zo, A nune kütsüko, mu süko mho kuyite. Kükrelamole neko lü baküta-oe cejü lü bakütao ce zhokuküti la.
english: You are of God, little children, and have overcome them; because greater is he who is in you than he who is in the world.

chokri: Ukoe cejüo mi zo, süla uko cejüo mi kümha dzüpoyo, mu cejüoe ukokhwü rünyiyo.
english: They are of the world. Therefore they speak of the world, and the world hears them.

chokri: U Jihova ceyotazo, thüma kühopührei Jihova seyoküzhomi u khwürünyiyo, Jihova ceyo kümomi u khwü rünyiyo mo. Süyo sülü, u kütho ropü-omu kükriküta ropü se kükreyiyo.
english: We are of God. He who knows God listens to us. He who is not of God doesn't listen to us. By this we know the spirit of truth, and the spirit of error.

chokri: Kükhrüko, uko hunehu khrüyi khe, kükrelamole kükhrüe Jihova celü pazoküti la, silizo mikhrüyoküzho khwü Jihova yolü u münuyita zo; mu Jihova seyo.
english: Beloved, let us love one another, for love is of God; and everyone who loves is born of God, and knows God.

chokri: Mi khrüyokümomi Jihova seyo mo, kükrelamole Jihova kükhrüyo zo kütila.
english: He who doesn't love doesn't know God, for God is love.

chokri: U po püla rhüyito de Jihova pünu puleyo kütsüpü cejü lü süküti süyolü Jihova celü küpa kükhrüyo pü u lülü u müse müngo süvata zo.
english: By this was God's love revealed in us, that God has sent his one and only Son into the world that we might live through him.

chokri: U Jihova khrüyi mole pütho u khrüküta zo, side u küphomako la u rütho thiva tole nnhannhalü kütsüsü zo, süo kükhrüyo zo.
english: In this is love, not that we loved God, but that he loved us, and sent his Son as the atoning sacrifice for our sins.

chokri: Kükhrüko, mhanuü Jihova u khrüpü hithüdü thisü lizo, u rei hunehu khrüyizü.
english: Beloved, if God loved us in this way, we also ought to love one another.

chokri: Mipührei mhapücerei Jihova ngo mo, u hunehu khrüyo lizo, Jihova u lü bayo mu pu celü küpa kükhrüyo u lülü tsüyiyo.
english: No one has seen God at any time. If we love one another, God remains in us, and his love has been perfected in us.

chokri: U pü lülü bayoküzho mu pürei u lülü bayoküzho seküyi kükrelamole pü pü ropü kha u tsüvaküta la zo.
english: By this we know that we remain in him and he in us, because he has given us of his Spirit.

chokri: Mu cejüo Külaküyio thito le Jihova pünu kütsüsü küti ukoe ngori zomu süo zhopo thi tayo zo.
english: We have seen and testify that the Father has sent the Son as the Savior of the world.

chokri: Thüma kühopürei Jisue Jihova Nuo zoleküti phrayo küzhomi Jihova süo lü bayo, mu süo rei Jihova lübayo.
english: Whoever confesses that Jesus is the Son of God, God remains in him, and he in God.

chokri: Mu Jihova u Khrüyoküti u se bata zo, mu mülü ri batazo; Jihova kükhrüyo zo mu thüma kühopührei kükhrüyo lü bayoküzhomi Jihova lübayo, mu Jihova rei pü lü bayo.
english: We know and have believed the love which God has for us. God is love, and he who remains in love remains in God, and God remains in him.

chokri: Kütsoküti nha u po thüpuyiküto la süyo lü kükhrüo u cheyotsüte; Kükrelamole pü kümha u rei hio lü ba zo toküti la.
english: In this love has been made perfect among us, that we may have boldness in the day of judgment, because as he is, even so are we in this world.

chokri: Kükhrüo lü u kümüprüh pührei di, sikütio mole kükhrü tsüküyio pütho kümüprüh whuvayo; kükrelamole kümüprüh-e pü sazho baküti la. Silizo thüma küpührei müprühyoküzhomi kükhrüyo lü tsüyiyo mo.
english: There is no fear in love; but perfect love casts out fear, because fear has punishment. He who fears is not made perfect in love.

chokri: U rei pü khrüyo kükrelamole pü u khrüraküti la.
english: We love Him, because he first loved us.

chokri: Mhanuü mipüh-e “I Jihova Khrüyo” isi de pü sazüdzürami rütsüyo lizo, thüma süo kücejümi zo. Kütho zo thüma kühopühri püe ngoküba pü sazüdzürami khrüyokümomi püe ngokümo Jihova khrüküyi di zo.
english: If a man says, "I love God," and hates his brother, he is a liar; for he who doesn't love his brother whom he has seen, how can he love God whom he has not seen?

chokri: Mu thüma kühopühri Jihova khrüyo küzhoo pü sazüdzürami rei khrüyimoo süküti dzü hio u Poo celü ngoite.
english: This commandment we have from him, that he who loves God should also love his brother.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei Jisu-e Khristao zoleküti mülüküzhomi Jihova yolü pü münuyita zo; silizo thüma kühopührei mi münusüyoküzho-o khrüyoküzhomi pü lülü münu pakütio rei khrüyo.
english: Whoever believes that Jesus is the Christ is born of God. Whoever loves the father also loves the child who is born of him.

chokri: U Jihova Khrü mu pü dzü khaküsüko thi mu züyo lizo, süyolüsü u Jihova nuneko khrüyoküti u seyiyo.
english: By this we know that we love the children of God, when we love God and keep his commandments.

chokri: Silizo u Jihova khrüyoküti püco, u pü dzü khaküsüko züyo küzhoo zo, mu pü dzü kha küsüko rüh mo zo.
english: For this is the love of God, that we keep his commandments. His commandments are not grievous.

chokri: Silizo mhakühopührei Jihova yolü münu parikütao cejüo ce kuyiyo; mu Jihova cejüo ce kuyikütao süo u kümülü zo.
english: For whatever is born of God overcomes the world. This is the victory that has overcome the world: your faith.

chokri: Tsoo Jisu Jihova Nuo zoküti mülüküzhoo sa cejüo ce kuyiyo küzhomi somi ra?
english: Who is he who overcomes the world, but he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God?

chokri: Dzü mu thüza zü küvoo Jisu Khristae süyosü zo; dzü lübi zo mole dzü rei sa mu thüza rei sa.
english: This is he who came by water and blood, Jesus Christ; not with the water only, but with the water and the blood. It is the Spirit who testifies, because the Spirit is the truth.

chokri: Süo tüyolü zhopo süh hiko thopüh bayo, Poo, Dzüo mu Kümüsa Ropü süh hiko püh zo.
english: For there are three who testify:

chokri: Mu cejü lü rei zhopo süh hiko thiyo Ropü mu Dzüo mu thüza-o mu süh hiko külürhü püh thiyo.
english: the Spirit, and the water, and the blood; and the three agree as one.

chokri: Mhanuü u thüma zhopo tho züyo lizo, Jihova zhopoe süo ce zhoku; Jihova zhopo sü hiohi zo pü lü zhopo thiküsüyo zo küti.
english: If we receive the witness of men, the witness of God is greater; for this is God's testimony which he has testified concerning his Son.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei Jihova Nuo mülüküzhomi zhopo süo pülü bata zo. Thüma kühopührei Jihova mülüyokümomi Jihova püsü kümüdao thivate. Kükrelamole thüma süo Jihova pü Nu dzü zhopo thiküsüyo mülü moküta la.
english: He who believes in the Son of God has the testimony in himself. He who doesn't believe God has made him a liar, because he has not believed in the testimony that God has given concerning his Son.

chokri: Mu zhopo süo Jihova küchothe kürhüro khapü u tsüvate. Mu kürhüro süosü pu Nuo lü bayokütio zo.
english: The testimony is this, that God gave to us eternal life, and this life is in his Son.

chokri: Thüma kühopührei Nu süo ngoikütami kürhüro süo nete, thüma kühopühri Jihova Nuo ngoikümomi kürhüro süo ba mo.
english: He who has the Son has the life. He who doesn't have God's Son doesn't have the life.

chokri: Mhahiko la I thopüh neko ce süzü ho, Nepo Jihova Nu Jisu mülüyikütola, süo küchothe kürhü ngoyiküta, mu Nepo Jihova Nu Jisu zalü mülütayi kütola.
english: These things I have written to you who believe in the name of the Son of God, that you may know that you have eternal life, and that you may continue to believe in the name of the Son of God.

chokri: Mu u püyolü u küthüpu ba kütayo, sü hiohi zo. U pünü pü müdo kümhade mhakühopühri choyo lizo pü u khwü rünyiyo.
english: This is the boldness which we have toward him, that, if we ask anything according to his will, he listens to us.

chokri: Mu mhanuü pü u khwü rünyiyo küti seyolizo, U pücelü choküsüko ngoitaküti seyitayo.
english: And if we know that he listens to us, whatever we ask, we know that we have the petitions which we have asked of him.

chokri: Mhanuü thüma kühopühri pü sazüdzürami sataküsü küphoma kümopüh thivaküta ngo lizo, püpo choyi, silizo Jihova sata küsü küphoma zokümo thiküvako la kürhüro khapü pütsüto, sata küsü küphomari nezo; I mi po chonokütio süo po bamo.
english: If anyone sees his brother sinning a sin not leading to death, he shall ask, and God will give him life for those who sin not leading to death. There is a sin leading to death. I don't say that he should make a request concerning this.

chokri: Mathokümo kühopührei küphoma zo;
english: All unrighteousness is sin, and there is a sin not leading to death.

chokri: Mu sataküsü zokümo küphoma kühopührei Jihova yolü münuyi kütami phoma yomo. Sirei Jihova yolü münuyi kütao münuyi tatayo. Süla kürüzhüo pü dzü yilho.
english: We know that whoever is born of God doesn't sin, but he who was born of God keeps himself, and the evil one doesn't touch him.

chokri: U Jihova cechoyo zoküti se bate mu cejü mütüe kürüzhüo khreikhrotayo.
english: We know that we are of God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one.

chokri: Mu Jihova Nuo vo de u po kütho zo kütio seyiküto la mhaküse kha utsü vaküti u se bate, Süo sü kütho zoküti pü pü Nu Jisu Khrista lü bate, Hiokütho Jihova zoküti Jihova Nuo mu küchothe kürhüroo süo zo.
english: We know that the Son of God has come, and has given us an understanding, that we know him who is true, and we are in him who is true, in his Son Jesus Christ. This is the true God, and eternal life.

chokri: A nune kütsüko neko thürümarhe rüsüyoküzhoko thürai zote. Amen.
english: Little children, keep yourselves from idols.

chokri: Pethi-o no khapüh küdaküyi thünopü mu pü mu neko ce I küthoo lü nieko khrüyo mu alübi mo. Siri küthoo sheyo küzho mütü risa.
english: The elder, to the chosen lady and her children, whom I love in truth; and not I only, but also all those who know the truth;

chokri: Kükrelamori küthoo ulüba mu küchothe uzütato.
english: for the truth's sake, which remains in us, and it will be with us forever:

chokri: Ukümünupü u poo celü mu Jisu Khrista Upo-o nu celü ngo kümüzhie, thülü kümünü mu küzüküveyo po küthoo mu kükhrüo po uzü bayite.
english: Grace, mercy, and peace will be with us, from God the Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, in truth and love.

chokri: Upo-o celü dzü ngoküyi bino I n nuneko humi küthoo lü ba küti ngono anüriba.
english: I rejoice greatly that I have found some of your children walking in truth, even as we have been commanded by the Father.

chokri: Mu tsü I nce choyo thünopü, I dzü küsa thopüh ntsü totiyomo siri u süculü ngoyi küta bino hunehu khrüzo yi khe si küti-ozo.
english: Now I beg you, dear lady, not as though I wrote to you a new commandment, but that which we had from the beginning, that we love one another.

chokri: Mu hibino kükhrü u pu dzü khaküsüo müdzuyi moyoküshü, u süculü sheyiküta mu müdzu vo küto kükhrü-ozo.
english: This is love, that we should walk according to his commandments. This is the commandment, even as you heard from the beginning, that you should walk in it.

chokri: Siyo kütsimüshüyo küzho kükro cezülü vorite, süko Jisu Khrista uthi upholü hüvoriti po phrayomo. Süo no mi kütsimüshüyo küzho Khrista ngomu-ozo.
english: For many deceivers have gone out into the world, those who don't confess that Jesus Christ came in the flesh. This is the deceiver and the Antichrist.

chokri: Nie mhathothi küyiko müdi va tiyo mori zhokhro ngotsühyi kütola nie tho nie pe süte.
english: Watch yourselves, that we don't lose the things which we have accomplished, but that we receive a full reward.

chokri: Kühopühri Khrista kümüthadzü yolü bamono süchü pa tayo, süo ukümünupü pu zhümo, siri sopühno pu kümüthadzü lü bayi süri Poo mu Nuo unie thüma süo zhü thite.
english: Whoever transgresses and doesn't remain in the teaching of Christ, doesn't have God. He who remains in the teaching, the same has both the Father and the Son.

chokri: Humi kümüthadzü süo püh mono mce vori zori pupo n celü lühi sitiyo mori külü ri hite.
english: If anyone comes to you, and doesn't bring this teaching, don't receive him into your house, and don't welcome him,

chokri: Sopühno hibi tiko züyi süri puri süo zü mhatho küshü küthi hilü unie kümhazo.
english: for he who welcomes him participates in his evil works.

chokri: Mhakükro thopüh niekotsü kütoba siri I lesi mu lesidzü nie süh ti cieri I a tho mhotsu no vori nieko zü kürüthi tayo unü tsüh zo küto lü bate.
english: Having many things to write to you, I don't want to do so with paper and ink, but I hope to come to you, and to speak face to face, that our joy may be made full.

chokri: Küdaküyi n sazüpü nuneko ri n külü süho.
english: The children of your chosen sister greet you. Amen.

chokri: Mehimi thopü pükhrümi Gaius cekesü, I pükhrü ketho kethio.
english: The elder to Gaius the beloved, whom I love in truth.

chokri: Kekhrüo, A kemenyü mha metü pi pra meve keba mu sürho keba, mu nkerhüro sheri kepra kemeve thi kebala.
english: Beloved, I pray that you may prosper in all things and be healthy, even as your soul prospers.

chokri: Kekrelamori I nüde rechü phiba, Usazüjürako kevori ce uko kepolü ketho n yo ba, mu no ketho lüta kebala.
english: For I rejoiced greatly, when brothers came and testified about your truth, even as you walk in truth.

chokri: I anuneko ketholü ketace anüku tiba samo, I süo se kesüce.
english: I have no greater joy than this, to hear about my children walking in truth.

chokri: Akhrüo no kemelü mhakehopü lü sheri thipü usazüjürako yo kesü, mu sekemo koyo sheri.
english: Beloved, you do a faithful work in whatever you accomplish for those who are brothers and strangers.

chokri: Kehuce mhüjülü nzhokeve zhopo kethi kola, uko revülü no mhace kemesazho thipü ukoyo sü lize no vezo tole.
english: They have testified about your love before the assembly. You will do well to send them forward on their journey in a manner worthy of God,

chokri: Kekrelamori uko püzao lano Gentile (judakemoko) mice mhapüri pümo zode uko tavo zü ketala.
english: because for the sake of the Name they went out, taking nothing from the Gentiles.

chokri: Uko süla sübi tiko zü keyi mesüzo, mu ketholü kekhrühi keta ukromiko tila.
english: We therefore ought to receive such, that we may be fellow workers for the truth.

chokri: I lesi thopü kehulü süte, vele Diotrephes uko dolü kemetho thinyüsa tade hako züyi mote.
english: I wrote to the assembly, but Diotrephes, who loves to be first among them, doesn't accept what we say.

chokri: Süla mhace I tavori lize I pü dipü thisü sheri I pü mhatho rekra süto, pü jüpo pü hako merha (cethisü), jükesu pü hako metsu; püzü ketü mozori, mori pü usazüjürako sheri mesomu te, mu süko züyi, mesoyi ketoko sheri kha (vakha) side uko kehucelü hu meta ve.
english: Therefore, if I come, I will call attention to his deeds which he does, unjustly accusing us with wicked words. Not content with this, neither does he himself receive the brothers, and those who would, he forbids and throws out of the assembly.

chokri: Kekhrümiko, mhakesu kethiko sameji hite, vele mhakeve mejite; pü mha keve kethi sü Jihova celü vori, vele pü mhakesu kethio sü Jihova ngomo.
english: Beloved, don't imitate that which is evil, but that which is good. He who does good is of God. He who does evil hasn't seen God.

chokri: Demetrius thüma metü pü kevezhopo thiba, mu süo kethozo, ile, hako sheri süo kepo theju se bate, mu neko seba vele hako zhopo kethozo. I mhakekro thosü ketoba,
english: Demetrius has the testimony of all, and of the truth itself; yes, we also testify, and you know that our testimony is true.

chokri: vele I Pen (lesi kethosü) mu Ink (püjü) lü thopü neko ce sümo tato.
english: I had many things to write to you, but I am unwilling to write to you with ink and pen;

chokri: Vele akelüce mecho bamode nekozü kengo tato, mu uko kezüngo de mha kepo tato, kezükeve (krokrü) tipo neko züba keyi thite, uzüko neko kelü süho, ukhrethomiko zacü zode kelü süte.
english: but I hope to see you soon, and we will speak face to face. Peace be to you. The friends greet you. Greet the friends by name.

chokri: Jisu Khrista jü kehalapü mese mengo kesü Jihova pü pütsü kesü, mhathi vori ze ta ketoko pü yithomiko meka kesü; pü tüyochoyimi ketsü pü zasi thipü pü choyi kethio John cesü.
english: This is the Revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave him to show to his servants the things which must happen soon, which he sent and made known by his angel to his servant, John,

chokri: Pü Jihova jüko züketako, Jisu Khrista zhopo m pü kehüko mu mhathoko ri se m ngo.
english: who testified to God's word, and of the testimony of Jesus Christ, about everything that he saw.

chokri: Pütü tso ba ketala somi no sajü jü hiko phri mu thi m zü yo sheli thejo kepütho.
english: Blessed is he who reads and those who hear the words of the prophecy, and keep the things that are written in it, for the time is at hand.

chokri: John Asia lü kehu thünako ce kesü; ngokemezhe po neyo ba keyi thite, thelü kemenü (kereyi) khakesüo thajüri ketao, tsüdori ketao, mu hisa ri vori ketoo; Rüpü thünako pü kedeba mhüjü lü tha;
english: John, to the seven assemblies that are in Asia: Grace to you and peace, from God, who is and who was and who is to come; and from the seven Spirits who are before his throne;

chokri: Jisu Khrista khakesü kemelü kene zhopo, kesami dolü rhüla kesü kerathoo, cejülü kedemiko nuo, pü uko khrüde püzapü ukephomako khrü kemesa kesüo.
english: and from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness, the firstborn of the dead, and the ruler of the kings of the earth. To him who loves us, and washed us from our sins by his blood;

chokri: Mu uko thipü kedemi, m pethi kezho (thevo) thi pü püpo Jihova tsü; püpo zapozale kede thikeyi thite. Amen.
english: and he made us to be a Kingdom, priests to his God and Father; to him be the glory and the dominion forever and ever. Amen.

chokri: Hihe, pü kemhüyo vori; themhü metüko pü ngoto, mu zerenyü pü pürhü kesüko ri pü ngoto; kede kekre ketsü cejülü nu metüko pü ngoto, m püla uko lü shü phito. Sizoto, Amen.
english: Behold, he is coming with the clouds, and every eye will see him, including those who pierced him. All the tribes of the earth will mourn over him. Even so, Amen.

chokri: I Thüra-o mu thülao (Alpha mu Omega) Niepoo side poyo-voketa-o, tsü kebao mu vori ketoo zo, kepfüthoo.
english: "I am the Alpha and the Omega," says the Lord God, "who is and who was and who is to come, the Almighty."

chokri: I, John neko sazüjürao, kemezhe ketsü kroko, Jisu Khrista kedela kemezhe tsü hü keyiko, I, Patmos cejü rethitso kemolü ba, Jihova jü la mu Jisu Khrista zhopola.
english: I John, your brother and partner with you in oppression, Kingdom, and perseverance in Christ Jesus, was on the isle that is called Patmos because of God's Word and the testimony of Jesus Christ.

chokri: Niepoo zhonha Rüpü a yo vorita de a saco füphra thecü fü meto kesübi tsü se tsü.
english: I was in the Spirit on the Lord's day, and I heard behind me a loud voice, like a trumpet

chokri: Pode, I Alpha mu Omega kerao mu kekhao No mha kedipü ngo sheli thopü kehu thünako ce süte Asia lü; Ephesus, Smyrha, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, mu Lodicea koce.
english: saying, "What you see, write in a book and send to the seven assemblies: to Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and to Laodicea."

chokri: I regü sü pfüphra süo pe süri, süna meto sü thüna bode ngoyi.
english: I turned to see the voice that spoke with me. Having turned, I saw seven golden lampstands.

chokri: M suna meto thünako dolü thüma ru bi mipü ba, füne püpheziketso, suna chepha pü püvapha.
english: And among the lampstands was one like a son of man, clothed with a robe reaching down to his feet, and with a golden sash around his chest.

chokri: Püpi m püpitha thümakemega bi, kropü makre kekro bi; pümhü ni meto keba meli bi;
english: His head and his hair were white as white wool, like snow. His eyes were like a flame of fire.

chokri: M püphezi pitol kemeva bi, süko melü thü keba meva bi; m pü füphra jükekro fü bi.
english: His feet were like burnished brass, as if it had been refined in a furnace. His voice was like the voice of many waters.

chokri: M pübe lü uzaco thenyü thüna ba; pü talü zecho lucohico uyi keve bi ta pa ta: pü pepü meshümedü nace pü pü rütso thi.
english: He had seven stars in his right hand. Out of his mouth proceeded a sharp two-edged sword. His face was like the sun shining at its brightest.

chokri: M I püngo kesüce kesami bi retu tsüta pü phece. M pübe uzaco pü a jüde ace poti, meprü he; I therao mu kekhao:
english: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead man. He laid his right hand on me, saying, "Don't be afraid. I am the first and the last,

chokri: I rhüketao, save; m hihe, I rhüsüta ketao kechothe, Amen; meza m kesa cabi I pü ba.
english: and the Living one. I was dead, and behold, I am alive forevermore. Amen. I have the keys of Death and of Hades.

chokri: N kengoko thoyite, tsü mha kebako, m hisa mha vori ketoko.
english: Write therefore the things which you have seen, and the things which are, and the things which will happen hereafter;

chokri: Ketekhri ketsü thenyü thena abe azaco ba no ngo ketsüko m suna meto sü thüna. Thenyü thünako tüyochoyimi kehu thünako: suna meto thünako no ngo süko kehu thünako.
english: the mystery of the seven stars which you saw in my right hand, and the seven golden lampstands. The seven stars are the angels of the seven assemblies. The seven lampstands are seven assemblies.

chokri: Ephesus lü keba tüyochoyio ce jütho kesü: thenyü thüna ube uzaco pü kebao mhahiko poyo, pü suna meto thüna dolü ta kebao
english: To the angel of the assembly in Ephesus write: "He who holds the seven stars in his right hand, he who walks among the seven golden lampstands says these things:

chokri: I n mhathoko m thikebako ngo, sügüsühe ketsüko, no mikemedako zü yo kemo; mu somi apostle mi le po veli kemedami;
english: "I know your works, and your toil and perseverance, and that you can't tolerate evil men, and have tested those who call themselves apostles, and they are not, and found them false.

chokri: M sügüsühe de azala mhathothi de n nyü ta yo kemo.
english: You have perseverance and have endured for my name's sake, and have not grown weary.

chokri: Sizo sheri n yo a nü kemo huba, kekrelamori no n kekhrü kerao kha kevala.
english: But I have this against you, that you left your first love.

chokri: Süla nsa lü sü de no dipüce retu ta sheli de nlü kedeyi de mhatho kerao thiyite; molize n ce mhai voritato, suna meto n yo kebao pü vato n thilü, nlü rüde mota lize.
english: Remember therefore from where you have fallen, and repent and do the first works; or else I am coming to you swiftly, and will move your lampstand out of its place, unless you repent.

chokri: Veli no ri Nicolaitanes kemetha n nümo I ri tsüo ngometsü.
english: But this you have, that you hate the works of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate.

chokri: Uni kebao po jü Rüpü kehako ce kepo reniyite; Somi thatosheli I kerhüsü pü püpo tito, süo paradise metsu lü ba. (Jihova rüna).
english: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies. To him who overcomes I will give to eat of the tree of life, which is in the Paradise of my God.

chokri: Tho pü Smyrna kehu tüo choyio ce kesü; Mha hiko kepo Thüra-o m kekhao, sakeva-o m rhüta ketao.
english: "To the angel of the assembly in Smyrna write: "The first and the last, who was dead, and has come to life says these things:

chokri: I se n mhatho, n mezhe, ntsakhu (veli no mhane) I se kemeda (niepoo zho shü latsü) uko Jewmi le si veli mo, veli Satan kehu lü ta yo.
english: "I know your works, oppression, and your poverty (but you are rich), and the blasphemy of those who say they are Jews, and they are not, but are a synagogue of Satan.

chokri: Mice pohi, no kemezhe ketoko; Therükeshü-o neko humi tü pü Thejücelü süto, side n ne ketito; side zho kerü kemezhe ta to; kesa ketso sheri kemelü thazote, size I kehü kedepira pü ntsü to.
english: Don't be afraid of the things which you are about to suffer. Behold, the devil is about to throw some of you into prison, that you may be tested; and you will have oppression for ten days. Be faithful to death, and I will give you the crown of life.

chokri: U ni kenemipo Rüpü kehuce kepofü reni yite; somi thayisheli kesa kenao po pü methi saho.
english: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies. He who overcomes won't be harmed by the second death.

chokri: Pergamos kehu tüyo choyio cetho kesü; zecho uyi licohivo kebao po kesü;
english: "To the angel of the assembly in Pergamum write: "He who has the sharp two-edged sword says these things:

chokri: I n mhathoko se, m n kehüthi, Satan kebathi: no aza khi metükeba, a kemelü melakemo, Antipas a kemelü la dokhri kevao balü mi po püdokhrive, Satan Thethi lü.
english: "I know your works and where you dwell, where Satan's throne is. You hold firmly to my name, and didn't deny my faith in the days of Antipas my witness, my faithful one, who was killed among you, where Satan dwells.

chokri: Veli mhahulü a nütso kemoba, n celü Balaam no Balak methapü Israel mi nuneko chokha kethiko züba, marhe kereshü coko ti nozi, de uko po regürezhü tsü thi keto la.
english: But I have a few things against you, because you have there some who hold the teaching of Balaam, who taught Balak to throw a stumbling block before the children of Israel, to eat things sacrificed to idols, and to commit sexual immorality.

chokri: Süla no Nicolaitans dorhüko I ngometsü kebako ri züba.
english: So you also have some who hold to the teaching of the Nicolaitans likewise.

chokri: Thelü rüdeta te, molize I mhai nce vori tato, m I talü zecho khi sükho merha ta to.
english: Repent therefore, or else I am coming to you quickly, and I will make war against them with the sword of my mouth.

chokri: Uni kenemi Rüpü kehukoce kepo reni yite; pfü keyiko I kevapü meta ketsü manna pü püpotito, side ketsü kemega pü pütsü süto, ketsüyo theza kesa tho kesü, mi püri sekemo, ngokeyio thozo kemosa.
english: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies. To him who overcomes, to him I will give of the hidden manna, and I will give him a white stone, and on the stone a new name written, which no one knows but he who receives it.

chokri: Thyatira kehulü keba tüyochoyi cetho kesü: Jihova Nu hiko po sü, pü mhüni meli bi, püphezi ni pitol kemeva bi;
english: "To the angel of the assembly in Thyatira write: "The Son of God, who has his eyes like a flame of fire, and his feet are like burnished brass, says these things:

chokri: I se n mhatho, n kekhrühi, nyitho, n kemelü, n sügüsühe ketsü, n mhathoko; thelako kerako ce thipfü ketsü.
english: I know your works, your love, faith, service, patient endurance, and that your last works are more than the first.

chokri: Sizosheri I mhahu nyo anü tso kemoba, no Jezebel choyithi, pü saju kepopü le poyo, a choyi mi swu ketsepü uko po keregü kerezhü thiyo, marhe kereshüzhüko tino zi yo.
english: But I have this against you, that you tolerate your woman, Jezebel, who calls herself a prophetess. She teaches and seduces my servants to commit sexual immorality, and to eat things sacrificed to idols.

chokri: Mu I pütü pü pütsü sü thelü rüde ketola; veli pü rüde mute.
english: I gave her time to repent, but she refuses to repent of her sexual immorality.

chokri: Hihe, I pü kehüpü thezilü sü vato, m püzü regürezhü ketako po kemezhe shu süto, uko thelü rüde ta kemosa, uko mhatho kolü.
english: Behold, I will throw her into a bed, and those who commit adultery with her into great oppression, unless they repent of her works.

chokri: M I kesa pü pünuneko mesa vato; m kehu metüko I uko mhathoko, uko melüko phu kega keta seyito; m neko mipüpü ketsü mhatho khü cezüde zhokhro I kha süto.
english: I will kill her children with Death, and all the assemblies will know that I am he who searches the minds and hearts. I will give to each one of you according to your deeds.

chokri: Veli I neko Thyatira lü kebako ce po yo, neko thezhokesü zü kemoko, m Satan do kemesüko seyo kemoko; I thepü kemeshi kekre kha neko tsü sa ho.
english: But to you I say, to the rest who are in Thyatira, as many as don't have this teaching, who don't know what some call 'the deep things of Satan,' to you I say, I am not putting any other burden on you.

chokri: Veli no melü ketayo pü metü ba zo te I vori kemothe.
english: Nevertheless, hold firmly that which you have, until I come.

chokri: M sopü tha sheli mu a mhathoko thi ba pütü thela tso sheli I kepfü rünako pi pü tsü süto.
english: He who overcomes, and he who keeps my works to the end, to him I will give authority over the nations.

chokri: M pü thegi kepfü khi shuyeko kekha to; mhabüko le kethio jüphro kesü bi I Apo celü ngo keyi bi.
english: He will rule them with a rod of iron, shattering them like clay pots; as I also have received of my Father:

chokri: M I keshuo thenyü pü pütsü süto.
english: and I will give him the morning star.

chokri: Uni keba mi Rüpü kehukoce kepo fü reni yite.
english: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies.

chokri: Tülü choyimi Sardis lü kebao ce tha kesü; Hiko pokesü Jihova Rüpü thüna kebao po; thenyü thüna; I nmhathoko se, no rhü ta zo leno thüza pü ba m sa ta te.
english: "And to the angel of the assembly in Sardis write: He who has the seven Spirits of God, and the seven stars says these things: "I know your works, that you have a reputation of being alive, but you are dead.

chokri: Fü menu bate, mesho kebako thi kemetü yi te, sata too kebako; n mhathoko vetsütso mo keta ngo bate Jihova mhüjülü.
english: Wake up, and keep the things that remain, which you were about to throw away, for I have found no works of yours perfected before my God.

chokri: N sa rükra süte, no kedipü bide seyi mu ngoyi sheli, thezü metayi mu thelü rüdeyi te. Mhace no fü menu ba mota lize, I kerügomi bi ta nce vori tato, Pütü di püce vori to sheli no se kemolü.
english: Remember therefore how you have received and heard. Keep it, and repent. If therefore you won't watch, I will come as a thief, and you won't know what hour I will come upon you.

chokri: No thüza huba Sardis lü ufüne merho kemo; m uko ufüne kekro khi a zü ta to; uko khishü keta la.
english: Nevertheless you have a few names in Sardis that did not defile their garments. They will walk with me in white, for they are worthy.

chokri: Somi thashi sümi füne kekro pü benene süto; kerhü lesidalü I püza va va ho, veli Apo mu tüyo choyimiko mhüjülü pü za po süto.
english: He who overcomes will be arrayed in white garments, and I will in no way blot his name out of the book of life, and I will confess his name before my Father, and before his angels.

chokri: U ni kene mipo Rüpü kehuko ce kepofü neni yite.
english: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies.

chokri: Thopü Philadelphia kehuce kesü, mhahiko kepoo mesa, ketho, m David cabi püba, pü mi pü ri kha yiho, kha kevasa mipüri süo khri yiho;
english: "To the angel of the assembly in Philadelphia write: "He who is holy, he who is true, he who has the key of David, he who opens and no one can shut, and who shuts and no one opens, says these things:

chokri: I n mhathoko se, hihe, I cekha khri pü n mhüjü kha mba, m mipüri süo kha yiho; n kepfü kedopü ba tsü la, a jü zükeyila, m aza mela va kemola.
english: "I know your works (behold, I have set before you an open door, which no one can shut), that you have a little power, and kept my word, and didn't deny my name.

chokri: Hihe, I süko thüpü Satan kese shü ce thi va to, uko Jewmi le poyo, veli mo, uko meda; I uko thipü n mhüjü n phece reshü süto, ukopo I nkhrü keba seyi keto la.
english: Behold, I give of the synagogue of Satan, of those who say they are Jews, and they are not, but lie. Behold, I will make them to come and worship before your feet, and to know that I have loved you.

chokri: Kekrelamori no ajü sügüsühe ketsü thi keyila, kedo ketsülü I n yo yito, cejü metülü dophi süsü voto.
english: Because you kept my command to endure, I also will keep you from the hour of testing, which is to come on the whole world, to test those who dwell on the earth.

chokri: Hihe, I mhai vori tato; metü tha zote, mikekremi po n kede pira sü khita mo keto la.
english: I am coming quickly! Hold firmly that which you have, so that no one takes your crown.

chokri: Pü pfü keyio püpo Jihova kehu celü sütüco thito, m püpo ta sa hote; I püyo a Rüo zatho pü tsüto, a Rüo nade za, m aza kesao ri thosapü pü tsü süto.
english: He who overcomes, I will make him a pillar in the temple of my God, and he will go out from there no more. I will write on him the name of my God, and the name of the city of my God, the new Jerusalem, which comes down out of heaven from my God, and my own new name.

chokri: Püni kebao po Rüpü kehukoce kepo füreni yite.
english: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies.

chokri: Laodicea kehu lü keba tüyochoyimi ce tho kesü; Amen, kemelü kethepu zhopolü kethothi, Jihova süculü thikesüo.
english: "To the angel of the assembly in Laodicea write: "The Amen, the Faithful and True Witness, the Head of God's creation, says these things:

chokri: N mhathoko I se, no mekorimo lürimo; no meko ta mori lüri ta ze a nü to ri.
english: "I know your works, that you are neither cold nor hot. I wish you were cold or hot.

chokri: Kekrelamori no lüwi ketsüla, mekomo, thilümo, a mülü n mehe kha vato.
english: So, because you are lukewarm, and neither hot nor cold, I will vomit you out of my mouth.

chokri: Kekrelamori no poti I mhane, vekehe bate azhüko, I mhakhi sa nsa mote; no hesheherü thiba keta no setha mote, kemechü kemerü, mhadi, n mhüce, mu mechükeba.
english: Because you say, 'I am rich, and have gotten riches, and have need of nothing;' and don't know that you are the wretched one, miserable, poor, blind, and naked;

chokri: I npo suna melü thü keva khriyi node kepo, side n kemethu mipo ngo hite; n mhü kenhü ketsü kha kenhüyite, side no mhango yite.
english: I counsel you to buy from me gold refined by fire, that you may become rich; and white garments, that you may clothe yourself, and that the shame of your nakedness may not be revealed; and eye salve to anoint your eyes, that you may see.

chokri: I khrü ketsüko lekhu süyo, m methi süyo; n nüsai m rhürha yite, nlü kede yite.
english: As many as I love, I reprove and chasten. Be zealous therefore, and repent.

chokri: Hihe, I cekha ce thade cekha ketu bayo; Mhace lami afü sede cekha khri sü lize, I pücelü lüto side püpo azü hi m I püzü hi to.
english: Behold, I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears my voice and opens the door, then I will come in to him, and will dine with him, and he with me.

chokri: Thakeyimi I kedebalü püpo bato, I pfü keyibi de Apo kedebalü ba keyi bi.
english: He who overcomes, I will give to him to sit down with me on my throne, as I also overcame, and sat down with my Father on his throne.

chokri: Pü uni keneo po reni yite, Rüpü kehuce kepofü.
english: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the assemblies."

chokri: Hisa I pe süri, hihe, cekha pü tüyo khri mba: Thefüpü seri thecü kefü fü bide acepo; Hice pheri te, hisa vori ketoko pü n mhüngo thi süto.
english: After these things I looked and saw a door opened in heaven, and the first voice that I heard, like a trumpet speaking with me, was one saying, "Come up here, and I will show you the things which must happen after this."

chokri: Mu sizisü metha I rüpü lü bata; m hihe, tüyo kedeba pü ba, mipü süyo ba.
english: Immediately I was in the Spirit. Behold, there was a throne set in heaven, and one sitting on the throne

chokri: Mu püngopü ketsü umakerü (jasper mu carnelian) ko bi; füsü pü kedeba whipü tha, pükhüko ketsü uma kerü (emerald) bi. ‘Mehimi 24 ko’
english: that looked like a jasper stone and a sardius. There was a rainbow around the throne, like an emerald to look at.

chokri: Kedeba khüko theba 24 ba, mu theba 24 kolü mehimi 24 baba, füne kemengakhi; uko pio kede pira suna pü ba.
english: Around the throne were twenty-four thrones. On the thrones were twenty-four elders sitting, dressed in white garments, with crowns of gold on their heads.

chokri: M kedebao yo no tüsü metha kri ketsü füphra prari; metobü thüna kedebao mhüjü lü ba; Jihova rüpüko.
english: Out of the throne proceed lightnings, sounds, and thunders. There were seven lamps of fire burning before his throne, which are the seven Spirits of God.

chokri: M kedeba mhü jülü khriva kezhopüba ketsüthü gabi; kedeba metsulü mu pü kewhiko khonu da umhü ujüco usaco metu tsü.
english: Before the throne was something like a sea of glass, similar to crystal. In the midst of the throne, and around the throne were four living creatures full of eyes before and behind.

chokri: Khonu kerao losha bi, khonu kenao metho nu bi, khonu süo thüma zü bi, m khonu dao yode prükezü bi.
english: The first creature was like a lion, and the second creature like a calf, and the third creature had a face like a man, and the fourth was like a flying eagle.

chokri: M khonu dako usi shurürüba; tüso tüzü relü yomo, de pochele tsü, mesa, mesa, mesa, Niepo. Jihova kekuo voketa, tsüdo, hisa vori ketoo.
english: The four living creatures, each one of them having six wings, are full of eyes around about and within. They have no rest day and night, saying, "Holy, holy, holy, holy, holy, holy, holy, holy, holy is the Lord God, the Almighty, who was and who is and who is to come!"

chokri: Khonuko thethsu therho, zapozale, m kemeza khasü, kedebayo kebao, hüketa kechothe kedeo tsüsü.
english: When the living creatures give glory, honor, and thanks to him who sits on the throne, to him who lives forever and ever,

chokri: Pethi mehi 24 ko züre tsü kedebayo kebao reshü ta, kechothe rhüketao reshüta, uko kedepirako thüpü kedeba mhüjülü sü de
english: the twenty-four elders fall down before him who sits on the throne, and worship him who lives forever and ever, and throw their crowns before the throne, saying,

chokri: Poti, Niepoo, no kraküyio, thethsu therho, keku ngokezüo: mhatüko nothi kesüla, n medo nnüko tsüriba mo no thisü.
english: "Worthy are you, our Lord and God, the Holy One, to receive the glory, the honor, and the power, for you created all things, and because of your desire they existed, and were created!"

chokri: Kedebayo kebao püzaco lesida pü lüri m püsaco ri tho pü mba mohor pü tsü thüna pü mba I ngo.
english: I saw, in the right hand of him who sat on the throne, a book written inside and outside, sealed shut with seven seals.

chokri: M tüyochoyimi kepfü jüpo meto shüde po, sopü lesidao lha süba, mu mohorko phrü sü ketola.
english: I saw a mighty angel proclaiming with a loud voice, "Who is worthy to open the book, and to break its seals?"

chokri: Tükhro thüma püri dita, a jüyoridi, m ajü khroridi.
english: No one in heaven above, or on the earth, or under the earth, was able to open the book, or to look in it.

chokri: M I kra shüta, kekrelamoli mipüri lesida süo phrü keshü dita mori süo peyi keve bamota.
english: And I wept much, because no one was found worthy to open the book, or to look in it.

chokri: Mehiko mipü acepode, krahite, kekrelamori Jewmi Losha, David me, phrü keve thiyite; lesida süo mu mohor kevü thünako pha phü sü va to.
english: One of the elders said to me, "Don't weep. Behold, the Lion who is of the tribe of Judah, the Root of David, has overcome; he who opens the book and its seven seals."

chokri: M I Mhango tsü, hihe, kedeba metsulü, khonu dako dolü, mehi 24 ko dolü teko pü dokhri kevabi, uka thüna umhü thena, Jihova Rüpü thenako ketsü cejü metülü süva.
english: I saw in the midst of the throne and of the four living creatures, and in the midst of the elders, a Lamb standing, as though it had been slain, having seven horns, and seven eyes, which are the seven Spirits of God, sent out into all the earth.

chokri: M pü ta süde phe kedebayo kebao be püzaco lesidao püyi.
english: Then he came, and he took it out of the right hand of him who sat on the throne.

chokri: Pü lesidao pü süri pethihi mi 24 ko zürü tsü teko nuo kelüta, lilü (harp) pü m süna khu urükethenyü kethsu thitsü kemesami kecho.
english: Now when he had taken the book, the four living creatures and the twenty-four elders fell down before the Lamb, each one having a harp, and golden bowls full of incense, which are the prayers of the saints.

chokri: M uko tsale kesa thita, uco, no lesida hayi kezüo zo, lesida m mohor phrü keshü-o kekrelamori n dokhri va hako kelapü therao tsükesüla uza pü shuye metü, ujü kekreti metü, thema kro kekre keti, shuye kekreti metü;
english: They sang a new song, saying, "You are worthy to take the book, And to open its seals: For you were killed, And bought us for God with your blood, Out of every tribe, language, people, and nation,

chokri: M hako thipü Jihova belü kedemi, pethi kezho, thevomi thi sü, mhako cejülüde ta to.
english: And made them kings and priests to our God, And they reign on earth."

chokri: M I ngoketsü, tüyochoyimi kedebayo kebako, khonuko m pethimehiko; phri süri, nye keri, va nye keri, nye ketsü nye kekro.
english: I saw, and I heard something like a voice of many angels around the throne, the living creatures, and the elders; and the number of them was ten thousands of ten thousands, and thousands of thousands;

chokri: Se mutode poti, rhokezü-o teko dokhrikevao keku pü ketolü cene, mhase, kemeco, thürho, zapozale, m thejo.
english: saying with a loud voice, "Worthy is the Lamb who has been killed to receive the power, wealth, wisdom, strength, honor, glory, and blessing!"

chokri: Mu khunu tülü ketako, cetako, cejülü ketako, cejü khroketako, m jülü ketako mu sülü ketako metü, I se tsü zapozale, keku, kedebayo kebao po püte mu tekonuo yo kechothe.
english: I heard every created thing which is in heaven, on the earth, under the earth, on the sea, and everything in them, saying, "To him who sits on the throne, and to the Lamb be the blessing, the honor, the glory, and the dominion, forever and ever! Amen!"

chokri: M khonu 4 ko pode, Amen sizite. Pethi mehimi 24 ko zürütsü kechothe rhü ketao reshüta.
english: The four living creatures said, "Amen!" The elders fell down and worshiped.

chokri: Tekonuo mohor zhü kemeta phrü kesü I ngo, mu thetsü fü bi se, khonu dako mipu pode, “vori pete,”
english: I saw that the Lamb opened one of the seven seals, and I heard one of the four living creatures saying, as with a voice of thunder, "Come and see!"

chokri: M I ngoti, gura kekropü, püyo ketao lice pü ba; kedepira pü pütsüsü; to mi meni m pfü keto la ta prata.
english: And behold, a white horse, and he who sat on it had a bow. A crown was given to him, and he came forth conquering, and to conquer.

chokri: Pü mohor kevü kenao phrü sü, siri khonu kenao poti, “vori pete” sitsü I se.
english: When he opened the second seal, I heard the second living creature saying, "Come!"

chokri: Gura kekre pü mere de ta prata; cejü lü kezükeve pü tata ketola keku püyo ketao sü sü, m uko hunehu dokhri node, zevo kezhopü kha pütsü sü.
english: Another came forth, a red horse. To him who sat on it was given power to take peace from the earth, and that they should kill one another. There was given to him a great sword.

chokri: Pü mohor 3-o phrü süri khonu 3-o pode ace “hice vori pete” sitsü se, a kengo ce, gura ketüpü süyo ketao mha meshi mede ketsü khu püta.
english: When he opened the third seal, I heard the third living creature saying, "Come and see!" And behold, a black horse, and he who sat on it had a balance in his hand.

chokri: Khonu dako dolü mhafü pü se, “ata (telha) Medo ketsü presa pü, chü rhasü presa pü; tirü mu hezo pü keho thi va hite,”
english: I heard a voice in the midst of the four living creatures saying, "A choenix of wheat for a denarius, and three choenix of barley for a denarius! Don't damage the oil and the wine!"

chokri: Pü mohor dao phrü süri khonu dao mha kepo I se, “vori pete.”
english: When he opened the fourth seal, I heard the fourth living creature saying, "Come and see!"

chokri: I Meho sü, gura petsü pü; mipü püyo kebao za kesa mu meza, ni püa ta. M keku cejü zada pü pü tsüsü, zecho pü dokhri ketola, khümeri, m kesa, cefü lü khonuko.
english: And behold, a pale horse, and he who sat on it, his name was Death. Hades followed with him. Authority over one fourth of the earth, to kill with the sword, with famine, with death, and by the wild animals of the earth was given to him.

chokri: Pü mohor pü ngu phrüsü, A kengo kereshü ba khro Jihova jüla mipo u dokhri ke vako rüpü sülaba, uko süo zhopo kola;
english: When he opened the fifth seal, I saw underneath the altar the souls of those who had been killed for the Word of God, and for the testimony of the Lamb which they had.

chokri: Uko füphra meto shude poti, “Dithe chota, O Niepo, mesa mu kethozo tsüo; no hako za khüpo sü motame cejü lü hü kebako yo?”
english: They cried with a loud voice, saying, "How long, Master, the holy and true, until you judge and avenge our blood on those who dwell on the earth?"

chokri: Fü kekropü uko tsüsü; mu posüte, uko ce, ukopo dopü relü ba no zita, ukezümiko, mu usazüjürako ri dokhri pü uko bi ba zo tsü la, popü kemetako thi tsoyi ketola.
english: A long white robe was given to each of them. They were told that they should rest yet for a while, until their fellow servants and their brothers, who would also be killed even as they were, should complete their course.

chokri: Mohor shurüo phrü kesü I ngo, siri hihe, cece süphita; nace zü tü müka thepitha fü bita, khri thüza bita.
english: I saw when he opened the sixth seal, and there was a great earthquake. The sun became black as sackcloth made of hair, and the whole moon became as blood.

chokri: Tüyo thenyüko n ra cejü tsü ta, chüdüse pü tü kemolü nra ketabi, tükhra kerü po pü hüra keva bi ta.
english: The stars of the sky fell to the earth, like a fig tree dropping its unripe figs when it is shaken by a great wind.

chokri: Tü rülo lesi thsü kezi kevabi, cejütuko mu rethitso kemoko utho uthi lü ba mo ta.
english: The sky was removed like a scroll when it is rolled up. Every mountain and island were moved out of their places.

chokri: Cejü kedemiko, thüma kezhoko, kenemiko, thipahe kezhoko, thüma kekuko, thejümi ri, mali miri tavo cejü khü kolü mu ketsü do kolü cejütu doko lü resü to.
english: The kings of the earth, the princes, the commanding officers, the rich, the strong, and every slave and free person, hid themselves in the caves and in the rocks of the mountains.

chokri: Cejütu mu tsüroko cepode, “Ta tsü ha kra ta te de hapo kede bayo kebao mhüjülü resüta te,
english: They told the mountains and the rocks, "Fall on us, and hide us from the face of him who sits on the throne, and from the wrath of the Lamb,

chokri: mu lekhu tüso vorite; sopü pümhüjülü thayi veta?”
english: for the great day of his wrath has come; and who is able to stand?"

chokri: M I hisa lü ngo ketsü tüyochoyimi da cejü kü da tha, tükhra da cejülü kebako püba, tükhra po cejülü khra sa mota, mori jü kezho lü ri, mori süboyo ri.
english: After this, I saw four angels standing at the four corners of the earth, holding the four winds of the earth, so that no wind would blow on the earth, or on the sea, or on any tree.

chokri: M tüyochoyimi kekrepü nathoco kirizü, rhüketa Jihova mohor püde; füphra meto shude tüyochoyimi da kocepoti, uko po cejü kezhoko methi takebako.
english: I saw another angel ascend from the sunrise, having the seal of the living God. He cried with a loud voice to the four angels to whom it was given to harm the earth and the sea,

chokri: Cejü mu jü kezhoko methi hite, sü ri, Jihova yithomiko utükhalü mohor vüyi kemothe,
english: saying, "Don't harm the earth, neither the sea, nor the trees, until we have sealed the bondservants of our God on their foreheads!"

chokri: I se keti, mohor vü keyiko phri kesü 144000 Jihova choyimiko Israel lü.
english: I heard the number of those who were sealed, one hundred forty-four thousand, sealed out of every tribe of the children of Israel:

chokri: Judah shuye lü mi nye keri kena. Reuben shuye lünye keri kena. Gad shuye lü mi nye keri kena.
english: Of the tribe of Judah were sealed twelve thousand, Of the tribe of Reuben twelve thousand, Of the tribe of Gad twelve thousand,

chokri: Asher shuyelü mi nye keri kena. Naphtali shuyi lü mi nye keri kena. Manasseh shuye lü mi nye keri kena.
english: Of the tribe of Asher twelve thousand, Of the tribe of Naphtali twelve thousand, Of the tribe of Manasseh twelve thousand,

chokri: Simon shuye lü mi nye keri kena. Levi shuye lü mi keri kena. Issachar shuye lü mi nye keri kena.
english: Of the tribe of Simeon twelve thousand, Of the tribe of Levi twelve thousand, Of the tribe of Issachar twelve thousand,

chokri: Zabulun shuye lü mi nye keri kena. Joseph shuyelü mi nye keri kena. Benjamin shuyelü mi nye keri kena, hiko mohor vüyi.
english: Of the tribe of Zebulun twelve thousand, Of the tribe of Joseph twelve thousand, Of the tribe of Benjamin were sealed twelve thousand.

chokri: Hisa I ngo tsü, hihe, makro krode, mipüri phri tsoyi keho, kede kekrekretsülü, shuye kekre ketsü, thüma kekre ketsü, cejü kekre ketsü kedeba mhüjülü fü kemega be, sini kemejo (Palm) ni ube lü tha.
english: After these things I looked, and behold, a great multitude, which no man could number, out of every nation and of all tribes, peoples, and languages, standing before the throne and before the Lamb, dressed in white robes, with palm branches in their hands.

chokri: Uko füphra meto de poti, “kelakeyi sü uko Rüo zo, kedeba lü kebao, tekonuo.”
english: They cried with a loud voice, saying, "Salvation be to our God, who sits on the throne, and to the Lamb!"

chokri: M tüyo choyimiko kedeba khü whi pfüba, pethi mehiko, mu khonu dako uko rüzü tsü Jihova reshüta.
english: All the angels were standing around the throne, the elders, and the four living creatures; and they fell on their faces before his throne, and worshiped God,

chokri: Uko pode, “Amen, thejokepü, zapozale, mhase, Kemeza khakesü, therho, keku, kemeco matüko uko Rüo zhü kechothe vo kechothe ketso, Amen;”
english: saying, "Amen! Blessing, glory, wisdom, thanksgiving, honor, power, and might, be to our God forever and ever! Amen."

chokri: M pethi pü a cepode, “kede füne kemega khi kebako hi puco dipü? Süsa uko kipüce voria?”
english: One of the elders answered, saying to me, "These who are arrayed in white robes, who are they, and from where did they come?"

chokri: M I püce poti, “Kezhoo, no se batho.” Pü a ce pode, “Thüma hikopo kemezhe shutsü thethilü vori, uko füneko tekonu zalü khrü kemesa kevako.”
english: I told him, "My lord, you know." He said to me, "These are those who came out of the great tribulation. They washed their robes, and made them white in the Lamb's blood.

chokri: Süla uko Jihova kedeba mhüjü tha, de tüso tüzü metülü kereshücelü pü choyi thi ba yo; mu kedebayo kebao hiko dolü hü hü yo.
english: Therefore they are before the throne of God, they serve him day and night in his temple. He who sits on the throne will spread his tent over them.

chokri: Uko theri meri saho, nace kethi mu pü keve pü uko va saho.
english: They will never be hungry, neither thirsty any more; neither will the sun beat on them, nor any heat;

chokri: Kekrelamori tekonu kedeba metsulü kebao uko vathi to, m ukozü (Chotha) rhü keta jüri lüvoto, Jihova uko mhüjüko shü meso vato uko mhükoyo.
english: for the Lamb who is in the midst of the throne shepherds them, and leads them to springs of waters of life. And God will wipe away every tear from their eyes."

chokri: Pü mohor thünao phrü sü, süce bavüdo ketüpü kemekre zü bata.
english: When he opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.

chokri: A kengo, tüyochoyi thüna Jihova kedeba mhüjü thatha; thecü thüna pü uko tsüsü.
english: I saw the seven angels who stand before God, and seven trumpets were given to them.

chokri: M tüyochoyimi kekrepü voride kereshüba ce thata, süna fü kethüzhü; m mharü kethenyü kekro pü pü tsüsü, side püpo kemesümi kecho pü suna kereshüba yo kedeba mhüjü keba yo reshü thi no sü.
english: Another angel came and stood over the altar, having a golden censer. Much incense was given to him, that he should add it to the prayers of all the saints on the golden altar which was before the throne.

chokri: M mharü kethenyü mekho kemesako kechoko tüyochoyio belü kho Jihova mhüjü lü khota.
english: The smoke of the incense, with the prayers of the saints, went up before God out of the angel's hand.

chokri: Tüyochoyio me Kereshübayo keba pü mekhu lü süde kehüpü cejü süva; sülü füphra, tüsü, methakri, m cecesü.
english: The angel took the censer, and he filled it with the fire of the altar, and threw it on the earth. There followed thunders, sounds, lightnings, and an earthquake.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi thünako thecü thüna khi füsü keto la dojü pü bata.
english: The seven angels who had the seven trumpets prepared themselves to sound.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi kerao thecü fü sü, siri phrü, meko thüza sa kerede kehüpü cejü sü va; sü zasü zapü sata, m nha kemejo metü thü va.
english: The first sounded, and there followed hail and fire, mixed with blood, and they were thrown to the earth. One third of the earth was burnt up, and one third of the trees were burnt up, and all green grass was burnt up.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi kenao thecü füsü, ri cejütu meto bi kehüpü jülü süva, süsa jükezho zasü zapü thüza meveta.
english: The second angel sounded, and something like a great burning mountain was thrown into the sea. One third of the sea became blood,

chokri: Siri jü kezho hü keta khonuko sata; ru zasü zapü mekava.
english: and one third of the living creatures which were in the sea died. One third of the ships were destroyed.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi süo thecüfüsü siri thenyü kezhopü metopü metobü kezhopü bi retu kerü zasü zapülü tsü ta, mu jüri lüko tsüta.
english: The third angel sounded, and a great star fell from the sky, burning like a torch, and it fell on one third of the rivers, and on the springs of the waters.

chokri: Thenyü sü za khu; jüko zasü zapü khu mezü mühata, jü kekhu la thüma kekro sata, kekrelamori jüko thipü khumezü ketala.
english: The name of the star is called "Wormwood." One third of the waters became wormwood. Many people died from the waters, because they were made bitter.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi dao thecü fü süri nace zasü zapü vüsü, khri zasü zapüri sa, mu thenyü zasü zapü; süko meü zasü zapü zübü ta, tüso zasü zapü va mota, mu tüzü ri sübi.
english: The fourth angel sounded, and one third of the sun was struck, and one third of the moon, and one third of the stars; so that one third of them would be darkened, and the day wouldn't shine for one third of it, and the night in the same way.

chokri: A kengo, tüyo choyimi pü tü metsu lü prüde füphrameto ti, “lüzhe, lüzhe, lüzhe cejü kehü miko püco tüyochoyimi kekre sü thecü füsa sü ketola.”
english: I saw, and I heard an eagle, flying in mid heaven, saying with a loud voice, "Woe! Woe! Woe for those who dwell on the earth, because of the other voices of the trumpets of the three angels, who are yet to sound!"

chokri: Tüyochoyi pünguo thecü füsü, I ngotsü thenyü pü tüyo no retu cejü tsüta, uthüla kede kece ce cabi pü pü tsü va.
english: The fifth angel sounded, and I saw a star from the sky which had fallen to the earth. The key to the pit of the abyss was given to him.

chokri: M pü uthüla kedi kece ce khri sü; mekho kece ce lü, methü kesü kezhopü mekho, nace mu tükhrako zübü ta mekho la.
english: He opened the pit of the abyss, and smoke went up out of the pit, like the smoke from a burning furnace. The sun and the air were darkened because of the smoke from the pit.

chokri: Ko mekholü prari ta cejüyo; kekupü uko tsü sü cejü lü seba tsü bi
english: Then out of the smoke came forth locusts on the earth, and power was given to them, as the scorpions of the earth have power.

chokri: M ukopo nha kemejo jü meshüva hi no uko ce posü, kemejo kekreko sheri, mori süko sheri, veli thema utükhalü mohor vü kemoko lebi.
english: They were told that they should not hurt the grass of the earth, neither any green thing, neither any tree, but only those people who don't have God's seal on their foreheads.

chokri: Uko dokhri va ho, veli uko methi meni tsü zoto tükhri püngu; seba thüma keyi tsü bi uko kemezheto.
english: They were given power not to kill them, but to torment them for five months. Their torment was like the torment of a scorpion, when it strikes a person.

chokri: M tüsozho hidoce hi thümako sata nyüsa de kesa phuto, veli kesa zü kesü motato; kesa sü ta keta la.
english: In those days people will seek death, and will in no way find it. They will desire to die, and death will flee from them.

chokri: Koko uhü gura therilü voketola dojüpü ketabi; uko piyo suna kedepirabi, uko zü pepü thüma zübi
english: The shapes of the locusts were like horses prepared for war. On their heads were something like golden crowns, and their faces were like people's faces.

chokri: Uko pitha thenomi pitha bi, uko huko Losha huko bi
english: They had hair like women's hair, and their teeth were like those of lions.

chokri: M uko meyiko thegi pü kethi yi bizo; mu uko gura gari kekro kehu keta pü bi usiko fü therilüvo kezübi.
english: They had breastplates, like breastplates of iron. The sound of their wings was like the sound of chariots, or of many horses rushing to war.

chokri: Umeko seba mebi, umeyo ukeyi tsü ta; ukopo tükhri püngu thüma methi to.
english: They have tails like those of scorpions, and stings. In their tails they have power to harm men for five months.

chokri: M kedepü uko züta, tüyochoyimi pü thüla kedi kece ce kefü-o, Hebrew mizülü püza “Abaddon” veli a Greekmi jülü püza “Apollyon.”
english: They have over them as king the angel of the abyss. His name in Hebrew is "Abaddon," but in Greek, he has the name "Apollyon."

chokri: Lüzhe pü tata, lüzhe kekre kena la vori sala.
english: The first woe is past. Behold, there are still two woes coming after this.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi shurüo thecü füsü m I setsü thefüpü Jihova mhüjülü suna kereshübayo uka dao prari.
english: The sixth angel sounded. I heard a voice from the horns of the golden altar which is before God,

chokri: Tüyochoyi shorüo cepode thecü khikeba-o tüyochoyimi dako Euphrates lü phapü kemütako hesü vate.
english: saying to the sixth angel who had one trumpet, "Free the four angels who are bound at the great river Euphrates!"

chokri: Muko hesüva, uko thüma zasühzapü dokhri ketola dojüpü prata, bavüdopü, tüsozhopü, tükhripü, m tütsepü.
english: The four angels were freed who had been prepared for that hour and day and month and year, so that they might kill one third of mankind.

chokri: Pü maphri million kra kena; I uko piphri se.
english: The number of the armies of the horsemen was two hundred million. I heard the number of them.

chokri: I zümholü uko gurakongo sükoyo ketakori, uko yikoyo mepüta, jacinth metsa; gura piko losha pikobi; uko ta kolü me, mekho, mu metsa prari.
english: Thus I saw the horses in the vision, and those who sat on them, having breastplates of fiery red, hyacinth blue, and sulfur yellow; and the heads of lions. Out of their mouths proceed fire, smoke, and sulfur.

chokri: Hizi ketala thüma zasühzapü sata, meyo, mekho mu metsayo, uko talü prari ta.
english: By these three plagues were one third of mankind killed: by the fire, the smoke, and the sulfur, which proceeded out of their mouths.

chokri: Uko keku uko talü ba, uko meyoba; uko meyo tenhi bi mu upi ba mha methi ketola.
english: For the power of the horses is in their mouths, and in their tails. For their tails are like serpents, and have heads, and with them they harm.

chokri: Thüma kekreko dokhri vamo tüso hilü, veli ukothelü redemo, ukobe mhathoko, uko therükeshüko, pitol pü kethiko, ketsüzhüko, süpü kethiko; süko mhangoriyomo, se ri yomo mori tariyomo.
english: The rest of mankind, who were not killed with these plagues, didn't repent of the works of their hands, that they wouldn't worship demons, and the idols of gold, and of silver, and of brass, and of stone, and of wood; which can neither see, nor hear, nor walk.

chokri: Mori uko kedokhri lüko uko lü kedeyi mo, mori thenyü ketikolü, mori keregü kerezhü kolü, mori uko rügo kolü ri.
english: They didn't repent of their murders, nor of their sorceries, nor of their sexual immorality, nor of their thefts.

chokri: Akengo, tüyochoyimi kekupü tüyo vori, kemhü pü pü rütsothi; füsü püpiyota, püzü nace kevebi, püphezini sü meto kebabi.
english: I saw a mighty angel coming down out of the sky, clothed with a cloud. A rainbow was on his head. His face was like the sun, and his feet like pillars of fire.

chokri: M pübelü lesida ketsüpü hapüba; puphe püzacopü jükezholüsü, püvecopü cejü kedü püba.
english: He had in his hand a little open book. He set his right foot on the sea, and his left on the land.

chokri: Pü se meto de, losha kerüfü bi; pü sekesü sa tüsüfü thüna prari.
english: He cried with a loud voice, as a lion roars. When he cried, the seven thunders uttered their voices.

chokri: M tüsü thünako ufü thi kesüsa, I süko thoto lesü, I füphrapü tüyo ace pode, mohor vüpü mbade tüsü thünako, tsüko tho hite.
english: When the seven thunders sounded, I was about to write; but I heard a voice from the sky saying, "Seal up the things which the seven thunders said, and don't write them."

chokri: Tüyochoyi I ngokeba püphepü jü mu cejü niyo thade pübe chopü tü peba.
english: The angel who I saw standing on the sea and on the land lifted up his right hand to the sky,

chokri: M rhü keta kechotheo ce reshu, tü thikesüo mha sülü keba metü, cejü m mha sülü keba metü, mu jükezho mha sülü keta metü pütüko bacho samo keta la.
english: and swore by him who lives forever and ever, who created heaven and the things that are in it, the earth and the things that are in it, and the sea and the things that are in it, that there will no longer be delay,

chokri: Veli tüsozhoko tüyochoyi thünao thecü füsüketo, Jihova mhakekhri ketsü, thitsü tso süzü, pü choyi kethimi mu saju kepoko ce popü kemeta bi.
english: but in the days of the voice of the seventh angel, when he is about to sound, then the mystery of God is finished, as he declared to his servants, the prophets.

chokri: Füphrapü tüyo ace jüpode, “Taphe lesida ketsüo püyite, hapü mba tsüo, tüyochoyio belü, jü mu cejü ni lütha kethao.”
english: The voice which I heard from heaven, again speaking with me, said, "Go, take the book which is open in the hand of the angel who stands on the sea and on the land."

chokri: I ta tüyochoyio ce phede püce poti, lesida ketsüo kha atsü süte. Siri pü pode, Püyite, deti süte; tsüo tikeyi san vade khu mezü tato, veli n talü nyü pü mefijü kenyü thi tato.
english: I went to the angel, telling him to give me the little book. He said to me, "Take it, and eat it up. It will make your stomach bitter, but in your mouth it will be as sweet as honey."

chokri: I lesida süo tüyochoyio belü püyi, de süo ti sü süo, nyü pü mefijü kenyü bita a mülü; süo ti mu Metha a vadelü khumezü ta.
english: I took the little book out of the angel's hand, and ate it up. It was as sweet as honey in my mouth. When I had eaten it, my stomach was made bitter.

chokri: Pü ace pode, sajü posalato thüma kekro mhüjü, shuyeko mhüjülü, ujü kekre ketsüko mhüjülü mu kedemiko mhüjülü.
english: They told me, "You must prophesy again over many peoples, nations, languages, and kings."

chokri: Tekhrü thegi bi tsü pü kha atsü sü, tüyochoyio acepode, ‘Tosü de Jihova kereshüce mede süte. Mu kereshüba sülü reshüthi kebako ri.’
english: A reed like a rod was given to me. Someone said, "Rise, and measure God's temple, and the altar, and those who worship in it.

chokri: Veli jüngo keti tsü ba khü chozuko kereshüce sa mede hite; kemesa nade mipo tükhri 42 kedü vato.
english: Leave out the court which is outside of the temple, and don't measure it, for it has been given to the gentiles. They will tread the holy city under foot for forty-two months.

chokri: I keku pü a zhopomi kena tsü süto, de uni zho 1260 saju poto, uni gakhrofü beto.
english: I will give power to my two witnesses, and they will prophesy one thousand two hundred sixty days, clothed in sackcloth."

chokri: Hini olive sü kena mu metosü cejülü rüo mhüjülü thatha.
english: These are the two olive trees and the two lampstands, standing before the Lord of the earth.

chokri: Mhace thüma kehopüri süko meshulize mi püta lü prari ta, de pü ngomumiko mezota; ma nthace thüma humi süko meka methi to lize hihi bide süko dokhri vata.
english: If anyone desires to harm them, fire proceeds out of their mouth and devours their enemies. If anyone desires to harm them, he must be killed in this way.

chokri: Uni tü kha va keve keku ba, uni saju po keba ce türü mota keto, m uni keku jü pü thüza thi va keve, mu thüso (tüsa) pü cejü methi keto tsü kenu thiva keve uni keku ba.
english: These have the power to shut up the sky, that it may not rain during the days of their prophecy. They have power over the waters, to turn them into blood, and to strike the earth with every plague, as often as they desire.

chokri: Uni zhopo tso ketasa khonu uthüla kedice lü paride unizü theri thito, uni meni vato de dokhri vato.
english: When they have finished their testimony, the beast that comes up out of the abyss will make war with them, and overcome them, and kill them.

chokri: Uni mo khapü nadeo lü chodelü zütato, rüpü lü zatho Sodom mu Egypt, hethi sülü uko Nie-o ri vüva.
english: Their dead bodies will be in the street of the great city, which spiritually is called Sodom and Egypt, where also their Lord was crucified.

chokri: Thüma kekrekre ketsü, shuye kekrekre keti, ujü kekre ketiko, kedekekre ketiko zhosü m pütsü, uni mo ngoto, uni mo pü mhakhre lü khrü vato.
english: From among the peoples, tribes, languages, and nations people will look at their dead bodies for three and a half days, and will not allow their dead bodies to be laid in a tomb.

chokri: M cejülü kehümiko unüphito unila, m ukenüla mhakhapü ketsü kezato; kekrelamori unila cejülü kehümiko kemezhe totila.
english: Those who dwell on the earth rejoice over them, and they will be glad. They will give gifts to one another, because these two prophets tormented those who dwell on the earth.

chokri: Zhosü sa Jihova Rüpü kerhü uniyo lü tade uni tosü uphepü thata; kemüche kezho thüma sükengoko yo voto.
english: After the three and a half days, the breath of life from God entered into them, and they stood on their feet. Great fear fell on those who saw them.

chokri: Uni tüyo mafüpü seti, “Hice khorite” M uni kemhüyo ta tüyo khota; uni ngomumiko süo ngo.
english: I heard a loud voice from heaven saying to them, "Come up here!" They went up into heaven in the cloud, and their enemies saw them.

chokri: Bavüdo sülü cece sü mezho shuta, nade zakeri zapü retuta, cece sütsü thüma nyethüna sata; müha küyiko mpe shuta, de tüyo keta Jihova zapo zale tho chu ta.
english: In that day there was a great earthquake, and a tenth of the city fell. Seven thousand people were killed in the earthquake, and the rest were terrified, and gave glory to the God of heaven.

chokri: Lüzhe kenao vota ri hihe lüzhe süo mhai zi vorita.
english: The second woe is past. Behold, the third woe comes quickly.

chokri: Tüyochoyi thünao thecü füsü; süce tüyo mhafü kekro seta, poti, cejülü kedekosü u niepoo kederüve thite, pü Khrista ri; pü kechothe detato.
english: The seventh angel sounded, and great voices in heaven followed, saying, "The kingdom of the world has become the Kingdom of our Lord, and of his Christ. He will reign forever and ever!"

chokri: Mehimi 24 ko uzü nyekü tsü pü reshü ta uko bayi bade, Jihova mhüjü lü.
english: The twenty-four elders, who sit on their thrones before God's throne, fell on their faces and worshiped God,

chokri: Uko pode, “Hako kemüza khapü ntsü süzü we O! Niepoo Jihova kekuo, tsü kebao, hijü vo ketao mu hisa vori ketoo; kekrelamori no keku püyite m kede thite.”
english: saying: "We give you thanks, Lord God, the Almighty, the one who is and who was; because you have taken your great power, and reigned.

chokri: M kedekekre tsüko unü mota, n lekhu vorite, kesamiko ne keti keto bate, no zhokhro pü n saju kepo miko tsü keto, kemesami kori, nza meprü ketakori, kezho ketsü metü; cejü müka ketoko mekava ketola.
english: The nations were angry, and your wrath came, as did the time for the dead to be judged, and to give your bondservants the prophets, their reward, as well as to the saints, and those who fear your name, to the small and the great; and to destroy those who destroy the earth."

chokri: Tüyo Jihova kereshüce khrisü, kereshücelü jütsü jükho fü ringo; sülü methoko kri, füphrako, tüsüko m cece sü tsüko süsa phrü kri tsü koba.
english: God's temple that is in heaven was opened, and the ark of the Lord's covenant was seen in his temple. Lightnings, sounds, thunders, an earthquake, and great hail followed.

chokri: Tüyo mha ungo keti pari; thenomipü nace pü pü keretso, khri pü phe khroba, thenyü kerikena pü pükede pira thi;
english: A great sign was seen in heaven: a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and on her head a crown of twelve stars.

chokri: Thenopü nunu vathi la kratha, menu ketola.
english: She was with child. She cried out in pain, laboring to give birth.

chokri: Mhakekre ungo kethi la pari; hihe fükera kemere kezho pü, püyo upi thüna mu püka keri, kedepira thüna püta.
english: Another sign was seen in heaven. Behold, a great red dragon, having seven heads and ten horns, and on his heads seven crowns.

chokri: Püme pü tüyo thenyü zasüzapü püva, süko retu cejü tsüta; fükera sü thenopü mhüjü lü tha, thenopü pünu menu süo tüti ketola.
english: His tail drew one third of the stars of the sky, and threw them to the earth. The dragon stood before the woman who was about to give birth, so that when she gave birth he might devour her child.

chokri: Thenopü thepu nu pü menusü, thegi keku süde kederünako kekha ketola; pü nu zü tüyo khota Jihova kede balü.
english: She gave birth to a son, a male child, who is to rule all the nations with a rod of iron. Her child was caught up to God, and to his throne.

chokri: Thenopü ta rayho thi lü vota, Jihova püla thethi kesüpü kemüta, sülü tüsozho nyepü krakena m (heshurü) 1260 pü va thito.
english: The woman fled into the wilderness, where she has a place prepared by God, that there they may nourish her one thousand two hundred sixty days.

chokri: Tüyo theri thita; Michael mu pü jüyimiko fü kerao zü theri thi; fükera ri uko zü theri thi püjüyimi sade.
english: There was war in the sky. Michael and his angels made war on the dragon. The dragon and his angels made war.

chokri: Mipüri kuyi mo, veli tüyo uko thethi ngo samota.
english: They didn't prevail, neither was a place found for him any more in heaven.

chokri: Fükera kezhoo hu va, tenhi pethio püza therükesüo, Satan, cejü metü shu ketse ketao; pü hupü cejü süva, pü choyimiko kesa huva.
english: The great dragon was thrown down, the old serpent, he who is called the devil and Satan, the deceiver of the whole world. He was thrown down to the earth, and his angels were thrown down with him.

chokri: I tüyo mhafü kerekrü pü seri, poti, tsüo kelakeyi, mu keku, uko Rüo kede, pü kemeco, Khrista zhü; uko sazüjürako mejo ketayo hu ketuve, tüso tüzü metü lü uko mejo ketao.
english: I heard a loud voice in heaven, saying, "Now is come the salvation, the power, and the Kingdom of our God, and the authority of his Christ; for the accuser of our brothers has been thrown down, who accuses them before our God day and night.

chokri: M uko tekonu zalü kuyite, uko jü zhopo lüko; uko kesa ketso ukehü khrü mozo.
english: They overcame him because of the Lamb's blood, and because of the word of their testimony. They didn't love their life, even to death.

chokri: Süla tüyo kehümiko, neko nüyite, lüzhe cejü lü kehümiko mu jülü kehümiko, therü kesüo nekoce kirite, pü lü kereda pü de, kekrelamori pü se keti pütü do pü zo tila.
english: Therefore rejoice, heavens, and you who dwell in them. Woe to the earth and to the sea, because the devil has gone down to you, having great wrath, knowing that he has but a short time."

chokri: Fükera pü hupü cejü sü keva ngotila thenopü thepu menu kesüo meshu ta (methi menita)
english: When the dragon saw that he was thrown down to the earth, he persecuted the woman who gave birth to the male child.

chokri: Yode bide usi kena pü thenopü tsüsü, pü po prü rayho lü vota ketola, püthilü pütühu püva thi batato, pütüpü, m pütü ketüpü, tenhi mhüjü bato.
english: Two wings of the great eagle were given to the woman, that she might fly into the wilderness to her place, so that she might be nourished for a time, and times, and half a time, from the face of the serpent.

chokri: Tenhi talü jüde bi pü thenopüva, jüde po pü zu pü tata keto la.
english: The serpent spewed water out of his mouth after the woman like a river, that he might cause her to be carried away by the stream.

chokri: Cejü thenopü khrühi de püta mekusü jüde mezo yita, fükera püta meku kesüo.
english: The earth helped the woman, and the earth opened its mouth and swallowed up the river which the dragon spewed out of his mouth.

chokri: Fükera thenopü yo pülü redata, de pünu shu nuyekoyo mehakeyiko zü theri thita, Jihova jü kha kesü kezükoyo, m Jisu Khrista zhopoko yo.
english: The dragon grew angry with the woman, and went away to make war with the rest of her seed, who keep God's commandments and hold Jesus' testimony.

chokri: I jü kezho khü tesünyo yo tha ri khonu pü jü kezhoyo pari dengo, upi thüna, uka keri, mu uka koyo kedepira ba, püpi koyo theza zho shu ketsü ta.
english: Then I stood on the sand of the sea. I saw a beast coming up out of the sea, having ten horns and seven heads. On his horns were ten crowns, and on his heads, blasphemous names.

chokri: Khonu kengo süo tekho khorhü bi, püphe zi ni thega phezibi, püta Losha ta bi; fükera po ketsü kha pü tsü, pubari mu pü kemeco ri
english: The beast which I saw was like a leopard, and his feet were like those of a bear, and his mouth like the mouth of a lion. The dragon gave him his power, his throne, and great authority.

chokri: Püpi pü reza püde ta sata ketothi; pü reza ku menü tata, cejü metüko khonu sü ngo pü uko ngothi.
english: One of his heads looked like it had been wounded fatally. His fatal wound was healed, and the whole earth marveled at the beast.

chokri: Uko keku kha kesü fükera sü reshüta de potsü, “Sopü no khonu hio biyita”? “Sopüno püzü theri thiyi veta?”
english: They worshiped the dragon, because he gave his authority to the beast, and they worshiped the beast, saying, "Who is like the beast? Who is able to make war with him?"

chokri: Pü talü mizhoshüyi keve mu mha kezho poyi keve pü pü tsüsü; keku pütsü kesü tekhri hedanküna.
english: A mouth speaking great things and blasphemy was given to him. Authority to make war for forty-two months was given to him.

chokri: Püta tagapü Jihova zhoshü shüsü, püza thali ceti, pü kereshü ceri, tüyo kehümi kori.
english: He opened his mouth for blasphemy against God, to blaspheme his name, and his dwelling, those who dwell in heaven.

chokri: Püpo kemesami zü theri thi tota, uko meniva ketola; kede kekre ketiko pi, ujü kekre ketiko, mu kede shuyeko pi.
english: It was given to him to make war with the saints, and to overcome them. Authority over every tribe, people, language, and nation was given to him.

chokri: M cejülü kehü metü pü reshü tato, tekonu cejü thi süculü kerhülesidalü uza thoyi kemo metü.
english: All who dwell on the earth will worship him, everyone whose name has not been written from the foundation of the world in the book of life of the Lamb who has been killed.

chokri: Kehopüri mhace uni kebami po reni yite.
english: If anyone has an ear, let him hear.

chokri: Pü mitüpü thejü kethimi po mijü thitato; zecho pü mi kedokhrimi mipo zechopü pü dokhri tato. Hice kemesako sügüsühe tsü mu kemelü bato.
english: If anyone has captivity, he will go. If anyone is with the sword, he must be killed. Here is the endurance and the faith of the saints.

chokri: I khonu kekrepü cejüyo parizü ngo; Tekonu bi püka kena ba, m pükepo fükerabi.
english: I saw another beast coming up out of the earth. He had two horns like a lamb, and he spoke like a dragon.

chokri: Pü mhüjülü khonu bi kekujü metüpo dojü, cejülü kehü metüpo khonu kerao reshüta, pü rüzaku menü ketao.
english: He exercises all the authority of the first beast in his presence. He makes the earth and those who dwell in it to worship the first beast, whose fatal wound was healed.

chokri: M pü mha ungo ketsü thi, tüyori me po kirita, cejülü, thümako kengo ce.
english: He performs great signs, even making fire come down out of the sky to the earth in the sight of people.

chokri: Mha ungo keti thi ketala cejü kehümiko kedo khonu mhüjülü pü keku kene thisü; de cejülü kehüko ce poti, ukopo khonu marhe thino sita, zecho khapü reza süde menü keta mu rhüta keto.
english: He deceives my own people who dwell on the earth because of the signs he was granted to do in front of the beast; saying to those who dwell on the earth, that they should make an image to the beast who had the sword wound and lived.

chokri: M pü keku pü khonu marhe rhekesüo po rhüyi keve thisü, marhe sü jüri poyive mu pü reshü kemomi dokhriva keto thisü.
english: It was given to him to give breath to it, to the image of the beast, that the image of the beast should both speak, and cause as many as wouldn't worship the image of the beast to be killed.

chokri: Pülano kezhokeni, kene kedi, mijümi ukekha kedimi, metüpo ube uzaco ukho thoyino zita moze utükhayo sheri.
