english: He causes all, the small and the great, the rich and the poor, and the free and the slave, to be given marks on their right hands, or on their foreheads;

chokri: Sizi thoyi kemomipo hethoheli thimori mhakhri zhu mo ketola, khonuo zari mori ukho yo sheri süyi moketo.
english: and that no one would be able to buy or to sell, unless he has that mark, the name of the beast or the number of his name.

chokri: Hicehi mhaseba, mhaseyi kevemi khonu mhaphri seyite, süsü thüma mhaphri, mu pu No lize 666.
english: Here is wisdom. He who has understanding, let him calculate the number of the beast, for it is the number of a man. His number is six hundred sixty-six.

chokri: Hihe, I pesüri Tekonupü Zion cejütuyo tha, m püzü kethako mi 144000, pü Poza thopü uko tükhayo ta.
english: I saw, and behold, the Lamb standing on Mount Zion, and with him a number, one hundred forty-four thousand, having his name, and the name of his Father, written on their foreheads.

chokri: Tüyo mhafü püse, jükekro fübi, tüsüfü kemüto pübi; libü “harp” kepüko tsale thi keba fübi.
english: I heard a sound from heaven, like the sound of many waters, and like the sound of a great thunder. The sound which I heard was like that of harpists playing on their harps.

chokri: Kedebao mhüjülü tsale kesafü bi uko, cheleba, khonu dako mhüjülü, pethi mehiko mhüjülü, thüma püri tsale süo seyi ho, uko mi 144000 kozo kemosa, uko cejü lü rhayi ketako.
english: They sing a new song before the throne, and before the four living creatures and the elders. No one could learn the song except the one hundred forty-four thousand, those who had been redeemed out of the earth.

chokri: Thüma hiko thenomi po uko merho va kemoko uko reli phosako, hiko tekonu kevoko lü vo ketsüko. Hiko thema dolü rhayi ketako, hiko Jihova mu tekonu rase kerathoko.
english: These are those who were not defiled with women, for they are virgins. These are those who follow the Lamb wherever he goes. These were redeemed by Jesus from among men, the first fruits to God and to the Lamb.

chokri: Uko talü mhakesu bako, uko Niepoo kedaba mhüjülü kekriketi ba mo.
english: In their mouth was found no lie, for they are blameless.

chokri: Tüyo choyimipü tümetsulü prüta dengo, cejülü kehümiko ce jüyikeve pü po to li ta; kede shuye metü, cejü kenemetü, m thüma kro kekre tsü metü.
english: I saw an angel flying in mid heaven, having an eternal Gospel to proclaim to those who dwell on the earth, and to every nation, tribe, language, and people.

chokri: Sede poti, “Jihova meprü yite, de zapozale püpütsüte; pü bavüdo mishe keti ketosü vorite, tüthi kesü te, cejü ri, jükezhori, mu jüri metüko thisü.”
english: He said with a loud voice, "Fear the Lord, and give him glory; for the hour of his judgment has come. Worship him who made the heaven, the earth, the sea, and the springs of waters!"

chokri: Süsü mejude tüyo choyimipü poti, Babylon retute, retute, rüna nadeo sü, kekrelamori shuye kede metüpo pü keregü kerezhü zokra de tekhu püte.
english: Another, a second angel, followed, saying, "Babylon the great has fallen, which has made all the nations to drink of the wine of the wrath of her sexual immorality."

chokri: Tüyo choyimi süo sü meji de pometo ti, thüma kehopüri khonu reshü pümarhe rifünu mu pütükhalü mori ubo lüri zasi khoko keto kepümi.
english: Another angel, a third, followed them, saying with a great voice, "If anyone worships the beast and his image, and receives a mark on his forehead, or on his hand,

chokri: Thüma sümi Jihova lekhu hezo krato, süo la pü ngokemetsü thi kesü, mepü pümethito, tüyochoyi kemesako mhüjülü melü metsa, m Tekonu mhüjülüri.
english: he also will drink of the wine of the wrath of God, which is prepared unmixed in the cup of his anger. He will be tormented with fire and sulfur in the presence of the holy angels, and in the presence of the Lamb.

chokri: Mekho süo kechothe methimeni bata: uko, sülü tüso tüzü kerelü dita, somi khonuo mu pü marha resu sheli, somi süo zasi uyo thpü sheli.
english: The smoke of their torment goes up forever and ever. They have no rest day and night, those who worship the beast and his image, and whoever receives the mark of his name.

chokri: Hice, kemesamiko sügüsühe bata: uko Jihova khakesüko zü m Jisu yo kemelü khi bata.
english: Here is the patience of the saints, those who keep the commandments of God, and the faith of Jesus."

chokri: Tüyo mhafüpü sevori acepoti, “Niepoo zalü saketako tha yovino rukotho:” sia, Rüpü poyo, “uko mhathokolü relü ta to, uko mhathoko uko meji ta to.”
english: I heard the voice from heaven saying, "Write, 'Blessed are the dead who die in the Lord from now on.'" "Yes," says the Spirit, "that they may rest from their labors; for their works follow with them."

chokri: I pesüri, hihe, kemhü kemegapü thüma Nu süyo tade ngo, püpiyo suna kede pira pita m pübelü zefü püta.
english: I looked, and behold, a white cloud; and on the cloud one sitting like a son of man, having on his head a golden crown, and in his hand a sharp sickle.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi kekrepü kereshücelü paride ngo de kemhü yo kebao ce pode, Zefünu pü rü süte nbelükeba-o: n po rüyi keto pütü vorite: cejü rüyi keto mü bate.
english: Another angel came out from the temple, crying with a loud voice to him who sat on the cloud, "Send forth your sickle, and reap; for the hour to reap has come; for the harvest of the earth is ripe!"

chokri: M kemhülü kebao pü zefüne khi cejüo rüsü, cejü side rüyita.
english: He who sat on the cloud thrust his sickle on the earth, and the earth was reaped.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi kekrepü tüyo kereshücelü pari, püri zefüne khita.
english: Another angel came out from the temple which is in heaven. He also had a sharp sickle.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi kekrepü tüyo kereshücelü pari me pi pü kekuba; püfüphra meto de zefünu kepüo cepoti, n zefünu pü cejü khubü se müba ketao thsu (chu) rüsüte, khubü seko müte.
english: Another angel came out from the altar, he who has power over fire, and he called with a great voice to him who had the sharp sickle, saying, "Send forth your sharp sickle, and gather the clusters of the vine of the earth, for the earth's grapes are fully ripe!"

chokri: Tüyochoyio pü zefüne pü cejüo rüyita, side cejü khubüseko kenguyi, de kehüpü Jihova lekhu tsada ketolü süva.
english: The angel thrust his sickle into the earth, and gathered the vintage of the earth, and threw it into the great winepress of the wrath of God.

chokri: Khubüse tsadapü hezo kethi bi nade khü co uko tsada va, siri hezo kethobü thüza krü parita, gura ta kepha ketso thü khorita, furlong nyepü de krashurü ketso thüvata (1600).
english: The winepress was trodden outside of the city, and blood came out from the winepress, even to the bridles of the horses, as far as one thousand six hundred stadia.

chokri: Tüyo zasi kekre pü pari, zho mu ungo thi, Tüyochoyimi thüna pari tüsa thüna khita kekrelamori Jihova lekhu sükolü thsu ta.
english: I saw another great and marvelous sign in the sky: seven angels having the seven last plagues, for in them God's wrath is finished.

chokri: I ngo keti, khriva jükezho bi me sükolü kesata; khonuo pi ku keta la, pümarheko pi ri kuyi, m zasi tho kepü kopiri kuyi m pü za thopü ketako piri kuyi, jü kezho khriva yo thade, Jihova libüko (harp) pü tha.
english: I saw something like a sea of glass mixed with fire, and those who overcame the beast, his image, and the number of his name, standing on the sea of glass, having harps of God.

chokri: Moses tsale Jihova choyio thi, tekonu tsale ri thi, n mhathoko zho mu ungozo, Niepoo therü kekuo; n choko mezi mu kethozo, no kemesako kedeo.
english: They sang the song of Moses, the servant of God, and the song of the Lamb, saying, "Great and marvelous are your works, Lord God, the Almighty; Righteous and true are your ways, you King of the nations.

chokri: Sopü n mpe mota O! Niepoo, uza po kemele mota? N lebi kemesazo; kedeshuye metü voride n mhüjü n reshü to; no mi mejo keto mesemüngo süte.
english: Who wouldn't fear you, Lord, And glorify your name? For you only are holy. For all the nations will come and worship before you. For your righteous acts have been revealed."

chokri: Süsa I pe süri, hihe, tüyo kereshüce lü zhopo khasü;
english: After these things I looked, and the temple of the tabernacle of the testimony in heaven was opened.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi thüna kereshüce lü pari, uko thepü thüna khita, sapütsafü (linen) kemesa be, uko suna pü uko khoro pha.
english: The seven angels who had the seven plagues came out, clothed with pure, bright linen, and wearing golden sashes around their breasts.

chokri: Khonu dako dolü mipü suna he pü tüyo choyi thünako tsüsü, sülü Jihova lekhu chuta, pü kechothe rhü ta yo.
english: One of the four living creatures gave to the seven angels seven golden bowls full of the wrath of God, who lives forever and ever.

chokri: Jihova zapozale mekho tho kereshüce sülü chu bata, pü kekuri mu mipüri sülü lü su ta, tüyochoyimi tüsa thünako tso va kemothe.
english: The temple was filled with smoke from the glory of God, and from his power. No one was able to enter into the temple, until the seven plagues of the seven angels would be finished.

chokri: I keresücelü mhafü pü se tüyochoyimi thünako cepode, “Neko ta neko cholü vode Jihova lekhu heko lapü cejülü süte.”
english: I heard a loud voice out of the temple, saying to the seven angels, "Go and pour out the seven bowls of the wrath of God on the earth!"

chokri: Süko dolü kerao pü he lapü cejü lü sü, lüshüfü, uphüzotsü kethi thüma somi yo khonu marhe ba m reshüyo sheli süko yo vota.
english: The first went, and poured out his bowl into the earth, and it became a harmful and evil sore on the people who had the mark of the beast, and who worshiped his image.

chokri: Tüyochoyi mi kenao he lapü jülü sü; süko thüma sakezümi za thita; rhü keta jülü keba metüsato.
english: The second angel poured out his bowl into the sea, and it became blood as of a dead man. Every living thing in the sea died.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi süo pühe lapü kerülü m jürilüko sü; süko metü thüza meveta.
english: The third poured out his bowl into the rivers and springs of water, and they became blood.

chokri: Jülüketa tüyochoyio poti, po mezizo, O! Niepoo voketao tsüdoketao, m hisa vori ketoo, no kemejo mhatho hiko thi süte.
english: I heard the angel of the waters saying, "You are righteous, who are and who were, you Holy One, because you have judged these things.

chokri: Kekrelamori uko kemesako, saju kepoko za mekrüve. Thüza pü uko po krayi kekrelamori uko kra tsü mesüzo.
english: For they poured out the blood of the saints and the prophets, and you have given them blood to drink. They deserve this."

chokri: I kereshüba yo bala kesüse, Sizo therü Niepo kekuo n shetiko mezizo.
english: I heard the altar saying, "Yes, Lord God, the Almighty, true and righteous are your judgments."

chokri: Tüyochoyi midao pühe lapü nace yosü; thüma methi tsü keto kekupü pü tsü.
english: The fourth poured out his bowl on the sun, and it was given to him to scorch men with fire.

chokri: Thüma thsü methi shüsü, kethi hio pi keku keba Jihova zho shüta; uko lü kede mode zapo zale pü Jihova tsü mota.
english: People were scorched with great heat, and people blasphemed the name of God who has the power over these plagues. They didn't repent and give him glory.

chokri: Tüyochoyi pünguo pühe lapü khonuo bayosü; pü kedeba zübü vota; Thümako kemezhephi ketala uko meyi tha parita.
english: The fifth poured out his bowl on the throne of the beast, and his kingdom was darkened. They gnawed their tongues because of the pain,

chokri: Tüyo Thürü-o zhoshü m püthata kekrelamori uko thimu kethikuko la, uko mhatholü uko lü rede mota.
english: and they blasphemed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores. They didn't repent of their works.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi shorüo pühe lapü Euphrates rü kezholü sü; ri kerü süo sota, nathoco kedeko cho kesüyi ketola.
english: The sixth poured out his bowl on the great river, the Euphrates. Its water was dried up, that the way might be made ready for the kings that come from the sunrise.

chokri: A kengo rüpü mesakemo 3 fükera talü pari, m khonuo talüri pari, m saju kepomi talüri pari.
english: I saw coming out of the mouth of the dragon, and out of the mouth of the beast, and out of the mouth of the false prophet, three unclean spirits, something like frogs;

chokri: Süko therü keshü rüpüko, ungo mhathoko thi, cejülü kedemiko cevo m cejü metülüvo, uko züvo kenguyide theku kekuo tüsozho nha theri thiketola.
english: for they are spirits of demons, performing signs; which go forth to the kings of the whole inhabited earth, to gather them together for the war of that great day of God, the Almighty.

chokri: Hihe, I kerügomi bi vorito. Somi füla kebao thejo kepütho ufüne khiba de mechü ta kemo, de mipo pü kemechü kemenga ngo kemomi.
english: "Behold, I come like a thief. Blessed is he who watches, and keeps his clothes, so that he doesn't walk naked, and they see his shame."

chokri: M pü uko zü kengupü thethi pü Hebrewmi jülü Armogeddon sitsü lüsü.
english: He gathered them together into the place which is called in Hebrew, Megiddo.

chokri: Tüyochoyi thünao pühe lapü tükhralü sü; siri tüyo kereshücelü mhafü kerekrü pü se, poti tsüo thise;
english: The seventh poured out his bowl into the air. A loud voice came forth out of the temple of heaven, from the throne, saying, "It is done!"

chokri: Thefüko, tüsüko, m metho kekreko pari; cecesü mezho shuta, thüma kehülü sükümha thi, mozo cejülü, cecesü rüshuta, kushuta.
english: There were lightnings, sounds, and thunders; and there was a great earthquake, such as was not since there were men on the earth, so great an earthquake, so mighty.

chokri: Nadeo kezapü zasüh thiva, kede nadeko retuta; Babylon kezhosü Jihova mhüjü rükra la vori, pü lekhu kerü hezo pü pütsü ketola.
english: The great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell. Babylon the great was remembered in the sight of God, to give to her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his wrath.

chokri: Cejü rethi tsokemoko, cejütuko ngosa mota.
english: Every island fled away, and the mountains were not found.

chokri: Tüyo phrü kri shipü thüma vota, pü meshi zhorhapümeshi (100lb); thümako Jihova reshü (zhoshü) ta thepü hio la, hio zho kemere thita.
english: Great hailstones, about the weight of a talent, came down out of the sky on people. People blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail, for this plague is exceedingly severe.

chokri: Tüyochoyi thünako dolü mipü pori, pühe 7 püta, de ace poti, “Hice pherite, theno tükhrü pü jü kekrolü keba thakha n meka süto:
english: One of the seven angels who had the seven bowls came and spoke with me, saying, "Come here. I will show you the judgment of the great prostitute who sits on many waters,

chokri: Cejülü kedemi kekro püzü kekhrü kezü bayo, m cejülü kehümiko pü kerügü kra mezü bayo.”
english: with whom the kings of the earth committed sexual immorality, and those who dwell in the earth were made drunken with the wine of her sexual immorality."

chokri: Süla pü rüpülü azü rayho thilü vota. Thünopü ngotsü khonu merezü ketipüyo ba, theza kekro zhoshü keti la, püko keri püpi thüna yoba.
english: He carried me away in the Spirit into a wilderness. I saw a woman sitting on a scarlet-colored animal, full of blasphemous names, having seven heads and ten horns.

chokri: Thenopü rolozüta ketipü pü retso thi, suna, ketsü uma kerüko, pearlsko pü pürütso thi, süna he mesakemoko, zhoshu ketsü, m keregü kerezhü süla chu pü ba;
english: The woman was dressed in purple and scarlet, and decked with gold and precious stones and pearls, having in her hand a golden cup full of abominations and the impurities of the sexual immorality of the earth.

chokri: Pü tükha lü thopü keta, “Ketekhri ketsü Babylon kezhoo, thenotükhrüko zu, mha ngokemetsü kethiko cejü metü lü”
english: And on her forehead a name was written, "MYSTERY, BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF THE PROSTITUTES AND OF THE ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH."

chokri: I ngo tsü thenopü kemesamiko za krapü kemesamiko za krapü mezata, Jisu zalü mipo udokhri kevako I ngo pü a ngo thita.
english: I saw the woman drunken with the blood of the saints, and with the blood of the martyrs of Jesus. When I saw her, I wondered with great amazement.

chokri: Tüyochoyio “no kedipüla n ngo thi ta? I nceposüto, thenopü ketekhri ketsüko, m khonu püpo ketayo, upi thüna m püka keri kebao.
english: The angel said to me, "Why do you wonder? I will tell you the mystery of the woman, and of the beast that carries her, which has the seven heads and the ten horns.

chokri: No khonu ngokebao, ngomo ketao; cejü kecece pü thüla kedipülü parito, side mi kedoto; cejülü kehümiko ungothito, cejü shüdü culü kerhü lesidalü uza thopü ta kemoko, khonu himhüjü ketao, bamo ketao, m tsüdo ketao.
english: The beast that you saw was, and is not; and is about to come up out of the abyss and to go into destruction. Those who dwell on the earth and whose names have not been written in the book of life from the foundation of the world will marvel when they see that the beast was, and is not, and shall be present.

chokri: Hice, mhakesemi po seyite, pi thünoko sü cejüta thünoko, thenopü kebathi.
english: Here is the mind that has wisdom. The seven heads are seven mountains, on which the woman sits.

chokri: Kedemi thünaba; püngu retute, pü balu, kekrepü vori molu; pü vori süzo pütü huba zoto.
english: They are seven kings. Five have fallen, the one is, the other has not yet come. When he comes, he must continue a little while.

chokri: Khonu hijü kedebao, dita, pü tüthao (8) tsü thüna (7) kebao, mikedotato.
english: The beast that was, and is not, is himself also an eighth, and is of the seven; and he goes to destruction.

chokri: Püka keri ngokebako, kedekeri, uko kederüve ngoyi molu, tsü ketso; veli khonuo ce kedemi keku bavüdo pü ngoyito.
english: The ten horns that you saw are ten kings who have received no kingdom as yet, but they receive authority as kings, with the beast, for one hour.

chokri: Uko metü ulükelü (umedo) püzo, ukokeku m uko kemeco kha khonuo tsüto.
english: These have one mind, and they give their power and authority to the beast.

chokri: Neko tekonuo zü therithito, tekonu ukopi kuyito, kekrelamori pü niepoko pi Niepoo zo tsüla, kedeko piri kedeo; püzü ketako cüpü kedakeyiko, kemelü ketho thiketako.”
english: These will war against the Lamb, and the Lamb will overcome them, for he is Lord of lords, and King of kings. They also will overcome who are with him, called and chosen and faithful."

chokri: Pü a cepode, jüko no ngo keba, thenotükhrü ba ketsüo, thümako, krodeko, kedeshuyeko, ujü kekre ketsüko.
english: He said to me, "The waters which you saw, where the prostitute sits, are peoples, multitudes, nations, and languages.

chokri: Uko keri no ngo kebakhonuyo, tekhrü pü ngo metsü tato, uko pü thi medi m püpo mechü tato, m uko püthi tito, de mepü pü thü vato.
english: The ten horns which you saw, and the beast, these will hate the prostitute, and will make her desolate, and will make her naked, and will eat her flesh, and will burn her utterly with fire.

chokri: Kekrelamori therao pü jüko kha süko melülü süde pü medo thi tsü tso va ketola, ukopo umedo kemethode uko kedeko khonuo tsü vato, therao medoko (jüko) thi tsü tsoo kemothe.
english: For God has put in their hearts to do what he has in mind, and to be of one mind, and to give their kingdom to the beast, until the words of God should be accomplished.

chokri: No thenopü ngo kebao sü nadeo zo, cejülü kedeko kekha kebao;
english: The woman whom you saw is the great city, which reigns over the kings of the earth."

chokri: Hisao lü tüyochoyimi kekrepü tüyo kiri I ngo, pü keku neshu; pü zapozale la cejü thi müve sü.
english: After these things, I saw another angel coming down out of the sky, having great authority. The earth was illuminated with his glory.

chokri: Pü füphra kemeco pü füphra meto shu sü, Babylon kezhoo sü retu te, rüpü mesakemo, mera mesakemo ngokemetsü pü thite.
english: He cried with a mighty voice, saying, "Fallen, fallen is Babylon the great, and she has become a habitation of demons, a prison of every unclean spirit, and a prison of every unclean and hateful bird!

chokri: Cejü shüye metü pü keregü kerezhü kra mezü de lekhu ngoi, cejülü kedeko metü püzü regü rezhü, cejülü hetho helimi pü ketikekra keveko la mhaneyi.
english: For all the nations have drunk of the wine of the wrath of her sexual immorality, the kings of the earth committed sexual immorality with her, and the merchants of the earth grew rich from the abundance of her luxury."

chokri: Tüyomhafü kekrepü se, poti Thenopü celü tatate, neko pü kephomako thi mo keto la, size ne pü kethiko neko yo voho.
english: I heard another voice from heaven, saying, "Come out of her, my people, that you have no participation in her sins, and that you don't receive of her plagues,

chokri: Pü kephomako tasü tü ketso khote, Jihova pü kephomako (pükerhoko) rükra bate.
english: for her sins have reached to the sky, and God has remembered her iniquities.

chokri: Nekoyo zhokhro kha kesübi püzhokhro kha pü tsü süte, pü mhathoko zhokhro zakene kha pütsü süte, pü he sü chu kesüko zakena süpü pü tsüte.
english: Return to her just as she returned, and repay her double as she did, and according to her works. In the cup which she mixed, mix to her double.

chokri: Kedithedü püthopüthipü kethürho sheli m hüpü pünüpünyü thi sheli, pü melü lü pü lü keti, I kedepü, balüba, thenosame mo, thelü keshü zü kesüho.
english: However much she glorified herself, and grew wanton, so much give her of torment and mourning. For she says in her heart, 'I sit a queen, and am no widow, and will in no way see mourning.'

chokri: Kekrelamori tüsa zho pülü ta vori tato, kesa, thekri, thekre, de mepü thenopü thü khri vato, Niepo Jihova pü neketi ketsüo ku keti la.
english: Therefore in one day her plagues will come: death, mourning, and famine; and she will be utterly burned with fire; for the Lord God who has judged her is strong.

chokri: Cejü kedeko püzü mhakesu kethiko hü kethevü shu kebako püla uko lü shü shuta to, de pü kri to, uko pü kethü mekho ngoto.
english: The kings of the earth, who committed sexual immorality and lived wantonly with her, will weep and wail over her, when they look at the smoke of her burning,

chokri: Pü kemethi pe mepri de vokemecuco tha ba tato depoti, Alas, Alas, Babylon nade keku kene rüna? Bavüdo pülü n kemüjo vorite.
english: standing far away for the fear of her torment, saying, 'Woe, woe, the great city, Babylon, the strong city! For your judgment has come in one hour.'

chokri: Hethoheli kethimiko pu krikrato, kekrelamori mipüri uko he kekhri basamo ketala.
english: The merchants of the earth weep and mourn over her, for no one buys their merchandise any more;

chokri: Tühetheli suna, raka, m ketsü uma kerü, pearls, sapütsafü, merezütsü kelo, mereshoro, sü pü kethi urü, kethenyüko, prü huko, sü uma kerüko, pitol (mesüthi) thegi, marble.
english: merchandise of gold, silver, precious stones, pearls, fine linen, purple, silk, scarlet, all expensive wood, every vessel of ivory, every vessel made of most precious wood, and of brass, and iron, and marble;

chokri: Süthi, mharü keveko, ukenhü ketiko, utsakethiko hezo, tir, kemenücoko, ata, khonu, teko, gura, gura gari, thejümi, thüma kerhüroko,
english: and cinnamon, incense, perfume, frankincense, wine, olive oil, fine flour, wheat, sheep, horses, chariots, bodies, and people's souls.

chokri: Use kethi uthiupho kemenyüko ncelü tata to, mhakeveko mu kezüveko ri tata to; no süko mhapü ceri ngo sa mota to.
english: The fruits which your soul lusted after have been lost to you, and all things that were dainty and sumptuous have perished from you, and you will find them no more at all.

chokri: Tehekethimi mha hiko pü thi mene sü, pükemezhe (pümethi) ketsü ngo sü uko meche ketala kemecuco thata to, de kra m the kri thi bata to.
english: The merchants of these things, who were made rich by her, will stand far away for the fear of her torment, weeping and mourning;

chokri: Uko pode, alas, alas, nade tsüo le, linen fü keveko, merezü tsüko, mere vekrü tsüko, m suna, ketsü umakerüko, pearlsko pü pü retso kethi kole.
english: saying, 'Woe, woe, the great city, she who was dressed in fine linen, purple, and scarlet, and decked with gold and precious stones and pearls!

chokri: Kekrelamori cene kezho süko bavüdo pülü mhapüri ba mote, rulü kezhomiko, ru kebamiko, ru kethomiri, jükezholü tühe kethimiri, rapeco bata.
english: For in an hour such great riches are made desolate.' Every shipmaster, and everyone who sails anywhere, and mariners, and as many as gain their living by sea, stood far away,

chokri: Uko krade, mekha to keba süo ngo kesüce poti, nade dipü ce nade hio bi kha!
english: and cried out as they looked at the smoke of her burning, saying, 'What is like the great city?'

chokri: M uko nyopha pü ukopi kezapü bata, de kra, thekri thi ulü shü to, de poti, Alas, Alas nade tsüo le, ruyo mhama kerü jükezho lü pü vo ri pü thi mene kesüko, bavüdo pülü di mesate.
english: They cast dust on their heads, and cried, weeping and mourning, saying, 'Woe, woe, the great city, in which all who had their ships in the sea were made rich by reason of her great wealth!' For in one hour is she made desolate.

chokri: Neko püla nenüyite, ne apostle kemesako, sajü kepoko; Jihova neko khüpo thipü püyo süsüte.
english: Rejoice over her, O heaven, you saints, apostles, and prophets; for God has judged your judgment on her."

chokri: Tüyochoyimi kekupü ketsü mhakegü tsü kezho bi tsü bi kehüpü jükezholü sü, de poti, Babylon nadekezho-o khakemo kezho thipü jü kezholü sü ve, pü ngo sa yi hote.
english: A mighty angel took up a stone like a great millstone and cast it into the sea, saying, "Thus with violence will Babylon, the great city, be thrown down, and will be found no more at all.

chokri: Thefü, harp kefüko, tsale kethimiko, lu-ü kefüko, thecükefüko, ncelü sesa mota to; kemedu ketako ngosa motato; mhagü ketsü füko sesa motato.
english: The voice of harpists, minstrels, flute players, and trumpeters will be heard no more at all in you. No craftsman, of whatever craft, will be found any more at all in you. The sound of a mill will be heard no more at all in you.

chokri: Mefibü meto ketsü kevoko ngosa motato; zhosami m zhosapüko fü sesa motato; hethoheli kethi n thümako celü kezhomi n ra thenyü ketsü la cejü shüyeko metü kedo tayo.
english: The light of a lamp will shine no more at all in you. The voice of the bridegroom and of the bride will be heard no more at all in you; for your merchants were the princes of the earth; for with your sorcery all the nations were deceived.

chokri: Zhopokethimi, sajükepoko, kemesako za, kemesami dokhri kevako metü ncelü ngoi yo.
english: In her was found the blood of prophets and of saints, and of all who have been slain on the earth."

chokri: Hisao lü I tüyo thüma kekrofü kerekrü pü se, pode Haleluya; kelakeyi, zapozale, therho, kemeco u Niepoo zhü;
english: After these things I heard something like a loud voice of a great multitude in heaven, saying, "Hallelujah! Salvation, power, and glory belong to our God:

chokri: Kekrelamori pü theco thepe kemezio zo; thenotekhrüpü mejo süte, pü keregü kerezhüko pü cejüo merho süte, pü belü choyikethiko za khü po thisüte.
english: for true and righteous are his judgments. For he has judged the great prostitute, who corrupted the earth with her sexual immorality, and he has avenged the blood of his servants at her hand."

chokri: Uko posala de Haleluya, pü mekho to süketa-o kechothe batato.
english: A second said, "Hallelujah! Her smoke goes up forever and ever."

chokri: Pethi mehi 24 ko, m khonu 4 ko zürütsü Jihova reshü ta kedebalü kebao, uko pode “Haleluya”
english: The twenty-four elders and the four living creatures fell down and worshiped God who sits on the throne, saying, "Amen! Hallelujah!"

chokri: Thefüpü kedebalü paride “Jihova thsu te pü yithomi metü, pü kemeprükhü, kezho keni metüko.
english: A voice came forth from the throne, saying, "Give praise to our God, all you his servants, you who fear him, the small and the great!"

chokri: Thüma kekrofü bi tsüpü I se, jü kekro fü bi, tüsüfü kezhopü bi, pode, Haleluya; Niepo Jihova keku metü püzhü tsüo kedethite.
english: I heard something like the voice of a great multitude, and like the voice of many waters, and like the voice of mighty thunders, saying, "Hallelujah! For the Lord our God, the Almighty, reigns!

chokri: Unü m ujü ve yi khe, therhopü pü tsükhe, tekonu nolü sü vorite, pücemi thi ketoo sü dojü pü bate.
english: Let us rejoice and be exceedingly glad, and let us give the glory to him. For the marriage of the Lamb has come, and his wife has made herself ready."

chokri: Füne kemenü kemeva pü pü retso thi nosü, mesa m mega ti; fü kemenü (Linen) sü kemathomi retsozo.”
english: It was given to her that she would array herself in bright, pure, fine linen: for the fine linen is the righteous acts of the saints.

chokri: M pü ace poti thoyite, tekonu nolü lü cü kesüko ruko thoko; Ase pü posade, kepo hiko kethozo Jihova jü.
english: He said to me, "Write, 'Blessed are those who are invited to the marriage supper of the Lamb.'" He said to me, "These are true words of God."

chokri: I zürütsü pü phece pü reshü to le sü, veli pü ace pode, tsizi hite; I ri n bi ketsü yithomi pü zo, n sazüjüra, Jisu zhopo kethi mi Jihova reshüte, Jisu zhopo kethi sü sajü kepo rüpü zo.
english: I fell down before his feet to worship him. He said to me, "Look! Don't do it! I am a fellow bondservant with you and with your brothers who hold the testimony of Jesus. Worship God, for the testimony of Jesus is the Spirit of Prophecy."

chokri: M tü khri kesü I ngo, siri hihe, gura kemegapü pari m püyo ketao za Kemelü Keveo m kethoo, pü kemezi lü thecothepe thi m mizü theri thi.
english: I saw the heaven opened, and behold, a white horse, and he who sat on it is called Faithful and True. In righteousness he judges and makes war.

chokri: Pü mhüni metokeba meli bizo, püpiyo kede piraketu ta; pü thüzapü tho pü ta, mikremi süo se mo pü lebi zo kemosa.
english: His eyes are a flame of fire, and on his head are many crowns. He has names written and a name written which no one knows but he himself.

chokri: Püfüne thüzalüsa püta, püzacüpü, Jihova jü.
english: He is clothed in a garment sprinkled with blood. His name is called "The Word of God."

chokri: Tüyo paheko gura kemega yo püsa mejita, linen fü kemesa, keve, mega m mesa tsü khita.
english: The armies which are in heaven followed him on white horses, clothed in white, pure, fine linen.

chokri: Pütalü zechoyi keve ta prata, süo pü shuye metü meni ketola; pü thegi khi süko pi kekhato: pü hezo thü ketho thi therü kekuo lekhu pü kedüto.
english: Out of his mouth proceeds a sharp, double-edged sword, that with it he should strike the nations. He will rule them with a rod of iron. He treads the winepress of the fierceness of the wrath of God, the Almighty.

chokri: Pü bolayo m püdoyo theza pü tho pü ta, “Kedeko pi kedeo, Niepo pi Niepo.”
english: He has on his garment and on his thigh a name written, "KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS."

chokri: Tüyochoyi pü naceyo thade I ngo; püphra metode seba, tüyo keta merako, prüketa metü, neko vori kengu yite, Jihova hü kezholü hite;
english: I saw an angel standing in the sun. He cried with a loud voice, saying to all the birds that fly in the sky, "Come! Be gathered together to the great supper of God,

chokri: Neko kedeko thiti ketola, thipahe kezhoko thi ti ketola, kekumiko thi ti ketola, gurayo keta thümako thi ti keto la, thüma metüko thiti ketola, mijü kethimiri thikemomiri, kezho ketsü metü.
english: that you may eat the flesh of kings, the flesh of captains, the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses and of those who sit on them, and the flesh of all men, both free and slave, and small and great."

chokri: I kengo, khonu, cejülü kedemiko, uko paheko, uko gurayo ketao zü de theri thito tha püsajiko rizüde.
english: I saw the beast, and the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to make war against him who sat on the horse, and against his army.

chokri: Khonuo m celü sajü kepoo, ungo mhathoko thi kesüo süko khi thüma shuketso ketao, khonuo zasi thopü ketako, m pü merhe kereshüko, uko tüpü merhü meza tosü keba metso lü süva.
english: The beast was taken, and with him the false prophet who worked the signs in his sight, with which he deceived those who had received the mark of the beast and those who worshiped his image. These two were thrown alive into the lake of fire that burns with sulfur.

chokri: Gurayo ketao zechopü mesho kebako dokhri tsü va, zecho pü ta lü kepario m türako metü süko tipü ukechu thii.
english: The rest were killed with the sword of him who sat on the horse, the sword which came forth out of his mouth. All the birds were filled with their flesh.

chokri: I tükesapü m cejü kesapü ngo; tüküvüo m cejü kevüo dita; jü kezho basamota.
english: I saw a new heaven and a new earth: for the first heaven and the first earth have passed away, and the sea is no more.

chokri: I, John nade kemesao ngo, Jerusalem kesao tüyo Jihova celü pari tibi.
english: I saw the holy city, New Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God, made ready like a bride adorned for her husband.

chokri: Tüyo I thefü kerekrüpü se poti, hihe, Jihova kereshüce sü thüma zü ba te, pü uko zü hüto, uko pü thüma thi ta to, m Jihova uko zü bata to, de uko Rüo thitato.
english: I heard a loud voice out of heaven saying, "Behold, God's dwelling is with people, and he will dwell with them, and they will be his people, and God himself will be with them as their God.

chokri: Jihova uko mhüjüko shü mesovato; kesa basa mo ta to, lüshü lüzhe sheri, kekra sheri, kethi keni sheri bamota to; mhakerao basa mote.
english: He will wipe away from them every tear from their eyes. Death will be no more; neither will there be mourning, nor crying, nor pain, any more. The first things have passed away."

chokri: Kedebayo pode, hihe, I mhakothi kesave, pü ace pode, thoyite, jü hiko ketho m kemelüzo.
english: He who sits on the throne said, "Behold, I am making all things new." He said, "Write, for these words of God are faithful and true."

chokri: M pü ace poti, “Süo thi süte, I Alpha (kerao) m Omega (kekhao), shudüo m thelao. Theri ketami I kerhü jüri mechü zode khasü tsüto.
english: He said to me, "It is done! I am the Alpha and the Omega, the Beginning and the End. I will give freely to him who is thirsty from the spring of the water of life.

chokri: Pü kukeyimi mhametü kalü thiyito; m I pü Rüo thi to de pü a nu thi to.
english: He who overcomes, I will give him these things. I will be his God, and he will be my son.

chokri: Veli mhapeketami, melü kemoko, rhoketako, kedokhrimi, therhekereshüko, kecejümi, meza m metsa thü kebalü uzathi ta to; hio sa kenao (Kesakenao).”
english: But for the cowardly, unbelieving, sinners, abominable, murderers, sexually immoral, sorcerers, idolaters, and all liars, their part is in the lake that burns with fire and sulfur, which is the second death."

chokri: Tüyochoyimi thünako dolü mipü ace pheri de pü he lü tüsa 7 pü ta süko tüsa thülako pü ace poti, hice vorite, I zhosapü tha n meka sütomo, tekonu cemi.
english: One of the seven angels who had the seven bowls, who were loaded with the seven last plagues came, and he spoke with me, saying, "Come here. I will show you the wife, the Lamb's bride."

chokri: Side pü Rüpü lü apüde cejütu kerekrü shu pü po yo vo ta, de nadeo tha amekasü, Jerusalem nade kemesao, Jihova celü tüyo kiri.
english: He carried me away in the Spirit to a great and high mountain, and showed me the holy city, Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God,

chokri: Jihova zapozale püyota; pü keve ketsü uma kerüthopü bi, jasper vepü ketsü thüga bi.
english: having the glory of God. Her light was like a most precious stone, as if it was a jasper stone, clear as crystal;

chokri: Pü sazho cho m zhophi, pü kharü 12 ba, m kha rüko lü choyimi 12 ba, uzako süko lü tho müta, Thüza süko Isrealmi shuye 12 ko za.
english: having a great and high wall; having twelve gates, and at the gates twelve angels; and names written on them, which are the names of the twelve tribes of the children of Israel.

chokri: Nathoco kharü 3; mesoco, mekhroco kharü 3; nakroco kharü sü;
english: On the east were three gates; and on the north three gates; and on the south three gates; and on the west three gates.

chokri: Nadeo sazho copü 12 ba, sükoyo Apostleko mi 12 za ba.
english: The wall of the city had twelve foundations, and on them twelve names of the twelve Apostles of the Lamb.

chokri: A züde mhapo kebao belü suna tekhrü kha mha mede ketipü ba, pü nadeo mede keto la, pü kharüko ri keto la, m pü sa zhoko mede keto la.
english: He who spoke with me had for a measure, a golden reed, to measure the city, its gates, and its walls.

chokri: Nadeo sü kada (4) thi, ucho ri uzho düzo, pü sunatekhrü sü sü pü mede tsü, furlong nye keri kena (12, 000). Ucho, uzho m pü rekhü metü ketü.
english: The city lies foursquare, and its length is as great as its breadth. He measured the city with the reed, Twelve thousand twelve stadia. Its length, breadth, and height are equal.

chokri: Pü sazho mede sü ri 144cubit (Botho) pethimi botho the, m thüma süo tüyochoyimi.
english: Its wall is one hundred forty-four cubits, by the measure of a man, that is, of an angel.

chokri: Cekethi süo püsazhoko (jasper) ketsü uma kerü pü thi; nade pü thi, khriva kemesabi.
english: The construction of its wall was jasper. The city was pure gold, like pure glass.

chokri: Püsa zho mejuko tisa ketsü ma kerü püthi, süo chalcedony, dao emerald;
english: The foundations of the city's wall were adorned with all kinds of precious stones. The first foundation was jasper; the second, sapphire; the third, chalcedony; the fourth, emerald;

chokri: Kharü 12 ko pearl (ketsü umakerü) pü pü kha ti; nade chopüko sü suna kemesa pü thi, khriva pephayi keve bizo.
english: The twelve gates were twelve pearls. Each one of the gates was made of one pearl. The street of the city was pure gold, like transparent glass.

chokri: Sülü I kereshüce ngo mo; kekrelamori Niepoo therü kekuo m tekonu ri sülü kereshüce-o thi ketala.
english: I saw no temple in it, for the Lord God, the Almighty, and the Lamb, are its temple.

chokri: Nadeo nace khisa morive, mori khri sheri sülü keve thimorive; Jihova kevetho süla va nve tato, m tekonuo tho sülü keveo thi ta to.
english: The city has no need for the sun, neither of the moon, to shine, for the very glory of God illuminated it, and its lamp is the Lamb.

chokri: M kelayiketa shuyeko keve sülü chota to; cejülü kedeko zapozale m therho khi vorito.
english: The nations will walk in its light. The kings of the earth bring the glory and honor of the nations into it.

chokri: Pü kharüko khavaho tüsozhometülü kekrelamori sülü tüzü ba mo tila.
english: Its gates will in no way be shut by day (for there will be no night there),

chokri: Uko zapozale m thechu therhokhi vorito.
english: and they shall bring the glory and the honor of the nations into it so that they may enter.

chokri: Mha mesakemo püri sülü voriho, mha kehopüri ngokerütse kethi baho, mori kecejü kemeda baho; veli tekonuo kerhü pri lesida lü thopü kemetako lebi bato.
english: There will in no way enter into it anything profane, or one who causes an abomination or a lie, but only those who are written in the Lamb's book of life.

chokri: Pü kerü jü kemesa kerhü jü tha a meka, mesa pü khriva kemetse bi, Jihova kedebayo tekonu celü vori.
english: He showed me a river of water of life, clear as crystal, proceeding out of the throne of God and of the Lamb,

chokri: Chopü metsulü kerükhü lucohico kerhü sübo pü ba, süse kekreketsü 12 zhüyiyo, tekhri metsü use zhü süyo, uniko shuye thi kemenü süyo.
english: in the middle of its street. On this side of the river and on that was the tree of life, bearing twelve kinds of fruits, yielding its fruit every month. The leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.

chokri: Reshu keva basa ho; thürü-o kedeba m tekonu sülü ba to; pü choyimiko sülü pü reyibato;
english: There will be no curse any more. The throne of God and of the Lamb will be in it, and his servants serve him.

chokri: Uko püzü ngoto; m uko tükhayo püza bato.
english: They will see his face, and his name will be on their foreheads.

chokri: Tüzü sülü ba saho; uko libü ri ba ho, nace ri baho, kekrelamori Jihova Niepoo kevepü uko tsüto; uko kechothe püzü kede thi ta to.
english: There will be no night, and they need no lamp light; for the Lord God will illuminate them. They will reign forever and ever.

chokri: Pü ace pode, “Kepohiko ketho m kemelü; saju kepo kemesako Niepo Jihova tüyochoyimi ketsüpü yithomi ce mhathi vori mhai ta ketoko pü meka sü.
english: He said to me, "These words are faithful and true. The Lord God of the spirits of the prophets sent his angel to show to his bondservants the things which must happen soon."

chokri: Hihe, I mhai zi voritazü; saju jü hiko thopü kemeta lesi hikozüyi ketimi thejo kepütho.
english: "Behold, I come quickly. Blessed is he who keeps the words of the prophecy of this book."

chokri: I, John mha hiko ngo, m se; mhahiko pü a mese mengo kesü tüyochoyimi mhüjülü I zürütsü pü reshü to lisü.”
english: Now I, John, am the one who heard and saw these things. When I heard and saw, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel who had shown me these things.

chokri: Pü ace po, “tsizihite; I ri n bi mi choyi mizo, nsazüjüra m prüo lipüko jü hiko thi m zü ketakomizo, Jihova reshü m pü jü zü ketamizo.”
english: He said to me, "See you don't do it! I am a fellow bondservant with you and with your brothers, the prophets, and with those who keep the words of this book. Worship God."

chokri: Pü ace pode, saju kepo lesidao mohor vüva hi te; pütü meno shu bate.
english: He said to me, "Don't seal up the words of the prophecy of this book, for the time is at hand.

chokri: Pü mezi kemoo po mezimo bazote; mesa kemoo po mesamo bazole; kemezio po meziba zo te; mesakeba-o po mesa bazote.
english: He who acts unjustly, let him act unjustly still. He who is filthy, let him be filthy still. He who is righteous, let him do righteousness still. He who is holy, let him be holy still."

chokri: Hihe, I mhaizi vori ta ze; zhokhro püta, themako utho umhatho ce sü thi khasü tsü to.
english: "Behold, I come quickly. My reward is with me, to repay to each man according to his work.

chokri: I Apha m Omega, therao m kekhao, shüdü-o m thelao rizo.
english: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the First and the Last, the Beginning and the End.

chokri: Somi pü khakesüjüko thi m züyi sheli thejo kepütho, kerhü sü yo umezi nete, kharüko lü ta nade lü lü ta to.
english: Blessed are those who do his commandments, that they may have the right to the tree of life, and may enter in by the gates into the city.

chokri: Kekrelamori chozuco teshüko ba, thenyümiko, keregü kerezhümiko, kedokhrimiko, marhe kereshümiko, kecejü kemeda unüketsümiko ri sülü ba to.
english: Outside are the dogs, the sorcerers, the sexually immoral, the murderers, the idolaters, and everyone who loves and practices falsehood.

chokri: I, Jisu tüyo a choyimi ketsüpü kehükoce mhahiko po mesesü; I David meo m püyo keprario, keshu tüvepü thenyü keveo.
english: I, Jesus, have sent my angel to testify these things to you for the assemblies. I am the root and the offspring of David; the Bright and Morning Star."

chokri: Pü rüpüo m zhosapü pode, “Tavori te, sekeyi mi po ri tavori posü, theri keta miko pori vori kerhüjü methu püyi te.
english: The Spirit and the bride say, "Come!" He who hears, let him say, "Come!" He who is thirsty, let him come. He who desires, let him take the water of life freely.

chokri: Kekrelamori I lesida hi lü saju jü kese koce zhopo kha süyo, mhaceno thüma hu mhahiko pi sa sülize Jihova tüsako thopü kemetako pü pü tsü sa sü to.
english: I testify to everyone who hears the words of the prophecy of this book, if anyone adds to them, may God add to him the plagues which are written in this book.

chokri: M thümahu mhace, saju jüko lesida hilü kebako püva lize, Jihova kerhü lesida lü pu mesüko khivato, kemesa nadeo lüri, m lesida hilü thopü kemeta kolü no.”
english: If anyone takes away from the words of the book of this prophecy, may God take away his part from the tree of life, and out of the holy city, which are written in this book.

chokri: Pü mhahiko kepoo pode, I vorizo ketho to mhai de, Amen, sizizoto, vorite, Niepo Jisu.
english: He who testifies these things says, "Yes, I come quickly." Amen! Yes, come, Lord Jesus.

chokri: Niepoo Jisu Khrista Kekhrü po ne metüko zü vo keyi thi te. Amen.
english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with all the saints. Amen.

chokri: thá dzɨ mɨ yẽ nū mɨ pù tī ʃī nê mû thə yô ū kō mɨ sɨ kə mə zá â nō hlɨ bâ jō ʃẽ
english: It is said that a long time ago an orphan, a dog and a frog were living together.

chokri: kə mə zá vé rī bâ jō ʃẽ
english: Very happily together, it is said.

chokri: ū kō vô thī zɨ phẽ lɨ bâ â nō kə rɨ thī î nō sɨ bâ jō
english: Usually, before they would go to bed, they would sit at the foot of the bed in deep conversation.

chokri: pù zɨ̄ pù mə yẽ nū lī pū ʃî pū nî zɨ kə bâ tî tʃê thə yô o nō tâ tâ
english: One night while the orphan and his dog were sleeping, the frog ran away.

chokri: kɨ sɨ yā nà mə yə nū lī tī ʃī nê pū nî tò sɨ pà ʃī zɨ̄ î nō mə yɨ nū nō vô thə yô rɨ thī
english: Usually early in the morning the orphan and his doggy would get up and go talk to the frog.

chokri: sɨ sâ mə yə nū lī tī ʃī nê pū nî ɨ lɨ kə mə zê sɨ tâ
english: And then the orphan and his doggy suffered deeply.

chokri: ʃī zɨ̄ n̥ tʃê mō tî kō lɨ thə yô phû mɨ dɨ tâ
english: They searched the whole house but the search for Frog found nothing.

chokri: sɨ sâ mə rə nū vô khr kî khá khrī sɨ thə yô thə yô nō dɨ pù tʃê bâ lâ
english: Then the orphan went and opened the window and called Frog Frog where are you?

chokri: tī ʃī nê pū pɨ mə kà ɨ tâ
english: Doggy stuck his head inside the bottle that had been Frog's house.

chokri: bò tō lō pū pɨ mə kà kə bâ tsɨ kə sɨ phá â vâ
english: He fell down and the bottle shattered.

chokri: mə rə nū ō pū ʃī krɨ tsɨ kə tâ pū kî pū ʃī mɨ zà
english: The orphan saw his dog fall jumped from the window and grabbed his dog.

chokri: kə tsá kə tsô vô ō nō thə yô tʃɨ thə yô nō dɨ pù tʃê bâ lâ
english: Next they went to the forest to ask and called Frog frog where are you?

chokri: ʃī zɨ̄ ɨ nō kə tsá mō tî kō lɨ tʃɨ vô
english: And they called like that throughout the whole forest.

chokri: pū nî kə tsá lɨ lɨ kə zɨ tʃê mə khɨ qhô lɨ kə lê tʃê mó
english: Just as they entered the forest they saw a bee hive and a squirrel hole.

chokri: mə rə nū nō tə ʃɨ tʃê pô sɨ nō phê mə khɨ kō tʃê ū kō thə yô mó mē mò sɨ kə tsò sɨ tē
english: The orphan said to the dog to approach the bees and ask them whether they have seen the frog.

chokri: ɨ kā lê kə tsò kə bâ tʃê
english: While I ask the squirrel.

chokri: mə rə nū nō kā lê tʃɨ kə sɨ tʃê kā lê pà mə rə nū kə tsò sɨ mə rē nō nō só pū phû bâ lâ
english: When the orphan called to the squirrel he emerged and asked Orphan for whom are you searching?

chokri: mə rə nū lī kā lê pū nî kə rɨ thī
english: The orphan and the squirrel conversed.

chokri: mə khɨ kō tī ʃī nê khrk sé ɨ mò tâ
english: The bees were very many and that is why they could not hear the doggy's voice.

chokri: sɨ nâ tī ʃɨ n̥ pū lɨ rə dà â nō vô sɨ bô kə nâ sɨ
english: Therefore the dog became angry and went to shake the tree.

chokri: tī ʃī nê nō sɨ bô kə nâ kə sɨ tʃê mə khɨ qhô kà tû tsɨ tʃē dzɨ lɨ kɨ tâ
english: When the doggy shook the tree the bee's nest fell down to the ground.

chokri: mə rə nū sə bô mə lê kū û nō hù tī lī tʃɨ sɨ hmɨ kə zô ō nō tʃê lɨ bâ mē mò lâ
english: The orphan climbed a tree and called to the owl Big-eyed one are you in your house?

chokri: hù tī lī n̥ pū lɨ rə dà sɨ ɨ nō pfɨ pà mə rə nū kə hrê sɨ
english: The owl boiled inside and flew out startling the orphan.

chokri: n̥ā tʃɨ khā kə tsɨ sâ ɨ n̥ zɨ̄ χâ phá vá tò hō
english: If you ever again call me Big-eye like that I will scratch your face to shreds!

chokri: ū kō ɨ lɨ rə dà sɨ tâ
english: During this same time the bees became very angry.

chokri: tī ʃī nê tsɨ hū tē ū kō vô tə ʃɨ hū sɨ
english: Chase this dog! They went to chase the dog.

chokri: mə rẽ nū nō hù tī lī tʃê pô sɨ ā kə dzô vá sɨ tē ɨ n̥ zā kə mò pū sɨ n̥ tʃɨ sá hlò tē hō
english: The orphan said to the owl Owl forgive my fault I will never again call you by a name which is not yours.

chokri: hù tī lī n̥ mə rẽ nū tʃê pô sɨ sɨ sɨ vé
english: Owl replied to the orphan That's okay.

chokri: mə rẽ nū kə tsɨ kə zô pù mə lê kū kə zɨ tʃê pū hò rẽ kə tâ nâ
english: Because he was very tired the orphan climbed a rock and was holding on to a branch.

chokri: ʃī zɨ̄ n̥ pū kə tsɨ pɨ lɨ thà â nō thə yô tʃɨ lâ sɨ
english: And in that way he stood on top of the rock and called again for Frog.

chokri: mə rẽ nū nō sɨ tsô mū n̥ú kə bâ ō tsɨ thə zê kà kə tsɨ sé bâ mò
english: The orphan did not realize that the branch he was leaning on was a deer antler.

chokri: pū thə yô tʃɨ kə sɨ tʃê thə zê hnâ dò lɨ zɨ kə bâ kə rê sɨ mû thɨ zê o nō pū kə rê kə sɨ tʃê hnâ dò lɨ thɨ pā á
english: As he called Frog the deer sleeping in the bush startled and when he leapt out he startled the orphan.

chokri: thə zê thɨ pà kə sɨ tʃê pū kà vô mə rə nū gù ù tâ
english: As the deer leapt out the orphan was hooked on his horn.

chokri: thɨ zê mə rə nū pfɨ ɨ mò zō l nō tâ rə zâ n̥ê lɨ kɨ tâ
english: Without hesitation the deer carried the orphan and ran down to the pond.

chokri: thə zê tâ kɨ rə zâ lɨ kɨ tsò kɨ mə rə nū kɨ thó pū sɨ rə zâ lɨ sɨ sɨ
english: When the deer had reached the lake he jolted the orphan into the lake.

chokri: lâ vô ā mə sɨ lâ khā hɨ thə zê n̥ ʃê sɨ
english: Don't come hassle me ever again shouted the deer.

chokri: ɨ tɨ hù sâ mə rə nū lī tī ʃī nê pū nî thə yô yw û kə bâ sê
english: After some time the orphan and doggy heard a frog croaking.

chokri: mə rə nū tī ʃɨ tʃê pô sɨ dzɨ kə phà hɨ tē
english: The orphan said to the dog Shh! Don't make any noise.

chokri: mə rə nū lī tī ʃī nê pū nî ɨ rɨ lê mû mū nū sɨ ɨ nō thə yô yw û kə ba tsō pé sɨ
english: The orphan and the doggy slowly and carefully looked towards the frog's croaking.

chokri: pū nî thə yô pù mò lɨ thə yô kə nā zɨ kə sɨ
english: They met not one but two frogs.

chokri: ū kō kə sɨ ɨ nō ū nɨ sɨ kə bâ tî tʃê thə yô zû ū nō thə yô n̥ê kō tʃɨ sɨ mə rə nū lī tī ʃī nê zɨ kə sɨ tē
english: With their meeting they were very happy and the frog mother called the little frogs to come out and meet with the orphan and doggy.

chokri: thə yô n̥ê kə khrō tâ pà â nō tī ʃī nê lɨ mə rə nū pū nî zɨ kə sɨ
english: Many little frogs ran out and met with the doggy and orphan.

chokri: thə yô zû ū nō mə rə nū tʃê pô sɨ mə rə nū ɨ tʃê lɨ lâ vô hlò tē kə krê nâ mò lɨ ā nū n̥ê kō tə khrê bâ mò ō kə sɨ nâ lɨ vê ɨ vô o nō n̥ nɨ ā nū n̥ê pū khā n̥ tsɨ sɨ tò
english: The frog mother said to the orphan because I must care for my children I can never come to the house again but I will give you one of my children and all of you together will live in happiness.

chokri: sɨ sɨ sâ ū kō khɨ khò tâ
english: After that they separated.

chokri: thá dzɨ ao mɨ tʃê dzɨ lɨ rɨ lɨ mɨ kə nā kə mɨ zê sɨ ɨ n̥ hlɨ bâ yō ʃẽ kə krê nâ mò lɨ sɨ rá dzɨ rá hɨ n̥ī hī nō mə rẽ nō mɨ kə tsɨ nâ
english: Long ago in Ao country there were two young women living in much suffering because these two siblings were orphans.

chokri: pū nî zû sā kə tâ sâ ū pō n̥ thə nó kə sâ pù zɨ lâ i tâ
english: After their mother's death their father had received a new woman.

chokri: ū zû kə sâ ō nō rɨ lɨ n̥ī phɨ mō tsɨ rɨ kə tsɨ nâ pū u n̥ vô pū nū pù zɨ kə rə thɨ ɨ nō rɨ lɨ n̥ī hū vá
english: The new mother hated the two girls very much therefore she went and discussed with her husband about chasing them away.

chokri: rɨ lɨ n̥ī kə tsá lɨ vô tâ
english: The two girls went to the forest.

chokri: rɨ lɨ n̥ī kə tsá lɨ tɨ sɨ zô kə krô rū hù tâ rɨ ná kə tsɨ pù mó mû pū nî rə ná n̥ê sâ tsô tʃê n̥ê pù thɨ ɨ nō hlɨ sɨ dɨ tâ
english: After walking for many days in the woods the two young girls saw a small village and they built a house behind it and began to live there.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ nō tɨ tʃê mə tsɨ pū pū hlɨ thɨ kə dẽ vá a nō rɨ ná kō lɨ vô o nō thə mà kō dɨ pù bɨ ɨ n̥ hlɨ bâ sɨ pé sɨ sɨ jō
english: Each year God changed His appearance and went to the villages to see how people were living.

chokri: pù hnā pù kə mə nō pfɨ rɨ ná n̥ê lɨ khrā kə tɨ mɨ dò thɨ ɨ nō tʃê mō tî kō lɨ vô
english: One day God went to the little village pretending to be a beggar going into all the houses.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ nō tʃê lɨ mō tî kō kə tsò sɨ ā pô nō n̥ê kō tʃê lɨ lɨ vô rɨ lɨ ɨ vé mò lâ
english: God went to all the houses asking for my benefit will you let me in to rest?

chokri: hā kō vò ū nū mɨ nû bâ tē lē sɨ nâ nō m̄ pô hā tʃê lɨ lɨ
english: Our pig is giving birth just now therefore you cannot come in.

chokri: hā vɨ kō kò bâ kə tâ nâ n̥ pô hā tʃê lɨ lɨ vô o sɨ tē hō
english: Our hens are hatching that's why it's not to your benefit to come inside right now!

chokri: sɨ kə hmā â nō mɨ mɨ tî kō pū vā lâ vá
english: In a similar manner all the people repeatedly refused Him.

chokri: sɨ sâ kə mə nō pfɨ nō tà sɨ rɨ lɨ n̥ī tʃê lɨ vô tsō kɨ ɨ tʃê rɨ lɨ n̥ī kə tsò sɨ n̥ nɨ mə zâ rɨ ā pô tʃɨ zɨ n̥ī kō tʃê lɨ lɨ zɨ vé mē mò lâ
english: After this God walked to the two young ladies house and asked could I sleep in your house tonight?

chokri: rɨ lɨ n̥ī pū tʃê pô sɨ hā n̥ī hmā pù ɨ n̥ tsɨ kə tò bâ mò lē sɨ nâ n̥ pô hā tʃê lɨ lɨ vô kə tò mɨ n̥â lē
english: The young women said we have nothing to give because of this we would be ashamed to have you come into our house.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ pū nî tʃê pô sɨ n̥ pō tsâ a n̥ n̥ nɨ sɨ n̥ī kə bâ mō tɨ bâ sɨ nâ n̥ nɨ ɨ lɨ kə mɨ zê mò ɨ vé ɨ vô o nō n̥ nɨ zɨ hmā tɨ tò
english: God said use your grandfather to have all that you want so that you will no longer suffer I will come to eat with you.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ nō mē phû phɨ tʃê bâ a nō hmā tsho sɨ dɨ tâ
english: God sat near the fireplace and began to cook something.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ thə hlā sɨ pù pū pɨ pū pà a nō lê lɨ sɨ sɨ ʃī zɨ̄ ɨ nō khū tsɨ tshô ɨ
english: God took a grain of uncooked rice from his head and put it in the pot and cooked rice.

chokri: sɨ sâ pū phê χā sɨ nō hmā pù pū sɨ lê lɨ khā sɨ ɨ tɨ hù sâ thɨ vō thɨ tsho ɨ
english: Next he scratched his leg and put something into a pot and after some time pork was cooking.

chokri: ū kō hmā tɨ tsō kɨ ɨ sâ vô tʃê thô tsō bâ vâ
english: After having finished eating they all went to the back of the house to sit.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ n̥ rɨ lɨ n̥ī kə tsò sɨ hɨ hɨ só pù zɨ lâ lɨ hɨ só pù zɨ lâ ʃī zɨ̄ ɨ n̥ zɨ mō tɨ kō kə tsò sɨ
english: God asked the young women whose field is this whose field is that and asked about all of the fields.

chokri: nā tʃɨ pfɨ kə mə nō pfɨ tʃê pô sɨ zɨ hɨ hɨ ā dzɨ rá pfɨ hā n̥ī zā
english: The younger sister said to God this field belongs to us.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ nō sɨ sɨ sê kɨ ɨ tʃê ê dzô pū rə lɨ n̥ī tsɨ sɨ lɨ vê zɨ kə krê mō tî kō rɨ phɨ vá
english: When God heard this he gave a blessing to the young women but he cursed all the other fields.
